Dai Gao Zheng, Wang Ge GeLin Yue and Gu Chuan have been married for about a year. The two of them have very different opinions about their marriage and two very different personalities. Go Chuan, a structured, disciplined and busy lawyer, thinks that his wife's job has her on the edge of the law most of the time and that her life lacks discipline and order. Lin Yue, a loose and free-spirited painter, finds her husband’s meddling in her job as a freelance illustrator disrespectful and doesn’t welcome his attempt to “shape” her life for her, acting more like a drill sergeant than a husband. Finally, she has had enough, and the two of them start the divorce procedures, initiating the 30-day cool-down period.(Aired: Feb 10, 2025)

FAQ:1. DM for Request2. Title format is[Original Title]

[Male Lead], [Female Lead], [Second Male/Female Lead], etc...(unless I'm not familiar with the actors and wrongly misinterpret their names)3. Some of earlier uploads have subtitle file uploaded separately (.srt formatted files), you should download it too.4. All files have subtitles, either softsubs or hardsubs unless there's "RAW" on the description. RAW dramas will be re-uploaded if subtitles are found.5. If the subtitles didn't appear when you play the files, try manually turning on your video player's subtitle option.(Download the file, and open the video with your media player through your File Manager/Gallery. Then turn on the caption/subtitle option)➡️[Tutorial here]6. Occasionally will upload older dramas when there's not many decent dramas released on that dayor when I'm free.7. This channel is handled by 1 person only, so please bear with the flaws.8. Talk to me on my "Little Rambling" post 😉9.Please spread the channel, invite your friends and don't forget to leave comments!

资本小姐下乡后被婆婆带飞

Zuo Ming, Li Ruo QiZhong Siqi, a descendant of a modern medical family, transmigrates into a novel, becoming a pampered young lady from a wealthy family who is about to be exploited and lose her entire fortune. Using a spatial jade pendant she stole from the female lead, she takes money, sends her stepmother and the seemingly innocent female lead to prison, and then goes to the countryside to find her fiancé, only to discover that her future mother-in-law seems to have been reborn.
他似星河璀璨

Zhang Li Ren, Jin Chen Chen (Pan Hui Min)On the day they registered their marriage, Shen Qinghe was called nine times but her boyfriend Xie Ling never showed up. It turned out Xie Ling was proposing to her "white moonlight" (a term for someone who has a crush on someone else), and Shen Qinghe resolutely broke up with him. However, she unexpectedly met He Yan, and the two had a whirlwind marriage. After being pampered by her husband, Shen Qinghe realized she was actually the "white moonlight" of a powerful figure, and she thoroughly humiliated her cheating husband. Their married life is incredibly sweet.
夜莺与玫瑰

Chen Ming Hao, He Tian TianA gifted ballet dancer, at the peak of her career, was framed by her fiancé and stepsister, losing her left leg and tragically dying from poison. On her deathbed, the man she once considered a monster, the head of the Song family, sought revenge for her and died for her, revealing to her the depth of his love and affection. Reborn, she returns to the moment her fiancé tricked her into going to a casino to deliver money; she immediately retaliates against him and deliberately attracts his attention.
女老祖携宝下山，沈总竟折腰

Chen Guan Yi, Xu Si QiThe last female sword immortal, Shen Xi, sought to break the seal on her cultivation and searched for her lover, Jiang Ye, with her daughter. However, she became embroiled in the Jiang family's internal strife and the Chen family's forced marriage. She saved Jiang's father, received a dowry of 10 billion, and turned the forced marriage against him. At the wedding banquet, she humiliated Jiang Jian and Chen Qingxue, foiled their plot to seize her, exposed the fake Shen Xi, destroyed the villains, and joined hands with Jiang Ye to break the deadlock.
嫁神明

Yang Peng Cheng, Zhang Jin YiAfter Fu Zhen died in a car accident, Zhao Jiyuan, the last god in the mortal realm, resurrected her. However, an accident caused Zhao Jiyuan's divine power to transfer to Fu Zhen. At the same time, Fu Zhen's grandfather's will stipulated that Fu Zhen must marry in order to inherit the Fu Group. Faced with covetous relatives, Fu Zhen negotiated a cooperation with Zhao Jiyuan, and the two had a whirlwind marriage.
救命！我老公茶香四溢

Zeng Hui, Zhang Jin YiSeeing his beloved Pei Yan about to marry another, Fu Huaizhou, who had secretly loved her for nine years, laid a trap. He feigned close contact with her fiancé, Li Yueting, and under the guise of a "good brother," set a honey trap, personally delivering a "sexual assault" video to her on the eve of the wedding, completely shattering the engagement. Desperate, Li Yueting even drugged Pei Yan, falling right into Fu Huaizhou's trap. He appeared at the opportune moment, acting as a savior, and coaxed the delirious Pei Yan into signing the marriage agreement. This long-planned theft of her love finally succeeded.

东北爱情往事; 闪婚玫瑰

Liu Hao Qun, Guo Yu XinIn Northeast China during the 1990s, Yang Chunrong, a village girl who had run away from her arranged marriage, was rescued by Lu Binghe. The two entered into a whirlwind marriage due to their respective needs (she needed protection, and he needed family status for his brother's schooling). From a fake marriage to a real one, they fought against local bullies, thwarted conspiracies, and protected their family, showcasing the charm of old Northeast China. This transactional marriage eventually blossomed into a passionate love story, creating a legendary tale of love in Northeast China.
予她热忱

Duan Mei Yang, Li Ruo QiJiang Yuan's father abandoned his wife and daughter for money and power, leaving her deeply hurt. Her mother then took control of her life, forcing them to separate. Seven years later, Jiang Yuan and Xie Chen reunited at a Buddhist temple. Xie Chen relentlessly pursued Jiang Yuan, determined to marry her. Despite numerous obstacles, they overcame difficulties, gained Jiang Yuan's mother's consent, and dealt with Jiang Yuan's scumbag father. In the end, they reconciled and got married.
她的昼与夜

Wang Yi Lei, Zhai Yi YingTang Tang, a urologist, marries into the Shen family to save her mother, becoming the wife of Shen Juan, the richest man in Beijing's elite circles. However, she gets caught up in a family conspiracy and a mystery involving a dual personality. On her wedding night, she bumps into Shen Juan's sickly younger brother, Shen Xingye, and from then on, she finds herself caught between the aloof CEO Shen Juan and the gentle, sickly Shen Xingye.
抄家后她娇入骨，战神王爷偏要宠

Zhang Chi, Zhi Chun HeModern female doctor Duanmu Xuqing transmigrates into the body of the second young lady of an ancient family whose property has been confiscated. To save her family, she disguises herself as a man and becomes a servant to Prince Jing, Long Jingxiu. She gains trust by saving people with her medical skills and spatial abilities, and Prince Jing develops feelings for "her." She hides the secret of the Heavenly Fragrance Sacred Body and navigates conspiracies. After her true identity is revealed, the two join hands to break the deadlock, save their family, and find love.
挽风知烬

Shu Tong, Zhai Yi YingSu Wanwan's parents died in a car accident, and she was adopted by Fu Changlin, a friend of her father. Su Wanwan was determined to find out the truth behind the accident. She met Fu Zhoujin for the first time at her birthday party and learned that he had power over both the underworld and the legitimate world. She deliberately got close to him, wanting to use his power to find out the truth, but in the process of spending time together, her heart gradually fell for him.
新婚夜，装瞎老公不装了

Zhang Yun Tao, Dai Qi XuanShen Weiyu, who suffered abuse from a young age, was forced to marry Li Nanting, a blind young master of a wealthy family. Their meeting was not accidental, but destined. After their marriage, the two protected each other's identities, outwitted the wealthy family, and joined forces to create an AI technology business; while the secret of the legendary AI godfather, Master Qingyuan, slowly surfaced.
溺海蔷薇

Liu Lan Bo, Yang Luo QianThree years ago, Song Yuwei, a newly minted doctor, was preparing to bring her adoptive parents to Beijing to enjoy a better life when a car accident claimed their lives. She, however, escaped unharmed while driving under the influence. Gu Jiangshan's younger brother, Gu Huaiqing, fell in love with Song Yuwei at first sight. After learning Gu Huaiqing's true identity, Song Yuwei decided to seek revenge. When Gu Huaiqing, unable to win her heart, tried to grant Song Yuwei her freedom, he learned the truth.
瘦身男女之重量级恋爱

Ma Shi Yao, Liu Xi YuMini, to support her childhood sweetheart Kurokawa's pursuit of his musical dreams, overworked herself and became a 200-pound (100 catties) overweight girl. After her boyfriend became an overnight sensation, she only dared to pretend to be a fan and secretly follow his schedule. Having already given up on everything, Mini felt incredibly guilty upon learning that her boyfriend had been waiting for her and wanted to see her at Christmas. She contemplated suicide but was saved by her landlord, a fat man. To prevent the house from becoming a haunted house, the fat man used all available resources to help Mini lose weight.
被迫闪婚，其实冷面机长他超爱

Li Zhuo Yang, Pu Yu TongEmergency room doctor Lan Ying is framed by her own sister and forced to have a child through prostitution. However, she falls in love with wealthy pilot Gu Yunchi. They marry first and then fall in love. Despite family obstacles, she wins the pilot's exclusive affection. Together, they uncover the truth about Lan Ying's background and overcome misunderstandings to fall in love.
诱色逃离

Liu Lan Bo, Yang Luo Qian"Xia Zhikui, do you want to die?" The obedient Xia Zhikui harbored a secret—she wasn't born mute; her mother had poisoned her. Knowing the truth, she tried to escape countless times, only to be pulled back into the abyss each time, until she met the man named Yan Siye.
重生分娩夜，冷脸老公偏要宠

Ma Shi Yao, Wu Jia LuIn her past life, Qin Yuwan's entire family was tragically killed because of her doting adopted brother and best friend. A ray of Buddhist light descended, and Qin Yuwan was reborn on the night of her delivery. Reborn, Qin Yuwan successfully gave birth, humiliated her scheming, manipulative brother and his vicious, unrequited love, won back her husband from her past life, reclaimed her company, sent her manipulative brother and fake best friend to prison, and lived happily ever after.

Shi Kang, Tian Tian YiThe richest man becomes a vegetable? The substitute bride turns out to be me! Lin Shuwan, a greedy and dramatic womanizer, marries into a marriage to bring good fortune to her sister, thinking she'll become an overnight millionaire. But she bumps into Qi Yan, a vegetable-like husband who can hear her thoughts. Their hilarious daily banter unfolds, a story of marriage of convenience blossoming into love, villainous comebacks, and mutual pampering. When their mind-reading abilities activate in both directions, this dramatic couple's sweetness explodes, achieving success in both their careers and love lives!
领证当天，捡了个老公回家

Chen Rui Feng, Fang Si ChangOn the day Wenxi was to register her marriage, she was betrayed by her boyfriend Xu Sun. In a fit of rage, she impulsively married a stranger, Mu Yansen, as revenge. Their marriage began as a contract, and despite numerous obstacles, they gradually developed feelings for each other. When Wenxi discovered that Mu Yansen was actually the person who had helped her ten years ago, past misunderstandings and deep affection intertwined. Ultimately, they broke free from the shackles of their transactional marriage, confessed their feelings, and found fulfillment in their love. They became each other's strongest support, writing a romantic tale of destiny amidst the hustle and bustle of the city.
失控，暗戀對象總想撩我

Feng Yi Yang, Shi Yue YueOne night, an unexpected turn of events led the girl to spend the night with her best friend's brother, whom she secretly admired. They ended up getting married in a whirlwind romance. She initially thought this ill-fated marriage wouldn't last, but after the wedding, her best friend's brother showered her with affection and flirted with her, constantly tempting her. Later, she discovered that this was all part of his long-planned scheme, and that she was once his unrequited love.
烽烟红颜

Gao Ming, Zhai Cheng LuAfter military doctor Song Yunshu suddenly dies, she opens her eyes to find herself in the Republic of China! She, the daughter of a military governor, is not satisfied with marrying General Chen Haoting, and on their wedding night, he abandons her to pamper the scheming Lin Wanyi! Song Yunshu laughs, perfect, this life is no longer worth living!
穿书富家妯娌，我和闺蜜齐上阵

Xiang Shuai, He Yu Yang, Lin Jun Yi, He Ling YaoLin Nanqiao and Xia Linshi unexpectedly transmigrate into a wealthy family novel, becoming the wives of the twin brothers Ji Chi and Ji Yu, originally sisters-in-law with tragic fates. To change their destinies, the two join forces to save money and run away. During this journey, their relationship gradually changes, and they develop feelings for each other. When the original female lead, Xu Zhiyi, appears, their fates are once again put to the test.
失约的月光

Li Jing Ze, Tan Wen WenYan Zhaoyue accidentally discovers that her boyfriend, Xu Mo, a poor student she sponsors, is secretly using her luxury cars and watches to impersonate a rich second-generation heir and has smeared her as an older, desperately-married aunt. Yan Zhaoyue coldly laughs and takes back everything she gave Xu Mo. Xu Mo remains unaware, continuing to rely on her love, oblivious to the joke that is about to unfold.
顶楼俱乐部

Liu Xiao Xu, Zhong XiAfter her younger sister, Zhong Wan, is murdered by the Qin family, Zhong Xian, a working-class woman, attempts suicide to take them both down with her. However, Qin Feng, the eldest son of the Qin family, takes her to a high-society club and uses her to seek revenge. Amidst the family feuds, Zhong Xian instigates infighting among the Qin family, ultimately discovering a deeper conspiracy behind the revenge plot, and that the real struggle has only just begun.
冷小王，别来有恙

微光里的眷恋

Bai Hao, Zhang ShanA funny actress with a lot of negative news VS a milk dog actor, a star-chasing girl wears a female star and falls in love with her idol, using the system to enjoy a cheating life, sweet, cool and funny. This is the dream of many star-chasing girls.
一觉醒来嫁给了男神

Chen Zhi Hui, Wu Jia NiXia Xiaocheng, a sensitive high school student with low self-esteem, is accidentally hit by a football kicked by a cool and arrogant academic, and falls into a world ten years later in a daze!
失忆后，反派的占有欲藏不住了

Ma Fa Yang, Wang Wen JunThe cute face-hungry lady ✖️ madly criticizes the yandere and paranoid boss. The girl stops flirting halfway, and the paranoid yandere boss goes crazy and directly imprisons and forces love!

Sun Yi Xun, Li Xin YiJing Yun and Gu Zhuoyi are married according to their elders' wishes. Gu is a conservative person with sleepwalking. As they get along, Jing discovers Gu's childhood trauma. The two gradually fall in love, but misunderstandings create a rift!
深情沦陷，傅先生他超爱

Wang Xuan, Zhang ShanThe dark and venomous prince ✖️ The pure and lustful young lady, before the storm comes, gambles on an unforgettable fall. He is willing to accept the loss and avenge her with a sharp blade!
谁与你白头成眷

Wang Zi Yi, Cui Shi YiShe cuts off her ill-fated relationship, disappears from her household, and leaves, only to find herself trapped in a revenge trap set by her pursuer. Isolated and helpless, she breaks free on her own and lives a beautiful life of her own!
陆总，我们都重生了！别离婚

Feng Ming Chao, Chen Lu XiA bright and charming little drama queen ✖️ A paranoid and affectionate boss. He lost everything in his previous life, and repeated the same mistake in this one. His gamble paid off, and his girl finally fell for him!

Wu Hao, Chen Dou DouA handsome senior ✖️ A poor female student, a loving senior silently guards her for many years. Finally, after unremitting efforts, his love is finally seen by her, and her secret love finally comes true!

Chen Si, Yang Shu YuIn this game of love, Nan Ye Jue is the conqueror, the brutal plunderer. He gives Rong En ten days to compromise, then gradually closes in, completely destroying Rong En's once-normal life. The superior bows to love, but Rong En always remembers the pain he inflicted. Her unwavering clarity drives Nan Ye Jue ever more mad, and he's determined to keep her by his side at all costs.
小瞎子认错老公，糙汉大叔宠上天

Cao Tian Kai, Tian Xi WenThe blind girl Jiang Li accidentally fell in love with her fiancé's uncle for half a year. When her eyesight recovered, she found that everything was wrong and she had recognized the wrong person. But at this time, Xiang Ye had already been obsessed with Jiang Li, and his possessiveness was extremely strong. He would not allow Jiang Li to leave, and made an agreement that she could not leave for a month. When Jiang Li was struggling and in pain, her fiancé returned to China, and the uncle and nephew quarreled. After a month, what choice would Jiang Li make?
上错婚车后，我赖上冷酷谭爷

Wang Yu Bo (Wang Yin Qi), Han Zhong YuShe was tricked by her stepsister into getting on the wrong wedding car, and by mistake, she married the ruthless and critical CEO's uncle. Everyone was waiting to see her make a fool of herself, but unexpectedly, after the marriage, the CEO was tamed by her and became a love-brained person. He doted on her and she turned into her stepsister's aunt, holding her head high and doting on everyone!
弹幕警告别惹你老公

Wang Yu Bo (Wang Yin Qi), Li Yao YaoDanmu Warning! Don't mess with your husband, he's secretly in love with you! On the eve of her divorce, Wen Duo saw a screen full of spoilers, only to discover that her cold-faced CEO husband had long been paranoid. It turned out that what she thought was coldness was his deep affection that he tried hard to hide. A marriage game of extreme tension began!
海棠与妄

Jin Jia Yu, Shi Yue YueWen Haitang is ostensibly the daughter of Southeast Asian tycoon Wen Zhennan, but she's actually his concubine. Fu Wang conceals his true identity and disguises himself as a bodyguard to approach her, but in reality, he's gathering evidence to bring Wen Zhennan to justice and avenge his mother. From using each other to falling in love, the two team up to subdue Wen Zhennan, avenge their family, and protect her from suffering, becoming the light of each other's salvation.
炙烈

Zhao Zhen Dong, Cui Yi LiangLawyer Wen Xu leaves her law firm for a matter of principle and moves to Hong Kong Island. While staying at a sea-view guesthouse, she develops feelings for the owner, Zhou Lie. After overt and covert flirting, Zhou Lie reciprocates on a typhoon night. The two then agree on a three-month short-term relationship. Their feelings blossom, but a friend's accident forces them to return to North City. A repaired wedding dress Zhou Lie sends her evokes longing, and Zhou Lie travels across mountains and seas to North City. Setting aside their concerns, the two pledge their lives together with a wedding ring.
睡神学霸:他失忆后成了白月光

Zhang Ji Jun, Hu Xi XiThe heroine Jiang Youyou and her senior suddenly obtain the Exam God System. After the college entrance exam, the system tests her humanity by requiring her to choose between love and the Academic God System. However, upon entering university, she learns of Jing Sichen's death. Ten years later, Jiang Youyou reunites with the hero Jing Sichen, ultimately rediscovering her secret love.
群下芬德拉

Wu Bo Yan, Mao Jing XinJiang Wuxi, seeking revenge, uses her beauty and wit to maneuver between two men. Gradually losing herself in the pursuit of revenge, she seeks redemption amidst the entanglement of love and hate!

Chen Yun Ting, Yao HuiIn her previous life, Hua Qianqian married Xiao Yan, the son of the Bo family. She thought she could win him over with her true love, but he refused to consummate the marriage. Her dowry was taken away by her parents-in-law, and she was persecuted to death by her vicious sister, leaving her with a legacy of infamy. When she opened her eyes again, she experienced the day she slept with the scumbag. Since her husband had been so unkind to her, she severed the bond.
婚礼现场，嫁给前任死对头

Yang Yuan Gang, Zhang Yi LinOn the day of trying on her wedding dress, Bai Wei saw her fiancé Qin Yuan and her sister Bai Ran being intimate in the bathroom. When she was about to collapse, Bai Wei remembered what her mother said five years ago, so she decided to take her billions of assets and transfer them to Gu Jingchen, the deaf and mute young master of the Gu family! Bai Wei fought back and publicly announced her engagement to Gu Jingchen, severely slapping Qin Yuan in the face.
容爷的蓄意心动

Song Zhe Lun, Yuan XiaThree years ago, Su Yuanxi rescued a critically injured man, but lost her knife-wielding license and suffered psychological trauma. Three years later, she encounters Rong Yan, who aggressively pursues her. Rong Yan, the man she rescued, conceals his true identity and pursues her. After resolving the misunderstanding, he helps her investigate the explosion and her past, ultimately leading them to be together.
小祖宗千金归来，我是他的掌中娇

Wen Yu, Yu TianZuo Wu was taken back to the Zuo family from Yunxi Town, where she faced rejection from her birth mother, prejudice from her family, and the harassment of the fake daughter Zuo Tianxin. She defied harassment by solving classroom problems, earning admission to the Xingyu Gang. She also showcased her talents as a cellist and jewelry designer, uncovering Zuo Tianxin's schemes. Ultimately, she broke free from the Zuo family, bringing down both the Zuo and Yu families, and overcoming prejudice against her family background with her own strength.
换亲嫁世子，我照样风光当主母

Lin Rue Xue, Jin WangIn her previous life, Shen Wantang married a poor scholar and became the wife of a powerful official. Her elder sister, Shen Mingxuan, married the Prince of Ning but tragically died, forcing him to become a monk. After both were reborn, Shen Mingxuan insisted on marrying the poor scholar, but faced difficulties from her mother-in-law. Her husband, who misogyny and was imprisoned for his behavior, also misogynistically married. Shen Wantang entered the Ning Palace and was treated kindly by the Ning Prince and his wife. However, the Prince, Xiao Qingyuan, favored the scheming woman and was hostile to her. Shen Wantang repeatedly exposed her scheming, and Xiao Qingyuan repented and begged for a reconciliation, but she refused. She never sought love, but the position of mistress of the palace.
野狗吻月亮

Ma Hao Dong, Cai Zi YiReborn, Su Xia approaches the indifferent Xu Jiqing to repay her gratitude. After discovering the truth about his poor and difficult family background, Su Xia always chooses to warm him with her pure heart, and Xu Jiqing also silently protects Su Xia in his own way. After many twists and turns, the two redeem each other and finally bravely choose to embrace each other and face this relationship honestly.
问渠那得清如许

Shi Kang, Guo Xin RuiXu Ruqing, who married a gangster, became the wife of the richest man 13 years later, while her stepsister, who married an officer, became a widow early. Reborn in 1997, Xu Ruqing smiled at her stepsister who couldn't wait to marry a gangster in an attempt to change her fate. After all, the richest man was the richest man because his wife was her, Xu Ruqing.
高岭之花今天顾盼垂青了吗

Zhu Min Xin, Wu Chun YiWhen they first met seven years ago, he was a proud, prejudiced, and noble young master, mocking her for her "depravity." Seven years later, she has reached the pinnacle of power, while he has fallen into despair, becoming her pawn. A bargain forced the young woman of high status into submission. "Mr. Gu, you can play with me, but don't try to kick me out." When revenge meets addiction, and between sobriety and depravity, who will be the ultimate winner?

偏爱法则

After recovering from a high fever, she unexpectedly discovered she could understand animals! The Xia family seized Xia Zhining's animal vaccine patents and expelled the fake daughter to die. Zhang Si Fan, Zhai Cheng LuAt 18, a plane encountered severe turbulence, and Cheng Chiyu's voice saved Lin Zhiye. Six years later, she became a traffic controller, and upon their first encounter at a bar, she vowed to pursue him. Their paths crossed repeatedly at work, but he remained aloof, while she was passionate and forthright. A misunderstanding was resolved, and he voluntarily returned her earrings. They rescued her at the bar, pretending to be in love. Their voices reunited, and though he didn't recognize her, his heart was already moved. Finally, the flower of the mountain was melted.
替嫁冲喜真千金

Qian Zhe, Meng NaLuo Xingli, a proud daughter of heaven, finds her family in decline. In an attempt to save her comatose father, she becomes the fiancée of Song Zhiyu, a man in a vegetative state, only to discover he's secretly lurking. From tentative encounters to a collaborative partnership, the two navigate the machinations of wealthy families, patent disputes, and even kidnappings. Luo Xingli strikes back, uncovering the truth and disclosing her patents for the benefit of society, leaving her and Song Zhiyu's romance in suspense.
错撩后他反客为主了

Lin Hui Huang, Zhong Jia LingWriter Su Yi, who, after getting drunk, mistakenly takes Ji Hanchuan, the eldest son of the wealthy Ji family, as a male model and signs him as her assistant. Ji Hanchuan conceals his true identity and approaches her, setting off a long-planned heart-pumping game. The series has been recommended by multiple verified accounts on social media, generating significant buzz.
饲狼手册

Li Zhuo Yang, Zhao Yu XuanThree years ago, Shen Tingxu saved the seriously injured Lu Chen with a lace headband and mints. To protect her, Lu Chen infiltrated the Shen family under an alias and became her bodyguard. Shen Tingxu was used by her family as a tool for a marriage alliance and was forced to get engaged to Gu Jingxing. Deeply in love with Lu Chen, she made repeated bold attempts and declarations of affection, but was rejected by Lu Chen due to his dangerous status and his "duty." Desperate, Shen Tingxu graffitied the bridal shop mirror with a hint of an escape route from the church. On the wedding day, the bodyguards hijacked the bride...
错把老公当玄孙

Therefore, she must descend to the mortal world to help them improve their fortunes. Only after this success can she ascend to heaven. After learning Lin Han's true identity, she found a new lover and dated the poor singer Qing Chengyu. 凭爱意将她私有

Zhao Zhen Dong, Zhai Yi YingTo raise money for her grandmother's medical expenses, school beauty Li Xing becomes a "custom girlfriend." Lou Chong, posing as "Hunter," places a request, posing as a "Hunter," and threatens her with medical expenses, even promising to make her fall in love with him. As they get along, Li Xing gradually falls for him, only to discover that Lou Chong's kindness is motivated by guilt as her father once sacrificed his life saving his father. They break up and go abroad. Eight years later, they reunite, finally reconciled and together.
剧情崩坏！死了十一年的白月光回来了

Wang Nan, Zhao Mu YanEighteen-year-old Lin Mo travels back in time to the eleventh year after her death. She discovers her world is a novel, and she and her three younger brothers are merely tools within it. To save herself and her brothers from a tragic fate, Lin Mo begins a rebellion. Along the way, she suddenly discovers that the domineering CEO who has been silently accompanying her is actually the biggest variable in the novel's world.
娇刃

Zhang Zheng Yue, Peng YaoTo avenge her sister, Lu Jiao assumes her sister's identity and seeks to attach herself to the most powerful and insane tycoon. Sold to the tycoon by her family for marriage, he forces her to break off the engagement and abuses her upon first meeting her. She plays the role of a good boy, begging for mercy to stay with him while seeking revenge against the Jiang and Lu families, wreaking havoc in the business world. As they spend time together, they gradually fall in love, and he realizes she is the girl he'd been searching for that night. His desire to kill her becomes a willingness to sacrifice his life for her...
惊鸿掠野

Lan Bo, Wang Xiao YiLu Jingtang, the legitimate heir to the Xu family, was consigned to a mental hospital by her father, Lu Yunchuan, who coveted the family fortune, along with her stepmother, Zhou Yunrou, and their illegitimate daughter, Lu Linyan. Over the course of three years, she fought her way through the violent institution, becoming a fierce warrior with a fiery temper, driven by a single goal: revenge.
晚月落云舟

Cheng Cheng, Huang Yun YunIn his previous life, Li Wanzheng gave everything for Ye Mingxuan, but was tragically betrayed and tortured to death by Ye Mingxuan and Ruan Zhaozhao. Before his death, he learned that Lu Yunzhou, whom he had always hated, was protecting him. In his new life, Li Wanzheng decided to slap Ye Mingxuan in the face and protect Lu Yunzhou. The two of them fought against the evil together and finally lived a happy life hand in hand.
闪婚妈咪竟是帮派团宠

Wei Ruo Chen, Zhang Ruo ChenAt the banquet, the richest man Fu Yebai introduced his wife who came from the countryside and said, "My wife is new to Beijing. She is quiet and gentle. She doesn't understand all the twists and turns. Please take care of her." Those who were beaten black and blue by Su Moran were quiet and gentle. She is a gang leader who can beat ten people at once! Fu Yebai said, "My wife is naive and romantic. She doesn't know anything." Rich businesspeople from all over the world, her research and development has shocked the world. What's the matter with us almost wearing out our knees to cooperate with her? After Fu Yebai and Su Moran got married by contract, they developed feelings for each other in their daily interactions. Su Moran accidentally discovered that Fu Yebai's daughter was actually his own! The two of them got married naturally.
恰似南风遇凉栀

Upon seizing power, Kang Shaoqi becomes a demon, and the two marry but separate. Ruan then encounters "A Xing," a figure resembling her former love, Chu Nanfeng, whose scars are absent, raising suspicions. Ruan seeks to uncover the truth behind the explosion, angering Kang Shaoqi and prompting him to seek a divorce. Chu Nanfeng, meanwhile, returns, seeking revenge, and a cat-and-mouse game begins between the three of them.

the other was that her daughter Lu Nianlin, whom she had exchanged her life for, had been bullied by Jiang Yaoyao and her daughter for a long time and suffered from mental illness. Lin Zhao was furious. While beating her husband, she dealt with Jiang Yaoyao and her daughter to avenge her daughter. Lu Xun, who had been widowed for many years, finally waited for Lin Zhao to return, but he was sent a letter by his daughter for not raising his child well.
穿成年代文里的极品亲妈

Wang Hao Xiang, Yao Yu Chen (RAW)Transmigrating to the 1970s, Su Taotao faces two choices. 1. Follow the original novel's plot, abandoning her husband and children to return to the city to rekindle her childhood sweetheart; 2. Do nothing and wait for her cheap husband to show up six months later and take her back to the base for a feast. Su Taotao chooses the adorable human cub! As she raises it, she realizes its adorable intelligence seems to be a bit outrageous. Later, Su Taotao, with her fair complexion and long legs, appears at the base's family compound, holding the delicate and beautiful cub. How could it be possible? How could the cold and fierce Engineer Fu have such a beautiful family and such a lovable child? It must be an illusion!
重生之异能狂妻

一见钟情

Because they're in a long-distance relationship, Wen Xu initially only wants a three-month romance, but Zhou Lie can't let her go. When she refuses to see him, he travels thousands of miles to find her. This drama shows us that long-distance relationships are never an obstacle; two hearts in love can be close even when thousands of miles apart!

予我万丈光芒

As fate would have it, retribution will surely prevail, and the evildoers' evil deeds will soon receive their due punishment.

The two meet and fall deeply in love. Li Zhinan initially believes that the relationship began as a transaction of money and sex, but she doesn't realize it's a trap set by a tycoon disguised as a puppy.
绝对偏爱

Twenty years later, having become a powerful Wall Street woman, she reunites with her sister, Lin Xuan, only to learn that she and her husband had fallen to their deaths in the sea during their honeymoon. Rumors of Lin Xuan's murder surface online, prompting a wave of online rumors. Determined to investigate, she reappears at the Lu family's home, posing as her younger sister. But what about Lu Qi, who claims to be her younger sister's secret lover? It seems the Lu family's cousin is also having an affair with her younger sister. What secrets does the Lu family hold?
那时喜欢你

She exploited Rong Jianxue to reclaim her dowry and eliminate his spies, countering the Rong family's schemes. 狗一样可爱的老板

After waking up, she's transformed into a dissolute and foolish princess, becoming the emperor's favorite sister. Her free and easy modern soul has transformed her original foolish image. 穿书归来，炮灰男配不再当

Zhang Yun Tao, Zeng He Hui ZiChen Yehan and his good brother Chen Yang traveled through a book together! Chen Yang traveled through time and space as the vicious male supporting character in Bai Yueguang's novel, while Chen Yehan traveled through time and space as a handsome and sunny little puppy. Chen Yang is the little follower of the second female lead, and is a well-known veteran jealous husband. Chen Yehan is the sickly adopted brother of the female lead, gentle in front of people but crazy behind others. Everyone knows that the two are deeply in love with the two female leads, but they don't know that they are saving money like crazy in secret, getting closer and closer on the road to becoming a billionaire. When they were about to reach the final goal, the male lead came back! 青梅吻唇角

Zhou Hao Shan, Zheng Qian YiWen Mi pursued Jiang Yanchen for four years but was met with indifference. He Jue died in a car accident while saving her, leaving Jiang Yanchen indifferent. Reborn as a sophomore, Wen Mi sees Jiang Yanchen for what he truly is and begins to cherish He Jue, who doted on her. The two fall in love, but Jiang Yanchen regrets his actions, and He Jue declares Wen Mi his love.

Liu Hao Yuan, Li Shi QiAs a child, Zhou Shuhe was deeply hurt by her heartless father. During an extreme snowstorm in northern Beijing, she walked alone by the roadside, clutching the doll she had grown up with. She froze and fainted under the pounding snow. A Bentley pulled up, and a teenager in the back seat opened the door, scooped Shuhe up, and urgently rewarmed her before rushing her to the hospital. When Shuhe awoke, she had been properly cared for, but the teenager had gone to England. They met again years later. Shuhe had never imagined that her engagement would be to the legendary Shi Yu, the man who had snatched her back from the clutches of death. Before their marriage, they had exchanged very few words. Shuhe knew that Shi Yu, a son of a prominent family, would be distant and unfeeling. After marriage, she sought only to keep their relationship peaceful...
金榜有卿名

Li Qi Ge, Sun Qian XunSong Jingyuan, a successful modern woman, accidentally travels back to the family of an ancient tycoon and has to live as "Song Huanyuan", a man. She embarks on a road of counterattack through the imperial examinations and uses modern ideas to redeem the outstanding woman who is bound by feudalism. However, after becoming the top scholar and entering the court, she finds that what she ultimately has to fight against is the feudal imperial power.
手握团宠剧本，七小姐又美又飒

Zhang Nai Ge, Wang Qian HuiAfter eighteen years of wandering, Gu Xiyao returns to the Gu family in Beijing, only to be framed by her adopted daughter, Gu Yurou, and disdained by her grandmother as a country bumpkin. In reality, she's a gifted violinist, a luxury jewelry designer, and a master healer—all secrets. Pei Jingchen breaks off his engagement with Gu Xiyao, then flirts with her in secret. She wants to pamper her son and covet the domineering boss. She starts the game with a slay. 男主总是被迫臣服

Wang Ye, Liu Yan JunThe story revolves around the talented architect Gu Chen, who, due to his mother's inherited debts, falls under the control of the mysterious heir of a consortium, Lin Wan, and is forced into a "contract marriage." As they get along, he gradually discovers Lin Wan's hidden tenderness. Amidst conflicting interests, the two secretly develop feelings for each other, but Lin Wan is forced to create misunderstandings to protect family secrets, while Gu Chen struggles with his pride. As the truth behind an old case emerges, this "contract couple" work together to overcome the turmoil of business war and ultimately break free from the shackles of their identities, unfolding a moving story of forced submission to a shared love.
罪与爱同歌

However, when her attitude changed, Shen Tingchuan, out of curiosity about her, began to pursue her, only to discover that he had actually been secretly in love with her for a long time.
督军夫人重生后，带聋哑儿女过福宝人生

Fortunately, Lin Yanshu was reborn, and in this life, she decisively fought back, never to tolerate it again!

予我为饵

Zhang Zhi Wei, Liu YingBefore the age of eighteen, Song Xiazhi was a pampered little princess. However, on her birthday, a car accident took the lives of her parents. Qian Mei tricked her into giving away the key to the bank's safe. To protect the Shen family's interests, Shen Du arranged for Song Xiazhi to marry into the Tan family.
回到70年代霸道婆婆带我飞

Cai Xin Yang, Ma Xiao WeiJiang Nanxi, a modern office worker, unexpectedly found herself transmigrated into a beautiful, yet unintelligent, supporting actress from a novel set in a time of poverty. In the original novel, her 20-year-old fiancé, the protagonist, was stolen away by a 42-year-old woman, prompting her to marry Zhou Ji, the retired man. After their marriage, she resented him and even became entangled with him at home, ultimately leading to their divorce. Years later, she was disfigured and froze to death under a bridge while scavenging for scrap, while Zhou Ji became a business tycoon with businesses across the country. Determined to change her fate, Jiang Nanxi shed her former image and treated Zhou Ji and her mother-in-law with genuine sincerity, ultimately receiving unexpected warmth.
契约同居教授读心宠上天

Xia Hou Jia Sheng, Cao Qian YiThe well-behaved Jian You is an intellectually elegant student, a top student in the music department of a prestigious university. She also has a secret career as a prolific writer, cranking out 8,000 words a day. Professor Jiang Yunyi, a student at the same university, is young, promising, and handsome, making him a popular target for Jian You's fantasies.
姐姐的三条簪

Cai Xin Yang, Wang Ge GeDuring the Japanese invasion of the Ming Dynasty, Lan Baili was framed by her younger sister, Baozhu, for practicing martial arts. Using her "three hairpins," she and her friends killed a bandit, only to be falsely accused of losing her virginity. The pirates demanded she "kill the Japanese woman," but Baozhu, realizing her mistake, decided to die in her sister's place. Lan Baili led the women, using their hairpins as soldiers, to inspire the entire town to victory against the Japanese, and later joined the army alone.
诱她野

Min Jie, Long Yi Yi (Wang Jin)Chu Ci lost both of her parents when she was young. She thought that she would marry Lu Jingchuan after returning to China. However, he had a little secretary by his side. She slept with Lu Jingchuan's friend Ye Wujiu in a fit of anger. He couldn't afford to play with her and couldn't get rid of her.
贵女

Zhou Ke Jun, Yu Xin YiTo pay off her father's debts, Si Nian becomes Shen Wei's maid, suffering humiliation and having her work stolen. After Shen Wei falls unconscious in a car accident, Si Nian discovers her sister, Si Yan, has died at a high-society gathering. Determined to uncover the truth, Si Nian assumes Shen Wei's identity, using the alias "Lillian," infiltrates high society and engages in a maneuvering with Sheng Huaixu. Through repeated attempts and attempts, Si Nian is recognized by the crown prince, Sheng Huaixu. The two clash, yet gradually fall for each other, and Si Nian discovers the murderer is someone else.
非她不娶，花开半夏

Fu Han Yuan, Lin Zi RongLin Banxia, ​​a descendant of Traditional Chinese Medicine, is forced into marriage by a villain, leading to her falling off a cliff and losing her memory. A wealthy young man, Ye Tianhao, who has returned from abroad, rescues her from the cliff. She mistakes him for her fiancé, and on the eve of her pregnancy and wedding, the villain reappears to disrupt the situation. The child's origins remain a mystery, and her shattered memories force her to flee. The wealthy young man pursues his wife madly, his love transcending the mundane, demanding she marry no one but him.
风月不识君

Wang Yu Wei, Cheng Yi YiIn her previous life, Zhuang Miaoyun was betrayed and poisoned by her lover Bai Ze and Princess Cheng Xinyuan. After her rebirth, she purchased Cheng Xinyuan's three male favorites and secretly cultivated her own power. One of them, Xingchen, is actually Su Yunyi, the prince of Linyuan Kingdom. Joining forces with Su Yunyi, she leverages her business acumen and past-life memories to launch a coup on her wedding day and ascend the throne as empress. From exploiting each other, the two gradually develop a true love. At the end, Zhuang Miaoyun is pregnant with Su Yunyi's child, signaling the future unification of the two kingdoms, to be inherited by the next generation.
乔先生,夫人她飒爆全场了

Su Wan hides her identity to investigate her mother's death, but when faced with repeated challenges in the workplace, she reveals her incredible business acumen, repeatedly striking back against the villains. Qiao Yanchen appears to be a cold-hearted CEO, but secretly protects his wife. The two go from a contract marriage to a truly loving relationship. During this time, Su Wan repeatedly amazes the audience with her powerful disguises (hacker, racing driver, antique appraiser), while Mr. Qiao transforms into a doting wife-loving man. Together, they navigate family strife and business competition, ultimately uncovering the truth behind the Su family's conspiracy dating back twenty years.
未世降临, 18楼不好惹

Their tentative intentions led to a partnership, a quest to rescue a close friend and confront the villains who taunted her. In times of crisis, she fought alongside her allies, bringing their enemies to their own ruin. She and Huo Yishen fell in love, and together they faced an even harsher apocalyptic future.

Zhang Yun TaoDuring a difficult childbirth, Qiao Manman was betrayed by her fiancé Qin Muyu and her sister Qiao Shiya, and was told, "Don't have any children, big or small." Near death, the mysterious "Nine Lord" ordered her rescue. She fled overseas with one child, but returned five years later under multiple guises, seeking revenge. She discovered that the twins and the other child were still alive, and that "Nine Lord" was the child's biological father. Ultimately, she reclaimed everything and found happiness.
以爱为镜探真意

Wang Bo, Gong Fang NiAn Yining devoted five years to Shen Zhiyan, and her father even died trying to raise money for Shen's medical treatment. However, all of this was a lie from Shen Zhiyan, who claimed he was the crown prince of the Beijing entertainment industry. He then teamed up with Lin Weiwei to humiliate An Yining. Disappointed, An Yining left and met her true love, Gu Jingchen.
双嫁

Zhang Zheng Yue, Dai Qi XuanIn her previous life, Xie Minglan was granted a first-rank imperial decree and enjoyed immense prosperity. Xie Molan, however, was a young widow, trapped in a Buddhist temple. Jealous, Xie Molan assassinated Xie Minglan, only to find them reborn, returning to the day they had married together years earlier. This time, Xie Molan desperately sought to marry the impoverished Prince Pei, believing this would exchange their fates. Unbeknownst to her, she was setting herself on a path of no return.
国民影帝暗恋我

Wang Chen Peng, Zhu Mo YanIn her previous life, Li Jin was betrayed by her family and boyfriend and died. She then chose to see Yu Qianfan, the movie star with a crush on her, as her enemy. Yu Qianfan waited 55 years for Li Jin's rebirth. Reborn, Li Jin, armed with memories of her past life, returned to the entertainment industry, exposing her family's hypocrisy and reclaiming what was hers. Eventually, they fell in love and married.
明明明月留不住

Yu Lun Hao, Liu Mei NaA year ago, Fu Mingyue fell in love with her senior, Fang Yuchuan, but Fang Yuchuan hid the fact that he already had a fiancée. Upon learning of this, Fang Yuchuan's fiancée, Chu Yue, sought revenge against Fu Mingyue, destroying her family and leaving her homeless at school. In desperation, Fu Mingyue, guided by her friend Qiao Yan, decided to seduce Li Huaian, the most aristocratic son of North City, to seek revenge on the Chu family. Fu Mingyue and Li Huaian tested and exploited each other, developing true feelings amidst their pretense. Fu Mingyue used Li Huaian to bring down the Chu family and avenge her parents. After a series of hardships, the two finally realized their feelings for each other and, overcoming numerous obstacles, came together.
春日浓情

Wang Bo, He ShiAfter years in the countryside, Jiang Yinong returns to Yuncheng to disrupt the relationship between her half-sister Jiang Jinjin and Huo Yanzhou, seducing him. Simultaneously, she leverages Huo Shizhou's influence to avenge her mother's tragic death at the hands of Liu Fenlan and Jiang Jinjin. She schemes to make Huo Yanzhou fall in love with her, only to find herself drawn into his trap. They protect each other, overcoming their respective challenges. It also transpires that Huo Yanzhou's long-cherished benefactor is not Jiang Jinjin, but Jiang Yinong. Ultimately, the two finally become a couple.
为你设定的心动

Zhang Chen Xiao, Song Yan ZhiLu Chuan's AI dating system accidentally sets Su Wan as its only match, and the two gradually develop real feelings through the system's "heart-beating mission." As their relationship deepens, Lu Chuan discovers that Su Wan is actually the girl he rescued in his childhood, while Su Wan gradually uncovers Lu Chuan's past, which was closed off by family trauma. In this collision of virtual programming and real-life emotions, the two break free from the system's constraints, rewrite the program with their true hearts, and ultimately forge a true love that transcends data and reality.
欲吻桑枝

Jin Jia Yu, Zhang Jiu ZiIn order to attract investment, her boyfriend, with whom she had been in love for seven years, sent Sang Chuzhi to his uncle Shang Yuzhou's bed. Unexpectedly, the heartless Shang Ye not only did not kick her out but also quickly got a marriage certificate with her. What she didn't expect was that all this was actually planned by Shang Yuzhou for a long time.
烬雪染红妆

Wang Hao Zhen, Bai Xu HanNing Zhibai accidentally rescues warlord Duan Yanze on a train. Recognizing her as the daughter of the Ning Mansion, Duan Yanze, whom he's obsessed with, forces her into marriage, threatening the Ning family's safety. After enduring the turmoil of her adopted sister, her fiancé's kidnapping, and even a life-saving gunshot wound, Ning Zhibai's hatred turns to love, and the two finally reaffirm their deep affection amidst the flames of war.
穿书后我把反派霍爷拿下了

Zhan Wei (Zhan Zhuo), Zhao Mu YanAfter a car accident, Jiang Su is transported into the novel and becomes the wife of the deceased patriarch, Huo Jinghuai. She must win over the protagonist to return to reality. Mistaking Huo Yunshen for the protagonist, she aids him in his fight against Huo Jinchen, only to realize her wrong side when Huo Jinchen is injured and suffers backlash. Huo Jinchen's suspicions of Jiang Su eventually develop feelings for her. Through a series of events, Jiang Su joins forces with Huo Jinchen to resolve the crisis, forgoing her chance to return to the real world to start a family with Huo Jinchen and their child, and live happily ever after.
罪与爱同歌

Lin Feng Song, Wan Wan'erFive years ago, Lin Shen's miscarriage of justice led to Su Wan's sister's unjust suicide, forging a blood feud between the two. Five years later, Su Wan returns as a criminal psychology expert, ostensibly assisting the police in solving the case, but secretly investigating the truth behind it. As the case progresses, Lin Shen discovers Su Wan's revenge plan is far more complex than he imagined, while Su Wan also discovers a hidden story behind Lin Shen's miscarriage of justice. When guilt and true love intertwine, can the two overcome the shackles of hatred?
薄总，夫人又在装乖骗你了

With the help of an old lady and the provocations of a villain, their relationship blossomed, and Bo Yu's self-control led him to fall deeply in love. From contracted couple to working together to overcome crises, Shen Zhiyi finally shed her pretense, and the two discovered true love.
认错攻略对象后，反派他好感度爆表

In the original novel, the entire Jiang family suffered a tragic death, all caused by the utterly insane and powerful Prince Pei Jing. The system tasked her with revising the plot: as a vicious supporting character, she would follow the original novel's storyline, first marrying Wei Mingzhen, the third son of the Dingyuan Marquisate, then torturing her younger sister-in-law, the original heroine Wei Ciying, as her sister-in-law. Finally, she had her entire family murdered by the villainous Prince Zhaoning, Pei Jing, who was in love with Wei Ciying.

Jin Jia Yu, Zhang Jiu Zi[HERE]2. 烬雪染红妆 - Wang Hao Zhen, Bai Xu Han[HERE]3. 以爱为镜探真意 - Wang Bo, Gong Fang Ni[HERE]4. 明明明月留不住 - Yu Lun Hao, Liu Mei Na[HERE]5. 薄总，夫人又在装乖骗你了 - Ma Ming Yu, Gou Yu Xi[HERE]6. 穿书后我把反派霍爷拿下了 - Zhan Wei(Zhan Zhuo), Zhao Mu Yan[HERE]7. 罪与爱同歌 - Lin Feng Song, Wan Wan'er[HERE]8. 国民影帝暗恋我 - Wang Chen Peng, Zhu Mo Yan[HERE]9. 诱君心 - Wu Zhu Xi, Yuan Yu Xuan[HERE]10. 认错攻略对象后，反派他好感度爆表 - Chen Yun Ting, Jin Ya Na[HERE]11. 双嫁 - Zhang Zheng Yue, Dai Qi Xuan[HERE]12. 春日浓情 - Wang Bo, He Shi[HERE]13. 为你设定的心动 - Zhang Chen Xiao, Song Yan Zhi[HERE]
诱君心

Wu Zhu Xi, Yuan Yu XuanThe clever and sweet He Jiaojiao travels to an imaginary ancient world and becomes Princess Hua, on the verge of being murdered by the Regent. To survive, she must navigate the seemingly cold and ruthless Regent while searching for a way back to the present. A coquettish princess flirts with the villain. A cold-blooded prince breaks his vows for her, and her flirtatious ways earn her the heart of her husband!
折腰

Wu Xi Ze  (Caesar Wu), Yue Yu Ting(Prisoner of Beauty)The war is raging, and the world is in chaos. Every step is carefully planned to win the emperor's heart. See how Roushui Xiaoqiao can soothe the cold-faced Wei Shao and navigate the dilemma between love, hate and power.
七零辣媳当家

An Zi Yang, Xu DanTraveling back in time to the 1970s, jumping into a river and being rescued by the wealthiest educated youth? Food blogger Gu Qingqing binds herself to a takeout space system—making money from food and striking it big with her beauty! Clinging to the educated youth boss Lu Xiangyang, she can both bully the scumbag and get rich. Who says time travel means only misery? I want it all!
他肆意妄为

Cao Tian Kai, He Tian TianLin Yu, an ordinary woman who is unexpectedly embroiled in a powerful family feud. She is framed, bullied, and subjected to relentless oppression. Yet, Lin Yu, with her indomitable spirit, fights back against adversity with wisdom and courage. She befriends a group of like-minded friends and joins forces to fight evil. Along the way, Lin Yu finds true love and uncovers a vast conspiracy. She rises from a weakling at the mercy of others to a powerful figure who controls her own destiny and makes those who once acted recklessly pay the price. The story unfolds in a captivating and moving manner, filled with passion and heartwarming emotion.
入骨暖婚

Chen Jian Yu, Xiong An NiLin Xueluo marries into the Feng family, mistakenly mistaking her brother-in-law Feng Xinglang for her husband Feng Lixin, and falls into a pseudo-forbidden love affair. Feng Xinglang, misunderstanding her as a money-grubber, misunderstands her deeply, and goes from pretending to test her to loving protection. Upon learning that Lin Xueluo is being schemed against and harassed by her uncle's family, Feng Xinglang secretly helps her resolve the situation. Lin Xueluo gradually falls for Feng Xinglang, but struggles with her married status. When the truth about her identity is revealed, Lin Xueluo is enraged and heartbroken, determined to divorce him. Feng Xinglang then embarks on a grueling pursuit of his wife. Ultimately, Lin Xueluo sees Feng Xinglang's true heart and learns that the little boy she saved in her childhood was actually Feng Xinglang, clearing up all misunderstandings between the two.
捡个小福宝，全城争当女儿奴

Zhang Li RenWhen Sui Sui's mother passed away, abandoned and bullied by her family, she was adopted and cherished by the wealthy He Huaichuan. Unexpectedly, Sui Sui possessed a koi-like physique and could even communicate with plants. Along the way, she helped the He family catch spies, solve crimes, and rescue people, quickly becoming the beloved darling of the wealthy and powerful throughout South City. Not only did she personally bring the bad guys to justice, she also uncovered the truth behind her mother's death. At the birthday party, amidst applause and well wishes, Sui Sui's mother unexpectedly returned.
春山暄

Ma Shi Yao, Wei Fan ShuWen Wanning was filming in Northeast China on a snowy night, at -20 degrees Celsius, when her family car broke down. Soon, a shabby Santana pulled up, and seventeen-year-old Ling Ye emerged, tools in hand, his eyes apathetic. On impulse, Wen Wanning took him back to Shanghai, accompanied him to get hearing aids and visit Disneyland. She watched him break records on the track and be spotted by a European racing scout—she had discovered this star amidst the rubble, and had once wanted to be the big sister behind a world champion. It wasn't until after the graduation performance, hungover, that she woke up and remembered wanting to kiss Ling Ye the night before, and he, usually silent, hadn't flinched.
炮灰女主，但满级通关

Liu Yi Long, Qin Tian Ai (RAW)Su Wan, discontent with the novel's heroine, Song Qingye, who suffered a sudden death due to her unpleasant ending, travels back in time to become Song Qingye and awakens a system that demands she make her cheating husband, Lu Jingshen, regret his actions or face obliteration. Lu Jingshen brings his son, Lu Chenxuan, who has been brainwashed by his "white moonlight" Lin Chuchu, to confront him about breakfast. Despite Song Qingye's high fever, Lu Chenxuan assaults and kicks her. The system demands a gentle apology, but she instead throws milk at him and files for divorce...
穿书七零我搞科研风生水起

Wu Lin, Peng DanLin Jianchun, a physics teacher at a modern university, accidentally travels through a book and becomes the "deceased ex-wife" of the 1970s male protagonist Lu Xuanzhou. To reverse her fate, she outsmarts villains, saves the wounded, and leverages modern knowledge to develop a CT machine, breaking the foreign technology monopoly. Meanwhile, she and Lu Xuanzhou, a soldier in hiding, develop a relationship that blossoms from misunderstanding to understanding. Ultimately, they achieve success in both their career and their love life, becoming beloved by their entire family and embarking on a life of happiness together.
穿回被夺舍的第三年，崽崽他爹黑化了

Zhang Yun Tao, Zeng He Hui ZiXu Chuxia was possessed by a captivated woman for three years. When she returned, her once gentle and caring husband had become a cold-faced devil, her lively and adorable son had grown into a bratty brat, her well-behaved and sensible daughter had become timid and cowardly, and her own reputation had been shattered. A ruthless person with few words, Xu Chuxia rolled up her sleeves and got to work! She educated her children, seduced her husband, and pursued her career with vigour, ultimately winning back everything that belonged to her.
许你一世如初

Wang Zheng Rui, Gao Man'erBetrayed by her boyfriend, An Ruchu is forced by her mother to enter into a flash marriage contract with her eldest brother, Shi Yuting. She feigns agreement and flees late at night, only to be personally apprehended by him—revealing she was once his savior. When her ex-lover returns, her narcissistic stepsister repeatedly assaults her, and she retaliates. A madly savage woman seeks revenge on her, and he cleans a warehouse to protect his wife, but she retaliates in kind. The contract is exposed, and infighting within the wealthy family escalates. True love and conspiracy intertwine. This marriage, which began as a bargain, will ultimately end in either the wedding of the century or the divorce of the century...
风起时相爱

Liu Jia Rui, Chen Yi JieTo repay a favor, the glamorous lawyer Xu Qingwu agrees to an arranged marriage, but a twist of fate forces her to marry her best friend, Cen Xihuai, the uncle of a business tycoon known for his strict, aloofness. While initially hoping for a mutually non-interfering contractual marriage, Cen Xihuai meticulously fulfills his "husband's duties," moving from twice-weekly intimacy to regular romantic dates, meticulously documenting his progress with a memorandum of understanding. As Xu Qingwu repeatedly confronts her best friend and defuses crises, she gradually falls in love, only to discover that this erroneous marriage was the product of his long-term, calculated depravity. Ultimately, the unassuming beauty falls from grace, and the contractual marriage becomes a destined, fairy-tale romance.
前夫哥，请叫我嫂子

Wu Tian Hao, Yue Yu TingTo exact revenge on her ex-boyfriend Liang Tianche, who broke up with her unjustly, Xu Danxi seduces his twin brother, Liang Qichen. What she believes is a flawless "money-making plan" turns out to be Liang Qichen's tacit approval. His brother's strife and Xu Danxi's betrayal drive Liang Tianche completely insane, and he resorts to extreme means to force Xu Danxi back. Faced with a loyal and overbearing brother and a mad and paranoid younger brother, what choice will Xu Danxi make?
闪婚对象竟是宠妻巨鳄

Tao Si Yuan, Zhou Zhao ZhaoTo escape the pressure of a family marriage, the heroine enters into a whirlwind marriage with a stranger, only to discover he's the cold-hearted CEO of a multinational corporation. While seemingly a business marriage, the drama conceals a long-held secret love for the hero. The drama showcases the intense dynamics of workplace competition and the sweet interactions between the hero and heroine, as they transition from contracted marriage to true love. While seemingly cold, the hero dotes on his wife relentlessly, clearing obstacles for the heroine's career, outsmarting rivals, and even exposing his hidden identity.

夺宠

Shen Hao Nan, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun)He Junting, the prince of the Hong Kong circle, becomes a third party for love, hiding his identity to accompany Yu Feiwan, using his love to redeem Yu Feiwan, enduring the bitterness in his heart but unable to see his identity. All of this originated from her redemption of him in his youth, a secret love, several coincidences, but they were all his long-planned plans.
京华一梦

Ming Chuan, Chang Dan DanJi Lingruo, a young lady from a prominent family, and the young general Lan Siheng fell in love when they were young. Before Lan Siheng left for the battle, he promised to marry her when he returned. However, after his return, Lan Siheng changed his mind and fell in love with someone else.
佛月漾尘

Tang Zhi Xuan, Zhu Xin YuH Country film queen Lin Zhiyang (Lavy) returns to China for a marriage proposal. At the airport, she accidentally touches actor Qi Yanchen, earning her accusations of hype. Qi Yanchen, in turn, misunderstands her. Unexpectedly, the man she's planning to marry is Qi Yanchen, and he offers to clear the air for her. Lin Zhiyang, at her grandmother's request, appears on a dating show, facing isolation. Her grandmother assigns Qi Yanchen to protect her, and their relationship gradually blossoms during the show.
她的小新欢

Wang Pei Yan, Liang Wen JingLi Su and her fiancé's younger brother had a flash marriage. Three months into her search for her missing fiancé, Li Su finally received the good news that he'd returned home, only to discover he'd lost his memory and married someone else! Heartbroken, Li Su went to a bar that night to get drunk, only to run into Huo Xuanye, her ex-husband's younger brother. "Sister, don't you just love his face? I'm his younger brother. Let's get married, and I'll be his body double!"
越界时心动

Dong Yi, Yang Luo QianA misdiagnosis prompts Jiang Wan to plan a night of absurdity with her secret crush, Shang Chi. Upon learning of the misdiagnosis, she flees in panic. After becoming a top international psychiatrist and returning to China, Jiang Wan faces family disputes and past grudges. She takes a risk and approaches Shang Chi, only to discover a hidden secret to his illness. In this dangerous relationship, who is the true hunter?
轻舟渡棠

Wang Bing Xiang, Lei Fu ManSu Tang, having made a deal with Fu Qingzhou due to the Su family's bankruptcy, later seeks refuge by agreeing to marry Fu Qingzhou's nephew, Fu Xiao. Fu Qingzhou, unable to forget his past feelings for Su Tang, constantly interferes in her life, and the two are entangled in family interests and emotional entanglements. During this period, Su Tang faces threats from her former creditor, Jiang Hai, and exploitation from her adoptive family. Fu Qingzhou remains loyal to her, ultimately overcoming obstacles, recognizing their true feelings, and working together to face the crisis and achieve happiness.
这个年下心思野

Zhu Zhe Ren, Huang Ning XinBecause of He Jiansen's "life-saving grace," Xia Yin is forced to marry his son, He Songshi. However, He Songshi is obsessed with protecting his non-blood relative, Duan Wenxin, and even skips their engagement party to take Duan Wenxin to the hospital, embarrassing Xia Yin. Meanwhile, Xie Zhuo, who has had a crush on Xia Yin for years, returns home, intending to snatch her away, but changes his plans due to He Songshi's absence. He plays the role of a weak "brother" in front of Xia Yin, but privately acts like a strong "wolf dog," using the "tea-for-tea" method to counter Duan Wenxin's provocations and He Songshi's difficulties, ultimately protecting Xia Yin.
野女孩

Li Ruo Xun, Tan Yan YanLiu Xiaorou was abducted to a remote village and nearly forced into marriage. In the face of danger, she risked her life to escape from the countryside back to the city. When she was stuck in a quagmire, Xiang Baikai became the only ray of light in Liu Xiaorou's dark life. A wild rose among thorns will eventually break free from the cage of fate.*splitted into 2 parts due to file size
隐婚大作战

Qin Chen Chen, Lin Jun YiTo fulfill his grandfather's last wish, Gu Yuchuan agrees to marry Lu Mingxi, who desperately needs money to save his father. Gu Yuchuan can hear Lu Mingxi's inner voice. As they get along, they gradually fall in love, but are obstructed by Tong Mo and Xu Zhiyan. They also experience Gu Yuchuan's amnesia and other twists and turns. In the end, Gu Yuchuan regains his memory, finds Lu Mingxi, and the two finally become a couple.
野火烧过的春天

Zhang Ting Rui, Zuo Yi, Sa Gang YunA rural girl, Liang Muen, is imprisoned for hacking someone to death to protect her sister. Upon her release, she learns that her childhood sweetheart, Xiang Tianya, has been murdered and captured by the wealthy Xiao family. Transformed into a goddess of vengeance, she infiltrates the Xiao family, stalking the inner workings of the wealthy family, turning powerful fathers and sons against each other, and husbands and wives into enemies. When hatred meets sincerity, when the chessboard of revenge meets the thrill of love, how will she choose?
爱在重逢时

Jin Ze (Garvey Jin), Wu YiCheng Qingmiao was once secretly in love with Pei Huaiyu, but they broke up due to a misunderstanding and she gave birth to a daughter alone. They met again seven years later, but Pei Huaiyu did not recognize her. He then started to chase his wife to the crematorium, and finally they reunited.
