Shen Hao Nan, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun)[HERE]2. 野火烧过的春天 - Zhang Ting Rui, Zuo Yi, Sa Gang Yun[HERE]3. 她的小新欢 - Wang Pei Yan, Liang Wen Jing[HERE]4. 越界时心动 - Dong Yi, Yang Luo Qian[HERE]5. 轻舟渡棠 - Wang Bing Xiang, Lei Fu Man[HERE]6. 佛月漾尘 - Tang Zhi Xuan, Zhu Xin Yu[HERE]7. 这个年下心思野 - Zhu Zhe Ren, Huang Ning Xin[HERE]8. 隐婚大作战 - Qin Chen Chen, Lin Jun Yi[HERE]9. 野女孩 - Li Ruo Xun, Tan Yan Yan[HERE]10. 爱在重逢时 - Jin Ze (Garvey Jin), Wu Yi[HERE]11. 京华一梦 - Ming Chuan, Chang Dan Dan[HERE]
弟弟班主任居然是我初恋

Shu Tong, Song Yu JiaWhen his younger brother falls in love at school, the homeroom teacher calls the parents. With his mother away on a business trip, Chu Qing goes to see the homeroom teacher on her behalf. Unexpectedly, the teacher turns out to be Chu Qing's first love, Gu Xiang. After the college entrance exam, Chu Qing heartlessly dumped Gu Xiang. She spent a night in the snow downstairs begging for a reconciliation, but Chu Qing refused to come down to see her. Seven years later, they meet again, and Gu Xiang still can't forget Chu Qing.(Aired: Apr 8, 2025)
独宠炙爱

Wu Tian Hao, Yang Zhi WenIn her previous life, Si Nian was framed by the scumbag's sister and her family was destroyed. In her new life, she became the queen of revenge. She tore the scumbag apart, beat up the mistress, and helped her mother escape from an unhappy marriage. On the road to revenge, Si Nian's true heart was frozen, but Fu Yun Shen broke in forcefully.(Aired: Apr 22, 2025)
暖阳面馆

Shu Tong, Zhang Chu XuanThe life of laid-off workers in a noodle shop. The little people break free from the constraints of the times and gain a foothold in the new era. They rely on a bowl of hot noodles to survive the wind and snow of the millennium and cook through the ups and downs of the times.(Aired: Jul 7, 2025)
八零晚风微微甜

Shu Tong, Liu Mei NaThe heroine transmigrates into a novel set in the 1980s and becomes Su Wan, the supporting actress in the novel who commits suicide by jumping into a river to force the hero to marry her, only to suffer a tragic fate. To avoid the same fate as in the book, Su Wan refuses to marry the hero, Huo Xiaohan. However, her younger sister, Su Xiaohui, is jealous of her beauty and repeatedly frames and schemes her, deepening Huo Xiaohan and the Huo family's misunderstanding of Su Wan.(Aired: Feb 8, 2025)
九重春色锁干岁

Song Yi Fan, Ma Qian QianShen Nanqiao was poisoned by her husband, Ning Ziyu, and her half-sister, Shen Jingyi. On her deathbed, she saw the powerful and influential Ning Su, who had been ambushed while begging for her, and came back gravely injured. Only then did she realize his long-hidden love for her. Reborn, she openly regretted the engagement and insisted on marrying Ning Su. After marriage, he protected her, and she would not tolerate anyone dishonoring his reputation. One day, while investigating a case at the Q Building, Shen Nanqiao was shocked to discover that Ning Su was not a true eunuch—he was actually a prince who had been exiled to the common people.
在她掌中沦陷

Li Ruo Xun, Shi Ye JingAfter a car accident, female CEO Zheng Yan transmigrates into a novel and becomes the vicious supporting actress Wen Mingyun. To save her real-life sister, Zheng Luo, she must accumulate viciousness through the storyline. She outsmarts the script and seizes power, only to encounter Wen Xingxing, who bears a striking resemblance to her sister, and the affectionate Cheng Yu. The truth is revealed: this world is a virtual dimension created by Zheng Luo, the vegetative state where Zheng Yan resides, and has been rebooted six times. Cheng Yu, who retains his memories due to an earlier awakening, pursues this persistent search. Ultimately, Wen Mingyun gives up returning to reality and chooses to restart this virtual world with Cheng Yu, where "him" exists.
救命，攀错高枝了

Zheng Feng, Chang Dan DanJiang Fei, transmigrated as a cannon fodder supporting actress, accidentally flirts with the arch-villain Pei Jing. Upon realizing this, she flees, only to be met with relentless pursuit by Pei Jing. This veneer of chase and flight only draws them closer. It's only when they learn the system's purpose is to restore order that they realize their unlikely encounter was fate's most meticulously orchestrated plan.
盛夏挽晴天

Liu Hao Yuan, Li Ya YaZhang Qingtian, whose family has been drained of their money, is determined to change his fate by participating in a talent show. However, during his debut, an accident occurs and his soul is swapped with Gu Shengxia, the helmsman of the entertainment empire, and he is transported back a month. In order to prevent the other from destroying their original destiny, the two become contracted lovers and work together to find the truth behind the time travel. As their hearts and trust grow, they unexpectedly master the secret of body swapping.
穿书后我抱紧老公大腿

Wang Wei Yang, Li Ruo XiThe heroine transmigrates into a novel as a vicious supporting character, clinging to the hero to avert her inevitable death. She first dispels his suspicions about his original self, then exploits a bug when the system forces him to declare his affection for the second male lead, eventually winning him over. After her rebirth, the heroine abandons the second male lead for the hero, but ultimately triumphs and remains with him.
笼中鸟，烬中生

Luo Zheng, Zheng Cu ChenAfter Su Nianwan's mother passed away, she was adopted by her uncle Lu Chengyu. Lu Chengyu exercised mental and behavioral control over her in the name of protection. However, the appearance of her childhood sweetheart Gu Yanzhi gave her hope of freedom. During this period, she resisted Lu Chengyu and got close to Gu Yanzhi, and was framed by Lu Zhiwei and Shen Ruoxi. Gu Yanzhi helped her many times. As the truth was revealed, Lu Chengyu did not hesitate to turn against his family and destroy the Lu family in order to keep Su Nianwan. However, after Su Nianwan made it clear that "she only belonged to him", he collapsed and finally committed suicide on the rooftop. With Gu Yanzhi's company, Su Nianwan got rid of the shadow of the Lu family and came to the other side of the river to start a new life.
纵情焚野

Zhang Zheng Yue, Liu YingShi Yi, heir to the Shi Group, is pronounced dead in a helicopter crash. His secretary, Qi Xin, conceals her pregnancy and moves into the Shi family mansion as Shi Yi's "lover." Three years later, Shi Yi regains his memory and discovers the true secret behind Qi Xin's deceitful ways. The two, through thick and thin, finally become a couple.
觉醒后，京都公主狂追夫

Bai Hao, Yang FanThe little princess thought her husband went bankrupt and divorced her immediately, but then she found out that he was the hidden richest man and had a baby! So she started the "you run and I chase, husband, don't run away" mode.
软萌师弟不好惹

Qi Xuan (RAW)To track down his missing friend, Qin Xue, Lu Chengyan, the helmsman of the business giant Lu Group, infiltrates the Eurasia base of the multinational education group under the guise of "Lu Ming." He unexpectedly meets Lin Wan, the heir to a prominent pharmaceutical family. From mutual testing, the two team up to combat the Lin Group's shady biopharmaceutical operation known as the "Return to Cloud Project." When the mask of disguise is ripped open by blood, the once adorable junior and the proud daughter must confront the question: Who is the true master of this game within a game?
都怪我入戏太深

Gao Yu Chen, Xiu Yu XiuTo escape her father's control, actress An Chuyu arranges a flash marriage with Lu Zheng, and they remain silent for six months. A fashion show crisis, she defies it with a domineering gesture, yet forgets her husband. At a joint banquet and living together, the fake drama becomes real. She exploits him, and he mistakenly believes she's attracted to her. A green tea actress disrupts the situation, and he immediately defends her. Just as she's attracted to him, her ex returns, and he's overcome with jealousy. Discovering she's been used, he roars with rage. He declares it globally: "My wife, who dares to touch me!"
重回八零恰逢你明媚

Yang Cheng Han, Zhang Yi LinIn her previous life, Song Ran's identity as a real heiress was stripped away, leaving her with a disabled leg and the property of her benefactor's family seized. She lived a miserable life, witnessing the cruelty of the world. In her new life, she no longer compromises, beginning with a slaying of the gangster who stole her identity, the fake heiress. Her tenacity and foxy nature captivated Gu Yuanting, a Buddhist disciple in the capital. His faith wavered, and he bravely pursued love. However, Song Ran refused to believe in marriage, dedicating herself to her studies and career, helping her benefactor's family mitigate risks and establish a factory, ultimately earning everyone's support and recognition.
乖宝听兽语，帅爸掌心宠

Wen Yu (RAW)An'an, the lost daughter of the Gu family in Beijing, suffers from abuse from her adoptive mother. She unexpectedly saves the world-weary, suicidal Shen Zhihan. They become father and daughter, and the once-cold Shen Zhihan transforms into a doting father. Faced with a conspiracy orchestrated by the book-traveling Xia Kexuan, An'an deftly uses her animal language to defy it. Together, father and daughter become the warmest light in each other's lives.
清冷月光坠我心

Sun Jia Jun, Li XiuSong Jiucha seeks revenge for her adoptive mother by marrying Fu Jingmo, the head of the Fu Group, on behalf of her reluctant sister. Rumored to be paranoid and insane, Fu Jingmo is actually deeply wounded. From a cautious and tentative approach to Song Jiuyao, he gradually becomes drawn to her and clings to her. Using her fiancée's identity as his own, Song Jiucha uncovers the truth behind her adoptive mother's murder, confronting villains like Fu Wenqiu and Song Heyi. During this time, the two are repeatedly injured while protecting each other, but their relationship blossoms as misunderstandings are resolved. Ultimately, they uncover Fu Wenqiu's crimes, rescue the imprisoned girl, and Song Jiuyao's revenge is successful. Fu Jingmo gifts her Prague Island, and the two finally marry.
以爱为谋

Wang Kai Mu, Wu Chun YiPhotography student Xia Zhiyao encounters Luo Yunchuan, a cold, injured man with amnesia, deep in the mountains. To protect herself, she lies and pretends to be married. A tug-of-war between love and calculation unfolds. When deep affection meets political scheming, whoever is moved first loses.
八零甜妻灿若明野

Zhou Ling Feng, Chen Si YuVillage doctor Xu Can earns money to support her fiancé Liang Pengfei's college education, but he's already married and has children in the city. Xu Can resolves to break up with Liang Pengfei, but by chance, she rescues a gangster named Song Mingye. Song Mingye falls in love with Xu Can at first sight and proposes to her. While he's a ruthless and decisive gangster out in public, he transforms into a docile and obedient youngster at home.
明月燃宫墙

Chang Zhe Kuan, Jiang Yu JiaOn the eve of her wedding, Jiang Mingyue, daughter of the prime minister's family, sees her fiancé unjustly murdered by the emperor. Embittered, she enters the palace seeking revenge. She approaches the deposed crown prince, Xie Yun, and tries to entice him into an alliance against the tyrant. With her revenge secured, Jiang Mingyue wishes to retire, but Xie Yun turns against her and imprisons her in the inner palace.
星辰下的约定

Wu Yuan Cheng, Guo Xin RuiLou Yuxi was sold by her biological father and stepmother for a betrothal gift. Faced with no escape, she took a desperate gamble and unexpectedly had sex with Gu Jingheng, the crown prince of the Gu family. From then on, this poor little girl became the beloved pregnant wife of the wealthy Gu family. All those wolves and tigers in her family were slapped in the face!
浮灯灿烂一朝

Cai Cheng Yuan, Zhao Ying Nan (RAW)Liang Mingzhao once chose Shen Yanqing, the man she loved, as her consort. After his death, she remained a widow, and upon seeing him kiss Lin Zhenzhen on her deathbed, she died of regret. Reborn to the day of the consort selection, she resolved to exact revenge, choosing her mortal enemy, Xie Linfeng, but concealing the truth, hoping to make Shen Yanqing suffer the pain of a lover's separation. Unexpectedly, Shen Yanqing also reborn, abandoning the consort, believing Liang Mingzhao had chosen him. He protected Lin Zhenzhen, but upon learning that Liang Mingzhao had orchestrated the sword dance, he angrily divorced Lin Zhenzhen, but to no avail. Liang Mingzhao also discovered that Xie Linfeng had remained unmarried for her previous life, ultimately recognizing his true feelings and marrying Xie Linfeng.
误撩成禧

Yang Yu Bin, Song XiA drunken mistaken identity brings photographer Song Xi and business tycoon Jing Zhuo together. Thought to be a fleeting impulse, Jing Zhuo gradually fills Song Xi's world with tenderness. And Song Xi discovers that her husband is actually the stern and serious big brother her best friend described him as. In this ambiguous game of tactics and counter-tricks, they marry first and then fall in love, healing each other's past wounds and finding true belonging and love.
重生换嫁，短命太子他长命百岁了

He Shan Kai, Jin Lu YingWas she destitute and destitute in her previous life? In this new life, she doesn't want to be with such a heartless and unfaithful man. Feng Niannian decides to marry the short-lived prince instead. The whole capital is waiting to see her buried with him! But why does that dignified and handsome man look so much like the dying paralyzed prince?
野玫瑰

Zhao Rui, Xiang Yun JieSix years ago, Liu Xiaorou was abducted and taken to a remote village. Six years later, she was nearly forced into marriage. In the face of danger, she risked her life to escape from the countryside and return to the city. But she faced the cold-blooded parents who had sent her away, and an adopted sister with whom she had no connection. Faced with the pain of six years of imprisonment and the abandonment of her biological parents, she single-handedly reclaimed everything that belonged to her. She seemed neither evil nor malicious, forging ahead, driven only by the light that had saved her life. He was light, she was fire.
闺蜜说她大哥凶，可他喊我宝宝耶

Li Yi Chen, Li Mu XiSong Xi, drunkenly mistaking someone for someone else, wakes up to find herself married to a handsome stranger, Jing Zhuo. Meanwhile, her best friend, Zhang Hening, rants about her older brother, calling him mean and old-fashioned. Song Xi nods, secretly congratulating herself for staying out of the way. But then she turns around and discovers her flash-married husband, Jing Zhuo, not only calls her "baby" at night but also pampers her with sweet, almost heartfelt gestures. Only when the truth is revealed does Song Xi realize that the very person she's been avoiding is her doting husband. This marriage, which began as a misunderstanding, is filled with endless contrasts and sweet, unending love.
穿成炮灰女配，我成了公婆心尖宠

Liu Lan Bo, Mo NingAs soon as Song Jinjin crossed into the book, she became the wife of Lu Yanchuan, a scientific research boss. She was divorced right after landing. She insisted on staying with him and won over the whole family with her charm. She divorced him first and then fell in love with him but ran away, causing the boss to chase his wife.
前夫君登基为帝我被迫和离

Lan Bo, Tian Jiu LuoSheng Wu, the daughter of the Sheng family, married Prince Zhao Si Ye as his principal wife. Two years into their marriage, they lived in perfect harmony. However, one night, Sheng Wu discovered Si Ye's affair with his close friend Shen Wei. Heartbroken, she decided to divorce him. However, the Sheng family refused to allow abandoned women to return home, leaving her with no choice but to remarry, pregnant, and to marry her former cousin-in-law, Jiang Zhenhong, as a concubine. Sheng Wu thought she and Si Ye were parting ways, never to see each other again. Six years after their unsuccessful divorce, Si Ye ascended the throne, and when they met again, he still couldn't forget her.
凤诏震九洲

Jin Wang, Wu Jia NuoQin Zhaoling, the daughter of a guilty minister, was wrongfully sentenced to exile. Her husband Gu Huiming immediately took away their two children and divorced her to remarry. Three years later, Qin Zhaoling was favored by the ninth prince, Xiao Jingxian, and was crowned queen. She wanted to bring her children into the palace to enjoy a good life, but Gu Huiming's family, who were unaware of the situation, tried to stop her in every possible way. She wanted to see how she would make her disdainful husband suffer the consequences of his actions.

怪她太会撒娇

Liu Yu Hang, Guo Yu XinJiang Xian voluntarily threw herself at Lin Yuanzhou and became the laughing stock of the whole city. Just when everyone thought that Jiang Xian would marry Lin Yuanzhou, they found out that she only regarded Lin Yuanzhou as a substitute - she loved no one and even wanted to escape. However, Lin Yuanzhou went from being a good-for-nothing who didn't know how to love to truly falling in love with Jiang Xian. In the end, he went crazy and tied her to himself and begged her to love him.p.s: this got taken down like a flash lol
八零萌娃带飞，亲爹追妻超上头

Jiang Bo Long, Lin Xue YingSet in the 1980s, the story follows a gifted child who unexpectedly travels back in time to his parents' youth, only to discover his father is a taciturn engineer and his mother an independent journalist. The child becomes a "love strategist," using modern thinking to help his taciturn father win his wife. He creates romantic surprises, from handwritten love letters to confessing his love on a homemade radio, and deftly resolves misunderstandings. In the process, the child not only brings his parents together but also heals family trauma with his childlike innocence.
小穷包捡的男人竟是金疙瘩

Zhou Hao Shan, Mai TongFang Rongxue was betrayed by both her boyfriend and her cousin. She accidentally picked up the injured Bai Lin and took him in to recuperate. In order to deal with the harassment from her aunt and cousin, Bai Lin pretended to be Fang Rongxue's boyfriend and repeatedly stood up for her and protected her. Their relationship gradually warmed up as they got along.
惊！炮灰女配和男二喜结连理了

Li Yi Cheng, Yao HuiSelf-media blogger Ruan Xingmian died suddenly from staying up late and traveled through time to become the vicious female supporting role in the novel. She was also drugged and chose to detoxify each other with the academic genius Gu Xing. A month later, she found out that she was pregnant and confronted Gu Xing. The two decided to have a child and raise it together. In a series of difficulties, the two solved them together, attracted each other, and their feelings continued to heat up.
旧梦沉舟

Wang Xin Zheng, Wang Mu XuanAfter her rebirth, Li Su was completely heartbroken when her ex-fiancé Huo Zhenzhou returned with Zhou Motang, who had lost her memory. In her despair, she had a flash marriage with Huo Xuanye, Huo Zhenzhou's younger brother who had a crush on her...
穿到九零，她才是顶级猎物

Wang Kang, Niu Xiang LuSu Miaomiao travels back to 1989, countering the frame-up and teasing of the Crown Prince before leaving with grace. She tears apart her wicked relatives and friends, using her system and business acumen to forge a formidable foray into the business world. She even discovers she's the daughter of a wealthy Hong Kong family, and from then on begins a life of unparalleled devotion.
贺总夫人的AA制生活

Zhang Hao, Hong Yi XinSu Nian'an bribed He Mingyu into a fake kiss to escape her marriage, and ended up marrying him by mistake. He Mingyu feigned poverty and went the "AA" system, even calculating the room fee down to the cent. Su Nian'an, believing she'd married a stingy scrap collector, joined He's company as an employee, never realizing her immediate boss was her husband—it was all a misunderstanding.
邻居是我的恋爱搭子

Tan Zi Xuan (Li Heng Wei), Zhang Zi HanThe heroine, Ye Zhi, accidentally transmigrates into the world of abusive fiction and becomes the older sister of the chaste heroine, Ye Qinya. In the original story, the Ye family is devastated by the savagely criticized male protagonist, Ou Minghan. However, the abusive heroine, Ye Qinya, chooses to use love to transform her enemy. To rewrite her fate, Ye Zhi launches a counterattack.
重生七零嫁硬汉，小白菜也有春天

Zhou Sheng Wen, Shi Yue YueLin Zhen travels through time and space to the 1970s, swapping marriages with her reborn sister and marrying Zhou Heng. With the help of the space, she pursues her career, disciplines her ruthless relatives, and falls in love with Zhou Heng, who has also been reborn.
钱途无量！我教公子开银行

Zi Yu, Dai Yi HaThis drama takes a creative approach, exploring the "dialogue between ancient and modern finance." Through the storyline of Fu Tingxiu and Li Cheche, a modern-day bank employee who accidentally travels through time, they work together to revitalize a bank. The series cleverly incorporates modern financial concepts such as inclusive finance and risk management, conveying the values ​​of honesty, trustworthiness, and sound management through a lighthearted and engaging narrative. The drama deftly blends modern financial thinking with ancient business wisdom, offering a fast-paced, humorous, and engaging storyline that showcases the intersection of inherited and innovative business thinking.
错嫁之后，老公的身份藏不住了

Huang Bo, Mai TongJiang Yining was falsely accused and expelled from the Jiang family. To avoid the scumbag Ye Qingyue, she married Shen Zhizhou, a man with disabled legs and a gloomy temperament. With her thick skin and high emotional intelligence, she became the favorite of the Shen family. She also domineeringly protected her husband and gradually fell in love with Shen Zhizhou. In fact, Shen Zhizhou is the boss of the Qin family, who is hiding his identity to investigate the truth of the car accident. He went abroad to cure his leg disease and returned, revealing his identity to help Jiang Yining avenge her father and seize the inheritance. In the end, the two resolved their misunderstandings, decided to fall in love, and Jiang Yining became pregnant.

夜访血族老公

Liu Lan Bo, Tian Xin YaTo treat her brother, Ruan Sui, Ruan Shiyin was arranged by her adoptive mother, Wang Ya, to work with the Sheng family to treat Sheng Qi. There, she met Feng Chenghua and Master Wei and learned that her blood pressure would be needed to treat Sheng Qi's condition. Initially, Sheng Qi mistakenly believed Ruan Shiyin had come to the Sheng family for money and was somewhat repulsive. After realizing the misunderstanding, Ruan Shiyin gradually lowered her guard. When Sheng Qi fell ill, Ruan Shiyin, far from being afraid, actually worried about his pain. This reminded Sheng Qi of unpleasant memories, and he gradually grew closer to Ruan Shiyin. Ruan Shiyin repeatedly helped him during his illnesses, and the two eventually fell in love.
坏了，给她买到真仿生机器人了

Jin Jia Yu, Qin Yu JiaTo exact revenge on her mortal enemy, Shen Wu splashed out on a lifelike robot that resembled Lu Siyu. By day, she was a company CEO, but by night, she transformed herself into a master dog trainer. The robot was obedient, intelligent, and loyal. But it was becoming more and more like her mortal enemy.
偏宠沈先生

Yang Shuo, Zhang Yu MengFor twenty-five years, Sang Wu devotedly played the role of the eldest daughter of the Sang family and Gu Yan's fiancée. Just as she was about to be smitten by Gu Yan, she saw him passionately kissing a woman in a private room. Drunk, she became entangled with Shen Xingchuan. Thinking it was just a one-night stand, Shen Xingchuan began to appear frequently in her life. Reason told Sang Wu to stay away from him, but she was seduced by him again and again, slowly falling for him.
何处情欢

Qu Tian Rui, Zhou Yang YangLan Xi, a 30-year-old design team leader, is drugged by a male model at her bachelorette party before her engagement. She then unexpectedly spends the night with Jiang Muchin, the 25-year-old son of her best friend and CEO of Shengshi. The next day, she wakes up and flees, mistaking Jiang Muchin for a male model and leaving a "service fee." Unexpectedly, Jiang Muchin is actually an important client of the company! Jiang Muchin, through his aggressive involvement in a project, constantly flirts with Lan Xi, and their relationship becomes entangled.
一别山河永寂

He Long Tian, Yuan Ning (RAW)Set in turbulent times, the story follows the protagonist, a naive young woman from an aristocratic family, who is embroiled in court strife due to family misfortunes. She and the protagonist, a patient and reclusive prince, grow close through hardship, but are forced to separate by power struggles. Years later, they reunite, their statuses clashing: one wielding military power, the other mired in the maelstrom of imperial power. They must protect their country and family while remaining true to their original aspirations amidst conspiracy and betrayal.
天降饕餮，督军家抱盘追着喂

Wang Hui Long, Huang Yi AnZhaozhao is the last of the Taotie. With her powers limited, she starves and seeks out a warlord as her father. She also has five older brothers. She rescues her eldest brother, searches for her second, rescues her third, helps her fourth, and searches for her fifth, exhausted and hungry. Fortunately, her brothers dote on her, and her concubines dress her like a princess. This adorable fantasy story features unexpected twists and turns. Fubao, the heroine of the group, is the most beloved of all. She rescues the warlord, cures her eldest brother from a poisonous illness, searches for her missing second brother, saves her third, helps her fourth, and retrieves her fifth. She constantly confronts the second female lead who seeks to steal the warlord's family's fortune. She then befriends a business tycoon, rescues the mayor's daughter, and ultimately achieves fame and fortune, becoming the most beloved of all.
太太被读心后清冷教授坐不住啦

Chu Zi Jun, Li Li ZaiThe well-behaved Jian You is an intellectually elegant and well-behaved student in the music department of a prestigious university. She also secretly excels as a prolific writer, producing 8,000 words daily. Professor Jiang Yunsheng, a student at the same university, is young, promising, and handsome, making him a favorite subject for Jian You's writing. The two are secretly married, and Jiang Yunsheng is the object of countless girls' admiration. But rumors suggest... he's not a good match. Jian You doesn't mind, though. He's simply her "inspiration"! Until one day, Jiang Yunsheng is astonished to discover he can hear the inner voices of his innocent and well-behaved wife. The story is indescribable! Her innocent appearance is completely at odds with her! Then, the legendary beauty of the mountain steps steps down from her pedestal...
奈何奈何不逢君

Liu Run Ming, Luo Shi QiSet in ancient times, the story depicts the poignant love story of a man and woman, whose love is often separated by repeated missed opportunities due to family feuds and the twists of fate. The woman, a gentle and talented woman, is embroiled in power struggles due to family changes; the man, an orphan of the royal family, bears the burden of revenge and responsibility. The two meet and get to know each other in turbulent times, but their conflicting identities and external obstacles keep them from meeting each other again and again.
她曾情深

Liu Qing, Yu Bing HuiXu Yan, the adopted daughter of the Xu family, suffered horrific abuse and was forced to marry Qin Lie, the president of the Qin Corporation, as a pawn in a marriage alliance. She secretly loved him for years, but he remained in love with Mu Qing, who had returned to China, and she filed for divorce. Only after Xu Yan's resolute departure did Qin Lie realize the depths of the vengeance. Qin Lie's mother, Liu Ning, heartbroken by Xu Yan's affection, divorced her and adopted her as her goddaughter. Upon their reunion, Qin Lie, realizing Xu Yan's deep affection, began pursuing her, protecting her, and helping her escape her bondage. Eventually, the two reconciled and became a married couple.
挽颜传：不好意思，他们说我是好女人

Chen Jing Lin, Zhang Lan YueThe story revolves around the heroine Wanyan, a woman of humble origins yet filled with kindness. Amidst family strife and palace intrigue, she remains true to her heart. Faced with betrayal by her sisters and misunderstanding by her lover, she navigates crises with wisdom and earns respect with her sincerity. The drama blends the turbulent dynamics of family feuds with the tenderness of love, and through Wanyan's growth, she conveys the value that "kindness is not a weakness."
橘子糖甜吻

Shi Jia, Hao YunSong Qian, a freshman in the Department of Mathematics at Jiangnan University, had several accidents shortly after the start of the school year, causing the Jiangnan University's prominent figure Xie Yanchi to lose face. Song Qian, who thought she would be torn into pieces, fell step by step into Xie Yanchi's long-planned love "trap".
满级主母来上班

Meng Jia Hui, Wang Lu QingSong Xiyan is reborn as a cannon fodder supporting actress in a classic Chinese novel. Acting well at work but going crazy after work, she abuses scumbags and overthrows the mansion. She rescues her sisters, blows up the underground palace, uncovers royal secrets, and banishes scumbags and bitches to the sesame fields. After maxing out her points, she returns to the underworld with System 8384, ascends to the throne of a virgin, and then brings the little milk dog system down to earth to continue her madness.*splitted into 2 parts due to file size
超萌小医仙嫁到

Li Ze Hao, Yu LingXia Lingling, the illegitimate daughter of the Xia family, was adopted by the medical sage, Old Li, at the Shennong Sect in the mountains as a child and became his direct disciple. Unable to break through the celestial realm, she was sent down the mountain by her master to fulfill her engagement with Fu Jingchen, the cold-faced president of the Fu Group. Fu Jingchen suffered from a physical condition that was incurable. While her father was seeking remedies, Old Li calculated that their fates were compatible and arranged the marriage. Fu Jingchen took Xia Lingling away from the Xia family to treat her illness, but as they spent time together, he was drawn to her innocence and kindness, and gradually fell in love with her. Thus began a story of love, hate, and passion.
重生女帝一抬眼，满朝大臣全跪了＆长公主囚宠，禁欲权臣他美色勾人

Ye Yi, Zhao Hui NanIn her previous life, the Empress was framed by treacherous ministers, leading to the destruction of her country and her family, leaving her with a bittersweet death. Reborn, armed with memories and wisdom from her past life, she regains control of the court with swift and decisive measures. In court, a single glance reveals her unwavering authority, drawing all the courtiers to their knees in submission.
我为将军披战袍

Lu Huan Yu, Luo Yi XiaoA female producer travels back in time to become a frontier general, and her life starts in hell?! See how the dashing female general Su Xiaoman manipulates her deputy general, Xiao Lie, and leads her troops in farming and business!
我的同桌是校草

Ci Bu Rou, Hai XingThe plot focuses on Jiang Fuyao, an awakened NPC in a virtual world who unexpectedly breaks through the system's settings. She navigates three cycles of life and death, rising from oblivion to a rebellious struggle, teaming up with Lu Xing and Jasmine to unravel a conspiracy from a higher dimension. The immersive campus sci-fi experience, the mind-bending narrative, and the philosophical exploration of the NPC's counterattack create a new benchmark for thrilling, hardcore, and healing experiences. The directorial team reimagines this cyber allegory with an innovative perspective, opening a new chapter in Generation Z's struggle against fate.

星星祈愿

Shen Hao Nan, Zhai Yi YingAfter her rebirth, Xu Yuan saves the blind rich boy Zhou Qixing, who had committed adultery with her in her previous life, in order to reverse her family's tragic fate. However, this once again brings about the crazy revenge of the villain Si family. She uses "teasing" tactics to heal the male protagonist, and joins hands with her family to fight against the powerful enemy. The gears of fate turn, and a two-way redemption journey across life and death begins.
越界

Ren Yun Jie (Jesse Ren), Tan Yan YanFour years ago, the Su family went bankrupt. Su Tang disappeared after a deal with Fu Qingzhou to pay off her debts. Four years later, to avoid threats from her enemies, she planned to marry into the Fu family to seek refuge, but she met Fu Qingzhou again when he returned home. Unexpectedly, the person she was going to marry was Fu Qingzhou's nephew.
心动坐标偏差

Liu Yu Hang, Fang Si ChangAt the 100-day oath-taking ceremony, Jiang Li's ghostwriting of a love letter to Xie Chen as a self-criticism was mistakenly interpreted as a public confession. The two were admitted to the same university, and a misunderstanding led to Xie Chen's gradual affection. Jiang Li, citing family circumstances and a long-standing feud between the two families, avoided the relationship. Before Xie Chen left to study abroad, he confessed his love, and Jiang Yuan's response was met with opposition from her mother, leading to their breakup. Eight years later, Xie Chen returned with sincerity, resolving their grudge and finally marrying.
上位攻略

Lin Feng Song, Zheng Chen YuAfter Song Youning recovered, she planned to surprise her boyfriend, Jiang Yue, by pretending to be blind and proposing. However, Jiang Yue passionately kissed her best friend right in front of her, and even made a bet with his friends to have someone act as a stand-in to keep her safe while he went his own way. Song Youning was filled with grief and indignation. "Choose a husband for me," right? She threw herself into the arms of her chosen friend, Xie Yan, and asked for a kiss right in front of him, unaware that Xie Yan had already been deeply in love with her! In this game of power, who will come out on top? Who is... on top?
侯爷为何总是不解风情＆侯爷何时解风情

Wang Xing Kai, Yang Chen LuAn archery champion is reincarnated as the mistress of a cold and aloof marquis. If she doesn't become his wife within a year, her life is in danger. She flirts with him again and again, bringing the career-minded marquis down from his pedestal. She also improves her bow and arrow to protect her country, completing her counterattack from a skinny Yangzhou woman to the wife of a first-rank marquis.
别爱上那个保姆

Zhang Bei Xi, Zhang YingTo avenge her daughter, middle-aged nanny Wang Yun infiltrates a wealthy family. She charms the mature, overbearing Fu Siyan with her gentle demeanor, turning his contempt into obsession. Meanwhile, she seduces the wealthy, white moonlight of Wen Zhiyu with her mature charm, making him fall prey to the allure of her "sister." Furthermore, she drives her wealthy first love, Xu Zechuan, to regret and desperately beg for reconciliation. She navigates three generations of top-tier men, transforming the world of love into a battlefield, wielding her charm as the sharpest blade, in a textbook counterattack.
听雪灼烧

Xi Er Li, Liu Mei NaTo escape a family-arranged blind date, Pei Yu sets her sights on Liang Jingsen, a prominent figure in the finance department, hoping to pass him off as real. Her subtle flirtations unintentionally stir the iceberg's heart. At the height of their love, a careless remark leads to their separation. Years later, they meet again, their identities reversed, with Liang Jingsen becoming the stalker. Thus, the iceberg melts, ignited by love.
坠爱

Lu Xiang Shan, Yu DiOnline writer Shi Yin transmigrates into her own novel, becoming the diabolical female supporting character who is killed by the much-criticized villain Pei Jin. To save her life, she plots to capture Pei Jin and make amends for his suffering. As they tangle, they gradually develop feelings for each other, overcoming the crisis together.
忘川劫

Ma Shi Yao, Qu Xiao XiaoFang Qingluan, the ferryman of the underworld, descends to the mortal realm to exorcise demons. Upon landing, she discovers a villa haunted by a ghostly infant. Using half a jade pendant, she gathers merit by warding off evil spirits. She encounters Chen Mo, patriarch of the Chen family. Together, they solve a murder case in a hotel, battle the evil cultivators of the Ouyang clan, and rescue Bai Luoyang, a sorcerer trapped in a mysterious realm. After enduring numerous trials and tribulations, Fang Qingluan's merit is nearing completion, earning her promotion to the Ten Courts of Hell. Unexpectedly, the Ghost King Chang Yan kidnaps the Immortal Queen Mother! Fang Qingluan and her teammates face a decisive battle in the peach forest, where the Ghost King summons a massive array of peach trees to counterattack. Can she successfully defeat her enemy and seal the throne of Hell?
我以相术做局，他以江山为聘

Huang Hao Wen, Shi Xue JingIn her previous life, Jiang Nanzhi was betrayed to death by her husband, Xie Yuqing. Reborn, she renounced love and pursued power. Awakening her precognitive abilities, she discerned the fate of the chauvinistic Gong Yinghan, destined for imperial power, and offered him marriage, using the lure of sincerity as a token of his affection. Gong Yinghan, initially intent on assassinating the "Emperor's Star Girl," gradually fell for her true love amidst his false feelings. When Jiang Nanzhi faced crises like poisoning by an ex-lover and intrigue at court, Gong Yinghan repeatedly assisted her, even confessing his true feelings and risking his life under the urging of a rival. Ultimately, the two let down their guard, navigating a turbulent world shrouded in calculations and sincerity, seeking to reign supreme.
掌中沦陷

Li Si Yuan, Ge Xiu YanTo secure a project for Wansheng Group, Meng Jingzhou agreed to a "sweet deal" with Gu Zhao, the group's leader. Knowing Gu Zhao was just playing around, Meng Jingzhou gradually fell for it. Seeing Gu Zhao smiling sweetly with his fiancé on his arm, she became a clown consumed by jealousy. "Boss Gu, I'm fine. Don't try to kick me out."
权臣的软肋

Chen Zheng Yang, Huang Yun YunJiang Qingyu helped her fiancé Xiao Xun'an achieve success, but after his victory, Xiao Xun'an colluded with Princess Huangfu Xue, torturing Jiang Qingyu's family and leading to her tragic death. Reborn, Jiang Qingyu vowed to protect the Jiang family and avenge her father's death. This time, she orchestrated a chance encounter with Xie Chenyuan, the foremost official who had taught her about murder and power in her previous life. She used his influence to ascend to the throne, fulfilling her own ambitions and redeeming Xie Chenyuan, a man with a treacherous past.
灰姑娘的狩猎

Liu Ming  Hao, Kang Yu QianQi Yang appears innocent and delicate, but she's a determined and ruthless woman. She exploits Li Qiming's affections to gain money and resources, while also seeking revenge against Li Jueyang, bringing him downfall. Li Shuli, the eldest son of the Li family, sees through her scheme and proposes a partnership: she aids him in his fight for the inheritance. Together, they orchestrate a scheme to disrupt the Li family, ultimately defeating the stepmother's faction and securing Li Shuli's inheritance. As Qi Yang and Li Shuli develop a deep bond, she realizes the illusions and risks of marrying into a wealthy family and ultimately rejects his proposal, choosing to take control of her own life.
确诊后，带崽回古代认绝嗣摄政王

Quan Pei Lun, Yang Fu YuDiagnosed with advanced stomach cancer, Cheng Shuyi, eager to find a father for her twins, travels back in time with her children to seek out Pei Yanli, the regent whom she once drugged. Pei Yanli initially intends to kill her, but upon seeing the children, his attitude changes. A love blossoms between them. Cheng Shuyi opens a shop to accumulate wealth, averting the crisis. Her condition improves, and she finally lives with Pei Yanli and their children.
笙笙入怀

Huang You Tian, Bao Jin NiIn a previous life, Wen Yisheng was taken into the Wen family after her parents died. She mistakenly trusted the gentle facade of her supposed brother, Wen Zhi, and was subsequently restricted and imprisoned, ultimately dying in his arms. Reliving her past, Wen Yisheng returns to the day she entered the Wen family. She attempts to escape, but finds her memories fading, leaving behind only a warning to stay away from Wen Zhi. Upon meeting him again, she falls for his gentle deception and returns to dependence, only for him to once again control her life. It wasn't until she discovered his true identity and attempted to escape, only to be caught and imprisoned, that Wen Yisheng regained her full memory, ultimately breaking free and taking control of her life.
斩春鸢

Chen Zheng Yang, Yang Shan ZiYun Zheng, doted on from childhood, was offered marriage by the Pingxi Marquisate at the age of 16. Little did she know, this would be the beginning of a tragic life for Yun Zheng. On her wedding day, the Pingxi Marquisate's heir, the son of the Marquisate, was appointed heir to both branches of the family. Yun Zheng, who was supposed to be Yun Zheng's husband, married Bai Yueguang, while Yun Zheng was married to the Marquisate's deceased eldest son. She fought back, but her mother-in-law forced her to accept her fate. For the next ten years, Yun Zheng guarded the eldest son's memorial tablet, a lifelong widow. Finally, she was poisoned and thrown into a mass grave. Her family, the Yun family, also met a tragic end... Reborn, Yun Zheng resolved to resist...
穿成豪门反派崽崽的恶毒后妈

Bai Hao, Li Xue YangModern socialite Jiang Miao accidentally travels back in time to a period novel, becoming the wicked stepmother who, to please the scumbag Meng Junjie, betrays her husband Meng Xiao, abuses her stepson, steals a restaurant recipe, and ultimately dies tragically. Fortunately, Jiang Miao "wakes up" in time and resolves to change her ways. She dedicates herself to caring for her two sons and clinging to her promising husband, Meng Xiao. In the 1990s, she defies fate and lives a peaceful life!
[PREV⬅️]21 October Releases:1. 星星祈愿

Shen Hao Nan, Zhai Yi Ying[HERE]2. 越界 - Ren Yun Jie (Jesse Ren), Tan Yan Yan[HERE]3. 心动坐标偏差 - Liu Yu Hang, Fang Si Chang[HERE]4. 上位攻略 - Lin Feng Song, Zheng Chen Yu[HERE]5. 别爱上那个保姆 - Zhang Bei Xi, Zhang Ying[HERE]6. 确诊后，带崽回古代认绝嗣摄政王 - Quan Pei Lun, Yang Fu Yu[HERE]7. 我以相术做局，他以江山为聘 - Huang Hao Wen, Shi Xue Jing[HERE]8. 侯爷为何总是不解风情＆侯爷何时解风情 - Wang Xing Kai, Yang Chen Lu[HERE]9. 忘川劫 - Ma Shi Yao, Qu Xiao Xiao[HERE]10. 权臣的软肋 - Chen Zheng Yang, Huang Yun Yun[HERE]11. 掌中沦陷 - Li Si Yuan, Ge Xiu Yan[HERE]12. 灰姑娘的狩猎 - Liu Ming  Hao, Kang Yu Qian[HERE]13. 听雪灼烧 - Xi Er Li, Liu Mei Na[HERE]14. 坠爱 - Lu Xiang Shan, Yu Di[HERE]15. 笙笙入怀 - Huang You Tian, Bao Jin Ni[HERE]16. 斩春鸢 - Chen Zheng Yang, Yang Shan Zi[HERE]17. 穿成豪门反派崽崽的恶毒后妈 - Bai Hao, Li Xue Yang[HERE]
诱香

Wang Kai Mu, Su Yu TongSu Yutong's family business was destroyed by the Gu family in a perfume monopoly war, resulting in the destruction of her family. In order to find out the truth and seek revenge, she deliberately approaches Gu Jingshen, but finds that he is not only her fiancé's uncle, but also her ex-boyfriend. The two rekindle their feelings in the process of working together to investigate the truth.
危情合约

Zhang Bei Xi, Zuo YiIn order to save her seriously ill best friend A Zhao, Meng Rao signed a contract with the icy boss Shen Silin, pretending to be his lover and ruining his engagement with a wealthy family. She wanted to make money and run away, but was pampered by the other party. Was she moved? Not at all! Her inner words were all fake pampering, all illusions, I want to make money! Until one day, she found out that she was actually a tool used by A Zhao, so she turned evil and played a counter-attack. This move made the previously cold boss turn into a love-brained one and wanted to force love with her? Meng Rao was a little confused. The cold mountain turned into a volcano. This man is serious.
认错联姻对象后，他超爱

Huai Wen, Ye MiaoIn order to repay a favor, Xu Qingwu, the adopted daughter of the Shen family, arranged a marriage for the Shen family. She unexpectedly discovered that her marriage partner was Cen Xihuai, the uncle of the Cen family and the president of the group. From their awkward first encounter in the hospital to their hilarious cohabitation life after getting the marriage certificate, the two gradually became closer in their contract marriage.
靳夺南枝 & 甜欲肆吻

Du Ya Fei, Liu Xi YuJiang Jinnian, the current head of the Jiang family, was known for his self-denial and aloof disposition. Even though the Jiang and Shen families had long been engaged, no one connected him with Shen Nanzhi. For years, Shen Nanzhi believed the same. Jiang Jinnian, often abroad and aloof, rarely returned year-round, leaving them with few opportunities to see each other. Even when they did, Shen Nanzhi kept him at arm's length. She had never imagined that the marriage between the two families would, by some strange coincidence, fall between her and Jiang Jinnian. Nor had she imagined that he would pamper her to the skies after securing the marriage certificate.
套现人生

Li Jiu Lin, Lou Yi XiaoDu Xiaolei and Zhao Jiangsheng went from being friends who helped each other to lovers who walked hand in hand for a lifetime, and through their own efforts, their lives became more and more prosperous!
姐姐再亲我一下

Wen Zhi Cheng, Dai Hua LiAfter Jiang Qi catches her boyfriend Ji Mingyu kissing Li Yun, they break up. Her childhood sweetheart, Jing Xi, remains protective of her, helping her deal with Ji Mingyu and his men. Their relationship blossoms, and upon graduation, Jing Xi proposes, and they find happiness together.
心动偏差

Guo Xiang, Wang Mu XuanAfter being laid off, fresh graduate Ruan Chaoyang used her resilience to secure an opportunity at the top consulting firm Maxwell. She and her rational partner Cheng Huaizhou went from workplace confrontation to heartbreak, experienced misunderstandings and growth, and finally broke the rules and confirmed each other.
怪力侍卫陈思思

Chen Yun Ting, Hou Cheng YueModern boxer Chen Sisi travels back in time to ancient times, using her extraordinary strength to rescue the hunted prince Mu Xingchen and become his bodyguard. Along the way, the two encounter troubles with bandits and shady shops. Chen Sisi even sells Mu Xingchen on the black market due to a counterfeit banknote incident, but she rescues him. Meanwhile, the second prince, Mu Yunxuan, sends assassin Lingshan to undercover and track Mu Xingchen, but she is drawn to Chen Sisi. Ultimately, the conspiracy is uncovered, Lingshan defectes, and Mu Xingchen ascends the throne, whereupon Chen Sisi becomes his lover.
报告苏总，您找的赞婿是龙神殿主

Zhang Jun Ya, Lin Qi TingSu Wan never dreamed that a chance encounter at a hot spring would lead to her pregnancy, and she vowed to find the man who had gotten her pregnant! Five years later, Su Wan, now Jiangcheng's most beautiful CEO, searches the city for a husband to take back her mother's company. Unexpectedly, her daughter Yuanyuan finds her biological father, Ye Han, in the countryside! The man she'd been with five years ago turned out to be a farmer, so she decided to take him in as her son-in-law. However, after marriage, she discovers that this farmer is actually the Lord of the Dragon God Temple!
暗恋二十三年冬

Feng Xiang Kun, Meng LuShe is the "sister" whom he dare not cross the line, and he is the heartbeat that she has never taken seriously. A love that has been hidden deep in her heart for a long time is about to be unveiled!
月落繁星江叙白

Wang Chao Yang, Mi KaAfter graduating from high school, Cen Xing, despite the loss of her father and mother, was accepted into the medical schools of Peking University and Tsinghua University through her perseverance. To raise tuition, she worked eight jobs in one summer. While running errands, she stumbled upon a blind date hosted by Shen Qinfang, the wealthiest woman in North City, for her grandson, Jiang Xubai. Shen Qinfang took a fancy to her and they quickly married. The next day, Jiang Xubai went abroad for further studies, returning three months later. Cen Xing unexpectedly became pregnant, unaware of the father. While seeking an abortion, she encountered the surgeon, Jiang Xubai. Unaware of each other's identities, they misunderstandings arose. As they got along, Jiang Xubai fell in love with Cen Xing. When he wanted to divorce his wife, he discovered she was Cen Xing. The misunderstandings were resolved, and the two happily embraced each other.
橘子糖的甜吻

Qi Xiao Su, Li Xin RanAt the start of her freshman year, Song Qian offended a prominent figure at Jiang University. The first time, she knocked over Xie Yanchi's coffee. The second time, her underwear, which was hanging out to dry, fell on Xie Yanchi's head. The third time, she forcefully kissed him. Their hearts fluttered with each encounter, and Xie Yanchi discovered that his lost memories concealed a deep, secret love for Song Qian.
玄学少女说你三更死，打钱改命

Chu Zi Jun, Li Shi QiWuyin, whose cultivation is complete but her heart is lacking, descends to the mortal world to overcome a family crisis. Her soul, transported to the realm of Cheng Wuyin, the abandoned daughter of a wealthy family, decisively breaks with the cold-hearted Cheng family and chooses the kind-hearted Shen family for a new beginning. Drawing on the power of the Xuanmen ancestor, she aids the Shen family in their resurgence, striking down the scoundrels. The Cheng family regrets their actions, but it's too late. Ultimately, Wuyin finds fulfillment amidst the warmth of her family and chooses to remain in the human world to enjoy their warmth.
罪臣之女获君心

Ai Ke Li Ya, Shu Xue ManWith her family shattered and her husband betraying her, Lin Fengling lost everything overnight. However, as the daughter of a military family, she remained resilient and unyielding. To clear her father and brother of treason, she personally led her troops into battle, facing a perilous journey. However, due to a previous act of kindness, she saved the enemy prince, Yun Yiming. The two clashed several times on the battlefield, and gradually fell in love. Lin Fengling wanted to avenge her blood, and Yun Yiming paved the way for her. However, due to the disparity in status and the hatred between her family and country, what should she do?
被偷走的那五年

Huo Peng Yan, Zhang Zi HanAfter five years of marriage, Mu Qingyou realizes she's merely a stand-in for her husband, Gu Shiyan's true love. Disheartened, she divorces him, only to run into her ex-fiancé, Pei Zhiyu, the man she abandoned but who has always protected her. He helps her save her mother, abuses scumbags, and slaps down green-tea lovers, all while pressing for her position. Five years of no contract renewal, then marriage to your brother after the divorce—this move is awesome!
引他归航

Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Sun Qian XunSix years ago, Cheng Chiyu was the pilot who saved her. Six years later, Lin Zhi became an air traffic controller for him, her passionate pursuit melting his frozen heart. Abandoned by her family, Lin Chiyu was betrayed by her loved ones and faced with the mystery of her mother's car accident. He stood firm by her side, and together they journeyed home, guided by love.
[PREV⬅️]22 October Releases:1. 危情合约

Zhang Bei Xi, Zuo Yi[HERE]2. 诱香 - Wang Kai Mu, Su Yu Tong[HERE]3. 靳夺南枝 & 甜欲肆吻 - Du Ya Fei, Liu Xi Yu[HERE]4. 暗恋二十三年冬 - Feng Xiang Kun, Meng Lu[HERE]5. 怪力侍卫陈思思 - Chen Yun Ting, Hou Cheng Yue[HERE]6. 被偷走的那五年 - Huo Peng Yan, Zhang Zi Han[HERE]7. 认错联姻对象后，他超爱 - Huai Wen, Ye Miao[HERE]8. 引他归航 - Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Sun Qian Xun[HERE]9. 报告苏总，您找的赞婿是龙神殿主 - Zhang Jun Ya, Lin Qi Ting[HERE]10.  罪臣之女获君心 - Ai Ke Li Ya, Shu Xue Man[HERE]11. 玄学少女说你三更死，打钱改命 - Chu Zi Jun, Li Shi Qi[HERE]12. 橘子糖的甜吻 - Qi Xiao Su, Li Xin Ran[HERE]13. 姐姐再亲我一下 - Wen Zhi Cheng, Dai Hua Li[HERE]14. 心动偏差 - Guo Xiang, Wang Mu Xuan[HERE]15. 套现人生 - Li Jiu Lin, Lou Yi Xiao[HERE]16. 月落繁星江叙白 - Wang Chao Yang, Mi Ka[HERE]17. 本将军的夫人才不是恶女 - Li Zhuo Yang, Han Le Yao[HERE]
早逝白月光穿十一年后，成全家福星

Sun Qian Xun, Liu San Si, Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Deng Hao, Cheng YuLin Mo opened her eyes to find herself transported to the eleventh year after her death. On her deathbed, she learned that this world was a novel, and her three younger brothers were all villains in the original novel's counterpart, each meeting a tragic end. Unable to accept that her adorable brothers had become part of the protagonists' play, Lin Mo decisively acted to sever the evil connection, unaware that her former nemesis was now gazing at her with fascination the moment he saw her again.(Aired: Jul 12, 2025)p.s.: Season 2 will be released later today.
假千金捡到的小白脸是首富

Zou Ke Jun, Zhai Cheng LuJiang Ci You, the fake daughter of the Jiang family, was betrayed by her husband Yan Feng and her best friend Xia Ling, and the two left their hometown. Jiang Ci You spent three years in a nominal marriage. During this period, Jiang Ci You kept a "gigolo" and the prince of the richest family in Beijing, Bo Jin Xiu, but she didn't know his true identity. Three years later, Yan Feng and the pregnant Xia Ling returned to China. Yan Feng took over the family business, and Xia Ling wanted to take away everything from Jiang Ci You. Later, Xia Ling became a colleague of Jiang Ci You, and together with Jiang Xiao Xiao, the real daughter of the Jiang family, they targeted her.(Aired: Sep 29, 2024)
邱秘书的婚事

Wang Kai Mu, Han Yu TongIntelligent, humorous, and resilient, 25-year-old Qiu Yu navigates the workplace with ease and serves as CEO Ji Xiangdong's trusted secretary. Faced with the constant pressures of an ex-lover and family meddling, Ji Xiangdong's feelings beneath his cold exterior gradually emerge. Amidst the turbulent waters of career and love, Secretary Qiu bravely chooses her own happiness.
浮华之下

Wang Yi Ran, Guo JingAt her father's funeral, Nan Shaoyan faces double betrayal from both her fiancé and her stepmother, Wang Jiayin. Faking her own death and returning to life, she collaborates with the mastermind, Gu Xingzhi, for revenge, only to gradually uncover his ambitions to acquire three major clothing conglomerates. In her calculated vengeance, Nan Shaoyan joins forces with Gu Yiyu, the second son of the Gu family, to ultimately uncover the conspiracy, punish evil and promote good, and ultimately find love and self-reflection in the end. The drama weaves together commercial intrigue, emotional deception, and the awakening of human nature—a magnificent yet brutal feast of revenge.
昼夜回响

Liang Si Wei, Zhang Jin Yi, Yu LongLin Yeye, who had just been released from prison, wanted to start a new life, but was accidentally dragged into hell by Jiang Zhou. Jiang Zhou became Lin Yeye's creditor and set up a chess game to make her repay her debt with her body and seduce her brother Jiang Yuhua. However, Jiang Zhou gradually developed unusual feelings for Lin Yeye during this process. He regretted sending Lin Yeye to Jiang Yuhua, but he didn't know that he had...
为她失控

Wang Xuan, He ShiQin Sang has been under the mental control of her stepfather, Shen Guodong, since childhood. After witnessing him murder her mother and grandfather, she feigned obedience, seeking revenge. She approached Shen Guodong's sworn enemy, Zhou Yanzhi, offering her a "plaything." Zhou Yanzhi aided Qin Sang in moving her grandfather and confronting the Shen family. He even risked his life to save Qin Sang from drugging and attempting suicide, even willingly abandoning his business plans for her. Ultimately, the two teamed up to expose Shen Guodong's crimes and reclaim the Qin family. After enduring hardships and a period of darkness, Qin Sang and Zhou Yanzhi finally walked hand in hand toward their wedding, beginning a new life.
七号典当行

Wang Hao Zhen, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun)At an auction, Su Mian and Shen Zhuo compete for a gilded and silver-inlaid flying fairy mirror. Shen Zhuo wins the bid by lighting a sky lantern to save his grandfather. Later, the old man's condition worsens, and Su Mian uses a Nuo mask to save him, drawing suspicion from the Bai family, which tempts Shen Zhuo. Su Mian initially wants to use him to prolong his life, but his heart softens. Old Master Shen's engagement proposal is rejected, and Xu Jiaojiao's birthday party and the ancient painting encounter an accident.
在疯犬心上垂钓

Duan Mei Yang, Peng YaoSeeking revenge against her mother for abandoning her, young Li Jiayan deliberately approaches her stepson, Chen Yujin, hoping to win his love. Chen Yujin's life is complicated, and despite knowing the truth, he willingly surrenders to his downfall. The two, torn between revenge and redemption, ultimately uncover their past secrets, let go of their hatred, and redeem each other on the brink of the abyss, becoming each other's only light.
不露声色

Wu Tian Hao, Cui Shi YiLin Xingyue transmigrates into the vicious female supporting character in a yandere novel. The system demands that she turn the docile male protagonist, Jiang Jin, into a paranoid lunatic before returning to reality. Little does she know that Jiang Jin possesses the ability to read minds, seeing through her gentle nature beneath her veneer of malevolence. To avoid the system's punishment, she resorts to a "performance" of abuse, secretly protecting him. He plays along, but in reality, he sinks deeper into his trap.
以昭为光向庭而生

Li Bin Hang, Zhang Ruo XiJin Zhao transmigrated into the vicious female supporting role in a sweet romance novel. Not only is she fair-skinned and beautiful, she also has a husband who is secretly married to a prince in the Beijing circle. However, after hearing that her cheap husband is abstinent, she decided...
偏爱假面娇妻＆偏爱假面的她

Ma Ying Lu, Wu Chun YiTo pay for her grandmother's medical treatment, Zhu Miaomiao asks her mother, who married into a wealthy family, for a loan, but is refused. Instead, she is kidnapped by her stepsister and taken to Aocheng, where she is humiliated. With nowhere else to turn, she deliberately approaches Aocheng's crown prince, Duan Siyu, even offering herself as a bargaining chip. In this misplaced transaction, Zhu Miaomiao feigns love, but Duan Siyu takes her for granted and gradually falls for her.
出狱后，我成了傅少白月光

Qiao Jia Le, Tan Miao MiaoThe white-and-black heroine Lu Jiao, driven by revenge, and the male protagonist Fu Ran, driven by his mother's will, are brought together in the name of a blind date. The two redeem each other, with the always arrogant and ruthless Fu Ran volunteering to become Lu Jiao's most loyal bodyguard, torturing her in every way at first and finally "willing to die for her."
姐姐，我超好哄

Feng Zi Zhou, Zhou Jia YiSheng Shuran was raised by the Fu family and betrothed to their eldest son from childhood. Later, the Fu family retrieved their illegitimate son, Chi Xing. Chi Xing had been rebellious since childhood and often punished, so Sheng Shuran took extra care of this younger brother, unaware that he wasn't raising a puppy, but a wolf. Chi Xing had a childhood dream: to marry Sheng Shuran.
情敌竟是我自己

Wang Jia Mao, Sun Qian XunHai Xi disguised herself as a man to sign in for her brother Jiang Chen from the neighboring school. As a result, she accidentally became the school idol and also accidentally provoked the school bully Shi Yixian! Hai Xi was almost discovered by Shi Yixian several times when she was switching between men's and women's clothing, but she dealt with it wittily. However, she never expected that Shi Yixian would fall in love with her during this process and even regarded her impersonation of "Jiang Chen" as a rival in love.
穿成炮灰：错把摄政王当未婚夫撩

Luo Qi Mu Yi, Hai Yi FanModern-day social slave Jiang Fei transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder supporting character, mistaking the ruthless Regent Pei Jing for her fiancé. Determined to complete her mission and marry into the Wei family, she desperately tries to get the Regent to exterminate her entire family. Unexpectedly, Pei Jing has already seen through her identity and continues to pressure her. Amidst a series of hilarious misunderstandings, the two gradually unravel their childhood bond, ultimately leading Jiang Fei to abandon her mission and spend her life with him.
窈窈入我怀

Tang Shu Ya, Zhang Ning CiLi Yao, a modern-day captivator, was about to help the Fifth Prince ascend the throne. However, during the coronation ceremony, she was assassinated by Qin Ye, also a modern-day time traveler. The two then swap identities and travel back ten years. Li Yao, now the legitimate daughter of the Anyang Marquisate, faces challenges from her adopted daughter, Li Miaoyi, and misunderstandings from her family. She puts aside her "cuckold" facade, cleverly resolving family conflicts and gradually gaining their support. To complete her mission of capturing Prince Su, she proactively creates connections. In her dealings with Prince Su, Yuan She, she not only reverses her own fate but also unexpectedly finds true love. Meanwhile, she navigates Qin Ye's obstruction and palace intrigue, ultimately achieving a comeback.
解救厉先生

Zhang Yun Qing, Zhang Rui EnSent to a mental hospital by her evil mother-in-law, Shen Miaomiao meets Li Xibai, a man framed by his stepmother and brother. The two work together, with Shen Miaomiao helping Li Xibai escape and seek revenge. Through multiple crises, Li Xibai ultimately reclaims the Li Group, and their relationship gradually blossoms.
重生洞房花烛夜，我逆风翻盘

Xu Chen Hao, Wu Jia NuoIn her previous life, Linlang's family was destroyed due to the persecution of the Li family and Gu Yuanfang. After her rebirth, she was determined to protect her family. She started out by selling tea, fruit cakes, and braised meat. With her medical skills, she opened a clinic, developed penicillin, medicine for wounds, etc., and became a well-known miracle doctor. During this period, she rescued the unconscious Amu (actually Xiao Yuzhang, the young master of Dingguo Mansion, who lost his memory due to persecution by his mother). The two knew each other, fell in love, got married, and faced difficulties together. In the end, the two grew old together and had three children (Yier, twins), Amu became the Minister of Works and the Prime Minister, Linlang continued to practice medicine, and her family was happily reunited, realizing their wish of "safe mountains and rivers, and peaceful years".
野蔷归途

Li Shu Tao, Shang Yun QiModern-day social slave Jiang Fei transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder supporting character, mistaking the ruthless Regent Pei Jing for her fiancé. Determined to complete her mission and marry into the Wei family, she desperately tries to get the Regent to exterminate her entire family. Unexpectedly, Pei Jing has already seen through her identity and continues to pressure her. Amidst a series of hilarious misunderstandings, the two gradually unravel their childhood bond, ultimately leading Jiang Fei to abandon her mission and spend her life with him.
神女为我下凡尘

Liu Yu Hang, Yang Shu YuGu Linchuan was in a car accident on his way to propose to his goddess. When he woke up, he discovered he had traveled through time. He found himself ten years in the future, not only married to his goddess but also with a son by her! Before he could even celebrate, he realized his marriage was a complete mess! His wife didn't love him, and his son despised him! But when he demanded a divorce, his goddess—who couldn't swim—would rather jump into the water than agree to it! He dives in to save Zhou Yuyan, but his leg cramps up and he nearly drowns. He travels back in time again, this time to the wedding ceremony eight years prior. This time, Gu Linchuan chooses to run away from the wedding! But unexpectedly, Zhou Yuyan pursues him, forcing him into a love he never wanted!
归途有期

Wang Hao Zhen, Chen Fang TongModern auctioneer Li Manshu accidentally travels back in time to 1936 Paris, where he meets Shen Zhongheng, a seemingly calculating but deeply patriotic figure. Together, they embark on a legendary journey that transcends time and space. Initially testing each other, they gradually become partners, jointly protecting cultural relics amidst turbulent times, ultimately pursuing their own paths for the greater good of their country. But fate's pull brings them together again.
在八月盛夏

Huang Hao Wen, Guo Yu XinReunited eight years later, maxillofacial surgeon Jiang Nanshan accepted He Beizheng, who had brought another woman to see her. She had thought that the two of them were like a straight line, with no intersection after a brief encounter, and that life had long since returned to normal, and that this was the end of the story. Unexpectedly, one night in the middle of August, He Beizheng rang her doorbell. He asked her repeatedly, "Have you thought about me over the years?" "Do you still care about me?" He also asked her to "say you care." Jiang Nanshan responded inexplicably, "Yes." "I care."
掌中灼爱

Du Ya Fei, Zhang Ning CiChu Xiang and Lu Zhibai were adopted at a young age and secretly fell in love. At eighteen, they broke free and became together. The unexpected death of their adoptive parents tore them apart. Seeking revenge, Chu Xiang burned Lu Zhibai to death before leaving. Three years later, she returned with a new boyfriend, only to fall back under Lu Zhibai's control. He appeared to indulge her, but secretly entangled her, their love-hate relationship entwined like a rose in the dark night.
墨色晴天

Ma Shuo Qi, Li Yue XuanSu Nian's parents unexpectedly pass away. To protect her boyfriend, Mo Ning, she reluctantly breaks up with him. She now manages the family business alone, battling against her second uncle. Mo Ning misunderstands Su Nian, believing she broke up with him because he's poor. Six years later, Mo Ning has achieved success, while Su Nian has fallen into despair and lost her sight. Upon their reunion, Mo Ning initially wants revenge on Su Nian, but seeing Su Nian in need, he can't help but help. Overcoming numerous obstacles, the two finally resolve their misunderstanding and are back together.
翩翩棠花照司年

Hu Jia Hao, Wang Yu Ke QingJiang Tang traveled through time and space as a capitalist daughter who had been demoted to a lower class in a period novel. The original owner, disliked her military officer husband's rudeness and dullness, abandoned her twins and eloped with him, ultimately dying tragically at the hands of him and his vicious uncle's family. Jiang Tang, who had traveled through time and space, took the human traffickers and fled, punched her uncle's family, emptied the family of antiques and calligraphy, took a large sum of money, and took the twins on a train to the military district to find their father. Fu Sinian, who hadn't returned home for five years, saw his wife and two children joining the army when he was about to divorce, and from then on he lived a life of comfort and support with his wife and children.
替嫁后夫人她专治不服

Zhang Si Fan, Xiong Yu TingThe legendary Miss Song is reborn as Song Yin, the adopted daughter of the same name. The Song family forces Song Qiang to marry Yu Tingzhi in place of their biological daughter, Song Baoyi, unaware that Yu Tingzhi remains the heir to the family. Song Yin is no longer the country girl she once was, but a martial arts expert, medical prodigy, top hacker, and violin prodigy.p.s. This got taken down on Youtube right away every time channels uploaded it lol
逢君化吉

Chen Tian Xiang, Fang Si ChangShe was born to cause disaster, bringing misfortune wherever she went. However, she happened to fall into the arms of the cold-blooded Regent and became his exclusive amulet. She wanted to escape, but he spoiled her to the heavens.
全京城的白月光她重生了

Li Jun Chen, Bie LinEleven years after Lin Mo's death in a car accident, she is reborn and discovers her three younger brothers are cannon fodder in the novel. Determined to protect them, she undoes the schemes of the original female protagonist, Li Huanyu, and the original male protagonist, Gu Jingchuan. She also discovers that Xie Guanyan has been protecting her and her younger brothers for years and has had a crush on her since their youth. Ultimately, she protects her younger brothers and makes a pact with Xie Guanyan to stay together after the college entrance exam, rewriting everyone's fate.
关于我的白月光她也喜欢我这件事

Zhou Si Chao, Zheng Wen YanGenius girl Du Ruo and childhood sweetheart Xu Jingmo, from childhood rivalry to adult reunion. He pursues her, turning his secret love into a driving force for growth; she, from a reticent woman, bravely returns for love and her country. Amidst the tug of fate and disparity, they ultimately journey together to achieve their scientific dreams.
别在失忆后说爱我

Cao Jing Hao, Zhang Zhi QingOrphan Su Yunting was forced by her adoptive family to be close to the all-powerful Pei Wenjing. They fell in love at first sight and were unexpectedly married. However, Su Yunting became a tool for Pei Wenjing's humiliation, driven by his vengeance against the Su family for killing her father. Later, Pei Wenjing suffered a car accident and lost his memory. He forgot his hatred for the Su family and fell in love with Su Yunting, a brief and sweet romance. However, her aunt poisoned her, causing her to lose her memory again. She mistakenly believed Su Yunting had betrayed her and forced her to leave. Five years later, Su Yunting returned with her daughter, who had suddenly suffered kidney failure. Pei Wenjing discovered the truth and donated a kidney to save her life, only to become entangled in a scam to find the heroine's biological father...
夫人大我一千岁

Li Jing Yi, Jia Yi XuanJiang Yunshu, daughter of a prominent family of esotericists, travels back in time to the Republic of China, becoming the eldest daughter of the Jiang family, a wealthy merchant family now living among the common people. Using her esoteric wisdom, she aids warlord Huo Chenyu in his fight against foreign enemies, uncovering their conspiracy to collude with Japan. The two first encounter each other at a mass grave, faking their own deaths to lure the enemy and ultimately annihilate the Japanese pirates. Their mission accomplished, Jiang Yunshu returns a thousand years ago to become "Yunzu Taijun." Huo Chenyu cherishes the silver bell she left behind for the rest of his life, their love, a love that transcends time and space, forged in an eternal destiny.
姐是病娇太阳花，谁见都要笑哈哈

Yu Long, Yang Mie Mie (Yang Yi Lu)Qi Xiaojiu was lost as a child. Because of her extraordinary talent, she was selected by the Chinese Special Operations Bureau to become an ace agent. When she was 19 years old, the upper class sent her to the Qi family under the escort of her mysterious boss Fei Chiyuan to help her feel the warmth of society again. Facing her father who hated her, her four tough brothers, Xia Rongyun who was both her aunt and stepmother, and her little princess stepsister, Qi Xiaojiu fought back against all the tricks and took back everything that belonged to her. At the same time, the disguises of the genius painter Ji Jiu and the mysterious scientific research master could no longer be concealed.p.s. Miemie changed her screen name? Since when?
柔弱世子妃掀翻全京城

Li Pei Yang, Wang Yan FeiThe modern gambling god's daughter Liu Ying travels through the book and becomes Tang Liuying, the sickly daughter of the general's mansion. She marries Lu Zhaoye, the dandy prince of the Ning Palace. See how the modern time-traveling woman hooks the prince and trains her husband like a dog. The spoiled husband cannot leave his wife.
穿书后我反向驯服黑化帝王

Zhu Min Xin, He ShiWen Wan, a modern-day girl, transmigrates into a novel and becomes the daughter of a vicious marquisate. Forced to bind to a system, she bullies the downtrodden Second Prince, Xie Linyuan, to force his evil turn, threatening punishment. Aware of the original owner's tragic fate, she pretends to be difficult but secretly supports him, repeatedly defying the system's commands to protect Xie Linyuan. Amidst their testing and nagging feelings, the two unite to fight against the regicide-thirsty Crown Prince and the ruthless Empress. After Xie Linyuan ascends the throne, Wen Wan reluctantly departs to complete her final mission. Years later, as he governs the country, Wen Wan reunites with her. Together, they break free from the system's constraints, reversing fate through love and forging a happy ending.
见梨传

Chang Zhe Kuan, Dong Yue YuThe story follows the orphan Shi Jianli, who seeks refuge with her aunt at the Duke of Anguo's mansion. Though betrothed to her cousin Qiao Jingchuan, she is snatched away by Ming Yueshu, a concubine's daughter. Faced with humiliation, Shi Jianli, with her intelligence and tenacity, skillfully breaks off the engagement. Through these twists and turns, she meets and befriends the Crown Prince, Ming Zhaohan. Ming Zhaohan admires her independence and courage, repeatedly stepping in to protect her. The two, through both the inner strife of the mansion and external crises, grow deeply attached. Ultimately, Shi Jianli overcomes social status and marries Ming Zhaohan, commemorating a sweet and endearing story of mutual achievement and support.
请君入帐来

Bai Yi Xiang, Zhang Rui EnAfter staying up late reading a torturous novel, modern-day reader Shen Qingqing travels through time as Queen Shen Qingshuang of the fallen Southern Liang Dynasty, just as the tyrant Jun Yin of Yan State is about to overthrow Liang and enter the palace. Jun Yin unexpectedly hears Shen Qingshuang's inner thoughts, witnessing her conflicted state as she complains about the plot, obsessing over her own beauty, and simultaneously being forced to resist the "torture system." As the two spend time together, the plot gradually deviates, ultimately unlocking a hidden, intensely romantic plot. Shen Qingshuang gives up and returns to reality, falling deeply in love with Jun Yin.
重生: 拒绝当舔狗, 女神校花急了

Zhang Shi Yuan, Bai Heng WeiAn unexpected event sends Jiang Che back to the day before the college entrance exam, when he confessed his love to the school beauty Su Rongyin and was rejected. He severs his obsession with being a "dog" and vows to pass the university entrance exam, leveraging his past life memories to earn his first fortune and redeem himself. However, Su Rongyin, who had previously rejected him, panics and embarks on a measured pursuit of her husband. This unfolds a story of youthful triumph and emotional entanglement.
重生回夫君大婚时，她逆风翻盘第二季

Chen Yun Ting, Yang Cheng Lu, Yang Cheng HanYun Zheng is reborn, returning to the time of her wedding night, where she was humiliated by her husband and Bai Yueguang. She kicks over the candlesticks and refuses to enter the Marquis's residence. In her previous life, they tricked her into marriage and destituted her family. After her rebirth, she successfully reverses her fate, vowing revenge...*split into 2 parts due to file size
靡日不思

Qiao Jia Le, Chen Si CheForced by her husband, Qin Xiuhan, Shi Yan faces the prospect of having a child. Heartbroken, Shi Yan mistakenly encounters Xiao Chenyan, a warlord, in a bar, mistaking him for a male model. Later, Shi Yan becomes Xiao Chenyan's mistress, unaware of his true identity. During this time, Shi Yan becomes pregnant, and Qin Xiuhan finally realizes his mistake, but it's too late. Liu Ruyan's actions ultimately lead to her own downfall. Ultimately, Shi Yan divorces Qin Xiuhan, and she gives birth to Xiao Chenyan's twins, a relationship they share happily.
