撒糖

Wen Yu, Lei Xiao YuOn the wedding day, Jiang Yu was full of joy waiting for happiness to come, but she didn't expect that her scumbag fiance Chu Kai ran away from marriage to save his mistress. He even allowed Xia Ying Ying to bully her, and took her away to give blood transfusion. Unexpectedly, the captured Jiang Yu is no longer the cowardly Jiang Yu. She has been reborn, so she mercilessly kicked the scumbag, and tore the mistress apart. When she left the hospital, she ran into the handsome and wealthy man, Bei Jing Xiao. In order to complete her previous mission, she used the treatment of Bei Shi Sheng's legs as bait, successfully married Bei Jing Xiao, and hid her identity to start the road of abusing the scumbag. Under external pressure, Jiang Yu and Bei Jing Xiao's relationship continues to heat up.(Oct 12, 2024)
我想许愿在身边

Zhang Ji Jun, Peng YaoXu Yuan wishes to be reborn at 18, determined to repay Zhou Qi Xing, who died in revenge for her in her previous life. She begins actively flirting with him, bringing him soup and medicine, shielding him from trouble, and making him blush, believing him to be innocent. Little does she know that Zhou Qi Xing possesses a hidden talent. While seemingly passive, he's actually calculating, using tactics like his "abs" to gradually win Xu Yuan over.(Aired: Jul 25, 2025)
体重兑换系统，胖子逆袭计划

Wang Kai Mu, Li Jing Ye, Zhao Yu ZheIn her previous life, Shang Yechu was fat, stupid, and dumb. She was exploited by her family and became a comedian. After her rebirth, she bound her weight to the system and changed her fate. Shang Yechu took her system 103 and opened it up in all directions, bravely entering the entertainment industry.
以她为笼 & 西装暴徒

Lu Dan Dong, Wang Xiao YiA deception that went beyond belief, a fateful reunion. She is reporter Shen Ning, who once completed a mission in disguise; he is Rong Ming, also known as Jiang Chi, who has returned with an unknown purpose. When the chess game restarts, the line between hunter and prey has become blurred.
栀野昭昭

Yang Yan Guang, Liu Rong RongRenowned general Wen Qingyu died in battle, only to awaken as the deceptive daughter of a wealthy family, driven from her home. Drawing on her past life's skills in medicine, martial arts, and design, she confronts the true daughter and the scumbag, searching for her former lover, Pei Yanshi. Pei Yanshi, heir to a wealthy family and director of a national secret research institute, recognizes her instantly. Together, they defeat scumbags, pursue scientific research, venture into the entertainment industry, and disrupt a nefarious international mafia plot. The unfinished love story of a general and a prince from a previous life finds a happy conclusion in this life.
空间在手，神医毒妃风华天下

Wu Zhu Xi, Xu Bo DiQin Ran, heir to a prestigious medical family in Country Z, accidentally traveled through time and space and became a peasant girl in ancient times while searching for a meteorite. She opened her eyes to find her family destitute, her grandfather gravely ill, and her step-grandmother, along with her uncles and aunts, abusing them. Not only was her step-grandmother abusive, but her wicked grandmother also threatened to sell her younger siblings, less than four years old, for a silver child. Her parents, incapable of resistance, simply accepted their fate. As their family was about to be murdered, Qin Ran suddenly awakened in a spatial state. Using a silver needle in one hand and a spatial manipulation in the other, she subdued the group of bullies. She also unexpectedly fell in love with Jun Ci, the Eighth Prince from the capital. From a humble peasant girl, she became a sought-after heir to the art of medicine and poison.
她不乖，要哄

Zhang Hao, Huang Ye PingJi Shuyi, the eldest daughter of the Ji family, "exploded" Jiang Cheng, the young master of the Jiang family, in a bar, and from then on, they started to play tricks on each other: they were scared to tears during racing, quarreled with each other during military training, and protected him during training. In the process of quarreling, they even teased him
莫挽旧时雪

Tan Yu Qiao, Mai TongSu Muci's sister, Su Wan, was framed and killed by the Xie family. Upon returning to China, Su Muci learned that the Xie family had used their power to suppress Su Wan's murder. He decided to seduce Xie Jinglan, the head of the Xie family, and win his heart. Then, using his influence, he could gain access to the Xie residence, uncover the truth, and avenge his sister. Su Muci used every trick in his power to make Xie Jinglan fall in love with him. He successfully entered the Xie residence and gathered evidence. Just as she was about to denounce the Xie family, Xie Jinglan learned that she was Su Wan's sister and that everything he had done was a manipulation of him. Ultimately, out of love, he helped Su Muci imprison the three Xie family members.
她靠弹幕翻身

Li Yu Tong, Ma Qian QianThrough spoilers in the live-action comments, Jiang Jingning, nicknamed "Canary," discovers she's a cannon fodder supporting character and learns of her tragic end. To keep her job and save her life, Jiang Jingning goes from passively slacking off to actively engaging in a battle of wits with the female lead, Xie Nanxun, while also risking her life to shield He Xingxiao, ultimately gaining shares and achieving a comeback. She thwarts Xie Nanxun and the young master's kidnapping plot, exhausting Xie Nanxun's "female lead aura," and the "Canary" realizes she has already fallen deeply in love with He Xingxiao.
我真千金誓死守护病娇

Wang Dan, Zhang Xiao Nian (RAW)After multiple rebirths, Gu Chenyun discovers her life is deeply bound to that of Jing Huai, a savage, suicidal CEO. If Jing Huai dies, she'll die within three days. To save both of their lives, the glamorous and charming Gu Chenyun resolves to make the gloomy, world-weary Jing Huai fall in love with life. She joins Jing Huai's company, Jianghuai Technology, as his personal guardian, using quirky breakfasts and plant decorations to break his dark world and help him fight the vicious Jing family and the biased Ning family. Initially cold and resistant, Jing Huai gradually becomes moved, going from saying "get out" to declaring possession. Finally, at their wedding, they make a promise: Gu Chenyun swears to protect Jing Huai until his death, and Jing Huai may not love the world, but he will always love her.
东风再起时

Zuo Yi (RAW)Twenty years ago, Li Tian was framed by Wu Biao, resulting in the disappearance of his daughter and the insanity of his wife. Twenty years later, his wife, filled with grief, committed suicide by suicide. Traumatized by grief, Li Tian, ​​now a business tycoon, unexpectedly travels back in time to 1992. Determined to undo the damage he inflicted on his wife, Li Tian resolves to earn money to repay his debts. He first rescues Lin Keke, a young woman from Kyoto, who is hiding her true identity, and then mortgages his ancestral home for start-up capital. Leveraging his omniscience, he and Lin Keke maneuver between the director of Dafu Factory and the wealthy Zhao Zhenghe, successfully earning their first pot of gold, punishing Ding Hu, and redeeming Li Qiuyu's affections.

断卷重书

Yu Shu Zheng, Yu'erIn her previous life, Yin Liao mistakenly trusted the time traveler Lin Huaiyue and her husband, Lu Changling, leading to betrayal. Her father was assassinated, her country was overthrown, and she was disfigured and nailed to death in a prison with Lin Huaiyue's high heels. Upon learning of her death, her loyal General Chi Liang led 100,000 cavalrymen to be buried with her, but was thwarted by Lin Huaiyue's schemes. Reborn in the fifty-second year of Dali, Yin Liao, armed with memories of her past life, resolved to rewrite the tragedy. First, she rescued the framed Chi Liang, dispelling his resentment with sincerity and taking the "most loyal sword" into her own hands. She also won over Xiao Yue, the East China Sea hostage, paving the way for him to become a future ally.
齐总，夫人的心声藏不住了

Yuan Ke Qian, Xia Jing RanYi Qing Ju transmigrates into a novel as Qi Wei Ran’s wife and is forced into the role of a sycophantic “bootlicker.” Unexpectedly, Qi Wei Ran gains the power to read minds and becomes intrigued by Yi Qing Ju’s inconsistent behavior. Wanting her freedom, Yi Qing Ju helps the system match the novel’s original male and female leads—only to discover the male lead is Qi Wei Ran’s nephew, Qi Xi Nian. As she protects the nephew and earns his trust, Qi Wei Ran gradually develops feelings for her.(Aired: Jul 30, 2025)
十八岁太奶奶驾到，重整家族荣耀第三部

Zeng Hui, Li Ke Yi, Wang Dao Tie, Zhao Ting Yi, Chen Tian Xiang, Wu Tian Hao, Wang Pei Yan, Meng NaIn 1955, Professor Rong Yu unexpectedly passed away. Upon opening her eyes, she was transported to the body of an 18-year-old girl with the same name seventy years later. Her son had become a chairman in his seventies, and she had several handsome great-grandchildren. This season, Rong Yu experienced events like the Ji family's third young master's idiocy, Mr. Ji's heartbreak, and the malicious detention of the Lighthouse Nation. Yet, she used her wisdom and ability to rectify everything!p.s. It's finally out. The most star studded duanju. and it's getting more and more cast in each season lol
千金一曲幻君来

An Zi Yang, Zou Yi LinDesperate pianist Wang Tiantian, driven to pay off a 10 million yuan debt left by her ex-boyfriend, is forced to sign a three-month engagement with the mysterious CEO Huo Sizhe, becoming his daughter's "temporary mother." She initially intended to take the money and leave, but was instead drawn into the Huo family's internal strife, facing multiple crises including her ex-boyfriend's frame-up, her wealthy stepmother's difficulties, and the disruption of her family's affairs.
天降崽崽，老娘怎么成负心汉了

Han Yu Hong, Ruan Si YaoEighteen-year-old Ruan Tang collapsed in the library from hypoglycemia. Waking up eight years later, she discovered she was married to Leng Jing and had a child. Twenty-six-year-old Ruan Tang was a tyrant, neglecting her husband, abusing her child, and severing ties with her parents to pursue Qin Yu, even abandoning her beloved ballet. Her parents and husband were disillusioned with her...
霍太太她听得见心声

Lin Ya Dong, Wu Ke XuanTells the story of Su Qian, an ordinary girl who unexpectedly acquires the ability to read minds, and her relationship with wealthy CEO Huo Chengyan, from a contract marriage to true love. Su Qian discovers she can hear the tenderness hidden beneath Huo Chengyan's stoic exterior, while Huo Chengyan gradually becomes aware of her special ability. The two support each other amidst business struggles and family conspiracies. The drama blends the grudges of wealthy families, career triumphs, and supernatural powers. Su Qian, with her mind-reading abilities, resolves crises and exposes the villain's schemes. Ultimately, she and Huo Chengyan join forces to protect the family business, transforming from "contract couple" to soul mates.
景少别跑，你的戏精老婆已上线

Huang Xin Hui, Gong Tian YiRuan Xiaoxi, a wealthy daughter tragically abandoned by her own mother, bravely ventures into the entertainment industry to escape marriage, secretly living in the villa of top actor Jing Yanli! From a terrifying bathroom scene to a fierce confrontation in the exam hall, from fake play to real marriage, the two tsundere characters gradually develop feelings for each other through their banter. With Jing Yanli's help, Ruan Xiaoxi fights back, and the two of them race towards the pinnacle, meeting each other at the top!
暗恋是一场困局

Chen Rui, Yu Jia QiPediatrician Yu Jiao and wealthy CEO Zhou Julin had a secret crush on each other in high school. Ten years later, they reunite, with Yu Jiao now a top pediatrician and Zhou Julin at the helm of Zhongbai Technology, facing family alliances and his father's control. Their love rekindles, but is thwarted by class differences, paternal feuds, and romantic rivals. As the truth about Yu Jiao's father's death emerges, they discover that the car accident was a murder orchestrated by Zhou's father to seize his scientific research. Faced with the truth, Zhou Julin breaks with his father and joins forces with Yu Jiao to expose the conspiracy, overturn the verdict, and seek revenge. The two send Zhou's father to prison, reclaiming the Yu family's patents and dignity. Their secret love finally blossoms.
合约之外的心动

Tan Si Yuan, Wang Bing XingThe blind prince pretends to be poor but is pampered, secretly protecting his wife and abusing her scumbag. It's a great pleasure! Fake play becomes real, the rich family is exposed, and Hong Kong Island recognizes relatives.
这NPC咋比我还疯

Xie Yan Feng, Zhuo YiLin An, a transmigrated NPC character in a CEO novel, serves as assistant, housekeeper, driver, and bodyguard to the male protagonist, Fu Tingbai. To earn a multi-million dollar bonus, she's forced to push the original plot forward, reprimanding the "coffee-throwing heroine" and bringing the two protagonists together. However, the plot repeatedly derails. The heroine, Bai Yuan, fails to start work on time, the male protagonist shows no interest in her, and Bai Yuan's character collapses, becoming a money-grubber obsessed with saving her mother.
无上仙尊

Ma Fa Yang, Luo Hong Yu (RAW)Wuchen, the Immortal Venerable, was framed by his best friend and transported to the body of Ye Feng. Faced with his blind and naive daughter, Ye Xiaoxiao, he resolved to break the fate of being cut off from his family and pamper her like a princess. His rapid rise through the Immortal Venerable's power changed Chen Susu's opinion, garnered the attention of the Shen family, and ultimately smitten his enemies, ultimately becoming a formidable immortal cultivator, achieving both fame and fortune.
爹地追妻路漫漫萌宝在线当裁判

Huang Wen Bo, Zhan Ni (RAW)Shen Qinghe graduated from a prestigious university, but was pressured by her family to marry so they could use the betrothal gift money to help her younger brother find a wife. While drunk at a bar, she unexpectedly had a one-night stand with Song Wenjing, the heir apparent of the Song Group. The next day, Shen Qinghe abandoned the 250 yuan she had left and ran away. As a result, Shen Qinghe unexpectedly became pregnant, avoiding the forced marriage and severing ties with her family...
雾锁京蘼

Fu Bo Lin, Ma Bing YiSong Qingwu seeks funding from Zhou Lin for a film project and faces harassment. Her ex-boyfriend, Zong Yu, comes to her rescue and offers some covert support. After many twists and turns, the two resolve their misunderstandings and ultimately end up together. With Fang He's intervention and family pressure, their relationship strengthens, and they face challenges together, ultimately achieving a happy ending.

Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), Bai YeLin Zhao, an orphan from the Lin family's massacre, was adopted by Ye Jiao, the matriarch of the Pei family, and renamed Ye Zhao. She lay dormant for 13 years, seeking revenge. The Pei family promised her to the elderly Bai Rui, the head of the Bai family, but she escaped on the wedding day and actively approached the Pei heir, setting the stage for revenge. She navigated the complexities of her controlling adoptive mother, Ye Jiao; the scheming Bai Rui; and the cynical yet volatile Pei Zheng, the second-in-command of the Pei family. Later, she discovered that the murder was more complex than simple: Bai Rui was merely the executor, the mastermind behind the schemes unknown. Furthermore, Ye Jiao was linked to the mysterious deaths of the eldest sons of the Lin and Pei families. Pei Zheng, knowing he was being manipulated, still aided her. The two grappled with business and emotional battles, facing the choice between revenge and redemption.
欢城

Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), Long XiXu Jinhuan, after years of hard work and perseverance in the film and television industry, is just one step away from becoming a top actress. However, her jealous rival, Zhao Xinyao, is secretly plotting to spread rumors about her romantic life. The painting, a giant one, is the work of Xu Jinhuan's husband, Li Lancheng, head of the Morgan family, ruining Xu Jinhuan's life.
揉碎春潮

Feng Xiang Kun, Song Yu JiaShen Shuangli and Xie Jinghe, once lovers, reunite in a world of love and hate. Xie Jinghe's obsessive pursuits entangle Shen Shuangli, while resisting, gradually develop feelings for him. Interspersed with campus turmoil, family disputes, and other people's obstruction, the two confront the past and the present in a tense struggle!
一哥

Ma Hao Dong, Liu Lan GeXu Yi dropped out of school to work at Jinbihuihuang and quickly became the boss with his extraordinary talent. Later, he replaced his brother and went to jail. Three years later, he was released from prison and delivered food. He also started a business. The whole story revolved around the love-hate relationship with two girls (Zhang Zixuan and Qi Ling). It was because of this that he was involved in the disputes between the big brothers in society. In the end, he got rid of his enemies, broke the conspiracy, and returned to the top.
七零娇妻有点甜

Zhang Jia Song, Sun Yi FeiSu Man travels back to the 1970s and becomes the second daughter-in-law of the Lin family. After her husband, Lin Yunchao, is rumored to have died, her mother-in-law and eldest sister-in-law drug her and force her to marry Lin Yan, her younger brother-in-law. She fights back and agrees to marry Lin Yan, demanding a dowry and a house while shirking expenses. A love blossoms between them. Lin Yunchao's return after amnesia stirs up a storm, also implicating his benefactor, Shu Ya. Su Man reclaims the dowry, revealing Lin Yan's true identity and her pregnancy. Ultimately, Lin Yan achieves first-class merit, reuniting with Su Man and putting an end to his feud with Lin Yunchao.
喻教授我们结婚吧

Liu Zi Hao, Zhou Jing YiWhile helping her sister find a date, art student Shi Sheng unexpectedly meets medical school professor Yu Wenzhou. To escape her mother's control, she impulsively proposes marriage, only to discover her husband is a secret lover she met years ago. In their mutually beneficial marriage, they gradually fall in love, confront family conflicts together, and ultimately find true love and growth.
我的渡劫指南段先生

Zhang Feng Xin, Song Xing YiTo avert a fatal calamity, Xuanmen disciple Shu Wan was sent by her master into a space-time formation. Unexpectedly, she found herself at a divorce scene. Seeing Duan Sinian, shimmering with golden light, Shu Wan's eyes lit up, realizing he was the man her master had described as possessing the Pure Yang Body and imbued with merit. To save her life, Shu Wan pretended she couldn't live without him, but Duan Sinian refused to fall for her deception and insisted she sign the divorce papers. Unexpectedly, Duan Sinian overheard Shu Wan complaining about not living past 35 and changed his mind, taking Shu Wan home. She accumulated merit by eating melons, ultimately successfully cultivating a dual cultivation with Duan Sinian and averting the fatal calamity.
捡个少爷当赘婿，他每天都想亲亲我

Dong Xing Yan, Deng Yan NiSong Nianchu, a female CEO from the 21st century, traveled through time and space to become an orphan girl from the 1970s. Because she was born with supernatural powers, no one dared to marry her, so she took in Mu Shi'an, a young master of the exiled capitalist, as her wife. After the marriage, she relied on her cooking skills and brains to lead the whole village out of poverty, while he used his knowledge of physics to create inventions to improve productivity. As they got along, the two of them went from being a couple to true love, and built a happy family together.
春夜拂晓

Deng Yuan Chao, Shang Bao YiFive years ago, Sheng Ningshuang was betrayed by her adopted sister, Sheng Yingxue. She lost both her parents, was falsely accused of the death of her child, and was thrown off a cliff. Sheng Yingxue then swapped her child with a civet cat to marry the head of the Tianyin Pavilion. Five years later, Sheng Ningshuang returns to Beijing under a different identity and enters the music troupe, attempting to seduce the head and exact revenge on Sheng Yingxue.
歌尽桃花扇底风

Lei Yi Hao, Feng Huan HuanNing Tao, the eldest daughter of the Ning Mansion, a family of incense-making in northern Jiangsu, lost her mother at a young age and was raised by a wet nurse. Because of her gifted sense of smell and incense-making skills, her stepmother dared not touch her and had to raise her like a "golden treasure"! Everyone said that the eldest daughter of the Ning family, Jiao Zong, was domineering and had a bad temper. Whoever married her would be unlucky for the rest of his life! The second daughter, Ning Zhi, was kind and obedient. She had made an engagement with He Tingxu, the prince of Nanchen, early on. Unexpectedly, He Tingxu was injured on the horse farm and was in a coma for three months. Even the imperial doctors in the palace determined that he was a living dead. Ning Tao took the initiative to marry him to the Beichen Palace and gave her shadow (secret guard) that she had always loved to the second daughter, Ning Zhi.
苏先生，复婚请排队

Li Mu Yang, Cao Qian YiTang Xuqiu was in a car accident. Before his third year, he was bound to a system that required him to capture the Qing Gang's heir, Su Yin, within three years. If she fell in love with him, he would be resurrected. After the system teleported him, Tang Xuqiu was unaware that Su Yin was actually his childhood crush. Su Yin, however, was deeply in love with the supporting actress, Wen Tao. Due to her numerous enemies, she was constantly troubled. His subordinate, Lin Hao, chose Tang Xuqiu. To protect Su Yin and fulfill the system's mission, Tang Xuqiu offered to marry her. Three years later, after countless attempts to protect Wen Tao, Tang Xuqiu failed his mission and was killed by the system. Su Yin then realized that Tang Xuqiu was the one she had loved since childhood...
顾机长，太太说自己守寡三年

Yang Huan , He Yi TingSu Rao and Gu Nanting have been married for three years, but their marriage has always been kept secret. Gu Nanting has never publicly revealed his wife's identity and has frequent affairs with his white moonlight, Cheng Lu (Su Rao's half-sister). This has left Su Rao feeling deeply aggrieved, and she ultimately chooses to divorce Gu Nanting and return to the arms of her second male lead, Gu Mingchen (Gu Nanting's uncle), who has always silently protected her.
裴教授，重生夫人她超好命

Wei Ruo Chen, Zhang Qi Xuan (RAW)In her previous life, Shu Cheng exhausted her husband's luck, only to be betrayed and perish alongside his scumbag and his slutty sister. After both were reborn, she decisively broke off the engagement and instead invested the watch she'd been promised in exchange for good luck in the down-and-out professor Pei Jingxing. Little did she know he was the grandson of a reclusive tycoon. In this life, she achieved a remarkable comeback, becoming the man who treated her like a treasure and doted on her to the skies.
秋雨潇潇锁相思

He Kun, Deng Yan Ni (RAW)Lin Xiaohua was the top pursuer of Yan Chen, the prince of Beijing's inner circle. After being rejected by Bai Yueguang, Yan Chen began a relationship with Lin Xiaohua. Everyone knew he was using her as a training ground, and everyone waited to see her make a fool of herself, yet Lin Xiaohua pursued her relentlessly. Just before the start of university, Yan Chen's mother paid Lin Xiaohua the balance and asked her to leave. Lin Xiaohua obediently took the payment and fled. But that night, when the news of the prince of Beijing's inner circle committing suicide for love spread throughout Beijing, everyone was stunned.
重生2005我的青春我做主

Xiang Shuai, Lu En XinAfter a mediocre forty-year-old death at a construction site, Zhou Jiangnan was reborn twenty years earlier, starting over. With a chance of passing the college entrance exam and his parents still alive, he resolved to make up for all the regrets of his past life. Abandoning his former cowardice and servility, he became bold and uninhibited, handsome and free-spirited. He dazzled the audience with his astonishing basketball skills, mesmerized his teachers and classmates with his dazzling guitar and singing in music class, and astounded the entire class with his rapid rise in test scores. Zhou Jiangnan steadily fought his way back to the pinnacle of his career, reaching the pinnacle and becoming the master of his life!
开局失忆，我被死对头揣崽碰瓷

Zhang Ji Jun, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun) (RAW)Uncle-sister-in-law literature arrives, and the sense of infidelity is overflowing! The brother who once loved me so much is gone, and now that his brother is gone, the overbearing boss Lu Xiaohan has returned with a vengeance! He wants to inherit everything in the Lu family, including his sister-in-law!
契约系恋人

Cao Tian Kai, Zhang ShanQiu Ling, whose real name is Xia Lin, faces the unexplained death of her father. She decides to disguise herself and infiltrate Xie's company, her father's former closest client, to uncover the truth behind his death. A dark-skinned young woman faces off against a sullen and domineering boss, pitting each other against each other...
暗夜微火

Wang Dao Tie, Mai TongIn 1945, Zhou Mingyu, a member of the Jiangcheng underground party known as "Glimmer of Light," and team member Li Xuemei temporarily assumed the role of "fake husband and wife" to successfully complete the mission assigned by the organization. Li Xuemei, from seeking revenge to gaining a profound understanding of the discipline of underground work, overcame immense emotional obstacles, even risking her life to protect her "enemy," fulfilling her unwavering belief in the cause of the people's liberation. Zhou Mingyu, with his extraordinary wisdom and unwavering self-sacrifice, transmitted intelligence, dismantled the enemy camp, and braved danger for ultimate victory. Their combined "glints of light" would ultimately dispel the darkness.
风情野玫瑰 & 揉碎玫瑰

Feng Zi Yi, Fang Si ChangWei Lurao secretly loves Mingzhu, but due to his low self-esteem and sensitivity, he dares not confess his feelings, remaining silent and protecting her. Nine years later, he returns as the head of the Wei family. Mingzhu has become the infamous villain of Jiangcheng. To win her heart, Wei Lurao conceals his feelings and pushes her to the limit. Upon learning of Mingzhu's past six years, he is filled with regret. It turns out that Mingzhu suffers from depression and is not a biological child of the Ming family. All the family's love is directed towards their biological daughter, Mingtian. Her adoptive father died saving her, prompting her adoptive mother to vent her hatred on her.
八零甜妻被冷面老公宠上天

Zhang Bei Xi, Zhang Yu TianQian Lingling, a modern social animal, died suddenly from overwork. When she opened her eyes again, she found herself traveling back to the 1980s and becoming the wife of the cold-faced officer Xie Yan. Because Xie Yan was injured in the leg during the flood fighting and was unable to recover, the original owner despised Xie Yan's disability and forced Xie Yan to divorce. She injured her brain in the dispute. When she woke up again and found herself in the situation she was in, Qian Lingling regretted it. She also discovered that the orphan of Xie Yan's adopted comrade-in-arms was the future richest woman. Qian Lingling decided to stay in the 1980s to improve her favor. She hugged her husband and adopted daughter's thighs respectively, and worked together with her husband to start a life of a rich woman.
花仙降世，帝君连夜改追妻剧本

Chen Yun Ting, Li Hui MinThe lovely camellia fairy Huo Hongling received a task to help the god Jingyan from the lower world to overcome the tribulation of love, but the way to overcome the tribulation was to have sex with Jingyan! At first, Jingyan sneered at Huo Hongling who actively sought sex, but when Jingyan was in danger, Huo Hongling risked her life to save him. The relationship between the two quickly heated up as they got along, and finally the two overcame the crisis, achieved a positive result, and successfully overcome the tribulation of love.
不负来世不负卿

Shi Jia, Pan Yu HanPrincess Zhao Jinning was deceived by Helian Yi and his concubine sister, Zhao Jinxi, leading to the destruction of her country and family. Her childhood friend, Yan Du, died saving her. Reborn on the day of her coming-of-age ceremony, she resolved never to repeat her mistakes in this life, to protect her country and the people she cherished. As her relationship with Yan Du deepened, Helian Yi's obsession with her quietly rekindled.
伪装狩猎

Ma Yi Yan, Zhu Xiao Xue, Liu Yu Lu, Wei ZunIn high school, Song Mian was bullied by Zhao Mingzhu and others and was forced to drop out. Years later, she was admitted to university with excellent grades and determined to seek revenge. She exploited the relationship between Shen Zhuo and Zhao Mingzhu and cleverly plotted to put them in a difficult situation. Through a series of schemes, Song Mian exposed Zhao Mingzhu and Shen Zhuo's conspiracy, ultimately bankrupting the Zhao family and convicting Zhao Mingzhu. Song Mian successfully avenged her, restored her reputation, and achieved academic success, demonstrating her tenacity and wisdom.
你的胃由我掌管啦

Zhao Wen Xuan, Kong Zhao YuThe plot revolves around talented chef Lin Xiaoman, who unexpectedly inherits her grandfather's old restaurant and crosses paths with the aloof CEO Lu Jingshen. Lu Jingshen suffers from severe anorexia due to a traumatic childhood, but Lin Xiaoman's culinary skills awaken his sense of taste. A gradual bond blossoms between the two over the delicious food encounters, and Lin Xiaoman's heartwarming dishes heal Lu Jingshen's trauma. Meanwhile, the story unravels a grudge between the Lu and Lin families, stemming from a culinary competition dating back twenty years. The series weaves together the competition between Michelin-starred restaurants and the innovation of traditional cuisine, ultimately resolving the gap between generations through the theme of "delivering love through food."
侯府全重生，真千金专治不服

Hu Jia Hao, Wang Yan FeiIn her previous life, Shen Qingyang stole the secrets of heaven and severed the phoenix veins to change the fate of her three brothers, ultimately bringing them to power. However, at the height of their power, her three brothers brutally murdered Shen Qingyang in order to save their adopted daughter, Yu'er, who had faked her own death. Reborn, she discovered her brothers had been reborn with her! She decisively severed her ties and sought revenge, ultimately making her three brothers and the entire Marquisate reap the consequences of their own actions.
岁岁与你

Dai Rui, Ma Duo DuoThe story revolves around Su Qian and Lu Jingshen, forced into a family marriage. Initially, they dislike each other and clash frequently. Su Qian is a resilient and optimistic ordinary girl, while Lu Jingshen is a cold and wealthy business elite. As they get along, Lu Jingshen is gradually moved by Su Qian's kindness and sincerity, while Su Qian discovers the gentleness beneath Lu Jingshen's cold exterior. Together, they face family crises and career challenges. Over the years, their relationship evolves from hostility to love, and after enduring twists and turns, they finally find happiness, demonstrating that true love can overcome all obstacles.
拙慕

Xu Yue, Wang Zi JiaIn her previous life, Shen Youning was murdered by her scumbag fiancé Zhao Muyun, her stepmother Jin Ling, and her stepsister Shen Meiyan in a conspiracy over her property. The murder was then disguised as suicide. After her death, her soul wandered the mourning hall, filled with hatred but powerless to stop it. Just then, Song Xiancheng, the yandere commander who had coerced Shen Youning into love and forced her into submission, suddenly burst into the mourning hall and killed all four of the perpetrators of Shen Youning's death before committing suicide by poison. Shen Youning was horrified to realize that she had always believed Song Xiancheng only saw her as a plaything, unaware of his profound love for her. In her remorse, Shen Youning vowed that in her next life, she would marry no one but Song Xiancheng.
月染私桥

Lu Xing Zhuo, Qin Yu ZhaoWhen his new neighbor, Lou Yan, commits suicide, Si Qiao leaves behind a painting with the magical power of time travel. To save Lou Yan, Si Qiao travels back in time four times, unraveling numerous conspiracies, clearing his name, and eradicating potential trouble. Unaware, Si Qiao believes he's simply correcting a stranger's tragic fate.
月色入我怀

Huang Wen Bo, Yu Yu TongJiang Jianyue, whose childhood trauma at the hands of Xie Fei left her intellectual level stagnant, has a naive and naive personality. After being bullied and drugged by Jiang Ming, she accidentally develops a relationship with Jiang Ming's father, Jiang Siheng, and becomes pregnant. Upon learning of this, Jiang Siheng takes her back to the Jiang family, where they begin a blissful life together as a fatherly uncle and his sweet, naive wife. Later, Jiang Jianyue recovers, uncovers Xie Fei's true colors, and ultimately happily marries Jiang Siheng.
炮灰逆袭：七零辣媳不好惹

Wan Lin Zhou, Su Man RouInternet celebrity Su Manrou travels through time and space as a vicious supporting character from the 1970s. To change her fate, she marries the aloof military officer, Li Zhanye. Using her internet celebrity skills, she rises above the rest of the military, outsmarting the elite and pursuing her career. Her fashion designs dazzle everyone, and as they interact, they captivate Li Zhanye's heart. Together, they resolve crises and ultimately find a sweet home together.
芸芽

Zhu Mo Chen, Fang Chu TongYunya was originally an orphan in the countryside. She saved Pei Zhiyan, the eldest son of the Pei family, who had lost his memory and was seriously injured, and secretly decided to spend her life with him. But after Pei Zhiyan regained his memory, he became a completely different person and wanted to demote Yunya to a concubine. Yunya saw through his indifference and bought off his favor with money before leaving. Pei Zhiyan was unaware of the inside story and waited for her to change her mind. After leaving the Pei family, Yunya bought Wei Wujiang, the young marquis of Wei who had lost his memory due to injury, as his husband. The two fell in love with each other over time and lived a prosperous life. When Wei Wujiang saved Yunya, he suffered a severe head injury and regained his memory. Yunya was still frightened by Pei Zhiyan's incident. Wei Wujiang was caught in a dilemma between his responsibilities to his country and his children's love.
姐姐，过来给我亲亲

Liu Hao Yuan, Wei Fan Shu (RAW)A girl discovers her boyfriend's affair with his secretary. Dejected and drunk, she stumbles upon a young, handsome man in a bar, and they spend a sweet evening together. Mistaking him for a playboy, she leaves him 100,000 yuan and unceremoniously walks away. Little do she know he's actually a wealthy man with a secret crush on her for five years.

这个法医有点冷

Shen Hao Nan, Jin Zi XuanOn his first day at the Liangcheng Police Station, forensic pathologist Cheng Huaian's neighbor's house became a crime scene. Cheng Huaian, never one to spend much time with his colleagues, is suddenly thrust into the life of detective Wen Yan. The two team up to solve cases, becoming close companions who enjoy exchanging pleasantries. Wen Yan's warmth melts his icy personality, but Wen Yan's proactive approach seems to have ulterior motives. While investigating the mysterious triple deaths of a neighboring metaphysics blogger, they accidentally uncover a red cloth that spells bad luck. This leads Cheng Huaian to face repeated crises, and he and Wen Yan help each other, nurturing a bond amidst these crises. But even stranger things await.
被读心后，团宠大小姐人设又崩了

Huang Hao Wen, Shi Xue JingShi Yuanyuan transmigrates into a novel set in the 1980s, becoming the young and vicious ex-wife of a disabled tycoon. Bound to a "Villainous Female Supporting Character System," she must wreak havoc and cause trouble to successfully exit the story and return home. Shi Yuanyuan declares, "Even dogs won't play villains! If dogs won't act, I will!" As the saying goes, the villain gets the most out of the story, and Shi Yuanyuan rolls up her sleeves to begin her powerful and domineering life. Little does she know—her family can hear her thoughts, the family is becoming increasingly united, and even her disabled husband has stood up again, deeming her indispensable...
烬上余温

Zhao Guan Yu, Lin Zi RongWen Yiyi is the legitimate daughter of the Wen family, but her mother was forced into prostitution by her stepmother He Bairui and father Wen Keyan. She suffered long-term neglect and abuse from the Wen family, leaving her physically weak due to medication. To seek revenge, she deliberately approached Ling Yue, Wen Wanqin's fiancé, attempting to sabotage their relationship. Ling Yue was initially confused by Wen Yiyi's actions but gradually became attracted to her and discovered the Wen family's dark side. To consolidate her position, Wen Wanqin tried to send Wen Yiyi abroad and even drugged Ling Yue. Ultimately, Ling Yue chose to protect Wen Yiyi, canceling his engagement with Wen Wanqin and exposing the Wen family's conspiracy. Wen Yiyi successfully avenged herself and reunited with Ling Yue.
娇妻撩人，陆先生他超好哄

Guo Xiang, Liu Xin LeiAfter being reborn, Cen Wan embarks on a journey to win back her beloved Lu Beixun. She tears up the divorce agreement, outwits the villain Cen Xiu, and through her daily interactions of being affectionate and protective of her, she and Lu Beixun eventually move towards each other!
你装傻我充楞，我们天生一对

Da Bao, Jiang Kai XinTop hacker Sang Jiu unexpectedly transmigrates into a book, becoming the illegitimate daughter of the Sang family and being sent to a mental hospital. Initially, she only wanted to feign madness and live a life of leisure, but she unexpectedly encountered Chu Wenye, who also behaved erratically. In reality, Chu Wenye was feigning madness to investigate the true cause of his brother Chu Wenzhou's death, while also searching for a skilled hacker who could break through his brother's computer security.
偷听心声后，暴君绷不住了

Ma Qian Huan, Fang LeiShen Qingqing, a 996 office worker, was complaining about an old-fashioned angst romance novel when she transmigrated into the body of Shen Qingshuang, the empress of a fallen kingdom. According to the system's mission, she had to complete the "physically and emotionally tortured" plot before she could go home. However, the plot took a sudden turn when the tyrant Jun Yin unexpectedly gained the ability to read minds and eavesdrop on the heroine's thoughts, completely transforming the angst novel into a sweet romance.
失业当保姆后，拿捏厌食症老板

Qin Wei Zhao, Li Bi RongAfter suffering betrayal both at work and in her personal life, Lu Zhiyu resolutely quit her job and entered a new field, becoming the personal nanny of business tycoon Shang Yu. Shang Yu unfortunately contracted severe anorexia five years ago and has been relying on intravenous nutrition to sustain his life ever since. Lu Zhiyu, with her superb culinary skills and meticulous care...
天降小人参帅府宠上天

Wang Zi Han, Liu Zi HengGinseng, a thousand-year-old ginseng that had cultivated itself into a spirit, was sent down the mountain by the Mountain God to repay a debt of gratitude. By chance, she possessed the body of a "jinxed" little girl rejected by the Qin family, thus stepping into the turbulent Marshal's Mansion. At that time, the Marshal was missing, the young Marshal was in a coma, and the Marshal's Mansion was in financial difficulties. Everyone said that she would bring misfortune to the Marshal's Mansion.
山有木兮木有枝
Li Ruo Xun, Lin Qiu NaiOne is a noblewoman secretly in love with her brother; the other is a ruthless regent. How will this long-planned unrequited love finally blossom into marriage?
心声炸锅！贵妃她被迫当情绪垃圾桶

Qi Pei Xin, Zhang Yi MengA discarded concubine in the cold palace unexpectedly gains a "System of Empathy for All Beings," which amplifies and forcibly reflects strong emotions back to the person in question, granting the female protagonist ten times the empathy. From then on, people in the palace go crazy and self-destruct at any time, frequently contradicting their own experiences. The female protagonist becomes a plague that everyone avoids in the harem, and even the conspiracies of foreign enemies cannot be hidden. To clear her father's name, the female protagonist willingly becomes the emperor's human lie detector. At the same time, she becomes strange allies with the Duke of Zhenguo, who is ordered to monitor and investigate her. One pretends to be weak while the other tests her with his daily quirky humor, and they develop feelings for each other.
欲染甜梨

Li Yong Jing, Jiao RuiXing Sanye, the most arrogant and eccentric figure in Beijing's social circle, made a high-profile, impromptu marriage to a strangely dressed young woman during his brother's engagement banquet. Rumor has it that the woman, who is known for her aloofness towards women, was passionately kissed by Xing Heye on the street. However, the woman herself, Xia Xiaoli, vehemently denies this! She claims to be a wealthy socialite, but in reality, she works five jobs a day, with being the young mistress being just the most cost-effective side job. She's incredibly busy, juggling acting with the unpredictable Xing Sanye, being available at his beck and call, and even having to constantly revise her contract terms.
闪婚后，我被大叔老公宠上天

Fan Xiao Dong, Yu Xin YiOn the eve of her engagement, Zhao Xiaoya witnesses her fiancé Fu Chenyu cheating on her with her sister Zhao Xiaoting. Impulsively, she marries Fu Zhengting, whom she meets by chance. After the marriage, she learns that he is her fiancé's father. Under Fu Zhengting's care, she transforms, breaks free from the shadow of her family of origin, uncovers her true identity as the daughter of the Mo family, exposes a conspiracy, and ultimately gains love and family affection.

Shen Hao Nan, Jin Zi Xuan[HERE]2. 被读心后，团宠大小姐人设又崩了 - Huang Hao Wen, Shi Xue Jing[HERE]3. 烬上余温 - Zhao Guan Yu, Lin Zi Rong[HERE]4. 娇妻撩人，陆先生他超好哄 - Guo Xiang, Liu Xin Lei[HERE]5. 偷听心声后，暴君绷不住了 - Ma Qian Huan, Fang Lei[HERE]6. 闪婚后，我被大叔老公宠上天 - Fan Xiao Dong, Yu Xin Yi[HERE]7. 山有木兮木有枝 - Li Ruo Xun, Lin Qiu Nai[HERE]8. 你装傻我充楞，我们天生一对 - Da Bao, Jiang Kai Xin[HERE]9. 欲染甜梨 - Li Yong Jing, Jiao Rui[HERE]10. 失业当保姆后，拿捏厌食症老板 - Qin Wei Zhao, Li Bi Rong[HERE]11. 心声炸锅！贵妃她被迫当情绪垃圾桶 - Qi Pei Xin, Zhang Yi Meng[HERE]12. 天降小人参帅府宠上天 - Wang Zi Han, Liu Zi Heng[HERE]13. 幼师穿书再就业 - Zhou Rong Qiang, Du Zi Yang[HERE]
伪装乖犬

Ye Hao Ran, Meng NaSeven years ago, Song Wenying's foot landed on Song Qinian's injured shoulder, and she coldly said, "I only hurt you because I like you." Seven years later, the once thin and timid little wolf has grown into a domineering and aloof ruler. In the dimly lit basement, Song Qinian slowly kissed away her tears, his tone full of infatuation, "Sister, I only hurt you because I like you. Sister taught me that, didn't I learn it well?"
九爷你家小祖宗不想负责

Jin Jia Yu, Ma Le JieThe whole of Fengcheng was abuzz with gossip: An Nansheng, a powerful businesswoman, had begged her husband for a good life, but on their wedding day, he spent a whole day and night with another woman. Everyone laughed at her for being abandoned by her husband, but she nonchalantly declared that women are only better off without men! After becoming single again, she accidentally became the favorite of the powerful Ninth Master of the Mu family, treating him like a male model. She thought they would never cross paths again, but little did she know that he had been meticulously planning a cat-and-mouse game with her. Only when she fell into his arms did she realize that there was no coincidence at all; it was all a long-planned scheme by this man.
错换人生1977

Wang Dao Tie, Mai TongTraveling back to the 1970s and encountering the worst of the worst?! Watch as a 70s-era domineering CEO teams up with the venomous wild rose Lin Xi to teach you how to take on everyone and everything, make money, and punish scumbags at the same time!
她似软糖甜

Guan Yue, Yue Yu TingWhen Ruan Tang wakes up, she finds herself not only a mother, but also her nemesis Leng Jing as her husband! To make matters worse, eight years later, she discovers she's a love-struck cannon fodder, desperately groveling before a scumbag boyfriend? To rewrite her tragic story, she teams up with her "nemesis" husband for a hilarious counterattack, but along the way, she uncovers Leng Jing's long-hidden secret of affection and the truth about her amnesia and her place in this world.
黑莲花手撕命书后

Xie Hong Xin, Zhang Jin YiSu Wanwan foresees in her dream that she will be killed by her half-sister, Su Qinghuan. This awakens her power within the "Book of Fate," and she vows to shatter the "female" label and change her destiny! Using her premonition, she plots step by step, slapping away the tea, escaping traps, overturning the Crown Prince's prejudice, and uncovering the truth about the position of the Crown Prince with the deeply misunderstood God of War, Shen Jinzhao. Together, these two powerful figures slap the scumbag in the face, outwit the court's intrigues, ultimately shattering the Crown Prince's ambition for the throne, rewriting the original story's ending, and transforming from a "destined ashes" into a lotus flower heroine who controls the world.
反派送系统，虐渣训夫两不误

Zhu Jing Hao, Zou Yi LinLin Xiaoman works diligently and is devoted to her boyfriend, Gu Mingxuan, only to be betrayed by him and her best friend, Bai Qianqian. The two secretly alter her performance review, causing her game project to fail and resulting in her demotion by the CEO. Unexpectedly, this awakens a workplace game system within her. From then on, the ruthless Lin Xiaoman tramples on male supporting characters, defeats female supporting characters, orders the CEO to become a stay-at-home husband, and climbs all the way to the top of the group.
在他心尖肆意撒野

Bai Yu, Lu Dan NiLing Wei, a top design student at Yenching University, catches her fiancé Xu Zixun cheating on her cousin Ling Yun in a live stream, but unexpectedly gets caught up in a manhunt by Ye Ting, the president of Dingfeng Group. The two are forced into a contract marriage. Ling Wei uses Ye Ting's help to investigate the truth behind her parents' car accident and fight against villains, while Ye Ting, with Ling Wei's help, breaks free from family constraints. After overcoming conspiracies and trials, their fake marriage becomes real, and they ultimately join hands to avenge their family business, rebuild their family enterprise, and find true love.
姐姐，撩完就想跑

Zhu Ao Yu, Zhang Jiong Ai"Sister, you think you can just sleep with me and run away?" Tang Shuang, in a drunken rage, gets involved with 19-year-old Zhou Yan. She intended to use 30,000 yuan to sever ties, but he relentlessly pursues her, forcefully intruding into her life and heart. This younger-man-older-woman romance is an accident, but also a long-planned reunion.
情深不寿终白头

Sun Zi Cheng, Wu Yi FeiThe story revolves around Lin Qian and Lu Chen, a couple who fell in love in their youth. Their deep affection was thwarted by family upheavals and career disagreements at crucial junctures in their lives. Lin Qian sacrificed her dreams for her family, while Lu Chen shouldered the pressures of his family and struggled alone. During their years apart, they each experienced growth and pain. Upon their reunion, bearing their wounds and unresolved issues, they re-examined their relationship amidst the interplay of reality and memories. After many trials, they finally understood that the true meaning of "deep love is short-lived" is not that deep love inevitably leads to failure, but rather that only through honesty and mutual growth can they grow old together.
我是异能老婆，勇闯六零

Wang Yu Kai, Peng Qian LingLin Man, a post-apocalyptic tycoon, unexpectedly travels back to 1966, becoming the despised and bullied daughter of the Lin family. Upon waking, she is immediately framed by her jealous cousin, Lin Shuang, and even forced by her family to marry a mentally challenged man for their own benefit. After her first encounter with Huo Qingci, the military doctor who treats her at the hospital, Lin Man, determined to escape her dysfunctional family, seizes the opportunity and proposes a whirlwind marriage to Huo Qingci during a blind date. Huo Qingci is also attracted to Lin Man's intelligence and decisiveness. After their whirlwind marriage, Lin Man and Huo Qingci face their challenges together.
沪上神探之彼岸花开

Zhang Xuan, Yu Jia LinBai Die, a dancer at the Paramount Ballroom, is found dead in a locked room, surrounded by eerily beautiful talismans and spider lilies. Suicide or sacrifice? Deputy Police Chief Jin Yanqing, overruling all objections, concludes it's a perfect murder. Street shaman Ling Wei, upon hearing the details, suddenly shatters her teacup—the spider lilies, the locked room, the talismans—it's exactly the same scene as her sister's death three years ago. She infiltrates the scene, only to encounter Jin Yanqing. One pursues the crime through science, the other through metaphysics. When all clues point to the same goal, they discover that Bai Die's death is just the beginning. The curse from three years ago has been restarted, and the next sacrifice is quietly being born in the darkness.
皇叔不经撩

Wang Si Qi, Wang Yu HanThe head of the Heavenly War Medical Bureau transmigrated into the body of Luo Jinshu, an orphan girl in the Great Yan Dynasty. Upon arrival, she was suspected of murdering the Princess Consort of Shu and was hunted down throughout the city. She was also targeted by the Prince of Shu and a scheming woman. Well then, let's see how this modern person can go on a killing spree. But how come, despite my fierceness, a royal uncle is considering marrying me?
离婚后，乔小姐光芒万丈

Wu Si Teng, Zhang Ruo Chen, Li Si YangQiao Zhixu had a crush on Fu Lingsheng for ten years and willingly agreed to his absurd request for a marriage of convenience. With the contract about to expire, Qiao Zhixu, still full of love, wanted to renew it with Fu Lingsheng. However, she was heartbroken by Fu Lingsheng's behavior towards her childhood sweetheart, Jian Nuo. In the end, while watching the aurora alone, Qiao Zhixu experienced a life-threatening earthquake, which made her realize that her ten-year crush was nothing but a joke. So, Qiao Zhixu decided to divorce Fu Lingsheng and start a new life.
误入豪门后，我听到了植物人老公的心声

Chang Zhe Kuan, Song Hong YuAfter being reborn, Chu Ciyou hides in the ward of Huo Tingchen, a man in a vegetative state, to escape the fate of having her breasts cut off, and unexpectedly gains the ability to read minds. The two form an alliance and get married. She uses the Huo family's power to outsmart the scumbag Lu Song and the wicked younger sister Chu Yanran, and exposes Huo Zhongjie's conspiracy. While working together to deal with company crises and family infighting, Huo Tingchen gradually awakens and recovers. Their relationship develops from a contractual marriage to true love, achieving success in both their careers and love lives.
寒戟破苍穹

Wang Xing Chen, Chang Xiao Yu (RAW)Set in a mysterious ancient world, the story follows an ordinary boy who, through a fortuitous encounter, acquires a halberd imbued with mysterious power. This halberd's astonishing power attracts the covetous eyes of various factions. With unwavering will, the boy fights alongside the halberd, constantly breaking through obstacles on his perilous path of cultivation. He befriends like-minded companions, fighting against evil forces together, overcoming countless hardships and dangers, rising from obscurity to fame, ultimately using the power of the halberd to break through the shackles of the heavens, protecting world peace, and writing an epic legend.

早逝白月光穿十一年后成全家福星2

Liu San Si, Sun Qian Xun, Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Deng Hao, Zhu Yongqiang |[SEASON 1]A bright and dazzling young lady versus a seemingly virtuous but actually sinister nemesis; a sycophantic second brother; a depressed third brother; and a school bully fourth brother. Reborn as the white moonlight of her younger brothers, Lin Mo reverses their tragic fates one by one. However, the arrival of her "nemesis" seems to subtly alter Lin Mo's life as well. She returns with eleven years of memories, determined to rewrite the ending herself! Her lost self and her three brothers' uncertain futures will be rekindled by her.
与我坠星河

Yu, Hai Bin, Yang Zi YuIn her previous life, Shi Xing, the beloved daughter of the Shi family, was despised by her fiancé and, under the instigation of the family’s adopted daughter, was driven out of her home and even disfigured. After being reborn, Shi Xing returns with vengeance — punishing the scum and slapping faces one by one. She boldly confesses her feelings, turning her former nemesis into her loving husband. Watch as Shi Xing joins forces with the powerful prince to kick the scumbag aside, teach the scheming woman a lesson, and rise to the pinnacle of life.(Aired: Jun 29, 2025)
红毯热吻：和祁先生热恋升温

Chen Jing He, Shi Yue YueTop actress Shi Xing is betrayed by her scumbag boyfriend and scheming stepsister, falling from the peak of fame into utter ruin. Only on the brink of death does she realize that her longtime “rival,” Qi Chen Yan, had been her silent protector and true love all along. Reborn to the past, Shi Xing begins a double mission — launching a sweet and determined pursuit of Qi Chen Yan while taking ruthless revenge on her enemies — opening a thrilling, satisfying road of love and payback.(Aired: Jan 22, 2025)
影后重生：偏执哥哥别黑化

Zhang Yi Yang, Wei LinShi Xing had loved He Sheng for more than ten years, only to realize at the moment of her death that Qi Chen Yan was the one who truly loved her. After being reborn, she kicks the scumbag to the curb, tears apart the fake “innocent” woman, and enters a flash marriage with Qi Chen Yan. Together, the couple crush their enemies, and the XingChen CP (couple pairing) becomes a viral sensation on reality dating shows, hailed as the model couple of the entertainment industry. But unexpectedly, the scumbag He Sheng is reborn too — and begins an aggressive pursuit of Shi Xing once again.(Aired: May 26, 2025)
人面桃花

Yan Zi Xian, Zuo YiThe mountain god Mo Yuan fell in love with the mortal Song Yunshuang. On the eve of their wedding, however, he discovered his beloved had been murdered. Mo Yuan stormed the underworld, using half a Soul Pill to exchange for her reincarnation, but this resulted in her never living past 25 in any of her lives, and he himself was punished by being reborn as a peach blossom demon. A thousand years later, Yunshuang was reincarnated as Song Yunshuang, the heiress of the Song Group, but suffered greatly from her family's mistreatment and was also seriously ill. As she approached her 25th birthday this time, Yunshuang suddenly awakened and decided to live for herself! Mo Yuan and she unexpectedly met again. From initially using each other to joining forces to thwart everyone's conspiracies, they gradually fell in love and discovered the true meaning of love.
迟先生又心动了

Cai Xin Yang, Tian Tian YiUpon waking up, Shen Kui discovers she's a playboy supporting character in a novel! Pregnant with the child of billionaire Chi Yuliang, she recklessly runs off with a philandering man. Looking at her husband's abs and her in-laws' lavish lifestyle, she instantly realizes: this is a rare opportunity, she has to make it! From then on, she relentlessly tries to repair her husband's relationship while simultaneously dealing with scumbags and despicable characters, turning her life into a sci-fi drama. Finally, she learns the truth about her pregnancy, and she and Chi Yuliang finally get together, living a life of quiet contentment with their grandchildren, clearly and undeniably wealthy!
危险情人2

Shen Hao Nan, Zhu Li LanJiang Yan, a survivor of the Qin family massacre, encounters the unfathomable Lu Jianqing while seeking revenge under an assumed name. The two are drawn to each other during their initial tests, with Lu Jianqing making several moves against Jiang Yan. However, Jiang Yan gradually realizes he is merely a pawn in Lu Jianqing's game. As the truth is revealed, all clues point to Lu Jianqing as the murderer of the entire family. It turns out that whoever succumbs first loses everything.
是风动也是心动

Wang Yi Lei, Wang Ya QiThe chairman of Chen'an Group suddenly died before his wedding. The wedding turned into a funeral, and rumors about the bride's husband seizing power spread like wildfire. The male lead, Ji Fengxuan, who had become an excellent special forces soldier with Chen Jing'an's financial support, learned of Chen Jing'an's murder and, to uncover the truth, approached the female lead under the guise of choosing a bodyguard, secretly launching an investigation. During his investigation, he discovered that the female lead was actually an orphan who had been supported by Chen Jing'an since childhood. After learning that Chen Jing'an had cancer and that she had been forced into a fake marriage to help him save the company, the two reconciled. After experiencing a series of trials and tribulations, they finally uncovered the murderer.
替嫁后，傅少宠我入怀

Hu Jia Hao, Wang Yan FeiYe Wanxing transmigrated from a thousand years ago to marry Fu Tingyuan, the heir to a wealthy family, in place of her stepsister. Unexpectedly, on her very first day in the Fu family, Fu Tingyuan died in a car accident. Despite this, she managed to stay and manage to keep everyone in the family in check. Just as Ye Wanxing was preparing to embrace the joys of life as a wealthy socialite, she noticed that the bodyguards assigned to her by the old lady were becoming increasingly brazen in their gaze.
姐姐请入怀

Ye Hao Ran, Wen Mo YanIn her past life, to get revenge on her cheating boyfriend, Jiang Mian seduced Mo Yusen, the crown prince of the capital, only to discover he was a madman... Obsessed and insane, their relationship became a prison, yet also their destiny, until death.
新婚不熟，段机长请低调

Hou Peng Yan, Cao Qian YiXu Xiyan, one of the few female pilots, has faced constant gender discrimination from school to work, even her mother, who has been her only family since childhood, doesn't support her career. To reassure her mother, she hastily marries Duan Lingyun, a fellow pilot, after a blind date. However, due to a job change after marriage, the two go from being "unfamiliar couples" to colleagues, and Xu Xiyan discovers that the woman Duan Lingyun can't forget is none other than herself.
七零娇娇很惹火

Li Sheng Jie, Zhao An DiSang Yanyan unexpectedly transmigrates into a book in the 1970s, becoming a cannon fodder ex-wife. To avoid an early death, she uses her beauty and intelligence to seduce the male lead, Si Liye, determined to tame the roguish Si Liye into the best husband. Si Liye is initially captivated by Sang Yanyan's beauty, but later he is won over by her personal charm. In the end, Sang Yanyan outwits the original female lead and finds her own happiness.
金枫玉露

Li Meng Ran, Cheng ZiElite lawyer Chen Siyu is murdered and her soul travels back to the 1990s, becoming Jin Youwei, the illegitimate daughter of a wealthy family. To avert her inevitable death thirty years later, she allies with Zhou Fei, the ambitious second son of the Zhou family. He vies for power, she changes her fate; a mutually beneficial partnership, however, intertwines unexpected deep affection and entanglement amidst cautious probing.
月夜蔷薇

Xie Yu Wang, Lu Lu LuFive years ago, Ye Zhen fell in love with Ling Siheng, the eldest son of the Ling family. However, on their wedding day, Ling Siheng died in a car accident. By a twist of fate, Ye Zhen married Ling Siheng's twin brother, Ling Siye. In their five years of marriage, they were the most estranged couple. Ye Zhen knew that Ling Siye harbored feelings for someone else, and she felt deeply guilty for taking the position of Mrs. Ling. Therefore, when Ling's mother asked her to end her marriage with Ling Siye, Ye Zhen readily agreed. However, Ling Siye consistently avoided the topic until Ling Siheng and Ye Zhen's daughter, Ling Miaomiao, unexpectedly had an allergic reaction, gradually revealing the long-buried truth.
侯爷，我是你那素未谋面的夫人啊

Wang Yan Xin, Mi QiThe scumbag husband, having changed his mind, plotted to kill her. Song Xiao decisively changed their generational order: if they couldn't be husband and wife, they'd be mother and son! By imperial decree, Song Xiao married the deceased stepfather of the man in question, becoming his stepmother. She lived a life of luxury, calling him "good son" every day, enjoying a life of luxury. Just when things were looking up, an unexpected incident led to her having sex with another man. Song Xiao was initially relieved, relieved that she had married a dead man; as long as she kept it a secret, no one would discover her infidelity. However, things didn't go as planned. Song Xiao carefully concealed the truth from everyone, but unexpectedly, her deceased husband suddenly returned, wanting to give her a wedding night.
笨蛋卧底，误把总裁当黑帮

Wang Yan Xin, Song Yu JiaLawyer Lin Xiaran takes on a case but mistakenly identifies Fu Huai'an, the president of Sihai Group, as the gang leader, Boss Fu, and decides to go undercover. Lin Xiaran is injured protecting a recording pen, and Fu Huai'an, moved by her actions, proposes. To continue her investigation, Lin Xiaran agrees to a whirlwind marriage. After the marriage, Lin Xiaran, dressed in black, searches for evidence and steals phones, only to discover that Fu Huai'an's phone is full of her photos, causing her to waver. When Lin Xiaran is harassed by her ex-boyfriend Lu Xiuwen and mocked by her classmates, Fu Huai'an bravely comes to her rescue. As the two develop feelings for each other, Lin Xiaran discovers that Fu Huai'an is the biological father of her son, Xiao Jiu. With her undercover identity exposed, what will become of their relationship?
七零年代，娇妻的财富密码

Wang Hao Xiang, Xu Qin WeiModern-day heiress Ruan Jiaojiao, dissatisfied with the tragic ending of Ji Huai'an in a novel, unexpectedly transmigrates into the book and becomes a cannon fodder character. Leveraging the billions of assets bound to her by the system and the rewards from her missions, she strives to change her fate and develops a deep relationship with Ji Huai'an. Set against the backdrop of the 1970s, the two experience numerous ups and downs, ultimately achieving success in both love and career.
长公主风华绝代

Ming Chuan, Tian Jiu Luo, Xiao Bo Ting, Su YiPrincess Yunqi, wielding immense power in the court, transmigrates into a fictional world that vilifies her, becoming the abandoned, fake daughter of a marquis. Unwilling to be relegated to a supporting role, Yunqi uses ruthless methods and cunning to navigate the complexities of her relationships: her cold-faced ex-husband, a loyal half-brother, a seemingly innocent but actually cunning prince, a pure-hearted childhood sweetheart, and a haughty prime minister. Yunqi relentlessly defeats villains, wins hearts and minds, and vows to reverse fate, overturn the court, and manipulate everyone at will, living the life of a true leading lady.
桃花落烬凤还朝

Tang Shu Ya, Zhao JiaPrincess Feng Nihuang of the Great Sheng Dynasty, to help her younger brother secure the throne, took up arms, mounted her horse, donned armor, and went to war, guarding the border for ten years. However, just as she achieved a great victory over the Quanrong, she was shocked to learn that her daughter had been humiliated and forced into becoming a concubine, all of which was the work of her husband and younger brother. Upon learning the truth, Feng Nihuang was filled with grief and rage. She publicly divorced her husband and tore apart his shameless and despicable family. Facing her incompetent and tyrannical younger brother, who was determined to kill her, Feng Nihuang no longer supported him. Instead, she resolved to take everything he cherished, become the crown prince, embark on the path of the phoenix, and ascend the throne.
公主嫁到：腹黑将军请上位

Wang Yu Han, Jiang YaoIn her past life, Princess Mu Yun Chu's mistaken love for her husband, Fang Tian Cheng, led to her death and nearly destroyed her father's empire. When she opened her eyes again, she was reborn at the moment Fang Tian Cheng knelt in the imperial study, begging for a divorce. Recalling her past life's painful experiences—forcing Fang Tian Cheng into marriage, condoning his entanglement with Su Ning Xue, and ultimately raising a traitor—Mu Yun Chu resolved to rewrite her destiny.
在冷漠的他怀里撒个娇

Li Zhi Hao, Liu Yu LiDuring an audition, Jian Youen transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder female supporting character. She encounters the amnesiac villain Huo Shih-han, lying that she's his girlfriend to save her life. This triggers a scenario where she needs to accumulate merit points to become a villain. As they spend time together, they develop feelings for each other, and Huo Shih-han dotes on Jian Youen. Jian Youen defeats her stepmother and others, changing the original ending and helping the Jian family escape their predicament. Huo's father opposes their relationship and imprisons Jian Youen, during which she discovers a secret from Huo Shih-han's childhood. Later, Jian Youen resolves Huo Shih-han's crisis of patricide, awakens his conscience, completes her mission, and ultimately the two marry and live happily ever after.
病娇情侣的千层套路

Xiang Ming, Zhi PengThe female protagonist, Yang Cici, was originally a character in a novel. She discovers she can hear the thoughts of a time-traveler, Li Xuanmeng. Li Xuanmeng's goal is to win over Yang Cici's boyfriend, Pei Yanchuan, who is also a yandere (obsessive and possessive persona) and his purpose in approaching her is to disguise himself as normal. To find out if Pei Yanchuan truly loves her, Yang Cici decisively breaks up with him. Unexpectedly, this ignites Pei Yanchuan's twisted possessiveness and gives Li Xuanmeng an opportunity. Amidst Li Xuanmeng's interference, the two deeply in love experience numerous misunderstandings, but ultimately, their intense love rekindles their relationship.
前夫娶平妻，我带空间凤临天下

Wang Yu Han, Zhao Fei XueAfter being reborn, Wei Yunlan divorced her husband Shen Feng on the same day he married a concubine. She used her spatial ability to empty the Marquis's mansion and went into exile with her family. She hired the Tianji Pavilion (the Crown Prince's secret guards) to protect her family and helped the Crown Prince escape disaster and leave the capital. Later, she joined forces with the Crown Prince to thwart the Second Prince's conspiracy. In the end, the Crown Prince raised an army and offered her the land as a dowry to protect the common people together.
[PREV⬅️]31 October Releases:1. 人面桃花

Yan Zi Xian, Zuo Yi[HERE]2. 迟先生又心动了 - Cai Xin Yang, Tian Tian Yi[HERE]3. 危险情人2 - Shen Hao Nan, Zhu Li Lan[HERE]4. 是风动也是心动 - Wang Yi Lei, Wang Ya Qi[HERE]5. 替嫁后，傅少宠我入怀 - Hu Jia Hao, Wang Yan Fei[HERE]6. 姐姐请入怀 - Ye Hao Ran, Wen Mo Yan[HERE]7. 新婚不熟，段机长请低调 - Hou Peng Yan, Cao Qian Yi[HERE]8. 七零娇娇很惹火 - Li Sheng Jie, Zhao An Di[HERE]9. 金枫玉露 - Li Meng Ran, Cheng Zi[HERE]10. 月夜蔷薇 - Xie Yu Wang, Lu Lu Lu[HERE]11. 侯爷，我是你那素未谋面的夫人啊 - Wang Yan Xin, Mi Qi[HERE]12. 笨蛋卧底，误把总裁当黑帮 - Wang Yan Xin, Song Yu Jia[HERE]13. 七零年代，娇妻的财富密码 - Wang Hao Xiang, Xu Qin Wei[HERE]14. 长公主风华绝代 - Ming Chuan, Tian Jiu Luo, Xiao Bo Ting, Su Yi[HERE]15. 桃花落烬凤还朝 - Tang Shu Ya, Zhao Jia[HERE]16. 公主嫁到：腹黑将军请上位 - Wang Yu Han, Jiang Yao[HERE]17. 在冷漠的他怀里撒个娇 - Li Zhi Hao, Liu Yu Li[HERE]18. 病娇情侣的千层套路 - Xiang Ming, Zhi Peng[HERE]19. 前夫娶平妻，我带空间凤临天下 - Wang Yu Han, Zhao Fei Xue[HERE]
雁归时

Dong Yi, Yao Yu ChenThe day before they were to register their marriage, Song Siyan learned that he and Jiang Yusang were half-siblings, sharing the same father but different mothers. His mother had been driven to suicide by Wang Meilan because of this, and to conceal the truth, Song Siyan painfully severed ties with her. Five years later, upon learning that Jiang Yusang was not of the Jiang family bloodline, Song Siyan returned to China, vowing to seek justice for his mother.
吻过月亮

Zhang Ting Rui, Wang HanEighteen-year-old Wen Tangyue harbors a secret crush on her neighbor, Ji Rang, but hides her feelings due to her low self-esteem. An unexpected encounter leads her to meet the rebellious teenager Ji Li, who saves her but fills her with fear. Over seven years of entanglement, Ji Li outwardly teases but inwardly protects her, and Wen Tangyue gradually sees the truth in his heart, her admiration for Ji Rang turning into attraction for Ji Li. However, misunderstandings and hurt cause them to miss each other for seven years, until they reunite at a fashion gala. He has a fiancée, and she is embroiled in scandal; they continue to struggle and waver amidst misunderstandings and tests.
为苟命我抱紧死对头大腿

Ma Shuo Qi, Sun Yan'enReborn, Li Xiyuan had no time to rejoice before discovering she was bound to a "Favorability Conquest System," and her target was none other than Xu Simu, whom she utterly despised?! Watching the system's countdown timer, Li Xiyuan donned a mask of anguish. How was she supposed to possibly win over the enemy she'd played pranks on eight hundred times?!
火红年代

Wang Bing Xiang, Xiao LiIn a year of natural disaster and drought, the Zhang family, possessing the "Divine Eye," perished while saving a village in the north. Their sole heir, Zhang Haibin, was burned and rendered mentally impaired while rescuing someone from drowning. His fiancée publicly humiliated him and broke off their engagement. During the ensuing scuffle, he was severely injured and fell into a coma. Only Zhao Min, a young woman sent to the countryside, remembered his life-saving grace and stepped forward. On the brink of death, the "Divine Eye" awakened Zhang Haibin's sanity. Now alive, he resolved to avenge his humiliation, reclaim his ancestral home, break off his engagement, find true love, and, more importantly, follow ancestral teachings to open the water veins and save the entire village! However, in a year of famine, human nature is unpredictable. Some selfish individuals disregard the greater good, and behind the Zhang family's ruin lies a web of scheming.
年下小娇妻，大叔乖乖宠我 ＆ 幸运甜妻傅总超宠的

Huang Bo, Zhi PengXu Zhiwei witnesses her boyfriend Fu Minghao cheating on her with her colleague Tang Jiaojiao. Enraged, she drowns her sorrows in alcohol, only to find herself in bed with an older man by a twist of fate. She thought she would never see him again, but little did she know that this "older man" was the president of her company, and even more surprisingly, he was her ex-boyfriend's father. With a marriage certificate, she quietly becomes Mrs. Fu, and also her ex-boyfriend's rightful "stepmother." At 20, she successfully gains a 240-month-old son, spending her days disciplining him, slapping her daughter-in-law, and being pampered by the older man.
被偷听心声后，我成了帝王的掌上娇宠

Li Pei Yang, Li Sheng XuanModern woman Shen Qingqing, while complaining about a novel, triggers a system that transports her into the body of Shen Qingqing, the empress of a fallen kingdom. Forced by the system to complete the tragic storyline before she can return home, she faces certain death. Unexpectedly, a tyrant can hear her thoughts, and their forced love evolves into a sweet, mutual romance, ultimately breaking free from the system's constraints!
饲龙：我的五个神兽萌宝

Huang Wen Bo, Zhang Yan LinJiang Fanxing was betrayed by her fiancé Fu Ziheng and her stepsister Jiang Wanying, and pushed into the sea. She was rescued by the ancient dragon god Gu Chenye and unexpectedly gave birth to five exceptionally gifted divine beast babies. Four years later, she brought the babies down the mountain to care for her mother and reunited with Gu Chenye, unaware of his identity. The babies secretly played matchmaker, plotting to make Gu Chenye their "trial daddy." In the workplace, Jiang Fanxing faced repeated difficulties, and Gu Chenye repeatedly came to her aid, leading to a gradual development of feelings between them.
穿越当天，世子爷要以身相许

Xu Dong Zhe, Hu Jia RongA top-tier assassin heroine versus a top-tier, cunning, and sickly hero—a true love-hate relationship. Yun Jin Chu is a top assassin from the 22nd century who unexpectedly transmigrates to ancient times. Upon opening her eyes, she finds herself drugged along with the rumored sickly heir of the Prince of Zhennan. She strips him naked, exposes his disguise, and reveals that the Prince of Zhennan, rumored to be frail and breathless even after a few steps, is not only healthy but also ruthless and capable of wiping out entire families at the drop of a hat. The two are forced into an entanglement, drawn into a court intrigue. She uses her strength and wit to relentlessly defeat the villains, discovering that the heir is the key. She goes to him seeking reconciliation, only to have this cunning man grab her hand and say—"I'll marry you!"*split into 2 parts due to file size
突然回到那年夏天

Zhang Zhi Qing, Qin Jia LinThe female protagonist unexpectedly travels back to her high school days, reliving school life with an adult mindset. Using her memories of the future, she excels academically, becomes a top student, resolves conflicts within her family, and prevents her best friend from being bullied. The drama interweaves themes of first love and trials of friendship. The male lead is her first love, whom she missed due to a misunderstanding; the two reunite and resolve their past grievances. Presented in a lighthearted comedic style, the series recreates the details of a millennium-era school while exploring the regrets of growing up through time travel. Ultimately, the female protagonist, while correcting her past mistakes, realizes that cherishing the present is the true meaning of time travel.
锁娇

Xu Kai Xin, Peng DanAs the illegitimate daughter of the Tang family, Tang Wu suffered constant humiliation from a young age. On her eighteenth birthday, she was drugged and raped by the Tang family, ruining her reputation and leading to her expulsion from the country. Three years later, Tang Wu returned, vowing to make those who had wronged her pay. Thus, she plotted to rise to the top of Jiangcheng's power, marrying Huo Yunshen.
怪力夫人整顿将军府

Lv Yue, Zhao Ke WenBoxing champion Jiang Shuyu transmigrates into the body of a love-obsessed female supporting character with the same name after criticizing a Mary Sue novel. The original owner, a princess, was demoted to a concubine on her wedding day and, along with the male supporting character Zhan Yanting, was manipulated by the main characters Zhan Suining and Jiang Wanwan. She transmigrates on the very day of her wedding to Zhan Yanting, immediately crushing a jade ruyi to declare war, vowing to rewrite the plot, take revenge on the scumbag and the tea girl, and protect Zhan Yanting, making the story her own.
七零小飒妻，追夫治家游刃有余

Li Xiao Feng, Meng Jia HuiModern doctor Meng Wan transmigrates into the body of a villainous supporting character in a period novel. To avoid the original owner's tragic fate and despicable behavior, she resolves to turn the tables and change her destiny. Her first challenge is to avoid divorce and accompany the male lead, Jiang Feng, to the countryside. She uses her medical skills to save lives, outsmarts scheming women, and goes from being disliked to being trusted. She heals her child, saves her marriage, and ultimately wins respect and love, achieving a fulfilling life.
七零娇美人：我老公是反派 & 娇气厂花被抢亲？嫁反派后真香了

Zhou Ti Shun, Bian JingSet in the 1970s, the story follows the beautiful and gentle Lin Xiaoman, who unexpectedly transmigrates into the world of a book, becoming a cannon fodder female supporting character about to be killed by her villainous husband. To change her fate, she decides to use her gentleness and wisdom to influence her seemingly cold-hearted husband, Lu Chen, who is actually burdened with family hatred. As they spend time together, their initial wariness transforms into a blossoming of affection. Lin Xiaoman not only uses her modern knowledge to help Lu Chen resolve crises but also uncovers the secrets of his past. The drama blends the rustic life characteristic of the era with the bittersweet emotional turmoil, ultimately leading the villainous husband to let go of his hatred under her influence and join hands to protect their family.
恋爱脑商爷又争又抢

Li Xing Han, Li Zi YingSang Chuzhi is tricked by her fiancé, Shen Zhijing. She turns the tables and impulsively marries Shang Yuzhou, embarking on a story interwoven with revenge and love. Shang Yuzhou appears cold and aloof, but has secretly loved Sang Chuzhi for ten years. He orchestrates a scheme to win her heart, and after their marriage, he showers her with affection, helping her humiliate other men and women and avenge her family. Amidst misunderstandings and conspiracies, their feelings deepen. Sang Chuzhi gradually discovers Shang Yuzhou's deep affection and her own feelings, ultimately uncovering the truth behind her ten-year-long unrequited love. Together, they overcome all obstacles, culminating in a grand wedding and a happy ending.
八零：家属院来了个异域大美人

Xiao Lai, Jia Jin SaiRong Mei unexpectedly travels back to 1987 and finds herself about to be buried alive. Just then, Liu Rong arrives in time to save her. It turns out that she has been trafficked. Grateful for Liu Rong's life-saving grace, Rong Mei decides to continue being Liu Rong's daughter-in-law. While dealing with the incident of her sister-in-law beating Liu Rong, her husband Zhou Nanxu, whom she has never met before, returns. It turns out to be him!
七零大院新来的小美人是黑道千金

Han Ming Yang, Ye WenSang Shuyao transmigrates into a novel, becoming a pawn in a scheme. She decisively agrees to a marriage of convenience, emptying her family's coffers to marry Lu Jinzhou, a retired soldier injured, blind, and disfigured. Using her spiritual spring space, she heals his disability, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other while battling their greedy families. Ultimately, the couple joins forces to escape their vampiric family, their love deepens, and they welcome the joy of a new life, embarking on a happy life together.
我的代码男友

Guo Jia Qi, Jiang Xin (RAW)Game designer Xu Ting fled to Country Y to escape Fu Yu, only to unexpectedly reunite three years later. Fu Yu returned with a forceful attitude, intruding into her life, and the two became entangled in a complicated relationship revolving around their child, Jingjing. During this time, characters like Lin Zhexuan and Zhou Shasha created crises, and Fu Yu repeatedly risked his life to protect Xu Ting. As secrets such as the "Ouroboros" game data and Jingjing's eye disease were revealed, Fu Yu changed for Xu Ting, and ultimately the two resolved their misunderstandings, faced challenges together, and achieved a happy ending.
玫瑰年代

Luo Chu Fan, Zhao Fei (RAW)In her past life, her husband killed Xia Xi in a car accident to swindle her out of 30 million yuan in deposits. Before that, she saw through the true colors of her younger siblings. She also realized that the so-called wealth and luxury of a wealthy family was the result of Xia Xi's domestic violence and miscarriage, which rendered her unable to have children. In this life, she travels back to the 1980s and will never repeat the same mistakes. She will live for herself and use the wisdom from her past life to forge a new path for herself.
[PREV⬅️]1 November Releases:1. 雁归时
