青空之夏

Feng Zi Zhou, Lu Xiang ShanSu Xia never understood why her husband, Xu Jiqing, who had no feelings for her, insisted on marrying her. Even after he died protecting her in a car accident, she still couldn't understand his intentions. One day, Su Xia woke up to find herself back in her second year of high school, encountering the transfer student Xu Jiqing again. At this time, Xu Jiqing was just a poor, gifted boy who, despite his exceptional intelligence, couldn't escape bullying. Even as he desperately tried to survive, fate repeatedly dragged him back into the mire. This time, she was determined to find out what Xu Jiqing had gone through in high school; she vowed to save her deceased husband from his misery.
神明勿念，她有撒旦

Zhou Hang, Ai Si SiThe story tells of Zhou Sui, the eldest daughter of the Zhou family, who died suddenly at her 20th birthday party. Three years later, Zhou Sui miraculously revived, but lost her identity and memories. In order to find out the truth, Zhou Sui endured and lay low. Huo Mian gradually developed feelings for her as they spent time together.
上错花轿嫁病弱权臣被宠冠京城

Li Jun Chen, Lei Xiao YuIn her past life, Shen Qingtan was framed and murdered on her wedding day by her childhood sweetheart and her elder sister. When she opened her eyes again, she was back on her wedding day. This time, she decided to make the best of a mistake and married the sickly but powerful minister Zhao Yi, determined to make those who had wronged her pay with their blood. Unexpectedly, during her revenge, she discovered that Zhao Yi was not as weak as people in her past life had described, and that he secretly helped Shen Qingtan in many ways. As they spent time together, they grew increasingly fond of each other, and ultimately, Shen Qingtan achieved her revenge, and with Zhao Yi's help, finally unraveled the mystery of her own origins.
重生黑月光，大小姐她专治不服

Meng Jia Hui, He ShiIn her previous life, Sheng Wanqing mistook a ghost for her best friend, falling deeper and deeper into a trap woven by Su Mo. She was ostracized by her family and tragically died under Su Mo's car. Given a second chance, Sheng Wanqing realizes that her childhood savior was not Su Mo at all. Seeing Su Mo's true colors, she decisively chooses to escape Su Mo's trap, only to discover that Fu Qingshi has been silently protecting her through both past and present lives. Sheng Wanqing gradually tears off Su Mo's mask in front of her parents, finally expelling her from the Sheng family and ensuring she receives her due punishment.
夜色未眠

Ma Xing Shuo, Duan Qi XuanThis drama revolves around the emotional entanglements and growth of several young people in a bustling city. The female lead is an independent woman with dreams who meets several charming men with distinct personalities during her struggles. Together, they experience ups and downs in their careers, tests of friendship, and twists and turns in their love lives. The drama features both workplace rivalries and heartwarming moments in life. In the city shrouded in night, everyone pursues true love and dreams in their own way, writing their own wonderful stories.
黑化值满后，他失控了

Xie Wen Yi, Tang YangThe story follows Gu Chen, a genius programmer, who is unexpectedly drawn into a mysterious experiment and implanted with an "emotional corruption system." Whenever negative emotions accumulate to a critical point, the system forcibly activates superpowers, causing him to gradually lose control. Lin Xia, a psychotherapist, attempts to unravel his inner turmoil with love and professional expertise, but in the process, she discovers a far larger financial conspiracy hidden behind the experiment. The two go from mutual exploitation to a bond of life and death. As Gu Chen's corruption levels repeatedly reach their peak, he ultimately chooses between self-destruction and redemption. The plot blends science fiction, suspense, and emotional entanglement, showcasing the complex transformation of humanity under extreme circumstances.
长公主自救指南

Hu Dong Qing, Tan Yu Qiao, Wang Xin QiaoSu Fengyi transmigrated into the body of a villainous princess in a male-oriented novel, destined to be a third party in the story. To avoid the male lead Xiao Che's execution, she preemptively intercepted his trusted confidant at the execution ground, rescued the wrongly accused general Shen Quan, and seized military power. She also broke off her engagement, sending the poor scholar Pei Zhaoming into the cabinet, and promoted Xue Yu, the son of a merchant, to become a powerful eunuch in the palace. When the Prince of Pingliang murdered the emperor and plotted rebellion, smearing her as a "wicked empress," she used the late emperor's edict to clear her name, shot the traitor with an arrow, and ultimately ascended the throne to protect the people. From a villain on the verge of death, she lived to become an empress who protected the world.
开局分家，我宠夫我致富

He Si Jin, Jia Jin SaiThe protagonist, Su Yao, transmigrates into the body of a peasant woman in ancient times. At the start, she faces a difficult family division by her troublesome relatives, receiving only a dilapidated house and two acres of meager land. Facing this predicament, she uses modern business acumen to guide her honest husband, starting from a small food stall, gradually expanding to a workshop and then a restaurant, growing their small business into a thriving enterprise. Along the way, she cleverly outwits greedy relatives, resolves neighborhood conflicts, and uses delicious food and genuine affection to nurture her initially taciturn husband into a capable business prodigy. Together, the couple rises from poverty to wealth, embodying a heartwarming and inspiring story of "separation doesn't mean separation, working together to achieve prosperity."
能聊鬼魂的千金：符箓一出手就知有没有

Jia Yan, Peng Qian LingWhen the Wen family of Kyoto finally finds their 18-year-old daughter, Wen Yushi, she is a withdrawn and reclusive girl. Upon returning home, her adoptive parents and sister expose her for fighting, skipping school, and running away from home, leading everyone to expect ridicule for the Wen family. However, unexpectedly, a guzheng master, a Taoist master, and the head of the Special Investigation Bureau, among other powerful figures, all come knocking, revealing her extraordinary abilities. Wen Yushi is not only the deputy director of the National Special Investigation Bureau but also proficient in Taoist magic and talismans. She navigates the undercurrents within her family while solving various supernatural cases. During this time, she reunites with Zong Yue, uncovering their past connection, and ultimately enters Peking University as the top scorer in the national college entrance examination, continuing her path of excellence.
[PREV⬅️]2 November Releases:1. 青空之夏

Feng Zi Zhou, Lu Xiang Shan[HERE]2. 神明勿念，她有撒旦 - Zhou Hang, Ai Si Si[HERE]3. 上错花轿嫁病弱权臣被宠冠京城 - Li Jun Chen, Lei Xiao Yu[HERE]4. 重生黑月光，大小姐她专治不服 - Meng Jia Hui, He Shi[HERE]5. 夜色未眠 - Ma Xing Shuo, Duan Qi Xuan[HERE]6. 黑化值满后，他失控了 - Xie Wen Yi, Tang Yang[HERE]7. 长公主自救指南 - Hu Dong Qing, Tan Yu Qiao, Wang Xin Qiao[HERE]8. 开局分家，我宠夫我致富 - He Si Jin, Jia Jin Sai[HERE]9. 能聊鬼魂的千金：符箓一出手就知有没有 - Jia Yan, Peng Qian Ling[HERE]
幼师穿书再就业

Zhou Rong Qiang, Du Zi YangShen Zhaozhao dies suddenly and transmigrates into a novel, becoming the vicious female supporting character imprisoned by the succubus villain Pei Jin. To avoid being locked in the basement, this former kindergarten teacher uses her child-rearing skills to "tame" Pei Jin, outwardly imitating his ideal woman, but in reality, she's clearing her name of plagiarism and seeking revenge. Pei Jin initially forces her to imitate him, but is drawn to her "praise-to-treasure" and contrasting personality, gradually indulging and even helping her. Their relationship heats up through punishment and retaliation, and ultimately, these two vengeful individuals grow closer through their mutual torment.
暮暮朝朝梨花落

He Shan Kai, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun)Modern girl Li Mu transmigrates into a novel, becoming the foolish Crown Princess Li Chaochao. Her plan is to help the novel's male lead, Crown Prince Jiang Yao, embark on a path of darkness to return to the real world. Li Mu decides to play the fool, first cuckolding the male lead and then abandoning him, forcing him to become evil. Li Mu cleverly completes her mission, dying and leaving the novel world. However, fate plays a cruel trick; Jiang Yao's excessive corruption due to Li Chaochao's departure nearly destroys the original world, forcing the system to send Li Mu back. Upon seeing Jiang Yao again, the transformed Li Mu discovers he is no longer the person she knew, and her new identity makes her a thorn in his side.
他的炙热谎

Zhang Ting Rui, Cao Sai YaTo compete with other celebrities, Xia Zhi, a livestreamer specializing in emotional lingerie, goes to a male escort café to find a romantic partner. There, she unexpectedly reunites with Xu Yiye, her high school crush and a top student. The two enter into a contractual relationship, but their efforts are thwarted by their colleague Yue Jia, her ex-boyfriend Chen Weilin, and Xu Yiye's younger brother Xu Heming. As they work together to overcome these challenges, the truth behind their seven-year-long unrequited love gradually comes to light, and their contractual feelings blossom into genuine affection. After numerous trials and tribulations, they finally overcome all obstacles and find true love.
前男友竞空降成为我老板

Li Meng Ran, Cheng ZiQiao Xu, from an ordinary family, had been in a relationship with Xu Si'an, a man from a wealthy family, for nearly three years. Upon graduation, due to Xu's mother's interference and Shen Zhiwei's schemes, Qiao's father's surgery failed, leading to his death. Heartbroken, she quietly left with her beloved dog. For four years, she languished in depression. Unexpectedly, Xu Si'an became her new boss and appointed her as his personal secretary. In public, he was a stoic CEO, but in private, he relentlessly pursued her, determined to uncover the truth behind her abrupt departure years ago. Despite claiming revenge, he was always the first to stand by her side during her times of pain, gradually clearing up misunderstandings and healing her closed-off heart. After the truth came to light, Xu Si'an transformed into a fiercely protective husband, willing to defy his family to illuminate Qiao Xu's future.
那年风雪埋誓言

Wu Yu Hang, Jiang Rui JiaQin Xue was diagnosed with late-stage leukemia and knew her time was short. She then found a working-study college student named Gu Chenfeng as her boyfriend. She used her hard-earned money to take him on trips around the world. She sold her house and car for him, even taking out a million-yuan loan, vowing to love only him for the rest of her life. As Qin Xue awaited her death, Dr. Gu hoped she would be cryogenically frozen for another ten years, during which time her body would be continuously experimented on until a cure was developed.
你装纨绔，我装瞎，看谁能演

Yan Zi Xian, Zhi Chun HeXie Chengjun transmigrates into the body of a blind noblewoman. In the treacherous Marquis's mansion, she uses her blindness as a weapon, breaking off her engagement, battling her stepmother, and slapping her scheming stepmother. Lu Yunche, the capital's most notorious playboy, appears absurd on the surface but secretly plots, playing along to protect her. Together, they uncover the corruption of the land tax, eliminate powerful relatives, and purge the court of corrupt officials, using the empire as their chessboard and their true feelings as their bargaining chips. Five thousand elite soldiers face fifty thousand private troops in a bloody battle at Minshan. On the verge of death, he proposes, and she, having regained her sight, marries him. Ultimately, they offer the world as dowry and sight as a gift; the blind girl rises to power, and the two powerful empresses jointly rule the world.
不轨之臣

Li Zi Jie, Kang Yu QianYu Yan once saw Song Yanci as her salvation, but faced his betrayal of her "open relationship" before their marriage. Seven years of genuine affection turned into a joke, and she retaliated with a meticulously planned "cuckoldry scandal," becoming entangled in a forbidden romance with Song Yanci's younger brother, Song Huaixu, who suffers from bipolar disorder. Afterwards, Yu Yan navigated between the brothers, secretly shifting her career focus, but gradually discovered Song Huaixu's long-suppressed deep affection. Ultimately, the brothers' accumulated resentment erupted, and on the verge of murder, Yu Yan pulled Song Huaixu back, and the two, who had found mutual redemption, finally became a couple.
你是我翻山越岭的尽头

Yao Wang, Feng Xi YaoSeven years ago, actress Wen Wanning took in the young orphan Ling Ye. After a drunken kiss with Ling Ye, whom she only saw as a younger brother, she felt immense guilt and sent him abroad, withdrawing from her life. Over the next seven years, Wen Wanning, who refused to be exploited and was subsequently sidelined, gradually faded into obscurity, while Ling Ye, through his own efforts, became a highly sought-after world champion. A 2000-day unrequited love gradually blossomed amidst various deliberate accidents, ultimately leading to a mutual commitment!
予心予惜

Wu Yuan Cheng, Jiang Kai XinJiang Yuxi and Qin Zhan, the young master of the Qin family, are separated due to a misunderstanding. After their reunion, Qin Zhan feels both love and hate for Jiang Yuxi, secretly protecting her while repeatedly hurting her. The two struggle amidst family feuds, scandals, and conspiracies, ultimately uncovering the truth about their mother's death, resolving their inner conflicts, and finding love and happiness together.
别怕，贫道吴恙

Liu Ning, Fu Ruo Mei QiWu Yang, a modern youth, transmigrates to another world and gains immortality, but is troubled by his inability to die. His attempts to commit suicide, including jumping off a cliff and taking poison, all fail absurdly. He saves Fang Xianyu, who is being hunted, and they gradually develop feelings for each other. Later, he uses a bolt of lightning to kill a man in black, but still survives. The series blends fantasy, martial arts, and comedy, taking viewers on an absurd journey through the martial arts world.
别惹小小姐，她后爸是超级女儿奴

Zhang Yu Xuan, Yu Yi NingFive-year-old Xiao Hongguo, raised in the mountains, possesses the ability to bring the dead back to life. She accidentally saves Gong Nan, the young master of the Gong family, who is searching for a living deity in the mountains, and is taken in and adopted by him. From that moment on, the Gong family's fate changes. Xiao Hongguo uses her medical skills to break the curse that all the men in the Gong family will not live past a hundred years. She is doted on by her doting father, Gong Yanxiu, and powerful figures from all walks of life vie to become her apprentices, often making her father, Gong Yanxiu, extremely jealous.
夜色卿卿染

Wang Yi Chen, Bian JingYe Ran, a descendant of traditional Chinese medicine practitioners, transmigrates into the body of a peasant girl in a period novel. Unmarried and pregnant, she is destined for a difficult childbirth and must also contend with the exploitation of her uncle's family. She fights back using her medical and martial arts skills and searches for the father of her child.
昼夜难逃

Liu Hao Yuan, Peng Yao (RAW)To fulfill her promise, Lin Chaoxi deliberately gets close to Fu Lingzhou, the campus heartthrob. Unable to pluck this unattainable beauty, Lin Chaoxi resorts to various clever tricks and coincidences to finally win him over, and the two begin a relationship. Little does she know that Fu Lingzhou has been eyeing her for a long time. One day, Lin Chaoxi's secret is discovered, and the once gentle Fu Lingzhou instantly transforms into a possessive and lewd man. Time and again, she flees while he chases, and the two love-starved souls finally come together.
先婚后爱，不，先吃瓜

Liu Zi Heng, Zhang Ruo Chen (RAW)Li Fan, who married in place of her sister, marries Han Xuzhou, a man she once admired but who is now in a wheelchair. After the marriage, Han Xuzhou is constantly embroiled in scandals, and she becomes a discarded wife of a wealthy family. After being bound to a gossip-mongering system, she uncovers scandals involving her husband's associates and realizes that their contractual marriage has soured. Han Xuzhou unexpectedly overhears her innermost thoughts and becomes increasingly devoted to his beautiful wife, finding it difficult to let her go.

偏宠小疯妻

Wang Kai Mu, Zhang Chu XuanJi Shiwei is falsely accused of having a mental illness and is confined to a mental hospital. Despite her seemingly insane behavior, she secretly harbors a revenge plan. The male lead, Liang Jingsui, has long seen through her act. He outwardly uses "using" her as a pretext to protect her, but in reality, he secretly helps her uncover the conspiracy and fight against the villains.p.s. This finally ended. This was released just a few episodes per day, so it just completed.
嫁纨绔，本宫专治不服

Zhang Xuan, Yang Luo QianWhen Empress Changsun Ling Yi of the Western Dynasty is assassinated during her enthronement ceremony, she wakes up a thousand years later as the illegitimate daughter of the Changsun family. Forced to bind to a system, her mission is clear: marry the young master of the Pei family and become the matriarch — fail, and be erased from existence. Her grandmother is old-fashioned, her sister-in-law and brother are mean, and a scheming “green tea” keeps stirring up trouble. Ling Yi simply laughs: “This palace has never fought such a well-funded battle before!” But what she didn’t expect — her seemingly idle, playboy husband Pei Xiao turns out to be a secret romantic at heart?!(Aired: Aug 10, 2025)
半熟老公

Wang Kai Mu, Xu Zhen ZhenWen Ying and Jiang Chenye married through a family arrangement. Their relationship progressed from a routine, step-by-step process to a passionate, clingy romance. The usually aloof Jiang Chenye, a man of few words, broke all his principles for Wen Ying. When Wen Ying first joined the company, she heard the younger women in her department gossiping that the second young master was young, promising, and a top-tier "tall, rich, and handsome" man. At the time, she didn't pay much attention to Jiang Chenye's name. Unexpectedly, a year later, they got married after only meeting once. A year into their marriage, looking back, she realized that they communicated more in bed than outside. Not because it was frequent in bed, but because Jiang Chenye was aloof and sparing with words. Sometimes, she might only hear him say two words all day: "Do you want to?"
乖一点！你跑不掉了

Chen Ming Hao, Yang Shu YuLin Yan, in order to study abroad, accepts a mission to sabotage Song Yizhou's arranged marriage. She disguises herself as someone Song Yizhou likes, successfully making him fall in love. However, just as she completes her mission and prepares to leave with the money, Song Yizhou sees through the deception. His possessive and obsessive nature is fully exposed, leading to a series of conflicts, escapes, and imprisonment. But when Lin Yan falls into despair, Song Yizhou unexpectedly chooses to let go. This seemingly liberating release is actually the beginning of a more meticulously planned imprisonment from which she has nowhere to escape.
维港夜色

Chen Zhao Yi, Bai Xue RuShu Hui had a one-night stand with Qin Yushen, a wealthy heir in the Hong Kong entertainment circle, and became pregnant. Three years later, she married into the Qin family with her daughter, only to be belittled and scorned, separated from her daughter, and ultimately died tragically in a car accident. Reborn, she decided to no longer tolerate it, fight her mother-in-law, slap the face of the transmigrated woman, pave the way for her daughter's marriage into a wealthy family, and then divorce her! However, Qin Yushen gradually developed feelings for her during their days and nights together, and awakened his past life memories in one dream after another, embarking on a journey to win back his wife.
傅队，闪婚请指教

Zhang Lei, Tan XinLuo Xingyan, persecuted to death by her fiancé Lu Lin, is reborn, returning to the scene of her kidnapping three years prior. To rewrite the tragedy, she relinquishes her chance to be rescued, finding herself in danger only to be saved by Fu Jingyi. After her rebirth, she exposes Lu Lin's lie about claiming her life-saving grace and decisively breaks off the engagement, only to be forced into marriage by her adoptive parents to a playboy. With nowhere else to turn, she agrees to a marriage of convenience with Fu Jingyi, only to discover that he is her savior. After the marriage, Fu Jingyi, with his gentle yet strong presence, supports her, helping her escape her family of origin and her entanglement with her former fiancé. The two gradually develop genuine feelings for each other from their contractual marriage, uncovering the truth behind the past rescue, embarking on a happy life that begins with gratitude and ends with true love.
一生戎馬入深宅

Chen Yun Ting, Liang Jin XianThe female warrior Mo Lingyue, on her way to aid the northern border, was ambushed by spies, fell off a cliff and lost her memory. Rescued by a merchant, she assumed the alias Shang Yueqing. To repay a debt of gratitude, she married the young general Liu Shifei in his place. Three years later, Liu Shifei returned to his mansion with Princess Lin Mo, who was impersonating Mo Lingyue. The two conspired to force him to abdicate. On the verge of death, Shang Yueqing miraculously regained her memory, used swift and decisive action to intimidate the Liu family, reclaim her dowry and divorce papers, and vowed to thoroughly investigate the truth behind the massacre of the Mo family army. She and Crown Prince Xie Changyan decided to join forces to break the deadlock. Ultimately, their revenge was achieved, and Mo Lingyue married Xie Changyan, who ascended the throne, together protecting the peace of the Canglan Kingdom.
闪婚闺蜜大哥后，我彻底上头了

Wang Zi Lin, Chen Yang Ting DanTo prevent her fiancé Jiang Junfeng from squandering the family fortune and to successfully inherit the Meng family shares left by her mother, Chi Ran enters into a fake marriage with Xiang Ye, the brother of her best friend Xiang Wenwen and a retired soldier. After the marriage, the two gradually develop feelings for each other while dealing with crises such as Jiang Junfeng's entanglement, the schemes of the uncle's family, and the Meng family's uncle's attempt to seize power. In the end, they uncover the truth about Chi Ran's parents' car accident, punish the villains, and the story unfolds from a fake marriage to a real love and a wedding.
引以为乐

Zhang Pei Bao (Ming Yang), Zhang Zhang (Zhang Yu Jiao)Xiao Qiaonan lost her mother at the age of six and was framed by her stepmother and sent to a nunnery for 15 years. She returns to investigate her mother's death and meets Li Chenyu. He sees through her vulnerability and offers to support her unconditionally. After uncovering the truth behind her mother's death, she catches the murderer and, together with Li Chenyu, begins a new life.
纵野

Wang Zi Lin, Jin Ya NaThe story follows Lin Ye, a young man from a poor background, as he rises from a lowly deliveryman to become a rising star in the industry through perseverance and intelligence. During his deliveries, Lin Ye unexpectedly becomes embroiled in a business dispute and meets Su Qing, a wealthy woman whose entrepreneurial venture has faltered. The two initially doubt each other but eventually join forces to uncover industry corruption. Along the way, Lin Ye constantly pushes his own boundaries, expanding from logistics delivery to the field of intelligent warehousing, proving that "even wild grass can take root in the city." The plot interweaves workplace struggles, emotional choices, and tests of friendship, depicting both realistic challenges and inspiring moments of passionate pursuit of dreams. Story concludes with Lin Ye leading his team to break monopolies and reshape industry rules, conveying the positive message that "even those born in the wilderness can grow towards the sun."
八零女配觉醒后，惹得竹马心乱颤

Qi Tian Yin, Zhang Xin YiCen Yin woke up to find herself transmigrated into the body of a notorious and vicious supporting female character in a period novel. Her story began in hell mode—she was forcing Lu Jing into marriage and was about to face the tragic fate of being sent to a labor camp in the Northwest. She immediately rejected the engagement and demanded that Lu Jing take her to the city to find work. Facing repeated schemes from her scheming older sister, she skillfully countered each move, stunning the entire performing arts troupe with her unparalleled dance skills, transforming herself from a villain into a stage queen. Meanwhile, Lu Jing, who had once vowed "I will never marry you," became increasingly enamored with her as she focused on her career, eventually cornering her against a wall and saying, "Cen Yin, I'm blind. Now I only want you."
乱世偏宠：许她骄纵倾城

Zhou Yan Zhe, Bai YeOn the eve of her wedding, 22-year-old orphan Jiang Xunyue discovers her fiancé Lin Zixuan's affair with Su Wanyang and their plot to harm her. She decisively burns their clothes and, using the name of the young marshal Shen Yun, lures everyone to catch them in the act, causing him to lose face. During this process, she repeatedly offends Shen Yun, believing rumors of his "consideration," but Shen Yun falls in love with her at first sight and saves her multiple times. When Shen Yu colludes with foreign enemies to frame Jiang Xunyue for treason, the two join forces to devise a plan, ultimately exposing the treasonous conspiracy and eliminating the villains. A month later, they are married in a church, finally becoming husband and wife.
网恋失败后我成了全网白月光

Yu Xuan Hong Hao, Wu Yi QiaoSuffering from appearance anxiety, the stunningly beautiful Zhu Nanyin deliberately disguises herself as ugly in the game. Her devoted love interest, He Qilin, brings his "white moonlight" (his first love) to their third anniversary, issuing a kill order against her, leaving Zhu Nanyin heartbroken. At the proposal banquet, Zhu Nanyin appears, stunning everyone present, and He Qilin finally learns that his long-time crush is none other than Zhu Nanyin.
捡来的病友是商界霸主
Zhang Li Ren, Gong Fang Ni (RAW)

你好，我的傲娇学弟 | “Hello, My Arrogant Junior”

Zeng Xitang, Bai YanJiang Muran, a lifelong single, leaves home to escape an arranged marriage, unaware that her fiancé is none other than Cheng Zhaobai, the arrogant junior she falls for at first sight! From their first meeting at work when they mistakenly received a package, to becoming neighbors and bosses, she desperately resists the engagement, but he relentlessly pursues her. Until she discovers—the very fiancé she most wants to escape is none other than Cheng Zhaobai, the one who makes her heart race.
偏偏少帅他既争又抢 | “The Young Marshal's Arrogant and Competitive Spirit”

Zhang Ji Jun, Mi QiThe amnesiac Yan Xin reunites with the young marshal Jing Yuanzhao in prison. Jing Yuanzhao suspects that Yan Xin is the one who saved him in Guangcheng years ago and pays close attention to her. While investigating who saved him, Jing Yuanzhao secretly protects Yan Xin; meanwhile, Yan Xin, in dealing with the repeated persecution from her fourth sister and aunt, does not forget to investigate the real culprit who killed her relatives years ago.
掌控欲 | "Control Freak"

Wang Jia Mao, Tian Tian YiXu Sui opens her eyes to find herself reborn at 25—in 2025, engaged to Jiang Yan but not yet married. In this life, she vows never to repeat her past mistakes, decisively removing her engagement ring and plotting to escape Jiang Yan's control. However, Jiang Yan's obsession and possessiveness far exceed her expectations. He relentlessly pursues her, even threatening to record her conversations to force the wedding to be moved forward. Xu Sui outwardly feigns compliance, but secretly reunites with her college sweetheart, Fu Siyu. From initial testing to irresistible attraction, a dangerous game quietly begins—a game of revenge and the resurrection of Xu Sui's withered heart.
國民影帝每天都想官宣 | “The National Film Emperor Wants to Announce His Relationship Every Day”

Yang Yu Bin, Cheng ZiActress Li Jin, betrayed and murdered, is reborn at her grandfather's birthday banquet. She exposes her stepmother and stepsister on the spot and resolves to re-enter the entertainment industry. With her acting skills and emotional intelligence, she amazes the entire internet and reunites with actor Yu Qianfan, who has repeatedly protected her. She successfully takes revenge, exposes the conspiracy, sends her enemies to prison, and receives his long-suppressed confession. Ultimately, they reach the pinnacle together and reclaim everything.
傅先生他甘愿俯首 | “Mr. Fu Willingly Submits”

Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), Tian Xi WenTo resolve her family's crisis, Nan Sheng agrees to a secret marriage with Fu Moyan, who misunderstands her. The two go from being at odds to understanding and loving each other, joining hands to overcome obstacles from her former fiancé and scheming best friend. In the end, they uncover the conspiracy, revitalize the pharmaceutical factory, and achieve success in both love and career.
八零:把反派儿子养成乖宝宝 | “The 80s: Raising a Villain's Son into a Good Boy”

Qiao Jia Le, Liu Mei NaLin Banxia is reborn when her son is one year old. To reverse her fate of becoming a villain, she resolutely embarks on a journey to find her son. She decisively divorces her husband who sent their child away, finds her son with the help of her best friend Xiao Qingyun, and works hard to start a business, from selling mountain products to establishing a brand. In the end, she achieves success in both her career and love life, completely rewriting the fate of mother and son.
你对她下蛊？她可是苗疆圣女 | "You Bewitched Her? She's the Holy Maiden of Miao Territory"

Shi Wei, Li Sheng Xuan, Jiu YueThe Miao holy maiden Zhu Mangxing, injured during her training in the mountains, was rescued by Lu Yanming and later married him. After their marriage, Zhu Mangxing went into hiding and secretly implanted a "luck-borrowing" Gu in Lu Yanming, temporarily rendering herself unable to conceive. Six years later, Lu Yanming rose rapidly through the ranks thanks to the Gu, but began to despise Zhu Mangxing. His mother, also concerned about her infertility, instigated their divorce. Lu Yanming, wanting to reunite with his first love Wen Zhiyi and use the Wen family's influence to get to know the holy maiden, divorced Zhu Mangxing. Unbeknownst to him, his wife was the single woman he had been searching for. After the divorce, Zhu Mangxing learned that the one who truly saved her years ago was the young master of the Jiang family. Thus began the complex love-hate relationship between the four.
我老公是九尾狐 | “My Husband is a Nine-Tailed Fox”

Cao Jing Hao, Li Song CiSix years ago, Jiang Xinyuan, drunk, encountered Sheng Yuan, who was cultivating. After a night of passion, they parted ways, but unexpectedly, Sheng Yuan's inner core flew into Jiang Xinyuan's own body. Six years later, Jiang Xinyuan discovers that her daughter, Xiaoya, has mutated into a fox demon. Meanwhile, Sheng Yuan is also searching for Jiang Xinyuan to reclaim her inner core, but unexpectedly discovers that she has given birth to his offspring.
换亲后，成为封先生的心尖宠 | "After the Swap Marriage, I Became Mr. Feng's Beloved"

Zhou Yu Hang, Xia Xuan ZiThe story revolves around Lin Wan, who is forced into a "marriage swap" scandal—to save her seriously ill mother, she marries Feng Jingchen, the rumored ruthless president of the Feng Group, in place of her sister. After the marriage, Feng Jingchen, traumatized by childhood, is initially resistant to marriage, but gradually becomes moved by Lin Wan's resilience and warmth. From her initial cautiousness to discovering the gentleness beneath Feng Jingchen's arrogant exterior, the two go from a contractual marriage to genuine companionship, working together to unravel a family conspiracy and ultimately finding sweet love. The drama also interweaves subplots such as career triumphs and family redemption, showcasing a mutually healing and growth-oriented journey.
我成王爷掌心娇，太子殿下哭什么 | “I Became the Prince's Darling, Why Is the Crown Prince Crying?”

Yuan Hao, Guan XinGu Xiyuan, to help her cousin, Crown Prince Xiao Jinchen, with disaster relief efforts, donated 200,000 taels of silver in exchange for his promise of becoming her "only Crown Princess." Unexpectedly, upon his successful return, he conspired with her father to seize her title of County Princess and Crown Princess, bestowing them upon her half-sister. Her sincerity misplaced, betrayed by her family, Gu Xiyuan finally realized her mistake and refused to remain a submissive legitimate daughter. She emptied the Marquis's mansion, angrily kicked the bastard, helped her mother divorce, and even offered 10,000 taels of gold as a dowry to buy the position of Princess from the cold-faced Prince Yan, Xiao Xuan. From then on, she wielded her business empire, meticulously planning every step, determined to make all those who had wronged her regret their actions!
將軍請留步 | “General, Please Stay”

Ming Chuan, A ShangIn her previous life, Mu Jinshu misjudged people, blindly trusting her half-sister, leading to the massacre of her entire family. She even personally poisoned her husband, Qin Su, and met a tragic end herself. Reborn, Mu Jinshu fights against scumbags and despicable women, winning over her cold-hearted husband. The couple joins forces to avenge their family, sending the scumbags and despicable women to hell, and rewriting the fate of their entire family.
京港往事 | "The Story of Beijing and Hong Kong"

Zhao Yuan You, Wang Bing XingTo pay for her mother's stomach cancer treatment, Jing Chu became the tutor of He Xingzhi's powerful niece in Hong Kong. She initially thought He Xingzhi was calm and reserved, but she never imagined he was a madman who coveted her! Not only was he willing to be her mistress, but he even laid a trap to force her into submission.
驸马每天都想和离 | “The Prince Consort Wants a Divorce Every Day”

Song Pei Ze, Xu Dong YiThe story revolves around the tug-of-war between an arrogant prince consort and an equally arrogant princess over divorce. The prince consort, originally a cold and aloof scholar, is forced to marry into the princess's household due to family interests, and plots his divorce daily after the marriage. The princess, seemingly willful and capricious, secretly harbors feelings for the prince consort, yet obstructs his advances with various pretexts. Their relationship evolves from mutual testing to covert rivalry, and finally, after an unexpected life-or-death experience together, they gradually fall in love.
幸运儿与倒霉蛋 |"Lucky Ones and Unlucky Ones"

Guo Jia Nan, Li Zi ShuOn a dark and stormy night, the unlucky Crown Prince Shen Tianzhao is relentlessly pursued, but just as his life hangs in the balance, he encounters Qu Xiaofeng, a modern girl who falls from the sky. A chance kiss unexpectedly transfers her "lucky charm" to the Crown Prince. The Second Prince and Su Ruoli repeatedly plot against him, but their schemes are always thwarted by luck and modern thinking. Qu Xiaofeng approaches the Crown Prince to reclaim her luck, but gradually develops genuine feelings for him. Ultimately, the two join forces to unravel the conspiracy, save the Emperor, and bring the rebellious prince to justice. After ascending the throne, Shen Tianzhao defies public opinion and makes Qu Xiaofeng his Empress, thus beginning a magnificent and legendary era that transcends time.
重生七零：小夫人又把机长撩红温了 | Reborn in the 70s: The Little Wife Makes the Captain Flirt Again

Zhang Xuan, Liu Ying (RAW)In her previous life, Mu Qingci was betrayed by her fiancé and stepsister, losing her engagement, being sexually assaulted by a petty thug, having her college entrance exam scores and her entire life stolen, and ultimately dying along with the scumbag and the bitch due to a medical accident. When she opened her eyes again, she was back to before she first arrived in the city and met Li Tingshen. This time, she chose to marry Uncle Li, who was fourteen years her senior, and kicked her fiancé from her previous life out of the house.

刺猬的拥抱 | "The Hedgehog's Embrace"

Ma Xiao Yu, Zhang Jin YiHe's a carefree, playboy doctor; she's wild and untamed, a business queen. What seemed like a marriage of convenience, where each went their own way, unexpectedly uncovers a long-hidden secret love amidst clashes and crises. When the playboy begins his humble pursuit of his wife, and the queen finally lets her guard down, this game that started with lies transforms into a dramatic reversal of fortune, a true gamble with genuine affection.p.s. Early upload for today's drama. I have some free time this morning.
殊色驯野 | "Unique Colors Tamed the Wild"

Zhang Ting Rui, Jin ZiPrincess Yunqi, a woman of unrestrained charm and countless admirers, was suddenly transported into a fictional tale that vilified her, becoming a universally despised and wicked heiress. Her cold-hearted husband abandoned her with a letter of divorce, her gloomy half-brother, whom she had once humiliated, mocked her with disdain, and the hot-tempered prince she had once rejected now relentlessly pursued her. But soon, Yunqi chuckled, "Didn't everyone say they hated me? Now they're all vying to be my dogs."
爱在千禧 | Love in the Millennium

Shen Hao Nan, Lu Lu LuIn Yiwu in the year 2000, Shen Xiaolan, a boutique owner, unexpectedly learns through a precognitive dream that she will be tricked into becoming pregnant by her fiancé, lose her fortune, and ultimately cause the tragic deaths of her parents. To avoid this fate, she confronts the scheming Liu Geng and his family, and uses the information from her precognitive dream to save entrepreneur Zhou Chenguang. They enter into an arranged marriage that blossoms into love, and she achieves remarkable success, building her own domestic hosiery brand. After being doted on by Zhou Chenguang and his family, she gains both career success and love.
十里洋场，又逢她 | "Meeting Her Again in the Bund"

Miao Tian Tian, Zhang Ya MengThe story unfolds in the bustling and vibrant Shanghai of the 1930s, a place rife with undercurrents of power struggles. The female protagonist, a naive and kind-hearted heiress, finds herself in dire straits due to a family tragedy. Amidst this hardship, she meets the male protagonist, a mysterious figure with a complex background in Shanghai. As they spend time together, feelings develop between them, but the conflicts of Shanghai, family feuds, and external obstacles constantly test their relationship. Hand in hand, they navigate the tumultuous 80-episode storyline, weaving a romantic yet tumultuous love saga.
不够乖的她 | "The Not-So-Well-Behaved Girl"

Zuo Ming, Liu Lan GeOu Zun, the powerful head of a conglomerate burdened with a chilling poison, keeps Shi Yunyin, a mermaid girl whose tears turn into pearls, as a pet. Little does he know that her feigned innocence is merely a pretext...
金风玉露 | "Golden Wind and Jade Dew"

Wang Chen Peng, Sheng Yi JieFifteen years ago, during an earthquake in Moon Village, volunteer teacher Chen Ruyi lost her leg saving her students. Three years later, she returned to the city and became the housekeeper of the Gu family, only to die mysteriously six months later. At Mrs. Gu's birthday party, she fell from a building. Seeking revenge, the girl she saved, Yue Yan, spent fifteen years infiltrating the Gu family as their "top courtesan," maneuvering among the Gu brothers to gather evidence. As Meng Xinlan's birthday party approaches, this meticulously planned revenge unexpectedly uncovers an even more horrifying secret: behind the mountaintop party lies a transnational dark industry chain. And the seemingly carefree second young master of the Gu family also has an equally enigmatic identity.
港夜成婚 | "Marriage at Harbour Night"

Ma Shuo Qi, Mo NingModern female agent Su Miaomiao transmigrates into the body of another girl with the same name in the 1980s. Upon waking, she's framed by her best friend and sent to the bed of Wan Sinian, a powerful Hong Kong playboy known as the "Living Yama." However, the wicked always have their match; after playing with Wan Sinian, Su Miaomiao escapes. Reborn, Su Miaomiao is determined to live a vibrant life, not only captivating the Hong Kong playboy but also easily subduing the original owner's fake best friend and scumbag fiancé, rising from a college student to a rising business tycoon. With Wan Sinian's help, Su Miaomiao finds her biological parents.
重生回大婚前葉小姐她美又颯 | "Reborn Before Her Wedding: Miss Ye is Beautiful and Cool"

Zhao Guan Yu, Lin Zi RongIn her previous life, Ye Nanxi was brutally murdered after her family fortune was stolen by a scumbag and a scheming woman. Reborn, Ye Nanxi has a whirlwind marriage with Xiao Lingye, the richest man in Jiangcheng, and publicly humiliates the scumbag. To protect the company left by her father, Ye Nanxi must fulfill a betting agreement within six months. With Xiao Lingye's help, Ye Nanxi successfully defeats a group of villains, and ultimately has a lovely child with Xiao Lingye, living a life together.
港城太子爷，随叫随到 | The Prince of Hong Kong, Always on Call

Wang Hui Long, Tan Xiao FanYing Chan, a seemingly glamorous but actually adopted daughter of a businessman, is a popular actress who runs away after a one-night stand with Jin Si, the sole heir of the Jin family. Unaware of her amnesia, Jin Si misunderstands her as an attempt to avoid responsibility and, taking advantage of the situation, becomes her bodyguard, eventually falling deeply in love. Later, Ying Chan discovers that her seemingly insignificant bodyguard is actually the powerful heir of the Jin family, a figure who can shake the entire city of Hong Kong.
我不过作作妖！怎么就成白月光了 | "I Was Just Being a Little Mischievous! How Did I Become the White Moonlight?"

Li Pei Yang, Zhang Jin YiLabeled "stupid and vicious," cannon fodder Jiang Huashan unexpectedly awakens self-awareness and discovers she's in a theatrical world. To save her adoptive grandfather, Shen Zhuang, she rebels against the book spirit, tears up the original plot, and returns to her 18-year-old self. She leads the characters in the book against the rules of the theatrical world, developing complex love-hate relationships with the three young masters of the Shen family: the cunning and reserved illegitimate son Shen Guiling, the eldest grandson Shen Lanxi who once despised her, and her bickering love interest Shen Qingyu. Ultimately, Jiang Huashan rewrites her grandfather's fate and becomes the white moonlight in the hearts of the three young masters. After gaining the right to choose her world, she remains in the present world.
穿成八零极品小姑子她搞事搞钱 | “Transmigrated into the 1980s as the Ultimate Sister-in-Law: She Makes Trouble and Money”

Tan Zhen Hao, Yan Wen LiA modern woman transmigrates into the body of Su Xiaoman, the tragic heroine of a 1970s novel. Facing the schemes of a scumbag and a scheming woman, she uses her system-generated shop to launch a powerful counterattack. She tears apart the scumbag, reclaims his assets, seizes business opportunities to start a clothing factory, and unexpectedly forms a bond with Fu Jingsui. Together, the two overcome numerous crises, and in the end, Su Xiaoman not only builds her own business empire but also finds true love, completely rewriting her originally tragic life.
小婢女她扶摇直上 | "The Little Maid's Rise to Power"

Liu Jun Da, Tan Jiu LuoIn her past life, Tang Yu, as the illegitimate daughter of the Prime Minister's family, was sent by her elder sister, Tang Mingzhu, to the Crown Prince Chu Xiaohe's palace to bear his child. However, when she was seven months pregnant, Tang Mingzhu cut open her abdomen and stole her child, resulting in her tragic death and rebirth. In this life, she disguises herself as a maid and infiltrates the Eastern Palace, vowing revenge. Tang Yu meticulously plans her schemes, which inadvertently ignite Chu Xiaohe's desire to conquer her. She plays hard to get, neither letting Chu Xiaohe succeed nor failing, constantly stirring his heartstrings, successfully making him infatuated with her. Chu Xiaohe falls into her carefully woven web of love, unaware that each fall is a stepping stone for her revenge against the Tang family.
七年织蕾丝 | "Seven Years of Weaving Lace"

Zhang Yi Yang, Chen Si CheSeven years ago, Xu Lanxin broke up with her boyfriend Zhou Zheng and left to protect her pride because her father was the male lover of Zhou Zheng's mother. Seven years later, she returned to China, and Zhou Zheng, instead of seeking revenge, pursued her aggressively. Zhou Zheng initially misunderstood that Xu Lanxin was married with a child, but after learning the truth, he protected her and his friend's son, Gu Yingchen. During this time, he dealt with a family-arranged marriage and coercion from his mother, Zhou Li, using his parents' scandalous photos to pressure her and overcome obstacles. He also made a bet with his grandfather, agreeing to take over the Zhou family business and increase its performance by 10% in exchange for freedom to marry. Ultimately, Zhou Zheng fulfilled the bet, gained the approval of the old man, and the two became engaged.
今日宜告白 | "Today is the Perfect Day to Confess"

Cao Yuan, Hu Jia NiLin Wu unexpectedly learns that He Jingzhou's girlfriend, Chen Yi, is breaking up with him and going abroad. Everyone pities He Jingzhou for being dumped, but Lin Wu musters up her courage to find He Jingzhou and proposes to be his contract girlfriend, hoping to spite Chen Yi. She lies and claims that she also has someone she likes. The two begin a contract relationship, during which He Jingzhou gradually falls for Lin Wu and treats her better and better.
魂穿七零，搶個廠長當老公 | "Transmigrating to the 70s and Stealing a Factory Manager as My Husband"

Gao Ming, Wang Lu QingXue Lingyan is reborn as Xiao Yan in Hongxing Village, bullied by her stepmother and stepsisters. She fights back against the villains and the Wang family's schemes, and encounters the young marshal she admired in her previous life, Gu Mingheng, who has been reincarnated. Due to her high level of ideological awareness, she is selected as a tractor driver and sent to the city's agricultural technology station for training. During this time, she teaches a lesson to a hooligans, befriends Du Yue, and promises to bring roe deer meat to Xiao An. While her career is taking off, she gets closer to Gu Mingheng and gradually takes control of her own destiny.
未婚夫装失忆，我另谋高嫁 | "My Fiancé Pretends to Have Amnesia, I'll Find a Better Marriage"

Xiao Yang, Liu Mei LunThe female protagonist was deeply in love with her fiancé, but on the eve of their wedding, she discovered that he was feigning amnesia, becoming cold towards her and refusing to acknowledge their past relationship. Initially, she refused to believe it and tried repeatedly to awaken his memory, only to be thwarted each time. After seeing the truth behind his feigned amnesia, she let go of her obsession and decided to move on from the relationship. Subsequently, leveraging her charm and talent, she met more outstanding suitors in social settings, beginning a new chapter in her love life and finding her own happiness.
刀口之蜜 | "Honey on the Edge"
Liu Yan Chen, Wang Nian Jiang Cheng (RAW)

别拆穿我的乖 | “Don't Expose My Obedience”

Li Sheng Jie, Li Ruo QiShi Yin, the unloved second daughter of the Shi family, approaches Han Zhan, the dissolute second son of the Han family, in order to reclaim her share of the family fortune. She caters to his tastes, pretending to be a docile lamb. Little does she know that Han Zhan has long harbored a secret love for her and, unable to win her heart, the two enter into an arranged marriage that blossoms into love, finding redemption in each other.
我们野蛮生长 | "We Grow Wildly"

Bai Fang Wen, Guo Yu XinTo escape a false romance and a career slump, actress Jiang Nan, a renowned actress, ventures into the desert to experience a new role. There, she unexpectedly encounters Lu Bei, an engineer secretly tracking a wanted criminal. To protect Jiang Nan, Lu Bei disguises himself as local security and "detains" her. After the misunderstanding is cleared up, Jiang Nan witnesses the true face of a criminal and is drawn into a life-or-death situation. Forced into a "marriage" with Lu Bei to assist in the mission, they unexpectedly develop feelings for each other, their ambiguous relationship blossoming into something more. Amidst the wind and sand, two broken yet romantic souls find redemption in lies and danger, igniting a prairie fire for each other at the end of the long night. They are wounded yet unyielding idealists.
她比枪火炽热 | "She's Hotter Than Gunfire"

Yao Guan Yu, Han Le YaoIn Longcheng Street, Wen Manli is sold to a gang by her uncle. Because she resembles Chu Zhen, Huo Zichen asks her to impersonate her to help him fight for the gang leader and rescue his mother. After Wen helps Huo get rid of Ah Xiu and rescues Huo from prison, Chu Zhen forces her to marry him. Her mother awakens, and Huo rushes to the port to confess his love. The two stay together.
机长小姐，来我心上请直飞 & 甩掉空管前任后，却要听他指挥 | "Miss Captain, Please Fly Directly into My Heart & After Shaking Off Her Ex-Air Traffic Controller, She Has to Take His Commands"

Yan Zi Xian, Ye Xin XinZhu Qingyuan is a co-pilot at China Southern Airlines. She and the notorious air traffic controller He Jinzhou were once lovers, but they separated due to a misunderstanding. Five years later, Zhu Qingyuan encountered a pilot incapacitation incident while on duty. She and He Jinzhou worked together to ensure the flight landed safely. After they reunited, He Jinzhou still deeply loved Zhu Qingyuan and tried every means to pursue her.
肆宠而娇 | "Spoiled and Pampered"

Zhu Yi Wei, Bai Xin YiGenius designer Xi Zhao was adopted by wealthy patron Leng Yanxiu, but refused to be a substitute for his ex-wife and was sent to a brothel for "training," his dreams shattered. After escaping the brothel, the designer returns with hatred! He navigates the complex relationships between the obsessive patron and the mysterious Buddhist monk Feng Jinye, meticulously plotting his revenge and unleashing a storm of vengeance that sweeps through the wealthy families of Huainan, ultimately reclaiming everything that belongs to him.
欲壑難逃 | "Inescapable Desire"

Xie Yu Wang, Zhu Xiao XueReborn on her wedding night, Li Beinian witnesses her husband, Mu Donglin, cheating on her with her best friend and is subsequently murdered. Opening her eyes again, she finds herself back on her engagement night six months prior. This time, she retaliates decisively, scheming to escape the man in question and forming an alliance with the mysterious, dangerous, and powerful Mu Xichen. Both harbor their own agendas, using each other, yet feelings begin to blossom amidst their ambiguous testing and joint revenge. Li Beinian meticulously plots to bring her hypocritical fiancé down from his pedestal; Mu Xichen endures ten years of hardship, solely for the purpose of overthrowing his family and seeking revenge. When their true identities are fully revealed, the intricate web they have woven together leads to the annihilation of all their enemies.
掌印为后 | “The Palm Seal for Empress”

Li Zi Jie, Shang Guan Mei MeiAmidst court turmoil, Regent Shen Qing's daughter, Shen Qingwu, disguises herself as a man and assumes the alias Shen Wu, becoming the Grand Eunuch. Shen Qingwu, bold and decisive, engages in a power struggle with Emperor Xiao Che, who feigns illness and plots to assume personal rule. Xiao Che seeks a marriage alliance to sow discord within the Shen family, unaware that the future Empress and the Grand Eunuch are the same person. Once the secret is revealed, Xiao Che embarks on a journey to win back his beloved.
一别七载，雾里再逢舟 | “Seven Years Apart, Meeting Again in the Fog”

Yu Lun Hao, Zhang Ya MengNi Wu (formerly known as Cheng Qingmiao) was bullied in high school due to weight gain caused by hormone medication. She harbored a crush on the school heartthrob, Pei Huaiyu, but was forced into becoming his girlfriend. Seven years later, she changed her name, successfully lost weight, and became a single mother. While taking her daughter, who suffers from congenital heart disease, to the hospital, she unexpectedly encounters her attending physician, Pei Huaiyu. Pei Huaiyu doesn't recognize her but is drawn to her familiarity, using both threats and inducements to get closer to her. Ni Wu hides the truth, struggles to distance herself, but cannot resist his persistent pursuit. When Pei Huaiyu discovers her identity and her daughter, he launches a relentless pursuit, and the two navigate an uncertain future amidst past shadows and emotional turmoil.p.s. I'm getting tired of this adaptations. But it's Yu Lun Hao.........
你好别来无恙 | “Hello, Long Time No See”

Wang Yan Xin, Zhan NiFive years ago, Li Mai and Zhou Songyan were lovers, but Zhou Songyan concealed his identity as the heir to a top-tier wealthy family in Beijing, working as an ordinary employee in his family's branch office. The two broke up due to a misunderstanding, and Zhou Songyan suddenly disappeared. Li Mai gave birth to their son, Chengcheng, alone, struggling to raise the child. Five years later, Li Mai was transferred to Beijing for work and unexpectedly reunited with Zhou Songyan at a dinner party. They cleared up their misunderstanding and finally became a couple.
甜妻出狱，慕爷追着宠 | "Sweet Wife Released from Prison, Master Mu's Doting Love"

Lin Feng Song, Ma Xin YuTo save her mother, Su Ruolan was forced into a marriage of convenience to bring good fortune. She used acupuncture to revive the comatose Mu Chengzhou, but was instead impersonated, had her child stolen, and was imprisoned. Three years later, after her release, she searched for her son and, by a twist of fate, became a nanny in the Mu family, where she reunited with Mu Chengzhou. While using her medical skills to protect the child, she uncovered the truth of what happened years ago, ultimately humiliating the vicious female supporting character, discovering her true identity, and finally achieving a happy ending with Mu Chengzhou.
心跳漫画 | "Heartbeat Comics"

Zhang Yan Shun, Sun Qian XunBusiness tycoon Xiao Han publicly exposes her cheating fiancé at a press conference, causing her family business's stock price to fluctuate. To inherit the group, she unexpectedly enters into a "contractual relationship" with young cartoonist Lu Yixiu, agreeing to marry him within 100 days. A series of accidental "fake romances" unfolds. It turns out Lu Yixiu immediately recognizes Xiao Han as his childhood muse, and he is also the mysterious cartoonist Louis, the "key figure" who can help Xiao Han turn her company around. Their recognition of each other keeps slipping away during their 100 days of cohabitation. When the truth is revealed, can they break the contract and act on love?
卿本无双 | "The Peerless Beauty"

Cheng Yue, Chang Dan DanShe was originally a free-spirited hunter's daughter, but due to worldly turmoil, she mistakenly rescued the crown prince and was imprisoned in the deep palace, becoming a princess. However, years of forbearance only resulted in her being wrongly given her heart. Just as she was about to give up, the overlord of the northern desert besieged her city, helping her to restore her kingdom. From hunter to princess, and from abandoned wife to empress, this game of chess, with the empire as her dowry, has only just begun.
少主，中原不讲武德 | "Young Master, Martial Morality is Not Valued in the Central Plains"

Song Ke Jun, Liu Yu NingYe Zhaoyu, reborn as Princess Sheng'an, is kidnapped and sold to the Western Regions. There, she is coerced by a powerful force into seducing the young ruler of the Western Regions, Mona Loujie. She initially tries to escape but is captured by Mona Loujie. After discovering each other's motives, the two turn the tables, feigning deep affection to deceive the ruler. In the process of overcoming crises together, their feigned affection gradually transforms into genuine love. When Ye Zhaoyu is captured after her escape attempt, she reveals her true identity as a princess in desperation, and the two are finally reunited. Learning that Mona Loujie is in grave danger, Ye Zhaoyu abandons her desire to return home and uses the wisdom and courage of the Central Plains—a culture that often disregards martial ethics—to help him fight against their enemies and protect each other and their country.
穿书：我真不是来救赎反派的啊 | "Transmigrating into a Book: I'm Really Not Here to Redeem the Villain"

Lu Zi Pu, Chen Yu TingShen Xi transmigrates into a novel as a villainous supporting female character, tasked with completing a system mission to corrupt the real young master, Lu Jingming. However, her attempts repeatedly backfire, and she discovers his kind and pitiful nature, gradually developing feelings for him and abandoning the mission. During this time, Lu Yuan and Chu Weiwei interfere, revealing family feuds and mysteries surrounding their pasts, blurring the lines between the novel's world and reality. Shen Xi nearly dies protecting Lu Jingming, who then undergoes a transformation to save the world. The plot is later rewritten, and ultimately, the two find happiness together in reality.
穿书后，九十九次的失败迎来了大反转 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, Ninety-Nine Failures Lead to a Dramatic Reversal"

Zhang Tian Cheng, Zhou ZhouThe awakened villainous supporting character, Nan Yan, abandons her assassination attempt on the female lead to avert a tragic end, instead focusing on winning over her husband, Mo Jinchuan, with whom she has a marriage of convenience. However, the system forces her to constantly court disaster, ruining his affections. It's only when Mo Jinchuan overhears Nan Yan's inner thoughts, manipulated by the system, through the female lead, that he realizes she's not in control of her own destiny. The cold and domineering CEO resolves to protect her, completely overturning the main storyline.
京華燼 | "The Ashes of the Capital"

Huang You Tian, Zhu Mo YanPrincess Pingyang, Tang Jinshu, was betrayed and framed by her "beloved" Jiang Zixu and Qi Xueyi, bearing the crime of treason and suffering the annihilation of his entire family. She died unjustly, seeing the male protagonist, Gu Liancheng, heartbroken before her death. When she opened her eyes again, Tang Jinshu was reborn five years in the past, realizing that she had mistakenly trusted a scumbag and missed her true love in her previous life. In this new life, Tang Jinshu immediately awakens and, together with Gu Liancheng, begins to deal with Jiang Zixu and Qi Xueyi in this life, starting a new chapter in her life.
娇妻难寻，傅总他蓄谋已久

Wang Sheng Yun, Yu Yang ZiProfessional assassin Song Zhao is critically injured abroad and rescued by Gu Jiunian, the daughter of the Gu family, and the two become close friends. After Gu Jiunian is murdered, Song Zhao disguises herself as her and returns to China to seek revenge and investigate the truth. She then hastily marries Fu Chiye, who has just been released from prison. In reality, both have their own motives. Song Zhao wants to use her marriage to get close to the Gu family and investigate her best friend's death, while Fu Chiye is the head of the Fu family, hiding his true identity and pretending to be a released convict to uncover a family conspiracy. Their married life is full of tests. As Gu Jiunian, Song Zhao navigates the Gu family, dealing with the harsh Madam Li, the domineering Gu Lian'an, and other relatives. Fu Chiye secretly helps her, and the two fall in love.

只是未婚妻的关系 | Just Fiancée

Lin Ke Han, Lu YuanIt tells the story of the sudden disappearance of Gu Man Man, fiancée of Max's chairman Su Yu and daughter of the Gu family. Soon looking for his beloved, Su Yu accidentally meets Qiao Mai, who looks exactly like Gu Man Man. Su Yu, having no choice, asks Qiao Mai to play his fiancée temporarily to appease his grandfather's condition, and until the real Gu Man Man is found. However, they both do not expect that their relationship will soon turn out to be more real than just a contract deal.(Aired: Apr 15, 2022 - Apr 30, 2022)
母憑子貴後被老闆全家寵上天 | "After Her Mother Gains Power, She Was Pampered by the Boss's Whole Family"

Wang Xuan, Cheng Lin MiaoIn order to avoid being sold into marriage by her mother, Ji Tiantian took the opportunity of her unexpected pregnancy with Jiang Mubai to leave home. Five years later, Jiang Mubai discovered the existence of the child and began to pursue her. Yu Zhiyin was jealous of Ji Tiantian and kept making things difficult for her. In the crisis, Jiang Mubai saved the mother and child. At this time, Ji Tiantian found out that she was the daughter of the Yu family and that she was swapped by Ji's mother.(Aired: May 30, 2025)

双刃 | Higher

Zhang Ji Jun, Ma Xiao YuJiang Zhen, a former special forces instructor, goes undercover to investigate his sister’s death in a self-driving car crash, teaming up with former partner-turned-enemy Bai Fan to uncover a tech corporation’s deadly conspiracy.(Aired: Aug 11, 2025 - Aug 23, 2025)
盛世闌珊處 | "Where the Flourishing Age Fades"

He Jian Qi, A ShangSheng Shi had secretly loved Gu Lanshan for years, but Gu Lanshan loved her sister's fiancé, Han Chengchi. Gu Lanshan's secret feelings were discovered by her adoptive mother, who plotted to force her into marriage. Sheng Shi intervened, and the two were forced to register their marriage. On their wedding day, Gu Lanshan, accompanied by her younger brother, attempted to elope, but her brother tragically suffered an accident. Faced with exorbitant medical bills, Gu Lanshan was forced to plead with Sheng Shi for help in a transaction. One wanted to get closer, the other wanted to escape, leaving this forced marriage scarred and broken. Only when Sheng Shi let go and allowed her to be together did Gu Lanshan realize that the person she had loved in her youth was the passionate Sheng Shi.
千金谋 | "The Scheme of a Heiress"

Zeng Hui, Han Yu TongReborn, Zhu Chaoyun, timing it perfectly, found the severely injured and amnesiac Li Yuanzhao before Wang Jinhua from the same village. She knew he was a heartless man, but it didn't matter; she didn't care about love, only gold. Zhu Chaoyun started a new life with the money, unaware that the new emperor was furious and searching everywhere for his wife.
寶寶喜歡我不好嗎 | "Baby, Don't You Like Me?"

Gao Ming Chen, Qi WentingLin Wu had secretly loved He Jingzhou since high school. Knowing the vast difference in their social status, she could only keep it buried deep in her heart. After entering university, Lin Wu mustered up the courage to find He Jingzhou and proposed a "contractual relationship." On the surface, it was to help him provoke his family friend Chen Yi, but in reality, she wanted to get closer to him. He Jingzhou agreed with a playful attitude. Lin Wu was moved again, but she was bound by her inferiority complex and the shadows of her past. He Jingzhou initially misunderstood that she was only approaching him for money, until he saw the high school exam paper filled with his name in Lin Wu's dilapidated rented room, and finally understood.
双宝联盟怪力妈咪她A爆了 | "Double Treasure Alliance: Super Strong Mommy is Awesome"

Zou Ji Long, Duan Qi XuanJiang Ci, a girl with superhuman strength, drowns her sorrows in alcohol after being betrayed by her boyfriend. Through a chance encounter, she gives birth to two quirky children. With the help of her adorable kids, she eventually finds love. Facing the children left behind after that night, Jiang Ci fulfills her responsibilities as a mother, providing them with the best material conditions and love. Despite her mother's pressure to get married, Jiang Ci remains steadfast in her beliefs, committed to being responsible for herself and her children. The story ends with both parties recognizing each other as the people from five years ago, resolving misunderstandings and revealing the truth.

浮灯灿烂 | "Floating Lanterns"- Xiao Wen Yu, Yu Xin YiPrincess Liang Mingzhao, of noble birth, was betrayed in her past life by her unrequited love for Shen Yanqing. Reborn, she resolutely abandons the scumbag and chooses to marry her nemesis, Xie Linfeng. Unexpectedly, this charmingly roguish general has secretly loved her for years and spoils her rotten after their marriage. Meanwhile, Shen Yanqing, after discovering Lin Zhenzhen's true identity as a sword dancer, is filled with remorse, but it's too late. Witness how the clear-headed princess tears apart the scheming woman, outwits the powerful minister, and ultimately finds true love and a fulfilling life on her perilous path of revenge.
港城回响 | "Echoes of Hong Kong"

Chen Jian Yu, Li Shi QiShu Hui had a one-night stand with a Hong Kong tycoon and became pregnant. Three years later, she married into the Qin family with her daughter. The Cinderella story of marrying into wealth isn't a fairy tale. For her daughter's sake, Shu Hui diligently cared for the entire Qin family for five years, yet she never received a smile in return. Her husband was only passionate during their intimate moments at night. Hong Kong media revealed that Qin Yushen was keeping a mistress at his company. By this time, her daughter's status in the Qin family was secure, and Shu Hui was ready to file for divorce. Unexpectedly, a car accident sent her back five years to the day they registered their marriage. In this life, Shu Hui only wanted to pave the way for her daughter's entry into a wealthy family.
她的掌中娇 | "Her Darling in the Palm of Her Hand"

Cao Jun Ke, Gao Lin LinSong Zhinu found a man outside her villa and, captivated by his good looks, secretly brought him home. She assumed Huo Beixiao, with his eight-pack abs and homelessness, was a pitiful creature in need of her care and support. However, the real Huo Beixiao was the ruthless and violent heir of the powerful Huo family in Shenzhen, a frequent visitor to mental hospitals, and an unapproachable figure. Little did she know they had known each other for a long time. His beloved didn't remember him, but that didn't matter. He would make her rediscover herself, fall in love with him, and belong completely to him.
劫心为牢 | "Prison of the Heart"

Zheng Feng, Hong Yu TongAfter receiving news of her brother's death in a car accident, Tian Shangcan rushed to the hospital and learned that her brother had donated his heart before his death. Tian Shangcan suspected that someone had murdered her brother because they wanted his heart, so she secretly investigated the cause of her brother's death. She met her classmate Shen Ke, and the two developed feelings for each other. Tian Shangcan unexpectedly learned that Shen Ke was the recipient of her brother's heart.
知美人 | "Knowing Beauty"

Zhou Heng Yu, Li Zhi YingThe seemingly gentle but inwardly strong-willed Xiao Kuhua VS. The Mad Dog Emperor. Six years after their divorce, Sheng Wu's ex-husband ascended the throne. The day the news reached Sheng Wu's second husband's family, her mother-in-law insisted on giving her a divorce decree. She claimed that since she had been the new emperor's first wife, the Jiang family dared not keep her. Sheng Wu felt her mother-in-law was overthinking it! After the divorce, he married the woman he had always loved, and she herself remarried. A clean break, a complete separation. She believed that her ex-husband becoming emperor and her becoming a member of the Jiang family did not conflict. Upon their reunion, Sheng Wu knelt before the emperor's majestic presence, referring to herself as his subject. A slight smile played on the emperor's lips.
春風若有憐花意 | "If the Spring Breeze Has a Pity for the Flowers"

Xu Yang Hao, Bai Xu Han (RAW)Set against the backdrop of an ancient dynasty, the story revolves around the love between Hua Lian Yue, the daughter of the Hua family, and Gu Chun Feng, a scholar from a humble background. Hua Lian Yue is forced into embroidery due to a family tragedy, and Gu Chun Feng, to protect her, secretly helps her under the guise of medicine. The two find solace and companionship in adversity, but their relationship faces obstacles from powerful figures, including former members of the Hua family and conspiracies within the royal court.

穿越六零：冷美人的逆袭寻夫路 | "Crossing the 1960s: The Cold Beauty's Counterattack to Find Her Husband"

Yang Chen Bin, Lin YiModern-day aloof beauty Lin Wan unexpectedly travels back to the 1960s, discovering that the original owner of this body had a tragic fate and her husband was missing. Faced with an unfamiliar era and a harsh life, Lin Wan, with her modern wisdom and resilient character, strives to adapt to her environment and improve her life. While searching for her missing husband, she overcomes adversity and establishes herself in the 1960s through her own abilities. She not only gains friendships but also gradually uncovers the secrets behind her husband's disappearance. Ultimately, she reunites with her lover, writing a moving love story that transcends time.p.s. Today's releases most awaited drama (Chen Si's and Wang Xuan's) all got copyrighted right away lol. So I'll just upload the RAW videos later.
重生后, 霸道后妈带飞全家 | "Reborn as a Domineering Stepmother Leads the Whole Family to Success"

Peng Wei Min, Wu Xin YuIn her past life, the female protagonist was framed by her husband and stepdaughter. Reborn on the day of her whirlwind marriage to a wealthy CEO, she uses her memories and business acumen to rise from a despised stepmother to the pillar of her family. She sees through her stepdaughter's disguise, exposes her husband's conspiracy, revitalizes the family business through live-streaming e-commerce, and even cultivates her unruly stepson into a rising business star. The drama features both the tension and excitement of power struggles within a wealthy family and heartwarming and humorous parent-child interactions. The female protagonist resolves crises with her "domineering" methods, ultimately leading her family to the pinnacle of success, showcasing the perfect fusion of female wisdom and family strength.
失忆后她成了白月光 | "After Losing My Amnesia, She Became My White Moonlight"

Chen Yi NanAn accident causes Su Wanqing, a wealthy heiress, to fall into the sea and lose her memory. She is rescued by Gu Mingchuan, a young man from a fishing village, and begins a normal life as "Xiao Yu" (Little Fisherman). Three years later, Lu Jingchen, a rising business tycoon, comes to the fishing village in search of his missing fiancée. He mistakes Su Wanqing for his white moonlight and forcibly takes her back to the city. The amnesiac Su Wanqing gradually falls for Lu Jingchen's gentle advances, but becomes entangled in a complicated love triangle due to the identity discrepancy. Meanwhile, Gu Mingchuan enters the city to find his lover, uncovering Su Wanqing's true identity, while Lu Jingchen's business rivals seize the opportunity to plot against her.
暗夜恋人 | "Night Lovers"

Liu Ning, Yuan Yu HanPei Yu, president of the Pei Group, is engaged to Jiang Yueyue, the daughter of the Jiang family, yet he maintains a romantic relationship with Yu Wanning, a cool and sassy biker girl. She uses her younger brother to climb the social ladder, but becomes entangled with her older brother! Let's be lovers in the shadows, talking only of desire, not feelings!
一梦归洲 | "A Dream Returns to the Continent"

Zhang Yi Yang, Ge Xiao XiThe warlord's daughter, Su Mengying, suffers from hysteria after her lover, Shen Xizhou, dies in battle. She rescues a beggar named Jiang Yizhou, who bears a striking resemblance to him, and elevates him to the position of young warlord. However, Jiang Yizhou, relying on his handsome face, becomes arrogant and brazen, openly bringing his actress mistress into their home and constantly trampling on Su Mengying's bottom line. Finally, Su Mengying, unable to bear it any longer, personally disfigures his face.
错吻星光 | "A Mistaken Kiss Under the Starlight"

Yu Pei Shan, Xu Bo DiLi Sui, having mistaken someone for someone else as a child, fell in love with Huo Youning and pursued him for years. They were engaged. Huo Youning initially loved Li Sui, but later fell for his lost sister, Li Ya. Li Ya falsely accused Li Sui of deliberately causing her disappearance as a child. To compensate Li Ya, the Li family ostracized and targeted Li Sui. Even Huo Youning developed feelings for someone else. In a car accident, he saved Li Ya, abandoning Li Sui for her fate. When Li Sui awoke, she had lost her memory. Huo Youning then took advantage of this and pushed her towards his uncle, Huo Yanzhou.
八零换亲，纨绔掌心娇 | "The 80s: A Marriage Exchange, A Playboy's Darling"

Sun Yi Xun, Chen CiIn her previous life, Jiang Xianli's arranged marriage to a wealthy family was stolen by her younger sister. She married a poor young man and supported him through thick and thin, eventually becoming the enviable wife of a department head. Meanwhile, her sister was sent to a mental hospital by the纨绔 (playboy) Xie Shao, and, filled with resentment and jealousy, dragged Jiang Xianli down a building with her. Reborn, her sister rushes to the poor young man's bed, unaware of the price to pay for becoming a department head's wife. Jiang Xianli marries into the wealthy Xie family, focusing solely on making money, but unexpectedly, Xie Shao falls for her, and she becomes his darling!
跟死对头联姻后他欺负我 | "After Marrying My Nemesis, He Bullied Me"

Guan Lin, Mao Jing XinWen Luo and Song Sheng are notorious rivals. One day Wen Luo spreads rumors that Song Sheng wets the bed; the next day, Song Sheng spreads rumors that Wen Luo ate children. The Song and Wen families are betrothed, turning arch-enemies into husband and wife. On their wedding night, Wen Luo is caught auctioning Song Sheng's underwear, and all the proceeds are confiscated. Song Sheng: "So that's why I've been losing things lately! Turns out, Miss Wen, you've turned to thievery." Wen Luo, quick to plead her mistake, admits it. But who knew she'd dare to do it again? Song Sheng, who has secretly loved her for years, uses the marriage to "get her over," subtly guiding her. Wen Luo gradually falls for him.
晚风缠绵 | "Evening Breeze"

Xu Ling Yun, Xu LiangSu Miaomiao transmigrates back to 1989, becoming a pitiful, miserable flower in a mining area. Drugged by her best friend, she turns the tables, becoming the sugar daddy of Hong Kong's entertainment circle, Wan Sinian; catching her fiancé cheating on her with her best friend; breaking off the engagement and receiving a huge sum of money; and making her adoptive parents weep. With a survival system and memories of her past life, she earns a fortune daily. Wan Sinian initially hates her, then dotes on her; her parents shower her with affection and give her a million-dollar dowry. She turns out to be the abducted true daughter of the Bai family, the richest family in the world. In the end, Su Miaomiao achieves success in both her career and love life, and marries Wan Sinian, a perfect ending.
九零：满级绿茶改造反派计划 | "The 90s: The Max-Level Green Tea Villain Transformation Plan"

Li Bo Yi, Jiang YaoZhou Yu travels back to the 1990s, becoming the pregnant wife of the villainous tycoon Gu Ye. Knowing her husband has turned to the dark side after the deaths of his wife and daughter, she embarks on a "protecting her child and changing her fate" mode: first, she stops a gang fight; then, she seizes contraband and punishes her aunt; she helps her husband turn the tables, transforming a scrap yard into Kuangye Electric Appliances, waging trademark battles against counterfeits, and implementing a pre-sale model, attracting the investment of the richest man, Mr. Wang. She juggles breastfeeding her baby with her college entrance exams, breaking records for top scorers, rescuing a kidnapped girl, and eliminating a group of abusive men. Gu Ye becomes a doting father, earning money, caring for the child, and spoiling his wife; together, the couple writes a legend in that turbulent era.
大神你的号和我锁了 | "God, Your Account and I Are Locked"

Ma Yi Yan, Tang Qi QiQin Zhen had been pursuing Fu Siye for years, but every time she tried to win him over, she failed because of his "white moonlight" in the game. Hearing that the e-sports god "Cheng Mo" was mysterious and powerful, Qin Zhen decided to change her target. She took the initiative to team up with him and discovered that Cheng Mo was actually Fu Siye! What shocked her even more was that the white moonlight he had been talking about for so many years was none other than herself, the one who had helped him out of his dark past.
七零大美人的拿捏冷面老公日常 | "A 70s Beauty's Daily Life of Handling Her Cold-faced Husband"

Cao Jun Ke, Jiang Yi QinThe story follows Qiao Nianyao, a post-apocalyptic strongwoman who travels back to the 1970s. To repay a debt of gratitude, she marries Song Qingfeng, a paralyzed soldier king. She hides her superpowers, feigns weakness to heal her husband's leg, and their marriage blossoms into love. She outsmarts her awful relatives and mother, and the couple ultimately joins forces to take revenge on their enemies and begin a happy life with multiple children.
浮生拍卖行 | "Floating Life Auction House"

Ye Sheng Jia, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun) (RAW)Legend has it that there was an auction house that had existed for thousands of years, where fate and desire were exchanged for the most precious items. The auction house's owner not only possessed a cold and aloof demeanor but also retained her youthful appearance. One day, the head of a conglomerate with whom she had a deep connection suddenly appeared, declaring his intention to acquire the auction house, thus uncovering a story of past entanglements.
不成体统 | "Unseemly"

Chen Si, Jin Zi (RAW)Ninety-nine reincarnations ended in vain! In the 100th reincarnation, Xu Yanqiu finally returned as the true daughter of the Xu family! During a gang fight on a rainy night, Bai Jinxiao, the young leader of the Xuanwu Alliance, suddenly pulled her behind him. This act of protection broke her fate of dying unjustly a hundred times! Surrounded by family infighting, gang warfare, and lurking conspiracies from Japan, this time she would no longer be at the mercy of others. She wielded her blade to break through the stalemate, tearing a path to survival amidst the bloodshed and achieving a complete female awakening!
婚情不负好春光 | "Love Never Fails in the Springtime"

Wang Xuan, Guan XinDuring their university years, Pei Ling and Zhou Moye had a deeply memorable romance. However, due to interference from Zhou Moye's mother and a misunderstanding, they separated. Six years later, Zhou Moye and Pei Ling reunited at the university's anniversary celebration. Although Zhou Moye harbored resentment over their past separation, he couldn't hide his love, masking his deep affection with indifference, until he discovered that Pei Ling had given birth to his child!
