她不乖，他低头哄 | "She's Naughty, He Hugs Her"

Liang Si Wei, Yao Yu ChenYe Qingli, the most favored seventh young lady of the Ye family, lowered her head to fulfill her grandfather's dying wish. She planned to find a man to marry, but she ended up with the wrong person and became entangled with him. To make matters worse, the man was her brother's nemesis, who wouldn't let go once he started clinging to her.
他先沉沦 | "He Falls First"

Wang Yi Ran, Tian Tian YiAn unexpected encounter brings the cunning little fox Xu Nuo into contact with Si Jingnian, the chaste and refined heir of Beijing's elite circles. Faced with Xu Nuo's challenge, Si Jingnian devises a cat-and-mouse game for her. Because Si Jingnian offers so much, Xu Nuo, out of consideration for Q, agrees to investigate a long-standing cold case with him. As they spend time together, Si Jingnian gradually falls for her, melting at the sight of her outstretched finger. Si Jingnian: "So what she wanted wasn't Q, but a kiss from me!"
我能看见东西价值，成了富贵花 | "I Can See the Value of Things, I Became a Rich Girl"

Wei Ruo Chen, Lin Zi RongXu Nanzhu, burdened with millions in debt, unexpectedly gains the magical ability to see the value of objects. With this "eye of wealth," she accurately identifies bargains in lottery tickets, jadeite, stocks, real estate, and antiques, quickly paying off her debts and accumulating enormous wealth. Subsequently, she establishes a company, invests in film and television, signs promising artists, and befriends partners like Gu Yan and Zhou Tingyue, becoming invincible in the business and antique appraisal worlds. From a repeatedly deceived, down-on-her-luck girl to a female tycoon who masters capital and establishes the "Nanzhu Group," Xu Nanzhu's extraordinary life is a whirlwind legend of vision, courage, and a meteoric rise to success.

我将公主扶上位，自己坐稳太上凰 | "I Helped the Princess to the Throne, and I Secured My Position as the Supreme Empress"- Li Pei Yang, Shi Yue YueIn her previous life, An Qingluo was persecuted by Consort Shen, and she and her newborn son perished in a fire. Unexpectedly, she was reborn with a "good pregnancy system" and began a palace intrigue journey with the vicious female supporting character Consort Shen, the scheming male lead Emperor, and the insidious BOSS Empress Dowager. In the process, with the help of her good pregnancy and Princess Pei Shaohua, she gradually rose through the ranks and eventually assisted the princess in becoming Empress, while she herself ascended to the position of Empress Dowager.
她的炙热牢笼 | "Her Burning Cage"

Bai Yu, Yu Yang, Mu Le'enWen Ningwan, the eldest daughter of the Wen family, appears to be pampered and spoiled by her family, but in reality, after her parents' death, she is under the constant and pathological control of her brother, Wen Xubai, under the guise of familial affection. To cover up his shameful deeds, Wen Xubai deliberately marries the Cinderella-like Lin Xiangkui as a cover. Wen Ningwan's repeated attempts to escape are all caught by Wen Xubai. Wen Ningwan can only feign submission to Wen Xubai while simultaneously making a deal with Pei Yanlin, losing her virginity to him in exchange for him taking her away from this cage.
嫁给反派太子冲喜后 | "Marrying the Villainous Crown Prince for Good Luck"

Lv Yue, Cha Yi ChenMy delicate and charming husband has gone completely mad. Mu Zihan, the unloved eldest daughter of the Mu family, marries a terminally ill prince suffering from a rare poison to save her brother. On their wedding night, an accident awakens the prince, Zhou Jing. Undercurrents surge within the palace; some rejoice, some grieve. Mu Zihan discovers that the prince and her brother have been poisoned by the same poison. To protect her patron, she kneels and begs for medicine, publicly defending him. The charming prince lowers his guard, recognizing her as a trustworthy ally. Learning of the heavy hatred and pain Zhou Jing carries, Mu Zihan is shocked by the darkness of the royal family and heartbroken by his restraint and madness. After recognizing each other's true feelings, they join forces to stir up trouble in the palace and restore order.
穿书后意外攻略了苗疆少年 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Accidentally Win Over a Miao Boy"

Li Yi Cheng, Tang Li WenTransmigrating into the body of Chu He, a cannon fodder female supporting character in a novel, she is kidnapped by the Witchcraft Clan and thrown into the "Savage Cave," a den teeming with poisonous insects, to be used as material for refining poisonous creatures. To save her life, she cleverly lies to the bloodthirsty Miao youth, A Jiu, claiming they are engaged and that she is pregnant with his child. The memory-scratched A Jiu is skeptical, yet inexplicably brings her back to the cave. In the poisonous cave, A Jiu fights daily to steal steamed buns for her, while Chu He clumsily tends to his wounds and fabricates a story of their elopement. From mutual testing to gradual dependence, this bond, which began with lies, has quietly soured.
穿書後男反才是我的菜 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, the Male Antagonist is My Type"

Du Xin Fei, Xin YuBefore transmigrating into the book, Shiyi was just an unknown online novelist, forced to cater to the market and unable to write what she loved. After becoming the female lead, Jiang Shiyi, she felt sorry for the fate of the male antagonist, Pei Muye, in her novel. She tried everything to prevent Pei Muye from turning evil, single-handedly changing the plot, breaking off her engagement with the male lead, Ji Sinan, and bravely being with Pei Muye, ultimately succeeding. Upon waking, she realized it was all a dream, but Shiyi was determined to complete the novel according to her own ideas. After publication, it became an overnight sensation, and she reunited with Pei Muye at a book signing.
闪婚恰逢其时 | "Flash Marriage at the Right Time"

Xiao Tao Kuai Tao, Bai Heng WeiThis drama tells the story of a couple who hastily marry due to a series of coincidences. In their seemingly rushed marriage, they go from initial awkwardness and clashes to gradually understanding each other. Amidst the trivialities and ups and downs of life, they face challenges in family, career, and other areas hand in hand. In the process, they continuously discover each other's strengths, and their feelings for one another deepen. The drama features both sweet and romantic moments, as well as conflicts arising from differences in values, showcasing the growth and transformation of modern urban youth in the unique context of a whirlwind marriage, and conveying profound reflections on love and marriage.
空降老板外冷内热，竟是前男友 | "The Boss Who Arrived Cold on the Outside but Warm on the Inside Was Actually My Ex-Boyfriend"

Li Ke Le, Li Ya YaThe sky is falling! Her newly arrived boss is none other than her ex-boyfriend of four years?! Qiao Xu is in despair, terrified that this repressed ex will cause trouble, and just wants to get away! Xu Si'an, however, keeps pressing her, reigniting the flames in Qiao Xu's heart. The sharp-tongued couple reunite, their feelings rekindling amidst their daily banter, and they irresistibly fall in love with each other again. But one believes the other has a wife, and the other believes the other has a new boyfriend, causing the rekindled sparks of love to be dealt another blow. What was the truth behind their breakup? The two deeply in love, separated by misunderstandings, will eventually overcome the storm and embrace each other.
重回七零，我帶飛老公全家 | "Back to the 70s, I Bring My Husband's Whole Family"

Zou Sheng Wen, Song XiaoLin Yuwei is reborn and meets Huo Shiyuan. To change the tragedy of her previous life, she cleverly defuses the Lin family's attempts to frame her for adultery and agrees to marry Huo Shiyuan, using this as an opportunity to escape the Lin family. After their marriage, Huo Shiyuan is sent to the countryside for a special mission, and Lin Yuwei insists on going with him to Darong Village. Using resources from her spatial dimension, she improves their lives and establishes a primary school for the village children. Facing Lin Jiaojiao's provocations—claiming a teaching position and questioning the source of the textbooks—she solves the textbook problem by replicating them using her spatial dimension. She also overcomes Zhou Xuye's entanglement, the pressure from the cadre school, and Lin Jiaojiao's repeated difficulties, all while Huo Shiyuan remains by her side.
我们在云端相吻 | "We Kissed in the Clouds"

Guan Jun Jie, Wang Ya QingThis drama tells the love story of Lin Shu, a childhood guardian, and Jiang Yunxing, a control tower operator. Jiang Yunxing has always been obsessed with the sky, initially hoping it would bring her father back, and later because of a boy who brings her light. She strives to become a control tower operator to uphold her belief in the sky, and one day reunites with Lin Shu at a party, leading to a whirlwind marriage. However, their seemingly perfect marriage is shattered by a plane crash.
休病夫她转身嫁首辅 | "She Divorced Her Sick Husband and Then Married the Prime Minister"

Dai Ting Rui, Yang JingThe female protagonist was originally married into a family with a sickly husband. She devoted herself to household chores and caring for him, only to be neglected and harassed by his family. Her husband, frail and ill, not only failed to provide her with warmth but also subjected her to constant mistreatment within the family. Heartbroken, she unexpectedly met the powerful Prime Minister. He was attracted to her resilience and intelligence, while she, in turn, felt valued and cared for in their relationship. Ultimately, she resolutely divorced her ailing husband and married the Prime Minister, beginning a sweet yet politically charged new life.

Wang Yan Xin, Wu JiaoA mentally challenged daughter of the Prime Minister's family is betrothed to a hideously ugly ghost king feared by all. "The louder you laughed then, the louder you'll cry today!" Ghost King Xiao Yan declares to the world, "Anyone who touches my princess, I will exterminate their entire family!"
吻你在黑白之间 | "Kiss You Between Black and White"

Zhao Zhen Dong, Yuan Yu Han"Gu Chenzhou, you always bleed for me. In this lifetime, will you shed tears for me?" She thought that as her bodyguard, he was willing to die for her, but unwilling to love her. Little did she know, he was feeding a tiger with his own body, calculating everything, except for his own heart. On the two sides of the blade, they saw threads of love piercing through the gaps between black and white.
我是毒舌真千金 | "I Am a Sharp-Tongued True Heiress"

Wang Nan, Chai Hui XinA girl transmigrates into a book as the villainous female supporting character, but after unlocking her true identity as a wealthy heiress, she decisively abandons all pretense of wealth! During their first encounter, she's drugged by the fake heiress. She jumps onto the balcony of the domineering CEO next door, shouts "Marry me!", and runs away, leaving the CEO pinning her down. Back at the Wen family home, she turns the tables on the fake heiress, forcing her to apologize. She then uses her charm to ask her father for gold coins, effectively controlling the entire family. At the family reunion banquet, she dispels the "country bumpkin" rumors, and the domineering CEO makes a surprise appearance to save the day. She manipulates the scheming women, bending down to say "We meet again," thus beginning his assertive pursuit of love.
失控宠 | "Uncontrollable Pampering"

Hu Jia Hao, Long Yi Yi (Wang Jin)As the true daughter of the Wen family, Su Ruan didn't receive the same pampering as the fake heiress, Wen Wanwan. Heartbroken after witnessing her boyfriend, Yan Yunye, cheat on her with the fake heiress, Wen Wanwan, Su Ruan unexpectedly encounters Yan Yunye's cousin, Yan Tingnan, known as the abstinent prince of Beijing's elite circles. Su Ruan decides to use him to get revenge on her boyfriend. To become his sister-in-law and escape the Wen family's control, Su Ruan uses every trick in the book to seduce Yan Tingnan into breaking his vows. Ultimately, in their mutual struggle, they develop feelings for each other. After overcoming numerous hardships, they finally become a couple.
伪装嫁豪门，失忆老公看破不说破 | "Pretending to Marry into a Wealthy Family, My Amnesiac Husband Sees Through It But Doesn't Say It"

Feng Xiang Kun, Wu Ri Li GeZhou Fuxuan forged her identity and meticulously planned her schemes to seduce Pei Yanche, the president of the Pei Group. After a night with him, she became pregnant. However, Pei Yanche threw a check in her face, mocking her for not being worthy of bearing his child. Five years later, Pei Yanche returned from the dead, but had forgotten everything. Zhou Fuxuan could only feign deep affection in order to successfully marry into the wealthy family.
步步為營步步傾心 | "Step by Step, Heart by Heart"

Shao Zhi Peng, Li Hui MinSu Mianmian and her older sister Su Jin grew up together in an orphanage, relying on each other for survival. The dark times they spent there left deep scars on both of them. Su Jin's love for her sister became increasingly distorted, and she attempted to control everything about Su Mianmian. Finally, Su Mianmian could no longer endure it, and her love for her sister turned to hatred. To get revenge on her sister Su Jin, Su Mianmian turned her attention to her ex-boyfriend's father, He Shengyuan, hoping to become her sister's mother-in-law and thus gain control over her life. However, in the process, Su Mianmian found nourishment and redemption in He Shengyuan's healthy, inclusive, and unconditionally trusting love.
糟糕！和混混老公命运绑定啦 | "Oh No! My Fate is Bound to My Thug Husband"

After multiple rebirths, Shi Xinran decides to deliberately approach Tan Yunqian to help him avoid death and thus save herself. While resolving Tan Yunqian's crises, the two gradually develop feelings for each other on their journey together, eventually living happily ever after.
陆总，夫人她怀了您的崽 | "Mr. Lu, Your Wife is Pregnant with Your Child"

He Lian Fei, Li Ai XiaoQin Meng wakes up to find herself transmigrated into the body of Lu Tingxi's first wife in a novel. Upon learning she's pregnant, Lu Tingxi demands she abort the child! She decisively files for divorce, infuriating her ex-husband, who remains determined to leave. Then, Lu Tingxi sees the adorable baby and is stunned: "This is my child?!" Watch as the ex-wife uses the child to "win over" her ex-husband, staging a dramatic "wife-chasing-after-the-cremation" scenario!
吻上薔薇 | "Kissing the Rose"

Wang Hui Long, Zhang Zi HanSix years ago, Wen Li was in danger and rescued by a kind person, unaware that the person was Huo Siheng's father. Huo's father accidentally killed a murderer and was subsequently persecuted and imprisoned by the murderer's family. Unable to accept this reality, Huo's mother committed suicide by jumping off a building. Faced with his father's wrongful conviction, his mother's death, and the ridicule and fear of his classmates, Huo Siheng was isolated and helpless. Wen Li, who had just escaped danger, witnessed all of this. She already harbored a secret crush on Huo Siheng, and now, remembering the kind person who saved her but was wrongfully imprisoned, she secretly helped Huo Siheng. Huo Siheng, in turn, silently protected her. They redeemed each other and eventually fell in love.
甜妻诞女！被豪门全家宠上天 | "Sweet Wife Gives Birth to a Daughter! Spoiled by the Entire Wealthy Family"

While performing as a substitute singer, she gave birth prematurely to her daughter, Xiao Dingdang. Her father, Mu Nansheng, left behind a jade pendant and disappeared. Tang Yun raised her daughter alone for five years with great difficulty. Five years later, Old Madam Mu encountered Xiao Dingdang by chance and suspected she was a member of the Mu family. A paternity test confirmed she was Mu Nansheng's daughter, and the Mu family launched a full-scale search for her.
开局任意门，流放终点是太子妃 | "Starting with an Anywhere Door, Exile Ends with the Crown Princess"

Lu Dong Xu, Yu Yi LeiLin Zhiyi transmigrates into the body of a cannon fodder female supporting character in a novel. She encounters a scumbag who marries her as a concubine. Pregnant with his child, she chooses to abort it. After emptying her dowry and suing the scumbag, she follows her family into exile. On the way, her stepmother and the second wife try to seize her dowry and harm her, but Lin Zhiyi persuades her elder brother to sever ties with them. She establishes herself using her spatial ability and culinary skills. To protect her family, she prevents her reborn cousin, Lin Yunzhao, from getting close to the deposed crown prince, and saves the prince multiple times, gaining his favor.
別硬剛這位祖宗你真惹不起 | "Don't Mess With This Ancestor, You Can't Afford to Offend Her"

Xia Jin Mu, Yin YueYe Sang, an immortal girl who has lived for a hundred years, was imprisoned for three years to suppress the bloodlust within her. Upon her release and return to Yun City, she becomes embroiled in a conspiracy involving the "Blazing Blood Stone" and the "Island of Immortality," while her former nemesis, "Jade Kirin" Li Suizhou, is also released at the same time. The two go from being adversaries to working together, uncovering the dark side of multiple organizations and the mysteries of their own pasts. In the face of life-or-death trials, they gradually develop feelings for each other, but also face an even greater survival crisis.
救赎失败后，我和闺蜜离开了 | "After Redemption Failed, My Best Friend and I Left"

Yin Chen, Kang Ling XiaoLin Ruo and her best friend Lin Yue transmigrated into a book, redeeming the tragic male supporting characters. Lin Ruo was responsible for saving Fu Sinian, a genius boy bullied and abused to the point of autism, while Lin Yue was responsible for saving Pei Zhao, a pitiful boy paralyzed and disfigured, abandoned by his family and mother. The two worked tirelessly for ten years, and their redemption was almost complete; they would stay in this world and live happily ever after with their loved ones. But just as their mission was about to succeed, their beloved female lead returned. The progress bar was wiped clean. Ten years of effort became a joke. But Lin Ruo and Lin Yue wouldn't give up so easily; they were determined to overturn this world.
重回九零之锦绣人生 |  "Return to the 1990s: A Splendid Life"

Du Yu Qi, Zhang Lan YueLin Nuo transmigrates into a book and becomes a rural teacher in the 1990s, forced to take over the absurd marriage and family conflicts left behind by the original owner of the body. With modern thinking and a clear mind, she decisively breaks ties with the past, strives to repair her relationship with her husband Yang Mo and his family, and joins hands with the steady and reserved Yang Mo to start a business. From street vending to stock trading, from opening a restaurant to venturing into the education and training industry, their relationship deepens amidst their bickering, ultimately achieving success in both career and love, leading their family to wealth and happiness.
穿成七零硬核娇妻 | "Transmigrated into a Hardcore Darling in the 70s"

Wei Jia Yu, Fan Chu QiTang Niannian transmigrates into the body of a minor cannon fodder character in the 1970s. The original Tang Niannian fell into a river, was jilted at marriage, married a scoundrel, and died from domestic violence. Determined to change her fate, she first teaches the Qi family a lesson, recovering their debts and ending the engagement, then deals with Yang Hongling and He Guoqing, reclaims the spiritual spring space engraved with the character "Tang," and recognizes it as her master. She earns money through hunting, black market trading, and repairing equipment in various factories. Later, she establishes the Hongyun Socks Factory and the Meili Handicrafts Factory, leading Tang Village to prosperity and creating jobs. She reunites with Shen Xiao, the "wolf cub" she fed as a child, and they fall in love. Shen Xiao fully supports her endeavors.
夫人修仙，捉妖顺便谈恋爱 | "The Lady Cultivates Immortality, Captures Demons, and Falls in Love Along the Way"

Li Jin Chen, Ding XiaoTo collect the shattered primordial spirit of her disciple Xuanming, the Kunlun High Goddess Yaoguang sealed her memories and reincarnated for a thousand years, becoming the cold-faced demon hunter Qin Buli in this life. To replenish her spiritual power, she sets her sights on the wealthy and spoiled Tu Mingxuan, a rich second-generation heir shrouded in purple aura, binding him to a marriage contract that makes him her "portable blood bank." Together they exorcise foxes and solve cases live, the aloof High Goddess gradually develops feelings; Tu Mingxuan, in turn, goes from disdain to willingly protecting her with his blood and life. Tu Mingxuan uses his mortal body to shield her from calamity; Yaoguang sheds tears, and the thousand-year-old threads of love finally return to their rightful place. She finally learns to cry and to love in the mortal world.
藏起來的溫柔 | "Hidden Tenderness"

Jing Zhuo remained steadfast in his protection, silently winning her heart with his sincere care in their daily interactions.

First taste, then love; this time, he tasted a lifetime of happiness.

请驯服这只恶少 | "Please Tame This Bad Boy"

错嫁春风遇瑾年 | "Wrongly Married to the Spring Breeze and Meet Jin Nian"

Wang Wei Yang, Zhang Shao HeIn her past life, Su Yinian treated those she considered her closest relatives with utmost sincerity, only to be betrayed and exploited, ultimately suffering a tragic end with her family destroyed and dying with resentment. Reborn before the tragedy, a flame of revenge ignites in her eyes, vowing never to let the pain of the past repeat itself. In this life, she abandons her naivety and weakness, forcefully slapping the faces of hypocritical scumbags and vicious bitches, and determined to make the deeply affectionate man she missed in her past life obediently walk into the "chasing-back crematorium" she has laid out.
從此不再是童話 | "No Longer a Fairy Tale"

Tang Ming Yang, Wang Xing ZiSu Wantang was used as a tool for a political marriage by the Su family. She ran away barefoot from her engagement banquet and chose Lu Qingye, a man on a motorcycle. Little did she know that Lu Qingye was a rising star in Jiangcheng who would fight against the Su and Wang families for her, even rescuing her abused and crippled aunt. She orchestrated a scheme to expose the villains' ugly side and reveal the truth behind her mother's murder, transforming from a pampered damsel in distress into a vengeful queen. Their relationship evolved from exploitation to deep love, culminating in a wedding embrace where they found both love and justice. It turns out that escaping the darkness truly allows one to encounter their own fairytale.
重生七零帶著萌娃去逼婚 | "Reborn in the 70s with a Cute Baby to Force Marriage"

Li Mu Heng, Chen Mu YeTo protect her newborn child, Shen Yunzhi was pushed and hit her head by her stepmother, Wu Guihua, and woke up mentally impaired. In reality, Shen Yunzhi had traveled fifty years into the future and become a renowned painter. At the opening ceremony of an art exhibition, due to an accident, Shen Yunzhi traveled back to her original era, opening her eyes to see her grown-up child desperately protecting her. The now-sane Shen Yunzhi decided to settle accounts with her stepmother for the years of mistreatment she and her child had suffered. She forced her stepmother to remarry and sent her son to the Great Northern Wilderness. After resolving these issues, Shen Yunzhi, looking at the keepsake from her scumbag stepfather, took her child south to confront him.
灯火阑珊与他 | "The Dimming Lights and Him"

Zhou Jing Bo, Zhao You MeiThe story revolves around Jiang Zhi, who, to avoid an arranged marriage, has a one-night stand on the eve of their marriage registration, but unexpectedly ends up having a relationship with her fiancé, Song Yansheng. The two are complete strangers, and for three years after their marriage, they are like complete strangers. On the eve of her return to single life, Jiang Zhi goes to a nightclub and chooses a male model, only to choose Song Yansheng again. Amidst concealment, misunderstandings, and frequent clashes, their true identities are revealed, ultimately leading to a sweet and heartwarming tale of love after marriage, from initial resistance to eventual attraction.
予他心尖缠绕  | "To Entwine His Heart"

Qian Zhen Ji, Wang Ya Qing (RAW)When the Lin family company went bankrupt, Lin Wan was blackmailed by her father into accompanying a powerful figure to pay for her sister's medical expenses. However, she mistakenly entered Shen Jin's room. She had harbored a secret crush on Shen Jin because he had helped her when she was bullied as a child, and now she mistakenly saw him as someone to curry favor with. Shen Jin fell in love with her at first sight, and the two had a relationship. Afterwards, Lin Wan realized she had mistaken him for someone else and, believing Shen Jin had a girlfriend, refused to pursue him. Shen Jin secretly helped her but, seeing her self-destructive behavior, reluctantly drove her away.

Liu Yu Hang, Zhai Yi Ying[HERE]2. 是周教授先动心 - Shen Hao Nan, Jin Zi Xuan[HERE]3. 世界赠我以你 - Cheng Cheng, Ma Le Jie[HERE]4. 错嫁春风遇瑾年 - Zou Ke Jun, Wang Hai Min[HERE]5. 请驯服这只恶少 - Ye Hao Ran, Du Yu Chen[HERE]6. 突如其来的我们 - Zhang Bei Xi, Zhang Ru Yi[HERE]7. 傅先生的小作精 - Xiao Wen Yu, Xiang Yun Jie[HERE]8. 全家穿书后，炮灰女配不干了 - Cheng Cheng, Wang Yan Fei[HERE]9. 笼中花火 - Zhang Ting Rui, Wen Mo Yan[HERE]10. 别惹那个抱玩偶的，她打架贼凶 - Li Bo Yan (Li Bai Yan), Yu Yi Ning[HERE]11. 夜棠逐霄 - Wang Yan Xin, Zhu Mo Yan[HERE]12. 医妃挺孕肚随夫去流放 - Geng Zhi Xin, Chai Hui Xin[HERE]13. 假面许深情 - Zhang Si Fan, Zhai Cheng Lu[HERE]14. 辞旧迎新日前夫悔恨时 - Li Ke Le, Ma Qian Qian[HERE]15. 重生後太太成了傅總的貼身小掛件 - Wang Wei Yang, Zhang Shao He[HERE]16.  從此不再是童話 - Tang Ming Yang, Wang Xing Zi[HERE]17. 重生七零帶著萌娃去逼婚 - Li Mu Heng, Chen Mu Ye[HERE]18. 灯火阑珊与他 - Zhou Jing Bo, Zhao You Mei[HERE]19. 予他心尖缠绕  - Qian Zhen Ji, Wang Ya Qing*[HERE]
名媛教母，拉太子下神坛 | "The Socialite Godmother, Dragging the Prince Down from His Altar"

Cao Tian Kai, A ShangXia Hua, thanks to her mother's kidney donation, is brought back to the Song family. She establishes a socialite training program, using girls from humble backgrounds to infiltrate the wealthy family and gather evidence of the Song family's money laundering. To win over Xie Yuchen, Xia Hua disguises herself as a winemaker, but her striking resemblance to Xie Yuchen's mother attracts his attention. The cunning and abstinent Xie Yuchen is seeking revenge on his father, the richest man who killed his mother. The two discover each other's double identities and form a revenge alliance. They orchestrate a storm between the Song and Xie families, and while navigating various power struggles, they develop feelings for each other. Together, they bring down the Song family, shedding their pretenses at the end of their revenge, becoming each other's salvation.
在他心上种蔷薇 | "Planting Roses in His Heart"

Xie Hong Xin, Chai Hui XinThe first thing Qiao Wei did after graduating from university was to dump Lin Yan and pursue a brighter future. However, three years later, she ran into her ex again—she was now a nobody news anchor, while he had transformed into the second young master of the Lin Group. Qiao Wei, "?" Lin Yan, "You broke up with me so decisively back then because you thought I was poor, and now you live in this shabby place? Looks like your relationship with B-list celebrities isn't going so well?" Qiao Wei, "What? You have someone suitable to introduce me to?" Lin Yan took off his Richard Mille jacket and humiliatingly shoved it into her bosom. Lin Yan, "I do have someone. How about my brother? This is the deposit."
悦不负黎明 | "Joy Never Fades at Dawn"

Wang Hao Zhen, Wang Ge GeAt a lavish wedding, a perfect match for each other, Qin Yue's fiancé cheats on her. Amidst the sympathetic gazes of the guests, she turns away with a flourish. Li Yan, having worked in the most dangerous profession and witnessed the darkest, most wicked aspects of human nature, ultimately fulfilled his mission and returned alive, but left with incurable aftereffects. Just as he was about to give up and accept his fate, he met Qin Yue. She said, "We're both in the same boat, our weddings ruined. Why not spend our wedding night together?" They hit it off immediately, and their relationship quickly became irreversible. What they thought were just fleeting encounters turned out to be the result of all the past hardships leading up to each other. She was like a ray of light shining into Li Yan's life, inspiring him to strive towards the sun, because only by returning to the sunlight could he have the right to love her.
Little Rambling:Lots of today's dramas got taken down (on Youtube) just minutes after it's uploaded. I didn't even get to save the subtitles yet and it's already gone *sigh*
名媛教母19歲 | "The Socialite Godmother at 19"

Xiao Wen Yu, Tang Mu JiaNineteen-year-old Xia Hua is ostensibly the adopted daughter of the Song family, but is actually an illegitimate child. She secretly runs a socialite training school called "Nie Can," navigating the world of the wealthy under the guise of Chelsea. Seeking revenge for years of mistreatment by the Song family and to find her brother who was given away, she meticulously plans her schemes. Xie Yuchen gradually uncovers Xia Hua's multiple identities, drawn to her intelligence and resilience. Amidst their tests and clashes, feelings develop between them. Xia Hua uses Xie Yuchen's influence to disrupt the Song family's power. Ultimately, the Song family goes bankrupt, and Xia Hua, severely injured, disappears overseas. Xie Yuchen relentlessly pursues her, and they reunite in a foreign land. The story concludes with an open ending.p.s. same plot as Cao Tian Kai's drama from earlier today
少奶奶她又时间倒流啦 | "Young Mistress's Time Travel Again"

Shao Wei, Xiong An NiTo overcome her love tribulation, Sheng Qiluo, possessing the ability to rewind time, descends to the mortal realm and is betrothed to Gu Shaotang, a wealthy heir. She repeatedly uses her powers to resolve crises, attracting Gu Shaotang's attention. Together, they face numerous schemes from Xu Yuting, Meng Ning, and their false benefactor Fang Yu, gradually developing feelings for each other amidst humorous clashes and cooperation. Ultimately, they join forces to uncover the conspiracy, overcome serious injuries and the threat of separation, and with guidance from their master and the obstruction of fate, Gu Shaotang confesses his feelings, and the two decide to spend their lives together, fulfilling their love tribulation.
逆流1988花痴女重塑女王 | "Reverse 1988: The Infatuated Girl Rebuilds Her Queen"

Yin Yi Bo, Feng Yu TingModern-day popular actress Song Yao, known as the "Queen of Advertising" for her stunning beauty, unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a notorious womanizer in the 1980s after a mishap on her way to a new advertising endorsement. Not only does she suddenly find herself with a cold-hearted husband, but she also finds herself in the body of a woman who fainted from a nosebleed after peeping into the male employees' bathhouse at a car repair shop. In her previous life, men were willing to risk their lives for a glimpse of her; now, she's risking her life just to see a man! Determined to reinvent herself, Song Yao sheds her unfashionable appearance, seduces her rough-around-the-edges husband, competes to become an advertising model, and joins the factory's publicity department, allowing her to shine anew in the 1980s.
养宠系统，你绑定我老板干什么 | "Pet System, Why Are You Bound to My Boss?"

Li Ren Zhi, Liu Yi TongIntern Jiang Xiaoxiao accidentally gets bound to a pet-raising system, mistakenly setting the aloof CEO Mo Yunlan as her "dog." Forced to get close to him to complete bizarre tasks like petting his head and shaking his hand, she remains unaware that the CEO has secretly loved her for years. Amidst system tasks and the interference of a female antagonist, the two go from bickering to falling in love, ultimately unlocking a sweet romance and a life-changing transformation.
顶级千金被校草当众拒绝后，她不装了 | "After Being Publicly Rejected by the School Heartthrob, the Top Heiress Stops Pretending"

Liu Te, Wang Qian HuiZhou Jin was the ultimate simp for Liang Ze, the school heartthrob, for three years. She brought him breakfast, bought him medicine, and was on call 24/7, 365 days a year. On New Year's Eve, after her 1081st confession was publicly humiliated, she turned and left, declaring "Game over." Turned out she was actually the heiress of the Zhou family, a top-tier wealthy family in the capital. Three years ago, to make a bet with her childhood sweetheart, Gu Zhao, she disguised herself as a girl from the slums to pursue Liang Ze. Three years later, the bet ended, and she revealed her true identity, leaving Liang Ze. Liang Ze, upon learning the truth, was filled with remorse and, together with the scheming female supporting character Su Wenwen, attempted revenge at Zhou Jin and Gu Zhao's wedding, only to be outmaneuvered and humiliated!*Liu Te's first Duanju. Welcome back to Liu Te!
堕汀兰 | "Fallen Orchid"

Zheng Jin Yu, Zhang Lan YueSet in a fictional dynasty, the story follows Shen Tinglan, the eldest daughter of a family renowned for its medicinal herbs. Her family is implicated in a power struggle within the imperial court, falsely accused of treason and executed along with their entire clan. She miraculously survives, becoming a healer named "Bai Duo." While practicing medicine in a border town, she unexpectedly saves the critically injured Prince Xiao Chengyuan of the Northern Frontier. The two initially test each other but eventually join forces to investigate the truth, discovering that the massacre is intricately linked to royal secrets and a corruption scandal involving frontier military funds. As the layers of mystery are lifted, Shen Tinglan not only seeks revenge for her family but also faces a difficult choice between national duty and personal love. Ultimately, with Xiao Chengyuan's support, she exposes the conspiracy and clears her family's name.
郡主又美又颯，短命世子日日求娶 | "The Princess is Beautiful and Charming, and the Short-Lived Prince Pursues Her Marriage Every Day"

Wu Hao, Lin Rui XueReborn, Princess Wei Fu of Yong'an vows to reverse her family's downfall, tearing apart her scumbag husband Xiao Dingyi and his scheming mistress. Unexpectedly, she becomes involved with Cui Heng, the frail but cunning heir of Gaoyang. She tries to escape, but he relentlessly pursues her and fiercely protects her. Amidst the intrigues of the household and the palace, and the constant power struggles, Wei Fu, armed with unparalleled martial arts and a loyal servant, seeks revenge, while Cui Heng, despite his frail health, clears obstacles for her. Together, these two powerful figures develop feelings for each other on their path of revenge, ultimately punishing the wicked, giving birth to twins, and weaving a sweet and heroic ancient romance.*subtitle for the 1st ep is missing
偷听心声之高冷女神沦陷了 | "Eavesdropping on Heartfelt Words: The Cold Goddess Falls"

Ai Hong Chen, Tang Li JunJiang Xia is injured in an attack while saving her younger sister, Jiang Shuyue, who has been harassed. At the hospital, she meets Bai Zhen, the attending physician. Bai Zhen recognizes her from a crescent-shaped scar on her collarbone, recognizing her as the person who saved him in their childhood. He also unexpectedly possesses the ability to read Jiang Xia's mind. Under the guise of treating his sister, he becomes her personal assistant. As they spend time together, their feelings for each other deepen, but they face numerous crises. During this time, Bai Zhen's identity as a wealthy heir in Beijing's elite circles is exposed. He tears up his inheritance documents for Jiang Xia, steadfastly protecting her.
满城风雨入东宫 | "A City in Turmoil Enters the Eastern Palace"

Yan Ding Xiang Yu, Wu Ling WeiCrown Prince Song Chengyin, poisoned by the "Hehuan" drug, ventures into the Wanren Valley to find a woman with a birthmark resembling the red spider lily to cure him. However, he is ambushed and severely injured by his younger brother, Prince An. He later unexpectedly rescues Jiang Zhi, the legitimate daughter of the Marquis of Pingchang, who is being held alive in the valley, discovering that she is his destined love. To protect her daughter Jiang Mian from the "evil" Crown Prince, her stepmother forces Jiang Zhi to marry into the Eastern Palace. Despite repeated persecution from the Crown Princess and her stepmother, Jiang Zhi uses her medical skills and wisdom to join forces with the Crown Prince to fight against Prince An and eliminate internal enemies, ultimately seeking revenge on her father and stepmother.
少帅霸妻，强扭的瓜不甜也得甜 | "The Young Marshal's Domineering Wife: Even Forced Love Has to Be Sweet"

Lan Bo, Lu Lu Lu (RAW)"Come with me for three months, and I'll give you everything you want." Yan Xin, the young mistress of the Jiang family, a skilled physician, is drawn into a storm after rescuing a mysterious man. The warlord tyrant Jing Yuanzhao imprisons her in a villa while investigating intelligence, but is drawn to her wisdom and resilience as they spend time together. From forceful acquisition to entrusting each other with life and death, their love, forged in the flames of war, will ultimately transcend the barriers of class and faith.
烽火红颜拳未老 | "The Flame of War: The Fist Never Fades"

Xie Yu Wang, Wang Hai Min (RAW)In her previous life, Tang Lingyi, a wealthy heiress who had studied abroad, mistakenly trusted the wrong man, betraying Huo Tingchuan, the martial arts school owner who deeply loved her, and ultimately met a tragic end on the street. Reborn, she is determined to change her fate and "get back at" the unfaithful man. Facing her "straightforward" husband Huo Tingchuan, she launches a "husband-coaxing" mode, using various sweet tactics and clever schemes to "train" him from a cold-hearted man into a devoted and obedient lover.
娇藏 | "Hidden Beauty"

Xie Hong Xin, Shi Yue Yue (RAW)Her innate medicinal fragrance brought her no fortune, but instead made her a tool for her father to curry favor with the powerful: soaking in medicinal baths, offering herself to high-ranking officials, and being forced into marriage with a eunuch. Her mother's life was her Achilles' heel. Upon first meeting Shen Xiuyan, she stumbled upon an assassination attempt but dared to escape; after being robbed, she discovered he only wanted her as an antidote, and decisively broke off the relationship; when her wedding was abducted, she remained dignified and offered her life as a bargaining chip. Until the poison spread, she died with the hatred of being "used," unaware that she had already become the most beloved person in the heart of the God of War.

像烟花一样灿烂 | "Like Fireworks"

Zhang Chi, Wang Yi Lei, Yu Yin, Li Ke YiEighteen-year-old Song Zhuozhuo unexpectedly travels back to the year 2000, encountering her mother, Song Lihua, in her youth. Because of a scar on Jiang Yi's body, she believes him to be her biological father. To change her mother's fate—deafened in an accident and abandoned by her father—Song Zhuozhuo vehemently opposes Jiang Yi's relationship with her mother while teaming up with the gentle and academically gifted Zhang Wangchuan to help her mother realize her dream of owning fireworks. In protecting her mother, Song Zhuozhuo becomes friends with her, gradually learning to respect her life choices, and realizing a profound misunderstanding she has about her father. Meanwhile, the seemingly carefree Jiang Yi harbors a secret unknown to others.
遇良婚 | "Meeting a Good Marriage"

Huang Wen Bo, Yu Yu TongXiao Mengying was tricked into having a one-night stand with the richest man in Jing City, but unexpectedly became pregnant and was taken home. One thought it was a premeditated scheme, while the other was forced to compromise. What seemed like a misunderstanding gradually became clear to Qin Lie under the influence of his awful ex-husband. Would they maintain a respectful relationship, or would they act on impulse? How would Xiao Mengying, who had been hurt by love, deal with this relationship?
时时愿清风 | "May the Gentle Breeze Always Bring Us a Gentle Breeze"

Li Xing Lin, Cui Xiao XuanTop-rated nanny Jiang Shiyuan won over the elders of the Shen family with her experience and even became best friends with the second young lady of the Shen family. Only the cold-faced and domineering CEO Shen Yanqing wanted to get rid of her because he thought she was too young. After Jiang Shiyuan left, Shen Yanqing realized that she was actually the blogger "Shiyuan" whom he admired, and he instantly became a "true fan" of her.
夜寻千山＆夜巡千山 | "Night Search for a Thousand Mountains & Night Patrol of a Thousand Mountains"

Xiao Wen Yu, Qin Tian AiTen years ago, Huo Hansheng, the heir to the prestigious Huo family, lost both his parents and was taken in by Xie Zhao, the daughter of the long-established Xie family, and named Xie Hanye. Ten years later, Xie Zhao, drunk, was unexpectedly rescued by Xie Hanye, and their relationship was thus reversed. Xie Zhao, unaware that her obedient younger brother was actually a ruthless tyrant in sheep's clothing, remained oblivious to the truth.
野草疯长 | "Wild Grass Grows Wild"

Zhang Hong Ming, Jin ZiWhen Pei Ye was 16, his biological mother and stepfather died in a car accident on his birthday. By a twist of fate, he began living with his stepfather's daughter, Sang Wan. The 22-year-old Sang Wan became his "guardian." Living under the same roof, the 18-year-old Pei Ye gradually realized his feelings for Sang Wan, but before anything could happen, Sang Wan kicked him out of the house. Six years later, the two met again. Pei Ye had become a popular idol, while Sang Wan ran a coffee shop. Fate brought them together once more.*this is surprisingly better than what I was expecting and probably one of the best drama of the 14th
她的小幸运 | "Her Little Happiness"

Qiao Jia Le, Shi Yue YueJiang Yinong was dumped without her knowledge and then tricked into attending a banquet by Xiao S, where she was humiliated. To salvage the situation, she lied and claimed her boyfriend was the tycoon Fu Yusi. Unexpectedly, Fu Yusi and his mother were present, and the mother-in-law was very pleased with her daughter-in-law. The two then had a whirlwind marriage and began living together. However, what Jiang Yinong didn't expect was that what she thought was a gradual development of affection was actually Fu Yusi's long-planned scheme. It turned out that the Ah Yu who saved her from dire straits five years ago was someone else entirely.
新婚慢熟 | "Slowly Maturing After Marriage"

Wang Chen Peng, Lin Zi XuanTwenty-seven-year-old elite lawyer Wen Xi, after unexpectedly uncovering the mystery of her past, finds herself swapped with Yan Zhao, forced to leave her family and childhood sweetheart to enter into a contractual marriage with Shang Chen, the heir to a wealthy family in Beijing. Shang Chen is a rigid and aloof "iceberg CEO" who sees marriage as a responsibility; Wen Xi, traumatized by her family background, has closed herself off emotionally. Initially, the two are distant and awkward, but as they spend time together, Shang Chen shows care through small gestures and guides Wen Xi to confront her trauma, making her an exception for him. This marriage, which began as a contract, ultimately achieves a deep spiritual connection through the gentle flow of affection.
少帅每天都在吃醋 | "The Young Marshal is Jealous Every Day"

Huang Hao Wen, Yuan Yu HanThe jealous warlord Ling Shenxing neglects his wife Mu Wan, while a deadly plot lurks within his mansion. Mu Wan's accidental drowning is actually a murder plot; to protect herself, she uses her medical skills to navigate the warlord's estate. A series of unexpected events occur, including the poisoning of the second concubine and the sudden death of the fifth concubine. Mu Wan and Ling Shenxing work together to uncover the truth behind these events. Ling Shenxing's initial indifference transforms into heartfelt protection, and Mu Wan gradually develops feelings for this pillar of support in this chaotic world. Ultimately, the two escape the confines of the mansion and begin a happy life together.
籠中之梔 | "Gardenia in a Cage"

Liu Zi Heng, Li Xin YiMeng Zhiwan had been Fu Yujing's kept woman for three years. She knew better than anyone that their relationship was purely transactional, devoid of any genuine feelings. Yet, amidst those days and nights of tenderness and the man's increasingly generous displays of affection, should she harbor any delusions? She tried to remain a plaything, completely unaware that Fu Yujing had already fallen deeply in love with her.
溫小姐的暗戀守則 | "Miss Wen's Rules of Unrequited Love"

Meng Jia Hui, Wang Zi YiWen Shiyi had harbored a secret love for Jiang Hechuan for nine years, a feeling rekindled when Jiang Hechuan returned to China. Burdened by family trauma and psychological distress, Wen Shiyi never dared to express her feelings, yet through repeated encounters and entanglements, her relationship with Jiang Hechuan gradually deepened. Jiang Hechuan, in fact, had long harbored feelings for Wen Shiyi. Facing obstacles such as Su Mingfei's interference and family conflicts, the two found redemption and healing in each other. Ultimately, Wen Shiyi overcame her inner shadows, bravely confronted her love, and together with Jiang Hechuan, they overcame past obstacles and achieved a happy ending.
王爷每天都在暗恋王妃 | "The Prince Secretly Loves the Princess Every Day"

Li You Lin, Han Lu JinShen Jiwu feigns illness to vent his frustrations with the Emperor. Under Su Yin's "treatment," Shen Jiwu gradually "recovers," leading to a rift between them. Then one day, they each find a diary filled with cheesy love quotes featuring them. They mistakenly believe the other is secretly in love with them, causing a subtle shift in their attitudes. One becomes self-satisfied and over-interprets Su Yin's actions; the other, when faced with difficulties, feels compelled to offer a kiss to coax her into helping. Through their comical interactions, the two eventually become a couple.
不待春风慢 | "Not Waiting for the Slow Spring Breeze"

Zhou Hang, Wang QianRuan You accidentally discovers her ex-boyfriend He Zhiyao's affair with her younger sister Ruan Baiwei. Instead of showing remorse, He Zhiyao coldly abandons her. Heartbroken, Ruan You has a one-night stand with a stranger, He Tingzheng, unaware that he is He Zhiyao's father. Soon after, Ruan You becomes pregnant. Ruan Baiwei, eager to marry into the He family, goes to great lengths to please her future mother-in-law, whom she has never met. Upon learning of Ruan You's pregnancy, Ruan Baiwei repeatedly humiliates her in public, completely oblivious to the fact that the mother-in-law she is so painstakingly trying to please is none other than her own sister, whom she constantly torments.
天降福妻傻夫郎 | "A Blessed Wife and a Foolish Husband"

Lin Yu Xi, Li Ai XiaoIn a year of severe drought, Su Jiuyue was forced by her family to marry Wu Xiyuan, a man with intellectual disabilities. Initially cautious, she later experienced a warmth she had never felt before. With her arrival, the Wu family enjoyed a series of good fortunes and gradually escaped their predicament. Through her resilience and kindness, Su Jiuyue brought hope to her family and embarked on a legendary journey with Wu Xiyuan, navigating a chaotic world and reversing their fate.

拜托都修仙了，谁还当真千金啊＆宠爱不稀罕真千金她沉迷修仙 | "Please, Everyone's Cultivating Immortality, Who Still Values ​​a Real Heiress? & She Doesn't Care About Pampering, This Real Heiress is Obsessed with Cultivating Immortality"

Hou Peng Yan, Wu Yi QiaoShi Qi, a genius in metaphysics, failed her tribulation due to unresolved family ties. Ordered by her master to descend the mountain to find her family, she unexpectedly discovers she is the long-lost true heiress of the wealthy Ning family. Faced with a family that favors the false heiress, she refuses to let internal strife fester, using her extraordinary abilities to resolve numerous crises and gradually win their hearts. During this time, she meets Ji Fusang, the richest man in Yunzhou, cures his chronic illness, and they develop feelings for each other. After uncovering the false heiress's conspiracy and gaining both family and love, Shi Qi chooses to remain in the mortal world to live a happy life with her beloved.
本夫人只想养老，请陛下自重 | "This Lady Only Wants to Retire, Your Majesty, Please Show Some Respect"

Yu Pei Shan, Qi Hui ZaoA modern office worker unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of the daughter of a powerful minister in ancient times. Intending to live a life of leisure thanks to her family's wealth, she is drawn into palace intrigue by an imperial decree of marriage. Faced with the cunning emperor's elaborate schemes, the female protagonist feigns ignorance while using her modern mindset to resolve crises. From planting vegetables in the imperial garden to inventing mahjong to entertain the harem, she throws the palace into chaos. The emperor, outwardly disdainful, secretly protects her. The two gradually develop feelings for each other amidst their battle of wits, enacting a delightful "she runs, he chases" romance, ultimately achieving a sweet ending amidst the clash of power struggles and genuine affection.
提前一秒相爱 | "Falling in Love a Second Ahead"

Luo Zheng, Lu Fei'erLin Yuechen, once a rising star in the legal profession, becomes a housewife after marriage. Betrayed by her husband's infidelity, she unexpectedly meets Lu Wan, a top lawyer, at a bar. From initial hesitation to working together, Lin Yuechen returns to the legal profession, reclaiming her dignity and wealth. Lu Wan appears cold but is actually deeply affectionate, and his identity hides the secret of being the heir to the Qian Yuan family fortune. Torn between self-interest and genuine affection, they face conspiracies and challenges together, ultimately achieving a double victory in both their careers and love.
八零辣妻赚麻了 | "The Spicy Wife of the 80s Made a Fortune"

Qiao Jia Le, Song Yu Jia*Top hairstylist Zuo Jingyan transmigrates to the 1980s, becoming a notorious "ladies' man" in a residential compound. The original owner of this body schemed to marry the cold-faced military officer Lu Haoting, but remained lazy and unwilling to work, leading him to file for divorce. After transmigrating, Zuo Jingyan proactively proposes to become self-reliant before divorcing him, opening a hair salon using her skills and leading her fellow women to prosperity. Lu Haoting watches her transform from a "ladies' man" into a confident and independent woman, and is unknowingly drawn to her. However, Zuo Jingyan steadfastly adheres to their divorce agreement. Ultimately, Lu Haoting wins back his wife through his actions, and the two finally become a couple amidst the tides of the new era.
桃花喜事 | "Peach Blossom Wedding"

Ye Ting, Cai Miao YanLi Xiaotao, a farm girl, is forced by her stepmother, Sun Juan, to spend the night with a wealthy young man in exchange for selling the family's chickens, ducks, and geese. By a twist of fate, she enters the room of Nangong Jin (the young master of the Nangong Group), and the two have a relationship. Nangong Jin, feeling a sense of responsibility, proposes marriage. After the marriage, Li Xiaotao mistakenly believes her husband is a poor construction worker, yet remains optimistic and hardworking. Nangong Jin secretly protects his wife with his wealth, buying her livestock and gifting her an expensive necklace. Li Xiaotao's younger sister, Li Zhenbao, is jealous of her sister and repeatedly makes things difficult for her. Ultimately, Nangong Jin's true identity is revealed, and he decisively punishes the villains, leading the couple to work together to bring justice to the family.
今夜撩动他心 | "Tonight, I'll Stir His Heart"

Wang Dao Tie, Wen Mo YanAfter being heartbroken by her boyfriend Yan Yunye once again, the fictional character Su Ruan suddenly awakens to the plot. It turns out she is a cannon fodder female supporting character in a novel, whose purpose is to advance other people's storylines. Thus, she decides to defy fate, win over the male lead Yan Tingnan, and become the true female lead! However, Yan Tingnan is actually her boyfriend Yan Yunye's adoptive father! Thus, a thrilling love triangle begins.
长公主始乱终弃后，他黑化了 | "After the Princess Abandoned Him, He Turned Evil"

Li You Lin, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun)She is Xiao Jinning, the most esteemed princess of Daqing. In her past life, her unrequited love resulted in the slaughter of her entire family and the stain of her official ranks with blood... Reborn, she personally takes in the son of her enemy—her nominal "adopted son," Shen Xiao—and trains him into the sharpest blade.
大胆哀家才是真千金 | "Bold Empress Dowager is the True Daughter"

Jin Ze (Garvey Jin), Zhang Chu XuanFor twenty-six years, Empress Dowager Niohuru ruled from behind the curtain. On the day she passed away, she transmigrated into the body of Su Ran, the true heiress who had been a dragon-snatcher for eighteen years. The moment Su Ran opened her eyes, she saw a cold and ruthless older brother, a rebellious and defiant younger brother, the tearful fake heiress Su Qingshan, and an ambiguous grandfather. Well-versed in the rules of palace intrigue, Su Ran remained composed and dignified. First, she dealt with the hypocritical Su Qingshan, then she secured the support of her grandfather, the most influential person in the family, and finally, she used her elder brother's guilt to gain a job at the company. On her first day, Su Qingshan led the bullying of Su Ran at the company, and Su Ran, not to be outdone, retaliated on the spot.
梦燃成昼 | "Dreams Burn into Daylight"

Wu Tian Hao, Lin Zi XuanGallery owner Li Meng, whose husband Shao De and the scheming Su Xiaoshan conspired to defraud her of insurance money, is left with only three months to live. She then meets Song Ran, a down-on-his-luck actor also battling a terminal illness. The two strike a deal: Song Ran, posing as a "fake rich second-generation," seduces Su Xiaoshan to help Li Meng reclaim her assets and seek revenge. Amidst a meticulously planned Monat luxury goods scam, a fake pregnancy scandal, and a triple trap at a hotel, their relationship evolves from mutual exploitation to a journey of spiritual redemption.
死对头他今天不对劲 | "My Nemesis Is Acting Strange Today"

Lin Yu Xi, Zhang Wan YueIntern Song Zhaozhao mistakenly sent a novel as a work proposal to her supervisor, Lu Ye. Lu Ye, mistaking it for a hint, became engrossed in his own scheme, and began to manipulate Song Zhaozhao's work...
棠舟渡 | "Tangzhou Ferry"

Wu Zhu Xi, Wang Hai MinYe Chutang, a top-tier special agent from the post-apocalyptic world, unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of Ye Chutang, the legitimate daughter of a high-ranking official in ancient times. Her father is ruthless and cold-blooded, her stepmother appears gentle but is actually hypocritical and cunning, and her stepsister is scheming and vicious. Ye Chutang, honed by the ruthlessness and exceptional intelligence of the post-apocalyptic world, joins forces with the powerful and cunning Prince Chen, Qi Yanzhou, to tear apart their wicked relatives and ruthlessly punish their villains. Ultimately, the two quell a deadly plague sweeping the court, Ye Chutang rises to the throne as Empress, and finds a perfect love that they cherish and will spend their lives together.
何须相守到白头 | "Why Must We Stay Together Until Old Age?"

Fu Han Yuan, Zhang Chu XuanXu Zhiwei was born with a unique constitution, aging in reverse, unlike most people. Born in the 1970s, she was considered a "freak," with only her adoptive mother, Xu Ying, providing her with warmth. She and her childhood sweetheart, Jiang Jinghe, fell in love and stayed together in different timelines, but due to coincidences and the cruel twists of fate, they were separated time and again. Yet, they never forgot their initial love. Their entanglement spanning half a century, amidst life and death, family ties, and societal judgment, prompts them to question the true meaning of love—is growing old together the only way to achieve fulfillment?
闪婚后我成了旺夫小福妻 | "After My Flash Marriage, I Became a Lucky Wife"

Xu Hao Nan, Xu Hai WenAfter dealing with her ambitious adopted son, Lin Wanwan, who was suffering from late-stage stomach cancer, was bound to a pregnancy system and transmigrated into the body of a beloved 300-pound girl with the same name in the 1970s. She used the system to lose weight, become beautiful, build her career, slap the face of scumbag villains, and eventually married Fu Zheng, who was destined to have no heir. After marriage, she gave birth to several children and lived a prosperous and fulfilling life.
救命！和闺蜜逃跑又翻车了 | "Help! My Best Friend and I Tried to Escape Again"

Li Hui Min, Kang Yu Qian, Zhou Yi RanRuan Tang and Su Xiaoman are transmigrated into a novel, becoming tragic cannon fodder characters. To rewrite their fate, they decide to escape the Li family. However, the Li brothers, who should be infatuated with the novel's heroine Ruan Mei, relentlessly pursue Ruan Tang and Su Xiaoman like hungry wolves. Afterwards, the two women navigate the Li brothers while plotting their escape, only to discover their possessiveness towards them with each failed attempt. Meanwhile, Ruan Tang exposes the scandalous truth about the real and fake heiresses of the Ruan family, while Su Xiaoman faces the harassment of the Su family's mistress and her scumbag father. Ultimately, in their struggle against fate and their efforts to protect each other, they find unexpected love.
青青日常 | "Qingqing's Daily Life"

Hu Wen Zhe, Sun Yan QingAfter dying from overwork, modern-day office worker Song Qingran transmigrates to another world and is bound to a "no-cooperation" system, becoming the mistress of Prince Xuanwu, Ning Zhuo. Ning Zhuo can hear her inner monologues but mistakes them for mental instability. Their relationship begins with business dealings; Song Qingran uses her wisdom to resolve crises, while Ning Zhuo gradually falls for her as they navigate power struggles. Ultimately, they transcend their past identities and embark on a mutually devoted relationship.
小可怜孕吐后顾爷急了 | "My Poor Little Girl's Morning Sickness Makes Master Gu Anxious"

Qiao Jia Le, Xu Xiao ShuTang Rong, from a poor family, works part-time as a caregiver to pay for her tuition. She unexpectedly ends up "caring" for Gu Liunian, the heir to the Gu family, a wealthy and powerful clan! Highly fertile, she becomes pregnant, but Gu Liunian mistakes her for a gold digger and forces her to sign a contract to leave after giving birth. However, as they spend time together, Gu Liunian spoils her more and more, making her his precious darling.
厌厌生见 | "Yan Yan's Unexpected Encounter "

Xu Jun Yi, Zhai Cheng LuAfter Jiang Yan, the sole heir to the Jiang Group, went blind, Li Xi, using a highly convincing voice impersonation, impersonated his beloved for three years, deceiving him. Later, when the real beloved appeared, she disappeared overnight. When they met again, his eye disease had healed, and his fiancée was beautiful and charming. She, on the other hand, was leaving the hospital with her daughter, who had just been diagnosed with leukemia. To pay for her daughter's treatment, she was forced to stay in Hong Kong. On her first day at work, she discovered that the CEO was Jiang Yan. She tried everything to cover up the truth from years ago, but this time, Jiang Yan was proving difficult to fool.
故棠照雪来 | "The Old Tang Reflects the Snow"

Huang You Tian, Wang Si JinAfter being jilted, Jiang Zhaoxue, once hailed as the "most talented woman in the capital," became the laughingstock of the entire city. In the dead of winter, she was forced to kneel in the snow, vomiting and fainting. Just then, Zhou Gutang, a lame and powerful minister known as the "Living Yama" of the Zhou family, happened to pass by. Jiang Zhaoxue grabbed his sleeve and asked in a trembling voice, "Will you marry me?" Zhou Gutang reached out his hand and pulled her out of the mire. However, after the annulment, Cui Zhao, the eldest son of the Cui family, began to regret his decision.
前朝太子归来，赘婿岂是池中物 | "The Former Crown Prince Returns, How Can a Son-in-Law Be a Mere Subject?"

Yuan Feng Hao, Li XiuCrown Prince Chen Jingyue of the Great Chen Dynasty transmigrates into the body of the son-in-law of the eldest daughter of a wealthy and powerful family, the Gu family. His previous life was that of a notorious good-for-nothing, possessing only a few good looks, and a third-rate actor who rose to fame through an online talent show. Using his past life's experience and shrewdness, he wins over the housekeeper, his sister-in-law, and his brother-in-law, stunning everyone on various occasions. Ultimately, he rekindles his romance with his powerful female CEO wife, achieving success in both love and career.

Ma Shi Yao, Qu Xiao XiaoJiang Yuan never imagined that a trap meticulously set by her cousin would completely rewrite her life. An unexpected incident while drunk brought her into contact with a stranger, Huo Zhiyan. To save face, the two hastily married. Huo Zhiyan, whom Jiang Yuan mistook for a security guard, was actually the head of the Gu Group. After their marriage, Jiang Yuan was repeatedly framed, and Huo Zhiyan secretly protected her on several occasions. As they spent time together, they developed feelings for each other, gradually moving from a contractual marriage to a genuine relationship.
在反派心上撒野 | "Wild in the Villain's Heart"

Li Ye Chen, Qi Yu JiaTransmigrating into a novel as the villainous female supporting character, Su An'an's mission is to prevent the antagonist, Gu Jinchuan, from turning evil. Faced with the original owner's heinous acts and the villain's hatred, she proceeds cautiously, offering warmth and shielding him from harm. When her memories awaken, they meet again seven years later; he has become the powerful head of the Gu family. "For you, I am willing to be an enemy of the world." This time, she chooses to stay, and love and redemption finally find fulfillment.
乘风破浪，从大婚当日开始 | "Riding the Waves, Starting from Our Wedding Day"

Zeng Xi Tang, Liao Mo XiIn her past life, on her wedding day, Yun Zheng's husband wanted her to inherit two families, making her the eldest sister-in-law married to her deceased elder brother. She was forced to support the Marquis's mansion with her dowry and was even pressured to adopt her husband's son with her beloved's first love. Ultimately, she was poisoned by her husband. Reborn, Yun Zheng returns to her wedding day. This time, she is no longer timid. She forces the Marquis's mansion to change its mind, making her beloved the eldest sister-in-law of her husband's first love. She donates her dowry to gain a reputation for righteousness and even manages to curry favor with Prince Rui. With Prince Rui's help, Yun Zheng divorces her husband, making the Yun family the leading imperial merchants. She is granted the title of Princess and finally marries Prince Rui.
娇娇皇后是团宠 | "The Spoiled Queen is the Darling of the Group"

Feng Yi Yang, Zhang Yu QingEmpress Qin Manjiao, the most fortunate woman in the Great Zhou Dynasty, ruined her own life, even personally causing the death of the man who loved her most, Chu Yao. Reborn, still the beloved daughter of her family, Qin Manjiao decides to cherish her good fortune and marriage, determined to change her family's tragic fate. She and Chu Yao join forces to thwart the Empress's and Liao family's rebellion, and in the process, they reveal their secret of being reborn. Having missed each other in their past lives, they are now united in this one, the Emperor and Empress working together to rule the world.
嬌嬌入懷 | "The Darling in My Arms"

Liu Zi Rui, Meng NaJiang Li's past life was as a bodyguard for Murong Yan, the crown prince of the Nanzhao Kingdom. Sold into the Qianji Camp at the age of three for training, she became a purple-clad warrior in the camp at thirteen... A reborn strong female protagonist clashes with a cunning regent; on her path of revenge, will she use him or fall in love?
完蛋我被暴君監聽了 | "I'm Doomed, the Tyrant is Listening to Me"

Yu Hang, Li Jia JieModern-day office worker Mu Zhi transmigrates into the body of a woman disguised as a man, a fake eunuch. She encounters the tyrannical emperor Ying Mo and, after being entangled in a love potion, escapes. She possesses a cheat ability to eavesdrop on others' thoughts, but she cannot hear Ying Mo's voice. Instead, Ying Mo eavesdrops on her thoughts and appoints her as his chief steward. Mu Zhi helps Ying Mo quell the rebellion and clear his name. After a political marriage crisis, her true identity as the legitimate princess of Nanyue is finally revealed. He dismisses her from the harem and makes her empress.
锦绣渔乡：赘婿夫君真香实录 | "The True Story of My Husband's True Love in a Prosperous Fishing Village"

Chen Zhen Ni, Zhang Xiao NianBusiness queen Song Nianchu dies while ringing the bell and is reborn as Achu, a powerful woman with superhuman strength, in a fishing village in the 1970s. She becomes famous for knocking out a shark with a single punch on a stormy night and is forced by the village chief to marry Mu Shi'an, a capitalist's son-in-law. With her modern business acumen, she leads the village to prosperity with crispy fish chunks and net-weaving machines, securing orders from state-run restaurants and supply and marketing cooperatives. Mu Shi'an, with his hidden scientific talent, helps establish a fishing tackle factory and a cannery. Their marriage evolves from a contractual one to a mutual commitment, resolving conflicts with a local bully and his family, forging a path to wealth in the impoverished fishing village, writing a legendary tale of a strong woman leading her brilliant son-in-law to success.
这公主有亿点点毒＆我本灾星逆袭成凰 | "This Princess Has a Little Bit of Poison & I, a Calamity Star, Reverse My Fortune and Become a Phoenix"

Zhang Hao, Wang QiaoEighteen years ago, Princess Shen Mingzhu was falsely accused of being a jinx and sent out of the palace during a palace coup. Eighteen years later, she returns to the palace to uncover the truth. Feigning illness, she plots to bring down the Imperial Concubine and thwarts the Crown Prince and the Imperial Advisor's conspiracy to arrange a marriage alliance. When the Empress and the Imperial Concubine join forces to expose the Emperor's fratricide and usurpation, and the truth that Mingzhu is actually the orphan of the former Crown Prince, both mothers sacrifice themselves to protect their children and perish with the Emperor. Ultimately, Mingzhu sees through the lust for power and, under the protection of the Imperial Guards, leaves the palace to find true peace and happiness.
穿书七零，我把硬汉撩成宠妻狂 | "Transmigrating Into a Novel Set in the 19970s, I Turned a Tough Guy Into a Doting Husband"

Liu Yan Kai, Liu Jing YangLin Jianchun transmigrates into a novel set in the 1970s, becoming cannon fodder. On her wedding night, she's refused entry by her mother-in-law and ends up staying at the Lu family's house next door. She defies the original owner's weakness, accusing the Song family of scheming, salvaging her reputation and even receiving compensation. Initially, Lu Xuanzhou tries to distance himself, but Lin Jianchun stirs his heart, and their relationship blossoms into marriage. The original heroine, Song Caiwei, is in love with Lu Xuanzhou and repeatedly bullies Lin Jianchun, but she always manages to defuse the situation. Ultimately, Lin Jianchun and Lu Xuanzhou enjoy a sweet and happy life, their careers flourish, and they become the richest people in the area.
重生八零，改嫁后获得幸福人生 | "Reborn in the 80s, Gaining a Happy Life After Remarriage"

Cheng Zi, Ye ZiSong Qingyi, in her previous life, died a double suicide for love, but her soul returned to witness a truth that would overturn her entire life. Her "martyr" husband, Lin Jianhua, was not only alive but had also assumed the identity of his twin brother and was about to marry his fiancée, Su Yaoyao. Even more heartbreaking was that after her death in her previous life, her son, Lin Yaoyang, was abused to death by Su Yaoyao. Reborn, Song Qingyi decisively canceled her husband's household registration and collected his pension. Returning to the Lin family, she overheard her husband, Lin Jianhua, deceiving her by having Su Yaoyao bear his child in order to supposedly "fulfill his elder brother's last wish," and even planning to "carry on both branches of the family line."
战神奶爸：萌娃逼我摊牌 | "War God Dad: My Adorable Kid Forces Me to Confront Him"

Wang Bing Xiang, Song Xing Yi (RAW)Ye Xuan, a 27-year-old "God of War Dad," lives an ordinary life under an assumed name. In reality, he possesses a god-level sign-in system and is a combination of a divine healer, the founder of a multinational corporation, and a national guardian general.
重生大帝之我又重生了 | "Rebirth of the Great Emperor: I've Been Reborn Again"

Han Yi Bo, Xiong Ying, Shi Xuan Hong (RAW)Reborn in the 1990s, the three Shen brothers vow to reverse the family's misfortune of their sister being forced into a marriage with a mentally challenged man. The eldest brother starts a factory, the second brother uses his knowledge of antiques to speculate in stocks, and the youngest brother paves a path to stardom for his sister. Each brother utilizes their strengths, working together to overcome crises and collaborating with the Chen family. They not only successfully break off the cruel marriage agreement but also make waves in the business world, ultimately leading the Shen family out of the shadows and achieving a happy ending in both business and family life.
