Ultimately, Su Qingqing established herself in the clothing factory, established a relationship with Tong, and achieved success in both her career and love life.
契约到期后，偏执男主心慌慌 | "After the Contract Expires, the Obsessive Male Lead Feels Panicked"

Wang Zhi Yu, Nie Wen HuaFor three years, Jiang Rao was Fu Jichuan's secret lover, always a substitute for Qiao Yushi. Learning that her best friend Qiao Yushi was about to return to China, she finally resolved to sever this illicit relationship, no longer wanting to be someone else's shadow. Without saying goodbye, Jiang Rao packed her bags and left quietly, wanting only to return to her own life. But while she left decisively, Fu Jichuan pursued her relentlessly—this man who used to summon her at will had abandoned his former indifference, embarking on a dramatic and unwavering pursuit of her with an unyielding determination and persistent urgency.
小叔，你的高冷人设崩了 | "Little Uncle, Your Aloof Persona Has Collapsed"

Gu Yu Yang, Liu Yi TongQu Xinning unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel, becoming the kind-hearted heroine who suffers both physical and emotional torment. She's also unexpectedly bound to a system that forbids her from acting out of character in front of the original male lead (Shen Mingze), forcing her to become the contract wife of the scumbag Shen Mingze. Qu Xinning unexpectedly gets into a series of conflicts with her uncle (Shen Huaijin), unaware that Shen Huaijin can hear her inner thoughts. While Qu Xinning appears devoted and weak in front of Shen Mingze, her inner thoughts are completely different. Shen Huaijin becomes curious and fond of this contrasting side of Qu Xinning, and the two eventually marry.
渐入佳婚 | "Gradually Entering a Perfect Marriage"

Xia Ning Jun, Yu Yu TongShe was the true daughter of the Yan family and the adopted daughter of the Wen family, an awkward position that made her incompatible with both families. A marriage contract brought her to Shang Chen, a business tycoon. Her biological parents favored her adopted daughter, her adoptive mother repeatedly made things difficult for her, and even her younger brother considered her an enemy. Until that man stood by her side, declaring to everyone, "She is my wife, and no one will be allowed to suffer injustice."
姝色难逃 | "The Beauty That Cannot Escape"

Zhang Ceng Ceng, Hu Jia Ni18-year-old Li Shu loses her family in a fire and is burdened with huge debts. On her birthday, she forms a bond with Nanling, a notorious debt collector, and the two develop feelings for each other while collecting debts!
百日烟火，烬余书 | "A Hundred Days of Fireworks, The Remaining Book"

Yu Jian, Chu Qian YueLin Wanyue and Gu Chen had a ten-year-long relationship, and she thought they would be happy forever. However, in the fifth year of their marriage, Gu Chen began to cheat on her. Every time Gu Chen hurt Lin Wanyue, she would burn a love letter he had written to her. After a hundred love letters burned, she left heartbroken, and only then did Gu Chen realize his mistake. By this time, Lin Wanyue had already married her sworn brother, and Shen Xiaoye took her abroad, helping her to pick up her paintbrush again and become an internationally renowned painter. Gu Chen was filled with remorse and died of cancer. Lin Wanyue and Shen Xiaoye spent the rest of their lives together, and after the fireworks faded, they finally found happiness.
婚礼叫错名字后我失忆了 | "I Lost My Memory After Calling the Wrong Name at the Wedding"

Bai Yu, Zhou Rui RanAfter the wedding accident, Li Su suffers from amnesia, forgetting her five-year persistent pursuit of Shao Sizhuo and his forced marriage. Her brother, witnessing this, weeps, lamenting that amnesia is both a blessing and a curse. The amnesiac Li Su faces preferential treatment from Shao Sizhuo, questioning her past love for him. Shao Sizhuo, however, mistakenly believes she is faking amnesia and continues to humiliate her. With three days left, Li Su leaves behind a farewell letter and divorce papers, quietly departing.
心动秘书请签收 | "Please Sign for My Heart-Fluttering Secretary"

Mo Shu Ming, Ai Jiang ShanIn the drama, the male lead, as the company president, is too busy with work to handle his personal life, so the company assigns him a special secretary—the female lead. The female lead is not only exceptionally capable at work, managing the male lead's tasks meticulously, but also gradually wins his heart with her gentle and considerate personality. Through their daily interactions, their initial superior-subordinate relationship slowly evolves into a subtle emotional connection. During this time, they encounter various workplace challenges and emotional misunderstandings, but they overcome them all through mutual support, ultimately finding sweet love.
[PREV⬅️]17 November Releases:1. 姐姐，我装的

Wang Xuan, Cui Shi Yi[HERE]2. 大叔，我只想便宜你 - Yu Long, Yang Mie Mie (Yang Yi Lu)[HERE]3. 偏偏心动 - Zhong Zheng, Dong Yu Xuan[HERE]4. 嫌我胖丑，八零年我靠空间养全家 - Nie Bo Xuan, Chen Ci[HERE]5. 契约到期后，偏执男主心慌慌 - Wang Zhi Yu, Nie Wen Hua[HERE]6. 小叔，你的高冷人设崩了 - Gu Yu Yang, Liu Yi Tong[HERE]7. 渐入佳婚 - Xia Ning Jun, Yu Yu Tong[HERE]8. 姝色难逃 - Zhang Ceng Ceng, Hu Jia Ni[HERE]9. 百日烟火，烬余书 - Yu Jian, Chu Qian Yue[HERE]10. 婚礼叫错名字后我失忆了 - Bai Yu, Zhou Rui Ran[HERE]11. 心动秘书请签收 - Mo Shu Ming, Ai Jiang Shan[HERE]
步步笙欢 | "Dangerous Love"

Gao Ming Chen, Han Le Yao [24 Episodes]To avenge his father, Xu Bei Sheng goes undercover as the warlord’s adopted son, plotting to sabotage an arranged marriage between the Xu and Zhou families by getting close to Zhou Meng Huan. But as genuine feelings grow, their relationship spirals into a destructive cycle of love and revenge, culminating in a tragic downfall amidst the turmoil of war and power struggles.(Aired: Aug 25, 2025 - Sep 2, 2025)
她的池中之物 | "Her Pond of Destiny"

Wang Yi Ran, Jia Yi XuanAfter her brother Zhong Xiao was killed, Zhong Wangsheng met Lin Yubai, a gallery owner who looked exactly like her deceased brother. She did everything she could to pull him into her world, unaware that Lin Yubai was actually an undercover agent. The two went through a dangerous game of revenge, redemption, and true love amidst love, hate, and conflicting identities.
在港难逃 | "No Escape in Hong Kong"

Cao Tian Kai, Fang Si ChangTo save her father, she impersonated the blind heir of the Jiang family for three years, only to flee to Hong Kong with the money after her true love appeared. Three years later, she was stranded in Hong Kong because her daughter needed medication for leukemia. While job hunting, she unexpectedly encountered him, now a recovered CEO. For the exorbitant penalty for breach of contract, she reluctantly staged another scam. But he, now recovered from his eye disease, was no longer the easily fooled, sickly young master he once was. This reunion in Hong Kong—is it a chaotic scene where the scam is exposed, or a redemptive encounter where old feelings are rekindled?
被弃孤儿院，真千金带马甲强势归来 | "Abandoned in an Orphanage, the Real Heiress Makes a Powerful Comeback with a Disguise"

Zhang Yun Tao, Yao Yu ChenLi Xi, who grew up in an orphanage, is suddenly found by her divorced parents after more than ten years of separation. In order to investigate the truth about her abduction, she goes undercover and follows her mother into the wealthy Fu family. As her disguise is revealed, the Fu family members who initially looked down on her gradually become her loyal followers. At the same time, she and Pei Yun, one of the top nobles in Jiangcheng, finally get married.
救命！我画的纸片人对我失控了 | "Help! My Paper Doll Has Lost Control Over Me"

Li Meng Ran, Cheng ZiXia Zhisheng never imagined that the male protagonist in her comic would actually tear through the comic's dimension and come to her side. Yan Tingli chased after her from the comic to the real world, wanting to ask Xia Zhisheng why she had trapped herself in a cycle of sorrow from which she couldn't escape, only to find that she had forgotten him! He vowed to take revenge! But when he saw her being taken advantage of by another man, he couldn't help but shower her with endless affection and help, even willing to be a submissive for love, determined to win her over and showering her with affection every day! Zhizhi, my world only has you, and you can only belong to me.
以身为陷 | "Trapped by One's Own Body"

Cheng Cheng, Zhang Chu XuanAfter discovering her husband Ying Chi's infidelity with her best friend Liu Enya, Xin Yan decides, "If you sleep with my best friend, I'll sleep with your son." She teams up with Lu Zhisui, who is disguised as Ying Chi's illegitimate son, to seek revenge, staging a conspiracy between a "stepmother" and an illegitimate child!
督军不好了，夫人投敌啦 | "The Warlord is in Trouble, His Wife Has Defected to the Enemy"

Wang Bing Xiang, Xiao LiTwin sister Shen Mingyue sacrifices her love to marry in place of her brother, only to meet a tragic end in the warlord's mansion. Her younger sister, Shen Qingyue, to uncover the truth and avenge her sister, dons a mask of "resurrection" and enters this cannibalistic prison, vowing revenge against the rumored ruthless and bloodthirsty warlord Xiao Heting. Through cautious probing, she discovers that Xiao Heting is not as cruel as rumored, and that there is another culprit behind her sister's death! The person she once considered her enemy turns out to be her only ally. When truth and love intertwine, they must ultimately join forces.
此生为你 | "This Life Is For You"

Lu Huan Yu, Hu Dong QingIn full view of everyone, at her wedding to the wealthy Chu Hongyi, bride Song Xi publicly refused to marry him, claiming that she loved someone else—Qin Si, the heir to the well-known Qin family, a prominent clan in the city. The Chu family instantly lost face, causing a city-wide sensation. Unwittingly caught in the crossfire, Qin Si sent his driver to intercept Song Xi. After a long talk, Song Xi, with her silver tongue, successfully persuaded Qin Si to cooperate with her, posing as his girlfriend to deal with the Chu family. However, Song Xi was unaware that Qin Si agreed to this plan because he himself was facing forced marriage by his stepmother, Du Yanhong, and her niece, Shi Danqing; Song Xi was also unaware that she had become Shi Danqing's target for revenge.
假千金的我总想跑路 | "The Fake Heiress Always Wants to Run Away"

Li Ze Yu, Cui Xiao XuanA transmigration master transmigrates into the body of a mistreated fake heiress; being kicked out means receiving 10 billion. Favoritism from her family, a scheming sister—being kicked out is a piece of cake! She descends into the world as a demon, causing chaos and destruction, tearing apart the scheming sister, and kicking her biased brother! She even proposes to her misogynistic older brother. Strangely, she hasn't been kicked out yet; instead, her family discovers her sister's true colors, kicks out the scheming sister, and she herself becomes the family's darling…
预知悖论 | "The Paradox of Foresight"

Lei Yi Hao, Li Yuan JingWen Shixi possesses the ability to foresee emergencies three days in advance. Leveraging this skill, she quickly rises through the ranks in the customer service department of the Emerald Hotel, but is hampered by the rule that events cannot be changed and that anyone's intervention results in amnesia. An unexpected encounter leads her to reunite with Jiang Huoyu, the hotel's president, who turns out to be the depressed teenager she rescued ten years ago. In the workplace, Wen Shixi repeatedly uses her precognition to defuse crises. During this time, she and Jiang Huoyu go from initial hesitation to mutual trust. Caught in the fateful shackles of the "precognition paradox," they find redemption in each other, confirming their feelings amidst crises and reversals, ultimately overcoming obstacles and achieving a fulfilling love.
入戏太深 | "Too Immersed in the Role"

Chen Kai Zhou, Li Miao MiaoJian You and Jiang Yunyi are secretly married. Jiang Yunyi is a renowned medical school professor, but rumors suggest their relationship is flawed. However, Jian You doesn't mind. Because he's merely her "inspiration" for her writing! One day, Jiang Yunyi unexpectedly discovers he can hear Jian You's thoughts, which contradict her outward appearance—they're all sorts of indescribable things. Later, the aloof beauty willingly descends from her pedestal.
休夫后，摄政王他连夜入赘 | "After Divorcing His Husband, the Regent Prince Moved In Overnight"

Wang Xing Kai, Teng Ze WenShen Zhiyi was forced into an arranged marriage by her husband, Song Yuxiu, resulting in the loss of her family and the destruction of her home. After being reborn, she meticulously plots her revenge, exposes the Song family's conspiracy, reclaims her dowry, and vows to pay the price for her sins. She joins forces with Regent Zhou Xuance to outwit the incompetent emperor, helping him ascend the throne. Ultimately, she becomes a wise and virtuous empress, enjoying a prosperous and peaceful reign alongside Zhou Xuance.
沈总，夫人又在闯祸了 | "President Shen, the Madam is in Trouble Again"- Xiong Yun Hao, Liu Yu XinJiang Ling is a strong and resilient woman by day, wielding a knife to butcher fish at the seafood market

by night, she transforms into a Sanda (Chinese kickboxing) champion, sweating it out at the gym. When she meets Shen Yu, a domineering CEO who has unexpectedly been reborn and desperately needs a "shield wife," a contract tightly binds their two vastly different worlds together. When a Sanda champion meets a reborn CEO, when everyday life collides with the entanglements of a wealthy family, a heartwarming and hilarious urban light comedy unfolds. Watch as this unlikely pair finds true love amidst the chaos and drama.
晴夏未央 | "Summer's End"

Chen Zi Long, Peng DanWen Zhixia, a renowned physician from the Xia Dynasty, unexpectedly transmigrates, possessing the body of a modern-day heiress with the same name who is framed by her stepsister Wen Yueli and betrayed by her fiancé Shang Huaizhi. On the night of her transmigration, she mistakenly drags her fiancé's uncle—Shang Siye, the head of the Shang Group (who suffers from a leg ailment but is actually the reincarnation of the Xia Dynasty's Martial Emperor)—into a hotel and has a sexual encounter with him. To reclaim her inheritance of the Baiyun Group left by her mother, Wen Zhixia enters into a contractual marriage with Shang Siye, embarking on a journey as his "aunt" to punish the villains, build her business, and unlock the secrets of their past and present lives. Ultimately, the two unravel all the mysteries and spend the rest of their lives together.
灵泉空间在手，资本小姐崛起进阶录 "With a Spiritual Spring Space in Hand, the Rise and Advancement of a Capitalist Miss"

Yao Lei, Peng Dai DaiReborn on the operating table, Ms. Shen Shuling, a woman from a wealthy family, carries the memories of her past life and a spiritual spring space, vowing to protect her child and avenge her uncle's family. After reuniting with her husband, Gu Mojin, she uses the spiritual spring space and the medical skills from the "Compendium of All Things" to repeatedly save the wounded and resolve crises, unexpectedly becoming pregnant with twins. She and Gu Mojin settle down, raise their twins, and begin a happy life together.
穿到八零新婚夜，我带空间嫁穷汉 | "Transmigrating to the 80s on My Wedding Night, I Married a Poor Man with a Space"

Zou Sheng Wen, Xu Si QiJiang Mi, the chairwoman of the international catering giant Jiang's Group, was unexpectedly struck by a headlight after winning the Chef God title for ten consecutive years. She transmigrated into an 1980s novel, becoming the cannon fodder ex-wife of the male protagonist, Xiao Li. Facing a poor family background and the original owner's terrible character, she used her innate spiritual spring space and superb culinary skills to sell vegetables at a stall, secure orders from hotels and schools, and even persuade Xiao Li to grow vegetables in greenhouses together. During this time, she thwarted the repeated difficulties and schemes of Zhao Dongmei, Jiang Tian, ​​Lin Xiaohui, and others, winning Xiao Li's trust and love, and ensuring her younger siblings could attend school. Ultimately, the two joined hands to expand their greenhouse business, became wealthy, and happily ever after.
王妃手术刀在手，摄政王瑟瑟发抖 | "The Princess Has a Scalpel in Hand, the Regent Trembles in Fear"

Wen Yuan, Xu ZhenA female medical doctor's soul transmigrates into the body of Qiao Suier, who has fallen off a cliff. At the bottom of the cliff, she unlocks a medical space and saves the war god regent, Dugu Xuanche, who is afflicted with a Gu poison. She uses her superb medical skills to perform surgery to remove the poison from him, earning money and fame in the process. She also gains the support of this powerful patron, allowing her to punish her scumbag fiancé. The two return to the capital together, exposing the corrupt officials in the court and consolidating their power. After the storm has passed, Qiao Suier, holding a prescription, stops the prince in the street and says bluntly, "Your Highness's old ailment requires lifelong treatment—why not marry me as your concubine, and I'll guarantee you lifelong health? What do you say?"
雀占凤巢 | "The Sparrow Takes Over the Phoenix's Nest"

Li Ye Chen, Bai Xue RuQin Zhi was originally the beloved of Pei Jiyan, the heir to the Pei family. When Pei Jiyan was injured in a car accident, she should have stayed to care for him, but was forced abroad by her half-sister. Five years later, Qin Zhi became a sought-after ballet dancer. Hearing that Pei Jiyan had recovered and was about to get engaged to her sister, she immediately returned to the country, determined to seduce her future brother-in-law and ruin their marriage. But Qin Zhi didn't know that her revenge plan played right into Pei Jiyan's hands. Everything he did was to lure her back to him. He understood her; he knew she was selfish and mercenary; but whether she was good or bad didn't matter to him. He only loved her as a person, regardless of any admirable qualities.
齐少的重生剧本：校花与逆袭 | "Qi Shao's Rebirth Script: School Beauty and Counterattack"

Zhong Zheng, Zhu Xin YuQi Feng is unexpectedly reborn during the bustling start of the new semester at Nanshan University, carrying the regrets of his previous life and vowing to make amends. He carefully protects Su Nanzhi, who suffers from stomach problems, helping her find medical treatment and overcome her pain; he rushes to Xia Ruochu's aid when she is in grave danger, helping her avoid fatal injuries; he confronts the ambitious and ruthless Qi Jian and his son, who are plotting to seize the Qi family's assets, using his past life's experience and wisdom to fight them step by step. In the end, he successfully thwarts their conspiracy, stabilizes the crumbling Qi family business, firmly protects the people he cherishes most in this life, and completely rewrites his destiny.
叶少的掌心娇宠220斤 | "Young Master Ye's Pampered Darling 220 Pounds"

Min Jie, Tan Jiu LuoYun Ci took medication to save her family, causing her to gain weight. She was then murdered by her lover, Duan Jingmo, and Zhou Mengyao, who then devoured her entire fortune. After being reborn, she focused on her career and successfully lost weight. She mistakenly identified Ye Yanchen, a wealthy young man from Beijing's elite circles who had secretly loved her for years, as a male model. Ye Yanchen, seizing the opportunity, pretended to be a model and stayed by her side. Together, they resolved all threats and ultimately achieved success in both their careers and love lives.
岁岁怀安 | "May You Be Happy Every Year"

Wang Hao Zhen, Zhai Yi YingSong Huaichuan is tricked into forming a contract with Xu Sui'an, who suffers from a terminal illness. He initially intends to use marriage as a cover to stabilize his company and uncover the truth behind his mother's death; Xu Sui'an, on the other hand, can use her family's bloodline to cure her terminal illness. Both get what they want, but in the process of investigating the truth, Song Huaichuan discovers that Xu Sui'an seems to have a complex relationship with his mother, and that she is not a simple human girl, shrouded in mystery. From allies who use each other to lovers who depend on each other, they find the love of their lives in the process of searching for the truth, and together they spend the rest of their lives.
向周舟 | "To Zhou Zhou"

Charon, Zhang ShanZhou Zhou returned to China due to a family crisis. While her parents were pressuring her to get married, she received a WeChat friend request from Cheng Yanran, her high school friend whom she hadn't seen for twelve years. After reconnecting, Cheng Yanran gently but firmly entered Zhou Zhou's life, gradually closing the distance between them. Their years-long unrequited love blossomed into a sweet romance, and they eventually fell in love and stayed together.
撩完反派后我跑不掉了 | "After Flirting with the Villain, I Can't Escape"

Xu Jia Liang, Li Zi RongAfter a car accident, Jiang Xinyue transmigrates into the body of Jiang Ruoqing, a supporting female character in a novel, and is bound to a system. Jiang Ruoqing and Yu Ci accidentally collide, allowing Yu Ci to hear Jiang Ruoqing's thoughts. Jiang Ruoqing's carefree, outspoken, and "lustful and greedy" personality attracts Yu Ci. After being forcibly kissed by Jiang Ruoqing, Yu Ci falls completely in love with her, becoming a devoted husband and an all-around supporter for Jiang Ruoqing on her mission journey. As the mission progresses, Jiang Ruoqing and Yu Ci, after experiencing a series of hardships and setbacks, finally live happily ever after.
总裁的白月光女帝 | "The President's White Moonlight Empress"

Gao Ming, Zhai Cheng LuEmpress Shen Li of the Great Zhou Dynasty transmigrated to the modern world and became a bullied, crybaby young mistress in a wealthy family. Facing a difficult mother-in-law, a scheming half-brother, and a devoted female supporting character, she fiercely confronts them, using force to suppress them, determined to carve out a bloody path in this unfamiliar era. Her nominal husband, Mo Yunzhuo, appears to be a disabled and aloof CEO, but in reality, he has secretly loved her for ten years and even crippled his legs for her sake, a deeply devoted protector. He indulges her every whim and readily agrees to her proposed "transactional marriage."
颂欢喜 | "Praising Joy"

Chai Xu Ge, Feng Yi RanSong Xi, a nobody in the workplace whose life was supposed to end within two months due to a "curse," was unexpectedly possessed by a volatile fairy with maximum W power. From then on, her life was completely transformed! She ruthlessly dealt with scheming colleagues, dumped her ex-boyfriend, and was determined to get revenge on the spot! A handsome and domineering CEO was also deeply in love with her, and even became her personal "power bank"? As the truth behind the curse was gradually revealed, the masterminds behind it all turned out to be... them?! Song Xi and her fairy sisters confronted her directly, declaring, "You want me dead? Then none of you will live!"
一吻唤醒霍总他超傲娇 | "A Kiss Awakens President Huo's Super Arrogant Nature"

Chen Zhi Hui, Liao Mo XiXia Jinjin transmigrates into a novel about a wealthy, seemingly pampered heiress, forced to marry Huo Shijing, a domineering CEO who has been in a coma for six months. To maintain her life as a wealthy socialite, she uses her hazy memories of the original story to save Huo Shijing's life, earning her the title of "lucky star" from Mrs. Huo and a black card as a gift. While enjoying her life, she also navigates the machinations of the villainous Si Lan and others who plot against her. However, although Huo Shijing is in a coma, he is still aware of his surroundings. At a banquet, Xia Jinjin...
得偿 | "Rewards"

Yu Pei Shan, Gu Jia HanSong Wanqiao had been deeply in love with Lu Tingyou for five years, only to witness him propose to a wealthy heiress. Heartbroken, she left and married Shen Zelin, who had silently protected her. Lu Tingyou regretted his entanglement, but it was too late. Song Wanqiao healed her wounds in Shen Zelin's love and rediscovered her dreams. In the end, Lu Tingyou lost everything, while she and Shen Zelin remained together for life.
恶魔之吻 | "The Devil's Kiss"

Wu Ji Feng, Wang Yi YangOn her twentieth birthday, the day she inherited her parents' estate, Jiang Zhuo was brutally murdered by her uncle, Jiang Zhenye. However, she was resurrected after signing a blood pact with the mysterious "Ferryman," Ye Xuan. Reborn, she publicly shattered her uncle Jiang Zhenye's hypocritical mask at her own funeral. Ye Xuan was moved by her stubbornness and deep affection. From initial hesitation to blossoming feelings, the two faced perilous situations and outwitted powerful enemies, not only successfully avenging Jiang Zhuo but also discovering the price and destiny that lay behind their identity as ferrymen.
什么!攻略对象出错了 | What! The Target Was Wrong?"

Guo Rong Sheng, Yao HuiAfter Su Beizhi, the only daughter of the Su family, dies in an accident, she is bound to a cute little dog system. To survive, she diligently tries to win over Lu Wen for three whole years. But just when she's endured countless scornful looks and been labeled a "simp," the system tells her she's completely wrong! Her real target is the disabled and beautiful Fu Lu, considered a villain. Three years of effort go to waste—she has to start all over again. Will she succeed? And what about her new target, the villain Fu Lu...?*The scumbag roles expert finally got his leading role lol
特工医妃不好惹，病娇王爷到处追 | "The Special Agent Doctor is Not to be Messed With, the Sickly Prince Chases Her Everywhere"

Zou Ke Jun, Yan Wen LiShen Xingluo, the legitimate daughter of the Shen family, attempted to elope but was captured by her stepmother and younger sister. The transmigrated Shen Xingluo, a special forces medic with exceptional medical and poison skills, received the original owner's memories and learned that she had been sacrificed by her father to bring good fortune to the ailing Prince Su, He Yunting. She decided to bring her golden bracelet and omnipotent spatial ability to Prince Su's residence before making further plans. After the wedding ceremony, the two reached a deal: she would heal his illness, and he would guarantee her safety.
禁止心动指令 | "Forbidden Heartbeat Command"

Wang Si Qi, Guo XiangTo win a hefty prize, the female protagonist, Lu Zhizhi, participates in a dating game test. Her mission is to win over the male protagonist, Si Huan. She treats the task, which is supposed to be cruel, with kindness, causing Si Huan to awaken his consciousness, and the two fall in love. With the intervention of the game company, Si Huan breaks through the dimensional barrier and finds Lu Zhizhi in the real world, and the two finally become a couple.

偷恋暗火 | "Secret Love"

Shao Zhi Peng, Qu Xiao XiaoXia Zhi Yao has been secretly in love with her best friend's uncle for many years. She created comics with Shen Yan Ci as the protagonist and became a well-known girl cartoonist Tangxin. When Xia Zhi Yao's comics lost inspiration and stopped updating, Shen Yan Ci returned again, and the two reunited, and their relationship deepened in private.(Aired: Nov 30, 2024)
漫画里的秘密 | "Secrets in Comics "

Li Jia Chen, Li Ya YaXia Zhi Yao has been secretly in love with Shen Yan Ci for four years. She drew a comic book called "Secret Love" based on Shen Yan Ci, and fantasized about being with Shen Yan Ci like in the comic. After Shen Yan Ci came back, she tried every means to get close to him, became his life assistant, and lived in his house. The relationship between the two progressed rapidly.(Aired: Feb 21, 2025)
穿成女配，霸道帝王带我飞 | "Transmigrated as a Supporting Female Character, the Domineering Emperor Takes Me Flying"

Wang Xuan, Liu Lan GeJiang Wan transmigrated into a cannon fodder character in a book, destined to live only three months. Completely resigned and insane, she retaliated tenfold against any bullying in the harem, seeking only a happy life. However, she discovered that the tyrannical ruler Ye Lingyuan, who hated her, was bound to a redemption system and needed to pamper her for rewards. Therefore, he showered her with affection, turning her from utter hatred one moment to relishing it the next, driven by the system's rewards. From being forced by the system to losing her true feelings...
今朝凤栖梧 | "Today, the Phoenix Perches on the Wutong Tree"

Liu Ning, Han Lu JinIn their past lives, Xie Linyuan, the God of War of the Great Wei Dynasty, and Xiao Yu, the Third Prince, both sought to marry the daughter of Prime Minister Shen. Shen Wanqing, Prime Minister Shen's legitimate daughter, forced her half-sister, Shen Xiyue, to marry the dissolute Xiao Yu, while she herself married the promising Xie Linyuan. Shortly after their marriages, Shen Xiyue helped Xiao Yu become Crown Prince, and she herself became Crown Princess. Xie Linyuan died in battle, and Shen Wanqing's attempt to seduce Xiao Yu was discovered by Shen Xiyue. The two sisters died together, only to be reborn. In this life, Shen Wanqing forced Shen Xiyue into a marriage swap, using every means to marry Xiao Yu. Unexpectedly, Shen Xiyue defied fate, not only saving Xie Linyuan but also falling in love with him.
掌心窥爱 | "Peeping at Love in the Palm of My Hand"

Liu Xiao Xu, Lan LanTo repay a life-saving debt, Zhuang Qianxi entered into a three-year engagement with Huo Zhian, silently upholding this marriage in name only. It wasn't until Huo Zhian's childhood sweetheart, Zuo Xiaoluo, returned to the country that Zhuang Qianxi's heart truly turned cold. To avoid alarming their families, they maintained a facade of a relationship. During this time, Qianxi encountered Huo Zhian's eldest cousin—Huo Yucheng, the chairman of the Huo Group. She gradually realized that this self-disciplined and gentle man might be the one who truly saved her. Will this broken engagement find a new home?
心动的神 | "The God Who Makes My Heart Flutter"

Qian Zhe, Wang Yi YangIn her previous life, Mingyue, the matriarch of the Ming family, sacrificed herself for love, supporting her husband's entrepreneurial endeavors and successfully leading him to the pinnacle of fame. After both she and her husband were reborn, her scumbag husband abandoned her for his stepsister. Mingyue decisively chose Ji Laizhi, who disguised himself as a beggar, as her husband. After spending time with Ji Laizhi, his abilities were fully unleashed; he became omnipotent, excelling in both medicine and martial arts. Most importantly, he could do laundry, cook, and warm the bed. At home, he was a devoted and loving husband, and in public, he effortlessly humiliated the scumbag husband and mistress! As his mysterious identity was revealed, the couple lived a shameless and sweet life.*I was racing with Youtube algorithm to save the subtitle for this because it got taken down so fast every time a channel uploaded it lol

表姑娘进京了 | "The Cousin Has Arrived in the Capital"- Chen Zheng Yang, Wang Zi JiaOrphaned at a young age, Xu Shuyao traveled to the capital with her younger brother to seek refuge with relatives, only to be turned away by her aunt and further humiliated by bandits. Fortunately, she was rescued by Xiao Mo, the heir of the Duke's mansion, and became his secret mistress. She endured this hardship while secretly engaging in business to save money, hoping to escape. Fate intervened

she turned out to be the long-lost eldest daughter of the Shen family. After being recognized and returned to the family, she refused to be a concubine again, unwilling to repeat her past mistakes. Xiao Mo broke off his engagement, defied his father, and fought a bloody battle on a cliff for her, ultimately risking his life to win her back. On their wedding day, adorned in phoenix coronet and wedding gown, she, as Shen Jing'an, bowed to heaven and earth with him, vowing to stay together until their hair turned white.
第72页的偷恋 | "The Secret Love on Page 72"

Chen Zheng Yang, Gong Fang NiXia Zhiyao, a cartoonist who secretly admires Uncle Fozi, depicts him as the abstinent male protagonist of a bestselling comic. When the real Uncle Fozi returns to China, she guiltily hides her secret while relentlessly testing him. Little does she know, Shen Yanci, who holds the "evidence" of her actions, has already seen through everything and pulls her close, gradually transforming her from "Uncle Shen" to "Mr. Shen." This unrequited love, which she began, ultimately ends with his doting affection.*I posted the previous 2 versions earlier
今日宜嫁娶 | "Today is an Auspicious Day for Marriage"

Cao Jing Hao, Mu Si YuSong Xi is betrayed by a scumbag boyfriend. After getting drunk, she accidentally marries a handsome, wealthy CEO. She initially thinks it's just an accident, but it turns out he's actually the intimidating older brother her best friend described as a villain. He's also secretly in love with her for years and has been plotting against her. Ultimately, Song Xi falls for him and finds happiness with her best friend's older brother. The unrequited love she harbored deep inside has quietly grown into a towering tree, bearing the fruit of happiness.
缚深情 | "Bound by Deep Affection"

Zhan Zhuo, Fan Chu QiQiao Xi and Huo Yanshen have been in love for two years and are about to get engaged, but she unexpectedly discovers that he approached her to take revenge on her sister, Qiao Wei, and even secretly filmed explicit videos to ruin her at the engagement banquet. She also learns that he is actually married. Qiao Xi suppresses her hatred and pretends to be friendly with Huo Yanshen, but when she tries to retrieve the videos, she discovers she is pregnant. She deletes the videos, takes the pregnancy test results, and resolutely leaves. When they meet again, Qiao Xi has awakened and transformed, no longer controlled by Huo Yanshen. Huo Yanshen, however, is consumed by uncontrollable longing and pursues his wife relentlessly. It turns out that he mistook Qiao Xi for Qiao Wei during a race years ago, and in reality, he deeply loves Qiao Xi.
闺蜜双穿变妯娌 | "Best Friends Transmigrate and Become Sisters-in-Law"

Yu Cen, Wen Qi, Zhang Hong Qian, Li Jia HuiLin Nanqiao and Xia Linshi, after getting drunk, accidentally transmigrated into the novel "Young Master Ji's Pampered Darling," becoming the villainous supporting characters destined for a tragic death. To reverse their fate, the two formed an alliance to protect themselves. While dealing with the Ji family in-laws and navigating the complex relationships between their husbands Ji Chi and Ji Yu, they also confronted the schemes of the original author, Xu Zhiyi, who had transmigrated into the female lead, and her accomplices. During this process, the two couples gradually developed genuine feelings for each other, and the four joined hands to overcome the crises. Finally, after experiencing life-or-death trials, they returned to their wedding day, becoming a couple and beginning a happy life together.
闪婚后齐先生的爱意藏不住 | "After a Flash Marriage, Mr. Qi's Love Cannot Be Hidden"

Li Xue Yang, Jing WenSurgeon Xie Chuying, facing heartbreak and betrayal from family, unexpectedly marries Qi Jie, her lover of eight years, during a low point in her life. This marriage, which begins by chance, is fraught with misunderstandings—Qi Jie's assertive protection is misinterpreted, Xie Chuying's deep affection is difficult to express, and the machinations and schemes of others constantly disrupt the process. Faced with the schemes of a fake heiress, the entanglement of an ex, and even deadly danger, the two gradually overcome their barriers, working together to expose the lies and uncover the truth behind what they missed eight years ago. From their initial agreement to a life-or-death commitment, they confirm their feelings for each other amidst the trials, allowing their eight-year-long unrequited love to blossom.
江南何处又相逄 | "Where in Jiangnan Will We Meet Again?"

Yu Hao Yang, Zhou Yu LingTo fulfill her publishing house's requirements, Xu Zhinan is forced to invite the mysterious writer "Jiang Nan" to an event. Little does she know that Jiang Nan is actually her ex-boyfriend, Jiang Jinyue, whom she had broken up with six years ago to save her mother. After their reunion, he transforms into a cold and aloof writer, relentlessly pursuing her with a complex mix of love and hate. Amidst workplace struggles and family shadows, the truth and helplessness of six years ago gradually surface. He finally understands her predicament, shifting from revenge to protection, standing by her side through all difficulties. The two proud individuals resolve their misunderstandings, heal their wounds, reunite, and ultimately become a couple.
穿书后我靠干饭驯服甜翻暴君 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Tamed the Sweet Tyrant with Rice"

Li Ze Yu, Zhong Yu JinEmpress Shen Qingshuang, the deposed queen of a fallen kingdom, is forced into a "torture novel system," required to be forcibly taken by a tyrant according to the original plot, and ultimately die a tragic death by jumping off the city wall before she can return home. On the surface, she remains defiant, but inwardly she's furiously complaining, only to find that the tyrant, Jun Yin, can hear her thoughts. So the more she curses, the more he spoils her; the more reckless she acts, the more he protects her. Shen Qingshuang, solely seeking to accumulate suffering, ends up being crowned empress by the tyrant. Finally, the system completely breaks down, and Shen Qingshuang remains by the tyrant's side, resulting in a sweet and perfect ending.
一覺穿到八年後，老公寵我無下限 | "I Woke Up Eight Years Later and My Husband Spoils Me Rotten"

Cheng Zhi, Zhang Xiao YanEighteen-year-old Ruan Tang wakes up to find herself transmigrated eight years in the future, now a mother, and the father is none other than her former nemesis, Leng Jing! Even more outrageous, the original owner of this body had been cheating on Leng Jing with another man, and Leng Jing had actually chosen to tolerate it. "Death is acceptable, but not humiliation!" Ruan Tang swiftly changes her image, tears apart the scumbag, and wholeheartedly dotes on her son. Leng Jing always silently supports her, accepting her completely regardless of her appearance, never abandoning her. Ruan Tang understands Leng Jing's feelings through their interactions.
棋落无人诉情长 | "The Game of Chess Ends, and No One Can Tell Their Deepest Feelings"

Xiang Yu Hang, Yang Qian ChanYoung lawyer Lin Yuanzhe, after three years of hiding to investigate the truth behind his father's car accident, unexpectedly survives, only to discover that his younger brother, Lin Hu, has been colluding with his ex-girlfriend, Su Na, and has even betrayed his family to climb the social ladder and marry into a wealthy family. To uncover the conspiracy, Lin Yuanzhe deliberately gets close to Su Na's mother, Wang Hui, the president of the Su Group. In the dual game of business and romance, he uses his wisdom to navigate step by step, resolving the Su Group's business crisis, and even developing a deep love with Wang Hui after initially testing each other. The battle between family feuds and business interests erupts, ultimately revealing the truth.

不装了，我大小姐 & 和我前夫结婚吧 | "No More Pretense, My Young Lady & Let's Marry My Ex-Husband"

Liang Si Wei, Cheng ZiDeeply in love with Qin Shaoming since her teenage years, she willingly bequeathed her enormous mother's inheritance to him, enabling him to establish the vast Qin Group and lead the Qin family to become one of the top wealthy families in Yuncheng. During a chance medical trip, she returned home to find Qin Shaoming and her stepsister, Song Siyue, in bed together, with Qin's mother present and tacitly approving their affair. When Qin Shaoming murdered her, Sheng Yelan secretly vowed that if she had an afterlife, she would exact revenge and ensure they would never find peace.(Aired: Apr 30, 2024)
八零换嫁后, 我爆红家属院 | "After the 1980s Marriage Exchange, I Became an Internet Sensation in the Family Compound"

Chen Pin Yan, Ma Qian QianSet in the 1980s, the story recounts the protagonist's experiences following a remarriage. Her post-remarriage sparks a series of stories within the family compound. With her wisdom, courage, and unique charm, she gradually rises to prominence within this unique environment, garnering unexpected attention and becoming a household name. The drama vividly depicts the lifestyle, interpersonal relationships, and social atmosphere of the 1980s. Through the protagonist's experiences, the audience can experience the unique charm of that era, appreciate the growth and transformation of a humble figure amidst the tide of the times, and witness how the protagonist writes her own remarkable chapter after remarriage, leading to a different life.(Aired: Aug 24, 2025)
甜狗老公是个粘人精 | "My Sweet Dog Husband is a Clingy Darling"

Min Jie, Li Ya YaTwo years into her marriage to Ji Wangchen, Lu Shili had a dream: tomorrow, her husband would meet his true love. They spent the night together, and with the taste of pleasure, Ji Wangchen showered the other woman with attention. At an auction, he bought over a hundred million worth of jewelry, haute couture, and designer bags that once belonged to Lu Shili, all for his mistress. In the dream, to save her crumbling marriage, Lu Shili ruthlessly fought the mistress, ultimately being rejected by her husband and dying tragically in a mental hospital. Upon waking, she slapped her husband three times.
跟闺蜜跑路后，傅总他破防了 | "After Running Away with His Best Friend, President Fu Broke Down"

Yang Peng Cheng, Li Li ZaiSu Ran and Lu Xi transmigrated into cannon fodder female supporting characters in a angst-filled romance novel. They high-fived and vowed to seduce the male lead and make money, declaring that the day their "white moonlight" (male lead's love interest) returned home would be the day they ran away! Just as they successfully won over the male lead and things were looking up, the original female lead returned home early. So, the two of them quickly absconded with the money. The ladies fled, the CEOs chased, and they had no chance to escape!
侯府主母要寿终正寝 | "The Lady of the Marquis's Mansion is About to Die"

Liu Xiao Xu, Liu JinChen Yuhu, a history major at University A, died suddenly after staying up all night reading novels, and transmigrated into the body of the mistress of a marquis's mansion. The original owner of this body suffered from her mother-in-law's favoritism and her husband's concubinage while serving on the frontier, ultimately dying with resentment. To return to reality and die peacefully, Chen Yuhu transformed herself, overcoming her weakness to outwit her wicked mother-in-law, win over her children and concubines, revitalize the household, deal with her husband's pregnant concubine Jiang Yusun, and plan for her children's future. After many twists and turns, she secured her position as mistress, facilitated Jiang Yusun's remarriage, reconciled with her husband, and lived a stable life in ancient times, steadily progressing towards her goal of dying peacefully in her old age.
状元郎夫人又掀桌了 | "The Top Scholar's Wife Flipped the Table Again"

Gao Min Rui, Guo Yu XinTo repay a debt of gratitude for a meal three years prior, the newly appointed top scholar Qin Yu marries Zhang Qiong, a notorious "shrew" in the surrounding villages. Unexpectedly, this marriage entangles him in a complex web of family feuds and court intrigue. The seemingly gentle Qin Yu is actually a secret agent for the royal family, tasked with investigating corruption related to disaster relief. The fiery and courageous Zhang Qiong, to protect her sister, outwits her doomed uncle. Together, the couple works to benefit the people.
怎么办，我不想当你哥哥 | "What to Do, I Don't Want to Be Your Brother"

Li Sheng Jie, Tian Xin YaGan Tang, at eighteen and facing her college entrance exams, was kicked out of her uncle's house by his family. She dragged her suitcase and hid under the eaves of Xu Ying's house to avoid the rain, where Xu Ying, returning from school, took her in. Afraid that Xu Ying would also kick her out like her uncle, Gan Tang tried her best to be obedient, calling him "brother." Xu Ying took Gan Tang in and went out to work to earn money for her studies. He raised her very well, and Gan Tang, living up to his expectations, was admitted to the same university as Xu Ying.
救命，我怎么和死对头领证啦 | "Help! How Did I Get Married to My Nemesis?"

Yang Yu Bin, Gong Fang Ni25-year-old jewelry designer Deng Yuanyuan and her arch-rival Zhou Yu accidentally have a relationship during a drunken night, which is discovered by their parents and they are forced into marriage. The two have a 20-year-old feud stemming from when Deng Yuanyuan accidentally killed Zhou Yu's bird when she was six. Deng Yuanyuan hides in a resort hotel to escape her arranged marriage, unaware that Zhou Yu has secretly loved her for years and is determined to win her over. With her bank account frozen, Deng Yuanyuan is forced to serve Zhou Yu by exchanging money, and his favoritism gradually melts away her prejudices. After their marriage, while camping, they encounter a wild boar. The self-preservation of her rival Shang Yulin and Zhou Yu's selfless rescue allow the two to finally resolve their differences.
遇见池小姐，人生若只如初见 | "Meeting Miss Chi is Like Our First Encounter"

Wang Zi Lin, Ba LaThree years ago, Chi Huan made a deal with Huo Cizhou to save her father, but during their time together, she fell in love and became pregnant. Huo Cizhou married Mu Yirou for a family alliance, treating Chi Huan coldly to protect her. Mu Yirou plotted a kidnapping, causing Chi Huan to leave heartbroken. Three years later, Chi Huan was rescued by Leng Shuang, the head of a wealthy family, and made a stunning comeback. At an auction, she became the center of attention, and Huo Cizhou regretted his actions and pursued his wife, but she remained indifferent. When Mu Yirou tried to scheme again, Chi Huan countered her moves, eventually discovering Huo Cizhou's forbearance and deep affection from years ago. The two cleared up their misunderstandings and reconciled. This tortuous relationship reveals that true love must be cherished, for once missed, it is hard to regain.
危情泰兰德 | "Dangerous Love in Tyrande"

Shao Wei, Dai Qi Xuan, Huai WenFor years, the orphaned Dai Ling has undergone rigorous training under the guidance of a mysterious figure known as "Sister Hua" to avenge her parents' deaths. After a long period of preparation, her opportunity arrives, and Dai Ling successfully orchestrates a chance encounter with Chen Angwei at the Tan Palace. Under Dai Ling's deliberate guidance, their interactions become increasingly frequent, and their ambiguous feelings intensify. However, as the "hunter," Dai Ling's own heart is also subtly changing. The involvement of the mysterious Ou Shaowen causes Dai Ling to waver and struggle between the two men, painfully torn between hatred and love.
安可 | "Encore"

Wang Hui Long, Dong Yu XuanFive years ago, Li An was forced to break up with her first love, Qi Yan, by her mother's threats of violence, and lied that she had fallen in love with a rich second-generation. After the breakup, she contracted B and was in a car accident, suffering both physical and mental trauma. Five years later, she returned to Beicheng and unexpectedly became Qi Yan's neighbor. Amid misunderstandings, cases, and emotional entanglements, the two gradually uncovered the truth behind their breakup, ultimately healing their wounds and moving towards a new life by protecting each other.
我在七零开拖拉机 | " I Drive a Tractor in the 70s"

Min Jie, Zhan NiTop driver Cheng Yaowei is reborn as the daughter of a notorious capitalist in the 1970s. With her exceptional abilities and wisdom, she exposes corruption amidst skepticism, wins a tractor race, forms an all-female racing team, and eventually starts a business with Shen Yushan, the seemingly cold but warm-hearted production brigade leader, leading the villagers to prosperity through transportation and achieving success in both her career and love.
前夫登基我为臣妻 | "My Ex-Husband Ascends the Throne, I Become His Subject's Wife"

Chen Yun Ting, Gong Fang NiSix years after their divorce, Sheng Wu's ex-husband ascended the throne. The day the news reached Sheng Wu's second husband's family, her mother-in-law insisted on giving her a divorce decree. She claimed that since she had been the new emperor's first wife, the Jiang family dared not keep her. Sheng Wu felt her mother-in-law was overthinking things! After the divorce, he married the woman he had always loved, and she herself remarried. A clean break, a complete separation. She believed that her ex-husband becoming emperor and her becoming a member of the Jiang family did not conflict. Upon their reunion, Sheng Wu knelt before the emperor's majestic presence, referring to herself as his subject. A slight smile played on the emperor's lips.
昭昭婉心 | "Zhao Zhao Wan Xin"

Hu Jia Hao, Li Xiao NaIn her past life, Su Yunwan helped her husband, a man from a humble background, rise to the highest ranks of officialdom, only to be assassinated by her cousin, Su Shuangshuang. Reborn into the era of the Yiqin Festival, she went with the flow, giving up the position of Prime Minister's wife to her cousin, who was eager to climb the social ladder, and marrying the hunter He Xiangbei herself. Her cousin successfully married into a "scholarly family," but became entangled in a wicked mother-in-law, gambling debts, and examination fraud; Su Yunwan, on the other hand, used her medical skills, embroidery, and knowledge to help He Xiangbei achieve merit and be ennobled, becoming the first female top scholar of the dynasty herself, and finally reuniting with the Empress who had been searching for her for many years.
重生后，我替原身逆天改命 | "Reborn, I Defied Fate to Change the Owner's Destiny"

Zou Ke Jun, Hu Yi WeiThe female protagonist is unexpectedly reborn into the body of a woman with the same name but a tragic fate. The original woman, due to her kindness, was betrayed by her family and ostracized by her colleagues, ultimately dying with resentment. The reborn protagonist, using her memories and wisdom from her past life, gradually uncovers her family's conspiracy, rises to become an industry elite, and finds true love. She retaliates swiftly against those who bullied her and helps the original woman fulfill her unfulfilled wishes, making her family, who once looked down on her, pay the price. The drama blends business warfare, emotional entanglements, and personal growth, with each episode filled with twists and exciting moments, showcasing a thrilling story of female independence and triumph.
许你一世峥嵘 | "I Promise You a Lifetime Glory"

Li Quan Cheng, Chen Mu YeJiang Sutang married at eighteen. For five years after her marriage, she farmed, cared for her paralyzed father-in-law, and endured her husband's beatings and her mother-in-law's harassment. After her father-in-law passed away, her husband became even more irritable and easily angered!
萌宝助攻：拐个爹地送妈咪 | "Adorable Baby's Wingman: Kidnapping a Daddy for Mommy"

Li Jia Chen, Liu Xin YueSeven years ago, Shen Qingqing and Lu Ziyuan had an unexpected drunken encounter, resulting in her giving birth to twins, a boy and a girl, on her own. To save her daughter Mumu, who was suffering from leukemia, she deliberately approached Lu Ziyuan and started working at Lu's company. Lu Ziyuan was attracted to her and, during his investigation, discovered Chaochao, who bore a striking resemblance to him, and learned of the twins' existence. After thwarting Bai Chuyue's repeated attempts to frame him, Lu Ziyuan voluntarily donated bone marrow to save his daughter, his true feelings moving Shen Qingqing. Ultimately, he proposed romantically, and with the twins' help, the two held an engagement ceremony. Shen Qingqing also unexpectedly became pregnant with her third child, and the family of five finally achieved complete happiness.
七零美人正芳华 | "The Beauty of the 70s"

Li Jia Chen, Li Bo YangJiang Shutang travels back to the 1970s and unexpectedly has a relationship with research whiz Gu Zhengnan, giving birth to triplets alone. Six years later, while struggling to raise her children at a machinery factory, she reunites with Gu Zhengnan and brings her children to his family. To make amends for the four of them, Gu Zhengnan immediately proposes. Although married life faces disdain from Gu's family and provocations from her childhood sweetheart Ye Yiyi, Jiang Shutang handles it calmly. Her feelings for Gu Zhengnan gradually develop during their married life, and they support each other through thick and thin.
窃心劫 | "Stealing Hearts"

Yi Da Qian, Cheng GuoDuring the reign of Emperor Chengjian of the Ming Dynasty, Sun Jinghong, a chivalrous female thief burdened with the blood feud of her family's massacre, and Lu Hanjiang, a cold-faced imperial guard, go from being adversaries to working together. In the capital city, where eunuchs are rampant and undercurrents are surging, they jointly uncover the truth behind the salt tax case ten years ago. In the end, they use jade pendants and silver hairpins as keys to break the conspiracy, clear the name of the wronged, and overthrow the corrupt officials in the imperial court with a confrontation in the Golden Palace, restoring the world's innocence. In the chaos of the world, chivalry and justice are forged into a legend amidst the clash of swords and emotions.
姑奶奶又美又飒2:AK少女 | "My Grandma is Beautiful and Cool 2: AK Girl"

Liu Yi Long, Yang Fu YuThis drama is part of the Gray Iron Triangle female mercenary series. After being rescued from prison by Yu You with an AK, Pei Qi, the young master of the Tujing circle, falls hopelessly in love with this white-haired genius girl. Unfortunately, the young master's pursuit of his wife is not smooth, and he gets slapped one after another, but he remains persistent.
顾少的独家占有 | "Young Master Gu's Exclusive Possession"

Qu Yu, Yuan Chuan QiThe female lead, Xin Ran, is a struggling 18th-tier celebrity in the entertainment industry. On the surface, she's a glamorous and arrogant woman, but deep down, she suffers from a phobia of intimacy with the opposite sex due to the loss of her mother, abandonment by her father, and the lingering trauma of her past relationship with Gu Yanchi. The male lead, Gu Yanchi, appears to be a carefree male model and Xin Ran's assistant, but he is actually the illegitimate son of the wealthy Gu family. His mother died in childbirth when he was young, and he was left homeless. Seven years ago, Xin Ran rescued him on her motorcycle, and he has considered her the only light in his life ever since. This has led to a years-long, obsessive pursuit of her. While his personality harbors a mad and obsessive side, he shows unwavering loyalty and tenderness only towards Xin Ran.
长生千年，亲手养成小娇夫 | "Living for a Thousand Years, Raising Little Darling Husband by Hand"

Zhang Da Yuan, Xia Xuan ZiLu Ling'er accidentally ingested a magical herb that granted her immortality but also caused her to contract a cold poison. During the Republic of China era, she needed Shen Yan, a man of pure Yang physique from the Shen family, as a medicinal ingredient. Shen Yan initially resisted, but later made a pact with Lu Ling'er to save his mother. The two developed feelings for each other during their time together, and Shen Yan even sacrificed himself to protect Lu Ling'er. Lu Ling'er discovered that Shen Yan was the one who could help her break free from the blood pact of immortality, but Shen Yan died saving her. Lu Ling'er's soul traveled to the modern era and found Shen Qingnian, the reincarnation of Shen Yan, in the Shen family.
穿书后，反派婆婆竟是我闺蜜 | "After Transmigrating Into a Book, the Villainous Mother-in-Law Turned Out to be My Best Friend"

Ye Zi Jing, Fan Xuan Zi QiOffice worker Zhu Yi and her best friend Song Song, after venting about a novel, are transported to another world. Zhu Yi becomes Lu Zhaoyi, a discarded wife about to be killed by the villain, while Song Song becomes the wicked mother-in-law Xie Song. After recognizing each other, the two plan to get Lu Zhaoyi to divorce her husband to save her life and make money. Lu Zhaoyi deliberately causes trouble to provoke the male lead, Jiang Yan, with Xie Song's help, but unexpectedly, Jiang Yan falls for Lu Zhaoyi. The ultimate villain, Xie Qing, uses Xie Hualian to cause trouble and seize the Jiang family's assets, ultimately leading to both of them being imprisoned. Lu Zhaoyi lets go of her obsession with divorce and finds happiness with Jiang Yan and Xie Song.
如此温柔又多情 | "So Gentle and Affectionate"

Li Bin Hang, Zhang Xin YueYe Qiao, daughter of Ye Hai, a renowned bartender in Lucheng, suffered a tragedy at the age of five. Her uncle, Shen Yaodong, driven by jealousy of his younger brother's talent and lust for his sister-in-law's beauty, plotted to harm Ye Hai, but the plot resulted in the deaths of both Ye Hai and his wife. To seize Ye Hai's fortune, Shen Yaodong adopted his niece and renamed her Shen Ye Qiao. For fifteen years, Shen Ye Qiao endured humiliation and hardship within the Shen family, secretly plotting revenge. She appeared innocent and naive, but in reality, she knew the truth of what happened. Fate intervened, and Fu Chengyao, the eldest son of Lucheng's richest man, was unexpectedly drawn into the affair. With Fu Chengyao's help, Shen Ye Qiao ultimately succeeded in her revenge, completely eradicating Shen Yaodong and his forces.
她靠通古今在冷宫风生水起 | "She Thrived in the Cold Palace by Relying on Her Knowledge of the Past and Present"

Mao Yi Chi, Tan Wen WenAfter being banished to the Cold Palace, Consort Su committed suicide in despair, but accidentally entered the modern world of the 21st century. After reading palace intrigue novels such as "Empresses in the Palace," Su Ruoxi mastered the art of palace intrigue. She returned to the Cold Palace with modern equipment and began to rise, regaining favor, kicking the Consort, punching the Empress, and achieving far greater success than the Emperor. In the end, she ascended the throne as Empress!
穿越七零，我靠空间去寻夫 | "Traveling Back to the 1970s, I Used Space to Find My Husband"

Hu Tao, Zeng He Hui ZiJiang Tang transmigrates into a novel as the cannon fodder ex-wife of a modern-day novelist. She starts by beating up her scheming uncle's family, who are after her fortune, and then, with her twins, searches for her husband, Fu Sinian. Possessing a spatial ability and a spiritual spring, she slaps the scheming Yun Shu in the face, deals with her awful relatives, and rises to power through her own abilities. Along the way, her relationship with Fu Sinian deepens, and she uncovers the mystery of her own origins. Ultimately, she enjoys a happy family life, and all the villains receive their due punishment.

Xu Xiao, Wu Fei XueSong Jinjin, a top-notch translator, transmigrates into a novel as the cannon fodder ex-wife of the male lead, Lu Yanchuan. To avoid the scumbag Ye Jinghe, she begs to stay at the Lu family home for an extra month. She abandons the original owner's arrogance, proactively doing housework and showcasing her translation talent to earn money, winning over the Lu family's opinion of her. During their time together, Song Jinjin and Lu Yanchuan's relationship improves; they develop a tacit understanding while participating in team-building activities and dealing with unexpected situations. Lu Yanchuan is also attracted to her and silently protects her. Amidst the warmth of the Lu family, she reconsiders her marriage, and Lu Yanchuan's feelings for her subtly change.(Aired: Nov 7, 2025)
不负当面晴时雨 | “Not Betraying the Rain in Sunny Days”

Liang Si Wei, Ma Le JieNineteen years ago, Shi Yu was living under the roof of the Jiang family. When she first met Jiang Yichen, his nominal elder brother, she fell in love at first sight. However, Jiang Yichen, due to his mother's suicide, blamed all the faults on Shi Yu. He verbally abused her but was also irresistibly attracted to her. Until one day, Shi Yu forced herself on him. Unable to face his feelings, Jiang Yichen went abroad. Three years later, he returned, but Shi Yu had become a stranger. She was determined to raise money to leave the Jiang family and him. When they met again in the ancient town, Jiang Yichen became his little follower, a fiercely protective brother. The secret of Shi Yu's mother's wooden box led to a mystery about their bloodline. How will the two of them face this?
夫人她专治不服2 | “The Lady Specializes in Defeating the Defiant 2”

Wang Pei Yan, Li Ke YiThe mysterious tycoon Shen Qingci, in order to reclaim her mother's company, hastily marries Xi Xingye, the most notorious playboy in Beijing. Less than a year into their marriage, Xi Xingye's grandfather suddenly falls ill, plunging the Xi family into crisis. Shen Qingci employs both force and cunning, simultaneously reorganizing the company, rigorously reforming her wayward husband, and taking charge of Xi Xingye's group of playboy brothers, even winning over their grandparents. Amidst their daily laughter and tears, the spoiled young master Xi Xingye gradually matures and takes responsibility, the rift between Shen Qingci and her brother is resolved, and the two become more certain of their feelings for each other, working together to protect their family and business.
少总他茶香四溢 | "The Young Master's Tea Fragrance Envelops All"

Feng Xiang Kun, Zhu Tian YiShen Rong's ten-year marriage is marred by her husband Zhou He's infidelity. In despair, she meets Chi Bai. She accepts Chi Bai's marriage proposal and files for divorce, only to be mocked by Zhou He, who says, "I can't live without you." During the protracted divorce battle, Chi Bai, whose true identity is a wealthy CEO, secretly supports Shen Rong and exposes the cheating husband and mistress. Zhou He, while tolerating his mistress Xia Zixiao's provocations, remains convinced that Shen Rong will return to him. Finally, upon learning the truth, Zhou He breaks down, begging Shen Rong to come back, but to no avail.
揉碎春光 | "Crumbling Springtime"

Liang Yi Cheng, Wang Yi DanBy chance, Zeng Chutong developed a relationship with Gu Hai, becoming his secret lover. Soon, she discovered Gu Hai had a fiancée and wanted to break up. Gu Hai, for the first time, displayed his extreme possessiveness. Terrified but powerless to escape, Zeng Chutong was forced to remain by Gu Hai's side as a partner with no future and no chance of reconciliation. Then Qiao Nian appeared. Zeng Chutong thought she could use Qiao Nian's power to accomplish her mission. It turned out that Chutong, who had always been subservient to Gu Hai, was not the innocent little rabbit he could easily manipulate, but a cunning robin plotting revenge. She disguised herself as all the women he loved, all to avenge her sister…
纸玫瑰2 | "Paper Rose 2"

Wang Yan Xin, Zheng Chen YuAfter divorcing Bai Yan, Kang Jian realized he still deeply loved her and pursued her relentlessly. However, the machinations of a business rival led to Kang Jian being investigated and taken away in connection with a bribery scandal. Bai Yan, through her wit, managed to rescue him safely. Kang Jian, repenting, volunteered to be transferred to Yun County to start from the bottom, determined to develop Bai Yan's hometown. Kang Jian and Bai Yan began a long-distance relationship. However, at this time, news arrived of the tragic death of Bai Yan's childhood sweetheart, Shang Mingtian, in the line of duty, and news of her mother's cancer diagnosis. Where will their relationship ultimately lead? Will they forget each other, or will they stay together through thick and thin?
傅总，你的命我续上了 | “Mr. Fu, I've Extended Your Life”

Shen Hao Nan, Zuo YiJiang Chuwan, a master of metaphysics, descends to the mortal realm after undergoing a tribulation, gaining the ability to see her life's countdown through her third eye. To regain her powers, she takes on jobs to earn money to buy magical artifacts and accumulate merit, while also treating people with "strange illnesses" as a traditional Chinese medicine practitioner. Fu Yan'an arrives with an exorbitant reward, and after being rescued by her, he reveals his secret: he is afflicted with an incurable love curse. To aid her cultivation, Jiang Chuwan agrees to a fake marriage with him and moves into the Fu family home to detoxify. Little does she know that the two share a predestined connection. Fu Yan'an has loved her since then, recognizing her at first glance upon their reunion. He uses the fake marriage to get closer to her, hoping to spend his remaining days with her.
城南的花开了，你还走吗 | “The Flowers Bloom in the South of the City, Will You Still Leave?”

Wang Yi Ran, Tan Yan YanZheng Jinyi was imprisoned by Zheng Guozhou from a young age, becoming his meticulously cultivated "perfect creation." Nine years later, she reunites with her first love, Chu Ye, and uses herself as bait to meticulously plot her revenge. Chu Ye, a wealthy heir in Beijing's elite circles, knowingly succumbs to the trap, repeatedly saving her from danger. Zheng Jinyi struggles between freedom and love, her life nearing its end. The flowers bloom in the south of the city, but she chooses to face her end. In her final moments, Chu Ye stays close by, saying, "This time, I won't let you leave alone again."
我闪婚就算了，怎么姐姐也 | “I Flash-Married, But Why Did My Sister Too?”

Min Jie, Liu Xi YuOn her way to escape her abusive husband, Zhou Shengsheng encounters Mo Xiao and Mo Xing. Zhou Shengsheng unexpectedly has a one-night stand with Mo Xiao and discovers she is pregnant a month later. Mo Xiao arrives and proposes marriage to Zhou Shengsheng, taking her and Zhou Anning home. Living under the same roof, Zhou Shengsheng gradually wins Mo Xiao's heart; Mo Xing slowly falls in love with Zhou Anning. After a series of events, Zhou Shengsheng and Mo Xiao, Zhou Anning and Mo Xing, live happily ever after.
少总保镖太粘人 | "The Young CEO's Bodyguard is Too Clingy"
Chen Ming Hao, Zhou Jia YiA loyal bodyguard is on duty to protect his wife; the overly confident but manipulative woman is probably driven to introversion for life by the male lead.
京夜沦陷 | "The Fall of Beijing"

Xia Zhi Cheng, Lin Yi YunLin Yuan, a new employee, is bullied and framed by her boss, Manager He, and senior employee, Ma Xiaoqian. To escape, she asks her best friend, Lu Nian, to book her a hotel room. While drunk and being chased by Ma Xiaoqian, she mistakenly enters the wrong room and has a one-night stand with Fu Mingxiu, a similarly drunk heir from a wealthy Beijing family. Feeling responsible, Lin Yuan secretly runs away, hoping to quietly end the affair. Fu Mingxiu, however, is obsessed with Lin Yuan and begins searching for her. He later misunderstands her, believing she has a boyfriend and that he is the other woman. He feels self-loathing while simultaneously fighting for her affections. Lin Yuan continues to misunderstand Fu Mingxiu, making his pursuit of her a long and arduous journey.
私藏月光 | "Hidden Moonlight"

Min Xing Han, Li Bing BingEveryone said that Zhou Zhihe, the school heartthrob, was arrogant, intelligent, and a prodigy. Yet, this unattainable beauty was brought down from his pedestal by the domineering heiress, Song Shi. Song Shi approached him, possessed him, and lured him into a daze before dumping him without a second thought. Four years later, the impoverished school heartthrob Zhou Zhihe had become a ruthless new business tycoon, while Song Shi had become a fallen heiress. Song Shi believed Zhou Zhihe hated her to the core, but Zhou Zhihe relentlessly pursued her. Just when everyone thought Zhou Zhihe was about to severely punish Song Shi, they discovered that the prodigy was actually love-struck.
请欺瞒到底 | "Please Deceive Me to the End"

Li Jia Ming, Chen Zi NingProfessional con artist Xu Chengyi unexpectedly transmigrates into a wealthy family novel, becoming a cannon fodder female supporting character with the same name. She is forced to marry Song Wenzhou, the president of the Song Group, who becomes mentally impaired after a car accident. Xu Chengyi uses her deception skills to retaliate against her family, extorting 30 million yuan to escape, only to discover that her seemingly mentally impaired husband is actually a cunning and vengeful tycoon. Under Song Wenzhou's coercion and enticement, the two enter into a contract marriage. Xu Chengyi uses her deception skills and acting abilities to cover for Song Wenzhou in the treacherous Song family, and infiltrates the Song Group as an intern to help him investigate evidence of internal corruption.
社恐的我被迫闪婚了个国民女神 | "My Social Anxiety Leads to a Flash Marriage with a National Goddess"

Lin Xiao, Tai Jing YiLi Shuo, who transmigrates into the body of an autistic patient, is forced by his stepmother to marry into her family. However, he accidentally registers a marriage with Bai Qinning, a famous actress who wants to avoid suspicion, at a coffee shop. The two enter into a one-month contractual marriage. Li Shuo uses his past life's entertainment resources to write a novel and achieve success, while Bai Qinning conceals her celebrity identity as "Bai Muge" and lives with him. During this time, Li Shuo faces pressure from relatives to donate a kidney and difficulties from his family. Bai Qinning helps him on several occasions, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other amidst their hilarious daily interactions. Misunderstandings about their identities, jealousy, and external obstacles unfold one after another.
穿书后，他等了我十年 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, He Waited for Me for Ten Years"

Fan Cheng Qi, Zhou ZhouTen years ago, 21-year-old Yu Yin transmigrated into a book, always followed by an inseparable little tail named He Shiyan. Ten years later, 21-year-old Yu Yin transmigrated again, this time with her former little tail now a 27-year-old nobleman. He Shiyan had waited for Yu Yin for a full ten years, and upon their reunion, he entered her life with an assertive attitude, gradually seducing her. As they spent time together, love blossomed between them, and Yu Yin slowly learned the truth through system missions. Ultimately, the two changed the ending of their transmigration story and spent the rest of their lives together.
引她入轨 | "Luring Her into the Affair"

Gao Ming Yu, Wang Lin HuiLin Chuyi, a supporting female character, transmigrates into the body of the female lead in a novel. Upon waking, she finds herself in a predicament, caught cheating on her fiancé, Ji Baiyan, by him. During their time together, she melts Ji Baiyan's heart with her warmth, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other.

When Lin Yuyou announced she wanted to leave with the money, Cheng Jingyan panicked and began relentlessly pursuing her, discovering that Zhizhi was actually Zhizhi. Han Dong, Cao Sai YaGui Xi, a leading actress in a traditional opera troupe, is assaulted and framed by the troupe leader. Desperate, she is rescued by Xu Yanqing, a wealthy young master. Xu Yanqing not only helps her escape the troupe's predicament but also repairs her engagement bracelet. Later, to protect her completely, he defies his family's objections and takes her as his concubine. However, Gui Xi's life is not smooth sailing: she reunites with her former lover, Qiao Yulin, only to discover he has already changed his heart; she is also tricked into opium addiction by the Feng family, plunging her into a painful abyss. She meticulously laid a trap, approaching and manipulating Mu Chenzhou as a pawn in her quest for revenge. However, Mu Chenzhou's unconditional love gradually melted her icy heart. When her former childhood sweetheart became her sworn enemy, when the inevitable end of revenge clashed fiercely with genuine love, she must make a final choice between hatred and love.

Song Zhe Lun, Han Jia HuiIn their past lives, half-sisters Wen Shu and Wen Xin were led to a tragic abyss by an arranged marriage into a wealthy family. Driven by greed, Wen Xin steals her sister's arranged marriage partner, vying for the title of a wealthy heiress. Unbeknownst to her, Wen Shu has already seen through the scheme, entering into a marriage of convenience with the seemingly ordinary waiter Zhou Yansheng, secretly plotting to reclaim her mother's inheritance. Little did she know, this man she was working with was actually the mysterious heir of a top-tier conglomerate.
时与梨涡 | "Time and Dimples"

Jiang Wan struggles between revenge and true love, while Yan Linchuan wavers between his heart and worldly desires. From initially using each other, they gradually fall in love, ultimately joining forces to fight against the Jiang family's conspiracy, uncovering the truth behind their mother's death years ago, and healing each other in the process, finally coming together truly in love.
错嫁宿敌后，我真香了 | "After Marrying the Wrong Nemesis, I Actually Loved It"

Watch as Su Qingran turns the tide, her career soars, her love is sweet and fulfilling, and she lives a life of unparalleled success.
