Wang Xuan, Tan Yan Yan [24 Episodes]It tells the story of Min Jiang Xi, who aspires to become "the Number One Female tutor in Shencheng", and Qin Zhan, known as "the Villain in Shencheng". The two start off being wary of each other, but gradually develop deep affection and mutual understanding. In the end, they join forces as powerful partners to eliminate the great villains in the business world.(Aired: Feb 21, 2025 - Mar 5, 2025)
炽宠 | "Blazing Love"

Wang Yi Ran, Zuo YiIn an underground boxing ring in Kelantan, Southeast Asia, powerful businesswoman Lan Yanxi chooses boxer Qin Yang as her personal bodyguard. Unbeknownst to her, he is an undercover agent sent by her nephew. Their close interactions and growing intimacy lead Qin Yang to see Lan Yanxi no longer as a pampered young lady, but as a woman he must protect. He is willing to be her loyal servant, yet unable to escape his mission. Loyalty versus betrayal—how should he choose? When Qin Yang disappears while protecting Lan Yanxi, she begins a desperate search for him. She firmly believes that Gu Mingchen, who has lost his memory, is Qin Yang. The pampered young lady pursues her love at all costs.
第二十八年秋 | "The Twenty-Eighth Year of Autumn"

Zhang Hong Ming, Shi TongA rescue attempt sparked a connection between Zhou Heng and cardiac surgeon Sang Yu. Through several crises and near misses, Dr. Sang and Captain Zhou, though on different battlefields, shared the same passion. Ultimately, love blossomed amidst heartbeats and tender whispers, and this long-awaited spring finally arrived.
带手机穿越我躺皇帝怀里刷短剧 | "Transmigrating with My Cellphone: Lying in the Emperor's Arms Watching Short Dramas"

Zheng Feng, Zhao Mu YanModern girl Qin Wan unexpectedly travels through time to her grandfather's collection of ancient paintings, "The Night Banquet at the Jiang Palace," becoming the deposed concubine Leng Qingqing in the cold palace. Using her mobile phone and modern knowledge, she navigates the court, winning the heart of Emperor Jiang Beiyu, but also becomes embroiled in the rebellion plot of the powerful Zhang family minister. To protect her loyal brother and her loved ones, Qin Wan joins forces with the emperor to devise a scheme, using a passionate dance at the Mid-Autumn Festival banquet to kill Consort Zhang and help Jiang Beiyu reclaim his throne. Poisoned and given only three months to live, she is saved by her best friend Ma Shushu, who travels through time with antibiotics. Ultimately, Jiang Beiyu makes her his empress, offering the empire as a dowry, and the two rule the world together.
穿成炮灰女配，我只想当公婆的宝贝 | "Transmigrated as a Cannon Fodder Female Supporting Character, I Just Want to Be My In-Laws' Darling"

Ma Shuo Qi, Jiang Jing YuSong Jinjin, who unexpectedly transmigrated into a book, became the cannon fodder ex-wife of the male protagonist, Lu Yanchuan, and received divorce agreements right at the start. During her temporary stay at the Lu family's house during the divorce cooling-off period, she shed the original owner's vain and vicious traits, and used her vibrant energy to gradually change the Lu family's negative perception of her. She not only became the Lu family's darling but also slowly won Lu Yanchuan's heart.
星辰不渡回头月 | "Stars Never Ferry the Moon Back"

Yu Zong Wei, Guo Ming YuanSu Xiao had been hopelessly in love with Lu Heng for seven years, but she suffered severe injuries and amnesia because of him and her first love, Liu Yunxi. After being tricked into staying by his side as his fiancée, she was repeatedly framed and humiliated. When Lu Heng completely denied all her efforts, Su Xiao resolutely resigned and decided to start a new life. Meanwhile, Fu Yunxiao, a mysterious business tycoon with whom she had a childhood betrothal, was about to start a new chapter in her life.
别惹那个叼奶瓶的，她超凶 | "Don't Mess with That Bottle-Holding Girl, She's Super Fierce"

Zhang Bei Xi, Ke Lan Wan YiZhouzhou was taken back to the Qin family. Qin Lie is a notoriously cold and aloof businessman. Zhouzhou is like a little sun, with a built-in warm-hearted buff. Whenever Qin Lie is in trouble, she's there to solve it, easily resolving the Qin family's long-standing problems. Qin Lie's icy demeanor completely melts. When his masters come down the mountain to visit, they happen to see Zhouzhou clinging to Qin Lie's arm, acting all cute. This girl, who always seems to lack affection, is now overflowing with love!
重回九零，娇养夫君富养女 | Back to the 90s: Pampering Husband and Raising Daughter in Luxury"

Zhang Yi Yang, Yang LeiIn her past life, Su Ai was a female rogue who stole a handsome village doctor as her husband. The death of her husband and child became a lifelong sorrow for Su Ai. Reborn as a business tycoon, Su Ai vowed to spoil her husband and child rotten. However, her stolen little husband seems to have a rather impressive background.
穷学霸强吻校草，他真香了 | "The Poor Scholar Forces a Kiss with the School Heartthrob, and He Actually Falls for It"

Ju Hao Tong, Hong Yi XinSu Xiaotang works at a high-end club to pay for her tuition. While drunk, she accidentally sleeps with the aloof and arrogant heir of Beijing's elite circles, Leng Yanzhou. The next day, she wakes up to find herself dragged home by this young master and forced to sign a "girlfriend contract." She steals his meal card, destroys his unrequited love, and he, despite his initial reluctance, secretly marries her – a classic case of "it's actually good!" warning!
我死后，神医夫君悔疯了&甘草剧毒，不及君心 | "After My Death, My Healer Husband Went Mad with Regret & Licorice Poison Couldn't Compare to Your Heart"

Yuan Zhi Ying, Pu Yu TongThe legendary healer Wei Yanzhi and his poison-making apprentice Shen Ke were entangled for half their lives, with his wife Huo Yunqiao repeatedly becoming a victim in their game. When her husband personally handed her the deadly "antidote," she smiled; this was her chance to escape back to the modern world. She even accepted her apprentice as a secondary wife with a smile, watching him navigate the complexities of their relationship. When he made her take the blame to protect his apprentice, she presented him with fatal evidence. That night, he collapsed and roared, holding her gradually cooling body, while her soul departed, leaving this absurdity behind.
皇權許你 | "Imperial Power Grants You"

Wang Yu Wei, Han Fei'erIn her past life, Jiang Nanzhi was betrayed and killed by her husband Xie Yuqing. After being reborn, she severed all ties of love and pursued power single-mindedly. Awakening her precognitive abilities, she saw through the hostage Gong Yinghan's imperial destiny and actively sought marriage, using her sincerity as bait to invite him to join forces. Gong Yinghan originally came to assassinate the "Emperor's Star," but gradually fell for her true feelings amidst the feigned tests. When Jiang Nanzhi faced crises such as poisoning by her former lover and court intrigue, Gong Yinghan helped her several times, and even confessed his true intentions and gave his life under the provocation of his rival. In the end, the two lowered their guard and walked hand in hand through the chaotic world of scheming and sincerity, plotting together to become the supreme ruler of the world.
极致心瘾，病娇大小姐非我不可 | "Extreme Addiction: The Yandere Young Lady Can't Live Without Me"

Fu Yu Hang, Jiang Yi DuoAfter being reunited with Xu Jie, the long-lost true young master of the Xu family, he is taken home, while his adopted son, Lin Feng, is kicked out of the house by his three older sisters. After losing his status as the young master, he learns that his school beauty girlfriend had cheated on him and was only with him because of his status as the young master of the Xu family. At this moment, Lin Feng wakes up from his dream! He wanders aimlessly through the rainy alleys, only to be threatened by a drunken, aloof woman. After a confused night, she forcefully and inexplicably orders Lin Feng to stay by her side. She is none other than Chu Ling Shuang, the eldest daughter of the Chu family, and their fates are now intertwined.
穿书后我成了三个反派的后娘 | After Transmigrating into a Book, I Became the Stepmother of Three Villains"

Wen Cong, Huang Yun YunJi Zhihuan dies unexpectedly and transmigrates into the body of a cannon fodder female supporting character who dies early in the novel—not only does she marry the living dead war god Pei Yuan, but she also becomes the wicked stepmother of three villains! In the original book, she is the first step in the transformation of a cute little girl into a villain, ultimately meeting a tragic end. Ji Zhihuan refuses to have her life arranged for her! With a spatial ability and a full range of skills, she will kill the wicked, raise children, farm, and defy fate!

离婚后我人见人爱 | "After the Divorce, Everyone Loves Me"- Yang Hao Kai, Wang WeiXiang Wan, a nightclub dancer from a humble background, stumbles into the world of Fu Huai'an, the son of a billionaire, through a chance encounter. She believes she can escape poverty, but what awaits her is a deeper hell—the cold indifference of the wealthy, the humiliation of her mother-in-law, the betrayal of her lover, and even a deadly conspiracy. Before dying, she finally understands that it was all a scheme. Reborn back to that night, her memories linger, her heart aching. She vows never to be blinded by love again and to make all those who hurt her pay with their blood. Love, revenge, and fate intertwine
a turbulent undercurrent of revenge against the wealthy is about to begin.
夜莺的赌约 | "The Nightingale's Bet"

Li Hao, Qing WenTo uncover the truth behind her sister Ning Wei's forced suicide, Ning Wan, under the alias Lin Wan, infiltrates the high-seas auction island of her enemy, Master Jin San. Six years prior, her sister perished due to Jin San's "pig butchering scam" and threats of voyeurism. Ning Wan feigns loyalty, maneuvering between the twisted Jin San and his henchman Xu Meng, while deliberately getting close to the determined buyer Jiang Ting, using him as a weapon for revenge. After discovering that Jiang Ting had engaged in a dirty deal with Jin San to protect her, the two endure trials, misunderstandings, and life-or-death situations, ultimately joining forces to expose Jin San's illegal voyeurism empire, ruining his reputation. With their revenge complete, Ning Wan and Jiang Ting also confirm their true feelings for each other, embarking on a new life together.
后来不曾相见 | "Never Seen Again"

Hu Yang, Xiang Yun JieThe two were originally a loving couple. A passerby with mental illness injured someone, and her husband died protecting her. In her grief, she discovered that a billionaire looked exactly like her deceased husband. She was convinced he was her husband and launched an investigation and pursuit of him, but everyone denied it. When she reluctantly accepted the fact that he was her husband, she discovered his hidden secret.
霍先生他每天都在求名分＆月色 | "Mr. Huo is Seeking Recognition Every Day & Moonlight"

Shao Wei, Zhu Xiao Xue (RAW)Bu Wan has loved Huo Mingxi for ten years, but on the eve of her wedding, she discovers that he has always been thinking of his white moonlight, Mu Xue. Heartbroken, she wanders the streets and unexpectedly encounters Huo Sui, whom she hasn't seen for many years. Huo Sui's silent protection warms Bu Wan's heart, and on a whirlwind, the two decide to get married. After marriage, Huo Sui begins an unconditional doting husband mode, with every little detail revealing his deep affection for Bu Wan. It's not until Bu Wan discovers the scar on Huo Sui's back that she realizes that the person who risked his life to save her during the school fire years ago was actually Huo Sui, not Huo Mingxi. It turns out that she didn't waste her youth, but rather her deep affection.*This literally got taken down on Youtube just seconds after it's being uploaded. Anyway, it's similar plot as Xiao Wen Yu and Deng Ling Shu's
良辰佳话 | "A Tale of Two Cities"

Zhu Zhe Ren, Xiang Wei Jing (RAW)Lu Yanzhi had an affair with his elder sister-in-law, betraying An Jinhe's sincere heart, and subjected her to all sorts of abuse. This continued until An Jinhe finally gave up on Lu Yanzhi and left. On the day of the palace banquet, Lu Yanzhi, believing Liu Ruoyun's slander, prevented An Jinhe from attending the banquet with him. An Jinhe then set fire to her villa and faked her death. Lu Yanzhi, believing An Jinhe was dead, went completely mad. He searched the world for An Jinhe, filled with self-blame, despair, and alcoholism, even contemplating self-immolation to die with her. At the crucial moment, he finally found An Jinhe's whereabouts. Meanwhile, An Jinhe met Prince Pei, who had always secretly loved her, at the border.*This too. Ma Xiao Yu, Deng Ling ShuLin Qiao, the female leader of an international assassin organization, was about to retire from the underworld and enjoy a life of financial freedom when she was transmigrated into a melodramatic novel, becoming the cannon fodder, devoted wife of wealthy CEO Li Tingzhou. Lin Qiao initially wanted to divorce him as soon as possible, finish the storyline, and return to reality, but Li Tingzhou overheard her thoughts, ruining her divorce plans. She was forced to maintain the original owner's pampered heiress persona while using her jinxed predictions to outwit Li Tingzhou, unexpectedly winning him over completely!
代她 | "On Her Behalf"

Shao Wei, Yu YinOrphaned girl Adai and her sister Zhou Xiang begged for a living. After her sister was adopted by Prince Zhou Ziyin and lived a good life, Adai starved to death in the snow. Reborn, she took her sister's place in the royal palace, but fell in love with the wrong person, willingly becoming his sharpest weapon. The wealth and status she painstakingly gained turned out to be a carefully orchestrated scheme by someone else.
错潮涌动 | "Tides of Misfortunes"

Liu Xiao Xu, Wang Xiao Yi (RAW)In 1940, ace sniper Tong Xue and top undercover agent Shen Shaochen are forced to live together as a couple for an infiltration mission. On the surface, they are a handsome and beautiful couple, but in reality, they are perfectly matched comrades, working together to resolve crises, relay intelligence, and snipe enemy agents, repeatedly teetering on the brink of death to complete highly difficult missions. Amidst the clash of swords and the danger of danger, their feigned intimacy gradually blossoms into genuine affection, a complex web of testing and protection. As their identities are threatened, can they uphold their beliefs and nurture their budding love within the enemy's lair?*finding subtitles of  Liu Xiaoxu's dramas  ontime is hard as they always got taken down as soon as it's uploaded.....
一夜成喜 | "A Night of Joy"

Jin Ze (Garvey Jin), Xu Bo DiNing Xiaotong, a lifelong single, desperately tries to squeeze into the top-tier Shen Group in Beijing to achieve her grand ambition of owning a "three-bedroom apartment." Unexpectedly, a mix-up leads to her becoming pregnant, and the father? Nobody knows! Even more absurdly, her aloof, germaphobic, and seemingly perfect boss, Shen Qingyan, proposes a "fake marriage"? Thus begins their clearly defined contractual marriage.
与婳燕尔 | "With Hua Yan'er"

Li Mu Jie, Lu En XinA decree of marriage forced Yun Hua, the fourth daughter of the Yun family, to marry the seventh prince, Si Heng. The imperial edict caused an uproar. Some pitied Yun Hua for marrying a sickly, eccentric, and cruel man; some waited to see her tormented to death; and some even hoped for Si Heng's demise, intending to see her forced to commit suicide. But who would have thought that the short-lived would survive, and the eccentric would become devoted? By day, he stayed by her side, protecting her and ensuring her safety. By night, he held her soft waist, whispering sweet nothings in her ear. He saw the moon in the abyss and wanted to embrace it, bestowing upon her unparalleled favor.
薄爷，夫人撕了遗书，说你还有救 | "Master Bo, Madam Tore Up the Will, Saying You Can STill e Saved"

Wang Zi Lin, Wu JiaoThe female lead, He Yan, unexpectedly has a relationship with the male lead, Bo Siheng. After returning to her family of origin, she discovers that the person she is to marry is none other than the male lead. The male lead gradually develops feelings for the female lead without knowing her identity, but he mistakes the female supporting character for the female lead. In the end, the male lead realizes his feelings for the female lead and discovers the true identity of the female supporting character.
一直很爱你 | "I've Always Loved You"

Chen Jing He, Fan QiWith only one month to live, Lin Chutang booked a funeral director online, only to discover upon meeting him that it was her ex-boyfriend, Fu Lin, whom she had dumped five years ago. After their reunion, their past love and hate gradually resurfaced. As Fu Lin continued to hurt Lin Chutang, he gradually discovered the truth of what happened back then. Ultimately, unable to accept Lin Chutang's death, he suffered a mental breakdown and followed her in death.*TRIGGER WARNING‼️ This one is depressingly sad story. 死遁后我成了冷面侯爷的白月光 | "After Faking My Death, I Become the Cold-Faced Marquis' White Moonlight"

Qu Tian Rui, Li Yu TongLin Xinyue, heartbroken after her lover Shen Qingyuan died in battle, committed suicide. Six years later, she found herself as the wife of Xiao Yan, the Marquis of Yongxin, a powerful figure second only to the emperor, and with twins in tow. When Lin Xinyue went to see her former lover, Shen Qingyuan, she discovered he had drastically changed. She realized she had been used by him for the past six years, and after achieving his goals, he plotted to silence her. At the critical moment, Xiao Yan appeared and saved Lin Xinyue, who gradually realized that she was actually Xiao Yan's unrequited love.
他在赚钱我在花，契约夫妻顶呱呱 | "He's Making Money, I'm Spending it, a Perfect Contract Couple"

Su Chang, Cheng Zi NingShen Tang accidentally transmigrated into a novel while reading, becoming a supporting female character in a CEO romance novel. She signed a two-year marriage agreement with Gu Huai'an, receiving 5 million yuan per month and a 200 million yuan divorce settlement. This high reward was simply too good to pass up. To protect her "retirement pension," she deliberately kept her distance, but this contrasting behavior triggered Gu Huai'an's mind-reading ability, and the two gradually developed genuine feelings for each other from their contractual marriage.
误惹太子后，表姑娘她慌了 | "After Accidentally Provoking the Crown Prince, the Cousing Panicked"

Wang Chao Yang, Fan WeiSong Lingyi, a modern-day working woman, dies unexpectedly and transmigrates into the body of a beggar girl. At a Guanyin temple, she encounters Prince Xiao Mingyi, disguised as a bandit. Despite her wit and resourcefulness, she is still taken away by Xiao Mingyi. During their time together, Song Lingyi discovers that although Xiao Mingyi is ruthless and cunning, he has repeatedly protected her, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other. However, their differing identities and misunderstandings create obstacles between them.
错位千金，偏执傅少的心尖宠 | "A Misplaced Heiress, theObsessive Young Master Fu's Darling"

Ma Ming Yu, Zheng Yun QianSu Ming unexpectedly transmigrates into a book, becoming the real heiress who is about to be cannon fodder. She's bound to a "Cannon Fodder Counterattack System," meaning she can only return to reality by winning over the ruthless and heartless tycoon Fu Siting. Faced with Fu Siting's coldness and defensiveness, Su Ming uses her wisdom and perseverance to gradually approach him, warming the shackles in his heart. The obsessive and cold-hearted young master Fu also gradually reveals his sincere and affectionate side. In this world of real and fake heiresses, Su Ming and young master Fu join forces to stage a romantic story of counterattack and redemption.
你的爱时过境迁 | "Your Love Has Changed"

Liu Yu Zhan, Zhao Yu XuanThis story tells of the love-hate entanglement between Lin Qian and Lu Chen spanning ten years. Ten years ago, Lin Qian was forced to leave Lu Chen due to family circumstances, and the two regrettably missed each other. Ten years later, Lin Qian returned to the country with a secret, only to find that Lu Chen had become a rising star in the business world and already had a fiancée. Faced with a changed world, Lin Qian, under the dual pressure of career and love, embarked on a battle with Lu Chen about memories, redemption, and choices.
暮色不染伊人 | "Twilight Doesn't Stain Her"

Liu Zi Heng, Qin Tian AiYoung actress Su Nuannuan unexpectedly transforms into the 80-year-old matriarch of a Chinese-American billionaire family, Mrs. Shen, and becomes bound to a family energy system. She helps the elderly woman make amends and changes the relationship between the three heirs, who have turned against each other due to a villain's machinations. Through a series of "energetic actions" that break age stereotypes, Su Nuannuan optimistically and gradually resolves the rift between Shen Ling, Shen Du, and Shen Sijin, leading them to fight side-by-side to expose and thwart Gu Yanxing's sinister plot to steal scientific research technology and core patents, destroy the Shen family, and ultimately bring him to justice!
夫人她略懂些拳脚 | "The Lady Knows a Little Martial Arts"

Wen Zhi Cheng, Zhai Xin RanBai Qiqi, lost at a young age, was adopted by a mysterious overseas organization, where she developed exceptional martial arts skills and a cold, unsmiling personality. To investigate her adoptive father's death, she returns to China to marry into a wealthy family in place of an illegitimate daughter. The family's background is complex, but under her parents' protection, she grows up to be a simple-minded playboy. However, during their time together, the playboy develops unexpected feelings for this strong, aloof girl, and falls for her...
落魄千金被京圈大佬宠成小祖宗 | "A Fallen Heiress Spoiled Like a Little Darling by Beijing Bigwig"

Jin Xuan Yu, Cui Yi LiangThe hidden story behind her mother's suicide. Five years later, Song Siyan returns to China as the president of YunChuang, seeking revenge for his mother while simultaneously pursuing Jiang Yusang under the guise of a business partnership. At this time, Jiang Yusang is informed by her family that she is the fake heiress switched at birth, and is plotted against by her biological daughter, Jiang Rui, and her mother. Amidst their entanglement, the two resolve past misunderstandings, working together to expose Jiang's mother's crimes, ultimately bringing her to justice. Having endured hardships and suffering from depression, Song Siyan and Jiang Yusang overcome their differences and finally become a couple.
地下情五年男友给我发来请 | "Five Years of Secret Relationship, My Boyfriend Sends Me an Invitation"

Qi You Cheng, Zhou Yu Ling, Zhang Pei Bao (Ming Yang)Secretary Jiang Zhixia maintained a secret relationship with Gu Yichen for five years, fulfilling his promise to "marry her when I'm thirty." On the eve of her birthday, Gu Yichen called off his engagement to his pregnant love interest, Su Xiao, severing ties with her by offering her shares. Humiliated and heartbroken, Jiang Zhixia joined the Li Group on her wedding day, breaking off all ties with Gu Yichen. Gu Yichen, realizing his mistake, was filled with remorse, and ultimately, the villain was punished, while Jiang Zhixia found true love.
她嫁人那天少帅哭红了眼 | "The Young Marshal Cried Red-Eyed on the Day She Got Married"

Lin Qiu Yi, Zhu Jia NiOrphan Xu Jinye, to save her critically injured aunt, seduces Wei Yanchen, the son of a warlord, on a rainy night. For two years, she navigates the vortex of Wei Yanchen's possessiveness and an arranged marriage with a wealthy family, secretly plotting her escape. After Wei Yanchen sees through her disguise, he relentlessly pursues her, from being imprisoned by force to protecting her with his life, the two endure countless trials. Finally, Xu Jinye's true identity is revealed, the two clear up their misunderstandings, and together they find happiness amidst the chaos of war.
认主 | "Recognizing the Master"

Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Wei Jia (RAW)Yun Lan, the head of the Yun family, returns from the dead, vowing revenge against all those who betrayed her. She decisively abandons her hypocritical "savior," Fu Chenghe, and chooses instead Shen Zhiyan, the sickly and possessive underworld boss who died for her in her previous life. Through trials and tribulations, the two join forces, with Yun Lan sweeping away internal enemies within the family, exposing the truth behind her father and stepmother's murder of her birth mother, and reclaiming all power. At the same time, she heals Shen Zhiyan's deeply craving for love, and Shen Zhiyan, with his absolute loyalty and all his wealth, becomes her strongest support. Ultimately, having avenged her family, Yun Lan resolves her inner conflicts, and she and Shen Zhiyan conceive a new life together, transforming from rivals to a loving couple who reign supreme side by side.

与他共枕 | "Sharing a Pillow with Him"

Xie Yu Wang, Liu Lan GeShang Yiran and Xu Mubai have been married for five years, and for five years they've been embroiled in conflict. One is aloof and arrogant, the other resilient and stubborn, seemingly carrying a knife within him. They loathe each other; when they meet, it's a disaster. Both Shang Yiran and Xu Mubai are from wealthy families; their marriage was a political alliance that forced two people who were already unwilling to be together. Forced relationships are never sweet. But perhaps, over time, a forced relationship can become bearable.
12点，需要接吻 | "12 O'Clock, We Need a Kiss"

She kisses a domineering CEO while drunk, and to break the curse, she repeatedly tries to get close to him, only to discover she has a severe phobia of dogs! To break the curse, she lives as a human by day and a dog by night. Their feelings gradually deepen during the day, and at night, the two embark on a series of hilarious and absurd adventures…

保镖先生，结个婚 | "Mr. Bodyguard, Let's Get Married"

In the process of protecting him, her original "repayment plan" transforms into a heartfelt romance.

Meanwhile, her devoted mother-in-law and sister-in-law advised her to be magnanimous. Su Jingnian suddenly realized the truth and slammed the table! But when it came to dealing with her scumbag ex-husband and his family, someone always seemed to be there to fetch her the tools and the knife – none other than her former nemesis, now the fourth most powerful man in Beijing's elite circles, Fu Shiqin.

他哄他的小可怜 | "He Coaxes His Little Darling"

Duan Mei Yang, Zhai Yi YingA sweet and delicate girl versus a ruthless, arrogant, and possessive school bully. Ten years ago, Xia Zhengqing's friend Si Jinghe murdered Xia Chen's parents in order to seize the Xia family's business, but Xia Chen survived. Ten years later, young Xia Chen, seeking revenge, impersonates the second young master of the Si family and enters the Si family. To exact revenge on the Si family, Xia Chen steals Si Wenyu's girlfriend, Sang Yuxia. Sang Yuxia resists time and time again, only to discover that the person who protected her all those years ago was actually Si Qingyan.*Thankfully, most of today's dramas are decent. It's not a waste of the stunning line-ups lol
越过灰烬拥抱你 | "Embracing You Across the Ashes"

Wang Yi Lei, Zhu Xiao XueJiang Wu grew up in the shadow of her father's disappearance due to debt, living under the constant threat of being pursued. Then she met Jiang Yan, a taciturn man always bearing scars. He took her in and protected her. Jiang Wu, however, was unaware of Jiang Yan's true identity. Two lonely souls drew closer, yet she could never see through the fog in his eyes. Until Lu Xiao's mission reached a critical stage, he left without a word, leaving only a letter and some money, making her "forget." Four years later, she was a reporter for Beicheng TV, while he, retired due to injury, opened a guesthouse called "Nianwu." Fate brought them together again—only then did she realize: all his concealment and rejections all those years had been a form of protection.
知言之语 | "Words of Wisdom "

Wu Tian Hao, Shi TongIntroverted Zhiyu, due to her mother's death and her stepfather's controlling nature, develops a flamboyant personality, "Zhiyan." After returning to China, Zhiyu becomes entangled in an ambiguous relationship with her former classmate, Qin Siyue, while Zhiyan develops an interest in Ding Zhuowen, a rock musician and childhood friend of her college best friend, He Zhaoran. Upon learning that the truth behind her mother's death is connected to her stepfather, Song Mingyuan, and her best friend He Zhaoran, Zhiyu unexpectedly discovers that Qin Siyue has been secretly gathering evidence and intelligence for her. With Qin Siyue's help, Zhiyu and Zhiyan's dual personalities join forces to uncover the truth, achieving self-redemption and finding love.
总裁的闪婚甜妻 | "The CEO's Sweet Wife After a Flash Marriage"

Hu Jia Hao, He Tian TianJiang Yuxing impersonates her twin sister, Jiang Chengyue, and enters into a whirlwind marriage with Huo Jixing, signing a one-year contract. Forced to fulfill the contract, Jiang Chengyue lives with Huo Jixing, who is posing as a freeloader. During this time, they experience many hilarious situations and gradually develop feelings for each other. Huo Jixing is actually the heir to the Huo Group and married to inherit shares, but is moved by Jiang Chengyue's sincerity. Jiang Yuxing's extravagant spending leads to trouble, and Huo Siye seizes power. Amidst these crises, the two work together to uncover the deception and resolve the crisis. Ultimately, Huo Jixing reveals his true identity, and the two fall in love, holding a wedding and finding true love...
吻在荆棘之上 | "Kiss on Thorns"

Liu Lan Bo, Jiang Wu HanTo save her family, Shen Nanzhi is forced to marry Jiang Haochen, the comatose young master of the Jiang family, in a marriage intended to bring good fortune. However, three years later, the Jiang family finds their biological son, Jiang Yi (Jiang Haochen and Jiang Yi were mistakenly identified), who turns out to be her former "substitute" lover, whom she had previously supported but then broke up with. The boy she once considered her "white moonlight" has returned with immense power and a possessive, obsessive nature, trapping her in a forbidden relationship with her uncle. Meanwhile, her former love interest, Lu Wenjing, returns with ulterior motives, attempting to use Shen Nanzhi to gain access to the Jiang family's resources. Her comatose husband, Jiang Haochen, awakens and immediately turns to the dark side. The truth about her childhood drowning rescue comes to light, and an unexpected pregnancy further deepens their relationship.
困兽与玫瑰 | "Trapped Beast and a Rose"

Ye Hao Ran, Guo Yu XiTo repay a massive debt, Jiang Baoci enters into a marriage of convenience with He Jingzhun, the heir to the He Group. Misunderstandings cause their relationship to deteriorate, with Jiang Baoci plotting her escape, while He Jingzhun harbors feelings for her but struggles to express them. Internal strife within the He family intensifies, and Jiang Baoci faces repeated hardships. He Jingzhun gradually realizes his feelings and embarks on a journey to win her back, punishing villains and protecting the mulberry orchard for her. After being framed and having a family conspiracy exposed, the two briefly separate, but ultimately join forces to expose the crimes of Ouyang Manlan and others, resolving all misunderstandings and obstacles, putting aside past entanglements, and reconciling, achieving a sweet and mutually redeeming love...
资本家小姐觉醒后揣孕肚追夫 | "The Capitalist's Daughter Awakens and Chases After Her Husband While Pregnant"

Li Zhuo Yang, Li HuanIn the 1970s, Wei Yuxuan, the daughter of a capitalist, awakens to her cannon fodder fate, knowing she will be framed by her half-sister Wei Yuan, who transmigrates into the book. She and the male lead, Xie Yanzhi, were originally happy, but after the Xie family was reported, the entire family was transferred to the Northwest for construction work. In the original story, she chose to divorce, resulting in her death during childbirth. Reborn, she decides to return to the Northwest pregnant to change her destiny.
一不小心变成闺蜜嫂子 | "Accidentally Becoming My Best Friend's Sister-in-Law"

Cao Tian Kai, He Tian TianSong Xi, drunk, mistook someone for someone else and woke up to find herself married to a handsome stranger, Jing Zhuo. Meanwhile, her best friend Zhang Hening was ranting about how fierce and old-fashioned her older brother was, and Song Xi nodded in agreement, secretly glad she'd stayed far away. But then she discovered that her whirlwind marriage husband, Jing Zhuo, not only called her "baby" at night but also showered her with affection in ways that were sickeningly sweet. Only when the truth was revealed did Song Xi realize that the devil she'd been avoiding was actually her doting husband. This marriage, which began with a misunderstanding, is full of unexpected charm and non-stop sweetness.
怀崽后，冷面厂长追着我宠 | "After Getting Pregnant, the Cold-Faced Factory Manager Pursues and Pampers Me"

Yang Yu Bin, Peng Dai DaiIn the 1980s, Bai Xiaotong, the most beautiful girl in a textile factory, unexpectedly awakens to find herself transmigrated into a cannon fodder female supporting character in a period novel. Destined to be killed by her cousin Hu Xiulan because she is pregnant with the villain Lu Ling's child, she tries to change her fate by hiding from Lu Ling while pregnant, intending to find the original male lead, Chen Xiangjun, to take her in. In reality, Lu Ling has secretly loved Bai Xiaotong for years. After learning of her pregnancy, he aggressively pursues her, repeatedly protecting her from Hu Xiulan's schemes, all of which are thwarted. Bai Xiaotong gradually discovers Lu Ling's deep affection and protection, realizing her own feelings and no longer running away.
诱她沦陷 | "Tempting Her to Fall"

Ma Qian Huan, Yu Xin YiShen Fuzhou is a playboy who manipulates people and betrays true feelings, while Jiang Chuyu is a seductive goddess who will stop at nothing to achieve her goals. She has broken with her father due to a painful past and grew up alone and adrift. By chance, Shen Fuzhou is deeply attracted to the charming and sophisticated Jiang Chuyu. To expose her sister Su Xia's true colors, Jiang Chuyu is willing to use herself as a bargaining chip, entering into a dangerous game with Shen Fuzhou. Both harbor their own agendas and proceed cautiously, and in this game where sincerity is the stake, the ultimate winner remains unknown...
黑莲花大小姐回归 | "The Black Lotus Young Lady Returns"

Ma Yi Yan, Wang Bin MingAs the heiress of a top conglomerate, Shan Zhiying is omnipotent. However, her soul is imprisoned by a system, forcing her to watch helplessly as her body is possessed by various suitors, humbly begging for their pity, becoming a pathetic and foolish person. After regaining control of her body, she vows to reclaim everything that was once hers. She wins the monthly exams, changing everyone's perception of her, and achieves legendary status in the music competition, gradually reclaiming her glory and status through her own abilities. However, to complete the conquest tasks assigned by the system, she must navigate between multiple top conglomerate heirs, gradually winning their hearts with her superb acting skills and cunning strategies.
恍若大梦一场 | "Like a Dream"

Shao Wei, Wang Yu JingA wealthy heiress, pregnant three years into her marriage, is devastated to learn her husband has died in a plane crash. Five years later, she discovers that not only is her "deceased husband" alive, but he has also returned with his mistress, causing the deaths of her and her daughter. Reborn, she vows to change her fate and plans to leave with her daughter before her husband's return. However, at this crucial moment, her husband returns with his lover, plunging her into a life-or-death crisis. Meanwhile, she discovers that her husband's actions in her previous life had a hidden story…
和相亲对象闪婚后，我被娇宠了 | "After a Flash Marriage with My Blind Date, I Was Pampered"

Jing Wen, Li Xue DanQin Wei meets the calm and reserved Guan Chengyun on a blind date. To fulfill their families' expectations, the two enter into a whirlwind marriage based on a contract. This relationship, which begins with a promise, gradually warms up in their daily interactions—he silently protects her, dispelling danger and gloom; she gently forgives and heals his past emotional wounds. Facing the turmoil of an ex's return, unexpected crises, and hidden feelings, the two go from testing each other to becoming steadfast in their commitment. From contractual partners to life-and-death companions, they break down barriers, confirming their feelings amidst stumbles and falls, ultimately transforming an unexpected marriage into a deeply moving legend of mutual devotion and lifelong companionship.
穿书后，我把男主撩成醋精 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Made the Male Lead Jealous"

Huang Shuai Shuai, Liu Xin YueLin Yan transmigrated into a novel as a wronged supporting female character with the same name. The original owner was infatuated with a scumbag and caused all sorts of trouble, not only ending up dying together with him but also dragging the Lin family down with her. When she transmigrated, she was throwing wine on Pei Yuan, the male lead in her arranged marriage. To avoid death and save her family, she was determined to tear apart the scumbag and push Pei Yuan away from his relationship with his "white moonlight." But despite her diligent efforts as a "helper," the plot went awry. Pei Yuan's gaze towards her became increasingly strange, turning him into a jealous man who wouldn't let go, and the legendary "white moonlight" also harbored hidden secrets. Lin Yan was dumbfounded; how come the plot wasn't what she expected?
重启 1994妈我回来了 | "Rebooting 1994: Mom, I'm Back"

Liu Jia Rui, Sun Qian Xun, Guo Ting TingDisappointed at work, Wang Gangan indirectly caused her mother He Chunhua's accidental death. Filled with remorse, she discovers she has traveled back in time to 1994, when she was 10 years old. In this life, Wang Gangan decides to stop regretting her past. Using her knowledge of the past, she easily gains He Chunhua's trust and integrates into the family as a "tutor." This time, Wang Gangan begins to help her mother rediscover her youthful dreams, doing everything she can to make her mother happy. During this process, the interactions between "young Wang Gangan" and He Chunhua allow her to see glimpses of her own and her mother's past from a different perspective.
到位好事翻倍 | "Good Things Double When You're in Place"

Zhang He, Jiang Xi RaoShu Huajun, a young man from a rural area who survives an accident, unexpectedly finds himself "bound to a Rejection System." He gains a stroke of good luck by refusing unreasonable demands! Faced with moral blackmail, scams, and emotional manipulation, he refuses everything, transforming himself from a despised disabled youth into a hero leading his village to prosperity. Refusing internal conflict and giving up, Shu Huajun's unwavering spirit brings him good fortune. Who says fate is predetermined? He's determined to turn things around on his own!
梨花欲谢人迟归 | "Pear Blossoms Are Fading, But the Person Returns Late"

Zhu Ao Yu, Wang Yu JingShen Li, an orphan girl suffering from a serious illness, was rescued by Gu Yanchi's family and received their utmost care. Years later, Gu Yanchi confessed his feelings to her, but then revealed that he had massacred the Gu family on the eve of their wedding, shocking the entire city. However, the truth was far more complex. It turned out that everything was a conspiracy by Ye Yun'er. Jealous of Shen Li and Gu Yanchi's relationship, she manipulated Shen Li into becoming a murder weapon by exploiting Gu Shizhen's guilt. Unexpectedly, Shen Li had already seen through her scheme, swallowed the Heart-Searching Gu, revealed the truth, exposed Ye Yun'er's crimes, and brought her to justice...
今天也没抓到我 | "They Didn't Catch Me Today After All"

Du Yu Ze, Sun Qian XunLu Hansu transmigrated to a time and space called the Great Zhao Dynasty. Many transmigrators had arrived before the Great Zhao Dynasty, exploiting information asymmetry to commit evil deeds and being regarded as monsters by the locals. The Great Zhao Dynasty then established the Surveillance Bureau specifically to capture these transmigrators. Lu Hansu's new identity after transmigrating was that of a scribe in the Surveillance Bureau, responsible for recording the interrogations of transmigrators. Her superior, Xiao Jingheng, was the deputy commander of the Surveillance Bureau, who harbored extreme hatred for transmigrators because his parents had died as a result of their involvement in their deaths.
锦帐春深 | "Spring Deepens in the Brocade Tent"

Guo Jia Qi, Lin Qi TingTo avenge her husband, Song Yaozhi entered a brothel to learn seductive arts and seduce Crown Prince Zhao Xuance. However, she fell in love with him during their time together and stole the Crown Princess position from her enemy, Bai Ningshuang. Just as her revenge was about to be complete, she discovered that her husband, Xiao Chongxuan, was still alive. Zhao Xuance deliberately distanced himself to protect her, causing her to misunderstand. She then faked her own death with Xiao Chongxuan to escape. Grief-stricken by the loss of his love, Zhao Xuance abandoned his position as Crown Prince to search for her, ultimately moving Song Yaozhi. Xiao Chongxuan chose to let her go, and the two finally spent the rest of their lives together.
迟然盛放 | "Blooming Late"

Yan Gan, Ai Jiang ShanSheng Shuran was adopted by the Fu family and developed a close sibling-like relationship with Chi Heng, the Fu family's illegitimate son. After an accidental encounter, she went abroad. Discovering that the deaths of her parents and Chi Heng's mother were all related to the Fu family, she resolved to return to China for revenge. Chi Heng, having already recognized his wealthy grandfather and learned the truth, plotted to force her back to China and expose the marriage deception. The two ultimately joined forces to seek revenge, realized their true feelings for each other, and finally got together.
阮阮吾妻 | "Ruan Ruan, My Wife"

Yang Yu Bin, Huang Yun YunRuan Nansheng, the heiress of a triad, marries into the Yan family under a false name to fulfill her mother's dying wish. On the surface, she is the dignified and virtuous owner of Xinghua Department Store, but in reality, she secretly controls influence in both the underworld and legitimate society. Within three years, she transforms the nearly bankrupt Xinghua Department Store into a leading business in Mucheng. Her husband, Yan Qingpei, returns from studying abroad with his pregnant stepsister, Ruan Yingying. The two conspire to force Ruan Nansheng to relinquish the company and her position as the legal wife. After experiencing betrayal from her family, the murder of her beloved cat, and the destruction of her mother's memorial tablet, Ruan Nansheng awakens to the truth. She forms an alliance with Yan Ting'an, the newly appointed commander who controls the military, and publicly divorces her husband to seize power.
长夜无眠尽相思 | "Sleepless Nights, Full of Longing"

Meng En, Wei Fan Shu, Shao Wei (RAW)Empress Shen Yuning had only been married a short time when Emperor Yan Junmo died in battle while leading his troops. To protect her unborn child, Shen Yuning, with the Empress Dowager as witness, divorced her deceased husband and married Yan Junmo's younger brother, Yan Junxing, who became Empress. Thus, she became Empress for two generations. Unexpectedly, seven years later, Yan Junmo, now honored as the Retired Emperor, miraculously returned from the dead, leading an army of 100,000. He demanded that the new Emperor Yan Junxing return his Empress. Faced with the drastically different loves of two emperors, what choice should Shen Yuning make?*Luo Zheng, Jin Ze, Yan Yixian and Zhang He has been focused on duanju lately. And now, even Meng En is entering the duanju scene too? It's getting crowded here
不住，竟成冷王心尖宠 | "I Couldn't Help It, I Became the Cold King's Beloved"

Guo Zhi Ming, Tian Yu Qing (RAW)After her rebirth, in order to protect the child in her womb, who was considered a "bastard," Murong Jiu willingly married the crippled Prince Ling, Jun Yuyan, using the promise of helping him regain his legs as leverage to seek protection. While helping Prince Ling, Cheng Jiu, fight against the Second Prince, the two gradually fell in love. Little did they know that the father of the "bastard" in Murong Jiu's womb was none other than the crippled prince who had been by her side day and night.
新婚热恋冰山媳妇超旺夫 | "Newlywed, Seemingly Cold But Incredibly Lucky Wife"

Li Jia Hao, Liu Miao Miao (RAW)Lin Fan, a master of traditional Chinese medicine, is betrayed and jilted at his wedding by his blind date Ye Shuqi and her younger brother Lin Yi. By chance, he impulsively marries Wei Zhihan, who has also been jilted. Lin Fan mistakenly believes Wei Zhihan is unemployed and impoverished, and resolves to work hard to support the family, unaware that she is the powerful head of the reclusive Wei Group. After their marriage, Lin Fan faces repeated difficulties and schemes from the Lin family and Lin Yi, but Wei Zhihan always silently protects him, fiercely defending him and helping him overcome crises. As they face adversity together, their initial sympathy gradually blossoms into genuine affection, creating a satisfying story of marriage of convenience that blossoms into love and revenge against those who betray them.

错揽星辰 | "Mistakenly Embracing the Stars"

Zuo Ming, Jin Ya NaJian Wu, an ordinary florist, is mistaken for the runaway fiancée of billionaire Fu Sijian on the day she registers her marriage and is forced into a whirlwind marriage. To save her life, she hides her identity as a renowned healer, but her talent shines through when she saves Fu's grandmother. Her former fiancé, now a scoundrel, falsely accuses her of trying to kill her after claiming kinship with Fu Sijian. Under Fu Sijian's protection, Jian Wu embarks on a glamorous journey to retaliate. Meanwhile, their contract marriage blossoms into a real-life romance. The mystery of Jian Wu's past also comes to light, and ultimately, Jian Wu and Fu Sijian clear up their misunderstandings and find happiness together.
喜欢你的声音 | "I Love Your Voice"

Charon, Liu XunWhen the gentle, blind, domineering CEO Qin Yan meets the cheerful, limping girl Xia Xiaoxiao, they are each other's saviors seven years ago. Seven years later, they meet again, and his heart recognizes her before he even realizes it. He is wealthy but blind, while she struggles in the mire. This time, he will seize that ray of light! He pursues her relentlessly with gentle affection, while she retreats step by step, falling deeper and deeper into his trap. Blindness and limping—we are a match made in heaven!
老公失忆后总想上位 | "My Husband Always Wants to Take Over After Losing His Memory "

Ma Shuo Qi, Zhou Jia YiThree years of a marriage of convenience felt like walking on thin ice. Wen Yiqiao always believed her husband only had eyes for his other half and despised her. She finally decided to divorce him, but on the day of the divorce, her aloof and domineering husband was in a car accident? When he opened his eyes, he cried out, "Baby, I'm your mistress!" Wen Yiqiao was devastated, but in their interactions, she discovered that he had secretly loved her all along! It was all his long-planned scheme…
戏嗅蔷薇 | "Playfully Smelling Roses"

Wang Jia Mao, Cao Sai YaQiangwei, originally a cold and ruthless female assassin, was coerced by Ye Jinghong into infiltrating the Ye family and becoming a tool in their power struggles. Her target, the eldest young master, turned out to be an upright and warm-hearted gentleman who had saved her life. She was caught in a web of temptation, unwilling to be ensnared, yet forced to seduce and manipulate him. Her conscience remained intact; she refused to become a viper in the gutter, but Ye Jinghong relentlessly pursued her. When she finally managed to escape, she suddenly discovered that the mastermind was none other than her beloved! Ye Jinghong, seemingly loyal, was actually a villain. Her pure heart was tainted, and the world crumbled in an instant. But all the conspiracies had already been laid; could everything be reversed?
暗恋你，我也是 | "I Secretly Love You Too"

Min Xing Han, Wu Jia LuMeng Shiyi had a crush on someone for many years, who was her brother's best friend. He Xilou, a notoriously arrogant and dissolute man at Imperial University, had dated so many ex-girlfriends that they could circle the entire campus. At first, he smiled nonchalantly: "Don't worry, it's just my friend's sister, I won't touch her." Meng Shiyi still couldn't believe she would actually date He Xilou; it was an unattainable girlish dream. Just as she was blushing and her heart was pounding from his advances, she unexpectedly heard He Xilou's indifferent voice: "Just playing around with a little girl, I'm not really serious." Meng Shiyi then realized that a playboy would never change. But later, He Xilou became insanely jealous. Late at night, he cornered her against a wall, his eyes slightly red, and kissed her: "Baby, give me another chance..." "In the next life, let me have a crush on you, okay?"
最后一次晚安 | "The Last Goodnight"

Zhang Xuan, Zheng Chen Yu, Li Bo Yan (Li Bai Yan)Five years ago, Qiao Lu, the daughter of a billionaire, made a promise with her family that she would bring Shen Mingyang, the second male lead, home to meet them once he achieved success in his career. However, on her daughter's birthday, on her way home to meet Shen Mingyang, she and her daughter were in a car accident. In despair, she watched helplessly as her husband and his mistress, Cheng Yalan, drove past her. Her daughter died prematurely due to delayed medical attention. With her hopes shattered, she finally, with the help of the top lawyer Gu Yubai and her doting brother Qiao Yi'an, bravely divorced Shen Mingyang, making her scheming mistress, her scumbag ex-husband, and her materialistic mother pay the price.
少夫人不好惹 | "The Young Mistress is Not to be Trifled With"

Du Pei Yuan, Yu Jia LinFu Yuyao lived a flamboyant and carefree life, but her peace was shattered by the Mu family's marriage proposal. Learning that the proposal was motivated by a desire for the family fortune, she decided to heed her mother's advice and marry into the Mu family, hoping to sabotage the family's plans and make them suffer the consequences. Fu Yuyao already had a notorious reputation, and Mu Jingchuan, forced into the marriage by his grandfather, devised a scheme to sabotage it, hoping Fu Yuyao would break off the engagement. However, she didn't play by the rules, not only failing to fall for his trick but also nearly forcing herself on him. Unable to break off the engagement, Mu Jingchuan had no choice but to marry her first, planning to find a solution later. Unexpectedly, in their repeated interactions, their relationship grew closer, eventually turning their fake marriage into a real one.
以爱为刃 | "Using Love as a Blade"

Liu San Si, Xun Yin Xi, Zhang Jia MingPei Jinglan was framed by her sister Pei Xuerou and several powerful figures, and unjustly imprisoned for five years. After her release, she returns as the representative of the Louis Group, vowing to reclaim everything and exact revenge on Pei Xuerou and her cronies—investment banking elite Zhou Xushen, e-sports star Jiang Jin, and the mysterious powerful figure Shen Baichuan. In this game full of temptation and intrigue, she navigates between her former lover Bo Jin and her targets, carefully plotting and uncovering layers of conspiracy. Ultimately, she reveals the truth, makes her enemies pay the price, and finds herself again amidst the vortex of love and revenge.

深情诱哄，撩她入怀 | "Deeply Enticing and Coaxing, Winning Her Over"- Pan Yi Shan, Kang Yu QianWen Nian and Qin Yan were childhood sweethearts, betrothed since childhood. Only after marriage did Wen Nian discover that Qin Yan had a first love, Bai Xixi, whom he considered his "white moonlight." After marriage, Qin Yan ignored Wen Nian and frequently had affairs with other women. On their wedding anniversary, Qin Yan accompanied Bai Xixi, who had returned to China to secure entertainment industry opportunities, leaving Wen Nian alone. Completely heartbroken, Wen Nian decided to divorce. Ji Chen, who had long coveted Wen Nian, created an opportunity to have a relationship with her, further solidifying Wen Nian's resolve to divorce. After discovering hickeys on Wen Nian's clothes, Qin Yan impulsively divorced her. After the divorce, Qin Yan tried to win Wen Nian back, but Ji Chen seized the opportunity and had a whirlwind marriage with her. The two gradually developed feelings for each other.
死对头他总想对我贴贴 | "My Nemesis Always Wants to Get Close to Me"

Geng Zhi Xin, Zhang Xu HanCollege student Yu Yingying suffers unexpected amnesia and mistakes her rival Jiang He for her boyfriend. Jiang He, a wealthy heir, finds this amusing and goes along with it, pretending to be her boyfriend. In their hilarious daily interactions, the two overcome past barriers and gradually develop feelings for each other, only to face deliberate obstruction from Jiang He's childhood sweetheart and strong opposition from their families due to their different social statuses. Faced with the gap in their social standing and long-buried misunderstandings, they must unravel the mystery of the amnesia while overcoming numerous obstacles. Can this relationship, which began as a misunderstanding, overcome these obstacles and blossom into a mutual and genuine love?
重生大小姐放肆狂！忠犬保镖保驾护航 | "Reborn Heiress's Arrogance! Loyal Bodyguards Protect Her"

Yu Hao Xin, Lu Zi Xuan"Please, love me!" Han Shining opened her eyes to hear her loyal bodyguard professing his love for her, begging her not to marry the scumbag. In her past life, she was tricked by her cheating husband into impersonating her savior. The first thing Han Shining did after being reborn was to make him lose everything. She then eloped with her madly in love bodyguard, living a shameless and sweet life together, leaving her cheating husband tormented and regretful every night!
寒门凤鸣 | "Phoenix Soars from a Humble Abode"

Yang Teng, Zhou Jing XiangIn her past life, Jiang Ruchu, an orphan from a poor family, helped her husband Huo Yanzhou achieve fame through the imperial examinations but was cruelly abandoned. Reborn, she resolves to become the top scholar herself. At a poetry gathering at Huo's mansion, she publicly annuls her engagement and eloquently recites poems, attracting the attention of Zhou Changji. Zhou Changji, filled with hatred for his father, the Prime Minister, for abandoning his mother and accepting bribes, disguises himself as an advisor to the Emperor, intending to groom Jiang Ruchu to become the top scholar and use her for his own purposes. After entering Yun Chuan Academy, facing betrayal from classmates and examination fraud, Jiang Ruchu steadfastly upholds her ideals, using her intelligence and resilience to overcome crises, gradually revealing her brilliance, and ultimately becoming the first female top scholar of the dynasty.
老公是小绿植，没关系我是园丁 | "My Husband is a Little Green Plant, No Problem, I'm the Gardener"

Tang Ming Yang, Qi LeChu Ciyou wakes up to find herself transmigrated into the body of an unlucky female protagonist in a novel, nearly dying on the spot. To protect herself, Chu Ciyou hides in the hospital room of Huo Tingchen, a man in a vegetative state, only to unexpectedly hear his innermost thoughts and end up marrying him. The two fall in love after an arranged marriage, slap the villain in the face, and their relationship blossoms through playful banter, ultimately achieving success in both their careers and love lives.
进城当天忠犬老公领回家 | "My Loyal Husband Was Bringed Home on the Day I Arrived in the City"

Zhong Jia Hao, Jiang Chu WeiTo fulfill his grandmother's dying wish, Wang Ye, a dog demon from Fengyuan Village, enters a human city and inadvertently saves Wei Zhixue, a female CEO who is being harassed. A mistakenly sent marriage invitation leads to a "contract marriage" between the two. When he faces ostracism at work, she silently protects him; when she faces difficulties, he secretly helps her using his demonic talents. When a battle for inheritance turns family members against each other, when an evil Taoist's conspiracy endangers everyone's lives, when he controls Wei Xingming and seizes control of the Wei Group, when Wei Zhixue is pregnant and kidnapped, and when Old Master Wei suffers a stroke, Wang Ye, to protect his loved ones, is willing to reveal his true form—his identity as a dog demon can no longer be hidden.
心机夫人的一百层套路 | "The Scheming Wife's Hundred Layers of Tricks"

Gu Ming, Lin Jia HuiZhou Fuxuan, an orphan, unexpectedly becomes pregnant with the child of wealthy tycoon Pei Yanche in her struggle for survival. Six years later, she moves into the Pei family home with her child, only to be met with Pei Yanche, who has returned from the dead and suffers from amnesia. To protect her hard-won life, she pretends to be his former lover, carefully navigating every step of the way, only to find herself facing the crisis of her true identity being exposed and surrounded by rivals. A power struggle of love and lies within the wealthy family quietly unfolds.
南风知我意迟迟 | "The South Wind Knows My Heart's Delay"

Gu Le Chen, Wang Yun FeiTo save her grandmother, Shen Yi was coerced by her stepmother into marrying Gu Nanfeng, a disabled man from the Gu family, in place of her sister. She deliberately disguised herself as ugly, but Gu Nanfeng discovered her deception. Needing a shield against his family's pressure to marry and also attracted to her, Gu Nanfeng kept her. During their time together, feelings gradually developed between them. Shen Yi went from being indifferent to actively caring for him, and Gu Nanfeng also became protective of her. Facing crises such as her stepmother's framing, her sister's covetousness, and a family power struggle, Shen Yi revealed her identity as a divine healer, curing her grandmother's and Gu Nanfeng's leg ailments and psychological trauma. Gu Nanfeng, in turn, helped her escape the Shen family and secure her position as the matriarch.
月染青川 | "Moon Dyed Green River"

Sun Zi Hang, Luo YiAfter Warlord Fu Qingchuan's girlfriend, Meng Nanxi, was in a car accident, he adopted her younger sister, Meng Wangyue. At Wangyue's 18th birthday party, she confessed her feelings to Fu Qingchuan in front of everyone, only to be harshly rejected. Fu Qingchuan, drunk, mistook Meng Yue for Nanxi and passionately kissed her. Upon sobering up, he was filled with regret and immediately arranged a marriage with the eldest daughter of the Rong family. Wangyue's serious illness made Fu Qingchuan realize that he also loved her, and the two finally overcame all obstacles to be together.
我等晨光等风来 | "Waiting for the Morning Light and the Wind"

Liu Chen Yu, Zhu Yu TongWen Yu, whose family has fallen on hard times, works odd jobs to raise money for her mother's medical expenses, only to reunite with her first love, Song Qingshu, at a club. Seven years ago, the two broke up due to a misunderstanding and family feud. Now, their social statuses are vastly different, and Song Qingshu, driven by revenge, relentlessly pursues her, yet their entanglement leads to a rekindling of their old feelings. Facing repeated attempts to frame her by Li Wanzhuo, the gentle protection of Meng Dongting, and the truth behind her parents' wrongful conviction, the two endure life-or-death trials, clear up misunderstandings, ultimately expose the corruption, bring justice to the family, and finally become a couple after weathering the storm.
我靠腹中萌宝，成为人间富贵花 | "I Become a Wealthy Flower in the World by Relying on My Adorable Baby"

Li Hao, Li Jing Ye (RAW)Su Feifei, an honest and simple country girl, unexpectedly encounters Gu Qishan, a wealthy heir from Beijing's elite circles, while interning at a hotel. They have a relationship. Because she is highly fertile, she becomes pregnant with Gu Qishan's child. Initially, at the urging of her best friend Lin Weiwei, Su Feifei considers having an abortion. However, she unexpectedly hears the voice of her unborn child and learns that in her previous life, she listened to Lin Weiwei, not only refusing the help of the Gu family, the richest family in the world, but also causing a huge conflict with them, resulting in her and her child going hungry and cold, and ultimately dying tragically. Hearing her baby's voice, Su Feifei resolves to change her fate in this life.

为她悸动 |"My Heart Flutters for Her"

怀上死对头的崽后我上位了 | "I Rose to Power After Getting Pregnant with My Nemesis's Child"

A grand historical drama blending intrigue, destiny, and bittersweet romance is about to begin!

Knowing he was dying, Xu Ziwang chose to continue hiding the truth. After paying off his last three debts of fifty thousand each, he decided to go somewhere Li Yingxue couldn't find him to die alone. After staying with her, he gradually breaks down her defenses with his gentle care, but their affair is accidentally discovered by Wen Jinchu's stepmother, Lin Wanqing. Lin Wanqing, for her own benefit, forces Wen Jinchu to get engaged to the playboy school heartthrob Jiang Wenzhe. Gu Zechuan pretends to be her boyfriend to help her out, and the two begin a "contractual relationship." As they spend time together, Gu Zechuan's thoughtfulness and the scent of mint subtly touch Wen Jinchu's heartstrings, while Jiang Wenzhe secretly plots, faking an engagement party to force Wen Jinchu to submit.

青山乍见欢＆他的小欢喜 | "A Glimpse of Green Hills & His Little Joy"

Liu Lan Bo, Mo NingBusiness legend Shen Yuqing suffers a drastic personality change after becoming disabled in an accident. One day, he encounters the vibrant Song Tinghuan, who bursts into his world with enthusiasm, breaking down his closed-off defenses with her unique directness and warmth. Song Tinghuan takes him to amusement parks, to dine and dash, creates a secret garden, and celebrates his birthday together, deepening their bond. They even team up to disrupt the villain's engagement party. A light kiss after an unexpected fever breaks the ambiguity and sparks mutual testing. This accidental encounter ultimately transforms into a sweet and loving romance of mutual redemption. Through companionship, they become each other's little joys.
还是很爱她 | "Lost and Found"

Shen Hao Nan, Wen Mo Yan [23 Episodes]Si Qing Ye, the president of the Si Group, and Ning Wu Hui part ways due to a misunderstanding. Pregnant and alone, Ning loses all her memories after giving birth and becomes a single mother. Seven years later, they reunite and gradually rediscover their feelings, resolving past misunderstandings and embarking on a journey toward a joyful life as a family of four.(Aired: Oct 25, 2024 - Nov 9, 2024)
繁欢 | "Lust and Lies"

Zhang Ting Rui, Ke Ying [24 Episodes]After a twist of fate, street orphan Ruan Fei Fei assumes the identity of a famed courtesan and enters the prestigious Huo family, transforming into the heiress Huo Qing Wan. Determined to seek revenge, she maneuvers through a web of power and deception while becoming embroiled in a fierce, emotionally charged relationship with the commanding young marshal, Huo Xiu.(Aired: Sep 15, 2025 - Sep 23, 2025)
家里家外 | "Sweet Home"

Wang Dao Tie, Sun Yi RanIn the early 1980s, a devastating flood in Sichuan and Chong Qing unites engineer Chen Hai Qing and factory worker Cai Xiao Yan. As they build a new life together, their blended family navigates the challenges of a changing era with love and resilience.(Aired: Mar 14, 2025)
予你岁岁欢好 | "May You Have Joy Year After Year"

Yang Han, Li Xi WeiXia Qiao, a top-scoring student from the mountains, came to Jinghai City to pursue her dreams at Peking University. However, a case of school bullying ruined everything. Workplace harassment? Deception by her ex-boyfriend? Then, Lu Shiyan appeared out of nowhere, and the powerful bowed down for love. He said, "Let me be your stepping stone. Use everything I have to climb higher and bring you joy year after year!" A tribute—all dreams will come true!
家里家外2 | "Sweet Home 2"

Wang Dao Tie, Sun Yi Ran, Duan Mei Yang, Wang Pei Yan, Zhao Ting Yi, Deng Ling ShuThe first season won over countless fans with its authentic period setting and positive energy. There were no superhuman talents or unexpected windfalls; it simply depicted the down-to-earth lives of ordinary people. Cai Xiaoyan's daring and enterprising spirit, Chen Haiqing's sense of responsibility, and the mutual support among neighbors were all incredibly touching. This time, the production team has put even more effort into the production, using real locations to recreate the old Chongqing street scenes. The original local dialect adds to the immersive experience. Get ready for an immersive viewing experience!*This is more touching than the 1st season. And the duration is 5 and half hour, so the file size is big and I have to split it into 2 parts.
假孕成真 | "Fake Pregnancy Becomes Real"

Hu Jia Hao, Pu Yu TongOn the night the real heiress He Yan was brought back to her wealthy family, she was ambushed by the fake heiress He Yiyi, who kidnapped the young master of the Beijing elite seeking medical treatment to obtain the antidote. Bo Siheng, born with a cold poison, only had three months to live. The He and Bo families had an arranged marriage, and the He family, unwilling to let their adopted daughter marry such a sickly man, forced He Yan to marry in his place. He Yan's master, a renowned medicine doctor, suddenly disappeared. To find him, He Yan decided to marry into the Bo family, hoping to use their influence to locate her master. Unexpectedly, Bo Siheng turned out to be the man who had given her the antidote that night.
战爷，云小姐她忽然不傻了 | "Master Zhan, Miss Yun Suddenly Isn't Stupid Anymore"

Wang Hao Xiang, Wu Jia LuYun Wei, the capable CEO of the Yun Corporation, enjoys a happy family life. After a car accident, she discovers that her supposed fiancé is actually her stepfather's illegitimate son. The two conspired to steal everything from her and even planned to send her to a mental hospital. Unwilling to accept this betrayal, Yun Wei hires bodyguards and fights back against the scumbags, vowing to reclaim everything that is rightfully hers.
锦绣深宅 | "The Splendid Mansion"

Song Yu Bo, Wang Xing ChenIn Shanghai in 1936, Shen Muyao, the eldest daughter of the Shen family, returned to China disguised as her brother, Shen Mu'an, to protect her mother and avenge her brother. She cut her hair and bound her chest. She won a Suzhou embroidery competition with her exquisite gold-embroidery skills and entered the design department of her family's "Jinxiu" business, secretly investigating the truth. At work, she integrated traditional Suzhou embroidery into modern designs, and gradually developed feelings for Gu Yanzhi, the design director who repeatedly helped her. Facing repeated betrayals and attacks from Bai Ruowei and her son, the two overcame difficulties together, and Shen Mu'an finally revealed his true identity. After gradually gaining power, she cleared her mother's name, revitalized the family business, and allowed Suzhou embroidery to shine again in the new era. Together with Gu Yanzhi, she achieved both business success and love.
玄学大佬爱吃瓜 | "The Metaphysical Master Loves Gossip"

Zheng Ji Yuan, Zhang Zi LinTo overcome her impending doom, the esoteric master Shu Wan, under her master's guidance, unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a resentful woman in a wealthy family, just as the original owner is about to divorce her husband, Duan Sinian. Shu Wan immediately recognizes that Duan Sinian possesses the pure Yang body her master spoke of, and is a person of great merit who can help her overcome her tribulation. Therefore, she cleverly saves her marriage. In the Duan family, she indulges in gossip, but her thoughts are overheard by the family members, who use these thoughts to resolve various family crises. Shu Wan also uses her metaphysical abilities and wisdom to help the Duan family resolve crises. To facilitate her own early cultivation with Duan Sinian, she heals his leg, while also uncovering many hidden secrets.
许你顾盼生辉 | May You Shine Brightly"

Ou Jing Xiao, Sun Yi RanTo reclaim her family fortune, Xu Xia Nian is forced into a marriage with He Shao Yong, only to unexpectedly reunite with her first love, Gu Jian Chuan, only to discover he has become He Shao Yong's nephew and assistant. Xu Xia Nian attempts to use their past relationship to break the deadlock, but unexpectedly uncovers He Shao Yong's secret. He Shao Yong frames her, triggering a crisis of trust between the male and female leads. Xu Xia Nian joins forces with Gu Jian Chuan to bring Li Ming Zhang to justice, breaking He Shao Yong's prison of hatred. Xu Xia Nian and Gu Jian Chuan finally achieve reconciliation through love and redemption.
你听起来很美 | "You Sound Beautiful"

Zhang Yong Bo, Chen Yang Ting DanHan Na, despite her unattractive appearance and heavy weight of 200 pounds, possesses a naturally beautiful voice. She earns a living as a secretive resident singer in bars. Meng Wensheng, the president of an entertainment company, unexpectedly encounters Han Na, helps her out of a difficult situation at the bar, and, impressed by her singing, gives her his company's business card. Han Na excitedly tells her fiancé, Lin Shangjun, only to discover she's been tricked. The demo he promised to submit to Han Na has been made into a wildly popular hit song by the famous actress Xu Yamei. Han Na decides to lose weight and successfully transforms herself.
糙汉媳妇：捡个学霸老公发家致富 | "Rough-Hearted Wife: Picking Up a Top Student Husband and Getting Rich"

Shu Xiang Jun, Luo Mai YiSong Nianchu, the female CEO of a listed company, unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of an orphan girl with superhuman strength in a small fishing village in the 1970s. Because no one dares to marry her, her original father appears in her dreams every night, urging her to go on blind dates. She encounters Mu Shi'an, a capitalist's son who has been sent to the countryside and a cold, aloof researcher. Attracted by his appearance and voice, she quickly marries him after he agrees to let her marry into his family. After marriage, Song Nianchu, with her modern thinking and business acumen, leads the villagers to establish a factory, develop a net-weaving machine, and sell specialty canned goods. She not only resolves the Mu family's crisis, but also transforms her contractual marriage with Mu Shi'an into a deep and loving relationship.
伪装保镖后，小作精又争又抢 | "After Disguising Himself as a Bodyguard, the Little Darling Fights and Snatches"

Liu Hao Zhe, Xu Han LinBetrayed by her fiancé, Bo Xizhou, Si Tangtang, after drinking, has a relationship with her bodyguard, Gu Yanshen. To get revenge on Bo Xizhou, she signs a six-month secret marriage agreement with Gu Yanshen, unaware of his mysterious identity and hidden unlimited black card and immense wealth. During their time together, Gu Yanshen's protectiveness and deep affection gradually move Si Tangtang. Meanwhile, the entanglement between Bo Xizhou and his admirer, Jiang Chuning, the pressure from the Si family, and Gu Yanshen's past secrets and true identity (CEO of ST Group, a wealthy young man from Kyoto) all surface. After experiencing kidnapping, misunderstandings, family conspiracies, and life-or-death trials, the two resolve all their inner conflicts. Si Tangtang recognizes her feelings, overcomes the gap in their social status and past traumas, and stays with Gu Yanshen.
