碰瓷将军成了我的止痛药 | "The Accident-Piercing General Became My Painkiller"

Chen Guan Yi, Chai Hui XinSong Xiaoqing was diagnosed with brain cancer and given only three months to live. Distraught in the hospital corridor, she bumped into Gu Yunshan, who had unexpectedly traveled from the Song Dynasty. Gu Yunshan followed Song Xiaoqing because of the bracelet on her wrist, which he believed was the reason for his journey to the modern world. Later, Song Xiaoqing nearly had a car accident due to dizziness while driving, but Gu Yunshan saved her. Miraculously, Song Xiaoqing's headache would disappear whenever she had physical contact with Gu Yunshan, so she took him home. As they spent time together, their feelings deepened. A hermit told Gu Yunshan that "jade may shatter, but tile may remain whole"—if he broke the bracelet, Song Xiaoqing might be reborn, but the price would be Gu Yunshan's complete disappearance from the world.
他偏要强求 | "He Insists on Forcing It"

Hu Chu Yan, Lin Jia HuiSix years ago, Jiang Suisui became pregnant with Pei Yanqing's child but was forced by her grandmother to enter into a marriage of convenience with Zhao Qi. Four years after their divorce, she reunited with Pei Yanqing at her grandmother's funeral. To protect her child and the Pei family's reputation, Jiang Suisui concealed her daughter Yuanyuan's true parentage. Pei Yanqing, targeting the Zhao family, pressured her to return to the family, but was misunderstood as deeply in love with Zhao Qi. Zhao Qi threatened her with the child's parentage, triggering Pei Yanqing's revenge. Jiang Suisui's attempt to take her daughter abroad failed, and she was forcibly brought back to the Pei family by Pei Yanqing. The paternity test was fabricated by Jiang Suisui's friend, but Madam Pei noticed something amiss and joined forces with Cheng Shuyi to put pressure on her. Yuanyuan suddenly developed a blood disease, and the truth about her parentage was revealed.
女帅惊华，朝堂之上尽风流 | "A Stunning Female General, Her Elegance Captivating the Court"

Zhou Qian, Shang Yu QianBai Xuan transmigrates into the body of an unmarried princess humiliated by enemy forces. She burns the Wei army's supplies and uses a marriage pact to bring down the aloof and powerful Prince Xiao of the Great Zhou Dynasty, joining forces to repel the enemy and find a cure. She confronts corrupt officials who embezzle military funds, foils a prince's coup attempt, seizes control of the Imperial Guard, and repeatedly averts crises as a woman! She is appointed by the emperor as the first female head of the Imperial Guard, bringing glory to her family!
重逢前男友后，被宠入怀 | "Reunited With My Ex-Boyfriend, I'm Pampere in His Arms"

Zhao Guan Yu, Yao Yu ChenFour years ago, Qiao Xu, pressured by the family of her wealthy boyfriend Xu Si'an, experienced the loss of her father, suffered from depression, and resolutely left with her dog. Four years later, she became the secretary of Xuxing Group, and her newly appointed boss was none other than her ex-boyfriend whom she had "dumped." In public, he was a stoic CEO, but in private, he transformed into a devoted husband chasing after her. When the truth from four years ago came to light, Xu Si'an stood resolutely by her side, determined to protect her for life, even if it meant going against the entire world.
她不是坏女孩 | "She's Not a Bad Girl"

Huang You Tian, Jiang Shi QiThis is a thrilling story that blends suspense, revenge, business intrigue, and romance. Centered on the search for the truth behind her mother's death, it peels back the layers to reveal the conspiracies, sins, and human struggles within a prominent family. The protagonist, Su Youwei, in her struggle to break free from her constraints and seek the truth, transforms from a lonely rebel into someone who gains love and support, ultimately achieving self-redemption and growth, and finding true love.

炙热之恋 | "Burning Love"- Wang Hao Xiang, Zhang Yi YueSu Qianchong had a crush on Bo Sinian for ten years and finally married him, only to be misunderstood and rejected by Bo Sinian due to Bai Lu's machinations. Suffering from terminal stomach cancer, she faked her death after the divorce. Three years later, the amnesiac Su Qianchong returned with Jin Hang. Bo Sinian suddenly realized his mistake and embarked on a tumultuous journey to win her back. During this time, Su Qianchong gradually uncovered the truth behind Bai Qi's death and exposed Bai Lu's misdeeds. She unexpectedly became pregnant with Bo Sinian's child, and her pregnancy was revealed at their wedding. Bo Sinian fiercely protected his wife, while Jin Hang chose to step aside. After many trials and tribulations, Su Qianchong let go of the past and was saved by Bo Sinian during a dangerous childbirth. Ultimately, the two resolved their differences and formed a happy family with their child.
路人甲的我，拐走捡垃圾吃的男主 | "Me, an Ordinary Passby, Kidnaps the Male Lead Who Eats Garbage"

Feng Zi Zou, Fang Si ChangModern-day office worker Lin Xin transmigrates into a minor character in a campus romance novel. Unexpectedly unlocking the comment function, she discovers that the down-on-his-luck boy Tang Zhou is a future billionaire. She decisively rescues and takes Tang Zhou in, helping him return to school and escape his wicked foster mother. Spending their days together, the two develop feelings for each other, ignoring the original female lead (who is also a transmigrator), joining hands to break free from the plot's constraints, ultimately confirming their feelings and taking control of their lives together.
女配修改一个字，全员崩了 | "The Female Supporting Character Changes One Word, and the Whole Cast Collapses"

Qiu Zhe Fu, Hou Meng YaoYe Xiao transmigrates into a novel as a villainous supporting female character, possessing the cheat ability to modify a single word of the original work. However, she is unaware that her true feelings can be heard by her family. While following the plot, Ye Xiao pranks the original male and female leads, and during this time, she meets Gu Yan, who has been reborn. The chaotic plot unfolds in an unbelievable way. Adapted from the novel "The Supporting Female Character Modifies One Word, and Everyone's Character Collapses," by the author "Catching Stars Sheep."
盛总，您的软肋又在闹了 |"Mr. Sheng, Your Achiles Heel is Acting Up Again"

Lin Xiao, Zhang Xu HanWei Sichu and Sheng Fang are drawn to each other's qualities and quickly develop feelings for one another. A passionate pursuit and a tug-of-war of ambiguity unfold, as they face external challenges and mutual testing in their relationship, yet they remain drawn closer. Can this love, which began with a spark and is devoted to each other, withstand all the unknown trials and remain a sweet and lasting bond?
重生后我被摄政王逼着养崽 | "After Rebirth, I Was Forced to Raise a Child by  the Regent"

Wu Zhu Xi, Wu Jia Lu"Your Highness, yesterday the Princess Consort stewed the Imperial Concubine's favorite koi." The prince flipped through the book in his hand. "Send a few more to the Princess Consort, lest she run out of food." "Your Highness, the Princess Consort kicked the little princess into the water." The prince didn't even look up. "Does the Princess Consort need to do such a thing? Next time, let her jump in herself." "Your Highness, the Princess Consort has run away with your son." The prince finally stood up. "Your Highness, are you going to arrest the Princess Consort?" "Issue my order: issue a warrant for the young prince's arrest! Daring to abduct my wife, I will break his legs!"
误惹成欢 | "Accidentaly Provoking Joy"

Ma Hao Dong, Yu CongBan Yao, seemingly a docile concubine's daughter in a noble family, has suffered ten years of bullying from her elder sister and mistress, and was even forced by her own father to marry the rumored tyrannical and perverted Prince An. To break free from this predicament, she reveals her claws and schemes step by step, seducing the mysterious masked man Xiao Jingci into falling in love. Using his power, she escapes Prince An and eliminates her elder sister and mistress one by one. Little did she know that beneath the mask lies Prince An, whom she desperately wanted to avoid! A power struggle that begins with manipulation and escalates into a tug-of-war between two strong individuals officially begins, entangled in a destiny of fate.
惑君心 | "Feeling Your Heart"

Liu Yi Long, Qi LeModern makeup artist Zhou Qianqian suddenly dies and is reborn as an orphan in ancient times. Her makeup bag is connected to a modern warehouse, providing an unlimited supply of cosmetics. Using her superb makeup and disguise skills, she transforms her rouge shop into a "bride's dream workshop," determined to achieve financial freedom. She unexpectedly saves Qi Yanzhou, a founding general who has been framed, helping him escape danger through deception, only to be forced into marriage at his own risk. The two engage in a hilarious chase and a battle of wits, working together to break through obstacles and develop feelings for each other.
前夫将我送人，我媚撩督主登凤位 | "My Ex-Husband Gave Me Away, I Seduced the Eunuch and Ascended the Throne"

Li Jing Ze, Jin Ya NaShen Jiaotang's life begins in hell—her scumbag husband, in order to marry a princess, caused the execution of her entire family and sent her to a den of wolves for a miserable death. Reborn, she possesses a natural allure and sets her sights on Yin Zhun, the powerful eunuch of the Eastern Depot. "Eunuch, shall we cooperate? I'll help you cure your poison, and you help me kill." She schemes step by step, seducing him, using him, and trusting him, from the wife of the Grand Secretary to the future Empress. He appears cold and ruthless, yet he protects her from danger time and time again; it turns out that even this living devil is willing to give his life when he falls in love. In this life, she will tear apart all her enemies and, together with Yin Zhun, ascend to the highest peak.
风雨误春光＆七年寒鸢 | "The Wind and Rain Mistake Springtime"

Quan Pei Lun, Fang LeiMaid Yun Yuan and the Ninth Prince Xie Qingyan lived a life of dependence on each other in the Cold Palace. Xie Qingyan was nearing the end of his life. Yun Yuan, disregarding her dignity, begged the Crown Prince to send Physician Jiang to transfer the poison from Xie Qingyan's body into her own. Seven years later, Xie Qingyan had been freed from the poison and became a revered general! When Yun Yuan reappeared before Xie Qingyan as a dancer, she was already dying and had to conceal the truth. Xie Qingyan, torn by love and hate because of the betrayal of years past, was able to unravel the mystery and redeem Yun Yuan.
转角再遇他 | "Meeting Him Again at The Corner"

Lu Xiang Shan, Jiang Jun HanIn her past life, Su Ruoli, who lived with her grandmother due to poverty, was brutally abused and died by a scumbag boyfriend. Reborn, she gained the Reborn System, which not only allows her to communicate with people from the future but also lets her earn money by solving their past problems. She diligently completes missions to redeem others and avoids revenge on her past boyfriend, but unexpectedly receives a mission from the school bully from her previous life, who refuses to leave her side! Is it even possible to continue this mission?
饥荒开局，我用空间娇养王爷 | "Famine Begins, I Use My Space to Pamper the Prince"

Li Jin Chen, Zhao Mu YanIn a post-apocalyptic world, Major General Su Ying is framed as a wicked woman who colludes with a scumbag husband to bully a child sharing the same name. On the road to exile, resources are scarce. Su Ying possesses a vast storage space containing millions of resources. Her husband and child have a terrible impression of her. Su Ying kills a white tiger, punishes her husband, rescues her child from the clutches of exiles, successfully turning the tide and changing everyone's perception of her. Adapted from "I Pamper the War God and the Crippled King with Billions in Resources" by Ting Chan.
系统逼我当红娘，影帝却想和我组CP | "The System Forced Me to Be a Matchmaker, But the Movie Emperor Wanted to Be My Partner"

Wang Sheng Lin, Ding Zi HanQiao Xi is bound to a truth-telling system and transmigrates into the body of a fake heiress in a tragic novel. Her mission is to guide the villain, Yu Sinian, to fall in love with the original female lead, leveling up through shock value. In the reality show "Celebrity Transformation," she initially reveals secrets about the director and guests, incurring the director's wrath, but manages to overcome the challenge with her shock value bonus. While helping the hemophobic Yu Sinian, she is misunderstood as being pursued, prompting her to embark on a self-conquest strategy. Qiao Xi is determined to match him with the original female lead, but Yu Sinian gradually falls for her through a series of actions, and the plot spirals out of control.
诱溺沉沦 | "Seduction and Depravity"

Chen Kai Zhou, Sheng XiaChu Zhi, a female college student living under the roof of the Bo family, suffers neglect from Bo Xu and harassment from Tang Yingxue. Unexpectedly, she receives deep affection and protection from Bo Chi Yi. Bo Chi Yi has secretly loved Chu Zhi for many years, from silently supporting her to fiercely protecting her, standing up against his family and punishing the wicked for her. After recognizing Bo Xu's selfishness and Tang Yingxue's malice, Chu Zhi gradually understands her own heart, breaks free from the shackles of her dependent life, and reciprocates Bo Chi Yi's love. The two overcome family obstacles, misunderstandings, and suspicions, finally breaking through all difficulties to be together and achieving a mutually fulfilling love.
反派女配觉醒了 | "The Villainous Female Supporting Character Awakened"

Yan Ding Xiang Yu, Wang Dian DianJiang Siheng was originally a villainous supporting character in a novel who met a tragic end. She accidentally awakened to the truth and decided to stop being a tool to drive the development of the male and female protagonists. She decided to rewrite her own life and unexpectedly discovered that her bodyguard Xie Yanxing was deeply in love with her. So she joined hands with Xie Yanxing to rewrite their life script and start a happy life together.
妈别怕，你的宝来了＆小团子驾到妈咪不做冤种 | "Mom, Don't Be Afraid, Your Baby is Here & The Little Dumpling Arrives, Mommy Won't Be a Victim"
Zhao Jun Han, Zhang Ying YingTell story of a son time travelling to save his mother from his abusive father.*This will get released officially on the 9th. So the full synopsis is still unavailable.
狙击玫瑰 | "Sniping the Rose"

Li Ren Zhi, You YangTen years ago, he rescued her from the abyss, shaping her into the sharpest blade in his hand and making her the most docile lover by his side. Jewels, pampering—he bestowed everything upon her, making her mistakenly believe it was love, the only light in her gloomy life. Until his white moonlight returned, and for the sake of his beloved, he personally handed her a packet of medicine, ordering her to scheme against another man. Only then did she realize that after ten years of companionship, she was nothing more than a tool he could sacrifice at any time. Heartbroken silently, she calmly accepted—this final lesson taught her to give up completely.

白夜陷落 | "Falling into the Night"- Wang Xuan, Sun Lu LuDriven to desperation, Ye Weiran takes a desperate gamble, attempting to seduce the powerful and influential Bo Yu. However, this is a tough nut to crack. Everyone says that Bo Yu is heartless and unapproachable, yet he, knowing Ye Weiran has ulterior motives, allows her to get closer. His initial disdain and dismissive attitude towards her gradually transforms into attraction
the aloof beauty is brought down from her pedestal, and from then on, he becomes her protector.
婚后第五年 | "The Fifth Year of Marriage"

Wang Bo, Ma Ming JieA gifted fashion designer, Ren Muzhixia, chose to retire from the limelight after marriage to focus on her family. However, in the fifth year of her marriage, her husband Fu Yan's infidelity was a devastating blow. With the support of her family and teachers, she rekindled her career, studying the innovation and inheritance of Shu brocade, and step by step, realized her dream and returned to the top.
女扮男装被千岁爷相中了，要给我封妃 | "A Woman Disguised as a Man is Chosen by the Emperor and Wants to Become His Consort"

Liu Run Ming, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun)Yun Mo, a top-tier assassin in the modern world, transmigrates into the body of a woman with the same name after her death. Yun Mo's father died in battle when she was young, and her mother, to ensure their survival within the Yun family, disguised Yun Mo as a boy from birth. As Yun Mo grew older, she both longed to reclaim her female identity and feared that discovery would lead to her and her mother's demise. To escape the danger of her identity being revealed, Yun Mo planned to flee with her mother. However, before they could escape, they were spotted by Jin Cang, the only prince of a different surname in the Great Yuan Dynasty, who wielded immense power and was incredibly ruthless. They were taken into his mansion, and from then on, Yun Mo began a life of struggle and battle against Jin Cang to survive.
周太太，恋爱不如先结婚 | "Mrs. Zhou, It's Better to Get Married First Than to Date"

Qin Chen Chen, Yu Yu Tong"I don't mind that you have him in your heart"—Zhou Chen reached out to Shen Yiqiao when she was most helpless. After their whirlwind marriage, they lived a stable and happy life until Shen Yiqiao's ex-boyfriend returned to the country, shattering the facade of peace. Faced with his wife's ex-boyfriend's blatant attempt to steal her away, the self-disciplined Zhou Chen finally revealed his possessive and obsessive side.
崽子叛逆送去古今变形记 | "Rebellious Kid Sent to Ancient and Modern Metamorphosis"

Wei Ruo Chen, Huang Yun YunLiu Jue, complaining about her unruly nephew Qi Guangling, is unexpectedly bound to a life-swapping system. Qi Guangling, a science genius, is sent to an ancient, impoverished world where he uses his modern scientific knowledge to produce carbon for survival, develop explosives, and build an armed force to smelt high-quality steel and strengthen his power. Meanwhile, Qi Guangrui, a sickly boy who looks exactly like him, arrives in the modern world. Under the care of his cheerful aunt Liu Jue, he undergoes surgery to cure his heart condition, receives instruction from renowned teachers, and secures funding to start a company. The two boys, one from the ancient world and the other from the modern world, grow and transform in their respective unfamiliar dimensions, ultimately joining forces to help stabilize the ancient land.
闪婚夫人太难哄 | "My Flash-Married Wife is Too Hard to Coax"

Wang Hui Long, Xu Xiao ShuDelivery driver Su Zhixia unexpectedly saves a billionaire's grandmother and has a whirlwind marriage with the billionaire Fu Zeyan. Fu Zeyan thinks she's a gold digger and deliberately pretends to be a "construction worker." With the grandmother's (who loves watching dramas and has a sweetened yogurt) divine intervention, Fu Zeyan tries hard to maintain his "poor man" persona while constantly putting on a show of "domineeringly protecting his wife" when Su Zhixia is bullied by her eccentric family and scheming colleagues. Their relationship gradually heats up amidst hilarious and extreme tug-of-war, until finally the domineering CEO's true colors are revealed, and he embarks on a whirlwind pursuit of his wife.
梦中犹是少年游＆闻笙知野渡，生死不相负 | "In Dreams, I Still Seem to Be a Young Man & Hearing the Sound of Sheng, I Know the Wild Crossing; Life and Death Will Not Betray Each Other"

Xin Hao Yun, Chen Lu XiWen Sheng, the eldest daughter of the Wen family, was murdered by her fiancé and a scheming woman. Her two childhood friends stood by and did nothing to help, but the last person she saw was her nemesis, Zhou Yedu. It turned out that Zhou Yedu had always secretly loved Wen Sheng, but knowing she loved someone else, he worried that his obsession would hurt her and chose to leave. Until this unexpected event, the two reunited. Wen Sheng, reborn with remorse, returned to her twilight years. Facing the enemies who killed her in her past life, Wen Sheng decisively retaliated, taking back everything the Wen family had given them. The men, unrepentant and still seeking revenge, reaped the consequences of their actions. At her birthday banquet, Wen Sheng firmly chose Zhou Yedu.
他的囚鸟 | "His Caged Bird"

Han Yi Si, Li Jia LinXin Yu witnessed her mother, Lin Xi, being murdered by her father, Xin Guosheng, and was herself beaten blind. Before her death, her mother entrusted her with contacting a mysterious person and delivering evidence. Ten years later, Xin Yu became a "prisoner" of the Xin family. The arrival of undercover bodyguard Chen Yu broke the deadlock. Xin Yu used music to convey coded messages and set traps to test Chen Yu, while Chen Yu, under surveillance, discovered Xin Yu's secret and Xin Guosheng's heinous acts. The two went from being wary of each other to becoming allies, joining hands to fight against the persecution by Xin Guosheng and his son, Xin Chengye. In the end, they exposed the truth about Xin Guosheng's crimes, Xin Yu regained her sight, and also found love with Chen Yu.
十年劫第二部 | "Ten Years of Calamity 2"

Liu Ning, Zhao Mu YanModern screenwriter Li Shuangshuang, dissatisfied with the alterations to her script, transmigrates into her own ancient romance novel, "Ten Years of Tribulation," becoming the mortal enemy of the original female lead, Su Jinran. Li Shuangshuang relentlessly alters the plot, attempting to crush the cannon fodder Su Jinran and seize the position of Crown Prince Qin Wangjing's only true love. However, Su Jinran, aided by a prophetic warning from a bronze mirror, counters her schemes. Ultimately, she helps Qin Wangjing regain his memories, dismantles Li Shuangshuang's "creator" power, reshapes destiny, and achieves a happy ending.
锦瑟无眠 | "The Brocade Zither Never Sleeps"

Lin Feng Song, Wang Ya QingFive years ago, Shen Ningyuan, the head of Jiangcheng Customs, was murdered for investigating the Fu family's smuggling activities with Japan. His family was massacred, and his daughter, Shen Zhaoning (later known as Shang Yiyi), was rescued by Fu Linyuan. She hid in a Peking Opera troupe, apprenticing to a master and plotting revenge. Five years later, Shang Yiyi attempted to assassinate her enemy, Steward Yan, during a performance. Fu Zezhi, the young marshal of the warlord's mansion, recognized her as a similar figure (the two were previously lovers). Fu Zezhi, actually a member of the Communist Party codenamed "Sleepless," secretly investigated the truth, and feelings gradually developed between him and Shang Yiyi. Together, they eliminated Steward Yan, brought down the Chen family, and exposed Fu Linyuan as the true culprit behind the massacre, revealing his collusion with the Japanese army.
换身之后，将军画风不对了 | "After the Body Swap, The General's Style Changed"

Ling Xuan, Song Yu JiaShen Zhao, as the mistress of the general's mansion, suffers constant harassment and provocation from her mother-in-law, a scheming woman. She endures this hardship, hoping to clear her family's name after their wrongful conviction. One night, she and General Chu Mu unexpectedly swap bodies. From that moment on, everything changes: Chu Mu experiences her hardships firsthand in the inner quarters and begins to support her; she, in turn, uses Chu Mu's general's identity to investigate clues in her father's wrongful conviction throughout the court and the country. The two gradually develop feelings for each other amidst their misplaced identities, but Shen Zhao then discovers that the truth she has been desperately seeking is inextricably linked to the man beside her.
凭爱意将你私有 | "I'll Possess You Withal My Love"

Wu Yu Hang, He Ling YaoJiang Xingluo, adopted by the Fu family, fell in love with Fu Jinzhou, who lived under the same roof, at the age of eighteen. However, due to a synesthetic chip, she became his exclusive bond. What she thought was deep affection was actually Fu Jinzhou's perception of her as a "delicate flower to be admired." A marriage plan and hurtful words broke her heart. At this time, Shi Ye, a wealthy young man from Beijing's elite circle who had secretly loved her for ten years, suddenly appeared, causing Fu Jinzhou to re-examine his feelings for Jiang Xingluo. Wen Mianmian's jealousy and framing, Fu's mother's considerations for interests, and Fu Jinzhou's belated repentance all played out in turn. Fu Jinzhou's obsessive attempts to win her back and Shi Ye's deep affection and protection still left her future uncertain.*Wu Yuhang  keep playing a scumbag roles lately. Why?😢
为你而来 | "I Came For You"

Fan Xiao Dong, Liang Wen JingTalented cartoonist Lin Nianwei, pressured by her boyfriend, decides to abandon her comic book creation and enter into a seemingly perfect marriage. The arrival of a mysterious fan, Lu Jingchuan, helps her see her boyfriend's true colors. With Lu Jingchuan's help, she escapes his control, exposes his facade, tears into her scumbag boyfriend, and picks up her paintbrush again to pursue her passion. Facing her ex-boyfriend's "blacklisting" and her best friend's betrayal and framing, she bravely fights back, using her paintbrush as a weapon to win a competition and reclaim her rightful glory. However, when she stands in the spotlight again, she discovers that Lu Jingchuan, who has always been by her side, is not a fan, but the male lead of her comic book, who came specifically for her.
心动延迟指令 | "Delayed Heartbeat Command"

Shi Ye Jing, Meng Zi Hao, He Zheng YuanXiao Xiao, a freshman in medical school, was about to get closer to her childhood friend, Xu Chun, when his indifference dampened her enthusiasm. She then unexpectedly stumbled into the world of Qi Wanghuan, the "campus bully." On one side is Bai Yueguang, a senior she's known since childhood but who has suddenly become cold; on the other is a junior she unexpectedly meets, domineering yet passionate. Faced with this "choose one" dilemma, what will she choose? A sudden attraction may be delayed, but true love will never break its promise.
予你心动 | "I Give You My Heartbeat"

An Yi Ming, Wang Chu YiWen Ning married her childhood sweetheart, Shen Yifeng, to repay a debt of gratitude, only to be betrayed by her husband and her junior, Su Weiwei. Heartbroken, she became entangled in a romantic relationship with Lu Xiao, a wealthy and powerful young man. Shen Yifeng, blinded by greed, repeatedly humiliated Wen Ning, while Lu Xiao secretly protected her, fighting against the Shen family and tearing apart his rivals. At the Shen family's patriarch's birthday banquet, Su Weiwei reaped the consequences of her actions, and Shen Yifeng's awakening came too late. Wen Ning decisively divorced him, and Lu Xiao publicly announced their relationship, gaining the family's approval. A year later, Wen Ning donned a wedding dress and sweetly held hands with Lu Xiao, completely bidding farewell to her fallen ex-husband's entanglement and achieving a happy ending.
客户变老公，还附赠一个楼王 | "Client Becomes Husband, Plus a Luxury Apartment as a Bonus"

Wang Ming Yang, Zhao You MeiReal estate agent Xia Anran is framed and falsely accused, and unexpectedly becomes pregnant after meeting Liang Chenxuan, who is concealing some of his true situation. Liang Chenxuan initially misunderstands the accusations, but after uncovering the truth, he joins forces with his mother to expose the conspiracy and punish the wrongdoers. Xia Anran and Liang Chenxuan overcome their difficulties together, resolving their differences and ultimately finding happiness, demonstrating the preciousness of kindness and resilience.
被拒后，我靠医术治好大佬成座上宾 | "After Being Rejected, I Cure the Big Shot With My Medica Skill And Became a VIP Guest"

Yang Hao Ran, Yang Yun XuanThe story follows Yuan Li, a genius scientist from the 22nd century, who transmigrates into the body of a capitalist's daughter. After being rejected by Gu Xiao while accompanying her to the army, she unlocks the space of her ancestral jade pendant, gaining access to spiritual water that makes her more beautiful and powerful. Together with Gu Xiao, she exposes the conspiracy of her scumbag father, Zhuang Jingzhi, and stepmother, Feng Guiping, to poison their relatives and seize their family fortune. They outwit spies, assist the country in developing electric locomotives and advanced weapons, and after experiencing life-and-death trials, she not only finds true love but also discovers that she is the orphan of a revolutionary hero. Ultimately, she and Gu Xiao stay together and begin a happy life.
幸得回首又见你 | "Fortunately, I Saw You Again When I Looked Back"

Luo Jia Hao, Li Yu TongForty-year-old Ye Wentang, a full-time housewife, was driven to rock bottom by her cheating husband's manipulation. After her divorce, she restarted her life by making scallion pancakes, unaware that Shi Jun'an had been secretly protecting her for years. From a roadside stall to opening her own business, from being bullied by her ex-husband to being pampered by Shi Jun'an, she not only achieved a career comeback but also found rebirth in love.
妈咪，爹地马甲藏不住了 | "Mommy, Daddy's Disguise Can't Be Hidden Anymore"

Fang Zheng Nan, Li Zhao (RAW)Jiang Wenyue and Mu Yicheng are a bickering couple. While they are happy, they are hiding a shocking secret from each other. The seemingly gentle housewife is actually the top-ranked special agent, Manyue, and the nemesis she has been chasing is actually her security guard husband who sleeps next to her every night?! As a conspiracy unfolds, the two are caught in a scandal, and their adorable child is the first to know their parents' identities. In order to protect their family, the child can only protect their parents' disguises amidst one joke and misunderstanding after another.
迟先生，太太她又花式作妖啦 | "Mr Chi, Mrs. Chi is Up to Her Old Tricks Again"

Yang Chen, Shao Yi Rui (RAW)A typical 996 office worker transmigrates into a novel, becoming the villainous supporting character who wreaks havoc in a wealthy family. To protect her precarious life in the rich and powerful, Shen Kui decides to turn over a new leaf. She retaliates fiercely against the scheming man who manipulates her! Facing her patriarchal, bloodsucking family, Shen Kui unleashes her acting prowess, vowing to make her parents repay double the money they took from her! But who can tell her how to appease her sickly, ruthless husband who's constantly teetering on the edge of darkness?*This got taken down so fast on Youtube. I wasn't able to save the sub yet 😭

雨夜春漪 | "Rainy Night, Spring Splendor"

Dong Yi, Huang Yun YunLin Wu had a crush on Song Ye since high school and liked him for five years. Due to a marriage alliance between their families, Lin Wu was forced to move in with Song Ye and get pregnant with his child. Song Ye suspected that Lin Wu was a spy sent by his stepmother and made things difficult for her at every turn. However, he did not know that Lin Wu had silently helped him a lot when he was at his most vulnerable. When Lin Wu was about to leave, Song Ye realized that he had fallen deeply in love with her.
后宫雁 | "The Wild Geese of the Back Palace"

Xiao Wen Yu, Wang Hai MinAfter a night with the Emperor at Huaqing Pool, Ning Wanyan, a member of the Music Bureau, disappeared. Her childhood friend, Miao Caiwei, fraudulently claimed the Emperor's favor and the title of Imperial Concubine. To eliminate any future threats, Miao Caiwei's entire family was murdered. Ning Wanyan mistakenly believed the Emperor was her enemy and sought refuge with Prince Meng Huaizhou of Zhennan. Three years later, she entered the palace to seek revenge. In the midst of her turmoil, she gradually learned the truth about the massacre and the fraudulent claim, and developed feelings for the Emperor. After experiencing a false pregnancy and a rebellion, she finally punished Miao Caiwei and avenged Meng Huaizhou. Having put aside her grudges, Ning Wanyan joined hands with the Emperor, became Empress, reformed the system of female officials, and together built a prosperous era.
且听风吟 | "The Pleasure of the Wind"

Ye Yi Chen, Wang Yi ShuShen Wan pretended to be congenitally deaf and mute, even secretly using her parents' inheritance to support Pei Sinan's studio. But just as Pei Sinan miraculously recovered from his deafness and muteness, and his studio developed into a company, everything seemed to be going well. However, Pei Sinan unexpectedly revealed his true feelings: he never wanted to marry Shen Wan and even harbored fantasies about his ex-fiancée. Completely disillusioned, Shen Wan chose to marry her childhood sweetheart, Ye Qiyan, in a political alliance.
少爷今天也在替挨打 | "Young Master is Also Taking the Beating Today"

Huang Yan Kai, Zhao XiMartial arts prodigy Jiang Zhi is framed for doping, resulting in her suspension and the collapse of the Rose Martial Arts Club, leaving her homeless. A car accident transports her back to before the "Golden Belt Cup" tournament, where she and wealthy heir Shi Jin experience a "pain swap." To clear her name and fulfill her father's dying wish to become a champion, Jiang Zhi returns to the arena, facing challenges from Tianlong and Leiting Yan Hui. She and Shi Jin, who took her pain, develop feelings for each other through their bickering. Ultimately, she wins the championship, exposes the conspiracy, avenges her father, and finds true love.
替嫁后，我和老公不太熟 | "After Being Forced Into a Marriage, My Husband and I Weren't Very Close"

Dai Ting Rui, Yang YangThe Sheng family was originally a renowned wealthy family in Beijing, but their fortunes declined. For the sake of their family business, they were forced to form a marriage alliance with the Qi family. However, just before the wedding, Qi Wenbin unexpectedly passed away. To save face for the family, Qi Ming coerced Qi Wenyan, whom he had abandoned abroad, to return to China to take her place in the wedding. However, at the wedding, Sheng Wanxing ran away, and Sheng Xiangyang, in order to secure funding from the Qi family, was forced to marry in Sheng Wanxing's place. Through a series of unfortunate events, Qi Wenyan and Sheng Xiangyang ended up as husband and wife.
进城后，我被总裁深深溺爱 | "After Moving to the City, I Was Deeply Pampered By the CEO"

He Lian Fei, Cui Xin XinSu Shu, a country girl, goes to the city to stay with her cousin, only to have her ancestral gold lock stolen and her cousin impersonate a wealthy heiress, becoming the fiancée of CEO Shen Yuzhou. The cousin also repeatedly plots against Su Shu. When the truth is revealed, Su Shu finally returns to her biological mother and joins forces with Shen Yuzhou to expose her cousin's evil deeds. Her stolen life is finally restored; Su Shu not only regains her family but also receives a grand marriage proposal from the CEO, fulfilling her childhood engagement!
穿六零：我的空间囤满黄金珠宝 | "Wearing the Clothes of the 1960s: My Space is Filled With Gold and Jewelry"

Ji Jun Liang, Bai YeIn the autumn of 1967, Shen Qingli, a 21st-century medical doctor, transmigrated into the body of the eldest daughter of the Shen family. Her scumbag father, Chu Weiguo, after marrying into the family, mistreated her with his stepmother, Wang Xiue, and even tried to take her job. Shen Qingli unexpectedly awakened a spatial ability and resolved to avenge the original owner of the body, emptying the ancestral home and outsmarting her family. Along the way, she was rescued twice by Gu Beizhou, and the two gradually developed feelings for each other. Gu Beizhou and his family repeatedly protected her, helping her resolve crises and find work. The Chu family members continued to cause trouble but ultimately reaped the consequences. Shen Qingli and Gu Beizhou joined hands to overcome challenges such as being sent to the countryside, and ultimately stayed together for life.
懂兽语！真千金在八零被偏宠啦 | "Understanding Animal Language: The True Heiress Was Pamered in the 80s"

Chang Zhe Kuan, Lin LingShen Ran, a beast-taming immortal, was banished to the mortal realm for her gossip and transmigrated into the body of a wealthy heiress in the 1980s. Facing a biased and scumbag father, a vicious stepmother, and a scheming adopted sister, she repeatedly breaks through their schemes and turns the tables with her unique ability to understand beast language. Initially intending to divorce her cheap husband Qin Lie and live a carefree life, she is gradually drawn to him, and their contractual marriage blossoms into genuine love. Shen Ran rises from a veterinary intern to the head of her department, achieving success in both her career and love life. Ultimately, it is revealed that Qin Lie is also a deity who descended to the mortal realm for tribulation, and the two reunite in the Heavenly Court, vowing never to be separated again.
重生后，我嫁了装乖的他 | "After Rebirth, I Married the Pretending-to-be-Well-Behaved Him"

Yue Yu Hang, Sheng ChenAfter being reborn, Wen Nian marries Qin Shao, who pretends to be mentally challenged, to seek revenge. During their time together, they develop feelings for each other. She uses her divine powers to protect Qin Shao multiple times and opens an entertainment company to fight back against Qin Xu, Wen Chuchu, and others. Qin Shao secretly plots his revenge, using the identity of "Xiu" to assist Wen Nian. Ultimately, Qin Shao reveals his true identity, but Wen Nian is involved in a car accident orchestrated by Wen Chuchu. The first season ends when Wen Nian awakens from her coma, seemingly amnesiac, and inquires about Qin Shao's identity.
许你盛夏 | "Promise You Midsummer"

Zhou Zheng, Wu Jia YaoTop designer Xu Xingmian was murdered due to the jealousy of her ex-boyfriend Gu Yanzhi. Her soul transmigrated into the body of ordinary woman Lin Zhixia, who was forced into a fake relationship contract with top star Xie Mingye after an accident. During the contract period, the two worked together to overcome workplace sabotage, family obstacles, and past conspiracies. Lin Zhixia returned to the competition with her exceptional design talent and, under Xie Mingye's protection, gradually uncovered the truth behind her death. In the end, she not only won the Golden Scissors Award but also fell in love with Xie Mingye, who had shed his celebrity status, and together they reached the pinnacle of their careers and lives.
黑夜帝王掌心宠 | "The Emperor's Pampered Darling in the Dark Night"

Luo Jia Hao, Yang ChenTo raise money for her tuition, Lin Ruanruan had an unexpected relationship with Si Tingxiao, the president of the Si Corporation, while working part-time at a nightclub, and became pregnant. Due to his belief that he would be childless and his suspicious nature, Si Tingxiao mistakenly believed Lin Ruanruan was a woman after his money and repeatedly refused to acknowledge her. Lin Ruanruan gave birth to her child in a helpless situation, but due to premature birth, the baby suffered from heart failure and urgently needed surgery. She struggled to earn money but to no avail. Ultimately, to save her child, without either of them knowing, she voluntarily donated her corneas to Si Tingxiao.
重生98：离婚后我靠冰激凌翻盘 | "Reborn in '98: After the Divorce, I Turned Things Around With Ice Cream"

Li Ze Yuan, Yang YanZhong Yuanchao is reborn in 1988, filled with resentment. He discovers his wife, He Xiuling, is having an affair with Zhao Jinbu and decisively divorces her, severing their ill-fated relationship! With memories of the future in his hands, he starts from a school-run distribution department, becomes a sensation with his "Häagen-Dazs" ice cream, and then expands into the health supplement market, rising to become a business tycoon. During this time, he makes amends to his family's regrets, outsmarts the He family's suppression, and even sparks a romance with Xie Ningzhu. Through business battles and emotional choices, he ultimately achieves success in both his career and love life, living a brilliant life unlike any he has lived in two lifetimes!
开着大奔闯八零 | "Driving a Mercedes-Benz in the 80s"

Ren Dong Min, Yang LinIn 1987, Lu Xiangdong, a gambling addict, woke up to find himself reborn on the day his wife, Su Yuelan, and their daughter committed suicide. Witnessing the tragedy about to repeat itself, he had a sudden realization and vowed never to repeat his mistakes. Using his memories from his previous life, he seized opportunities, starting by selling vegetables, then moving into seafood trading, revitalizing his stall, and outsmarting his rivals, gradually accumulating wealth. Facing rumors and malicious suppression, Lu Xiangdong no longer backed down, protecting his wife and daughter, fighting against malicious neighbors and business enemies, and rising powerfully in the wave of reform and opening up. In this life, he not only wants to provide a better life for his wife and daughter, but also to become a trendsetter of the times, creating his own business empire!

Dong Yi, Huang Yun Yun[HERE]2. 后宫雁 - Xiao Wen Yu, Wang Hai Min[HERE]3. 且听风吟 - Ye Yi Chen, Wang Yi Shu[HERE]4. 少爷今天也在替挨打 - Huang Yan Kai, Zhao Xi[HERE]5. 替嫁后，我和老公不太熟 - Dai Ting Rui, Yang Yang[HERE]6. 进城后，我被总裁深深溺爱 - He Lian Fei, Cui Xin Xin[HERE]7. 穿六零：我的空间囤满黄金珠宝 - Ji Jun Liang, Bai Ye[HERE]8. 懂兽语！真千金在八零被偏宠啦 - Chang Zhe Kuan, Lin Ling[HERE]9. 重生后，我嫁了装乖的他 - Yue Yu Hang, Sheng Chen[HERE]10. 许你盛夏 - Zhou Zheng, Wu Jia Yao[HERE]11. 黑夜帝王掌心宠 - Luo Jia Hao, Yang Chen[HERE]12. 重生98：离婚后我靠冰激凌翻盘 - Li Ze Yuan, Yang Yan[HERE]13. 开着大奔闯八零 - Ren Dong Min, Yang Lin[HERE]
江小姐，别来无恙&分手五年宋先生别纠缠 | "Miss Jiang, Long Time No See & Mr. Song, Don't Bother Me After Five Years Apart"

Wang Chen Peng, Wang Zi JiaJiang Yusang discovers she was switched at birth 26 years ago and is actually a fake heiress. Her parents favor the real heiress, Jiang Rui, so she decisively decides to change her household registration and live for herself. To raise a down payment for a house, Jiang Yusang tries to secure a legal contract with Sherain Group, only to find that the group's president is none other than her ex-boyfriend, Song Siyan, with whom she had a dramatic breakup five years prior. To secure the deal, their paths cross, and Jiang Yusang gradually realizes that Song Siyan is plotting to reconcile, and that their breakup was a misunderstanding. Ultimately, they resolve their misunderstandings.

小叔的陷阱 | "My Uncle's Trap"- Shi Jia, Chai Hui XinCheng Youyi is engaged to Gong Qianyu, the young master of the Gong family, but by a twist of fate, she crosses paths with Gong Qianyu's uncle—Gong Ming, the 30-year-old head of the family. What she initially thought was an accident turns out to be a result of Gong Ming's love at first sight in high school and years of calculated maneuvering. Facing societal disapproval, Gong Ming fiercely protects her, and Cheng Youyi, struggling and yearning, gradually recognizes her true feelings. The two ultimately join hands.

婚内暗恋 | "Secret Love in Marriage"- Nie Bo Xuan, Chen CiMu Zhi and her childhood sweetheart, Lu Jingzhou, had been in love for many years, but she suffered from emotional abuse and betrayal, leading to a heartbreaking breakup. On that heartbroken night, she unexpectedly reunited with Huo Yanting, a powerful figure in Beijing's elite circles. In a moment of desperation, she impulsively proposed a marriage of convenience. Little did she know that Huo Yanting had long harbored deep feelings for her. He immediately agreed to the marriage, using his gentle care to dispel her gloom and his unwavering protection to heal her wounds. The two gradually developed deep affection for each other, their relationship blossoming day by day.
洁癖老板的例外清单 | "The Exception List for the Cleanliness-Obsessed Boss"

Zhang Pei Bao (Ming Yang), Zeng He Hui ZiShen Nanxing, known for her tendency to be fired in the workplace, unexpectedly joins Worson as the secretary of the germaphobic CEO, Lu Chenzhou. Due to a series of farcical incidents, the two frequently clash and even accidentally kiss. Overwhelmed, Shen Nanxing wants to resign, but Lu Chenzhou refuses and even promotes her. When she faces difficulties in the marketing department, Lu Chenzhou secretly helps her. As they spend more time together, misunderstandings gradually dissipate, and the two, who initially disliked each other, slowly develop feelings for each other.
驯服纨绔小娇夫 | "Taming the Spoiled Young Husband"

Tan Si Yuan, Li Qian LeShe was a legendary assassin, but died in an accident. Now, she is Su Ruoxue, a country girl discarded by the Su family as a substitute bride, about to be packed up and forced to marry Huo Ye, the infamous "Living Yama" of Haicheng! Su Ruoxue begins her journey to tame Huo Ye, to reform him, to hope for him, and to guide this wild horse onto the right path! She even tries to make Huo Ye, who claims to only want to eat, drink, and have fun and has no ambition, willingly take charge of the Huo family empire! Huo Ye is eventually overwhelmed by Su Ruoxue's domineering and powerful nature, from initial resistance and anger to being irresistibly attracted and ultimately completely succumbing to her charm.
捡来的京圈太子每天要贴贴 | "The Picked-Up Prince of Beijing's Elite Circle Needs Daily Intimate Contact"

Wang Yi Ge, Li Yao YaoFang Rongxue found an injured man by the roadside. The man was handsome, but his pale, sickly appearance stirred pity and a selfish desire in her, so she took him home to care for him. She even considered seducing him to be her boyfriend. It wasn't until several luxury cars pulled up in front of her house that she realized she was supporting a Beijing socialite. Everyone noticed that Bai Lin, the most ruthless and cold-blooded heir of the Bai family, seemed like a completely different person after his return.
破局：炮灰全家觉醒计划 | "Breaking the Game: The Cannon Fodder Family's Awakening Plan"

Huang Jia Xuan, Zhu Mo YanLing Zhaoran, having returned from her cultivation journey, finds herself back in a modern family, only to become the laughingstock of the entire city. She uses ruthless methods to reorganize the family, reform her step-siblings who were merely cannon fodder, and engages in a thrilling confrontation with the powerful figures who covet the Shen family's fortune. In protecting her family, she not only reverses everyone's fate but also reveals the true meaning of family love.
反向攻略，顾先生越追越勇 | "Reverse Strategy: Mr. Gu's Pursuit Becomes More Courageous"

Han Miao, Cao LuNian Sui'an unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of the female protagonist in a novel called "Memoirs of a Tragic Woman." She's about to marry Gu Junxing, a divorced CEO of the Gu Group with a child. According to the novel's plot, Gu Junxing is an extremely stingy old man after marriage, causing Nian Sui'an immense suffering, ultimately leading to her starvation. To escape her fate, Nian Sui'an decides to divorce, only to learn that the Gu family has established a trust fund to protect the marriage. If the marriage lasts three years or Gu Junxing initiates the divorce, Nian Sui'an can claim a huge sum of 300 million yuan from the trust fund. For this money, Nian Sui'an chooses to stay, and in her future life, she tries every means to cause trouble for Gu Junxing, mimicking ancient divorce customs.
顾少我的透视眼识货更识人 | "Gu Shao's X-Ray Vision: He Can Recognize Goods and People Alike"

Yu Di, Huang Li TingXu Nanzhu's relentless workdays and nights left her with severe nearsightedness. Unexpectedly, after refractive surgery, she gained the ability to perceive the value of things—judging their worth by color. Purple represents high-value items, gold represents people who can bring her benefits, and gray and black indicate people or things that will cause her loss. Xu Nanzhu uses this ability to reclaim her mother's company and humiliate her sister and father. During this process, she sees the value in Gu Yan, the most notorious playboy in Beijing's elite circles, and decides to marry him. The two then co-found a company.
八零娇气包手握灵泉 | "The Pampered 80s Girl Holds a Magic Spring in Her Hands"

Gao Zhe, Zhai Zhao RongLin Jiao, a genius designer from the 21st century, transmigrates into a novel as a spoiled brat from the 1980s. She unexpectedly discovers that her husband, Fu Jinyan, has a "Marrow-Cleansing Spring" hidden behind a red mole on his lip. Using the spring, she improves her appearance and constitution, deals with the mess left by the original owner, and fights off the entanglement of the scheming female lead, Su Rou. The two gradually develop feelings for each other after their contractual marriage. Fu Jinyan consistently protects Lin Jiao, supporting her in opening a clothing store and expanding her business. Despite family obstacles and Su Rou's sabotage, Lin Jiao heals Fu Jinyan's father with the spring, and the couple has twins. Fu Jinyan receives an opportunity to study abroad, which Lin Jiao fully supports, and the couple embarks on a journey towards the future together.
福山来福 | "Fortune Come From the Mountains"

Lin Jia Qi, Hu Jia YiOn their five-year wedding anniversary, Gu Man and Lu Chengzhou are caught in a car accident, resulting in temporary amnesia—his memories are stuck in his university days. Gu Man is both amused and annoyed, and decides to play a prank on him. Meanwhile, Gu Man also has to deal with internal turmoil within the Lu Group. Director Morphine and others, disregarding coffee quality, forcefully push for the expansion of offline chain stores, using inferior coffee beans that cause the brand's reputation to collapse, leading to numerous consumer complaints. To reverse the Lu Group's public relations crisis, Lu Chengzhou suggests that Gu Man participate in the World Coffee Championship. Faced with the arrogant provocation of two-time champion Zhou Xun, she remains unmoved and ultimately wins over the public with her talent.
声曝光！全家偷听反派阴谋 | "Heartfelt Words Revealed! The Whole Family Eavesdrops on the Villain's Plot"

Liu Hao Yuan, Sun Yan'enOn the verge of death, Wen Zhaoyi's powerful desires attracted a demon. She made a pact of revenge with the demon, sacrificing her soul. Given a second chance, she won back her family's love, found her own romance, and rewrote her destiny. Just as everything seemed perfect, Wen Yaoshu, in a desperate act, attempted to assassinate Wen Zhaoyi, but was stopped by Gu Yu, who died in the process. In her panic, Wen Yaoshu was run over and killed by the enraged Qiao Zhiyuan. Wen Zhaoyi and Gu Yu then signed a blood pact, rekindling their past romance.
渔生有你 | Life is With You"

Zhang Xiao Ang, Chen Zhen Ni (RAW)On her deathbed, Lin's grandmother arranged marriages for her granddaughters. Lin's father allowed his daughters to choose "voluntarily," but in reality, he had already arranged for her elder sister, Lin Xueru, to marry into the Zhao family in the fishing village, and her stepsister, Lin Yurou, to marry into the Su family in Lucheng. Xueru, knowing the truth, was forced to marry into the Zhao family, only to discover they were the richest family in Haicheng, and her husband, Zhao Youting, had led the villagers to prosperity. Xueru used her professional knowledge to resolve a fish fry crisis and helped sell oysters through live streaming, gaining Youting's approval and leading to their wedding. Yurou, after marrying into the Su family, faced difficulties and even went to the Zhao family with her mother to mock them, only to be humiliated. Youting revealed his identity, leading to the Su family's bankruptcy and Yurou's divorce.

Wang Chen Peng, Wang Zi Jia[HERE]2. 小叔的陷阱 - Shi Jia, Chai Hui Xin[HERE]3. 婚内暗恋 - Nie Bo Xuan, Chen Ci[HERE]4. 洁癖老板的例外清单 - Zhang Pei Bao (Ming Yang), Zeng He Hui Zi[HERE]5. 驯服纨绔小娇夫 - Tan Si Yuan, Li Qian Le[HERE]6. 捡来的京圈太子每天要贴贴 - Wang Yi Ge, Li Yao Yao[HERE]7. 破局：炮灰全家觉醒计划 - Huang Jia Xuan, Zhu Mo Yan[HERE]8. 反向攻略，顾先生越追越勇 - Han Miao, Cao Lu[HERE]9. 顾少我的透视眼识货更识人 - Yu Di, Huang Li Ting[HERE]10. 八零娇气包手握灵泉 - Gao Zhe, Zhai Zhao Rong[HERE]11. 福山来福 - Lin Jia Qi, Hu Jia Yi[HERE]12. 声曝光！全家偷听反派阴谋 - Liu Hao Yuan, Sun Yan'en[HERE]13. 渔生有你 - Zhang Xiao Ang, Chen Zhen Ni*[HERE]
本将军的夫人才不是恶女 | "The General's Wife Is Not a Villain"

Li Zhuo Yang, Han Le YaoXie Zhi unexpectedly transmigrates into a book, becoming the infamous villainous female protagonist. Using her understanding of the plot, she reclaims the system, escapes the schemes of evil people, and reconciles with her fiancé, Ning Yuan. Together, they fight against famine, save the people, and ultimately rewrite their tragic fate.(Aired: Oct 22, 2025)
长明灯之烬玉案 | "The Eternal Lamp: The Case of the Jade Sword"

Chen Tian Xiang, Sun Qian SunThe ailing General Zhong Chusi is forced by imperial decree to marry Li Rongyu, a hostage who has returned home. This marriage, initially imposed by imperial coercion, harbors a hidden bond that threatens to overturn their destinies. He resists the marriage wholeheartedly, while she remains wary of the relationship. Within the confines of the general's mansion, they test and balance each other. However, as imperial intrigues and blood feuds unfold, these two strangers are forced into a bond, repeatedly joining forces to overcome obstacles amidst the clash of swords. As their hidden pasts gradually surface, his secrets and her unwavering convictions unexpectedly intertwine. Where will this marriage, born of calculation, ultimately lead?
娇妃逆袭步步登至后位 | "The Spoiled Concubine's Counterattack: Step by Step to the Empress's Throne"

Chen Tian Xiang, Fang LeiModern girl Xiao Yingran accidentally transmigrates to ancient times seventeen years later. Using modern methods, she transforms herself into an unparalleled beauty and marries into the Crown Prince's residence, becoming a concubine of Crown Prince Rong Jingze. However, Rong Jingze is ruthless and cruel, doting only on his Crown Princess Han Yiyi. The concubines who marry into the Crown Prince's residence either die or are crippled. Xiao Yingran does not seek true love but decides to seize power and men to change her destiny.
农门小辣妻捡个王爷来耕田 | "The Spicy Peasant Wife Picks Up a Prince to Farm the Land"

Zhang Hong Ming, Yao Xiao XiaoModern agricultural expert Jiang Xiaoan unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a village girl in ancient times. To dispel her relatives' attempts to sell her for money, she fakes a marriage using a corpse. However, on their wedding night, she discovers that her husband, Qin Yu, is not dead, but merely severely injured and unconscious. Jiang Xiaoan then cares for her husband while devising ways to become wealthy and deal with her troublesome relatives. In the process, she also wins the heart of Qin Yu, a prince of the reigning emperor. The two eventually work together to improve their lives, and Qin Yu reveals his true identity to Jiang Xiaoan. They finally accept each other and fall in love.
小律师撩完就跑 | "The Little Lawyer Flirts and Runs Away"

Liu Yi Long, Qin Tian AiBy a twist of fate, Sheng Yan marries Jiang Mo, the boss she has loved for seven years. After their marriage, Jiang Mo remains somewhat distant from Sheng Yan, but fortunately, she doesn't give up and bravely pursues her love, disregarding the opinions of others. Sheng Yan gradually changes Jiang Mo, and the two heal each other's wounds, their love growing ever deeper.

夫人超会，清冷傅总又哭了 | "The Madam is Super Clever, the Cold CEO Fu Cried Again"- Dong Yi, Xiu Yu XiuIf it weren't for a chance encounter while delivering takeout, Su Yan would never have imagined that her poor husband of four years of dating and three years of marriage was actually a billionaire heir in the entertainment industry. When she discovered the truth, her husband was celebrating his childhood sweetheart's birthday with jewelry while casually apologizing, "It was just a birthday gift for Xue'er, something befitting my status. I thought you were generous, why are you so petty?" He leisurely waited for Su Yan to beg him, but what he received instead was a divorce decree from her.
两个人的深渊 | "Two People's Abyss"

Cheng Cheng, Guan XinMu Xintong returns to the Chu family with her husband Chu Yan's ashes to inherit the estate. There, she encounters her brother-in-law Chu Ge, whom she has never met before. The two clash over the cause of Chu Yan's death and the two wills, engaging in a calculated battle of wits, yet simultaneously drawn to each other. Upon receiving the inheritance, Mu Xintong's demeanor changes drastically, and the devilish Lin Zhe lurking behind her reveals his true colors.
渣男逃婚后，我成了他奶奶＆双世医妃 | "After the Scumbag Ran Away from His Bride, I Became His Grandmother & The Twin-Life Doctor"

Huang Hao Wen, Cai Zhuo YinIn modern times, Lin Wanrou, at the request of the vengeful spirit of the tragically deceased Lin Wanrou from another world, activates the "Book of Fate" and travels back to the other world on Lin Wanrou's wedding day to "rewrite" her fate! Surrounded by wolves in sheep's clothing and harboring their own schemes, Lin Wanrou easily overcomes these obstacles with her intelligence and wit. Using her exceptional medical skills, she cures Xiao Yu's leg ailment and cures his deadly poison. She also opens a free clinic to revitalize the Marquis's estate!
合约婚恋，到期不延 | "Contractual Marriage, No Extension Upon Expiration"

Yang Han, Zhao FeiThe male and female protagonists enter into a contract marriage due to their respective needs, with the agreement to end upon expiration. However, they gradually develop feelings for each other during their time together, and are forced to choose between love and responsibility as the marriage expires. The contract marriage is full of tension, exploring the balance between love and reality, and the plot is close to urban romance.
闪婚后，我被冷面老公宠上天 | "After a Flash Marriage, I Was Pampered by My Cold-Faced Husband"

Liu Yan Chen, Kan Zi YiTo rouse his grandmother's will to live, Jin Chenzhou grabbed a pregnant woman at the hospital and told the unconscious grandmother that the woman was carrying his child, thus saving her life! Unexpectedly, Jin Chenzhou dreamt of this pregnant woman that very day! Xia Chu initially thought meeting the child's biological father at the hospital was a coincidence, but from then on, this man frequently appeared in her life!
贵女不下嫁 | "A Noblewoman Doesn't Marry Down"

Liu Yan Chen, Zhu Xin YuPei Heye lost his parents at a young age and was adopted by his father's friend, Chen Muyun. He grew up with Chen Xiyan and they developed feelings for each other. However, for the stability of the company and Chen Xiyan's safety, 23-year-old Pei Heye had to go abroad. Chen Xiyan was heartbroken by his sudden departure. Five years later, Pei Heye finally took control of the situation, only to discover that Chen Xiyan was already with Zhang Haoming. Pei Heye initially intended to protect her, but secretly discovered the despicable tricks of Zhang Haoming's family. Faced with Chen Xiyan's distrust, Pei Heye showed absolute loyalty and devotion.
她很乖 | "She's Very Well-Behaved"

Li Jin Chen, Li Xiao NaIn their past life, Pei Yu and Shen Lichu broke up due to a misunderstanding. Reborn, Pei Yu still suffers from severe autism. He occasionally dreams of fragments from his past life. When fate brings him back to Shen Lichu, although he doesn't remember who she is, he yearns to be with her. As his memories return, he becomes increasingly anxious and insecure. In this life, he will protect his beloved Shen Lichu and will never let anyone hurt her again.

私会 | "Secret Meeting"- Su You Cai, Zhao Xi XiTo save her mother's medical life, renowned gallery owner Lu Shuyan submits herself to Jiang Mingcheng, the president of the Jiang Group. For over a decade, she is trapped in a sham marriage, her inspiration dried up, and she loses herself. Meanwhile, the prodigy whom Lu Shuyan healed years ago has grown into a leading figure in the art world. He hides his identity and approaches Shuyan, rekindling her cold heart with his passion, silently protecting her, and helping her break free from the prison of her facade.

再见钟情 | "Love at First Sight"- Lin Feng Song, Wu Yi FeiThree years ago, Shen Mingxiao lost her sight in an accident and was admitted to a nursing home, where she met her boyfriend, Pei Li'an. Three years later, their relationship is stable, and they are about to get married. However, Pei Li'an's uncle, Pei Youye, unexpectedly enters her life, and a complicated relationship ensues. Amidst the turmoil of these two relationships, Shen Mingxiao also finds true love again.
我是你专属的提线木偶 | "I'm Your Exclusive Puppet"

Ma Yi Yan, Tang Qi QiJiang Jiu, a "mute girl" abused in the Jiang family since childhood, is actually a vengeful figure hiding her true nature. To investigate the truth behind her mother's death, she feigns weakness and volunteers to marry in her sister Jiang Nana's place after the latter refuses to marry President Shi. However, she orchestrates her escape from the wedding, where she encounters Li Jingxiu, a seemingly playboy but actually cunning and ruthless man. The two form a partnership, with Jiang Jiu using Li Jingxiu's power to gradually take revenge on the Jiang family. At the same time, she slowly gains control of the Jiang family company, exposing her father Jiang Zhenguo's hypocrisy. She becomes the true mistress of the Jiang family and her relationship with Li Jingxiu evolves from a partnership of interests to genuine love.
六零养崽，我家顿顿有肉 | "Raising a Child in the 1960s, My Family Has Meat at Every Meal"

Tong Zi Wei, Chen Xiao TiJiang Li, an engineering PhD, transmigrates into the body of a villainous female supporting character in the 1960s. Notorious for her laziness and irresponsibility, she even attempted to sell her child for a better future, incurring the scorn of the entire village and the schemes of her sisters-in-law. She tears up the script to defy fate, using her system's cheat-like abilities to repair machinery, run side businesses, and raise her children to become wealthy, spoiling her two sons—one of the future provincial tycoon and the other a research expert—as her precious treasures. When her military officer husband returns, his initial suspicion turns into boundless doting on his wife, and the whole family joins forces to punish the villains.
竹马难逃，开启撒娇模式 | "Childhood Sweethearts Inevitably Switch to Spoiled Mode"

Huang Hao, Huang Pan PanIn her past life, Su Niansheng pursued Shi Yubai relentlessly for six years without success. On their wedding night, he cheated on her with her childhood sweetheart, Lin Yixuan. While terminally ill, she was humiliated and robbed of her belongings by the two, dying with resentment. Reborn back in university, she resolves to distance herself from the scumbag and win back her family and the silently devoted heir of Beijing's elite circle, Shen Junxi. She exposes Lin Yixuan's lip-syncing, and with her intelligence and Shen Junxi's help, repeatedly turns the tables on frame-ups, revealing Lin Yixuan's true colors. Their initial tentative interactions gradually blossom into romance, and Shen Junxi's deep affection melts her frozen heart. Ultimately, Su Niansheng's identity as the daughter of a billionaire is revealed, past grievances settled, and she and Shen Junxi achieve both professional and romantic fulfillment.
抱紧反派大腿后，全员洗白了 | "After Clinging to the Villain's Leg, Everyone is Redeemed"

Qian ZheJinian, an outstanding student in toxicology, tragically died at her graduation ceremony and transmigrated into the body of a female cannon fodder character in a sweet romance novel. Not wanting to repeat the original owner's tragic end, she shed her burdens and clung tightly to her scumbag father's coattails. Influenced by Jinian, the cold-hearted father slowly learns to love.
萌孙天降纨绔爷爷请接招 | "Adorable Grandson Descend Upon a Spoiled Grandpa, Please Accept the Challenge"

Li Ren Zhi, Zhang Mo LeiSix-year-old Tianbao, a promising young actress from 2060, accidentally travels back to 2025 and encounters her spoiled grandfather, Fu Qingfeng, in his youth. At that time, the Fu family is being schemed against by his stepmother, He Yuwan, and their illegitimate son, Shen Minghan. Fu Qingfeng's business is bankrupt, his marriage is strained, his aunt, Fu Rou, is being manipulated, and his cousin, Yangyang, is unruly and rebellious. Using her ability to understand the thoughts of plants and animals, Tianbao uncovers the villains' plot, helps them expose the true nature of He Yuwan and her son, and ultimately returns to the future, reborn as the beloved little princess of the Fu family.
以吻为刃 | "A Kiss as a Blade"

Nie Ji Kun, Jiang Lai (RAW)Lin Weiwei was murdered by her husband and sister, only to be reborn three days before her wedding. To inherit the estate, she had to marry. She deliberately provoked the mysterious Li Yechen, unaware that he was actually her fiancé's uncle. Driven by profit, he by pleasure, they had a whirlwind marriage. She sought revenge against the scumbags, and he protected her. When her true identity was revealed, her ex-husband knelt and called her "aunt." This marriage, which began as a transaction, ultimately allowed her to reclaim everything and gain true love and protection.
声声念晚 | "Evening Thoughts"

Guo Jia Nan, Yang Fan (RAW)Ten years ago, Gu Nianwan, who secretly loved Pei Yansheng, gave him her virginity. However, she overheard Pei Yansheng and his friends mocking her for being poor. She left after their mockery, which became a knot in Pei Yansheng's heart. Ten years later, Pei Yansheng deliberately reunited with her and could no longer suppress his feelings. He schemed repeatedly and finally married Gu Nianwan, only to be met with a divorce agreement.*Guo Jianan focused on duanju only now?
