Ma Yi Yan, Tang Qi Qi[HERE]16. 六零养崽，我家顿顿有肉 - Tong Zi Wei, Chen Xiao Ti[HERE]17. 竹马难逃，开启撒娇模式 - Huang Hao, Huang Pan Pan[HERE]18. 抱紧反派大腿后，全员洗白了 - Qian Zhe[HERE]19. 萌孙天降纨绔爷爷请接招 - Li Ren Zhi, Zhang Mo Lei[HERE]20. 以吻为刃 - Nie Ji Kun, Jiang Lai*[HERE]21. 声声念晚 - Guo Jia Nan, Yang Fan*[HERE]22. 捐了恋爱脑后，我在90只搞钱 - Feng Xiang Kun, Lin Zi Rong*[HERE]
旗袍下的荆棘 | "Thorns Under the Cheongsam"

Qiu Zhe Fu, An Xiao JieThe Fu family's adopted daughter, Sheng Shuran, and their illegitimate son, Chi Heng, have been entangled since childhood. Chi Heng, obsessively devoted, goes to great lengths to protect Sheng Shuran, even staging a car accident, punishing those who covet her, and defying the Fu family's power. Sheng Shuran struggles between dreams and reality, gradually seeing through the Fu family's hypocrisy and Chi Heng's true feelings. After enduring kidnapping, betrayal, and life-or-death trials, the two break free from ethical constraints and join hands to overcome obstacles. Ultimately, Chi Heng's marriage proposal is successful, Sheng Shuran becomes pregnant, and the two achieve a happy ending, spending their lives together.
捐了恋爱脑后，我在90只搞钱

Feng Xiang Kun, Lin Zi Rong (RAW)Lin Ting, a female CEO with a net worth of tens of millions, transmigrates into a melodramatic historical romance novel as a villainous supporting character who is driven mad by love and sentenced to 250 years in prison for "hooliganism" by the richest male lead! Lin Ting decides to rewrite the tragic ending of the book. Using her business acumen ahead of her time, she sets up a street stall, speculates in stocks, opens a clothing store, and builds a factory, becoming the richest woman first and sending the male lead to prison, reversing the tragic fate of the villainous supporting character! Meanwhile, the introverted and socially awkward Jiang Zong, a brave young master from Shanghai, silently protects her. To fight alongside her, he travels overseas to build a business empire, just to be worthy of her brilliance and meet her at the top.
放羊吧老板 | "Let the Sheep Go, Boss!"

Yang Peng Cheng, Wang Ge GeWang Anke, a divorced and unemployed wedding company owner, who travels to the grasslands and unexpectedly meets Zana, a grassland man, at her ex-husband's wedding. Their initial encounter is fraught with conflict. What was initially thought to be a fleeting meeting becomes increasingly complex as Wang Anke embarks on a second entrepreneurial venture on the grasslands, her interactions with Zana deepening and their hearts drawing closer. When their destined romance arrives, they are forced to confront the reality that the big city offers her the career she loves, while the grasslands are the wilderness he cannot live without. How will she choose between her passion and his freedom?
当归遇上野格 | "Angelica Meets Yege"

Lu Dan Dong, Zhu Xiao XueJiang Lai, a quirky and talented top bartender, unexpectedly rents the ancestral home of Su Jinghe, a scholar of traditional Chinese medicine with a restrained and ascetic lifestyle. When the unrestrained and flamboyant "Jägermeister" collides with the calm and reserved "Dang Gui" (a type of herbal drink), a clash between tradition and freedom unfolds. She is a passionate believer in nightlife, he is a refined scholar of traditional Chinese medicine focused on health and wellness; she is carefree and unconventional, he is strict and self-disciplined; she uses alcohol to express her true nature, he uses medicine to reflect on the passage of time. Two completely different souls are constantly pulled in different directions within the confines of the ancestral home, brewing a boundary-breaking love story amidst the tension between tradition and modernity.
天灾末世，她屯满物资后所向披靡 | "In the Apocalypse, She's Unstoppable After Stockpiling Supplies"

Huang Hao Wen, Li Li ZaiReborn, Annan avenges her enemies and fills her storage space. Betrayed by her scumbag father, stepsister, and fiancé, she decisively severs ties with family and supplies, preparing for an extreme apocalypse. The mysterious man she unexpectedly rescues turns out to be Gu Zhiyu, the heir to a billionaire's fortune. The two fight side-by-side, establishing a base and combating disease in a world where order has collapsed. When the secret of her rebirth is revealed, he chooses to unconditionally protect her space, for it is far less precious than her. In the face of the apocalypse, they fight to protect ordinary happiness.
发现前夫有读心术后，我演技爆棚 | "After Discovering I Had Mind Reading Skills, My Acting Skills Exploded"

Dong Xing Yan, Xu Xiao ShuReborn, Su Weiwei plots a divorce to distance herself from her ex-husband, Lu Yushi, and seek revenge. However, Lu Yushi unexpectedly awakens his mind-reading abilities, allowing him to hear all her ruthless complaints and schemes. To escape successfully, Su Weiwei activates her "acting superb" mode, appearing gentle and harmless on the surface while unleashing a torrent of inner turmoil, creating a hilarious and chaotic scene of contrasting personalities with the mind-reading Lu Yushi. In the ensuing struggle, the truth of their past lives is revealed.*The poster kinda misleading lol
念念有回响 | "Echoes of Love"

Lu Huan Yu, Li Bing BingSu Niansheng was pushed off a building and died by her husband's childhood sweetheart. Reborn back in school, she immediately got engaged to her childhood sweetheart, a wealthy young man. Unexpectedly, her ex-husband broke down in tears, begging for forgiveness. However, in this life, she would not look back. In her interactions with her childhood sweetheart, she discovered that the paper airplane that saved her all those years came from him, not her ex-husband. It turned out that he had been silently protecting her all these years.
夫人她真是修仙的 | "My Wife Is Truly a Cultivator of Immortality"

Li Yu Tong, Guo Xin RuiYun Qingqing grew up in a Taoist temple and knew nothing about modern society. With only 99 days left to live, her master told her that she and Lu Jiuyuan, the eldest son of the Lu family in the capital, were destined for each other. Only by conceiving a divine child could she extend her life, and Lu Jiuyuan could retain his domineering destiny. The cowardly Yun Qingqing immediately ran down the mountain, her head veiled in red, to marry Lu Jiuyuan. Her actions, including being slapped on the table by a dog, became a trending topic online. From then on, Lu Jiuyuan had a clever and adorable little white rabbit by his side.

孝子贤孙先别跪，老祖她才十八岁&一叶众生 | "Filial Sons and Grandsons, Don't Kneel Yet, Our Ancestor Is Only Eighteen Years Old & One Leaf, All Beings"- Shi Kang, Li Ke Yi, Liang Wen JingWhen the immortal Ye Lingyin ascended to heaven to undergo tribulation, she unexpectedly transmigrated into the body of Ye Xunyin, the sixth-generation great-grandson who died unjustly at the age of eighteen. Returning to the Ye family, Ye Lingyin witnessed its gradual decline, the incompetence of its descendants, and the fact that the young child she had raised was now an elderly patriarch who had been poisoned, leaving him powerless to manage the family business. She decided to stay in the mortal realm to revitalize the family and personally restore order to the clan.
此生嫁帝王，本宫才是真凤命 | "Marrying an Emperor in This Life, I Am the True Destiny"

Jin Xuan Yu, Yang Yi MoIn her previous life, Qin Shi was betrothed to a cruel crown prince by a childless emperor, but was killed by the prince after three years of childlessness. Reborn, Qin Shi is determined to change her fate. After swapping marriages with her half-sister, she takes control of the childless emperor first and quickly becomes pregnant. She saves the people from suffering and torments the crown prince. She will let the world know who the true destined one is.
空间在手换亲夫君是战神 | "With Space in Hand, My Husband is a War God"

Huang Zi Qi, Zhang Yi MengIn her past life, Su Yunwan had a complicated relationship with Li Zian. Reborn, to distance herself from Li Zian, she agrees to a marriage of convenience with He Xiangbei. She possesses a jade pendant space left by her mother, containing spiritual spring water, land, a library, and more, which can be upgraded by saving people. She utilizes the space's resources to improve her life and develop her family business, supporting each other with He Xiangbei. Later, she travels to the capital with Madam Xu and discovers that she is the Empress's long-lost daughter, and is bestowed the title of Princess Jia Ning.
山河为契，江山为聘 | "Mountains and Rivers as Contracts, the Empire as Dowry"

Li Yu Cheng, Zhou Yu XuanMiao Yuan, a holy maiden from Miao territory, sought to break a curse on herself and had a one-night stand with Emperor Zhou Jingheng, who was out of the palace to treat her leg. She conceived a child, but due to a misunderstanding, she gave Zhou Jingheng the wrong medicine, rendering him infertile and unable to have any contact with other women, greatly angering him. Six years later, Zhou Jingheng sought out renowned physicians from across the land. Miao Yuan, as the holy maiden of Miao territory, entered the palace to treat him. Through their interactions, the two gradually resolved their misunderstandings and fell genuinely in love.
南风卷尽长安雪 | "The South Wind Sweeps Away the Snow in Chang'an"

Jia Yan, Luo YiMu Shenge had a three-year entanglement with Crown Prince Qi Mu, believing he would finally grant her a legitimate status. However, Qi Mu was about to marry her elder sister, Mu Zhiyu, and kept her as a mistress, forever hidden from the public eye. Heartbroken, Mu Shenge agreed to marry Shen Yunyi. Before the wedding, she was repeatedly tormented and harassed by Mu Zhiyu, and Qi Mu, knowing the truth, willingly became an accomplice. On the day of Qi Mu and Mu Zhiyu's wedding, Mu Shenge was sent to marry a foreign prince to the border.
茶香四溢，爷他宠妻无度 | "Tea Fragrance Overflowing, My Lord Spoils His Wife Without Limits"

Wang Jia Mao, Li Shi QiLin Mingyan wished at the Yonghe Temple to live in a large house, served by a few servants, and enjoy the daily delicacies of a master chef. Instead, she was transported to ancient times, where, shortly after reaching marriageable age, her uncle sold her to the Fourth Prince as a concubine. Having arrived in ancient times, she no longer cared about a lifelong, monogamous relationship. Lin Mingyan changed her goal to living to 108 years old. So she diligently served as a concubine, vying for favor in the inner palace, though inwardly she felt no affection for her superior, the Fourth Prince. But unexpectedly, her rank skyrocketed. Some people cursed her, calling her "Lin Kunshi, you vixen!" Lin Mingyan exclaimed in surprise, "Oh dear, I don't deserve such a compliment!" Well, this praise was beautifully accepted by the newcomer.
七零空间：娇娇知青的宠夫日常 | The 1970s Space: The Daily Life of a Spoiled Educated Youth Spoiling Her Husband

Lei Yi Hao, Wang Yi ShuSong Ziyao is reborn in 1975, abandoning her arranged marriage in the city to resolutely go to the countryside to find her lover from her past life, Tan Jinhe. Armed with a portable space that connects to a future villa, she cleverly outwits her stepmother, fights back against her love rival, and navigates a complex web of adversaries. In the process of getting to know Tan Jinhe and eventually becoming a couple, she uses her wisdom and sincerity to resolve his inner conflicts. Together, they face rumors and persecution, and their feelings deepen over time. When Tan Jinhe unexpectedly regains his memories from his past life, their deep love across two lifetimes is finally fulfilled.
重生七零我闪婚，崽他爹竟是黑市掌舵人 | "Reborn in the 70s, I Had a Flash Marriage, and My Child's Father Was Actually the Black Market Boss"

Bai Hao, Li Xi WeiLin Fan transmigrates to the 1970s, unexpectedly becomes pregnant, and has a whirlwind marriage with Zheng Zijie, the behind-the-scenes boss of H City. Using modern thinking and knowledge, she helps her mother escape her abusive father and uses a "system" to promote the development of the machinery industry. She also slaps the face of the scheming second female lead and becomes the first woman in the open individual economy, achieving success in both love and career!
穿书后，我与老公守家产 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, My Husband and I Protect Our Family Property"

Wang Bo, Tang Qi QiAfter transmigrating into a novel, Shu Jiaran becomes a wealthy wife, only to find her husband, Lin Yutian, in a vegetative state. The original protagonists, Lin Xiuyuan and Shen Xinwan, covet her inheritance. To protect her wealth, Shu Jiaran, unlike her original foolish self, wins over Lin Yutian's younger siblings, Lin Anqi and Lin Yinan, engaging in a battle of wits with them. She unexpectedly discovers that Lin Yutian's consciousness can leave his body and accompany him. The two initially cooperate to fight their enemies, but gradually develop feelings for each other during their encounters. Ultimately, Lin Xiuyuan, Shen Xinwan, and the mastermind behind it all, Lin Xiangyu, are apprehended, Lin Yutian recovers, and Shu Jiaran not only preserves her life of luxury but also finds true love.
苦尽甘来缘是你 | "After Bitterness Comes Sweetness, It's You"

Du Yu Ze, Liu Xiao YuTo escape being sold by her family to marry a man to bring good fortune, Lin Xiao seeks help from Liang Chen, the president of the Liang Group, who happens to be passing by. Liang Chen, moved by her plight, saves her and arranges for her to attend one of his private schools. At school, Lin Xiao suffers discrimination and bullying, and is even forced to work part-time by her birth mother. It is there that she encounters Liang Chen again, and as they spend time together, feelings gradually develop between them.
炽炀 | "Blazing Fire"

Charon, Lan LanTop student Tang Yu is often bullied by rich girl Meng Shirui. In despair, he meets transfer student Bian Yang and agrees to three months of his protection in exchange for his help. During their time together, Bian Yang illuminates Tang Yu's darkness, and Tang Yu, in turn, redeems his lonely soul. The two find solace in each other amidst the storms of youth, ultimately walking side-by-side towards a bright future.
摄政王和他的黑月光 | "The Regent and His Dark Moonlight"

Wang Jia Mao, Chang Dan Dan (RAW)In her past life, Meng Qingchen, the daughter of the Prime Minister, was betrayed by her husband, Shu Wang'an, and her maid, Yan Shu, and died tragically. Reborn, she refuses to marry the hypocritical scholar Shu Wang'an and joins forces with Regent Ling Qingxuan to exact revenge. She battles Princess Xia Zhenzhen, exposes Shu Wang'an's conspiracy, and crushes the rebellion of Prince Xia Xiao of Zhennan. Ultimately, she avenges her enemies and marries Ling Qingxuan.
味斩乾坤 | "Taste Severing Heaven and Earth"

Zong Yan Chu, Zhao Zi Qi (RAW)Gao Shanchen, a folk culinary prodigy, went into hiding as a servant at Baiwei Restaurant after his father was wrongly accused. When his beloved Fang Huixue was framed by her family and faced a life-or-death crisis, he stepped forward and won the culinary competition with his astonishing skills. After his victory, he learned of the palace secrets behind his father's tragic death and resolutely decided to enter the palace to seek revenge. However, he unexpectedly lost his memory on his way to the capital and ended up wandering among the common people.

Yang Peng Cheng, Wang Ge Ge[HERE]2. 当归遇上野格 - Lu Dan Dong, Zhu Xiao Xue[HERE]3. 天灾末世，她屯满物资后所向披靡 - Huang Hao Wen, Li Li Zai[HERE]4. 发现前夫有读心术后，我演技爆棚 - Dong Xing Yan, Xu Xiao Shu[HERE]5. 念念有回响 - Lu Huan Yu, Li Bing Bing[HERE]6. 夫人她真是修仙的 - Li Yu Tong, Guo Xin Rui[HERE]7. 孝子贤孙先别跪，老祖她才十八岁&一叶众生 - Shi Kang, Li Ke Yi, Liang Wen Jing[HERE]8. 此生嫁帝王，本宫才是真凤命 - Jin Xuan Yu, Yang Yi Mo[HERE]9. 空间在手换亲夫君是战神 - Huang Zi Qi, Zhang Yi Meng[HERE]10. 山河为契，江山为聘 - Li Yu Cheng, Zhou Yu Xuan[HERE]11. 南风卷尽长安雪 - Jia Yan, Luo Yi[HERE]12. 茶香四溢，爷他宠妻无度 - Wang Jia Mao, Li Shi Qi[HERE]13. 七零空间：娇娇知青的宠夫日常 - Lei Yi Hao, Wang Yi Shu[HERE]14. 重生七零我闪婚，崽他爹竟是黑市掌舵人 - Bai Hao, Li Xi Wei[HERE]15. 穿书后，我与老公守家产 - Wang Bo, Tang Qi Qi[HERE]16. 苦尽甘来缘是你 - Du Yu Ze, Liu Xiao Yu[HERE]17. 炽炀 - Charon, Lan Lan[HERE]18. 摄政王和他的黑月光 - Wang Jia Mao, Chang Dan Dan[HERE]19. 味斩乾坤 - Zong Yan Chu, Zhao Zi Qi[HERE]
等待你的降临 | "Waiting for Your Arrival"

Wang Xuan, Zhang ShanSu Min unexpectedly gains the ability to travel between comic book worlds. She enters the comic "Drowning," co-created by Su Min and Su Yanxiu, and approaches the gloomy, ill-tempered Li Zhou as a transfer student, attempting to change his fate. Meanwhile, in reality, Su Yanxiu is shaken by her unusual behavior. Traveling between the two worlds, Su Min gradually discovers that Li Zhou is Su Yanxiu's dark mask, and that she has fallen in love with the real him beneath the mask. The ending is rewritten—not drowning in darkness, but a rebirth.
朝阳似我 | "The Rising Sun Resembles Me"

Zhao Ting Yi, Liang Wen JingRuan Chaoyang was laid off on her first day of employment, but an unexpected encounter with Cheng Huaizhou changed the course of her life. Through his recommendation, she transformed from a newcomer into a capable business analyst. In their workplace interactions, she and Cheng Huaizhou developed feelings for each other and became a couple. Faced with Cheng Huaizhou's vulnerability—his fear of love and inability to express it—beneath his perfect exterior, Ruan Chaoyang patiently and gently healed him with her understanding and optimism.
四姊妹的八零年代 | "The Four Sisters in the 1980s"

He Cong Rui, Xu Meng YuanThe four Gu sisters, orphaned at a young age, endured hardship under the cold eyes of their uncle and aunt, but never bowed to fate. The feisty and decisive Gu Erhui led her sisters away from the countryside and started a new life in the provincial capital by selling clothes. She not only outwitted her uncle and aunt and other petty people, but also fell in love with Ye Yunzhou, together composing a sweet love song in the 1980s.
捡来的女儿是隐藏款福宝 | "The Adopted Daughter is a Hidden Lucky Charm"

Mao Zhi Yuan, Zhang Jia YiSeven-year-old Xia Ruanruan is blessed with good fortune, but also plagued by bad luck. She must use genuine affection to dispel this bad luck in order to usher in good fortune; otherwise, letting it run rampant will harm both herself and others. After being abandoned multiple times, she meets the domineering CEO Xia Zefeng. However, shortly after being adopted, Xia Zefeng goes bankrupt. Instead of blaming Xia Ruanruan, he uses her as motivation. Unbeknownst to him, if the 3 billion yuan debt isn't repaid within a month, the cursed luck within Xia Ruanruan will backfire. To repay her debt, Ruanruan uses every trick in the book to get close to Ji Li, a wealthy heiress pressured by her family to marry. Thus begins a mutually beneficial transaction.
穿成娇小姐后她以武服人 | "After Transmigrating as a Pampered Young Lady, She Subdues People with Martial Arts"

Li Xin Yi, Shi Xuan HongNan Xiangwan, a modern-day all-around genius with a spatial ability, transmigrated into the body of a capitalist's heiress in the 1960s after reading a novel and criticizing it. Facing a tragic fate of being sent to the countryside to die after being framed by her scumbag father and stepmother, she retaliated fiercely, reclaiming the Nan family fortune and exposing her parents' crimes to the public. She avenged her mother and grandfather, and also made her stepsister, who had bullied her, suffer the consequences of her actions by being sent to a remote mountain village. After resolving these issues, Nan Xiangwan and Xie Yunting lived a life of mutual support and ruthless revenge on the reborn heroine who had destroyed their relationship.
哎呀，捡来的爹地竟是太子爷 | "Oh My, the Daddy I Got Here Is Actually the Crown Prince"

Huang Wen Bo, Huang Yun YunSingle mother Shen Nuo has a whirlwind marriage to the cold-faced gangster Shan Linyuan. She fiercely protects her husband, while Shan Linyuan feigns weakness to pamper her, and their adorable child provides loving support. However, a truth stemming from jealousy is revealed, putting their marriage on the brink of collapse. Ultimately, the truth about their parent-child relationship is revealed, and the family of three, amidst the crisis, honestly expresses their love and reunite after a bittersweet journey.
病娇不要黑化啊＆恶毒女配她只想活命 | "Don't Turn Evil, Yandere & The Vicious Female Supporting Character Just Wants to Live"

He Yu Yang, Mo NingXie Tang transmigrated into a novel, becoming the vicious female supporting character to the yandere male lead, Yan Yun Shen. To reverse her fate of being destined for revenge, she decided to rewrite the plot and refuse to be cannon fodder! So, Xie Tang began to stand up for Yan Yun Shen, fight against the villains, show him concern, and help him resolve his inner conflicts. Finally, she found a chance to escape, but unexpectedly, Yan Yun Shen, the yandere male lead, completely ignored the novel's female lead and only wanted to keep Xie Tang by his side!
刷满任务就跑路 | "Complete All Task And Run Away"

Cao Jing Hao, Zhao Zhao'erYe Xiyao, a terminally ill girl, is suddenly bound to a "life command system" and forced to complete 20 commands from the aloof CEO He Yanci to survive. To prolong her life, she relentlessly completes these tasks—going to work, undergoing chemotherapy, being scolded, and begging for orders—a journey filled with both laughter and heartbreak. Unexpectedly, she stumbles into the world of the CEO and his son. As the tasks progress, the cold-faced CEO gradually breaks down, becoming obsessively protective. Upon completing the tasks, she leaves behind divorce papers and disappears. Until a life-or-death crisis exposes the truth—it turns out that the person who most wanted her to live was him all along.
月光皎皎离人归 | "The Moon Shines Brightly, the Parting Returns"

Ma Ying Lu, Li Ya YaSu Ranran's fiancé, Shen Jinyan, was in a car accident and became a vegetable, leaving Su Ranran devastated. At this time, a system approached her, proposing that if she successfully won over Jiang Yu, she could revive Shen Jinyan. Su Ranran agreed without hesitation, thus becoming Xiao Anran and beginning her pursuit of Jiang Yu. On her tenth attempt, she successfully won over Jiang Yu and saved Shen Jinyan. After overcoming numerous obstacles, Jiang Yu let go, and Su Ranran and Shen Jinyan achieved a happy ending.
笼中月 | "The Moon in the Cage"

Ni Hao Sen, Sun Yi RanLeng Xinyue, originally the eldest daughter of the Grand Secretary, was framed by a treacherous official and exiled to the frontier. She and her younger sister were forced to live among commoners. Later, she was adopted and trained as a secret guard by Prince Fu Mingyu, who then placed her undercover within Fu Minglou's inner circle. Leng Xinyue fell in love with Fu Minglou and they consummated their relationship. When Fu Mingyu discovered this, he threatened Leng Xinyue with her sister's death, forcing her to choose between two lives. Leng Xinyue betrayed Fu Minglou for her sister's sake. Years later, Fu Minglou returns victorious. What sparks will fly between them?
穿成二百斤的胖王妃后，她得宠了 | "After Transmigrating into a 200-Pound Fat Princess, She Gained Favor"

Xie Hong Xin, Jing Jing XiangA renowned traditional Chinese medicine doctor transmigrates into the body of a 200-pound overweight princess. With one hand, she uses silver needles to cure incurable diseases; with the other, she uses her wits to redress injustices. She makes a deal with a sickly, sharp-tongued prince: "Cure the poison in exchange for freedom." Intending to retire gracefully, she is surprised when the prince presses his forehead against hers and says in a deep voice, "Only you can cure my poison, and my heart belongs only to you." When the slimming miracle doctor amazes the world, the arrogant prince is willing to abandon his kingdom for her, together weaving a sweet and equally matched legend.
不休夫，我连饭都吃不饱 | "If I Don't Divorce My Husband, I Can't Even Get Enough to Eat"

Li Mu Jie, Chen Xi XiUpon waking up, the food blogger finds herself transmigrated. Originally a beautiful woman, she's now in the body of Guan Xiyue, a plump concubine. Through the original owner's memories, she discovers that being a concubine isn't easy; without divorcing her husband, she won't even have enough to eat. Well, she decides to make the best of it and sees how she escapes this concubine's status, battles various awful characters around the original owner, and brings all the modern delicacies to the ancient world. She'll get rich, become beautiful and powerful, and incidentally, even take a general home, thus reaching the pinnacle of life.
神算娇妻：病弱世子有点甜 | "The Divine Fortune Teller's Beloved Wife: The Sickly Prince is a Little Sweet"

Jiang Jun Han, Lu Meng LinJiang Wanbai was betrothed to Qi Qingyun, the heir of the Qi Marquis's mansion, from a young age. However, due to a fortune teller's prediction that she was unsuitable for marriage, she was taken away from the capital. Ten years later, Jiang Wanbai descended the mountain at her master's dying wish and met the benefactor Qi Qingyun. Neither of them knew the other's true identity, and they chased each other all the way to the capital. Unbeknownst to her, Jiang Wanbai owed Qi Qingyun a large sum of money and could only stay by his side to help him change his fate. In reality, Qi Qingyun already knew that Jiang Wanbai was his fiancée and secretly kept track of the debt, each installment a testament to his feelings for her.
君临裙下 | "Under the Emperor's Skirt"

Li Ruo Xun, Wang Hai MinReborn, Shen Zhinian saves Emperor Xiao Yan on their wedding night, binding them together in a deal: he becomes her weapon for revenge. However, Xiao Yan possesses the ability to read minds, seeing through all her pretenses. The two gradually transform from allies testing each other into partners willing to die for each other, facing the taboo of "a ruler taking a subject's wife" and court intrigues together, ultimately finding their final destination amidst power struggles and genuine affection.
白马入芦花 | "A White Horse Enters the Reeds"

Ji Zhong Qing, Yang Shu YiWhen Zhu Qinghuan was kidnapped by bandits, her bodyguard, A Cang, disappeared without a trace. She suffered greatly in the bandits' den, only to return to find that it was all A Cang's doing, a scheme to avenge his scheming half-sister. A Cang's true identity was not that of a homeless orphan, but rather the only crown prince of the dynasty—Xiao Yunlan. Devastated by the truth, Zhu Qinghuan decided to marry a foreign prince. After Zhu Qinghuan left, Xiao Yunlan, upon learning his half-sister's true nature, was filled with remorse, but it was too late.
错嫁少帅宠上瘾 | "Wrongly Married to the Young Marshal, Addicted to Pampering"

Wang Jin Bao, Zhang Wen LuSeven years ago, Su Zhaoxue saved Chi Zhen and unexpectedly became pregnant and gave birth to Lele. Seven years later, the Su family went bankrupt. Su Zhaoxue agreed to marry into the Song family because Lele needed money for medical treatment. Xu Ximan, who used to be Su Zhaoxue's maid, returned from studying abroad. Xu Ximan was favored by the old master of the Chi family and was to marry Chi Zhen. In order to make Su Zhaoxue stand out on her wedding day, Xu Ximan deliberately married Su Zhaoxue. However, due to a series of coincidences, Su Zhaoxue mistakenly married Chi Zhen, who was also getting married on the same day!
八零小医妻逆转人生路 | "The Little Doctor's Wife in the 80s Reverses Her Life"

Wu Lin, Peng DanModern doctor Su Qingqing transmigrates to the 1970s, initially facing a broken engagement and false accusations, but unexpectedly marries Gu Jingchen, the man of her dreams. With her superb medical skills, she resolves the difficulties posed by her neighbors, heals Gu Jingchen's leg injury, and slaps down awful relatives and a scheming rival. From rural clinics to international medical conferences, from being questioned to gaining authoritative recognition, Su Qingqing's journey is one of triumph. She establishes a traditional Chinese medicine foundation to benefit the people. During this time, she and Gu Jingchen join hands to fight against family conspiracies and business schemes, overcoming countless obstacles together, ultimately achieving both career success and a fulfilling love.
穿书七零新婚夜被送到隔壁借宿 | "Transmigrated into a Book in the 70s, Sent to Stay Next Door on Her Wedding Night"

Yuan Zhi Ying, Ma Ming JieUniversity physics professor Lin Jianchun transmigrates into a novel as an unlucky supporting female character in the 1970s. On her wedding night, she unexpectedly finds herself with the male lead, Lu Xuanzhou, and faces difficulties from her former fiancé, the Song family. She uses her intelligence to fight back against the Song family, wins the Lu family's approval, and seizes an opportunity to work at a hospital, establishing herself through her professional skills. During this time, she and Lu Xuanzhou develop feelings for each other, working together to overcome the Song family's schemes and the challenges of being sent to the countryside. Ultimately, they find happiness and change the original tragic ending of the novel.
七零养爹日记 | "Diary of Raising a Father in the 70s"

Ge Xiu Yan, Wang Yue YiLin Xiaoman was reborn into an old-fashioned, tragic novel. As she grew older, she gradually remembered the plot. When she was five, her mother, Lin Jing, died young from lung disease, and her father, whom she had never met, was framed and imprisoned in an accident. She, on the other hand, was reduced to a pitiful child, bullied by everyone, and died of depression in her early twenties. Standing at this crucial juncture in her life at five, Lin Xiaoman vowed to change everything: buy medicine for her mother, find her father, and alter the tragic ending of the book. To live a better life, she even began her daily life as a "chicken dad," trying to reunite her parents and make their life prosperous. The pitiful child transformed into a beloved figure.
认命&栀寂山河，乱世情赊 | "Accepting Fate & Desolate Mountains and Rivers, Love in Chaotic Times"

Li Pu He, Tang Jing (RAW)Qiao Zhi, a child bride in the Shen family, was forced into a relationship with Fu Jishan, the governor of Yanping, because her husband, Prefect Shen, was infertile. Fu Jishan also used Qiao Zhi to get close to Wang Lucai, the secretary-general of the Japanese army, to complete a secret mission. However, Fu Jishan gradually became attracted to Qiao Zhi, while Qiao Zhi discovered the tenderness beneath his cold exterior. Just as Qiao Zhi wanted to tell Fu Jishan that she was pregnant with his child, he received a new mission.
二嫁督军 | "Remarried to the Warlord"

Zhang Lei, Tan Yan Yan (RAW)Bai Xiaofan broke with her father to marry Jiang Xincheng, but was treated coldly after the marriage and was even used as a tool to climb the social ladder, being given to Sheng Yan. Sheng Yan relentlessly pursued her, and Bai Xiaofan gradually fell for him. However, when a woman who looked remarkably like herself appeared, she mistook her for a substitute and ran away. Sheng Yan went to great lengths to win her back, uncovering the truth—the white moonlight he had been searching for for many years was indeed her. It turned out that Bai Xiaofan had suffered amnesia due to an accident, and the child was also Sheng Yan's. After overcoming Jiang Xincheng's schemes and the Presidential Palace's conspiracy, the two joined hands to break through the straits. In the end, Bai Xiaofan regained her memory, and she and Sheng Yan held a wedding, achieving a happy ending.
裴先生你的心尖儿老婆又想离婚啦&裴先生的复婚攻略 | "Mr. Pei, Your Beloved Wife Wants a Divorce Again & Mr. Pei's Remarriage Strategy"

Long Chen, Lu Lan YuRong Shu, a transmigrated woman, unexpectedly becomes the villainous supporting character in a novel. To escape her tragic fate, she desperately seeks a divorce from the male lead, Pei Jingcheng. However, Pei Jingcheng falls deeply in love with her, misunderstanding that Rong Shu's various "evil deeds" are merely attempts to attract his attention. Furthermore, his ability to hear her inner thoughts only strengthens his resolve. Meanwhile, the original female lead, Jian Xue, acting as the strategist, repeatedly frames Rong Shu in an attempt to win back Pei Jingcheng, but fails each time. Ultimately, her system is shut down, and she reaps the consequences of her actions.
系统出错，我和死对头生了个崽 | "System Error, I Had a Child with My Nemesis"

Zou Ke Jun, Zhai Xin RanRuan Tang, an 18-year-old college student, unexpectedly transmigrates to her 26-year-old self, only to find herself not only married to her childhood sweetheart and nemesis, Leng Jing, but also with a 5-year-old son. However, in the past, she had abused her son and transferred family assets to pursue Qin Yu, a man from a humble background who had achieved success, deeply hurting her family. Awakening to her past, Ruan Tang decides to change her fate. She confronts scheming women, outwits scumbags, and uses her 18-year-old innocence and warmth to heal her son's psychological trauma. She and Leng Jing go from misunderstanding to love. Ultimately, she uncovers Qin Yu's "charming system" conspiracy, protects her family, and writes her own life's script.*Another Leng Xiao Wang-Ruan Tang story..
真千金身份曝光，惊乍全网 | "The Real Heiress's Identity Exposed, Shocking the Entire Internet"

Liu Yan Chen, Wang Yan Fei (RAW)The fortune teller Ying Zijin transmigrates into the body of a neglected heiress of a wealthy family. Her aunt desperately needs her help, a fake heiress tries to embarrass her, and her parents think she's not elegant enough. Hmm? Ying Zijin casually reveals a few identities: ancient martial arts, ancient medicine, and an ancient conglomerate, causing global tycoons to bow down in worship, leaving the entire Ying family dumbfounded!*Liu Yanchen's drama always get taken down on Youtube lately...
青山归杳处 | "Green Hills Return to the Distant Place"

Wang Hao Zhen, Shi Xue JingThe male lead, Zhou Zhenliang, is a prominent figure who falls in love with the female lead, Gu Yao, at first sight and begins to pursue her. However, due to the difference in their social status, Gu Yao both respects and fears Zhou Zhenliang, and dares not face his true feelings, repeatedly backing down. Once Zhou Zhenliang is determined, he forges ahead and actively pursues his love. As they get to know each other, their feelings deepen, and they eventually become a couple.
金屋藏骄 | "Hidden Beauty"

Wu Tian Hao, Deng Ling ShuCui Yuntan discovers that the aloof school heartthrob, Shi Jin, is secretly dating someone behind her back. Without hesitation, Cui Yuntan finds a blond-haired guy on the street as her new love interest. This guy is not only obedient and sensible but also very professional, often making Cui Yuntan's heart flutter. Little does she know that this understanding and well-behaved younger brother is actually Shen Yan, the heir to the Shen Group. At this time, Shen Yan is using the alias Zhou Xi and has run away from home to pursue his dream of entering the entertainment industry. Because Cui Yuntan witnessed her sister being hurt by her lover since childhood, she doesn't understand love and is afraid to love, only daring to be with the person she likes in unconventional ways. Two people with their own hidden agendas finally bravely face their true feelings and find happiness after spending a long time together.
吻安我的老公大人 | "Goodnight, My Husband"

Min Jie, Liu Xi YuMarried into a wealthy family under a substitute name? Xia Zhi is determined to tear up the script! To rebel against her father, she runs away from her arranged marriage but accidentally flirts with a mysterious male model, signing a contractual marriage. She seeks revenge in the workplace, while he silently protects her behind the scenes. When the impoverished male model's disguise is revealed, it turns out to be Qi Zhengting, the head of a business empire. From pawn to player, Xia Zhi finally reclaims everything, and President Qi declares with a globally watched wedding that she has always been his only love and salvation.
热夜正浓 | "Hot Night"

Wang Xuan, Li Ruo Qi (RAW)On the day Xu Suining broke up with Jiang Ze, heartbroken, she went to a bar to "fish for men" to clear her mind, but unexpectedly hooked up with her ex-boyfriend Jiang Ze's cousin—Chen Lu. As a recognized aloof beauty in the circle of wealthy young men in Kyoto, Chen Lu is cold and noble, and is the only person in the circle that her ex-boyfriend Jiang Ze dared not speak out against and was afraid of from the bottom of his heart. An unexpected encounter thus began.*Not many Wang Xuan's Duanju can survive Youtube's copyright attack. It's basically a race against them. And as a non-VIP Baidu user, downloading from Baidu is annoying lol
她的香气 | "Her Fragrance"

Xiao Kai Zhong, Dai Qi XuanLiving under the roof of her stepmother's house, Lu Lingran suffers constant bullying, with her stepbrother Zhang Yuche relentlessly pushing her to the brink of despair. At a birthday party, the mysterious CEO Lin Zhuo, drawn by a strange fragrance, enters her room. It's the familiar scent that repeatedly appears in her dreams—"Your scent, it smells so good." When reality and dreams intertwine, she doesn't know whether this man is her salvation or another abyss. Her mother's inheritance, a marriage conspiracy, and a love that is imprisoned—a dangerous game of desire and redemption unfolds.*Even Kaizhong is entering the Duanju world now. Seems like he's becoming the highest profile one to enter as of now. He's definitely more high profile than Luo Zheng, Zhang He, Li Zifeng, Qiu Baihao, and Zhang Sifan; fame-wise (in Mainland). Who else is joining Duanju next?
落入你的红尘万丈 | "Falling into Your Mortal World"

Cheng Cheng, Xu Si QiTo repay a debt of gratitude, underworld boss Xiao Zhen enters into a marriage agreement with his savior. However, a fortune teller claims he's cursed with bad luck, destined to bring death to his wife and child. He then hastily marries Wen Xu, using her as a scapegoat. Yet, Wen Xu, like a gentle sun, repeatedly touches Xiao Zhen's wounded heart. But to fulfill his promise of gratitude, Xiao Zhen forcibly avoids his feelings for Wen Xu. Until Wen Xu "dies" in childbirth, he unexpectedly learns that the female supporting character and her family have been deceiving him all along, and that Wen Xu was the one who saved him in his youth. Years later, Xiao Zhen encounters the miraculously alive Wen Xu again. This time, he will never let her go!
穿进短剧后，夫人她整顿直播界 | "After Transmigrating into a Short Drama, the Madam Reorganizes the Live Streaming Industry"

Liu Yan Chen, Wu Yi ChunYang Ruoqian unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel as a villainous supporting female character, bound to a useless artist cultivation system. Dedicated to making a struggling artist more popular, the system only makes them rise to fame. A tech genius and a sharp-tongued e-sports player become wildly popular, while the domineering CEO Qin Yan transforms from indifferent to fiercely protective. A story of unconventional success, achieving both career and love success, navigating an alternative entertainment industry!
赘入爱河 | "Falling into Love"

Luo Dong Xu, Yang Tian YuZhou Qingyang, the second daughter of a wealthy family, falls in love with Lu Tianye, a bartender who ran away from his arranged marriage. Her brother, Lu Tianchen, joins the Zhou Group and gradually develops a romantic entanglement with Zhou Wanning, the eldest daughter of the Zhou family. Meng Chadao, a senior executive of the group, schemes to seize control of the company. Lu Tianye and the Zhou sisters join forces to fight against the conspiracy and resolve the crisis. The Lu brothers, after a period of estrangement, eventually reconcile. The group's founder, Zhou Kaifu, after recovering from his illness, cleans up the family and respects his daughter's choice. The two brothers marry into the Zhou family, and the two mismatched couples finally get together.
魔女一怒闹翻天 | "The Witch's Wrath Turns the World Upside Down"

Tan Zhen Hao, Liu Jia ManPrincess Su Luoluo of the Demon Realm possesses the ability to hear people's thoughts and knows all the secrets of immortals and demons. She is also greedy, lustful, and does whatever she pleases. One day, the witch is caught peeping at the most handsome immortal lord and is punished by being sent to the mortal realm to experience tribulations. The immortal lord, Siming, sets up these tribulations, requiring her to reverse the tragedy of the Su family, find her true love, and regain her identity. Su Luoluo, who transmigrates into the body of the true daughter of the Su family, loses her ability to hear people's thoughts; instead, her own feelings are overheard by her family, who repeatedly preempt her. She is even forced to fall in love by the immortal lord. Ultimately, she chooses to submit, which leads to her victory.
重逢傅總破了妨，花式追妻 | "Reunited with President Fu, He Overcame Barriers and Pursued His Wife in Various Ways"

Zhang Pei Bao, Yang Yun XunA year after their breakup, Shen Qingyan went to the doctor for irregular menstruation and unexpectedly stumbled upon her ex-boyfriend, Fu Yaochen, who was posing as a doctor. Past misunderstandings had led her to leave decisively, but Fu Yaochen refused to let go, pursuing her relentlessly. From his devoted protection of her by concealing the truth about the car accident, to his tender care and anonymous companionship, and then to his fight against his family and clearing obstacles for her, Fu Yaochen used his sincerity to resolve their differences. Facing family resistance and the interference of old enemies, the two rekindled their old love amidst their struggles, ultimately overcoming numerous obstacles to walk hand in hand into the hall of marriage, continuing their perfect love story.
重生后我改嫁病弱老公，三个竹马悔不当初＆天命不渡负心人 | "After Rebirth, I Remarried to a Sickly Husband, and My Three Childhood Sweethearts Regretted Their Past Actions & Fate Does Not Save the Unfaithful"

Zhang Lei, Chu Qian YueIn her past life, Ye Zhizhi searched for her husband Jiang Chen, only to discover he already had children with her best friend Liu Wan. She was then murdered by her childhood sweetheart Gu Huaisheng and Zhao Jiashu. Reborn, holding the destiny books of five great families, she no longer defies fate for her unfaithful childhood sweetheart, resolutely choosing the sickly Lu Ci. When everyone pressures her again for Liu Wan's sake, she laughs lightly and tears up the destiny books. In this life, only Lu Ci is worthy of her using the power of the Nuo God to defy fate and extend her life, to be reborn together.*They censored the kiss scenes lol
契约新娘：陆总请按需投喂 | "Contract Bride: President Lu, Please Feed Me as Needed"

Chen Lei Lei, Zhao Mei XuanFormer heiress Su Yaoguang, though fallen from grace, remains optimistic and courageous. To make ends meet, she accepts her best friend's invitation to enter into a contract marriage with the aloof CEO Lu Chenzhou, agreeing to spend all the funds he provides. Little does she know, this is Lu Chenzhou's confession of love, hidden for over a decade. With her strong work ethic and sharp mind, Su Yaoguang is highly favored in the Lu family, repeatedly turning the tables in the socialite circle, and winning over those around her with her sincerity. Lu Chenzhou, initially indifferent, is gradually drawn to her vibrancy and kindness, transforming into a devoted husband, clearing obstacles for her and showing her tenderness.
我家来了只财神猫 | "A Lucky Cat Came to My House"

He Zhao Yuan, Chen ChengDespite her impoverished circumstances, Xerox remained optimistic and found an injured kitten on an ordinary night while working overtime. What she thought was just a chance encounter quietly changed her life: unexpectedly, she found more money in her wallet, a handsome new neighbor moved in upstairs, and even her boyfriend, a freeloader, disappeared... Was the world really so wonderful?
锁情结 | "Locked-up Feelings"

Li Jing Ze, Ma Qian QianDriven by a desire for revenge for the massacre of her entire family, Song Wan infiltrates the Lu family under an assumed name, becoming the tutor of the纨绔幼帅 (a spoiled young master) Lu Ting. She navigates the complex relationship between Lu Ting and his adopted son, Lu He, exploiting their conflict to uncover the truth. In her power struggle with Lu Ting, the two go from being adversaries to gradually developing feelings for each other. Lu Ting, seemingly carefree and nonchalant, is actually secretly plotting and repeatedly saves Song Wan from danger, causing their relationship to quickly intensify. Meanwhile, the truth of what happened years ago gradually comes to light!
七零旺家小辣妈 | "A Prosperous and Hot Mom in the 70s"

Zou Sheng Wen, Peng Dai DaiSix years ago, Shen Yunzhi was framed and had a relationship with Gu Chengyan. After becoming pregnant, her letters were intercepted by Su Shiyu, one of Gu Chengyan's suitors. After giving birth alone, she was harmed by her stepmother and rendered "mentally challenged." Her soul then transmigrated fifty years in the future, becoming a painter and gaining a spatial ability. Five years later, she returned reborn, punishing her wicked stepmother, scumbag father, and bad brother. She then sought justice from Gu Chengyan with her five-year-old son, Manzai. Gu Chengyan had always cared for Shen Yunzhi. The two resolved the misunderstanding in the letters and worked together to overcome Su Shiyu's repeated harassment and framing. Gu Chengyan fiercely protected his wife, and the two eventually married. Manzai was successfully registered, and the family of three lived happily ever after.
穿越80，厨娘御夫有道 | "Transmigrating to the 80s, the Cook's Way of Taming Her Husband"

Lin Xiao, Geng Chi ShuOn the day she was preparing to hire male models to taste her dishes, renowned chef Shen Ning was unexpectedly transported to the 1980s in a car accident. She was left with a mother who died young, a biased father, and a wicked mother-in-law—a classic tragic love story. Shen Ning rolled up her sleeves: "Handsome men tasting dishes? Watch how I navigate the 1980s and win back my handsome husband!" Shen Ning abandoned the original owner's bad habits, focusing solely on hard work. She set up a breakfast stall, participated in a culinary competition, and even managed to woo her handsome husband, Xu Yuanzhou. The two fell in love and eventually lived a happy and sweet life together.
重生之涅槃蔷薇 | "Rebirth of the Rose"

Zhao Tan You, Shi Xiao YeGu Qiangwei is reborn in 1980, filled with resentment. Facing her ex-husband Lu Zhoushan and his family, who had deceived and exploited her, she resolves to rewrite her destiny. Using her memories from her past life and her resilience, she decisively breaks free from the Lu family's entanglement and, together with her best friend, starts a clothing store, quickly gaining recognition amidst the reform wave thanks to her unique vision. During this time, she meets Su Qingyi, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other through mutual support, eventually marrying and achieving both a thriving career and a happy family life.
换亲后，我在王府当主母 | "After the Exchange Marriage, I Became the Mistress of the Prince's Mansion"

Huang Jing Zhou (Xiao Tai), Feng Yi RanShen Wantang, the illegitimate daughter of the Shen family, and Shen Mingxuan, the legitimate daughter, both reborn before their arranged marriages. In previous lives, Shen Mingxuan married into the royal family but met a tragic end, while Shen Wantang helped a poor scholar rise to high office. Reborn, Shen Mingxuan tries to force a marriage with the poor scholar, pushing the heir apparent towards Shen Wantang in an attempt to make her repeat her fate. However, Shen Wantang, through her wisdom and resilience, not only wins the respect of everyone in the royal family but also develops feelings for the heir apparent, Xiao Qingyuan. When the two discover that they are each other's childhood sweethearts, they overcome numerous trials and finally become a couple. Meanwhile, Shen Mingxuan and others, driven by jealousy and scheming, ultimately reap the consequences of their actions.
撒娇丑妃最好命 | "The Ugly Concubine Who Knows Best Has the Best Fate"

Tan Si Yuan, Mo NingSong Jiaren, a descendant of ancient physicians, transmigrated into the body of the ugliest woman in the land, sporting a triple double chin. Not only was she married to a sickly prince on his deathbed, but she was also falsely accused on her wedding night. She used her strength to slap him in the face, tear apart the scheming woman, and lead her ancient sisters to become beautiful.

无声的誓言 | "Silent Oath"

Zuo Ming, Yao Yu ChenIn the summer of 1937, the Japanese army conducted exercises in Binjiang. Cheng Yu pursues Mei Xiang under the pseudonym of postman Chen Ming, and becomes involved in the "Kill His Horse Plan" controversy. Before his father Cheng Zhenshan was assassinated, he entrusted the plan to Cheng Yu and ordered him to wait for the contact person. Cheng Yu discovers that Mei Xiang is actually a Japanese spy. After the core character Qiao Junsheng died, Cheng Yu cooperated with the driver Achang and the latent police officer Yan Ruonan to crack the encrypted text from the music box. Mei Xiang sets fire to force the plan, but Cheng Yu counterattacks and kills her. Yan Ruonan's identity is revealed, and she is actually Junsheng's wife and sister. Cheng Yu joined the anti-Japanese organization and separated from Yan Ruonan due to missions. In the end, the "Kill the Horse Plan" was restarted and everyone rushed to the front line.
闪婚甜妻竟能续命＆闪婚甜妻竟能给总裁续命 | "The Sweet Wife in a Flash Marriage Can Actually Extend the Life of he CEO"

Deng Chao Yuan (Aaron Deng), Liao Hui Min (Leng Ba)Xu Jinhuan was cursed with blood, so he entered into a contract with Fu Jinxiu, the grandson of the dying richest man, to extend his life. On the day of the wedding, Fu Jinxiu wakes up and is bound to the resurrection system - completing strange tasks can renew his life. Every time Xu Jinhuan says "husband" is worth one hour of life. One is counting down to the expected number of births, and the other is doing crazy tasks to survive, but they are in the middle of each other's fight.*Even Deng Chaoyuan is in Duanju scene now.... or his scandal brought him here? 🤔
他赐我满身荆棘 | "He Gave Me a Body Full of Thorns"

Qian Zhe, Wang Yi YangSang Yanning fought for Gu Zechuan's family through life and death, but she became a pawn between him and Mu Wanwan. Her mother's danger made her completely heartbroken. She offered a reward of 100 million to snatch the wedding, and the mysterious boss Xie Huaizhou accepted the order and accepted the appointment. After the wedding counterattack, Sang Yanning emptied the Gu family's property, and when she cooperated with Xie Huaizhou, she learned that he was his childhood benefactor. The two teamed up to thwart Mu Wanwan and Zhang Xueer's conspiracy, and Sang Yanning's true identity caused Gu and Zhang to go bankrupt. In the end, Gu Zechuan and Mu Wanwan died together, and Sang Yanning and Xie Huaizhou got married and were reborn together.
炽猎＆危局灼心 | "Blazing Hunting & Heart-burning Crisis"

Lai Yi, Qin Tian AiIn a love affair, Jiang Yuan was killed and her family was destroyed. In order to take revenge, Jiang Yuanbing made a dangerous move and took the initiative to provoke Yin Dong, the crown prince of the Yin family. Yin Dong is cruel and ruthless, and the city is extremely deep. But Jiang Yuan has a vengeful beast in his heart, and is determined to get involved with his own life. Yin Dong hated women who seduced him for profit, but when the incident was revealed, he clasped Jiang Yuan's wrist tightly and collapsed: I am willing to do so.*It's been a while since I saw Lai Yi. He also joins Duanju now?

笼中雀 | "Bird in a Cage"- Hu Rong Tao, Yang Luo QianAfter Song Zhenxing found out that she was the heroine of the novel who died at the beginning, she completely tore up the script of "Good Girl". To angrily criticize the scumbag, he directly hired a 20-year-old "well-behaved" man Dakai Lu Xie to act as a shield. The younger brother is caring and capable, making him the strongest support. But when Song Zhenxing gradually indulged in Lu Xie's company, he suddenly discovered that this "Q student" was actually the fiancé he had never met in the legend. All the gentleness and obedience were carefully disguised traps. The CP of the siblings suddenly changed into a high-end game. Is he a bird in a cage or a chess player?
明月下西楼 | "Bright Moon Under the West Tower"

Zhang Yun Tao, Xu LiangWen Xuyue cleaned up Xie Huai's mess for five years, just to exchange for her mother's freedom. On the eve of the engagement party, she backhandedly sent Xie Huai to the hot search, broke off the engagement, seized power, and locked the Wen family father and son in the basement. Shen Xici, the old love she had let down, was wounded all over and the entire Shen family supported her. The two overturn the chess game of three families, save their mother, take revenge, and seize power. When the dust settled, he knelt down on one knee by the river and put the ring that was five years late on her finger. She laughed and cried and stopped running away.
封总，夫人银针会撩火 | "Mr. Feng, My Wife's Silver Needle Can Arouse Fire"

Zhang Hao, Xu Hai WenA disciple of the master of traditional Chinese medicine married the living King of Hell who had been in coma for three years. On the wedding night, he woke up after touching her body! Her silver needles can detoxify and prolong life, and can even win the heart of Bingshan CEO. Faced with the best relatives, vicious stepsisters and family conspiracy, she used her skills as a doctor and poisoner to fight the whole audience, and by the way, she turned her crippled husband into a maniac who doted on his wife. It turns out that he was the owner of the life-saving copper whistle when he was a child. He can't hide his identity as a hacker boss! The marriage by agreement has become a two-way street. This wave of love after marriage is so sweet.
崽崽曝光后，爹地马甲掉了 | "After Zai Zai Was Exposed, Daddy's Vest Fell Off"

Qi You Cheng, Lu Dan NiIn order to find out the truth behind the murder of his grandfather Pei Yuanheng, Pei Muting, the son of the richest man, hid in the sea market. He rescued Ye Manying, who was drugged by his family and wanted to marry Zhou Jinghao. The two had a daughter. Five years later, Ye Manying found Pei Muting to marry by contract. Ye Manying participated in the Pei Family Design Competition but was challenged by Zhou Jinghao and her work was stolen. Pei's father showed up to expose the conspiracy. Zhou Jinghao and Ye's father joined forces to seize power, but were thwarted by Pei Muting's plan. Pei Muting's identity was revealed to the public, and the real culprit of the Zhou family who killed his grandfather and stole the mines was found out. The evildoer was brought to justice, the Pei family and his son reconciled, and the whole family was finally happy.
我妈是影帝的白月光 | "My Mom is the Movie Emperor's White Moonlight"

Wang Kang, Bai Xue RuAfter Yun Suiwan suddenly died due to overwork, she protected her daughter Yun Baoer in the form of her soul. In order to give the orphan girl something to rely on, she made a deal with a mysterious woman and got a chance to be reborn in seven days, but she could only exist through someone else's identity. At this time, Yun Baoer's biological father Jiang Shiyue has become the best actor. Yun Suiwan silently protects her as a friend, witnessing that her daughter has not given up on finding her father despite all the hardships. In the end, after many crises and conspiracies were exposed, Jiang Shiyue understood the truth, and the family of three overcame obstacles and was finally reunited.
意外穿书后，反派非我不娶 | "After Accidentally Passing Through the Book, the Villain Insist on Marrying No One But Me"

Du Zi Yuan, Su Yu TongSu Nuannuan dressed up as cannon fodder in the short drama. In order to avoid the fate of the original owner's broken leg, she lied about being the villain Gu Yunxiao's wife five years later and helped him fight against the enemy, but she fell in love with him during the relationship. After accidentally returning to modern times, she was forced to interact with her former male patron Gu Mingyuan in order to return to the binding system. Five years later, Gu Yunxiao, who had a misunderstanding, became paranoid and sensitive. The two experienced twists and turns, and finally Su Nuannuan broke through the shackles of the plot, and joined hands with Gu Yunxiao to defeat all enemies, and reunited in the real world.
沈少今天很反常 | "Mr. Shen is Very Unusual Today"

Zou Ji Long, Zhao Mei XuanAn orphan accidentally pissed off a business magnate to vent her anger on her sister's behalf, but she didn't know that he was the little beggar she saved as a child and had been searching for him for fifteen years. The cold-faced CEO set a gentle trap to keep her by his side, but she escaped repeatedly due to misunderstandings about his substitute. Amidst the undercurrent of conspiracy, the two uncovered the bonds of childhood through tugging and testing, and healed their past traumas. It was a counter-conventional sweet and sadistic love affair between a paranoid CEO and a straightforward orphan. The sweetness and sadism were all at the same time, and it got better and better!
下错蛊后，裴总成了我的小娇夫 | "After the Wrong Gu Potion, President Pei Became My Little Darling"

Xu Jia Wei, Chen Shu YiIn order to cure the strange poison "Red Flame Tangle", Su Tong went to Haicheng to fulfill the engagement and wanted to forcefully "marry" Song Ziyu, the young master of the Song family. On the way, she accidentally rescued Pei Jinchuan, who was suffering from blood poisoning and was dying soon. However, due to an accident, the "Tongxin Gu" intended to control Song Ziyu was mistakenly dropped on Pei Jinchuan. The Tongxin Gu made Pei Jinchuan irresistibly obsessed with and dependent on Su Tong, and Su Tong gradually fell in love with Pei Jinchuan during their entanglement.
重回七零揽春风 | "Return to the 70s to Embrace the Spring Breeze"

Chai Hao Chen, Liu Yi QiaoZhou Yuntang and her cousin Suman both returned to the day when they were assigned to work. Suman decisively took away the job in the pastry factory and gave the teaching job to Zhou Yuntang. But what Suman didn't know was that Zhou Yuntang's success in her previous life was the result of her hardships. Zhou Yuntang finally got the teaching job she had longed for and came to the place where Suman worked in her previous life.
宠妃攻略 | "Strategy for Beloved Concubines"

Wang Xing Kai, Wang Hai MinWen Luoxue accidentally dressed up as an ancient maid, but was mistaken for the prime minister's legitimate daughter because of her mistaken costume. She married the tyrant Zhou Xiao's younger brother Cheng Wang by mistake. In order to save her life, she made mistakes and outsmarted the flirtatious prince and the scheming female partner in the palace. Later, due to an accident, the tyrant discovered his identity. During his escape, he accidentally entered the emperor's bath and triggered the "Twin Romandy" strange flowers, which were connected by blood and pain to the tyrant Zhou Xiao. From then on, the two went from killing each other to falling in love while being forced into bondage.
和离后，替嫁医妃带崽宠冠全京城 | "After the Divorce, He Married a Medical Concubine and Took Care of the Whole Capital"

Li Shu Yuan, Cui Xiao ManBai Lin, a descendant of a modern Chinese medicine family, traveled through time again and became the substitute princess of Ning Prince Mo Shaohua. The original owner was snubbed and humiliated by King Ning, and finally committed suicide by hitting a pillar. After Bai Linran woke up, facing Prince Ning's letter of divorce, she cleverly obtained the letter of He Li and a thousand taels of silver, and left the palace with her pregnancy. After returning to the Bai family, she discovered that her adoptive mother Jiang was poisoned, and the servants in the family colluded with outsiders to plot the family property. Bai Liran relied on her medical skills and wisdom to expose the conspiracy, send the evildoers to justice, bought a pharmacy, took in loyal servants, and started to set up her own business.
重生古代被崽带飞 | "Rebirth in Ancient Times and Being Carried Away by Cubs"

Peng Rui Feng, Hu Xin TangCheng Shuyi, who is suffering from advanced gastric cancer, travels back to ancient times with his twins to find their biological father, Prince Regent Pei Yanli. Just when the palace welcomed the concubine, she opened "Darun Wanjia" by virtue of the interconnected space between ancient and modern times, and made a lot of money with modern goods. On the way to recognize their relatives, crises such as the concubine's difficulties, the family's contempt, and the rebellion of King Yan were staged one after another. The two solved the misunderstanding six years ago, from testing each other to working together to solve the problem. Pei Yanli did not hesitate to break up with the family to protect his mother and son. Under his protection, Cheng Shuyi also relied on a combination of traditional Chinese and Western medicine to overcome terminal illness.
锦帐春风拂旧尘＆退婚当日，我嫁侯门为尊 | "The Spring Breese Blows Away the Old Dust in the Brocade Tent & On the Day We Break Off the Engagement, I Will Marry the Hou Family as Your Honor"

Liu Jun Yao, Zhu Yi Wen (RAW)Sure enough, choice is greater than hard work. Shen Fu was humiliated by the prince on her wedding day. Liu Xiao Xu, Lan LanA beautiful, sassy widow versus a stoic older brother: At her husband's funeral, she feigns tears but secretly rejoices at her newfound freedom, only to be caught in the act by her wheelchair-bound older brother. Facing a demanding and controlling mother-in-law and watchful relatives, she struggles to cope. Unaware that her brother is the one who has secretly helped her on numerous occasions, her true identity is revealed until his true colors are exposed, and the two form an alliance—she draws the fire in the open, while he orchestrates the scheme from the shadows. As they fight side-by-side, feelings blossom, and she discovers he is the man who saved her life years ago, and that he has secretly loved her for many years, silently protecting her.
暗恋这件难过的小事 | "The Little Sad Thing of Secret Love"

Charon, Chen Shu YiLin Xu met Ye Feng after an accident and began to secretly admire him. She fed his cat and helped him with his homework. The two grew closer through their study group. The marriage announcement from back then was a misunderstanding, and their belated youthful love finally came to fruition.
最佳猎物 | "The Best Prey"

Zhou Hao Shan, Fang Si ChangTo eliminate the Heavenly Secrets Alliance at the opportune moment, Yu Mowan chose to lie low in her hometown, Yuhu Mountain. 别惹她，她是贺爷掌心雀 | "Don't Mess With Her, She's Master He's Beloved"

听到腹中儿子心声后，我跟老公破镜重圆 | "After Hearing My Unborn Son's Heartfelt Words, My Husband and I Reconciled"

Qiu Zhe Fu, Chai Hui XinLove-struck Ruan Yu is tricked by her best friend Lin Wei and the scumbag Song Rui into divorcing her husband Tang Zhou, who is on the verge of bankruptcy. In this critical moment, Ruan Yu unexpectedly unlocks the inner voice of her unborn child, learning that Lin Wei is a transmigrator from another book who conspired with Song Rui to kill Ruan Yu and seize her inheritance.
地府打工人不想996 | "The Underworld Worker Doesn't Want 996"

Li Pei Yang, Li Li ZaiSitu Yu, a modern-day office worker, accidentally becomes a soup-making girl after death. Not only does she have to work year-round, but she also has to accept the evaluations of "customers." Because of her excessive resentment, the soup she makes causes a poisoning incident. After Yama Jiang Ziwen intervenes to quell the situation, Situ Yu unexpectedly becomes the new Meng Po, and is bound to Yama in an employment relationship.
霍总，太太想和你离婚很久了 | "Mr. Huo, Your Wife Has Wanted a Divorce for a Long Time"

Chen Zheng Yang, Yang Luo QianOn their wedding anniversary, Yun Chu witnesses Huo Yanzhou reuniting with his former love interest, Xie Anning. Heartbroken, Yun Chu decides to divorce him, only to be blackmailed by Huo Yanzhou. Faced with Xie Anning's provocations and pressure from the Huo family, Yun Chu decides to focus on her career. Huo Yanzhou belatedly realizes the true nature of his former love interest, only to discover that Yun Chu has already decided to let go, thus beginning his arduous journey to win her back.
玫瑰予他 | "Roses for Him"

Ma Shi Yao, Qu Xiao XiaoYe Anwan concealed her identity and worked as a nanny for her fiancé Shen Lanzhou for three years. However, due to Shen Lanzhou's bias towards his ailing sister-in-law Bai Zhixia, their wedding was repeatedly postponed and she was misunderstood. After learning about Bai Zhixia's illness during her premarital medical checkup, Ye Anwan completely gave up and remarried Jiang Tingchen, who had secretly loved her for many years, on their wedding day.
麻辣教师不麻辣 | "The Spicy Teacher Isn't Spicy"

Wang Qian Shuo, Peng Qian LingTo fulfill her mother's dying wish and escape the conflicts of the underworld, Jiang Shuyi conceals her identity and enrolls in Nancheng No. 1 High School, becoming the homeroom teacher of the problem-ridden Class F. Upon entering the school, she must fend off the jealous schemes of her colleague Fang Ruyue, while unexpectedly reuniting with Lu Xingzhou (who is hiding his identity as a school doctor), who is engaged to her. Using her formidable skills as a gangster boss and her unique approach to handling affairs, Jiang Shuyi gradually tames the group of troubled students.
茶甜系美人与霍爷的隐婚日常 | "The Secret Marriage of a Sweet Beauty and Master Huo"

Wang Yi Yang, Xu Bo DiActress Jiang Qia unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel, becoming the early-deceased wife of the villainous Huo Wenyi. To escape the original tragedy, she abandons the original owner's subservient, devoted character, diligently building her career to humiliate others while simultaneously showering Huo Wenyi with affection. As they navigate the Huo family's schemes and rivals' provocations together, their feelings gradually deepen. Ultimately, they overcome the barriers of their contractual marriage.
豪門夫人被讀心後，瓜田裡都是猹 | "After the Wealthy Lady's Mind Was Read, the Melon Patch Was Full of Badger"

Huang Xiao, Dong Yue YuOriginally a poor and unlucky soul, Ji Fei was mistakenly taken by the King of Hell and received a time-travel gift package: she was reborn as a wealthy woman about to divorce the domineering CEO Qin Xian, complete with a gossip-eating system. She initially planned to sign the divorce papers, collect 200 million, and start her life as a rich woman, but unexpectedly, her CEO husband, Qin Xian, could hear her gossip-eating thoughts. Using the gossip-eating system, Ji Fei exposed the truth behind the scheming Yu Zhi, uncovered her brother-in-law Li Zhi's conspiracy, and helped her younger brother Qin Chao successfully resolve the crisis by mistaking his savior for his own. During this time, Ji Fei's relationship with Qin Xian blossomed, and she gradually adapted to life in a wealthy family.
穿书后，我成了反派校草的黑月光 | "After Transmigrating Into a Book,  Became the Villainous School Heartthrob's Dark Moonlight"

Yan Hao Yuan, Zeng He Hui ZiAfter Mu Qiao falls to her death while climbing over a wall, she transmigrates into a novel, becoming the vain school beauty. At this time, the original owner of the body has just humiliated the villainous school heartthrob, Luo Xingchen. To protect Luo Xingchen from repeating the same mistakes in the original story, Mu Qiao takes the initiative to approach him, apologize, and ask for tutoring. During their time together, feelings gradually develop. After a brief separation, Luo Xingchen finally confesses his love in a romantic setting, and their mutual unrequited love finally blossoms into a relationship.
玄学真千金 | "The True Heiress of Metaphysics"

Wang Jia Mao, Zhu Mo YanSu Xiaoluo descends the mountain to reunite with her family, only to be impersonated by the fake heiress Su Wan and framed. Using her newly acquired skills, she saves Fu Shaoting's brother, heals her critically ill grandfather, and uncovers the scheme orchestrated by Su Wan and her mother fifteen years ago. With Fu Shaoting's protection, the true and false heiresses are revealed, Su Xiaoluo is reunited with her family, and she and Shaoting finally become a couple.
九零小锦鲤，听动物心声升职加薪 | "A Lucky Koi in he 90s, Getting Promoted and Raise By Listening to the Animal's Heart"

Wang Jia Mao, Teng Ze WenJiang Yeqiu transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder female supporting character, only to have her fiancé, Li Jianshe, publicly break off their engagement. She unexpectedly gains the ability to communicate with animals, using it to obtain clues during investigations. She is praised and reassigned to assist in a major case. During their collaboration, she and Captain He Yan develop feelings for each other and eventually become a couple.
死后第五年我成了暴君的白月光 | "Five Years After My Death, I Became the Tyrant's White Moonlight"

Quan Pei Lun, Mi QiFive years ago, Shen Lanshu was strangled on the day Yan Pingxiao ascended the throne. Five years later, she was reborn as Nan Shu, but was sent to the palace. Yan Pingxiao, because of her resemblance to his deceased lover in appearance and habits, began to test her relentlessly. The two were torn between love and hate, and the truth and conspiracy gradually surfaced.
通古今后，我养成了未来奸相 | "After Becoming an Expert in Ancient Texts, I Nurtured a Future Treacherous Minister"

Xie Hong Xin, Yu LingSu Jin is a contemporary university student whose graduation thesis is to prove the existence of the Great Yue Dynasty and demonstrate China's 5,000-year history. Faced with an extremely challenging topic, Su Jin has only one clue: a tattered scroll given to her by her advisor. She unexpectedly discovers that this scroll is the key to the Great Yue Dynasty. In the Great Yue Dynasty, Shen Yubai suffers from tuberculosis and is nearly dying. His father died early, leaving behind a widow and orphan who suffer humiliation at the hands of their clan. Although Shen Yubai wants to protect his mother and himself, his serious illness is too much of a burden. Years of being bedridden have made him gloomy. Suddenly, one day, the scroll left by his father begins to glow
余生若梦，岁月安然 | "The Rest of My Life is Like a Dream, the Years are Peaceful"

Zhang Zhi Wei, Yang LuYang Zhaoning possessed a rare peony-like destiny. To help Xiao Jingheng ascend the throne, she endured humiliation and forced herself to be his concubine five hundred times. However, after his ascension, he favored his new empress and forced her to have sex with his guards in turn, all to pray for a good offspring for her. Yang Zhaoning smiled and offered her "sincere" blessings, but in reality, she used a forbidden technique to transform them into a deadly curse—the birth of a prince would inevitably lead to the death of both the emperor and empress!
这个王妃路子野，得宠 | "The Princess Has a Wild Way of Doin Things, and is Favored"

Li Ruo Xun, Dai Qi XuanPrincess Chu Qingyi of the Nine Netherworlds descended to the mortal realm in search of the Underworld Pearl, only to find herself a foolish princess murdered by her lover. Chu Qingyi resolutely sought revenge, but accidentally slept with the domineering and abstinent Regent Xiao Jue. The two became a bickering couple, working together to eradicate evil forces and search for the Underworld Pearl. However, they unexpectedly awakened Xiao Jue's memories of his past life, revealing their intertwined past lives and predestined destiny.
错嫁成宠：西域王独宠我 | "Wrongly Married But Became a Favorite, the Western Region King Dotes on Me Exclusively"

Yang Hong Yuan, Su Yi HanXie Jingshu, the legitimate daughter of a general, is reborn on the day she was switched at marriage with her half-sister. She decisively exposes the conspiracy and volunteers to marry in her place in the Western Regions. She forms an alliance with Helian Dan, a prince from the Western Regions who is disguised as an envoy—she uses the seven-colored snow lotus from her birth mother's belongings to cure his poison, and he helps her seek revenge. Together, they fight against the persecution of the Crown Prince and Empress, and uncover the truth behind her birth mother's death at the hands of the Empress and her father. Ultimately, their enemies are brought to justice, she lets go of her resentment, and travels with Helian Dan to the Western Regions, where they find true love and a new life.
