The beloved female lead, Shen Mianmian, returns, and to avoid being caught up in the original story's ending, Fang Yun and Xia Yan decide to "fake death" and escape that world together.*This is so "dramatic" (in a hilarious way). A more comedic version of this plot
夫人她只想要铁饭碗 | “The Lady Only Wants a Secure Job”

Zhang Bei Xi, Li Xi WeiTang Tian unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a love-struck supporting female character in a melodramatic novel, solely focused on clinging to her secure job. To rewrite her fate, she decisively dumps her scumbag fiancé and sets her sights on Huo Jinnian, a Buddhist monk with an allergy to women but who dotes on her unconditionally. From an aloof Buddhist monk to a doting husband, while everyone laughs at her for climbing the social ladder, Tang Tian silently proves them wrong. And her unborn twins completely dispel the rumors of her "childless" status—she wants to be the wife of a billionaire, she wants a secure job, and she'll have both love and career firmly in her grasp.
热吻梨涡 | "Kissing Dimples"

Lin Feng Song, Ma Le JieJust when Lin Jianxi thought her unrequited love for Jiang Xu was hopeless, an accident led to her marrying him. After the marriage, Lin Jianxi felt that her marriage was like still water, so she filed for divorce. Jiang Xu agreed on the surface but was unwilling in his heart. Unexpectedly, when the cooling-off period for divorce ended, she found out that she was pregnant. Even more unexpectedly, Jiang Xu secretly withdrew the divorce application behind her back.

炙唇 | "Burning Lips"- Wang Chen Peng, Zhang Ning Ci (RAW)After witnessing her boyfriend of many years cheat on her, Su Mian unexpectedly embarks on a whirlwind marriage with the composed and aloof Lu Zheng, a marriage based on mutual benefit. After the marriage, Lu Zheng silently protects her with endless tenderness and steadfastness. Su Mian gradually discovers that this seemingly aloof husband has been watching over her for many years without her realizing it. From a hasty marriage, the two gradually grow closer to each other's hearts.
半熟情侣 | “Half-Baked Couple"

Huang You Tian, Cui Xiao XuanTong Yan was abruptly stopped by He Wenyu at the airport, who questioned her about spreading rumors that he was just playing around. It turned out that three months prior, Tong Yan had been taken away by He Wenyu's mother's bodyguards while she was setting up a stall. He Wenyu's mother told Tong Yan that her son claimed he didn't like women, but had spent a long time watching her outside her school, so she gave Tong Yan ten million yuan to seduce He Wenyu. Tong Yan was shocked, and this misunderstanding-driven entanglement within a wealthy family thus began.
顾机长，太太说她已守寡三年＆许你晴空万里 | “Captain Gu, the Lady Says She's Been Widowed for Three Years & I Promise You a Clear Sky"

Mao Kuan Ren, Wang Yan FeiAfter surviving a plane crash, Nanfeng witnesses her husband's intimate behavior with her "white moonlight," Jiang Chu, and is utterly heartbroken. However, due to her grandfather's illness, she is forced to maintain a "one-year marriage" with Gu Lingchuan. Gu Lingchuan discovers he has long fallen in love with Nanfeng, and the appearance of Nanfeng's business partner, Cheng Ze, transforms him into a jealous man, embarking on a tumultuous journey to win her back. In a critical moment, Gu Lingchuan shields his wife from poison. Ultimately, the two resolve long-buried misunderstandings, and his "white moonlight" has always been her.
穿书女配别作妖：宝宝心声救全家 | "Transmigrated Female Supporting Character, Don't Cause Trouble: Baby's Heartfelt Words Save the Whole Family"

He Lian Fei, Li Ya YaAfter her husband Tang Zhou went bankrupt, Shen Zhaoyi received a video of his alleged infidelity. Just as she was about to divorce him, she overheard her unborn son's voice and realized it was a conspiracy by the time-traveling woman Lin Wei. She feared that the divorce would result in her and her unborn child's death. She resolutely tried to save her marriage, while Tang Zhou also unexpectedly heard his child's voice. The couple joined forces to confront the situation. They uncovered Lin Wei's schemes, orchestrated by Xu Xinyi and Song Rui, and ultimately set a trap at the hospital, bringing Lin Wei to justice and protecting their family and their unborn child.
魂穿后，大祭司成了落魄真千金 | "After Transmigrating, the High Priest Became a Fallen True Heiress"

Deng Hao, Wang Ai LingSi Lanyuan transmigrates into the body of an abandoned heiress. Using her blood magic, she rises up to seek revenge and unexpectedly meets Lu Chen, the CEO of the Lu Corporation, who possesses primordial purple energy. To restore her spiritual power, she takes the initiative to approach him. The two go from a contractual marriage to genuine love, working together to uncover the mystery of their origins, punish evildoers, and build a happy future.
真千金的马甲A爆了&桑家有女灼耀归来 | "The True Heiress's Disguise is Awesome & The Sang Family's Daughter Zhuo Yao Returns"

Jiang Yi Ming, Cheng ZiWhen Sang Ning was six, she was misdiagnosed and replaced by Sang Li. Fifteen years later, she was found by the matriarch of the Sang family, and Sang Ning, carrying a title, slapped everyone in the face. Fu Xiuyuan, the head of the Fu family in the capital, turned out to be her ex-boyfriend. The usually ruthless Fu Xiuyuan became a pitiful, adorable husband in front of her! The truth about Sang Ning being abandoned as a child is peeled away layer by layer as her disguise falls away.
弟弟太会撩 | "My Younger Brother is Too Good at Flirting"

Zhou Jin Xiang, Jiao Xue RuiMu Yunjin accidentally encounters Su Shijin in a down-on-his-luck state and is attracted by his gentle appearance, so she "picks him up" and takes him back to her side, intending to raise him as a docile "little puppy" to relieve her boredom. Unexpectedly, Su Shijin takes the opportunity to stick to Mu Yunjin and shows a ruthless side completely different from his "well-behaved" persona. Whenever someone covets Mu Yunjin, he will reveal his sickly and delicate nature, even fighting to the death to protect his master, and declaring, "Sister Jin can only be mine."
真千金回家后，我被迫成了假千金 | "After the True Heiress Returned Home, I Was Forced to Become a Fake Heiress"

Wang Yi Yang, Wang Xin YueThe long-lost heiress of the Qi family has finally been found, but the identities of the real and fake heiresses are revealed, and the butler father turns out to be a hidden tycoon! The resilient heroine, Cen Yin, faces repeated difficulties and school bullying from the returning heiress, Qi Sisi. With the protection of the academically gifted Lu Yu and the secret support of her father, she focuses on her studies, wins art awards, and is even scouted by a talent agent to enter the entertainment industry. Ultimately, she turns the tables, exposes the fake heiress, and achieves success in both her career and love life, proving that "true strength is the only real foundation."
社畜变真千金，感情免谈我只想做人生大女主 | "From Office Worker to Heiress: No Romance, I Just Want to Be the Leading Lady in My Life"

Zhang Yi Yang, Tan XinOffice worker Chen Qian unexpectedly discovers she is Shen Yue, the true heiress of the Shen Group, who disappeared 23 years ago. Returning to her wealthy family, she faces repeated schemes from her adopted sister Shen Tiantian, mockery from her second brother Shen Yu, and estrangement from her father Shen Wei, all while adhering to her goal of "only seeking money, not love." She enters into a transactional marriage with Yu Huai, the heir to the Yu Group, and later reveals a shocking secret at a family reunion banquet: Shen Wei, to elevate his illegitimate daughter Shen Tiantian, had personally sold her to human traffickers. Ultimately, Chen Qian achieves financial freedom and wins Yu Huai's true love.
他是月光亦是蛊 | "He is Both Moonlight and Encantment"

Meng Jia Hui, Zhang Shan ShanLi Yang is offered to Jiang Yan, a business tycoon whom her greedy boyfriend Song Wenjing once briefly sheltered. Jiang Yan harbors a twisted obsession with her, stemming from Li Yang's childhood recognition of his heterochromatic eyes. He uses a love potion to control her affections. Li Yang fiercely resists, but falls into Jiang Yan's meticulously woven web. She attempts to escape by getting engaged, only to face even more frantic obstruction from Jiang Yan.
穿书还做恋爱脑，不如赚大钱 | "Transmigrating into a Book and Being a Romantic Brain: Better to Make Big Money"

Li Yuan Jing, Lin Yu XiLin Ting, murdered by her ex-boyfriend in revenge, unexpectedly transmigrates into a 1990s romance novel, becoming a love-struck, villainous female supporting character. To rewrite her tragic fate, she decisively distances herself from the scumbag and focuses on building her career. With modern business acumen, she starts from a street stall, capitalizes on the stock market boom to accumulate capital, opens a boutique, and expands her business with partners. Along the way, she meets Jiang Zong, a socially awkward rich second-generation, and the two support each other. She also helps her friend overcome difficulties. Ultimately, Lin Ting builds a business empire, achieves a life-changing turnaround, and finds true love.
明月嫁卿卿 | "Moonlight Marries You"

He Shan Kai, Lu Lu LuAfter her rebirth, Song Chuyu distanced herself from Kang Rui, who had deceived her, and decided to marry Lin Qingyuan. She admired Lin Qingyuan for overcoming his illness to recover lost territories and save the Great Yong Dynasty from peril when his country was on the verge of collapse. She also pitied his difficult childhood and the deadly poison he suffered, and hoped that in this life she could protect Lin Qingyuan's peace and happiness.
我脑子里有个大仙 | “There's a Great Immortal in My Head"

Xi Er Li, Wang Yan FeiJiang Xianjiao, the legitimate daughter of a general, is framed by her closest relatives and lover. On the verge of death, the soul of the reigning emperor, Yu Yuanxu, unexpectedly enters her consciousness, becoming her guide. With his help, Jiang Xianjiao is reborn from the ashes. The two recognize each other, and Yu Yuanxu showers her with affection, making her a concubine. Gaining power, Jiang Xianjiao begins a meticulous plan, exposing her brother's shameful deeds and her fiancé's disgrace, ruining the reputations of all those who betrayed her. Ten years later, she has grown from a bullied and vulnerable girl into a wise and resolute empress, standing shoulder to shoulder with the emperor, bearing twins, and bringing retribution upon her former enemies, ultimately achieving a fulfilling life.
嫡姐夺气运，她被未来皇帝宠上天 | "The Eldest Sister Steals the Luck, She's Pampered by the Future Emperor"

Feng Jun Xi, Wang Xing ZiSi Wan is bound to the Nirvana System and reborn. After her rebirth, Si Wan uses her memories from her previous life to seek cooperation with Crown Prince Xie Yan. With Xie Yan's help, Si Wan gradually shatters the conspiracies and pretenses of Liu Xunyan and Si Qingjia, reclaiming her rightful phoenix destiny. During her revenge, Xie Yan's help and patience gradually win Si Wan's heart, and they eventually become husband and wife, with Si Wan becoming Empress.

Wang Hao Zhen, Wang Ge Ge, Wu Zhu Xi, Cui Yi Liang[HERE]2. 夫人她只想要铁饭碗 - Zhang Bei Xi, Li Xi Wei[HERE]3. 热吻梨涡 - Lin Feng Song, Ma Le Jie[HERE]4. 炙唇 - Wang Chen Peng, Zhang Ning Ci[HERE]5. 半熟情侣 - Huang You Tian, Cui Xiao Xuan[HERE]6. 顾机长，太太说她已守寡三年＆许你晴空万里 - Mao Kuan Ren, Wang Yan Fei[HERE]7. 穿书女配别作妖：宝宝心声救全家 - He Lian Fei, Li Ya Ya[HERE]8. 魂穿后，大祭司成了落魄真千金 - Deng Hao, Wang Ai Ling[HERE]9. 真千金的马甲A爆了&桑家有女灼耀归来 - Jiang Yi Ming, Cheng Zi[HERE]10. 弟弟太会撩 - Zhou Jin Xiang, Jiao Xue Rui[HERE]11. 真千金回家后，我被迫成了假千金 - Wang Yi Yang, Wang Xin Yue[HERE]12. 社畜变真千金，感情免谈我只想做人生大女主 - Zhang Yi Yang, Tan Xin[HERE]13. 他是月光亦是蛊 - Meng Jia Hui, Zhang Shan Shan[HERE]14. 穿书还做恋爱脑，不如赚大钱 - Li Yuan Jing, Lin Yu Xi[HERE]15. 明月嫁卿卿 - He Shan Kai, Lu Lu Lu[HERE]16. 我脑子里有个大仙 - Xi Er Li, Wang Yan Fei[HERE]17. 嫡姐夺气运，她被未来皇帝宠上天 - Feng Jun Xi, Wang Xing Zi[HERE]
玫瑰吻过枪膛 | "Rose Kissed the Gun Barrel"

Wang Hao Zhen, Hou Cheng YueLawyer Lin Yan travels to Mengshi to investigate a financial fraud case. In her search for Long Gang, the fugitive who kidnapped her years ago, she proactively approaches Yang Qiao, a local gangster, to help him deceive drug lord Wu Sanye. The two develop feelings for each other, but Yang Qiao, due to his undercover identity, dares not reveal it. Three years later, Yang Qiao, now using his real name Yan Heng, rejoins the team and reunites with Lin Yan at a friend's wedding. Lin Yan is resentful that he didn't seek her out after his return, and Yan Heng embarks on a romantic pursuit to win her back.
他比子弹温柔 | "He's Gentler Than a Bullet"

Yao Guan Yu, Zhu Li LanQi Simin rescues the critically injured Fu Yaoyang, the head of the Fu family, on a rainy night. From then on, she is drawn into the Fu family's bloody power struggle. Fu Yaoyang forces her to stay by his side as his secretary, both to control and to protect her. In their joint fight against the Second Master Fu, their initial antagonism gradually gives way to affection. As Fu Yaoyang's true identity is revealed, the nearly out-of-control Fu Yaoyang awakens and rebels. He ends his life of crime with the help of his adopted son. As the smoke clears, the two walk hand in hand across the ruins towards a future of light and redemption.
暖昧请继续 | "Let the Ambiguity Continue"

Gan Wang Xin, Zhu Xiao XueThree years ago, Xu Beizi's family business collapsed. During her lowest point, she mistook her junior schoolmate Zhou Xubai, who had a crush on her, for a male model. Suspecting something amiss, and hampered by old injuries, she chose to run away while pregnant. Three years later, Xu Beizi and Zhou Xubai reunited. He immediately began pursuing her passionately. However, her past trauma had created a high wall around her heart. When the identity of her savior, "Mr. Z," was revealed, Xu Beizi realized he was the same person as the "male model." Zhou Xubai also resolved to keep her and her child with him.
血燃江月 | "Blood Burns the River Moon"

Xie Yu Wang, Han Jia HuiLin Shuyue, the eldest daughter of the Lin family, is perceived by outsiders as mentally impaired and easily manipulated after a fire. In reality, she possesses the healing bloodline unique to the Hidden Mountain Clan. For ten years, she has feigned amnesia, plotting revenge. Jiang Jin, outwardly cold, has been investigating the Lin family's affairs. Their paths cross due to their respective goals, leading to mutual testing, cooperation, and a gradual development of a relationship that transcends self-interest amidst the pursuit of truth, calculation, and strategic maneuvering.
竹马接贫困生开学，我换专业他悔 | "My Childhood Sweetheart Picks Up a Poor Student for School, I Change My Major and He Regrets"

Liu Te, Zhao Fei XueSong Jiaojiao gave up her dream of studying medicine for her childhood sweetheart, Lu Jingchen, only to be repeatedly framed by Zhao Zhaodi, whom he sponsored. Lu Jingchen consistently sided with Zhao Zhaodi, breaking her heart. Senior student Li Ziming stood by her side, and Song Jiaojiao joined forces with others to expose Zhao Zhaodi's misconduct. Faced with Lu Jingchen's obsessive harassment, she resolutely broke off their relationship. Seven years later, Song Jiaojiao acquired the bankrupt Lu Group, growing against the odds and taking control of her own life.
天才崽崽：爹地，妈咪又跑了 | "Genius Baby: Daddy, Mommy Ran Away Again"

Song Yu Bo, Gou Yu XiLuo Yan and Cheng Jing were deeply in love, but Cheng's mother's misunderstanding forced them to break up. On the night Cheng Jing proposed, Luo Yan left a note and cruelly departed. Four years later, Luo Yan became an intern reporter at a television station and by chance reunited with Cheng Jing, who had become a wealthy heir in Beijing's elite circles. She ran away while he chased, with Xiao Bao's help, and the two finally resolved their past misunderstandings and rekindled their relationship, eventually reuniting as a family of three.
穿书后，假瘫痪老公求贴贴 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, My Fake Paralyzed Husband Begs for Love"

Heng Tao, Ling Chuan Bei BeiBai Muyan, terminally ill and swindled out of all her money, transmigrates into a novel as the villainous female supporting character. To obtain a huge "child-bearing reward," she embarks on a "money-making and baby-making" plan with Su Jingze, a CEO who pretends to be paralyzed. Su Jingze, feigning a vegetative state to investigate a car accident, mistakenly sees Bai Muyan as a pawn in his enemy's game. The two gradually develop feelings for each other amidst their mutual testing. After overcoming family conspiracies, assassinations, and provocations from a former love interest, Bai Muyan uses her strength and wisdom to tear apart the villains, but fakes her death due to a lack of security. Five years later, Su Jingze finds his wife and son and begins his pursuit of her, joining forces to punish the villains.
夫人别走恶少已知错 | "Madam, Don't Go! The Evil Young Master Has Acknowledged His Mistakes"

Yin Yang, Xia Xuan ZiDog trainer Du Yan is entrusted by the Ye family to train the temperamental young master Ye Lingyuan. During their time together, she discovers a secret about the Ye family and helps Ye Lingyuan overcome his psychological trauma; the two gradually develop feelings for each other. Just as Ye Lingyuan is about to propose, Du Yan, whose brother is being blackmailed by his fiancée Cheng Shuangshuang, painfully breaks off their engagement. Three years later, Du Yan returns to the country with her recovered brother and stumbles upon Ye Lingyuan's engagement party, only to be pursued by him again. Ultimately, Ye Lingyuan defeats the villains Zhang Ke and Cheng Shuangshuang, and also wins Du Yan's heart, leading to their eventual marriage.
晚来承意 | "Late Journey, I'll Accept Your Wishes"

Sun Wen Bo, Wang Ruo XiThe most "unprofitable" mission in history: Private detective He Wanlai approaches Lu Chengyi, a younger brother from a wealthy family, to investigate a will, but unexpectedly becomes the "beneficiary" of the will herself. The two, one playing the fox and the other the innocent rabbit, engage in a dramatic game of cat and mouse amidst the mysteries of the wealthy family. As the conspiracy unfolds, the ultimate target turns out to be the original "prey" himself. A tale of sisterly love and murder mystery, every episode is full of twists and turns; the prey you perceive is actually the hunter; the love you think you experience is actually an extreme tug-of-war between strategy and attraction.
重生后，资本小姐重走来时路 | "After Rebirth, the Capitalist Miss Retraces Her Own Path"

Zou Sheng Wen, Bai Xue RuThis drama tells the story of Shu Yue, a capitalist's daughter, who is reborn in the 1970s on the day she gave birth. She uncovers her sister-in-law Huang Fang's scheme to switch babies and reclaims her biological son, Shu Che. Using a spiritual spring space system, she grows high-quality fruits and vegetables, connects with state-run restaurants, leads her family to wealth, and builds a new brick house. Her injured husband, Cheng Jingchuan, clears up his misunderstandings and fiercely protects her. Shu Yue confronts toxic relatives, fights back against her rival Xu Zhijing's harassment, exposes her biological father Gu Cheng'an's conspiracy, donates national treasures to gain recognition, opens a restaurant, takes over a cannery, and ultimately, the villains are brought to justice. Shu Yue, Cheng Jingchuan, and their son live happily ever after, achieving a perfect comeback.
穿成十八线，我惊艳娱乐圈 | "Transmigrated into an 18th-Tier Celebrity, I Amazed the Entertainment Industry"

Ma Qian Huan, Jian Yu XingBefore their wedding, Chen Xueer and Ye Chen exchanged tokens of love. However, Ye Chen was intercepted and killed by Qing while transporting grain. Upon learning this, Chen Xueer sought revenge on Qing but was killed by a bomb. She awoke to find herself transmigrated into the body of Chen Xueer, an obscure actress, and exposed in the dressing room with Ye Chen, a drugged movie star. This time, she was no longer the weak Chen Xueer; she resolutely fought back and rekindled her romance with Ye Chen.
灼骨 | "Burning Bones"

Yi An Yang, Peng Peng, Gong XinShen Manying, the daughter of a former warlord, suffered the massacre of her entire family and lost her memory. She was rescued by the charming and refined Lin Wenxuan. A marriage certificate and three years of seemingly respectful marriage led her to believe it was divine intervention. Until her memories returned—she realized this marriage was a trap set by him and his "white moonlight," Lin Qingyue, to cover up the latter's atrocities against her and the destruction of her entire family. She shattered the deception and turned to Xie Yu'an, the military commander of Fengtian. This man, who had secretly loved her for ten years, paved the way for her and helped her exact revenge. Upon learning the truth, Lin Wenxuan knelt and begged for forgiveness, but Xie Yu'an, gun pointed at him, chuckled, "My woman is not for you to atone for."
嫁纨绔 | "Marrying a Playboy"

Liu Yi Long, Qin Tian AiPrincess Consort Shen Chaoyun went to the Gu residence to propose marriage, only to witness Gu Zhao wielding a stick and brutally beating her scumbag father and his mistress. The eldest wife of the Gu family seized the opportunity to fan the flames, hoping the Princess Consort would choose someone else, marrying the young prince to her daughter, Gu Qianqian. Unexpectedly, Gu Zhao's actions played right into the Princess Consort's hands. She wanted a strong-willed daughter-in-law to discipline her spoiled young master.
穿越深山我怎么就成山神了 | "Transmigrating into the Deep Mountains, How Did I Become a Mountain God?"

Xie Hong Xin, Tian Xi WenQin Zhao transmigrates into the body of a "mountain god's bride" deep in the mountains, gaining a spatial ability, an encyclopedia, and celestial robes—a three-piece set—and rises to power by accumulating merit. Her prophecy of a torrential rain saves Cui Tan, the leader of a rebellion, helping him overthrow tyranny, establish a new dynasty, and promote women's education. She manifests divine power along the way, being bestowed the title of "Guardian Maid of the Nation"; while Cui Tan leaves her unattended in the harem, offering the entire kingdom as his dowry. Divine power and imperial power stand side by side, jointly safeguarding the eternal reign of the Great Zhao Dynasty.
陛下，你的仇人不对劲＆复仇暴君步步沦陷 | "Your Majesty, Your Enemy Is Strange & The Vengeful Tyrant Falls Step by Step"

Yi Hang, Guo Xin YuLiu Wanyan's story begins in hell mode: she becomes the tyrant Yuan Ze, her enemy from a past life. Reborn, he only wants to kill her. She desperately tries to survive, but he harbors murderous intent at every turn. Finally, when he pushes her towards an assassin's blade, she gives up hope. But as she turns to leave, he pulls her into his arms, his eyes red: "Don't go... I'll give you my life, is that not enough?"
换嫁风波：太子他悔疯了 | "The Swap Marriage Scandal: The Crown Prince Regrets It to the Brink"

Zhu Zhi Ling, Shi Yue YueAfter her rebirth, Chen Huaisu devised a plan to have Qinghe impersonate her poetic talent and marry the Crown Prince, publicly exposing her true colors. She then chose to marry the Grand Tutor Fu Yunmiao, who had always been devoted to her. After losing everything, the Crown Prince became obsessed and attempted a rebellion. Chen Huaisu and her husband used a clever scheme to help the new emperor quell the rebellion. The Crown Prince was executed, Chen Huaisu avenged her father, and she and Fu Yunmiao finally found happiness together.
让你娶剑仙，没让你权倾天下  | "I Let You Marry a Sword Immortal, But I Didn't Let You Rule the World"

He Long Tian, Wang YanGu Changsheng transmigrated into the body of the sickly seventh prince of the Great Jing Dynasty. From the start, he was betrothed to a female swordswoman from an enemy country, her cultivation completely destroyed and shrouded in malevolent energy. Everyone expected Gu Changsheng to die on his wedding night, becoming the biggest laughingstock of the royal family. However, in his despair, Gu Changsheng awakened a system and formed a bond with Ling Shuangyue. Afterwards, Gu Changsheng and Ling Shuangyue joined hands, establishing themselves in the capital, thwarting conspiracies one by one, defeating the third prince, and being appointed Crown Prince Regent. During this time, they developed a deep affection for each other and became a true couple.
被丞相送往敌国后，他悔疯了 | "After Being Sent to an Enemy State By the Prime Minister, He Went Mad With Regret"

Lin Fei Yu, Wang Lin HuiSitu Yuan was originally a beloved princess who saved Pei Ji in her youth. However, Lin Wanru claimed the credit for her actions, and Pei Ji personally sent her to the enemy state of Bei Li as a hostage. During her three years in Bei Li, Situ Yuan suffered inhuman torture. Only after Bei Li's defeat did Pei Ji bring her back. Upon returning home, Situ Yuan appeared obedient, but inwardly she was utterly disillusioned with Pei Ji. At this time, the appearance of Emperor Situ Jing made Situ Yuan realize her mission. From then on, she embarked on a path of darkness and revenge.

嫡女她嫉恶如仇 | "The Eldest Daughter Hates Evil & The Eldest Daughter is Vengeful"

Huang You Tian, Yu YinNan Mo is reborn, shedding her original weakness and displaying a ruthless and decisive nature. She punishes wicked servants, intimidates the entire Bai family, and shows no mercy to her brother Bai Shiyan, who has repeatedly bullied her. Her younger sister Bai Qianqian plots against her multiple times, but Nan Mo always manages to thwart her schemes. Ultimately, Bai Qianqian's treasonous past is exposed, and she is imprisoned. The heroine Nan Mo and the hero, War King Ming Yuchen, join forces, working from within and without, to completely crush the rebellion plot of the Western Xia spies. Nan Mo ascends the throne, jointly ruling the country, becoming a legendary empress and empress celebrated by later generations.
小助理变美后，抢了大明星的金主 | "After the Little Assistant Became Beautiful, She Stole the Big Star's Sugar Daddy"

Wang Jia Mao, Zhou Jia YiSu Qianqian, who transmigrated into a book as a junior assistant, reversed her fate after being bound to a beauty system. While working as the assistant to actress Lin Shu, her outstanding looks and genuine personality attracted Gu Chengyu, who favored sincerity. Facing Lin Shu's scheming and Gu Chengyu's probing, Su Qianqian calmly dealt with the situation, establishing herself in the entertainment industry through her abilities and winning Gu Chengyu's heart.
以堕为光＆堕 | "Taking Fall into Light"

Ma Hao Dong, Li Sheng XuanJust when Yin Wangshu thought her bleak life was about to be reborn, a car accident caused Mo Chen's death. Yin Wangshu was tormented by guilt, and Mo Chen's son, Mo Huai, shared her negative thoughts. The two signed an absurd agreement, agreeing to rely on each other and live a positive life. Five years later, Yin Wangshu felt she had fulfilled her mission and prepared to retire, but Mo Huai, having spent so much time with her, developed special feelings for her.
裴总，爱情是另外的价钱 | "President Pei, Love Has a Different Price"

Ma Shi Yao, Xiang Yun Jie (RAW)Five years ago, a bizarre night unfolded when Zhou Fuxuan, "gaining status through her son," stormed into a wealthy family, only to become Pei Yanche's deceased "love of his life." Four years later, the missing CEO Pei suddenly returned—with amnesia. Zhou Fuxuan seized the opportunity, weaving a deeply affectionate dream to win over the cold-blooded CEO. As she became infatuated with this fabricated warmth, Pei Yanche's memories quietly began to resurface. Is this love woven from lies merely a shattered illusion, or the prelude to a genuine transformation? "Pei Yanche, love, I'll name my price?"
这样恋着多喜欢 | "How I Love You Like This"

Li Quan Cheng, Han Jia HuiA year ago, Wei Lianheng fell in love with Bai Shen Shen at first sight during a cruise trip, but refused to reveal his true feelings. The two developed a sexual relationship, but Bai Shen Shen's indifferent and unattached attitude towards him made him insecure. Under pressure from his family and misunderstandings, he agreed to marry Du Nanxi, proposed ending the relationship, and humiliated Bai Shen Shen. Unexpectedly, Bai Shen Shen readily agreed to end it and retaliated. At her grandmother's birthday banquet, Bai Shen Shen unexpectedly discovered that her stepmother's daughter was about to marry Wei Lianheng, and decided to launch her revenge plan by "provoking" Wei Lianheng.
白兔入怀 | "The White Rabbit Enters My Arms"

Xing Shuo, Su Yu TongLin Wanwan, an orphan from the Lin family, is engaged to Pei Yanli, the second son of the Pei family, but she fears her powerful elder brother, Pei Yanzhou. Seemingly obedient, she is actually mischievous and cunning, secretly plotting to annul the engagement. However, her scheme is discovered by Pei Yanzhou upon his return from abroad, who forcefully takes over the engagement. After the marriage, she unexpectedly discovers that her parents' deaths were not accidental, and that she is not even related to her "brother," Lin Jingxuan, by blood. When the evidence points to the Pei family, she is on the verge of collapse, but gradually regains her senses under Pei Yanzhou's patient protection. Together, they uncover the conspiracy, and his deep affection heals her wounds. Ultimately, they join forces to seek revenge, rising from the ashes amidst truth and love.
画魂之爱＆画魂 | "The Love of the Painting Soul & The Painting Soul"

Zhu Yu Xin, Wu Xin Man, and Guo Yu ChengMo Xuan's body is inhabited by the soul of his senior apprentice, Awei. Together, they protect the family gallery and become entangled in a complex relationship with Zhen Ai, their nominal "aunt." Facing external conspiracies, Mo Xuan struggles with his dual souls to overcome creative blocks; Zhen Ai steadfastly protects the gallery and their love; and Awei ultimately sacrifices himself to allow the two to be together. Together, the three undergo trials of art and emotion, ultimately thwarting the conspiracy and finding rebirth through love and redemption.
冰山大哥的閃婚陷阱 | "The Iceberg Brother's Flash Marriage Trap"

Li Bin Hang, Ye Jing YiSong Xi, drunk, mistakenly enters into a whirlwind marriage. After the wedding, she discovers her husband is none other than Jing Guan, the stern and aloof older brother her best friend described. Unaware of the truth, she tries to adapt to the marriage, while Jing Guan, who has secretly loved her for years, carefully conceals his identity, weaving a sweet trap with his gentleness. When his disguise is revealed, she discovers that this ill-fated marriage is actually a long-planned expression of his deep love.*How many versions is this going to be? I think this is already the 11th or 12th?
大小姐她总是不求上进 | "The Eldest Miss is Always Unambitious"

Qi Xiao Shu, Fu Yu ShuQin Liuxi, the eldest daughter of a powerful official family and a disciple of Taoism, initially wanted to live a life of leisure. However, due to a family crisis, she was forced to shoulder the responsibility of managing the household. Utilizing her superb physiognomy skills and divine medical abilities, she navigates various crises both within and outside the family, engaging in a battle of wits with Prince Jing, Xiao Jinyuan, from initial testing to mutual support and redemption.
红妆万丈 | "Red Makeup"

Ling Xuan, Guo JingYe Hongzhuang and Jing Xiuyi were both betrothed, but were attacked on the eve of their wedding. Ye Hongzhuang saved Jing Xiuyi, and the two exchanged faces using a secret technique. Ye Hongzhuang, now Jing Xiuyi, married into the Prince Chen's mansion and investigated the truth for them. Jing Xiuyi was arrested for assassination, and Ye Hongzhuang willingly sacrificed herself in her place, but her true identity was eventually revealed. The Emperor forced Si Chen to kill his beloved, and Jing Xiuyi risked her life to assassinate the Emperor. Before dying, the two exchanged faces again, and Ye Hongzhuang and Si Chen finally became a couple.
降妖录，帝君请接嫁 | "The Demon-Slaying Chronicles, Your Majesty, Please Accept the Marriage"

Zhong Zai Yu, Li Li ZaiThree hundred years ago, Qingqing, the daughter of the Underworld King, was saved by the Ziwei Emperor and fell deeply in love with him. When he descended to the mortal realm to undergo tribulation and became Xie Yuan, she possessed his body to become a bride for a marriage of convenience, getting caught up in a case involving demons, power struggles, and the theft of life force within a noble household. The two worked together to solve the case, and feelings began to blossom between them. As their tribulation neared its end, their identities clashed with the rules of heaven, and their grudges with their father clashed with destiny. They struggled between love and fate, ultimately making their choice.
书院后街摆吃摊，皇帝咋也来排队 | "Food Stall Set Up on the Bac Stree of the Academy, Even the Emperor Lined Up For Them"

Deng Hao, Wang Lu QingTop-tier chef Gu Yanxi transmigrates into the body of a poor adopted daughter. She uses her divine culinary skills, including curing anorexia, to achieve a remarkable turnaround, slapping down bullies, amassing wealth through street vending, helping her father rise in rank, and sending her brother to success in the imperial examinations. She wins over the emperor, forges alliances with various nations, and becomes a diplomatic ambassador, only to be framed by her fake heiress sister through arson. The truth is revealed—she is actually a princess who has been living among the common people! Gu Yanxi uses her culinary skills to bring peace to the world and her benevolence to resolve grudges, ultimately achieving success in both family and career, ushering in a prosperous era that spans from the streets to the imperial court.
王妃太缺德得宠着 | "The Princess is Too Immoral, She Must Be Pampered"

Jin Xuan Yu, Dong Yue YuThe ghost doctor Su Jiaoyang is forced to marry the ugly and crippled Prince Pei Shenzhi in place of her. On their wedding night, when her red veil is lifted, she is shocked to discover that he is actually her former "old friend." This "old friend" harbors deep resentment and they constantly bicker online, their rivalry eventually blossoming into mutual affection. In Pei Shenzhi's eyes, Su Jiaoyang is savage, greedy, and lustful—a woman only he can bully, and anyone who dares to bully her will be killed.
女县令她又美又霸道 | "The Female Magistrate is Both Beautiful and Domineering"

Cai Cheng Yuan, Zhang Ying FeiIn her previous life, Shen Zheng, a female accountant who was cheated by a ruthless boss, was involved in a car accident and transmigrated to become the only female county magistrate in the Great Zhou Dynasty. Upon taking office, she was immediately sidelined by the wicked gentry Wu Pengzu. With her extraordinary courage, Shen Zheng fought back, promoting the development of agriculture, industry, and education while gathering powerful allies. She repeatedly overcame crises while resisting bandits and outwitting corrupt officials. Her achievements earned her the emperor's appreciation, who invited her to the capital to be appointed to an official position. However, Shen Zheng politely declined, determined to promote women's rights and new policies. In the end, she led the Great Zhou into a golden age and became a legend.

雀食 | "Sparrow's Food"

Wang Xuan, Zhao Mu Yan, Liu Jia ChengTen years ago, her elder sister, Qi Yue, was ruined by PUA (Pick-Up Artist) tactics and committed suicide in despair. Ten years later, Qi Xing, under the alias Shen Yinong, returns to Hong Kong to avenge her sister! Together with her adoptive uncle, Shen Musheng, she meticulously plots to get closer to her enemy, Song Yan, and his henchmen. While feigning friendship with Song Yan, she awakens the second personality within Shen Musheng, leading to a series of emotional entanglements—one a demon she wants to destroy, the other a madman she desperately wants to save. Love and hate intertwine, truth and lies tear at each other; who is the hunter? And who willingly becomes the knife in her hand?
她掀桌，他撑腰，反派在劫难逃 | "She Flips the Table, He Backs Her Up, the Villain is Doomed"

Lin Feng Song, Liu Lan GePei Jin wakes up to find herself transmigrated into the body of a scapegoat abandoned by her entire family. On the day of her release from prison, the powerful Fu Yanzheng appears as her bodyguard, offering his constant protection and fulfilling her every request. She sways in her red dress as she enters her birthday banquet, her toast stunning everyone present; she shatters the facade of family affection, and he silently offers her a crystal glass; she overturns the table with a cold, disdainful look, but he has already cleared the way for her, determined to spoil her to the bone.
撩惹 | "Teasing"

Lin Feng Song, Fu Ya NingJiang Nan enters into a marriage of convenience with her ex-boyfriend Fu Jinchuan, joining forces to fight for the family fortune against her cousin Jiang Bei and the Huo family's conspiracy. After experiencing twists and turns such as a battle for shares and a kidnapping crisis, she gradually comes to understand Fu Jinchuan's deep affection amidst the extreme tension. Ultimately, she exposes the mastermind behind the scenes, inherits the Jiang Group, and her marriage to Fu Jinchuan transforms from a marriage of convenience into a true love where both parties find redemption.
穿到八零我靠喂猪养全村 | "Reincarnated in the 80s, I Supported the Whole Village by Feeding Pigs"

Zou Ke Jun, Wang Yan FeiLi Susu, the world's second-largest pig farmer, is unexpectedly electrocuted and transmigrates into the body of Gu Mingyang, the lazy wife of the village chief of Qiao Family Village. The original owner of this body drugged Gu Mingyang in an attempt to consummate their marriage, resulting in Gu Mingyang's rejection. Just then, experts from Beijing arrive to address the village's pig farming problems. Li Susu, possessing scientific pig-raising techniques, discovers the issues and volunteers to solve them. The lean pigs are transformed into golden pigs, igniting a wealth-generating frenzy in the impoverished village! Poisoning by a scheming woman? Taunts from the wealthy? Li Susu deals with it all, ruthlessly punishing the scumbags while showering her husband with sweet affection.
小可怜哭哭，顾总宠上天 | "Poor Little Girl Cries, President Gu Spoils Her to the Heavens"

Zeng Xi Tang, Li Shi QiSu Niannian, working at a bar, accidentally bumps into the domineering CEO Gu Yuheng. Gu Yuheng refuses to arrange blind dates for many people, but falls in love with Niannian at first sight. To save her seriously ill grandmother, Niannian agrees to a marriage of convenience to appease her family. This marriage of convenience blossoms into love, but undercurrents surge within the wealthy family. Gu Yuheng becomes her protector, fiercely defending her and slapping her in the face. A crisis strikes, and Niannian unexpectedly uncovers the mystery of her past, gaining two handsome older brothers and ultimately becoming the darling of the family!
就20万！本小姐不伺候了 | "Only 200,000! I'm Not Serving You Anymore"

Yang Yan Guang, Li Jia Yuan ZiLin Wan and her cousin Li Hao jointly ran a bed and breakfast, earning a net profit of 3.6 million yuan annually but only receiving 200,000 yuan in dividends. She was also exploited and looked down upon by her uncle's family. She resigned with her core clientele and savings, and with Chen Mo's help, founded "Wanqing Xiaozhu." Li Hao's family, due to poor management, brought the bed and breakfast to the brink of bankruptcy. In their attempts to salvage the situation, they repeatedly clashed and even took risks, ultimately reaping the consequences. Lin Wan, on the other hand, built her bed and breakfast into a chain brand through high-quality service and word-of-mouth, completely breaking free from her exploitative relatives and living a fulfilling life.
揽倾入怀 | "Embracing Her"

Wang Kang, Ma Ming JieTop female celebrity Bai Qing and doctor Song Yan, who had a past together, unexpectedly reunited after ten years apart. From initial hesitation to blossoming romance, their relationship progressed. Bai Qing publicly announced their relationship, revealing Song Yan's identity – he was not only a talented young doctor but also came from a prominent family and was exceptionally handsome. Despite public scrutiny and online discussions, they confirmed their feelings for each other, ultimately discovering that ten years hadn't diminished their love; instead, it had brought them together again at the peak of their lives, allowing them to continue their sweet and pure love story.
她的专属感应波 | "Her Exclusive Sensory Wave"

Shao Zhi Peng, Wang Qian HuiA female bodyguard, Jinian, infiltrates the life of tycoon Lu Sinian to save her childhood sweetheart, but is fired afterward. After being struck by lightning, the two develop a "shared feeling" and are forced into a bond. Amidst a contractual marriage, power struggles within a wealthy family, and a love triangle, their relationship evolves from bickering to attraction. Finally, in a life-or-death situation, they confess their feelings, ultimately finding happiness with twins and true love.
后妈有毒 | "The Stepmother is Poisonous"

Lu Huan Yu, Bai YeShen Jiaojiao, the heiress of the Shen Group, lost her mother at a young age and grew up under the control of her stepmother, Fang Yuan. Everyone says her mother committed suicide, but Shen Jiaojiao firmly believes that her mother's death was inextricably linked to Fang Yuan's involvement. In order to bring down Fang Yuan, Shen Jiaojiao deliberately seduces Lin Yao, the richest man in Liancheng with even greater power. However, just as the two are pressing Fang Yuan step by step, they discover that the past is far more complicated than they thought.
掌中金丝&长姐她竟是隐藏大佬 | "Golden Silk in the Palm & The Eldest Sister is Actually a Hidden Boss"

Zhou Yu Hang, Hu Qian Qian (RAW)Shen Tang severed ties with her father early in life due to family rules and went abroad to become a renowned jewelry designer and inheritor of the intangible cultural heritage of filigree inlay. After her father's death, she returned to China to find her younger brother spoiled, her younger sister bullied, the family business controlled by her uncle, and traditional skills abandoned. She made a strong comeback, seizing power as a shareholder. Through betting and competitions, she ultimately won the intangible cultural heritage competition and signed a huge order from the Gu Group. During this time, she overcame numerous obstacles and kidnappings, protected her younger siblings, and ultimately exposed the conspiracy, punished evil and promoted good.
旧爱难辞 | "Old Love is Hard to Let Go"

Li Yi Chen, Wang Mi Ze (RAW)On the eve of her wedding, Dr. Li Ruixi, a research scientist, is betrayed by her fiancé Mu Chuan and her childhood sweetheart Bai Youli, leading Mu Chuan to make the absurd demand for "freedom the night before the wedding." In her grief and anger, she asks her first love, Yi Yandong, the president of the Yi Group, to spend the night with her. Their old flame rekindles, and they uncover a past that led to their separation seven years ago due to their differing family backgrounds, orchestrated by Yi Yandong's mother. Li Ruixi resolutely cancels the wedding, whirlwinds into marriage with Yi Yandong, and together they fight against Mu Chuan's entanglement, Bai Youli's scheming, and Yi Yandong's mother's tests, ultimately achieving a happy marriage and family.
贺先生的小哭包被娇宠了 | "Mr. He's Little Crybaby is Pampered"

Jiang Xin Qi, Cheng Xin Yue (RAW)Xu Tian lost her mother at a young age and worked part-time to earn money for her tuition. However, due to an accidental mistake on the wrong floor, she unexpectedly had a one-night stand with He Jinzhou, a wealthy and influential figure in Beijing's elite circles. After their passionate encounter, Xu Tian became pregnant and had to give up her dream of ballet. She dropped out of school to work and support her child, but her stepmother and father severed ties with her. Meanwhile, He Jinzhou was searching for the mysterious woman. Eight months later, when Xu Tian was being persecuted by her family, He Jinzhou came to her rescue and took her into his home. After overcoming numerous obstacles together, the two finally opened their hearts to each other and decided to spend the rest of their lives together.
做旧师 | "The Antiquity Master"

Bai Fang Wen, Ke Fan (RAW)In the world of antique collecting, masters of forgery call themselves "antique masters." The Meixi antique master was unparalleled, but vanished overnight due to a tragic incident. Years later, Mei Jiu, a descendant of the Meixi master, re-enters the scene, using his antique forgery skills to befriend Xiao Wu, Su Mo, Hua Rui, and others. He navigates the complex relationships between the three prominent families of Jingdezhen—the Hua, Su, and Rong families—in search of the truth behind the Meixi master's demise.
重生八零之逆风时光 | "Rebirth in the 80s: Against the Wind"

Lv Yi Hao, Zhang Qian WenYu Changying is reborn in the 1980s, rising from a tragic supporting character to a powerful figure. She decisively dumps her scumbag boyfriend, enters into a contract marriage with Qin Shiyun, and travels to northern Anhui to restart her life. With her advanced knowledge and special abilities, she practices medicine to help people, transforms river crabs into a source of wealth, and leads her fellow villagers out of poverty. In their shared struggles and companionship, their fake marriage blossoms into a real-life romance. Ultimately, they join forces to thwart the villain's conspiracy, achieving success in their careers and finding true love, embarking on a warm and fulfilling new life together.
梅花烙 | "Plum Blossom Mark"

Mu Ting Yu, Tan Wen WenLin Shutong, the daughter of a powerful warlord, after her unmarried engagement to Gu Yunsheng, "Xiangguo," recruits Xie Zhilan, who bears a striking resemblance to Gu. Xie betrays her, forcing her to tolerate the dancer Bai Lu and even stealing the pigeon-blood red necklace given to her by Gu Yunsheng. At the wedding, Lin Shutong shoots and destroys Xie's birthmark, severing ties with him. Later, she discovers that Gu Yunsheng is not dead but has lost his memory. He is rescued by nurse Chen Lili, who conceals her identity from him. In the process of finding true love and uncovering the lies, Lin Shutong reunites with Gu Yunsheng, who has regained his memory, and they eventually become a couple.
风起铁锈缚余生＆错付心仪终涅槃 | "The Wind Rises and Rust Binds the Rest of My Life & Misplaced Love Leads to Nirvana"

Guo You, Zhu Yu XinIn her past life, Lu Xinyi refused to let go, leading to the destruction of her family and her death in a steel furnace at the hands of her cold-blooded husband, Xie Hongtao. Reborn on the day she discovered his infidelity, she wiped away her tears and decisively signed the divorce papers. In this life, she doesn't want love; she only wants to escape this demon with her parents. But when she truly turns away, why does the man who once treated her like dirt suddenly become frantic, searching high and low for her?
家有福星从天降 | "A Lucky Star Falls from the Sky"

Huang Wen BoTangtang was adopted by a nunnery, but it was washed away by a heavy rain, and Chen Feng took her in. Everyone thought Tangtang had a strange personality and didn't like her. But after she went to Chen Feng's home, Chen Feng began to have a series of good luck. Chen Feng and his mother both felt that Tangtang was a little lucky star. Surrounded by Chen Feng and his mother's love, Tangtang began to display her various skills and gradually became known as a little lucky star.
三魂为聘，七魄为礼 | "Three Souls as Dowry, Seven Spirits as Gifts"

Xie Hong Xin, Yang Fu YuHumans have three souls and seven spirits, but Yin Wenjiu only has one soul and one spirit. However, she only lives for the happiness in front of her, calculates the most accurate divination, charges the highest price, does not exert effort to live, and does not actively seek death. The idle prince Zhou Xian followed his close friend Lou Huanming to Yunmengze to seek medicine. Yin Wenjiu was forced to leave the mountain, and at the same time, she was also trapped by resentment. However, Yin Wenjiu discovered that the imperial aura in Zhou Xian could help her suppress the resentment, and the fates of the two became intertwined.
盲眼国舅，爆改恋爱脑 | "The Blind Imperial Uncle, A Dramatic Rewrite of a Love-Struck Man"

Tang Shu Ya, Jiang Yuan Ya RongHeartbroken and disillusioned with men, Shen Zhixi only wanted to have a child to carry on the family line. The Emperor's brother-in-law, Song Lianzhou, was being hunted by enemies and went blind after being wounded. Shen Zhixi rescued him. Fearing he would implicate others, Song Lianzhou adopted the alias Tang Zhou. Seeing the handsome but blind man before her, Shen Zhixi changed her name to Bai Linglan and deceived Song Lianzhou, claiming she was just a country girl. Through a series of lies, Shen Zhixi won over the lovestruck Song Lianzhou, tricking him into marrying her.
太子妃她命中带煞 | "The Crown Princess is Destined to Be Cursed"

Xuan Hao, Liu YingXie Qiao, a girl reborn with a cursed destiny, lived in seclusion for sixteen years. On her way back to the capital to participate in the selection of the Crown Prince's consort, she inadvertently helped the Crown Prince Zhao Xuanhuan multiple times, causing him to fall deeply in love with her. After returning to the capital, Xie Qiao used all her magical skills to punish villains and eliminate treacherous officials, mastering everything she did. However, her "cursed star" fate became the biggest obstacle to her becoming the Crown Prince's consort.
惊鸿辞 | "A Farewell to a Swan"

Jin Xuan Yu, Hao YunShangguan Wushuang transmigrated from the 21st century into the body of the seventh young lady of the Zhou Kingdom's Minister's Mansion. Due to a birthmark caused by poisoning, she was considered ugly and wicked, and was betrothed to Qin Wujue, the evil king of the Xuan Kingdom. Her stepsister, Shangguan Jiao'er, repeatedly framed the original owner out of jealousy. Thus, Shangguan Wushuang resolved to take revenge and save herself. Using her prophetic abilities from the original book, she gathered evidence to expose Qin Wujue's crimes. During this time, she and Qin Wujue went from testing each other to falling in love. They finally confirmed their relationship and slept together.
暴君前夫的白月光竟是我自己 | "My Tyrant Ex-Husband's White Moonlight Was Actually Me"

Cui Xu Yu, Zhao YingTo complete her mission, the transmigrated woman Zhou Yinyin accompanied Yan Ming from the cold palace as he ascended the throne. However, due to his favoritism towards Xu Yunyan, a princess from an enemy country, she only received the title of Imperial Concubine and was even disliked by her own son, Yan Zheng'an. After failing the mission and being wiped out, the system rebuilt her body. She married Zheng Yi on the border, had a daughter, and lived a peaceful life. Five years later, Yan Ming and his son, having realized their mistakes, came to try and win her back. Zhou Yinyin resolutely refused and ultimately helped Zheng Yi overthrow the tyrant, ascending the throne as Empress and protecting the people.
穿越成太子我跟父皇对着干 | "Transmigrated as the Crown Prince, I Went Against My Father"

Wu Yuan Cheng, Kou Shi LingLi Chengkun transmigrated, becoming the deposed crown prince of the Sheng Dynasty. Arrested for treason, he faced a hellish start, but luckily, he awakened a system that rewarded him for provoking Li Shenfeng. Thus, to survive, Li Chengkun embarked on a journey of mischief! By enraging Li Shenfeng, Li Chengkun unlocked countless rewards, gradually building his strength until he finally gained the power to return to Chang'an and confront Li Shenfeng head-on!

在逃99次，我的九尾狐老公追红温了 | "After 99 Escapes, My Nine-Tailed Fox Husband Went Viral"

Shen Hao Nan, Yu YinJiang Nuan was tragically murdered by her second uncle's family and fell off a cliff. On the verge of death, she was saved by the nine-tailed fox Yun Qi! However, he turned out to be a ruthless character who was there to finish her off. After being reborn three times, Jiang Nuan, unable to bear it any longer, pounced on Yun Qi and kissed him, accidentally swallowing his inner core and changing her fate! Seeing Yun Qi's unparalleled beauty and immense magical power, she instantly realized that she had to cling to this life-saving powerhouse! From then on, she used various methods to seduce the thousand-year-old pure-hearted fox to survives. Ultimately, she discovered that Yun Qi's three "murders" were actually acts of salvation, and she and Yun Qi finally embarked on a mutually beneficial journey, turning their death loop into a thrilling revenge story!
破笼 | "Breaking the Cage"

Zhang Chi, Yu YinAfter realizing she was just a minor character in a novel, destined to die young and suffer injustice, Song Zhenxing began to break free from her predicament. Her blind date plotted to make her a mistress, took nude photos of her, and caused her social death. Because she was from a women's virtue school, she dared not speak out, so she retaliated by stabbing him. Her elders took over the company under the guise of helping her, but sorry, starting today, she would manage the company herself. Her mother forced her to go on blind dates in the name of love, while Lu Zheng, whom she hired, was 20 years old, very obedient and compliant, shielding her from harm. Even with many wounds, he wouldn't back down, only looking at her with pitiful eyes and reddening.*Splitted into 2 parts
难撩＆亲完就跑周医生把她拉黑了 | "Hard to Seduce & Running Away After a Kiss, Dr. Zhou Blocked Her"

Wang Hao Zhen, Zhai Yi YingGuan Zhi has a hand fetish; she was immediately drawn to Zhou Quqing's hands when she first saw him in Xinjiang. They stayed at the same guesthouse, and during a game among the guests, the bottle tip landed on Zhou Quqing, who chose truth. Guan Zhi bluntly asked him if he was single. Zhou Quqing lightly replied that he was. A burst of teasing ensued. Later, he helped her catch a thief stealing her wallet, she took him and a sick child to the hospital, they watched the Milky Way together by the lake, and when Guan Zhi went hiking, the weather suddenly changed, and Zhou Quqing braved the wind and snow to come to her aid. That night, a romantic atmosphere developed. Guan Zhi: "Dr. Zhou, how about we play another game?" Zhou Quqing: "What game? Guan Zhi, I'll kiss you."
拥抱太阳 | "Embracing the Sun"

Xie Yu Wang, Zhang ShanA year of blood feud couldn't sever the spark between young hearts. She was a radiant sun reborn from the ashes, he a top-notch captain burdened with original sin. Their first encounter, still burning with youthful innocence, was now etched into their very bones by the bloodshed of a stormy night. Upon their reunion, she instantly recognized the unchanging tenderness in his eyes, but he, bound by the shackles of being the son of a sinner, dared not acknowledge her. Besieged by public opinion, blackmailed by his gambling uncle, and the return of his fugitive father—when darkness descends once more, this time they are no longer each other's light, but comrades-in-arms fighting side-by-side against the abyss. Ten years ago, you protected me; ten years later, I'll accompany you to atone for your sins. This two-way journey across life and death will ultimately pierce the gloom and embrace their own radiant light!
涅槃之上 | "Above Nirvana"

Yang Yu Bin, Lan Lan (RAW)Twelve-year-old Xia Hua was persecuted by her wealthy family. Her mother was forced to donate a kidney, and she was then adopted by her biological father and taken into the Song family, only to become Song Zhiying's maid. Witnessing Xiao Jia'an, who resembled her older brother, being sent to northern Myanmar, Xia Hua vowed revenge, determined to taint the bloodline of the wealthy with the "pollution" of the lower classes. She concealed her talents and started her own socialite training school, "Nirvana," from scratch. During this time, she encountered Xie Yuchen, an extremely difficult man to win over, whose dual nature was seen through.
恶之花 | "The Flower of Evil"

Qian Zhe, Wang Yi YangI was once a pampered, privileged girl, but I transmigrated into a comic book as a villain despised by everyone. My best friend took my place, becoming the sole female protagonist in this world. On my wedding day, she smiled as she put shackles on me—a final trap she had set for me. Until my dying moments, the second male lead, who should have been hers, stood in my way: "Want to live? Then tear her script apart with me."
偷月娇藏 | "Stealing the Moon, Hiding the Beauty"

Huai Wen, Fu Yu ShuXie Lin, investigating evidence against his enemies, infiltrates an engagement party, creating chaos but unexpectedly taking away the injured and unconscious Lin Shuyue. To extract evidence of the Shen family's crimes from Lin Shuyue, he impersonates Shen Zhaoming from her memories and takes her back to live with him. What began as a deception gradually changes their relationship due to Xie Lin's care for Lin Shuyue and her revealed vulnerability and dependence. Ultimately, the two join forces to seek revenge.
总裁的私定调香师 | "The President's Private Perfumer"

Zhang Li Ren, Xu Zi ShanThe story unfolds with Fu Yancheng, the president of a perfume brand. He is extremely sensitive to scents. One day, he discovers that he can be cured of his insomnia by the unique body fragrance of the genius perfumer Shen Zhiwei. Shen Zhiwei harbors a dream of entering Fu's top-tier laboratory, but she is disqualified from the competition because her classmate Lu Jingrou steals her fragrance base, leaving her with no choice but to join Fu's as an ordinary employee.
暮色尽时 | “When Twilight Fades”

Wang Qian Shuo, Peng Qian LingTo raise money for her studies abroad, Lu Anran, following Guan Wanqing's suggestion, creates an encounter with Jiang Chenye in an attempt to break up their engagement. Her carefully planned meeting seems clumsy to Jiang Chenye. After they confirm their relationship, Lu Anran still plans to go abroad, but her roommate betrays her. Driven by possessiveness, Jiang Chenye imprisons her in a villa. With the help of the second female lead, Lu Anran escapes. Jiang Chenye, obsessed with imprisoning her on a remote island overseas, insists on doing so. During their struggle, a truck arrives, and Jiang Chenye is injured protecting her. While hospitalized, he discovers Lu Anran is pregnant. After many trials and tribulations, a year later, the two bid farewell to the past and begin a new chapter.
失控:死对头只想亲她 | "Out of Control: My Archrival Only Wants to Kiss Her"

Zhu Min Xin, Zeng He Hui ZiQiao Yuning returns to China and heads straight to the Zhou Group, where she reunites with her arch-rival, Zhou Shixu. The two were childhood sweethearts, yet constantly at odds—she resents his broken promise in London, he's angry that she blocked him, their bickering revealing their deep affection. From misunderstandings at Yuyaxuan and his extravagant 1 billion yuan purchase at the auction to win her heart, to living together, caring for each other, and working together to overcome troubles, the bickering couple gradually develops feelings for each other. Zhou Shixu goes from being stubborn but soft-hearted to openly pursuing love, while Qiao Yuning goes from tentative to falling in love. Finally, amidst a birthday celebration filled with fireworks and a drone proposal, these "out-of-control rivals" become each other's lifelong companions.
沐太太的养崽手册 | "Mrs. Mu's Guide to Raising Her Stepchild"

Chen Jing He, Jiang YaoJiang Tang transmigrated into the body of a wicked stepmother in a wealthy family, initially punishing her son, Mu Yanzhi, by making him stand in the corner. After transmigrating, her personality changed drastically; she became fiercely protective of her son and confronted the awful stepmother, unexpectedly gaining the attention of her CEO husband, Mu Tingzhou. From initial testing of each other to working together to overcome various troubles, Jiang Tang used her unique methods to run a jewelry store and protect her family, while Mu Tingzhou gradually opened his heart. In their daily interactions, their relationship deepened, and they even uncovered Jiang's mother's fabricated bloodline, ultimately leading to a happy family life for the three of them.
沈总请自重我们已经分手了 | "President Shen, Please Behave Yourself, We've Broke Up"

Xiong Yun Hao, Zhu Jia NiThis story revolves around the love-hate relationship between journalist Qin Li and Shen Mingzhou, president of the ZL Group. Five years ago, Qin Li broke up with Shen Mingzhou to avoid burdening him after her family suffered a tragedy (her father was framed and committed suicide, and her mother was falsely accused and then committed suicide after being hospitalized). Five years later, the two reunite during an interview, and Shen Mingzhou, still harboring feelings for Qin Li, pursues her relentlessly. While dealing with the suppression and scheming of her second uncle, Qin Renzhi, and others, and investigating the truth behind her parents' deaths, Qin Li, with Shen Mingzhou's protection and help, gradually exposes Qin Renzhi's crimes of smuggling and framing. Ultimately, she is exonerated, and she and the tumultuous Shen Mingzhou finally achieve a happy ending, walking hand in hand into the future.
春风吹展我愁眉 | "Spring Breeze Unfolds My Frown"

Liu Yan Chen, Huang TingReborn back to the point where her scumbag boyfriend suffered a car accident and lost his memory, Jiang Hua initially wanted to win back her beloved, only to witness him condoning his scheming rival's illegitimate child and trampling on her sincerity. Realizing the truth, she joined forces with her stepbrother Jiang Zheye, who secretly loved her, and, armed with irrefutable evidence of infidelity and economic crimes, exposed the scumbag and his mistress at their wedding, bankrupting the Shen Group and bringing shame upon the villains. From a love-struck fool to a business queen, she rose from the ashes in revenge, ultimately embracing the deep affection hidden in the past.
盛夏告白 | "Summer Confession"

Sun Jia Jun, Liu Yi TongSensitive and insecure Jiang He has harbored a secret crush on Zhou Yiyao since college. Their feelings for each other gradually blossom during their daily interactions, with Zhou Yiyao's silent devotion and Jiang He's unrequited love bringing them together. However, Jiang He's father is suddenly diagnosed with a tumor, and her mother demands she transfer schools on the condition of paying for medical expenses. To avoid burdening her mother, Jiang He chooses to break up with her and disappears. Even after the breakup, Zhou Yiyao can't let go of Jiang He. After an unexpected reunion, he embarks on a relentless pursuit of her. As the hidden reason for Jiang He's transfer is revealed, they resolve all their inner conflicts. Ultimately, Jiang He overcomes her insecurities and fears, bravely responding to her feelings. This couple, who have weathered many storms, reunite, continuing their story of summer confession and lifelong commitment.
我在Q市当大佬那几年 | "My Years as a Boss in Q City"

Tan Si Yuan, Zheng Chu ChenZhou Wangyou transmigrated into the body of a tragic female supporting character in a wish-fulfillment novel, only to be rescued by the infamous villainous Zhou family. Knowing her family's impending doom due to the original female lead, Sheng Shuying, she decided to strike first. Faced with Sheng Shuying's ever-changing personas and dazzling aura, Zhou Wangyou fought evil with evil, using her premonition to form a "villainous alliance" and gathering secrets of the wealthy family as leverage. From auctions to business battles, from birthday parties to life-or-death situations, she launched precise counterattacks, peeling away layers of her opponent's disguise. Finally, when everyone thought the Zhou family was doomed, she joined forces with her patient ally, Chu Yin.
新婚夜记忆之外悔不当初 | "Regret Beyond Memories of My Wedding Night"

Xiang Ming, Li Bi RongLi Su waited agonizingly for her missing fiancé, Huo Zhenzhou, for half a year, only to find him returning with a new wife, Zhou Motang, after suffering from amnesia. Heartbroken, she was seduced by Huo Zhenzhou's younger brother, Huo Xuanye, and hastily married him, binding them together under the guise of a substitute. After their marriage, Huo Xuanye's genuine devotion clashed with Zhou Motang's repeated schemes. Li Su gradually fell in love amidst her pain, only to suffer a leg injury as revenge from Zhou Motang's father. Ultimately, Huo Zhenzhou regained his memory, Zhou Motang's lies were exposed, and Li Su recovered with Huo Xuanye's support. The two shed their substitute status, held a grand wedding, and found true love.
满级长姐，接单八零 | "Max-Level Eldest Sister: Taking Orders in the 80s"

Li Zi Jie, Zhang Chu XuanA scumbag father brought his stepmother into his wife's home, living in her room, sleeping in her bed, and even trying to kick out her child. But! Yao Shula, who was specially hired to deal with the scumbag father, has been reborn! She'll deal with the scumbag father, the mistress, and her younger siblings! She's here to make life better for them, so she makes money, chases after handsome men, and enjoys her sharp tongue—making her mouth happy and her breasts clear. Hey, you have an order for "Have you finished cursing?" Please accept!
掘金女王之爱恨1990 | "Gold Digger Queen: Love and Hate in 1990"

Gai Yue Xi, Dai Xiang Yu, Chen Zi HanSet against the backdrop of Shanghai's economic boom in the 1990s. It tells the legendary story of Chen Yuzhen, a young woman from Sichuan who elopes to Shanghai and rises from a street vendor to a real estate tycoon. Using a mysterious "Gold Rush Notebook," she uncovers business opportunities and manipulates the clothing, stock, and real estate industries, while also engaging in a lifelong love-hate relationship with Hong Kong businessman Lin Xi. Spanning over thirty years, the story intertwines personal destinies with the changing times, showcasing the resilience and ambition of women navigating the turbulent world of business.
弃女掌天下 | "The Abandoned Daughter Rules the World"

Shao Wei, Liu NianTao Huaixi, stripped of her property and driven from her family by her second uncle, returned to the capital after five years of living in the borderlands with her son, seeking revenge. To avoid forced marriage, she entered into a three-year contractual marriage with Han Nanxing, the heir of the Marquis of Jingyang, for one hundred taels of gold. Little did she know that he was her former lover, now suffering from amnesia. As the two fought together against foreign enemies and resolved a crisis in the capital, Han Nanxing's true identity as the orphaned son of the Wu Qiang was revealed. However, his son, Tao Qu, was cursed and needed the help of his royal bloodline, which led to accusations of being a "Western Region spy." The King of Wu Qiang arrived as promised. Could this crisis of family and country be resolved through business?
不好意思我全家都穿了 | "Sorry, My Whole Family Time-Traveled"

Lu Huan Yu, Liu NianA single mother and daughter are transported to the ancient imperial harem, where they receive a system mission: if they become empress, they can return to the real world and receive a hundred million. However, as a concubine, she discovers that her entire family has also transmigrated, with her own mother becoming the Empress Dowager. With no experience in palace intrigue, the family must work together to complete the mission.
天降医妃瘸腿太子你别跑 | “Heaven-Sent Physician Consort: Lame Crown Prince, Don't Run!”

Ji Jun Liang, Bai YeYue Rushuang, a top-tier military doctor in the 24th century, holds dual doctorates in medicine and toxicology. One day, she transmigrates into the body of a general's daughter with the same name. She sheds the image of a submissive "Lin Daiyu" and slaps the faces of the second male prince and the scheming Jiang Yurou. The two plot to take revenge on Yue Rushuang, scheming to force the emperor to marry her to the deposed crown prince. Unexpectedly, Yue Rushuang, through her own efforts and using her personal military space, not only heals the crown prince's injuries but also cultivates the land, develops technology and military capabilities, assists the crown prince in his northern expedition against enemy states, eliminates treacherous officials within the country, and restores order. In the end, Yue Rushuang and the crown prince live happily ever after.
渣夫再娶，医妃风华定乾坤 | "Remarrying the Scoundrel Husband: The Physician Consort's Brilliance Shapes the Realm"

Chen Guan Wei, Teng Ze WenThe modern-day medical genius "Ghost Doctor" Jiu Li is betrayed and dies tragically, transmigrating into the body of Su Li Yue, the War King's consort, who was framed and abandoned in a nunnery five years prior. She returns with her adorable son, Ye Yu Cheng, using her unparalleled medical skills to break the deadlock, tearing apart her scheming half-sister and the Prince Duan, uncovering layers of conspiracies involving child swapping, amnesia, and hypnosis, and helping the cold-faced War King Ye Cang Ming quell the rebellion and ascend the throne. With the truth revealed, she leaves behind a divorce agreement and roams the martial world with her child; the War King, enraged, pursues her relentlessly, vowing to win back his wife and child, leading to a dramatic and heart-wrenching ending.
陛下这届宫斗太卷了 | "Your Majesty, This Round of Palace Intrigue Is Too Intense"

Qi Xiao Shu, Sheng ChenJiang Xian, a top student from a major internet company, transmigrates into the body of a concubine in the imperial harem! No worries! First, she'll have a chance encounter with the emperor, serve him in bed, get a promotion, and then use some modern office skills to win over the lazy empress. This small-town exam-taker easily becomes the most dazzling girl in the harem! As for the emperor? A love-struck fool never ends well! Adapted from the novel "My Beloved Concubine is Too Curious," by Jiang Shan Que.
月上枝头做凤凰 | "Becoming a Phoenix on the Moon Branch"

Ye Yi, Tian Jiu LuoThe female protagonist, Song Qiyue, is forced to enter the palace as a concubine in place of her cousin. Betrayed by her family, abandoned by her lover, and caught in the treacherous palace, she uses her wisdom and ruthlessness to ascend to the pinnacle of power. From a bullied concubine to the empress, Song Qiyue not only takes revenge on all those who wronged her but also safeguards her dignity and future amidst power struggles and bloodshed.
流放路上我带着傻爹顿顿吃肉 | "On the Road to Exile, I Took My Foolish Father to Eat Meat Every Meal"

Chen Xiang Min, Zheng Ji YuanTao Yaoyao, a female warrior in the apocalypse, unlocks her personal space after slaying 100,000 zombies and is reborn as the 11-year-old sixth young lady of the Minister's mansion, sharing the same name. The original owner of this body suffered greatly from bullying within her family. After the Minister's mansion was raided and she was exiled, she was used as a scapegoat by the eldest daughter, and her father, Tao Zhongming, died tragically in the streets while seeking justice for his daughter. The original owner's fate was miserable. Reborn, Tao Yaoyao returns with her personal space, determined to change her destiny and repay the original owner tenfold for all the bullying she suffered.
本王在此 | "This King Is Here"

Tong Jia Hao, Su HuanShe was once the powerful and influential commander of the Zhaotian Army, distrusted by the emperor, and died on the battlefield. Ten years later, Ye Zhao is reborn as the mentally challenged daughter of a military family. She secretly takes control of her household, consolidates her power, and vows revenge for her 100,000 former subordinates. When her arch-enemy attacks her again, she publicly retaliates at a royal banquet, shocking the court and the public. Meanwhile, the once sunny and devoted Prince Jing, who followed her, is now brooding and obsessive, willing to defy imperial power for her sake. Faced with the emperor's confinement within the palace and the concubine's deadly schemes, how will she, in her new identity, settle past grievances and uncover the truth behind the hidden arrows? And will the man who has been driven mad by her for ten years finally see her return?
替嫁战王后，神妃携带空间去流放 | "After Substitute Marriage to the War King, the Divine Consort Went to Exile with a Spatial Ability"

Zhou Heng Yu, Fan WeiSupernatural agent Yan Ruyu wakes up in ancient times and is forced to marry in place of her husband! To make matters worse, before the bridal sedan even lands, her husband's family is to be raided and exiled. Yan Ruyu discovers that her missing husband is actually her ancestor's benefactor. With her fiery temper, how could she stand by and watch her benefactor be humiliated? Raiding their home? Fine, all their possessions will be stored in her spatial dimension! Severing ties with her father? Fine, she'll write the disownment letter! They'll all be begging her on their knees in the future! Trying to assassinate her on the way to exile? Fine, she'll dig pits for them, burying them one by one! A white lotus, a crybaby pretending to be weak? Fine, every punch and slap will leave a mark, she'll cry her heart out!
红袖拈香绾山河 | “Red Sleeves Tying Fragrance, Binding Mountains and Rivers”

Gao Ming Yu, Yang Luo Qian (RAW)Xie Lingxian was originally the daughter of the capital's premier incense-making family. Her entire family was massacred after their secret incense, "Snowy Fragrance," was coveted, but she narrowly escaped. Three years later, she returned to the incense competition as a masked perfumer, exposing the conspiracy of her enemy, Wang Jue, and the mastermind, Consort Ling. Seeking revenge and an antidote, she cautiously approached Prince Rong, who was suffering from a rare poison, using incense as a medium and herself as a catalyst to help him recover. Their relationship evolved from mutual exploitation to genuine affection. Together, they unraveled the mystery of the poisonous incense in the palace, thwarted the coup plot of the Hu tribe and the Consort Ling, ultimately cleansing the court, restoring the Xie family's reputation in incense, and finding true love.
再嫁惊鸿 | "A Second Marriage That Stuns"

Zhou Yan Zhe, Wang Mei Qi (RAW)In her past life, Jiang Ru, who helped Qi An ascend the throne, was betrayed and tragically killed by him, Yun Qingqing, and Jiang Mian. Reborn on the day of the Jiang family's marriage selection, she recognizes Jiang Mian, who has also been reborn, and decisively marries the Third Prince, Qi Yuan. She reclaims the family heirloom, plots against Jiang Mian, causing her to suffer the consequences, and discovers Qi Yuan's poisoning, carefully caring for him and awakening his memories. She repeatedly thwarts Qi An and Jiang Mian's schemes, ultimately exposing their conspiracy. Qi An's coup fails, and he is exiled, with Jiang Mian accompanying him. Qi Yuan ascends the throne, making Jiang Ru his empress, and together they usher in a prosperous era for the Liang Dynasty, with her ultimately becoming a virtuous empress.
