Shao Wei, Liu Nian[HERE]20. 不好意思我全家都穿了 - Lu Huan Yu, Liu Nian[HERE]21. 天降医妃瘸腿太子你别跑 - Ji Jun Liang, Bai Ye[HERE]22. 渣夫再娶，医妃风华定乾坤 - Chen Guan Wei, Teng Ze Wen[HERE]23. 陛下这届宫斗太卷了 - Qi Xiao Shu, Sheng Chen[HERE]24. 月上枝头做凤凰 - Ye Yi, Tian Jiu Luo[HERE]25. 流放路上我带着傻爹顿顿吃肉 - Chen Xiang Min, Zheng Ji Yuan[HERE]26. 本王在此 - Tong Jia Hao, Su Huan[HERE]27. 替嫁战王后，神妃携带空间去流放 - Zhou Heng Yu, Fan Wei[HERE]28. 红袖拈香绾山河 - Gao Ming Yu, Yang Luo Qian[HERE]29. 再嫁惊鸿 - Zhou Yan Zhe, Wang Mei Qi[HERE]
督军如此多娇 | "The Warlord is So Charming"

Zeng Hui, Han Yu TongTwelve years ago, 10-year-old Gu Fengsheng, the little tyrant of the Prime Minister's office, married Lu Qingye, a girl from the orphanage, according to his grandmother's dying wish. Lu Qingye became a child bride to pay for her grandfather's medical treatment. After entering the Gu family, she disciplined the entire household and raised Gu Fengsheng, making him focus on his studies. Gu Fengsheng went from resisting to secretly falling in love, but was separated from Lu Qingye by going abroad, who insisted on staying home to take care of her grandfather. He vowed to find her when he grew up. Twelve years later, Gu Fengsheng became the military governor of six provinces in Jiangbei, and Lu Qingye became the prospective president of the Qinglong Society in Haicheng. At that time, Lu Qingye was planning to take a son-in-law as her husband, so Gu Fengsheng transformed into a "pampered young husband" and began his journey to win her heart.
婚后撩吻 | "Post-Marriage Flirting Kiss"

Yang Yu Bin, Fan Chu QiBlind guqin player Mingruo and Shang Chi, who conceals his identity as a CEO, reunite through a blind date. It turns out they were rescuer and rescued in a car accident ten years prior. After their marriage, Shang Chi, burdened by skin conditions and anxieties, adopts the persona of a "programmer earning 5,000 yuan a month," a lie that leads to misunderstandings. Ultimately, Shang Chi's empathetic support, his encouragement of Mingruo's musical dreams, and his charitable work make amends, allowing them to resolve their misunderstandings and continue their ten-year journey of love and redemption.
偏执老公有读心术后，总爆我马甲 | "My Obsessive Husband Has Mind-Reading Skills and Keeps Exposing My Secret Accounts"

Ma Ming Yu, Wei Yu JiaAfter complaining about a novel, Lin Qiao transmigrates into the body of a villainous supporting character, just as she's about to frame her husband, Li Tingzhou, for a car accident. An accidental encounter grants Li Tingzhou the ability to read minds, revealing her true intention: to divorce him and claim his vast fortune. Lin Qiao, with her innate ability to jinx things, repeatedly averts crises, while Li Tingzhou, investigating the truth behind the accident, gradually develops feelings for this unusual "wife." Together, they fight the villains, resolve scandals, and ultimately, Lin Qiao achieves her design dreams and finds true love with Li Tingzhou.
快跑！京大来了个活阎王 | "Run! A Living Yama Arrives at Peking University"

Li Ruo Xun, Dai Qi XuanXu Ruochu, the eldest princess of the Chu Kingdom, skilled in both literature and martial arts, unexpectedly transmigrates after being shot by an arrow and becomes the homeroom teacher of a class of spoiled brats at a prestigious high school in the capital. Facing a "hellish class" with 33 teachers a month, including the son of a Sanda champion and a wealthy tycoon, a tea merchant's son, and a love-struck heiress, she uses ancient methods of disciplining spoiled brats. She subdues troublemakers with force, uses traditional tea ceremonies to motivate academically challenged students, and resolves family conflicts with her wisdom. From classroom pranks to family conspiracies, Xu Ruochu breaks through obstacles with a hardcore approach, not only reforming all the spoiled brats into pillars of society but also gaining their unwavering loyalty, ultimately becoming the true "strongest homeroom teacher."
六年后大小姐带着系统夺回一切 | "Six Years Later, the Young Lady Takes Back Everything with a System"

Nie Bo Xuan, Tan Miao MiaoLin Qingyue is reborn after being wrongfully murdered, bound to the "Heiress System," and returns to the Lin family to seek revenge against her stepmother Bai Yu and her illegitimate daughter Lin Xueyi. She reclaims her room, wins over her younger brother, achieves academic and piano success, uncovers the truth behind the fire and her mother's car accident, ultimately makes her enemies reap what they sow, protects her family, and gains kinship, friendship, and love, living the life of a true top heiress.
依旧失控 | "Still Out of Control"

Pan Yi Shan, Sheng Yi JieFour years ago, Qiao Xu cruelly severed her relationship with Xu Si'an due to a meticulously planned misunderstanding and humiliation. Four years later, they meet again at work, and her former lover has become her newly appointed boss. Is Xu Si'an's relentless pursuit a personal vendetta or an unspoken act of protection? As the long-buried misunderstandings are gradually revealed, family opposition and the schemes of a rival follow. The two are torn between reason and emotion, struggling to overcome class prejudice and past wounds, and ultimately write a new ending for this unfinished love story. A battle between ex, boss, and true love begins.
中年被裁后，我拿下总裁弟弟 | "After Being Laid Off in Middle Age, I Won Over the CEO's Younger Brother"

Xue Yun Fei, Zhao Mi MiSu Nian became pregnant with CEO Huo Yanci's child after an unexpected one-night stand, giving birth to twins and raising them alone with great difficulty. Years later, the children participated in Huo's elite talent program, reuniting with Huo Yanci, only to be repeatedly harassed by HR manager Ma Weiwei. Huo Yanci, suspicious of the children's resemblance to himself, conducted a paternity test, confirming the relationship. Ma Weiwei then abused Su Nian and her children. Huo Yanci bravely rescued them, and the family was finally reunited, with the perpetrators severely punished by law.
乖宝重生，司少他在线诱宠 | "The Good Baby Reborn, Young Master Si's Online Seduction"

Bai Hao, Hao YunIn her past life, Yan Buyu died tragically on train tracks. Reborn at the age of eight, she decisively sent her scumbag father to prison and was adopted by the wealthy Shen family, becoming their pampered heiress. At twenty, she accidentally stumbled into a nightclub and bumped into the arms of Si Jingxu, the heir to a prominent Beijing socialite family, unaware that he was actually her anonymous "French teacher" of four years. Faced with her biological father's resurrected resentment and the gradual unveiling of the mystery of her origins, she and Si Jingxu, who had always been by her side, joined forces to fight back, ultimately achieving fulfillment in family, love, and career.
出狱归来，渣男靠边站 | "After Returning from Prison, the Scumbag Steps Aside"

Yi Cheng, Tang JingFang Li, the true heiress of the Fang family, is framed by the fake heiress Fang Yuxin and sent to prison by her fiancé, Gu Mingzhou. After her release, she discovers their affair and resolutely breaks off the engagement, only to be expelled from the Fang family. Desperate, she contacts "258," whom she had previously helped, only to discover that he is Gu Mingzhou's uncle, Gu Zhaoting. Gu Zhaoting, who has secretly loved Fang Li for years, seizes the opportunity to pamper her, helps her heal her leg injury, seizes the family fortune, and exposes Fang Yuxin's conspiracy. Gu Mingzhou, upon learning the truth, is filled with remorse, but it is too late; he has already lost his beloved. In the end, Fang Li finds a new life under Gu Zhaoting's protection, and the two live happily ever after, while Fang Yuxin and others reap what they sow.
穿成替身女配后 | "After Transmigrating into a Substitute Female Supporting Character"

Wu Fei Xue, Nie Ji Kun, Huang LuShi Shuyi, a top agent at the Transmigration Bureau, transmigrates into the body of a cannon fodder female supporting character in an old-fashioned tragic novel. The original owner of this body, taking advantage of Fu Shiyan's breakup with Gu Zhixia, became entangled with Fu Shiyan for three months, ultimately suffering a tragic end with the destruction of her family. To change her fate and fulfill the original owner's wishes, Shi Shuyi proactively plots. She approaches the obsessive, sister-obsessed Gu Huaiye with a pure yet flawed image, using acting skills and charm to become his girlfriend, cleverly navigating between Gu Huaiye and Fu Shiyan. In the process, she must contend with the jealousy and scheming of Gu Huaiye's sister, Gu Zhixia, gradually dismantle Gu Huaiye's defenses, and also cultivate Fu Shiyan's interest in her.
迟总夫人又在倒追你 | "Mrs. Chi is Chasing After You Again"

Xiao Wen Bo, Huang Hui Ling (RAW)Shen Kui unexpectedly awakens to the truth: she is the villainous supporting character who abused her husband, Chi Yuliang. To reverse her fate, she embarks on a frantic act of atonement, from whipping him to clumsily trying to win him back, only to repeatedly fail. Chi Yuliang appears stoic, but secretly harbors deep affection. When Shen Kui resolves to reclaim the millions of dollars swallowed up by her family of origin, this life-altering tale of marriage of convenience turning into love and a tumultuous pursuit of her husband officially begins.
老祖重生后，靠算命带崽逆袭 | "After the Ancestor's Rebirth, She Relies on Fortune Telling and Raising Her Child to Make a Comeback"

Cao Jun Ke, Tian ZhenLi Zhi is reborn into the body of a woman who abuses her own child. Upon waking, she is involved in a car accident. To save her son, Li Yanjing, who is burdened with a destiny, she uses mystical arts to demand compensation and acquire spiritual power. By chance, she discovers that Xie Tingzhou is her son's biological father and possesses abundant spiritual power, so she schemes to become Xie's family's nanny. During this time, she repeatedly thwarts Gu Yanran's schemes, gradually develops feelings for Xie Tingzhou, and unexpectedly becomes pregnant with her second child. After overcoming obstacles such as the revelation of her true identity and past misunderstandings, the two finally overcome obstacles and hold a wedding with the blessings of their families, living happily ever after as a family of four.
狼烟枕红妆 | "Smoke of War and Red Makeup"

Gang Tie Rou Rou (Li Lei), Liu Lan GePrincess Jiang Xueran of a defeated kingdom was kidnapped by a bandit gang known throughout the land as the "Small Kingdom" during her journey to a marriage alliance. She then lost her virginity to the bandit leader, Yan Wuxiao. After much scheming, she successfully entered the palace, only to discover that the Emperor of Yuwen Kingdom was bedridden and unable to rise. However, the emperor bore a striking resemblance to Yan Wuxiao, who disguised himself as a eunuch to enter the palace and come to her side. Meanwhile, the Regent, who held power in the palace, coveted her beauty and became entangled in a web of intrigue. Jiang Xueran, step by step, carefully manipulated the man to her advantage. She used herself as bait, and he used the bandits as a shield; their struggle escalated from the bedchamber to the court.
穿成公主，她玩转朝堂做女帝第二部 | "Transmigrated into a Princess, She Plays the Court and Becomes the Empress 2"

Cheng Yu Feng, Wen Mo YanAfter transmigrating into the body of the Empress of the Tianqi Dynasty, Li Luowan uses her seemingly decadent harem as a chessboard to balance the court, and embarks on a complex love-hate relationship with Xiao Heng, the young commander of the Western Frontier Army. Due to past heartbreak, she has closed herself off emotionally. After the judge of the underworld reveals the truth about her transmigration, Xiao Heng resolves to melt her heart. Li Luowan vigorously promotes women's examinations, fights against conservative forces, and thwarts the rebellion of the King of Donglin. Ultimately, she joins hands with Xiao Heng to usher in a new era of equality for women.
青梅嗅，世子他蓄谋已久 | "The Scent of Green Plums, the Prince Has Been Planning This for a Long Time"

Xiao Wen Yu, Yu Yi LeiJiang Changning, the legitimate daughter of a high-ranking official in the capital, was abandoned in Jiangnan as a child and raised by a nanny because her father favored his concubine over his wife. To pay for her nanny's medical treatment, she agreed to discipline the dissolute young master Xie Yan. The two went from being at odds to developing feelings for each other, but were forced apart when Xie Yan returned to the capital. Eighteen years later, Jiang Changning became the richest woman in Jiangnan. After her nanny's death, she returned to the capital to inherit her mother's estate. At her stepsister Jiang Chang'an's wedding, she exposed her father's disgraceful behavior  and reclaimed her mother's inheritance. Unbeknownst to her, Xie Yan had also waited for her for eighteen years, but mistook the newlywed Jiang Chang'an for her, and they tragically missed each other.
侯府姑奶奶才十六，专治各种不服 | "The Marquis's Daughter is Only Sixteen, Specializing in Curing All Disobedience"

Fa Er Jia, Li Li ZaiYun Zhixu is the legitimate daughter of the Marquis of Dingbei and the sole heir of the Xuantian Sect. Fifty years ago, while practicing martial arts, Yun Zhixu was deliberately pushed into a freezing pool. Time stood still at the bottom of the pool, and Yun Zhixu spent fifty years there. When she returned to the Marquis of Dingbei's mansion, she found everything had changed. Her elder brother had passed away, and her nephew Yun Tianzong, whom she had once held in her arms, was now an old man. Yun Zhixu had become the most senior aunt in the Marquis of Dingbei's mansion. Within the Marquis of Dingbei's mansion, the second wife, Liu Shi, harbored ill intentions, while outside, the political enemy, the Prince of Jing'an's mansion, was eyeing them covetously. Beset by internal and external troubles, the mansion was in grave danger.
大结局后我反手买了反派 | "After the Finale, I Bought the Villain"

Zang Xiao Jia (Jia Yan), Xu Bo DiAfter the finale of the transmigration novel, I spent ten taels of silver to buy Rong Qi, the villain whose home had just been raided. I intended to make a fortune off him, but to my surprise, he was penniless and badly injured. While stripping him of his clothes for money, I also encouraged him to steal back the exorbitant dowry intended for the female lead. Unexpectedly, I became his "wife" at the wedding robbery, and even opened a milk tea shop, becoming a city-wide sensation thanks to his "handsome smile." But Rong Qi gradually started acting strangely.

燎月 | "Blazing Moon"

Shao Wei, Xin Run XiShe possessed an immortal constitution, yet was imprisoned by her fiancé for a century, her spiritual energy drained. She broke the seal and escaped, then seduced Xia Mu, the heir of the Xia family, using her alluring eyes to absorb his spiritual energy, only to have her true feelings reshaped by his innocent charm. Together, they devised a scheme, completely outmaneuvering her crazed ex-husband! "I am your only lifeline," he declared, pinning her against the wall, forbidding her to seek anyone else. She helped him ascend to the position of family head, and he joined her in uncovering a century-old conspiracy. When the crimson moon returned, she forgot her past and fought her way out for him, vowing, "I'll give my life for your eternal freedom."
上嫁 | "Marrying Up"
Xiong Yun Hao, Li Xi WeiCheng Xi and Zhou Jingchen's forbidden love is exposed, and the blood feud between their fathers drags them into a storm once again!
嘘，天黑请动手 | "Hush, Make Your Move When It Gets Dark"

Hu Yun Ge, Fu Yu ShuSix months after being framed and sent to a mental hospital by the fake heiress Qin Rou, Qin Nuan returns to the Qin family as a "well-behaved patient." A mad soul lies dormant within her, waiting for a chance to "defend herself," while outwardly adhering to the principle of "never striking first," using her mental illness diagnosis as both a protective shield and a weapon for retaliation. Faced with Qin Rou's persistent manipulative tactics and her brothers' blind favoritism, she calmly navigates the situation with her superior intelligence, turning each provocation into a trap to lure her opponent into striking first. Each time, she launches a precise and swift counterattack, peeling back the layers of lies, and the villains reap what they sow. Ultimately, amidst the cold ruins of her family home, she reclaims her own warmth and dignity.
慢慢深陷 | "Slowly Falling Deeper"

Lin Ke Han, Lu YuanUndercover police officer Chen Yu infiltrates Xin Guosheng's inner circle, tasked with protecting his blind daughter, Xin Yu. Xin Yu, seemingly kept under house arrest, actually carries the burden of a blood feud over her mother's murder and secretly searches for evidence. The two go from testing and maneuvering to gradually trusting each other, joining forces to fight Xin Guosheng's criminal syndicate. After overcoming numerous crises and life-or-death trials, they successfully bring the criminals to justice, and in the process of fighting side-by-side, a deep affection blossoms between them, ultimately leading to a happy ending.
小乞丐与太子爷的黑卡 | "The Little Beggar and the Crown Prince's Black Card"

Zang Xiao Jia (Jia Yan), Yuan Yu'aiShen Meng, originally a wealthy heiress, was reduced to begging after her father's infidelity and her family's breakdown. She was then framed and humiliated by Shen Ruoxi, an illegitimate daughter, and Xu Wang, a wealthy heir from Beijing's elite circles. Knowing the truth, Shen Meng turned the tables, using this "gambling romance" to turn her fortunes around. With her talent and perseverance, she won an English speech contest, exposing all the conspiracies and pain. After experiencing family feuds and life-or-death struggles, she repaid her past debts, severed ties with her unbearable past, and went to Harvard to study, ultimately escaping her slump and becoming her own light.
意外求婚，宝藏老公将我宠上天 | "An Unexpected Proposal, My Treasure Husband Spoils Me to the Heavens"

Yang Yan Guang, Wang Nan NanOn her mother's birthday, Jiang Zhirou visited the funeral home and encountered Su Yan, the eldest son of the Su family, whose mother had also passed away. At this time, Su Yan was still a rich second-generation who was just living a carefree life. Seeing Su Yan isolated and helpless reminded Jiang Zhirou of her own loss of her mother. When Su Yan was humiliated by his fiancée's family, Jiang Zhirou stood up for him, confessed her feelings, and agreed to marry him to help him out of the predicament. However, when Jiang Zhirou wanted a divorce, she discovered that Su Yan had taken his charade for real and that he was actually a patient and ambitious academic genius who had transformed overnight from a good-for-nothing into the chairman of the Su Group!
她的黑玫瑰刺向白月光 | "Her Black Rose Pierces the White Moonlight"

Guo Che, Bei BeiSu Xingchen was forced to break up with her boyfriend Lu Shiyuan by his mother due to her family's financial situation. Four years later, she became the Black Rose, a powerful female gangster in Jiangcheng, and the heiress of the Su Group. Lu Shiyuan returned from studying abroad and became a surgeon. The two reunited during an assassination attempt. Lu Shiyuan mistakenly believed that Su Xingchen was cold-hearted, but in reality, she had always deeply loved him. After experiencing betrayal, family conspiracies, and life-or-death trials, Su Xingchen disbanded her gang for love, surrendered herself to the police to atone for her sins, and was released from prison seven years later. She and Lu Shiyuan retired together, selling tea at a street stall, and ultimately achieved a peaceful and happy ending.
撞球甜心 | "Billiards Sweetheart"

Chen Zi Yang (Chen Yu An), Lei Xiao YuLin Xiaoyue, a girl with a beautiful face and amazing billiards talent, originally lived a carefree life. However, her father's failed investment plunged the family into a huge debt. To help her father pay off the debt, Lin Xiaoyue had no choice but to give up her studies and apply for a billiards assistant coach position at the "147 Billiards Club" in the bustling city. There, she met Lu Chen, the heir apparent. The 147 Billiards Club is a well-known chain in the industry, with a large customer base and high spending levels, but it is also a place rife with undercurrents, competition, and challenges.
穿越七零这个嫂子会炼丹 | "This Sister-in-Law from the 70s Can Refine Pills"

Wang Bing Xiang, He Tian TianShen Xinyue, a celestial being in the cultivation world, transmigrates to the body of a simple-minded village girl in the 1970s due to an accident while refining pills. She is unexpectedly rescued by Gu Yanchen, who is on leave visiting his family. After marrying him, she uses her alchemy and medical skills to help military families overcome difficulties, and her feelings for Gu Yanchen deepen in the process. Shen Xinyue opens a pharmacy in the capital, where she is framed by the jealous Jiang Wenrui. Through her exceptional medical skills, she overcomes the danger and gives birth to her daughter, Gu Xinwei, who possesses magical powers. Gu Xinwei displays great talent while punishing the villains, and the family lives happily together.*They look way cuter than what I expected 🥰
她在八零乘风起 | "She Rides the Wind in the 80s"

Gao Ming Chen, Bai Xu HanFashion designer Xu Si unexpectedly transmigrates into an 1980s novel, becoming a supporting female character—the fake heiress of the Xie family, switched at birth. In modern times, she's an orphan. Unexpectedly, after transmigrating, Xu Si gains family and friendship, experiences the vibrant life of the city streets, and, due to the rebirth of the real heiress Xie Xinyue, marries Yan Zheng, Xie Xinyue's former husband. As the son of the chamber of commerce president, Yan Zheng resolutely joined the army at a young age, becoming the captain of the seventh team. Due to a leg injury during a mission, he feigns a limp and moves into Ivory Alley to investigate. Suspicious of the Xie family, he agrees to marry Xu Si, but unexpectedly falls in love with her during their time together.
退亲后，我嫁给了前任他哥 | "After Breaking Off the Engagement, I Married My Ex's Brother"

Guan Lin, Feng Xi YaoRuan Ningqi transmigrated into a male-oriented novel, becoming the fiancée of a scumbag. Starting in hell mode, she decisively broke off the engagement, only to unexpectedly become entangled with the male lead's older brother, Zhou Beichuan. Facing various schemes, she fought against scoundrels, built her career, and lived a brilliant life in the 1970s thanks to her medical skills. From misunderstanding to understanding, she and Zhou Beichuan eventually transformed a chance encounter into a deep and unwavering love. She rose against all odds and found her own hardcore love.
玄门真千金：宠夫改运双丰收 | "The True Daughter of the Mystic Sect: Spoiling Her Husband and Changing Her Luck"

Li Bai Yan (Li Bo Yan), Jin Ya NaSu Xiaoluo was lost at the age of three and adopted by a Taoist temple. At eighteen, she descended the mountain to reclaim her family's lost fortune and avoid a fatal calamity. She established herself in the Su family using her metaphysical abilities, but a misunderstanding led to a feud with Fu Shaoting. Su Wan, consumed by jealousy, colluded with an evil cultivator to repeatedly sabotage her family and even used a mind-controlling curse to manipulate Su's grandfather. As Su Xiaoluo and Fu Shaoting worked together to solve a school injustice and investigate ancestral graves, they gradually overcame their differences and developed feelings for each other. Ultimately, the two joined forces to expose the mastermind, resolve the family crisis, Su Wan reaped the consequences of her actions, Su Xiaoluo and Fu Shaoting became a couple, and the Su family returned to prosperity.
狰宠 | "A Fierce Pet"

Wang Chen Zhao, Sun Qian XunShen Qingwu is the leader of the Youth Federation, the fearsome "Fifth Master," yet no one knows she's a woman because she never shows her face. Only Shen Qingwu herself knows that she is cursed and will not live long, requiring a man with a special birth chart to sacrifice himself to break the curse. She searches all of Shanghai but cannot find one, finally focusing on Li Zheng, the unregistered adopted son of the Li family. To break the curse, she becomes entangled with Li Zheng, who becomes the Fifth Master's sacrifice. Initially adversaries, they gradually develop mutual admiration and love. In this process, they work together, defeat villains, break deadly situations, and uphold justice.
东北姐妹花穿书撒欢带飞全场 | "Northeastern Sisters Transmigrate into a Book and Spread Their Joy"

Tong Jia Hao, Cui Shi Yi, Liu Yi Xuan, Lv Yun FengJiang Lanyue and her best friend Su Tang accidentally transmigrate into a script together—one becomes the scapegoat heroine, and the other becomes the villainous supporting character. The system requires them to follow the plot, but the two completely reverse their choices. Jiang Lanyue refuses to be the "scapegoat," and after experiencing an ambush, she directly negotiates with the system, demanding that the characters act according to their own personalities and guaranteeing no mistakes. The system agrees, but to complete the task assigned by the system, which requires uncovering the truth of what happened back then, Jiang Lanyue once again makes a different choice.
未央＆冰封五十年她从棺中醒来 | "Wei Yang & Fifty Years of Ice Seal: She Awakens from Her Coffin"

Sun Jia Jun, Chen Shu YiAt his funeral, the aging Lin Che unexpectedly encounters Shen Qiu, the immortal cultivator who perished for love fifty years ago. Her appearance remains unchanged, while he is now frail and aged. Years ago, she sacrificed a thousand years of cultivation for him, only to be betrayed and die a tragic death, punished by being frozen by her sect. Now awakened, she subtly disciplines the Lin family members who covet her inheritance. When her sworn enemies, Xue Jingyao and his wife, suddenly appear at the funeral hall, Shen Qiu's half-century-long pent-up hatred erupts—her portrait in the funeral hall abruptly changes to that of her enemy, thunder roars, and a karmic retribution spanning fifty years finally arrives.
我在乡下挺好的 | "I'm Doing Fine in the Countryside"

Li Bo Yi, Liu Jun Yang (Liu Mei Qi)After being expelled from the Marquis's mansion, the fake heiress Lin Wan'er was forced to return to Taoyuan Village, a remote village where her biological parents lived. She expected a life of hardship, but instead found her mother picking her up in an electric tricycle, her father electrolyzing silver at home, and the house fully equipped with a refrigerator, television, and glassware—even harboring a gold mine, completely overturning her expectations. Her parents' arranged marriage partner, Li Tiedan, seemingly an ordinary country youth, was actually the reclusive master of Langya Pavilion. The two reunited and gradually developed feelings for each other. Meanwhile, Lin Yueru, the true heiress of the Marquis's mansion who had humiliated her, and Yuwen Duan, the heir of the Duan Prince's mansion, were ordered to visit the master of Langya Pavilion.
状元为母雪沉冤 | "The Top Scholar Clears His Mother's Name"

Zhao Zi Qi, Yu Yi LeiShen Qingning, a daughter of a military family, married Pei Wenxuan and devoted herself to managing the household. However, she was framed for adultery and was unjustly drowned by her husband, her spirit remaining trapped in the Pei mansion. She watched helplessly as her son, Pei Yuan, was subjected to all sorts of abuse by Pei Wenxuan, Liu Rumei, and others. Despite his suffering, Pei Yuan secretly pursued his studies, achieving the highest rank in the imperial examination at the age of eighteen. He rose through the ranks of the court through his intelligence, enduring years of hardship for revenge. He gathered evidence, exposing Liu Rumei's crime of murder, and revealing the truth behind Pei Wenxuan's evil deeds. Ultimately, he brought the murderers who framed his mother to justice. Guided by his mother's spirit, he emerged from the shadow of hatred, married, had children, and fulfilled Shen Qingning's expectations of him.
棠梨映雪迟 | "Pear Blossoms Reflecting the Snow"

Guo Zhi Ming, Yu Jin JinShen Xiaotang, dubbed the "fool," remained a widow for over a year before discovering that her childhood sweetheart, Cheng Yi, was actually alive. He had impersonated her brother-in-law to escape her "foolhood" and be with his gentle and talented sister-in-law. Shen Xiaotang had become "foolish" for Cheng Yi, but she refused to be taken advantage of or become a burden. Adhering to the simple principle of "if you don't want me, I'll leave," she agreed to remarry Zhao Huaijin, whom her father claimed had loved her for many years.

Wang Ding, Su Rui YingJiang Miao, a master of metaphysics, transmigrates into the body of a fake heiress in a marquis's mansion. Despised and driven out by her entire family, she remains unaware that the mansion's malevolent energy is entirely due to her suppression of it. The real heiress, Jiang Jinhua, returns with evil magic, stealing fortune and causing deaths. Jiang Miao sets up a fortune-telling stall to defy fate, befriending Prince Mo Beishu and the young heir Chi Ge. From suspicion to trust, the two join forces to solve the mysteries of the royal mansion and expose the imperial advisor's conspiracy.
将军辞 | "The General's Farewell"

Li Jun Yang, Wang Qiao (RAW)Jiang Li, the commander of the Xuanjia Army, is actually the sixteenth generation Wolong Master of Wolong Mountain, and is betrothed to Emperor Xia Feng. She rescued Xia Feng's beloved Wanwan during her campaign in the northern deserts, but was disfigured in the process. Xia Feng, wary of her achievements, seized the Tiger Seal, bestowed a mask upon her, made Wanwan his empress, and forced her to either marry a foreign ruler or relinquish her armor. The Prince of Qin provided medicine to help Jiang Li heal her wounds, and she had already obtained a letter of annulment from the Empress Dowager. On their wedding day, her general Xiao Feiyun rebelled in her place, and Xia Feng learned that Jiang Li had already left. With the northern deserts invading, he had no generals to command. Xia Feng went to Wolong Mountain to seek help from the Wolong Master, only to discover that he was Jiang Li.

Wang Kai Mu, Jin ZiAfter breaking up with her scumbag boyfriend, Jingyan first meets her landlord, Qiao Heng, who is a low-key landlady. As they get to know each other better, their feelings for each other quickly intensify without them realizing it. Forced to go on a blind date to reassure her mother, Jingyan is surprised to find that her date is none other than her dream man, Qiao Heng. They enter into a marriage of convenience that blossoms into love, and their blissful life begins anew.
穿书后，我和反派HE了 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Had a Happy Ending with the Villain"

Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), He Ling YaoIn an unexpected turn of events, Jiang Qia finds herself transmigrated into the body of a scheming, scheming female supporting character in an entertainment novel. Aside from her beauty, she possesses no intelligence. In the original story, she ruthlessly seduces the male lead, Huo Xiulin, constantly feigning pitifulness to bully the female lead. However, she reaps the consequences, unexpectedly ending up with the novel's mad villain, Huo Wenyi. She is forced to marry the antagonist.
闺蜜说大哥凶，可他非要叫我宝宝 | "My Best Friend Said My Big Brother Was Fierce, But He Insisted on Calling Me Baby"

Cao Hao Tian (Cao Tian Rui), Shu Qin'erAfter breaking up with her scumbag boyfriend, Song Xi seeks refuge with her best friend Zhang Hening. However, while drunk, she mistakes someone else for Jing Zhuo and has a one-night stand with him, leading to a whirlwind marriage. Only after the marriage does she discover that her "cheap husband" is actually the "fierce" older brother Jing Zhuo (Zhang Hening) that her best friend described. The two teeter on the edge of concealing their identities and risking being exposed, experiencing misunderstandings, jealousy, cohabitation, and a deepening of their feelings, ultimately uncovering the truth and finding happiness together.*This story again... How many are we going to have? Isn't this already the 13th or something?
谁动了我的女主光环 | "Who Moved My Heroine Halo?"

Qian Zhe, Wang Yi Yang (RAW)I was once a pampered, privileged girl, but I transmigrated into a comic book as a villain despised by everyone. My best friend took my place, becoming the sole female protagonist in this world. On my wedding day, she smiled as she put shackles on me—her final trap, a trap she had set for me. Until my dying moments, the second male lead, who should have been hers, stood in my way. "Want to live? Then tear her script apart with me."
晏总，说好的不近女色呢 | "President Yan, What Happened to Your Promise to Be Aloof from Women?"

Xu Yang Hao, Xu Zi ShanSu Ruan, a "black lotus" abandoned by both her biological and adoptive families, is determined to use Yan Tingnan, the most unattainable man in the capital, as a stepping stone to her ascent. She meticulously plans her moves over four years, gradually closing the distance. Unexpectedly, when feigned affection meets genuine love, and manipulation blossoms into romance, this seemingly unequal contest transforms into a mutual redemption. In the end, she becomes queen, and he willingly becomes her devoted subject.
错位重逢 | "A Mistaken Reunion"

Zheng Yi Hong, Lu Meng Lin, Dai Yun FeiFour years ago, a car accident caused Jin Sheng to miss his wedding appointment with Xu Muqing, and they lost contact after that. Four years later, Xu Muqing used a false identity to enter the Jin family in order to help Jin Xi save her seriously ill grandmother. The old love was reunited, and Xu Muqing began to pursue Jin Sheng passionately. Unaware of Xu Muqing's true identity, Jin Sheng adhered to his bottom line, but he couldn't help but fall in love. Amidst the tug-of-war between love and hate, will Xu Muqing be able to keep her secret identity and finally become a couple with Jin Sheng?

🌈 诱他失控 | "Seducing Him Out of Control"Jin Ye, a urologist, is always rational and calm, but for the first time, he loses control in his clinic. His patient is Xia Junfeng, a professional race car driver who appears successful on the surface but suffers from erectile dysfunction in private. One glance between them confirms one thing for Jin Ye—this is the man he wants. Under the guise of "treatment," Jin Ye gradually approaches Xia Junfeng, their relationship slowly crossing the line from doctor to patient, becoming an indispensable part of his life. From accompanying him after training to listening during his low points, even subtly clearing obstacles in his romantic life, every step is precise yet dangerous. Xia Junfeng knows he shouldn't rely on him, yet he falls deeper and deeper, until one day he realizes he's no longer just a patient. As the truth gradually emerges, will this relationship, which began in the clinic, be healing, or another, deeper form of depravity?
抢来的夫人超会撩 | "The Stolen Wife Is Super Flirty"

Song Zhe Lun, Yu XinIn her past life, Tang Di misplaced her true feelings, pouring her heart and soul into her husband, Yang Yuan, only to be tragically murdered by the entire Yang family, dying with resentment. Before her death, she learned that Lu Jinghuai, whom she had considered a complete stranger, had actually annihilated the wicked Yang family for her sake, and, heartbroken by the loss of his beloved, resolutely followed her in death. Reborn, Tang Di encounters Lu Jinghuai again at Yang Yuan's staged funeral. This time, she doesn't hesitate; she resolutely chooses to take his hand and depart with him.
挚吻成瘾 | "Addicted to Passionate Kissing"

Yang Chen, Lu Tian WeiA pure and innocent girl x a cold and aloof young man, a charming older man. Because of 200,000 yuan, Lin Rong is forced to marry Huo Lanzhou. He, with his tall and imposing figure, coldly declares he will never touch her. But then, they bump into each other at a nightclub, and he, jealous, forcefully drinks her wine. Lin Rong tells him to watch his words and actions. He reluctantly replies, "What, afraid people will know you've been married before?" Lin Rong is stunned. Didn't the older man say he'd divorce her in a month? What's he up to now?
我有一家通灵超市 | "I Own a Supermarket with Psychic Powers"

Wu Bo Yan, Zhang Ming WenPsychic Cen Luoling runs a supermarket that serves the underworld, specializing in helping the wronged souls of the dead. She teams up with Fu Ling, the King of the Underworld disguised as an intern, and Zhuang Yumian, a new employee, to form a "psychic team." First, they uncover the truth behind the death of college student Song Shiwei, confronting school bullying and a hypocritical mentor. Then, the mysterious death of popular star Zhuang Yumian leads them to discover a conspiracy between her manager and her mother. In addition, they handle the obsession of Sun Yanan, a mother who was trafficked, and the revenge case of high school student Su Ye'er. Through each case, the team confronts the darkness of humanity, experiences heartwarming growth, and together safeguards the balance and justice between the mortal and spiritual realms.
认主月光 | "Recognizing My Master's Moonlight"

Ye Yi, Wang Yu Qiu, Wu Mu Cheng (RAW)Dai Baozhu, the eldest daughter of the Dai family, foresaw her family's downfall through a system, witnessing her adopted son Dai Yanshu usurp power, be imprisoned by the villainous Shen Zhaoye, and ultimately die tragically. Upon awakening, she discovered the "God's-eye view" of the premonitions in the "bullet comments." To rewrite her fate, she resolved to reclaim control. Shen Zhaoye, whom she had saved as a child and promised to give her a family, who ultimately became a villain, became her most desired "exclusive puppy."
换嫁后，我和傻总裁横扫商界 | "After Being Swapped for a Bride, I and the Silly CEO Sweeped Through the Business World"

Dong Xiao Bai, Lin Ya DongReborn, Lin Qinghe refuses to marry her scumbag ex-fiancé and instead marries Gu Ciyan, the rumored president of the Gu Group who was supposedly mentally impaired due to a car accident. After marriage, she deals with the difficulties posed by her cousin Lin Mian and her ex-fiancé Lu Jingzhi, while also guarding against the power grab plot of Gu's second aunt, Liu Mei, and her son, protecting the Gu family's assets. As they spend time together, she discovers that Gu Ciyan is not truly mentally impaired. The two work together seamlessly to uncover the truth behind the car accident, thwart business traps, and overcome a crisis in the business world. In the end, all the villains are brought to justice, the Gu Group remains at the top of the industry, and Lin Qinghe and Gu Ciyan begin a happy life together.
穿书后，我绑定了强迫症老公 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Was Bound to an Obsessive-Compulsive Husband"

Lin Yu Xi, Tang Zhi FeiLin Sheng, a short video blogger, unexpectedly transmigrates into a book, becoming the cannon fodder ex-wife of wealthy CEO Ji Huaizhi during his divorce cooling-off period. She's also bound to a system that will eliminate her if she doesn't successfully "win over" him within 30 days. Ji Huaizhi has obsessive-compulsive personality disorder, only trusts data, and lacks empathy. To save her life, Lin Sheng uses her passion to break his rigid plans. During their time together, she discovers his personality stems from trauma in his family of origin, shifting her focus from "winning over" to "compassion and healing." Ji Huaizhi, in turn, breaks all the rules for her. Through mutual redemption, they ultimately complete the system's mission and stay together.
揣双胎带灵泉资本小姐闯大院 | "Pregnant with Twins and Bringing a Spiritual Spring, the Capitalist Miss Storms the Compound"

Yang Huan, He Yi TingWen Yuying is reborn on a pivotal night in her life. After a moment of realization, she severs her ties to the past and resolves to win back her husband, whom she has hurt. With the awakened spiritual spring space, she gains the confidence to change everything. In her new life, she uses wisdom and sincerity to navigate conflict and help her neighbors. When her husband is critically wounded during a mission and his life hangs in the balance, she bravely rushes to his aid, turning the tide in ways unimaginable to most. This is a story of awakening, protection, and triumph; watch her make amends, protect her loved ones, and live a fulfilling life.
睁眼八零，生了个三岁娃娃 | "Opening My Eyes in the 80s, I Gave Birth to a Three-Year-Old"

Wei Ren Yue, Li Qing'erIn the 1980s, Hu Yao was framed and suffered mental impairment for several years. When she opened her eyes again, she found herself married to Jiang Han, a notorious village bully with a bad reputation. Rumors circulated that Jiang Han had been to prison and had beaten people, making him feared by everyone. Not only that, but the two also had a son. Initially, Hu Yao was afraid of Jiang Han, but as they spent more time together, she gradually discovered that Jiang Han was cold on the outside but warm on the inside. Although he was often fierce, he treated her extremely well. The two gradually realized their feelings for each other and slowly came together.
陛下今日又孕吐了 | "His Majesty's Morning Sickness Again Today"

Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Peng YaoEmpress Ling Qingge of Dayu is forced into the palace, her only thought being to escape and save her mother; Emperor Xiao Yi, who avoids the harem, suddenly suffers from severe morning sickness. The imperial physician diagnoses that the Empress is pregnant, and the Emperor is experiencing morning sickness! On the surface, they are enemies, but secretly they spy on each other. One chases after the other with a sword, the other plots against him with drugs, yet amidst the chaos, feelings blossom. When intrigue and genuine affection intertwine, they must join forces, bickering while protecting their unborn child. Witness the Emperor and Empress's transformation, uncovering misunderstandings amidst hilarious pregnancy-related events, showering each other with sweet affection, and ultimately offering the throne as a dowry to pledge their lives to one another.
开局虐渣，特工世子妃来自现代 | "Starting by Abusing Scum, the Special Agent Princess Comes from Modern Times"

Wang Chen Zhao, Zheng Qian YiSong Yue unexpectedly transmigrated, becoming the legitimate daughter of a general's family, who had been mentally impaired for three years. She was poisoned by her stepmother and stepsister, turning her into a madwoman subject to beatings and abuse. Her stepmother seized the family fortune, and her stepsister took her place, becoming the glamorous eldest daughter of the general's mansion. When the imposter married in her name, Song Yue returned, sword in hand, braving the flames. With her left hand, she used silver needles to heal; with her right, she used poison to destroy hearts, slapping faces and exacting revenge on the scum. Their first meeting outside the capital saw the fearsome Prince Jing lift her veil with the tip of his sword. A madwoman and a king of hell—a perfect match indeed.
入君怀 | "Entering the Emperor's Arms"

Jin Wang, Wang Mo Han (RAW)Shen Ruoxi is reborn, determined to rewrite her tragic fate from her previous life. She decisively divorces her scumbag husband, tears apart the hypocritical villains, and actively approaches the deeply affectionate and reserved Prince Ling, Murong Heng. Together, they fight against villains and enemies, proceeding cautiously and strategically, from testing each other to finally giving their hearts to one another. Facing deadly poison, conspiracies, and external enemies, they become each other's armor, facing life and death together. Ultimately, amidst power struggles and deep affection, they forge a lifelong bond, sharing their kingdom and the rest of their lives.
我成全小将军娶表姐后，他后悔了 | "After I Helped the Young General Marry My Cousin, He Regretted It"

Sun Wen Bo, Shao Yi RuiWen Linlang, the eldest daughter of the Wen family, a family of ten generations of virtuous ancestors, was originally destined to marry General Han Linfeng to avert disaster for him. However, she was betrayed by her cousin Wen Shurou and a maid, and was forced to marry in her place. Reborn, she saw through the Wen family's favoritism and Han Linfeng's coldness, and decided to leave the Wen family to become engaged to Gu Chenbei, the heir of the Prince of Huai. After their marriage, Gu Chenbei treated her sincerely, dismissing his concubines. As expected, Han Linfeng fell seriously ill, and Wen Shurou's wicked scheme was exposed. The truth about her affair and the fact that her unborn child was not of Han family blood was revealed, leading to her murder. The Wen family attempted to implicate Wen Linlang, but she proved her innocence with a letter of severance, and the Wen couple were exiled.
退婚当天，摄政王连夜求入赘 | "On the Day the Engagement Was Annulled, the Regent King Begged to Marry In Overnight"

Tian Yang, Yu ChengXie Zhiyun and Gu Tingyuan were childhood sweethearts, but Gu Tingyuan's heart changed after the appearance of the time-traveling Lin Chaochao. In her previous life, Xie Zhiyun refused to give up her feelings for Gu Tingyuan and publicly exposed Lin Chaochao's habit of dressing as a man and frequenting brothels, as well as her premarital pregnancy. Unable to bear the humiliation, Lin Chaochao left, was kicked out of her family, and chose to commit suicide by jumping into a river. Gu Tingyuan shifted the blame onto Xie Zhiyun and imprisoned her in a cage, torturing her daily after their marriage. Returning to her wedding day, in this life, she chooses to dissolve her engagement with Gu Tingyuan. Xie Zhiyun hires Xiao Yan, disguised as a beggar, as her bodyguard. Under Xiao Yan's protection, she gradually moves towards a better life.

Wang Kai Mu, Jin Zi[HERE]2. 穿书后，我和反派HE了 - Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), He Ling Yao[HERE]3. 闺蜜说大哥凶，可他非要叫我宝宝 - Cao Hao Tian (Cao Tian Rui), Shu Qin'er[HERE]4. 谁动了我的女主光环 - Qian Zhe, Wang Yi Yang[HERE]5. 晏总，说好的不近女色呢 - Xu Yang Hao, Xu Zi Shan[HERE]6. 错位重逢 - Zheng Yi Hong, Lu Meng Lin, Dai Yun Fei[HERE]7. 🌈 诱他失控[HERE]8. 抢来的夫人超会撩 - Song Zhe Lun, Yu Xin[HERE]9. 挚吻成瘾 - Yang Chen, Lu Tian Wei[HERE]10. 我有一家通灵超市 - Wu Bo Yan, Zhang Ming Wen[HERE]11. 认主月光 - Ye Yi, Wang Yu Qiu, Wu Mu Cheng[HERE]12. 换嫁后，我和傻总裁横扫商界 - Dong Xiao Bai, Lin Ya Dong[HERE]13. 穿书后，我绑定了强迫症老公 - Lin Yu Xi, Tang Zhi Fei[HERE]14. 揣双胎带灵泉资本小姐闯大院 - Yang Huan, He Yi Ting[HERE]15. 睁眼八零，生了个三岁娃娃 - Wei Ren Yue, Li Qing'er[HERE]16. 陛下今日又孕吐了 - Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, Peng Yao[HERE]17. 开局虐渣，特工世子妃来自现代 - Wang Chen Zhao, Zheng Qian Yi[HERE]18. 入君怀 - Jin Wang, Wang Mo Han[HERE]19. 我成全小将军娶表姐后，他后悔了 - Sun Wen Bo, Shao Yi Rui[HERE]20. 退婚当天，摄政王连夜求入赘 - Tian Yang, Yu Cheng[HERE]
老祖的老公竟是小娇夫 | "The Ancestor's Husband is Actually a Young Darling"

Wu Yu Hang, Zhang ShanAlthough unwilling, Qiao Sijing was still going to marry the originally weak and incompetent eldest daughter of the Song family. Little did he know that the eldest daughter had already passed away, and the one who had returned was Song Yan, the Song family's ancestor who had cultivated for a thousand years. She had descended the mountain this time only to undergo tribulation and repay a debt of love, and the debtor was none other than the eldest daughter's fiancé—Qiao Sijing.
惹心 | "Temptation"

Chen Tian Xiang, A ShangSu Jinyu, betrayed by her husband Xu Mingli, is sent to the fox den to be sacrificed to a thousand-year-old mountain fox. In her moment of crisis, a frail scholar carries her away; it turns out this scholar is actually the mountain fox master, Xuan Ye! Xuan Ye discovers that her pure soul can heal the wounds inflicted by lightning, and Su Jinyu seizes the opportunity to propose a deal: in exchange for sex, she will exchange it for Xuan Ye's help in her revenge. During their quest for revenge, Xuan Ye discovers that Su Jinyu's birthmark is identical to that of Bai Li, the lover he has been searching for for a hundred years. With all the truths revealed, what will become of their entangled love and hate?
想了你七年＆枕上独宠 | "Thinking of You for Seven Years & Exclusive Pampering on the Pillow"

Zhang Bei Xi, Jiang Xin YanWhen Luo Yan left Cheng Jing to go abroad, she never imagined that seven years later, Cheng Jing would appear before her as an interviewee, then slam the door and leave. Ordered by her boss to go and apologize, Luo Yan thought this must be his revenge. But when she pushed open that door, she was greeted by Cheng Jing's passionate confession, and Luo Yan couldn't help but fall for him. No one would know how much he had missed her over the past seven years.
隱密的ID之天價打賞 | "The Hidden ID: A Sky-High Reward"

Shu Tong, Liu QingThe plot revolves around the rivalry between Li Rongwei, captain of the Economic Crime Investigation Division in Jiangcheng City, and Gao Tianyu, a high-IQ crime boss. Starting with a counterfeit currency case, the police investigation unfolds like toppling the first domino, gradually revealing a complex and multi-faceted criminal network behind a seemingly legitimate business. Viewers are guided through the investigation by the economic crime investigators, experiencing firsthand the crucial importance of safeguarding economic security.
苦瓜少爷别哭了，刁蛮孕妻悔过了 | "Don't Cry, Young Master Bitter Gourd, Your Spoiled Pregnant Wife Has Repented"

Liu Yi Long, Zhang Zi HanAfter awakening, Shen Kui discovers she's a cannon fodder female supporting character in a novel, abusing her autistic husband and ultimately meeting a tragic end. She immediately reforms, deciding to treat her family well and run away with the money after giving birth. Unexpectedly, her in-laws offer her their assets, her rebellious brother-in-law fawns over her, and her silent, autistic husband begs her to hit him with a belt. Shen Kui is even more terrified and leaves behind divorce papers, fleeing overnight. A few days later, the now-darkened man sits on the railing of her rented apartment, holding his child, his eyes stubbornly fixed on her: "If you don't want us, we'll jump. Hit me once, and I'll be yours for life."
愿我如你，铮铮不折 | "May I Be Like You, Unyielding and Unbreakable"

Ma Shuo Qi, He Tian TianAfter Fu Zhaozhao, the true daughter of the Fu family, is found, she is barred from the family for seven years due to her brother Fu Yanchuan's favoritism towards the fake daughter, Song Wan'er. All her auspicious divination results are secretly changed to inauspicious ones. Upon learning the truth, Fu Zhaozhao awakens to the truth and resolutely proposes severing ties with her family, but Fu Yanchuan strongly opposes this and continues to frame her with Song Wan'er. Fortunately, her childhood sweetheart, Pei Zheng, the son of Chief Zhao, appears in time to support and protect her. Together, they expose the truth about Song Wan'er and her mother's deliberate abduction and usurpation of their family home. Under Pei Zheng's protection, Fu Zhaozhao completes her self-growth, finally breaking free from the Fu family's constraints and starting a new life.
闪婚捡了个老狐狸 | "A Flash Marriage and Picking Up an Old Fox"

Qiao Jia Le, Lei Fu ManThe story revolves around Lu Xi, a seemingly fragile yet resilient woman who, to escape the long-term harassment of her brother-in-law Che Nan, unexpectedly marries Fu Nanzhou, a wealthy CEO, during a blind date. Initially believing it to be a mutually beneficial transaction, Lu Xi discovers that Fu Nanzhou is actually her boss, and that she was chosen because of her striking resemblance to his first love. After the marriage, Fu Nanzhou's quiet support in both life and work gradually melts Lu Xi's defenses, and the two develop feelings for each other as they spend more time together. Meanwhile, Lu Xi also helps her sister Lu Yao see through her scumbag husband and escape her unhappy marriage. Ultimately, Lu Xi overcomes her inner conflict, opens up to Fu Nanzhou, and finds true happiness.
等等，我好像才是大魔王 | "Wait, I Seem to Be the Great Demon King"

Chen Yun Ting, Cheng An Zi, Xie Xiao YuLin Moyao unexpectedly transmigrates into a cultivation world as a "furnace disciple," immediately becoming a target of pursuit. In a moment of crisis, she activates the "Demon King System," gaining various bizarre skills, only to gradually discover that she is actually the sealed Demon King herself (Yu Yao). In the Floating Jade Palace, she navigates between the aloof master Mo Ran and the wicked Demon King Xing Yuan, concealing her identity while searching for a way back to reality. As her memories awaken, she must confront the conflict between immortals and demons, the entanglement of love and hate, and choose her own path anew.
何不怜我金丝雀 | "Why Not Pity My Canary"

Zhang Yi Lun, Shi Yue YueOnce a wealthy heiress, Lin Shuyan, after her family's destruction, transforms into a weeping dancer, seeking revenge by getting close to Pei Shen, the young marshal and son of her enemy. She is auctioned off and eventually bought by Pei Shen. He sees her as a substitute for his former lover, unaware that she is actually his "deceased" fiancée. She feigns compliance, becoming his concubine while secretly investigating, only to discover that her former lover, "A Zhao," may not be dead, and could even be the true culprit behind the massacre. As the conspiracy unfolds, she uses her emotions as a weapon, meticulously plotting her revenge, ultimately making all those who wronged her pay with their blood, and forcing those in power to kneel and beg for mercy.
烬芳华 | "Ember of Youth"

Yu Lun Hao, Zhou Luo YiFifteen years ago, Su Jiangyue's family suffered a sudden upheaval. Fifteen years later, she returns to the stage as Xi Jiangyue. There, she encounters Bai Zhanlou, the young man who protected her in her youth and now the master of Huayin Tower. Together, they turn the tide and clear their names. In their collaboration, they also become entangled in a complex web of love and hate. When the grudges are burned away in the flames, she finally understands: true beauty lies not in avenging one's enemies, but in letting go of the shackles of hatred and finding one's own rebirth in the ashes. The moon shines in the ashes, burning away the past, finally bringing clarity and peace.
大小姐驾到，通通闪开 | "The Young Lady Has Arrived, Everyone Get Out of the Way"

Wen Yu, Liu YingWen Qianling, nicknamed "Night Goddess," returns to China in disguise. To fight against her father, Lu Zhenhua, rescue her grandfather, and reclaim the Wen family business, she teams up with Shen Xiuning, who is disguised as a playboy, after initial testing. Unexpectedly, her childhood friend, Su Ziyan, turns out to be the mastermind behind the traitors. The two join forces and ultimately punish the villains, reclaim their family business, and gain love and trust.
宗族想吃绝户，嫡女单开百年族谱 | "The Clan Wants to Eat the Extinct Lineage, the Eldest Daughter Creates a Century-Old Family Tree"

Zhong Zheng, Lin Qiu NaiReborn orphan Shi Juntang is poisoned on her wedding night, her soul drifting to a mass grave only to realize she's taken revenge on the wrong person. Reincarnated two years earlier, she tears off her hypocritical aunt's mask, sells the scheming man who plotted against her siblings into a brothel, and gradually uncovers the true culprit who killed her parents. Her "cousin," Shi Mingcheng, who always protected her, suddenly reveals himself to be the renowned strategist Zhang Xun. "Marry me, and everything I have will be yours." Shi Juntang sneers, "No need. I'll fight for the clan leader position myself." In this life, she won't be a pawn, but a player, determined to write her own century-long family genealogy.
九叔此生不复见 | "Ninth Uncle Will Never Be Seen Again"

Zhang Yi Yang, Bai Xue RuMurong Wan, who was wrongly accused and killed by her lover Pei Ling in her past life, is reborn before the tragedy occurred. To change her fate, she resolutely chooses to marry into the Northern Region, severing her ties with the Ninth Prince Pei Ling. However, Ling Chuchu's repeated schemes and Pei Ling's obsessive entanglement make her journey on her new marriage fraught with danger. Fortunately, she is always protected by the Crown Prince of the Northern Region, Nangong Yi, and the two join hands to uncover conspiracies and punish evildoers. In the end, Murong Wan lets go of her past and goes to the Northern Region with Nangong Yi to begin a new life, never to see Pei Ling again in this life.
别港春潮 | "Spring Tide at Farewell Harbor"

Li Si Yuan, Gao Yu ChenAt an interview, Wen Jinye, in her most vulnerable moment, unexpectedly encounters her ex-boyfriend of six months, Fu Yanjing, a Hong Kong entertainment tycoon. Fu Yanjing, however, ignores Wen Jinye like a stranger, standing beside a newcomer, actress He Jiayu. Wen Jinye becomes even more convinced that her three years with Fu Yanjing were a joke. Intending to distance herself, Wen Jinye repeatedly runs into Fu Yanjing through work, and he repeatedly mocks and misunderstands her, accusing her of using her looks to climb the social ladder. Wen Jinye finally decides to let go of Fu Yanjing completely. Fu Yanjing initially believes he's only resentful of Wen Jinye's departure years ago, but through repeated tests after their reunions, he realizes his own feelings for her.
校草心声太甜，我藏不住心动 | "The School Heartthrob's Heartfelt Words Are Too Sweet, I Can't Hide My Heart's Flutter"

Chen Yi Min, Gao Lin LinYun Xiang was called to greet Pei Xingche, the school heartthrob who had just transferred to her department. He was said to be aloof and unapproachable. Yun Xiang prepared herself mentally for the occasion, but unexpectedly discovered a dog suddenly appearing on his head. From that moment on, she could hear his inner thoughts. Through these thoughts, Yun Xiang was shocked to learn that Pei Xingche had deliberately transferred departments to pursue her. Because of her inherent inferiority complex, Yun Xiang was hesitant to trust the school heartthrob's advances and rejected his request to add her on WeChat. Pei Xingche didn't force her, but instead began his daily pursuit, such as deliberately showing off his abs on the basketball court and silently escorting Yun Xiang home at night.
爱落归途 | "Love Falls on the Way Home"

Lin Yong Ju, Zhang Xin YiThe wedding of Cheng Zhi, the daughter of the Cheng family, and Gu Chengye, the heir to the Gu family, was abruptly halted by the intrusion of Gu Chengye's illegitimate daughter, Gu Panpan. Six years of deception exposed, Cheng Zhi resolutely breaks with the past, vowing to make the betrayer pay with the power of the Cheng family. On her path of revenge, she encounters Lu Shihan, a wealthy heir in Beijing's elite circles, and their initial entanglement blossoms into a deep and lasting love. Facing Gu Chengye's persistent advances, Shen Youning's relentless revenge, and a family crisis, Cheng Zhi joins hands with Lu Shihan to overcome numerous obstacles, ultimately letting go of past hatred and finding true love and a fulfilling family life after enduring life-or-death trials.
女王从顶流做起 | "The Queen Starts from the Top"

Wu Si Teng, Cha Yi ChenAncient female general Nan Xiangwan transmigrates to the modern era and unexpectedly becomes bound to a top-tier system. If she fails to complete her debut mission, she will be punished with electric shocks. Forced to participate in the talent show "Debut, Trainee!", she becomes an overnight sensation with her contrasting performances, such as breaking bricks with her bare hands and performing martial arts sword dances. However, she faces repeated harassment from villains like Xi Baiwei and Yu Jingting. During this time, she unexpectedly encounters Gu Beihuai, a kingpin in the entertainment industry, and their relationship gradually warms up. She also discovers that she is the heiress of Huawan Entertainment. With the system's rewards and her own hard work, Nan Xiangwan rises through the ranks, gaining a large following as she faces unknown challenges through her journey to the top.
声动八十年代 | "The Sound of the 1980s"

Li Yong Zhen, Cao Wen JingA washed-up pop diva, Su Yin, unexpectedly travels back to 1981, becoming a poor, dark-skinned rural woman burdened with debts to her nominal husband, Huo Qing. In this unfamiliar era, armed with a worn-out erhu, she rises from the whispers of the neighborhood to astound everyone with her modern musical ideas. Facing the machinations of a scheming woman and industry suppression, she sells cassettes, holds autograph sessions, and organizes concerts, forging her own path to success. Meanwhile, her initially indifferent husband gradually falls for her during this triumphant journey. Su Yin proves with her talent that gold shines in any era, and that true love and dreams are never absent.
震惊！废物前妻竟是全能King | "Shocking! The Useless Ex-Wife Is Actually an All-Round King"

Huang Bo, Zhang Xin Yue (RAW)The abstinent Ninth Master breaks his vows for her! Shen Jingnian, who has lived for thirty years, has never believed in love or marriage, but his heart is thrown into turmoil when he meets Jiang Ning. She is a reborn genius abandoned wife, who rises to prominence with top-tier skills in programming, traditional Chinese medicine, and martial arts. A single acupuncture needle heals his hidden ailment and also pierces his heart. He breaks his principles for her, protecting her as he tears apart the Cheng family and wins the Sky Award. At the awards ceremony, the icy CEO confesses his love in public: "For you, what does my obsession with not getting married matter?"
霍先生的在线追妻日记 | "Mr. Huo's Online Diary of Pursuing His Wife"

Wu Shuai Kang, Peng Hui Ling (RAW)A drugging incident at a nightclub leads to a entanglement between delivery worker Lin Nan and Huo Xun, the president of the Huo Group. Lin Nan loses her jade pendant and becomes pregnant with twins. Her younger sister, Lin Xiaotang, impersonates her and steals the baby girl, Huo Nianxi. Four years later, Lin Nan, seeking help for her son Lin Nian'an who suffers from heart disease, applies for a job as a nanny for the Huo family and reunites with Huo Xun. The jade pendant and clues about their bloodline reveal the truth, Lin Xiaotang is punished, and the family of four is finally reunited.

谢邀，人在长安搞事业 | "Thanks for the Invitation, I'm Building a Career in Chang'an"

Zhu Mo Yan, Yang Mie Mie, Duan Xiao WeiThree modern women—Duan Xiaotang, a retired special forces soldier and programmer; Zhu Mingyue, a business president; and Lin Wanwan, a medical student—unexpectedly travel to the ancient dynasty "Da Wu" in a parallel universe. The three bravely venture into Chang'an, determined to break free from the shackles of their time, join forces to build a business, and change their own destiny and that of women of their era. Skillfully utilizing their modern intelligence, they fearlessly confront powerful figures and outwit tyrants, ultimately establishing themselves in Chang'an and carving out their own niche.
你好，祁先生 | "Hello, Mr. Qi"

Huang Hao Wen, Guan XinYu Li, a news anchor at Blue Sky TV, gets drunk while celebrating her best friend Qi Xi's family reunion and has an unexpected one-night stand with Qi Chenyan, the chief spokesperson of MU International Group, resulting in a pregnancy. The career-driven Yu Li initially tries to keep it a secret, but Qi Chenyan confronts her, demanding she take responsibility. The two then have a whirlwind marriage, beginning their secret life together. After marriage, Yu Li faces workplace challenges from the fake heiress Qi Jianyue, while Qi Chenyan quietly protects her, not only publicly supporting her celebrity interview program but also standing up for her when she faces crises. Meanwhile, Yu Li stands by her best friend Qi Xi, battling against Qi Jianyue and her backers. With the birth of their child, their contractual marriage gradually blossoms into genuine love, ultimately leading to a happy ending.
周周爱 | "Weekly Love"

Huai Wen, Fu Yu ShuGu Yao, a top science student born in the 2000s, joins Zhonglian Global and catches the attention of Chairman Zhou Zhenliang with a meticulously designed presentation. She cleverly exposes system vulnerabilities, showcasing her talent. After breaking up with playboy Cheng Mu, Gu Yao throws herself into her work, winning Zhou Zhenliang's appreciation with her outstanding ancient town project report and keen insights gained from on-site investigations. In repeated collaborations, she promotes intelligent office solutions and ancient town renovation projects, impressing Zhou Zhenliang with her vibrant energy and professional competence. Zhou Zhenliang arranges various opportunities to get closer to Gu Yao, and even risks his life to save her during an earthquake, finally winning her heart.
陆先生，你捡的小玫瑰又掀桌了 | "Mr. Lu, the Little Rose You Picked Up Has Flipped the Table Again"

Zhong Zheng, Mo NingOn the day she was abandoned, Lu Yaoyao burned down her grandmother's yard. In the flames, she stumbled upon Lu Shiye, the heir of the Lu family, covered in blood. He took her in, meticulously plotting to use this "thorny rose" to overturn the power struggle between the two families. However, he was completely captivated by her repeated counterattacks. From then on, he offered her the fire, she set it; he laid plans, she broke them. A clear-headed, eccentric female lead and a cunning, calculating male lead join forces to punish the villains and achieve mutual redemption.
我把他捧成影帝，又让他变回狗剩 | "I Made Him a Movie Emperor, Then Turned Him Back into a Dog's Leftovers"

Ma Hao Dong, Wen Mo YanAt the beginning of the month, Jiang Yuechu, the president of Entertainment, secretly sponsored Li Gousheng (later renamed Gu Qingrang), a boy from a mountain village, for ten years under the alias "Jiang Yue," helping him rise to the top of the Best Actor award. However, after Gu Qingrang became famous, he became ungrateful and publicly humiliated Jiang Yuechu, labeling her efforts as "harassment." Completely heartbroken, Jiang Yuechu resolved to retaliate and take back everything she had given him. In the process of revealing the truth and causing Gu Qingrang's career to collapse, Jiang Yuechu also saw the true feelings of her childhood sweetheart, Qin Mo, who had silently protected her for many years. In the end, Gu Qingrang was disgraced and imprisoned, while Jiang Yuechu and Qin Mo finally became a couple, achieving success in both their careers and love.
隐秘之恋 | "Hidden Love"

Meng En, Wan Wan'erShen Molan, a 29-year-old divorced executive, is diagnosed with premature ovarian failure and believes her life is nearing its end, until intern Lu Xingye enters her world. He's 23, with a youthful face and a fatherly heart. Their workplace interactions become increasingly complex. After a chance encounter, Shen Molan discovers she's pregnant. Due to the age gap and her divorce, she hides the truth, but Lu Xingye, upon learning this, remains steadfast in his protection. Meanwhile, Shen Molan's ex-husband, Lin Yao, repeatedly plots against her to cover the Lin family's financial losses. Together, they confront the crisis, expose Lin Yao's schemes, and their souls find each other amidst the ruins, rebuilding together.
白昼凋零时 | "When the Day Fades"

Liu San Si, Zhu Mo YanLin Xia is diagnosed with late-stage stomach cancer and given only two months to live. She decides to embrace her newfound freedom, but accidentally injures the aloof CEO Lu Yu, causing him to lose his memory. To evade responsibility, she lies and pretends to be his wife. Unexpectedly, Lu Yu believes her and becomes a doting husband. Their fake relationship blossoms into a real one, but Lin Xia discovers that her terminal illness was a misdiagnosis! Meanwhile, Lu Yu regains his memory, and a series of power struggles and scheming women ensue.
顶流真千金：魔尊大人又美又飒 | "The Top-Tier Tue Heiress, the Demon Lord, is Both Beautiful and Cool"

Cai Cheng Yuan, Zhu Mo YanAfter being struck by lightning, Demon Lord Su Yuanyou transmigrated to the modern era, becoming the true heiress of the Su family who had been living in the countryside for many years. At this time, she had lost all her cultivation, and her nine-tailed black cat had transformed into a tattoo on her wrist. Coincidentally, she also reunited with Xie Heng (also known as Xiao Yunlin), the reincarnation of the Xiao family's heir. To return to the Demon Realm, Su Yuanyou needed to rely on Xiao Yunlin's pure Yang body and various spiritual objects to restore her cultivation. She used her cultivation skills to revive the critically ill Old Master Xiao, gaining not only the recognition and gratitude of the entire Xiao family but also deepening her bond with Xiao Yunlin.*3 Zhu Moyan's dramas in a day? Girly is WORKING
替身谈钱不谈爱，傅少你哭什么＆别谈恋爱，姐只想搞事业 | "The Stand-in Talks About Money, Not Love, Mr. Fu Why are You Crying? & Don't Talk About Love, I Just Want to Focus on My Career"

Guan Yue, Li Yue XuanTop lawyer Jiang Li transmigrates into the body of a stand-in in an old-fashioned novel. Facing PUA tactics, she counters with a "Stand-in Service Agreement," clearly outlining the price of the stand-in relationship. She uses her professional skills to resolve crises, outwit villains, and build her own financial empire. Ultimately, she not only reaches the pinnacle of her career but also impresses her former CEO, leading to a reunion at the business world's summit.
万面皆为你 | "All Faces are For You"

Ai Hong Chen, Han Lu JinYe Qiaofei, the eldest daughter of the Ye family, was wrongfully imprisoned for five years. She was framed by her half-sister, Ye Wanwan, who stole her designs and seized her dowry. After her release, she refused to be bullied any longer and, posing as a "miracle doctor" on the dark web, entered into a marriage agreement with Fu Beimo, the president of the Fu Corporation. At Ye Wanwan's engagement banquet, she publicly exposed the conspiracy, thus beginning a thrilling battle for revenge and succession.
穿成豪门后妈后，我活成人生赢家 | "After Transmigrating into a Rich Family's Stepmother, I Became a Winner in Life"

Zhang Lei, Zhai Cheng LuJing Yun transmigrates into the body of a wicked stepmother in a novel—a woman who drains her husband of his money, mistreats her stepson, and despises her disabled husband. To change her tragic fate, she changes her attitude, ingratiating herself with her handsome, wealthy, and actually feigning disability husband, Ye Jingchuan. She genuinely cares for her stepson and improves her relationships with her brother-in-law and the Ye family elders. Faced with extortion and framing from her scumbag father and stepsister, she gathers evidence and fights back fiercely, reclaiming her assets and making them suffer the consequences of their actions. Ultimately, she is pampered by Ye Jingchuan and the entire wealthy family, completely rewriting her tragic life.
真千金是万人迷 | "A True Heiress is a Heartthrob"

Zhao Zi Lu, Xu Bo DiAfter Gu Qingyue, the true daughter of the Gu family, is recognized and reunited with her family, she is disliked by her birth mother and schemed against by her adopted daughter, Gu Yan. She is immediately kicked out upon returning home. Xiao Zhaoye, the heir to the Xiao family fortune, is bound by his grandfather's will to help Gu Qingyue become the heir in order to inherit the Xiao family business. The two agree to cooperate. During this time, they overcome Gu Yan's numerous attempts to frame them, resolve misunderstandings and feuds among the older generation, and ultimately Gu Qingyue becomes the heir to the Gu family fortune. Xiao Zhaoye also confesses his love for her, and the two transition from business partners to lovers.
许他光芒万丈 | "Grant Him Brilliant Light"

Li Jing Ze, Zhou Luo YiMing Jing, the eldest daughter of the Ming family, is engaged to Lu Ji'an, the heir to the Lu family, for the sake of family interests. On the eve of their wedding, Lu Ji'an disappears. To maintain their partnership, Ming Jing, in exchange for sponsoring an orphanage, hires Shen Jie, an orphan who bears a striking resemblance to Lu Ji'an, to impersonate him. Under Ming Jing's tutelage, Shen Jie navigates the Lu family's power dynamics, and the two work together to thwart family conspiracies, gradually developing feelings for each other. However, Shen Jie believes herself to be a substitute. When Lu Ji'an returns, the three become entangled in a complicated relationship. Ming Jing realizes her true feelings and chooses Shen Jie, who is actually Lu Ji'an's twin brother. Ultimately, the two overcome class barriers and become a couple, creating a modern fairytale of choosing between self-interest and true love.
成为你最好的礼物 | "To Be Your Best Gift"

Hu Jin Lin, Chen Xin YueFilm producer Xia Xing travels to Xiamen to shoot a movie. She encounters Shen Ze, a self-proclaimed "local guide," who offers his assistance, helping her navigate multiple filming crises including obstruction from local bullies, investors, and celebrities. The reunion with her childhood sweetheart, Lu Xingci, disrupts the delicate balance. Shen Ze's gentleness and Lu Xingci's deep affection leave Xia Xing in a dilemma. Little does she know, the man who has silently protected her is actually the youngest vice president of Southeast China's leading conglomerate. This carefully planned encounter becomes a battle between love and truth. Should Xia Xing choose the known past or the present shrouded in secrets?
二婚被捧成掌中娇，乡下锦鲤名动京城 | "Second Marriage, Pampered Like a Darling, Country Lucky Charm Becomes Famous in the Capital"

Wu Jun Jie, Xia Huan TingShen Xianhao, blessed with good luck, encounters Pei Yanchuan, the chairman of the Pei Group, on her wedding day when his car is out of gas. Mistaking Pei Yanchuan's luxury car for her wedding vehicle, Shen Xianhao gives him wedding candy as an apology. Simultaneously, Pei Yanchuan's gas tank miraculously fills up. To repay Shen Xianhao's kindness, Pei Yanchuan sends people to find her. After marrying into the Wang family, Shen Xianhao brings them wealth with her lucky charm. However, the Wang family members forget their roots after becoming rich, and her husband, Wang Qiang, even cheats on her with her best friend. Upon discovering this, Shen Xianhao resolutely divorces Wang Qiang and goes to work in the city. By a twist of fate, the hotel owner where Shen Xianhao works is none other than Pei Yanchuan.
换亲后，我嫁纨绔小公爷 | "After the Exchange Marriage, I Married a Playboy Young Master"

Wang Zi Yi, Wei Fan Shu (RAW)Yun Qing, who transmigrated into a book, was framed and forced to marry her future brother-in-law, Qin Xiu. "Since I'm here, I might as well make the best of it!" she thought. "The important thing is to make money; money gives you confidence—that's an age-old truth." However, after their wedding night, Qin Xiu told her he was sick! Greedy and lustful, she thus began a marriage-of-convenience-to-love story, managing to mold the young master into a henpecked husband.
娇养东宫 | "Pampered in the Crown Prince's Palace"

Yuan Zi Ming, Yang FanIn her past life, Jiang Buxi saved the critically injured Crown Prince Bei Junlin, only to be massacred and killed in a village-wide massacre. Reborn back to the moment they met, she resolves to conceive and reverse her fate. The fiery widow and the arrogant crown prince clash daily, gradually developing feelings for each other. The entire capital knows that the crown prince utterly despises Jiang Buxi, yet he dotes on her unconditionally.
穿越到古代后被皇室团宠了 | "After Transmigrating to Ancient Times, I Was Pampered by the Royal Family"

Yuan Liu Zhe, Wang Yu Han, Qu RuiWen Zilian, a dual-ability user possessing spatial abilities and the ability to communicate with animals, transmigrates to ancient times. However, she mistakenly believes she is having a wet dream and forces herself on Pei Zihua, the crown prince of the Great Zhou Dynasty. After realizing the trouble she has caused, Wen Zilian leaves. Four years later, Wen Zilian lives with her child, Xiaobao, but unexpectedly encounters Pei Zihua again. Wen Zilian does not want her child to recognize his father, but she is targeted by Princess Ruyang, who is infatuated with Pei Zihua. In order to protect herself, Wen Zilian has no choice but to confess to Pei Zihua, but she has no idea that she has entered the tiger's den and can no longer escape Pei Zihua's clutches.
四爷，妾身有礼了 | "Fourth Prince, Your Concubine Greets You"

Feng Wen Dong, Ju Ke'erModern-day Ye Zao transmigrates into the body of a concubine in the Qing Dynasty's Fourth Prince's mansion. Envied by the domineering secondary wife and manipulated by the scheming primary wife, Ye Zao can only cling to the Fourth Prince for protection. Fortunately, the Fourth Prince doesn't mind her appearance and secretly likes her because of her unconventional looks! Ye Zao perseveres and eventually becomes the most honored woman in the Prince's mansion and even the imperial palace.
让我冲喜，行！那就改朝换代吧＆王妃她一拳爆头 | "Let Me Marry Someone to Bring Good Fortune, Fine! Then Let's Change the Dynasty & The Princess Smash Her Head with a Punch"

Qi Pei Xin, Wu Yi ChunBu Ruo, the legitimate daughter of the General Who Protects the Nation, is reincarnated and captured by Crown Prince Xiao Jingrui to break off their engagement. However, she is framed and killed by Bu Yao in the Crown Prince's mansion. Later, the female protagonist possesses her body and becomes the new Bu Ruo. Upon returning home, she finds her family in ruins and her clansmen seizing her property. Bu Ruo uses a scheme to force her clansmen to repay their debts. At the same time, she swaps her marriage with Bu Yao, marrying herself to the legendary short-lived Prince Xiao Yulan. Bu Ruo is attracted to Xiao Yulan and plans to win him over as an important ally in her rebellion. So she cures his poison and illness. During their time together, the two develop feelings for each other.
