Little Rambling:28 dramas for today to be uploaded. I don't even know when I'll finish uploading them 😭
养成偏差 | "Deviant Upbringing"

Wang Xuan, Yu LingWhen Ruan Chaoyang, an insignificant office worker, faces layoffs, he is offered a chance to turn his life around by the aloof CEO Cheng Huaizhou. From having her proposal questioned and facing a rigorous written test, to the embarrassing situation of accidentally wandering into the CEO's house, and finally joining forces to uncover a data conspiracy, the two are brought together by their pet Alpha, and gradually develop feelings for each other amidst their clashes and protectiveness. Ruan Chaoyang is hesitant to confront his family background, while Cheng Huaizhou melts away the barriers with his silent devotion. Their mutual support during an earthquake and their joint efforts to overcome workplace crises allow them to transcend class differences and misunderstandings. This nurturing encounter blossoms into a sweet and passionate romance of mutual growth and redemption amidst the everyday realities of life.
热带港岛 | "Tropical Harbour Island"

Li Zhuo Yang, Yue YueSeven years ago, to fulfill her mother's last wish, Shen Tinglan created a misunderstanding and broke up with her boyfriend, Huo Cheye. Seven years later, Shen Tinglan was drowning and was rescued by Huo Cheye, a lifeguard. The two met again, and their hearts, dormant for seven years, stirred once more. Huo Cheye pressed closer, while Shen Tinglan retreated step by step, but ultimately she was overwhelmed by Huo Cheye's overflowing love.
千金归来后被全城团宠 | "After the Heiress Returns, the Whole City Adores Her"

Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), Liu YingSheng Lanyin's father, Sheng Wen, the richest man in the country, is ill and plans to choose an heir from among his children. Sheng Lanyin conceals her discharge from the military and returns to the Sheng family to retaliate against her nemesis and fight for the family fortune. However, by a twist of fate, she ends up marrying Xie Yanci, who has secretly loved her for fifteen years. After that, the military's nemesis becomes Mrs. Xie, and Mr. Xie's unrequited love comes true.
摸摸头，治愈你，重逢后炸毛竹马宠疯了 | "A Pat on the Head, Heal You; After Reunion, the Irritable Childhood Sweetheart is Spoiled Rotten"

Zhang Yun Tao, Cai Miao YanEight-year-old Gu Xiuyuan met Xiaocao, who had been separated from her family since childhood, at a sanatorium. She possessed a special ability to heal all things; her warmth and kindness were like a ray of light, illuminating his life and healing his legs. Sixteen years later, Gu Xiuyuan took over the Gu family business and vowed to find Xiaocao and marry her. However, he searched everywhere without finding her, until the Su family's second daughter, who had been sent as a substitute bride, entered his life, beginning a series of hilarious and absurd married days.
殿下，奴婢现在是您的总裁夫人 | "Your Highness, I Am Now Your CEO's Wife"

Yang Yu Bin, He Tian TianQin Shengsheng was transported to the modern world by the Imperial Advisor using a jade pendant, becoming Pei Yang's wife. The original Qin Shengsheng and the male supporting character, Pei Chen, had collaborated to steal company research. The male lead wanted a divorce and sent them both to prison. After the female lead's transmigration, she first tried to make amends to the male lead, healing his legs with silver needles, helping him treat a powerful figure and secure a collaboration, and successfully obtaining a ring. Later, while healing the male lead's legs, they developed feelings for each other. Meanwhile, after Pei Chen was imprisoned, he turned evil and hired someone to assassinate the male lead. The female lead shielded him from a bullet, and on the verge of death, the male lead produced the jade pendant. The female lead then traveled back to the Great Sheng Dynasty, bringing back the crown prince's soul.
夫人太暴力，秦总每天带伤上班 | "Madam's Too Violent, Mr. Qin Goes to Work Injured Every Day"

Lu Huan Yu, Zhang Qiu ZiAt their first meeting at a family dinner, Qin Yanli, the president of the Qin Corporation, falls instantly in love with Su Ci, his nominal nephew's wife. To win her over, he resorts to using incentives to lure his nephew into betraying him and drugging her. When Su Ci awakens, her world is turned upside down. He threatens her with videos and coerces her family to force her into marriage. She fights back, but he steadily suppresses her. When the long-buried secrets of the orphanage are revealed, she discovers that this forceful acquisition stemmed from a deep, unrequited love spanning many years.
被钉棺沉塘后，重生嫁世子夺江山 | "After Being Nailed in a Coffin and Drowned in a Pond, I Reborn to Marry the Crown Prince and Seize the Throne"

Wang Jia Mao, Fang Si ChangIn her previous life, Princess Fengyi, Su Chenyu, was betrayed by her sister, her heart clouded. She was manipulated by her beloved, becoming a murderous weapon that killed her loving grandfather and the prince who had always protected her. Ultimately, she was nailed to a coffin and drowned. Reborn, Su Chenyu returns as the dashing and noble princess. The scumbag regrets his actions? Su Chenyu disdains them. She only wishes to rekindle her romance with the prince of Baili Mansion, whom she wronged in her previous life.
短命王爷一身反骨，求娶将门主母 | "The Short-Lived Prince Has a Rebellious Streak; He Seeks to Marry the Matriarch of a MilitaryFamily"

Zhong Zheng, Yao Yu ChenIn her previous life, Princess Wei Fu of Yong'an was ruined and her entire family was executed after being drugged by her husband, who had risen to power through the Wei family, and his mistress. She was tortured to death by the two. Reborn, she finds herself back on the day she was drugged. After killing the villains, she forces herself on the powerful but sickly Prince Cui Heng to cure her. She intends to avenge her family and then "leave the father but keep the son," thus avoiding the calamity of their family's extermination. However, while she can defeat her ungrateful ex-husband, fight her vulgar mother-in-law, and deal with her scheming mistress, she finds herself unable to avoid or get rid of this fragile, sickly, and beautiful prince who coughs up blood at the slightest touch.
他过分撩野 | "He is Excessively Flirtatious"

Ji Jun Liang, Hao YunLou Keyan, a wealthy young man from Beijing's elite social circle, falls instantly in love with Sang Xia, a dance major. He schemes to break her up with her philandering boyfriend, Liang Huaizhou, and launches a forceful pursuit. To resolve her family's financial difficulties, Sang Xia enters into a secret relationship agreement with Lou Keyan, stipulating that they will only discuss money and not their feelings. However, the 192cm tall, handsome, mixed-race CEO's flirtatious charm is coupled with gentle protection—walking the dog, defending her, and standing up for her—he does it all. This "chasing and running" relationship, which begins with calculation, gradually changes amidst suspicion and testing. When financial transactions collide with genuine feelings, the two ultimately succumb, unlocking a sweet and wild love story that evolves from ambiguous attraction to a lifelong commitment.
跟前男友成为邻居后，他又争又抢 | "After Becoming Neighbors With Her Ex-Boyfriend, He Both Competes and Fights For Her"

Song Yu Bo, Fan Chu QiCardiac surgeon Wen Mu-kui unexpectedly reunites with her ex-boyfriend Qi Zhou at the hospital, and soon after, the two become neighbors. Their breakup eight years ago left behind misunderstandings; Wen Mu-kui mistakenly believed Qi Zhou had started a family, while Qi Zhou, unable to let go of his past relationship, actively approaches her as a neighbor, silently protecting her. As they spend time together, they resolve their past issues and jointly face problems such as Wen's mother's divorce proceedings and the threat of Feng Yi-zhou's release from prison. Through mutual support, they confront their inner feelings, eliminate barriers, and ultimately walk hand-in-hand into the marriage registry, achieving a happy ending.
太傅别哭，夫人她甘做屠户的掌中宠 | "Grand Tutor, Don't Cry; the Wife is Willing to Be the Bucher's Darling"

Wang Hao Xiang, Meng LuJiang Mingyue bought the convict Fu Yunxi as her husband, but was rejected. After Fu Yunxi regained his position as Grand Tutor, he abandoned her. Heartbroken, Mingyue married the butcher Chen Er, but Fu Yunxi forcibly prevented their marriage on their wedding night. At this time, Chen Er's true identity as a prince was exposed, and Fu Yunxi colluded with the Northern Barbarians to kidnap Mingyue, but was ultimately defeated by Chen Er. Three years later, Chen Er, now emperor, found Mingyue again, who was selling tofu, and they were finally reunited. Fu Yunxi lost everything due to his treason.
王妃太嚣张，她凭本事配享太庙 | "The Princess is Too Arrogant; She Deserves to Be Enshrined in the Imperial Ancestral Temple Based on Her Own Abilities"

Liu Ning, Zhao Mu YanShi Wanwan, a modern-day PhD in Traditional Chinese Medicine, transmigrates into the body of Princess Yongning of the Tang Dynasty. Facing persecution and financial ruin from her father, half-sister, and fiancé, she fights back, cleverly seizing the family fortune. She and Xie Xuanzhi, the powerful Prince Chong, gradually develop feelings for each other amidst their mutual exploitation. She uses her medical skills to save Xie Xuanzhi and outwits various factions. Feigning madness before the emperor, being humiliated in school, and cleverly unraveling mysteries, she rises against all odds, ultimately ascending the throne as Empress with the help of many, and living happily ever after with Xie Xuanzhi.
皇后她偏偏贤良淑德 | "The Empress Who Insists on Being Virtuous"

Wu Xu Zhi, Cui Xiao XuanYao Feiran, a 21st-century working-class woman, transmigrates into the body of a cannon fodder empress in a palace intrigue novel. The original owner was love-struck and died young, so Yao Feiran decides to completely subvert the typical trope. On the surface, she adheres to "virtuous and gentle," but in private, she's free-spirited and clear-headed, only to be schemed against by the concubines and her own family. No longer patient, she secretly plots with a "saintly" persona, cultivating allies, tearing apart scheming women, and outsmarting the scumbag emperor. Ultimately, she joins forces with the cunning Prince Xie Yanci to overthrow the tyrannical ruler, support a new emperor, and become the powerful empress dowager behind the scenes.
我曾为你赴深渊 | "I Once Went to the Abyss for You"

Wu Yu Hang, Mai Tong, Xiao Zi MingTo save her critically ill mother, Xu Zhinian is forced to return to her powerful ex-boyfriend, Qi Sheng. Meanwhile, her fiancé, Huo Tingshen, repeatedly provokes her because of his secretary, Qi Youwei's, ambiguous advances, even siding with her when her most cherished wedding dress is destroyed. On their wedding day, Huo Tingshen once again misses the ceremony because of Qi Youwei. Heartbroken, Xu Zhinian resolutely elopes. Years later, she returns with a new identity, and Huo Tingshen finally realizes that all the hurt was a calculated scheme. He desperately tries to win her back, only to find her already with Qi Sheng. It turns out that some people, once missed, are missed forever.*Why do Wu Yuhang took lots of scumbag roles lately?
冷面教授狂宠我 | "The Cold-Faced Professor Spoils Me"

Zhang Da Yuan, Sun Wei LinWhen her gambling-addicted adoptive father slapped her across the face, forcing her to sell herself to pay off his gambling debts, Jiang Muyan escaped. She accidentally stumbled into the arms of Fu Xiuming, a wealthy professor. They spent a night together, each getting what they wanted. The boundaries of monetary exchange blurred in their entangled breaths. Red wine spilled over her collarbone in the bathtub, and their fingertips were stained with paint in the art studio. On their first night, his restrained panting as he loosened his tie turned this taboo between them into something sweet.
黑千金第1部 | "The Black Heiress 1"

Feng Ming Chao, Chen Yu TongZhizhi was originally a wealthy heiress, but she was abandoned in a remote small county. Zhou Mu picked her up after being released from prison. Later, he became a coal mine owner, and the abandoned baby became a veritable "black heiress."
惊！被读心后小叔他开始撬墙角啦 | "Shock! After Being Mind-Read, My Uncle Started Stealing My Girlfriend"

Chen Yu An (Chen Zi Yang), Liu Yi TongIn order to escape her contractual marriage with Shen Mingze, the transmigrator Qu Xinning accidentally enters her uncle Shen Huaijin's room and breaks his Buddhist prayer beads, granting him the ability to read minds. Shen Huaijin is attracted to her seemingly contradictory yet genuine nature and begins his "heart-stealing" spree, silently protecting her and clearing away obstacles. Faced with Shen Mingze's wavering, Xiao Chuchu's scheming, and Tong Shuyin's revenge, the two go from tentative flirtation to unwavering commitment. Through their hilarious and absurd interactions involving mind-reading, they break free from the constraints of the plot and ultimately become a couple, finding love in mutual devotion.
晚来萧雨念清欢＆我和亲后，太子急疯了 | "Evening Rain, Xiao Melody, Pure Joy & After My Marriage, the Crown Prince Went Crazy"

Wei Tian Hao, Han Lu JinZhu Qinghuan, the legitimate daughter of a general, falls in love with her personal bodyguard. However, the bodyguard's true identity is Crown Prince Xiao Yunlan, who stays by her side only for the sake of his half-sister, Zhu Mingyue. Because of a complaint from Zhu Mingyue, Xiao Yunlan orders Zhu Qinghuan to be thrown into a bandit's den and tortured. Heartbroken, Zhu Qinghuan petitions the emperor for a marriage alliance with the Northern Barbarians. In the days leading up to the marriage, Xiao Yunlan repeatedly hurts Zhu Qinghuan. Only after she has truly left does he feel deep remorse. He learns from Zhu Mingyue that he fell in love with Zhu Qinghuan at first sight, but by then she has already married far away to the Northern Barbarians. To win back his lover, he finds Zhu Qinghuan's mother's sword, hoping to lure her back.
龙宝上洛帝宠无双 | "The Emperor's Unparalleled Favor Upon the Dragon Treasure in Luoyang"

Geng Zhi Xin, He ShiSix years ago, Wu Zhaohua was tricked by her half-sister, Wu Zhaoli, into an unexpected union with Jun Linyuan, the emperor of the Yinglong clan. She was subsequently expelled from her family and gave birth to three dragon eggs. Six years later, because her dragon offspring developed scales and suffered from a persistent high fever, she was forced to return to the capital for medical treatment, only to be discovered by the reborn Wu Zhaoli, who was determined to seek revenge. Despite repeated persecution, fate brought her back to Jun Linyuan.
蛊妃 | "The Gu Concubine"

Li Shi Yao, Lin Zi Lu, Hua Wen TingTo investigate the truth behind her mother's murder, the Holy Maiden Si Qingyou from the Southern Frontier returns to the Dayong Dynasty with her son Rou Rou. There, she reunites with Rou Rou's biological father, Mo Linyuan. Together, they resolve the power struggles and the crisis of poison in the palace, ultimately uncovering the conspiracy of the mastermind, the Great Witch, who launched a war for personal gain. At the same time, the two realize their true feelings for each other, and after stabilizing the court, they travel together to the Southern Frontier.
盲妃驾到 | "The Blind Consort Arrives"

Li Shi Jiao, Lu Zhao HuaYe Yaochen, the daughter of the Grand Commander, ran away from home to escape an arranged marriage. Unexpectedly, she stumbled upon Crown Prince Xie Jingyan committing a crime in the woods. Ye Yaochen cleverly feigned blindness to save her life, and was subsequently taken back to the Crown Prince's residence for observation. Upon entering the royal court, Ye Yaochen had to be wary of the open and covert attacks of Consort Xiao Fengyi, as well as the Crown Prince's suspicions and tests. Through their repeated encounters, the two gradually went from mutual distrust to developing feelings for each other. As the Crown Prince was diagnosed with a strange poison, a court conspiracy surfaced. To protect her beloved, Ye Yaochen decided to join forces with the Crown Prince to eliminate the mastermind behind it all and overcome the difficulties together.
出宫前夜，沦为暴君掌中物 | "On The Eve of Leaving the Palace, I Fell Into the Clutches of a Tyrant"

Qiang Yu, Li Xi WeiThe story revolves around the frail palace maid Su Wan, who accidentally stumbles upon the tyrant's secret on the eve of her departure and is forcibly detained in the palace. The tyrant, Xiao Chengye, appears cold and ruthless, but in reality, he develops complex feelings for Su Wan, and the two embark on a torturous love affair amidst the vortex of power. Su Wan plans her escape multiple times, but is always thwarted by Xiao Chengye with various excuses, from threats to gentle advances, gradually revealing the softer side of the tyrant. As the plot unfolds, palace intrigues surface, and the mystery of Su Wan's origins is revealed: she is a descendant of the previous dynasty, and Xiao Chengye's obsession with her stems from a life-saving act years ago.
凤主临，神格归，嫡女镇三界 | "Phoenix Sovereign Descends, Divine Grace Returns, Heiress Rules the Three Realms"

Song Yi Fan, Lu YuanHaving died a tragic death in her past life, Feng Qingyu is reborn, returning to the day her spiritual root was destroyed and her engagement was broken off! In this life, she sheds her ugly birthmark and becomes a genius with maxed-out attributes, shocking the continent. She divorces her scumbag ex-boyfriend, her music shakes the world, and all her enemies—the scheming older sister, the biased and sickly father, and the corrupt emperor—are slapped in the face! But why does the rumored cold-blooded and ruthless War God Prince Chen always come to her aid in times of crisis, and even insist on marrying her? "Your Highness, how about we join forces to assassinate the emperor and seize the throne?"
我嫁人后，王爷后悔了 | "After I Got Married, the Prince Regretted It"

Liu Yan Chen, Xi LeAfter being abandoned by Prince Duan, Xiao Yu, Shen Qingyuan married Marquis Zhenbei, Lu Chengyuan. After marriage, she let go of the past and lived a loving and devoted life with her husband, calmly resolving the repeated schemes of the concubine, Su Wanrou. Only after Shen Qingyuan repeatedly amazed everyone did Xiao Yu realize his mistake and regret his past actions. He desperately tried to rekindle their relationship, but it was too late. Meanwhile, Shen Qingyuan had already found true happiness and belonging in Lu Chengyuan's unwavering protection and affection. The belated affection of a past lover ultimately couldn't compare to the stable future offered by the person before her.
竹马哭吧，这次我选天降 | "Childhood Sweetheart, Cry, This Time I Choose the One Who Falls From the Sky"

Liu Xuan, Yang Xue YuZhu Zhixi is reborn at 18, determined to break free from her childhood sweetheart Gu Qishen, who betrayed her in her previous life. She recalls Xie Jin from her past life, wanting to make up for his sacrifices, and is gradually moved by his gentleness—he gives her cola when she breaks down, protects her when she's bullied, and even risks allergies to buy her a cake on a snowy night. As Xie Jin's background and his feud with the Gu family are revealed, Zhu Zhixi falls completely in love. But she doesn't know that behind Xie Jin's protection lies a secret connected to the tragedy of their past life. Will they be able to stay together in this life?
伪婚姻 | "A Fake Marriage"

Wang Shang Jin, Ma Ming JieMarried for three years, Shen Jianjia and Lu Zhan were the city's most beloved couple. Everyone said she was obedient and virtuous, but only she knew he had a sexual dysfunction. One day, by chance, Shen Jianjia found a bracelet in her husband's car. Turning on the dashcam footage, she was shocked to discover that his impotence was just a lie told to her. On her way to planning a divorce, she stumbled into the arms of several men who had been plotting against her.
冲天香阵透长安 | "The Fragrance of Incense Fills Chang'an"

Yao Lei, Zhuang Xi YueI was the most pragmatic noblewoman in the capital. When my fiancé's family was raided and he was exiled, I immediately allied myself with his mortal enemy. When my father and brothers were suspected by the emperor, I didn't hesitate to sever ties with my family. When the Northern Barbarian army invaded, I was the first to open the city gates to welcome them, becoming their favored concubine. Later, my fiancé became emperor and returned. His first act upon entering the capital was to kill me for revenge. Thankfully, I was already dead, but even in death, he wouldn't let me go, demanding a trial to summon my spirit. From high-ranking officials to commoners, everyone had a reason to hate me. But when all my deeds were displayed on the celestial screen, those who hated me to the core all wept.
白月光的杀伤力 | "The Destructive Power of the White Moonlight"

Zhu Yong Qiang, Lin Shi TingHao Ying once deeply loved Fei Chen, but was abandoned by him at their engagement banquet for his unrequited love, Ren Yu. She suffered double blows, being pressured by Fei Chen's power and manipulated by Ren Yu's manipulative nature. At this critical moment, Du Yu, a wealthy tycoon who secretly loved her, stepped forward. He supported her at the engagement banquet, helped her regain her dignity by bidding high prices for her paintings at an art exhibition, and even risked his life to save her when her mother was kidnapped and he himself was poisoned. Du Yu's love was equal and respectful, patiently accompanying her through her ordeal. Hao Ying destroyed her bridal chamber and won a gold medal with her mixed-color painting "Crossing Over," transforming herself from a "golden canary" dependent on men into an independent creator.

婚情已久 | "Long-Standing Marriage"

Wu Zhong Yuan, Tian Miao MiaoTo repay a life-saving debt, Lu Huo, president of Tengyue Group, conceals his identity and marries Su Yan. After the marriage, Su Yan unexpectedly discovers a divorce agreement and faces repeated harassment and framing from Qin Yin, Lu Huo's childhood sweetheart. While protecting Su Yan, Lu Huo secretly pushes forward with gene therapy for hemophilia (Su Yan is diagnosed), but his concealment leads to misunderstandings. After experiencing workplace bullying, exclusion from the wealthy family, and a life-or-death crisis, the truth comes to light, and the two resolve their differences. A year later, Su Yan becomes pregnant again, and she and Lu Huo hold a grand wedding, beginning their happy life together.
陷爱 | "Falling in Love"

Wang Yi Ran, Meng NaWhen Shu Tang was in Yuncheng, she rescued Xing Zhengyi, a mute slave in a fighting arena, under the mysterious identity of Sister SU. Shu Tang thought it was a destined redemption, and the two fell in love. However, when Xing Zhengyi's identity as the illegitimate son of the Song family was exposed, it was revealed that his approach to her was also a transaction. Shu Tang made a clean break but was caught up in the internal strife of the Song family. After Xing Zhengyi became the head of the Song family, he drugged Shu Tang to make her forget her past a year ago and her identity as Sister SU. She returned to Jinghai and became an ordinary person. She then carefully planned her way into a whirlwind marriage and pursued her. But as her memories gradually returned, her past also surfaced.
云纱遗梦 | "Cloud Veil Dream"

Wu Tian Hao, Cui Yi LiangAfter her father's murder, Shen Zhi unexpectedly establishes contact with her great-granddaughter a century in the future through a mysterious phone call, and joins forces with Qin Zheng, the second son of her enemy, to embark on a path of revenge. Amidst the intertwining of reality and illusion, the two overcome the barriers of time to uncover the truth, using traditional craftsmanship as their weapon to fight against fate.

勾心强宠这个男主我罩了 | "I've Got This Male Lead Covered Up"- Zhang Si Fan, Wei Jia LeLong Shuang transmigrates into a novel as the villainous supporting character Shen Shuang. The original owner of this body caused the male lead, Zhou Jibai, to become a vegetable and was subsequently killed. To change her fate, she protects Zhou Jibai, outsmarting Zhou Meilin, who covets her family fortune, and her cousin, Yang Chumo. She uses every trick in the book to prevent Zhou Jibai from suspecting anything, even flirting with him, leading him from confusion to attraction. At this time, the original female lead, Ye Xinqiao, appears. Shen Shuang sees an opportunity to return to the modern world or to bring the male and female leads together according to the plot, so she tries to matchmake them. Zhou Jibai notices Shen Shuang's distance and, taking advantage of her drunkenness, learns that she is leaving. He actively pursues her.
本王妃才不当炮灰 | "This Princess Won't Be Cannon Fodder"

Huang Hao Wen, Cai Zhuo YinModern-day legendary healer Lin Wanrou, responding to the plea of ​​the vengeful spirit of the tragically deceased Lin Wanrou in another world, activates the "Book of Fate," transporting her to the other world on her wedding day to "defy fate and rewrite the Book of Fate" for her! Surrounded by wolves in sheep's clothing and harboring their own schemes, Lin Wanrou faces deliberate obstruction and repeated betrayals from Xiao Yuan, Su Meier, her stepmother, and even the rest of the household. She easily overcomes these obstacles with her intelligence and wit. Using her exceptional medical skills, she cures Xiao Yu's leg ailment and detoxifies him from a deadly poison. She also opens free clinics, striving to revive the declining "Hundred Herbs Hall" and revitalize the Marquis's estate!
暗恋的学霸不甜，换个小哥哥来明恋 | "My Unrequited Love for the Top Student Isn't Sweet, I'll Openly Admire Him"

Liu San Si, Zheng Chen YuLin Shu is reborn back to her university days, determined to no longer be infatuated with the cold-blooded academic genius Ji Xingshen, and instead focus on self-growth and her dream of translation. In pursuing a new life, she meets Xie Buchen, a seemingly carefree but kind-hearted "rascal," and gradually falls for him in their interactions. Facing the entanglement of her ex-husband, family resistance, and the shadows of their pasts, the two redeem each other, grow together, and ultimately break through prejudice and fate, achieving fulfillment in both career and love.
岁晚临相思 | "Yearning for Love at the End of the Year"

Liu San Si, Tian Miao MiaoShi Wan and Ji Linchuan are reborn. In her previous life, Shi Wan was murdered by her husband Lin Xiuyuan, who faked his death, and her sister-in-law Bai Zhenzhen. Ji Linchuan avenged her. After being reborn, Shi Wan leaves with Ji Linchuan at Lin Xiuyuan's funeral. The two join forces to fight against the Lin family, expose the truth behind Lin Xiuyuan's faked death, and dissolve their marriage. Subsequently, they work together to deal with the internal strife within the Ji family and the conspiracy of Bai Zhenzhen and Ji Yanzhou. After many twists and turns, Ji Linchuan proposes to her, and the two finally become a couple.
兽语缉凶：假千金靠破案逆袭 | "Animal Language: The Fake Heiress's Rise to Power Through Solving Cases"

Yu Lun Hao, Cui Xiao XuanAbandoned by a wealthy family, Xia Zhining unexpectedly awakens the ability to speak animal language. Teaming up with her older brother Ji Shuyun, she cleverly captures a Class A fugitive, only to have the fake heiress Xia Qingqing claim the credit. She rescues Anxing, the beloved dog of wealthy CEO Gu Huaiye, and publicly exposes Xia Qingqing's fabricated limp. Subsequently, she solves numerous bizarre cases by understanding animal testimonies. Her family, who once treated her like trash, will finally kneel before this animal-speaking girl who stirs up a storm!
碎月落净土 | "The Shattered Moon Falls on the Pure One"

Wang Yu Wei, Mi Qi, Li Jing Ze, Wu Zhu XiIn her past life, the half-demon Yu Xi was tortured to death by the immortal sects. After being reborn, she resolutely chose to join the young master of the demon race. She became a disciple of the Demon Lord and discovered that she possessed a rare Sun and Moon Spiritual Root, which was only seen once in a century. From then on, she was cherished by the demons and they redeemed each other. However, when the immortals gradually awakened their memories of their past lives and tried to win her back, Yu Xi, who had already become the little princess of the demon race, left only a resolute back view that would never look back.
心声撩人，老公躺不住了 | "Heartfelt Words, My Husband Can't Stay Still"

Ji Jun Lian, Cao Qian YiShen Xingyao and her best friend transmigrated into a book together. Shen Xingyao became a wealthy "living widow." All she wanted was to lie low and be a rich, useless woman without a man. However, she was stunned by her husband's good looks, even though he was in a vegetative state. Her infatuated feelings were overheard by her husband in bed, and the handsome man was so aroused that he woke up on the spot. From then on, her mother-in-law regarded Shen Xingyao as her "lucky star," showering her with endless affection.
闺蜜拿下我老板后我赢麻了 | "My Best Friend Won Over My Boss, and I'm Doomed"

Chen Jing He, Cui Shi YiUnable to bear the demanding demands of the fastidious CEO Fu Hanzhi, Qiao Yu sends her beautiful best friend Shen Qinghan to win him over. Shen Qinghan falls for Fu Hanzhi at first sight and unexpectedly discovers that this aloof CEO is a complete novice in love, easily taming him. After they get together, Qiao Yu's career takes off, but Fu Hanzhi is often jealous of Qiao Yu and Shen Qinghan's close relationship. To get rid of this third wheel, Fu Hanzhi arranges a meeting to introduce his friend Xie Huaijin to Qiao Yu. Qiao Yu falls for the gentle yet cunning Xie Huaijin at first sight, and the two couples embark on a lively and sweet romance filled with playful banter and mutual affection.
宠意无声 | "Silent Pampering"

Mi Re, Fu Ya Ning (RAW)Dr. Hongdou, a medical doctor, unexpectedly transmigrates into a mindless transmigration novel filled with palace intrigue, becoming the wronged cannon fodder female supporting character, Shen Xitang. To reverse her tragic fate of being a stepping stone for the original transmigrated heroine, Mu Yunshu, Shen Xitang immediately twists the plot and incidentally saves another cannon fodder character in the book, the Marquis Mu Xingye. Unexpectedly, the Marquis is also a transmigrator. This pair of cannon fodder transmigrators decide to cooperate strategically to survive. However, the original transmigrated heroine, Mu Yunshu, considers herself the chosen one and has already sided with the two—Mu Jinzhou, the adopted son of the original male lead, the Marquis.
大叔，你的娇气包哭了要贴贴 | "Uncle, Your Spoiled Darling is Crying and Needs a Patch"

Huang Bo, Man YuNineteen-year-old Yan Rongrong, exploited by her family and caught in a series of unexpected mishaps, encounters Si Boheng, the most mysterious triad boss in Hong Kong. One is a down-on-her-luck student, torn by fate and yearning to escape; the other is a powerful figure who believes he understands everyone and everything. He suspects her of having ulterior motives, while she only wants to secretly eliminate "trouble." When the contract is finalized and the truth is revealed—she is actually the heiress of a top-tier wealthy family—this entanglement, which began as an accident, has already evolved into a deep and unbreakable bond he cannot let go of.
高门主母的驯夫手册 | "The High-Ranking Mistress's Guide to Taming Her Husband"

Chen Zheng Yang, Jin Lu YingCheng Zhao only discovered after marrying Zhou Yuanshen that he had a powerful concubine and an ambiguous relationship with a widow. Cheng Zhao handled these situations with ease. "Since I've married into the family as the mistress, my job is to clean up the messes left by the Duke. Once my position is secure and I have children, the next mess to clean up will be you, Duke."
闺蜜穿书成妯娌，双双孕肚藏不住 | "Best Friends Transmigrate into Sisters-in-Law, Both Pregnant"

Deng Xin Yue, Zhai Xin Ran (RAW)Lu Youyou and Song Zhaoyun are childhood best friends who promised to stay single and childless and save money to travel the world together. However, they unexpectedly transmigrate into a novel about a wealthy family, becoming the wives of the Lin brothers, Lin Chen and Lin Xu, and both become pregnant. The original owners of the novel were troublemakers who met a tragic end. To change their fate, the two joined forces to make money and prepare to run away. However, they experienced the miracle of life amidst their constant morning sickness and developed feelings for the two Lin brothers. In the end, they gained a sweet life and became the darlings of the Lin family.* 2 sisters/bestfriend story yesterday, and there are a few more later. This plot is always fun lol
万里星河作我冠 | "The Vast Galaxy as My Crown"

Guo Hao Jun, Shi TongShen Ruoyan, the daughter of a wealthy merchant in Kyoto, was forced by her husband, Wei Zhan, to accept her widowed sister-in-law as a concubine on their wedding day. Shen Ruoyan immediately annulled the engagement and then withdrew all military supplies to Wei Zhan's Weiyuan Army, leading to Wei's defeat. An imperial edict exiled Wei Zhan to the harsh borderlands! The former young general was paraded through the streets like a prisoner, and the scheming widowed sister-in-law, having lost her support, was placed under house arrest by the Wei family in a dilapidated courtyard. Meanwhile, Shen Ruoyan turned her attention to business, opening up maritime routes and instantly becoming the richest woman in Kyoto. She used this wealth to develop water conservancy, reform the canal system, and establish a girls' school, ascending to the pinnacle of her power as a queen.
皇后不讲道理，讲物理 | "The Empress Doesn't Reason, She Explains Physics"

Wen Liang, Lei Xiao YuReborn, Empress Jiang Ye completely shattered her past facade of virtue and gentleness. With her loyal maid Xiao Man and two clever children, she lived a carefree and unrestrained life in the palace. The once aloof Emperor Xia Yu was now a hopelessly infatuated lover. After Jiang Ye settled all the old scores from their past life, Xia Yu simply dismissed the harem, leaving her alone. Thus began a new chapter filled with trials and tribulations for this emperor and empress.
穿书娇妻：大佬为我站起来了&娇妻穿书后，他站起来了 | "Transmigrated Wife: The Boss Stands Up for Me & After My Wife Transmigrated, He Stands Up"

Guo Hao Jun, Shen YaoChi Qingluo, a struggling actress with a tarnished past, unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel, becoming a foolish and pretentious cannon fodder supporting character. Faced with a disabled, powerful husband and an impending death in the street, she swiftly tears up the divorce papers, determined to cling to her husband and defy fate. She removes her heavy makeup to focus on her career, uses a mysterious spatial fruit to heal his legs, and even manages to win over the aloof tycoon during a series of crises. When the original female lead arrives with a plot-driven tragedy, she chooses to stand shoulder to shoulder with him, together tearing apart this predetermined tragic destiny.
厌朱墙 | "Disliking the Red Wall"

Lin Xiao, Cui Yi LiangA privileged family background? A good education? Gentle and courteous? Nan Jin possessed none of these virtues. But she was adept at acting, cunning, and ambitious, always vying for power. With her exceptional tea ceremony skills, beauty, and intelligence, Nan Jin held the emperor firmly in her grasp, meticulously plotting her way from a lowly palace maid to the emperor's most beloved concubine. She used his power to kill, and he used her ruthlessness to establish his authority. The emotions on this chessboard were a mix of reality and illusion; whoever fell in love first was doomed. On the day the blood debt was paid, standing atop the clouds, she suddenly couldn't tell whether she had won the world or lost to the snowstorm within the palace walls.
封总，你家小白花她开大了＆大佬你的牙粘口红了 | "President Feng, Your Little White Flower Has Gone Wild & Boss, Your Teeth Have Lipstick on Them"

Wang Chao Yang, Deng Yan NiThe delicate and innocent Su Tang is coerced by her adoptive father into subduing the powerful Feng Jin, but unexpectedly, their positions are switched. From then on, Su Tang's life takes off! But after dealing with the scumbags, she discovers her home has been robbed. Meanwhile, Feng Jin discovers their secret of being switched. After they switch back, Su Tang wants to leave, but the powerful Feng Jin won't allow it.
人间清醒太子妃，只求富贵不求爱 | "A Sober Crown Princess, Seeking Only Wealth, Not Love"

Chen Guan Yi, Yao HuiXie Congyun, the eldest daughter of a general who protects the nation and the leader of the most powerful organization in the martial arts world, the Ink Blade Hall, rescues the wounded Crown Prince Xiao Qi'an from an assassination attempt. Xiao Qi'an vows to never betray either Buddha or his beloved. However, on their wedding day, Xiao Qi'an consummates his marriage with Qing Ning. Xie Congyun, seeking power rather than love, allows the two to be together, only to discover later that Xiao Qi'an has mistaken the healer Qing Ning for his savior. The two then see Xie Congyun as an obstacle and constantly cause trouble. Xie Congyun remains true to herself, determined to become Empress, and uses her wisdom to humiliate them. Ultimately, she brings the scoundrels to justice and achieves her own desires.
满级黑心莲重生成小可怜 | "A Max-Level Black-Hearted Lotus Reborn as a Poor Little Thing"

Sun Dan'en, Shu Xue ManIn her previous life, Shen Shuyi was bullied by her stepmother and cousin. Seeking support, she married the sixth prince and helped him fight for the throne, only to be abandoned and murdered by her cousin. Reborn, she is no longer naive. Using the power of the Canglang King, she returns to the capital, exposing her stepmother's embezzlement of her family fortune, and bringing misery upon her cousin, making her reap what she sows. She conspires with the Canglang King to report the sixth prince for possessing weapons and plotting rebellion, executing him on the spot. With her revenge complete, she reclaims her mother's dowry, establishes her own household, refuses to compromise, and lives a free and unrestrained life.
王妃京城第一棒 | "The Princess is the Number One Stick in the Capital"

Ye Yi, Bao Jin NiThe female protagonist, Shi Wanwan, transmigrates to the princess's mansion. Upon opening her eyes, she finds herself surrounded by numerous male concubines, all fawning over her. She initially believes her life will be wonderful, but she soon discovers that the original owner of this body was driven to the brink of bankruptcy by her obsessive love. In order to protect the princess's mansion and her own assets, the female protagonist embarks on a path of madness from which there is no turning back. At the same time, she encounters the male protagonist, Xie Xuanzhi, who is known as the God of Slaughter, and a series of hilarious and absurd events unfold between them.
我的爹爹是冥王 | "My Father is the King of the Underworld"

Sun Jing Chen, Wang Yu MoJiang Yu carried her child for three years, giving birth to her daughter An'an, but an accident occurred, and both mother and daughter fell into the underworld. It turned out the child's father was Lu Beiming, the King of Hell, who, despite drinking eighteen bowls of Meng Po soup (a soup for forgetting past lives), could not forget Jiang Yu. Jiang Yu endured many trials at the gates of hell, accidentally becoming a cook to get close to Lu Beiming, but was thwarted by the Vermilion Bird. After learning the truth, Lu Beiming desperately protected his wife and daughter, but his love prevented him from wielding the Netherworld Sword.

婚婚逢她 | "Meet Her at Marriage"

Wang Nian Jiang Cheng, He Tian Tian, Xiang Shuai, Xue Zi QiThe Su sisters were betrothed to the Fu family: the elder sister married the aloof and ruthless patriarch Fu Chengzhou, while the younger sister, Su Wan, married her brother, a top-tier movie star. However, on their wedding night, a series of mishaps led to the sisters entering the wrong bridal chamber. The next day, the truth was revealed, and Su Qing decisively switched their marriage contracts: Su Wan would marry Fu Chengzhou, while she herself would be tied to Fu Yang. After the marriage, Su Wan initially resisted Fu Chengzhou's strictness with her mischievousness, but she also softened his heart with medicinal cuisine. Amidst their tumultuous relationship, Su Qing and Fu Yang gradually developed feelings for each other. When the Fu family's old mansion made things difficult for Su Wan, she caused chaos, and Fu Chengzhou's protection further fueled the genuine feelings that blossomed from this farcical marriage.
OMG！新婚夜，我和姐姐走错婚房 | "OMG! On Our Wedding Night, I Went to the Wrong Bridal Chamber with My Sister"

Zhang Xuan, Cha Yi Chen, Zhang Hao Yang, Xia Xuan ZiTo solidify their business alliance, the Su and Fu families decided to arrange a marriage. The aloof and glamorous CEO, Su Qing, married the ruthless and domineering head of the Fu family, Fu Chengzhou. Her younger sister, Su Wan, a typical "older sister's sweetheart," followed her sister everywhere. Therefore, Su Wan married the second young master of the Fu family, the movie star Fu Yang. On their wedding night, a series of misunderstandings led the sisters to the wrong bridal chambers. The next morning, both couples discovered the truth and, to protect their family interests, decided to continue the marriage by exchanging vows, thus beginning two very different stories of arranged marriages that blossomed into love.
Little Rambling:Up until this minute, 6 versions of this Su sisters and Fu brothers plot released today. Idk if there are more on the 4pm & 8pm CST release later. I'll post all first lol
糟糕！和姐姐走错了 | "Oops! I Went to the Wrong Room with My Sister"

Xie Yu Wang, Wang Hai Min, Wang Jun Yu, Liu Ze FeiSu Wan and her sister were arranged to marry. The older sister, a CEO, married the cold and domineering head of the Fu family, while the younger sister, Su Wan, married the younger brother, a movie star. However, on their wedding night, due to a series of misunderstandings, the two sisters ended up in the wrong bridal chambers. She and her brother enjoyed a passionate night together, while her sister and her brother had a romantic evening. Since the deed was done, they had no choice but to switch the brides.
姐姐完蛋啦我们走错婚房了 | "Sister's Doomed, We've Entered the Wrong Wedding Room"

Xia Ning Jun, Hu Xue YiSu Wan and her sister were arranged to marry. Her sister, a CEO, married the cold and domineering head of the Fu family, Fu Chengzhou, while Su Wan married Fu Yang, the younger brother of the Fu family and a movie star. On their wedding night, due to a series of coincidences, the two women ended up in the wrong bridal chambers. Su Wan and Fu Chengzhou spent the night together, while Su Wan and Fu Yang shared a pleasant evening. After discussing it, the four decided to switch brides. Unexpectedly, this switch led to the union of two perfectly matched couples.
联姻对象错了！那就换一个 | "Wrong Marriage Partner! Let's Change It"

Nie Ji Kun, Zhu Xin YuSisters Su Qing and Su Wan are arranged to marry brothers Fu Chengzhou and Fu Yang respectively. On their wedding night, a downpour obscures the house numbers, and the sisters mistakenly enter each other's bridal chambers. Su Wan ends up spending the night with Fu Chengzhou, while Su Qing ends up with Fu Yang. With the marriages already arranged, the two couples swap marriage contracts, beginning a series of comical and absurd married lives. Su Wan, initially dissatisfied with Fu Chengzhou's strict discipline, gradually becomes dependent on and falls in love with him; Su Qing and Fu Yang also break down their stereotypes and develop feelings for each other. Ultimately, the four's mismatched marriages come to fruition.
走错婚房找对郎 | "Walk into the Wrong Wedding Room and Find the Right Groom"

Liu Chen Rui (Liu Wei Hao), Liu Yi RanThe Su sisters and the Fu brothers were betrothed, but they accidentally ended up in the wrong bridal chamber. Since the deed was done, they had to exchange marriage contracts. The older sister, Su Wan, was initially indifferent; as long as her sister was there, everything was fine. However, Fu Chengzhou constantly pressured her to learn etiquette and rules, restricting her life. Coupled with her father's obstruction, their married life was fraught with conflict. Su Qing, as the head of the Su family, married the carefree and popular singer Fu Yang, initially only for the sake of family interests. However, Fu Yang's passionate pursuit of her led her to re-evaluate this marriage that had come about by chance.* The last Su sisters and Fu brothers plot as of right now. I need some more high profile actors and more interesting details and sub-plots tho (if there are more versions)
野狗装乖！拿捏纨绔太子爷 | "A Stray Dog Pretends To Be Well-Behaved! Manipulating the Spoiled Yung Master"

Li Sheng Jie, Xue Zi QiTo avoid marrying the infamous playboy, Zhou Linya casually took in Chi Peiye—a narcissistic, vain, and constantly flirtatious man decked out in fake designer brands, relentlessly promoting himself like a peacock displaying its feathers. She thought she was manipulating a vain, easily fooled, and poor fool; he thought he'd found a rich older sister who would drive his entire family crazy. Until one day, he suddenly discovered that Chi Peiye was actually the absurd fiancé she'd refused to marry. Zhou Linya was the "200-pound, nose-hair-protruding" arranged marriage partner he'd imagined! These two rebellious individuals, deceiving each other, became the most compatible allies. Together, they built a business, slapped the world in the face, and incidentally, experienced a mind-blowing romance!
红鸾引 | "The Red Phoenix's Song"

Huang You Tian, Cai Cai Yun (Wang Yun Yun), Yi Hang, Lan Bo, Liu Zi HengYun Qi transmigrated into a storybook. From a powerful princess who held sway over the court, she was reduced to a disgraced fake heiress in a marquis's mansion. Meanwhile, the real heiress became the mansion's jewel, stealing all of Yun Qi's glory. Unexpectedly, when Yun Qi arrived, the gazes of the general who should have despised her, the two-faced leader, the marquis's heir, and her sickly younger brother followed her intently, refusing to look away from any of them.* The males are such a feast. The budget must have been big for this
白夜妄念 | "White Night's Wild Lies"

Li Zhuo Yang, Mai TongSurgeon Wen Ke is forced by her mother to maintain a contractual marriage with tycoon Shen Zhiyu, while she also falls in love with Qi Zhouye, who considers himself a "male model". After the three of them are exposed at a banquet, Qi Zhouye angrily discovers that he is the "other woman". However, before he learns the truth about Wen Ke's marriage, he returns as the real heir of the Qi family in Hong Kong, determined to win Wen Ke back from Shen Zhiyu.
夫人她专治不服3之将门捉婿 | "The Lady's Special Skill in Dealing with Disobedience 3: The General's Son-in-Law"

Wang Pei Yan, Li Ke YiXie Qiyue is reborn back to her wedding day, encountering Yan Shulan, the most notorious playboy in the capital who abducted her in her previous life. Although it was a prank, Xie Qiyue, recalling her husband's family's outrageous behavior in her past life, decides to remarry Yan Shulan on the spot. Everyone in the capital knows Yan Shulan. The heir of a marquis's family, he indulges in cat and dog walking, cricket fighting, drinking, cockfighting, and frequenting brothels. Even on their wedding night, he shamelessly praises the women of the brothels. Xie Qiyue, however, doesn't hold back, wielding a long spear, and embarks on her journey to tame her husband.
别惹真千金，她是满级异能大佬 | "Don't Mess with the Real Heiress, She's a Max-Level Superpowered Boss"

Sun Zi Hang, Yu CongA king of assassins with supernatural abilities transmigrates into the body of Jiang Yu, the timid and weak-willed true heiress of the Jiang family. She takes down scumbag boyfriends and bitches, kicks her scumbag father and stepmother, and faces the disdain of her powerful older brothers. However, Jiang Yu's true colors are gradually revealed, and her brothers all automatically transform into doting siblings. Just when things are going smoothly for Jiang Yu, Fu Chen kisses her, hating everyone but loving only her.
港城有雨 | "Rain in the Port City"

Ma Ming Yu, Liu XiaZhou Jing, the adopted daughter of the Wen family, is unwilling to be used as a tool by them and yearns for freedom. By chance, she meets Chi Shangxu, a powerful figure in Hong Kong's entertainment circle. The two begin with a contractual marriage, gradually developing feelings for each other through mutual testing and support. During this time, a series of events unfold, including the mystery of the real and fake heiresses, family feuds, and entanglements with past relationships. Zhou Jing must not only break free from the Wen family's constraints but also uncover the mystery of her own origins. Ultimately, she and Chi Shangxu join hands to resolve the crisis and move from a contractual relationship to true love.
幸得相遇重生时 | "Fortunately, We Met Again When We Were Reborn"

Zhang Han, Ai YiShengge is reborn with regrets from her past life, her eyes immediately locking onto the brooding and taciturn Zhou Ye, embarking on a passionate pursuit of him! He, haunted by childhood trauma and shunning, lowers his guard as she approaches him, waits for him in the rain after his release from prison, and steadfastly protects him. It turns out that the bread she offered him as a child had already sown the seeds of their destined bond. He silently protects her, clumsily doting on her, expressing his deep affection with three-line love poems, and giving her a specially made helmet to conceal his tenderness. She, bright and passionate, heals his gloom, standing by him against family schemes and oppression. In this bittersweet, mutually redemptive story, filled with the ultimate devotion, a love that transcends life and death, a sweetness that touches the heart!
义薄云天之洪星 | "The Righteous and Loyal Hong Xing"

Shu Tong, Xun Yi Xin (RAW)The story follows Xiang Yue, a triad boss sentenced to death, who is reborn twenty years in the past. To save his brothers and the innocent, he resolves to lead his gang out of crime, establish a legitimate company called "Hongxing," and transition to legal business. Using his reborn memories and shrewdness, Xiang Yue navigates the complex web of power struggles, protecting his family and friends while fighting crime, gradually cleansing his name and building a legitimate business. Ultimately, he brings the real criminals to justice and leads his brothers towards a brighter future. This short drama is adapted from the Tomato Top List novel "Stop, Yue, You're on the Anti-Organized Crime List" by Sui Sui Nian Nian Ya.
万人嫌的她风评逆转 | "The Popularity of the Disliked Girl Turns Around"

Wen Yuan, Chen Si YuTang Zhujun, a modern medical student, transmigrates into the body of a notorious, infatuated woman in ancient times. Using her modern medical knowledge, she improves prescriptions and opens a clinic. During this time, she encounters obstacles in selling her prescriptions and is framed by the villain Ruan Anruo. In a family where both her father and brothers are top scholars in the imperial examinations, she manages family crises and raises her son, who also becomes a top scholar. Her relationship with the aloof Prince Jin evolves from initial conflict to mutual affection.
咸鱼妾室的苟命日常 | "The Daily Life of a Lazy Concubine"

Huang Jing Zhou (Xiao Tai), Dong Yue YuXie Run transmigrated into a palace intrigue novel, becoming a cannon fodder female supporting character destined to die at the start. To survive, she vowed to be a lazy bum, staying away from the protagonist and never vying for favor. Unexpectedly, her promise of "never serving the emperor" piqued the interest of the cold-faced prince, forcing her to "work overtime" every night. Faced with the reborn and vengeful Consort Ning and the scheming transmigrated concubine Fang, Xie Run inwardly complained, "I just want to survive to the end, why is it so hard?" Meanwhile, the prince who claimed to want her dead repeatedly protected her, his eyes dangerous yet burning with desire: "Your life is mine." How will this lazy concubine survive the battlefield and become the ultimate winner, while incidentally turning the cold-faced prince into a "wife-doting maniac"?
九零逆袭：从服装厂工人到富婆 | "A 90s Girl's Rise from Garment Factory Worker to Rich Woman"

Li Guan Lin, Zeng He Hui ZiModern fashion designer Shen Qiuyun travels back in time to 1995, becoming the spoiled daughter of a garment factory owner. She marries He Jingxing, a retired soldier entrusted by his mother to manage the factory. She sheds her arrogance and uses her professional skills to resolve crises in the workshop and optimize production processes. She repeatedly triumphs in her battles with Qian Guoqiang, Zhang Cuifang, and others who covet the factory, launching hit products such as overalls and Hong Kong-style skirts. Meanwhile, she and He Jingxing gradually develop feelings for each other after initial testing, ultimately joining hands to expand the factory, find happiness, and welcome a new life into their lives.
掌心艳火 | "A Blaze in the Palm"

Tan Si Yuan, Lin Yan LaiSeven years ago, to conceal her father's entanglement with Zhou Zheng's mother, Xu Lanxin cruelly broke up with Zhou Zheng and left for another country. Seven years later, Xu Lanxin returned to China with her best friend's child, only to unexpectedly run into Zhou Zheng again on a rainy night. Zhou Zheng mistakenly believed that Xu Lanxin had married and had children, but he still couldn't forget her. He forcefully intervened in her life, clearing away obstacles at work and fending off harassing men. Faced with Zhou Zheng's persistent pursuit and deep affection, Xu Lanxin's long-dormant heart gradually wavered. The two were torn between misunderstandings and tests, ultimately uncovering the truth behind their breakup, overcoming family obstacles, and walking hand in hand towards a happy ending.
知许若笙 | "Knowing Xu Ruosheng"

Liu San Si, Lin Qi YuDu Chengxu, poisoned by a Southeast Asian blood curse, encounters Ren Sheng, a Peranakan woman, while being pursued. He unexpectedly discovers that her blood can suppress his sleight of hand, thus linking their fates together. To save his life, Du Chengxu and Ren Sheng enter into a "life-or-death marriage contract," embarking on a dangerous relationship that begins with self-interest but gradually blossoms into genuine affection.
和离后，侯爷跪求我复婚 | "After the Divorce, the Marquis Begged Me to Remarry"

Lin Yu Xi, Zong Yan ChuGu Qingyao, daughter of the General of the State, was ordered to marry Marquis Chengen, Lu Yuanzhou. After three years of marriage, she found no true love and was instead subjected to his treatment of the courtesan Lin Wan'er as a concubine, with the Marquis's household taking advantage of the situation to oppress her. In reality, Gu's father, Gu Feng, had not been captured and returned with 100,000 iron cavalry to support her. Gu Qingyao resolutely divorced her husband and subsequently fell in love with Shuofeng, the second prince of the Western Jurchens. When the Western Jurchens launched a southward invasion, Gu Qingyao went to war in her father's place to repel the enemy. After many trials and tribulations, the Marquis's household was demoted, and Gu Qingyao and Shuofeng, who had quelled the internal strife and become the overlord of the Western Jurchens, finally became a couple.
穿书后我踹渣嫁对栋梁郎 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Kicked Out the Scumbag and Married the Right Man"

Zhao Huan Dong, Xu Lan DiYin Zhi, transmigrated into a novel as cannon fodder, flees Beijing to avoid a tragic death, only to be betrayed by the scumbag Fu Sinian and the scheming Xu Hua. On the verge of miscarriage, she is rescued and impulsively married by Lu Yuchuan, a research chief engineer she once helped. Leveraging her expertise in eight foreign languages, Yin Zhi rises to become a top-tier translator, repeatedly thwarting the villains' schemes and revealing the truth about her parents—top research experts in disguise. Ultimately, she and Lu Yuchuan join hands, and their entire family dedicates themselves to national defense, embarking on the path to a strong nation.
别怕，我比你还疯 | "Don't Be Afraid, I'm Crazier Than You"

Yin Chen Zan, Shen FanAfter transmigrating into a book, the female protagonist's mission, given by the system, is to survive without being killed by the crazed male protagonist. To survive, she goes on a crazy rampage, which piques the male protagonist's curiosity, leading him to decide to spare her life. Thus begins their hilarious cohabitation. The female protagonist's main goal is to survive in the book and, incidentally, slap the face of the fake heiress second female lead who stole her identity. The male protagonist's goal is to avenge his mortal enemy, Jiang Zhiying. In the end, the male protagonist brings down Jiang Zhiying, avenging himself and his mother. The female protagonist's true identity as a heiress is exposed, and her brothers, deceived by the second female lead, begin begging for her forgiveness. After resolving everything, the male and female protagonists live happily ever after.
偷听我心声后，反派老公不离婚了 | "After Eavesdropping on My Heart, My Villainous Husband Won't Divorce Me"

Wang Yu Kai, Lei Fu ManThe frugal Zhang Xingran transmigrates into the body of a discarded wife of a wealthy family. To obtain alimony, she pretends to be a devoted admirer hoping for a divorce, unaware that the male lead, Gu Xiuyuan, and his family are overhearing her thoughts. After learning of the Gu family's tragic end, everyone begins to protect Zhang Xingran, and she also falls for Gu Xiuyuan during their time together. Through numerous trials and tribulations, including being framed by Chen Lu and a stock crisis at the Gu family business, the two finally resolve the misunderstanding about saving her life years ago. Zhang Xingran becomes pregnant, and the whole family lives happily ever after.
再爱你一次 | "I'll Love You Again"

Chen Zhi Hui, Chen Si CheOffice worker Ning Zhi transmigrates into a novel as a supporting female character in a wealthy family. To win the inheritance, she goes to great lengths to please the cold-faced, domineering CEO Zhou Tingxiao, only to unexpectedly discover that he is his unforgettable lover from a past life, Gu Xuening (whose memories Zhou Tingxiao has sealed). With the support of her fiercely protective older sister Ning Yaoyao, the two join forces to fight against the Zhou family's scrutiny, the schemes of relatives and friends, the original male lead's plot, and the villain Jiang Sui's revenge. After Zhou Tingxiao unlocks his memories, he pursues his wife, and ultimately, Ning Zhi completes her self-growth, heals her past, and they spend their lives together.

换婚吧！姐宝要幸福 | "Let's Have a Marriage Swap! May My Sister Be Happy!"

Lu Dong Xu, Peng YaoSu Wan, a demure younger sister, and Su Qing, a cold and aloof CEO, are betrothed to the Fu brothers, Fu Chengzhou and Fu Yang, respectively. However, on their wedding night, they accidentally switch rooms and swap spouses. After the swap, the four experience misunderstandings, family trials, and a power struggle within the Su family. Amidst their hilarious interactions, Su Wan and Fu Chengzhou, and Su Qing and Fu Yang, gradually develop feelings for each other. Ultimately, the two couples resolve their crises, the Fu parents reconcile, and the four hold a wedding ceremony, finally becoming husband and wife.* Let's start the day with another Su sisters and Fu brothers' story. This is the 7th version in 2 days. Idk if another will drop again later..
枕上撩火 | "A Tale of Two Cinderellas"

Shen Hao Nan, Meng NaForced into an arranged marriage by her savior! To save her comatose younger brother, Shi Ning is forced to marry the eldest grandson of the Shen family. However, on her engagement day, she is shocked to discover that her fiancé and secretary are having an affair and that the secretary intends to kill her after the wedding! Desperate, she retaliates by directly pursuing Shen Lingchen, the most formidable half-brother in the Shen family—Shen Nanxun's nemesis! She actively seduces and tests him step by step, hoping to save her life by choosing a different marriage partner, but the cold-faced tycoon repeatedly thwarts her schemes and protects her. How did this calculated game of power lead her to fall in love? But she cannot love; her marriage has always been solely for saving her brother!
暗恋竹马第七年 | "Seven Years of Unrequited Love for My Childhood Sweetheart"

Hei Ze, Yu YinCheng Xia had a seven-year unrequited love for her childhood sweetheart, Chen Shechuan. Even a drunken kiss only earned her a cowardly "we're just friends." Heartbroken, she resolved to distance herself, but unexpectedly reunited with another childhood friend, Xu Jingxiao, and was moved by his gentle yet unwavering pursuit of love. At this point, Chen Shechuan could only regret his actions.
医女古穿今，夫人她医术满级 | "A Female Physician Travels Through Time, Her Medical Skills Are Maxed Out"

Yang Peng Cheng, Ye Xin Xin (Liu Jin)In her past life, Sheng Yunshu was the head of the Imperial Hospital. One day, she opened her eyes to find herself in modern times, the eldest daughter of the Sheng family, abandoned by her stepmother and confined to a mental hospital. She returned to the Sheng family because of a childhood betrothal, only to discover that her fiancé was a notorious, unruly, and ruthless man in Beijing's elite circles. Fortunately, Sheng Yunshu possessed exceptional medical skills, specializing in treating the complex and difficult cases of the wealthy.
小哭包的校草邻居惊呆了 | "The Crybaby's School Heartthrob Neighbor Was Stunned"

Li Sheng Jie, Gong Fang NiLin Jianzhi had a crush on the school heartthrob, Zhu Liheng, for two years, and was preparing for the college entrance exam with his university, A University, in mind. A month before the exam, Zhu Liheng returned to his school to give a speech. She was so nervous that she burst into tears, and her disheveled state was caught on camera. She expected to be disliked, but instead, she received daily pick-ups and drop-offs from Zhu Liheng, math tutoring, and university selection analysis. She hid her joy on Weibo, thinking it was just a one-sided crush, unaware that Zhu Liheng had already recognized her account. As her neighbor, he had been eyeing this crybaby whose cries could shake the building for two years. His goal was simple: to bring her home and possess her.
仙子醒醒吧，你的心声泄露了 | "Fairy, Wake Up! Your True Feelings Have Been Revealed"

Jin Wang, Zhang Xu HanCheng Zhixi, the fairy princess of Penglai, considers Pei Ji, the equally matched immortal of Yujing, her mortal enemy. To defeat Pei Ji and defend her ten-game winning streak, Cheng Zhixi risks everything by accepting an SSS-level workplace mission to "work" in the mortal realm. Little does she know that Pei Ji's constant undermining of her performance stems from a long-standing crush on her, which he finds difficult to achieve. Heeding his friend's advice, he believes that being outstanding enough will make Pei Ji notice him. One is a fairy princess who mistakenly acquired a "golden finger" that allows her mind to be read; the other is a devoted immortal who descended to the mortal realm to pursue his beloved and gained the ability to read minds. Watch as these two work together to overcome challenges in the mortal workplace and forge a lasting bond.
穿成炮灰真千金，我嫁给黑化太子 | "Reincarnated as a Cannon Fodder Heiress, I Married the Darkened Crown Prince"

Liu San Si, Wang Lu QingWei Anning, the head of a modern family specializing in ancient martial arts, unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of the real daughter of the Duke of Anguo's mansion, who was maliciously switched at birth. Bound to a revenge system, she must avenge the original owner against the imposter Wei Rongrong and her persecutors. Using her formidable martial arts skills and system items, she launches a powerful counterattack. However, she unexpectedly catches the eye of the frail but cunning Crown Prince Chu Chengyuan, who proposes marriage. To accelerate her revenge through power, Wei Anning agrees to the marriage. After the marriage, Chu Chengyuan wholeheartedly protects his wife. Their relationship deepens as they work together to punish the villains, achieving a double redemption.
慌！摆烂后，小咸鱼她被迫登基了 | "After a Hasty Decline, the Little Salted Fish Was Forced to Ascend the Throne"

Wang Kang, Yao Yu ChenThe ninth prince, Jiang Yunxi, disguised as a man, originally only wanted to live a life of leisure, but unexpectedly inherited the throne. Facing court intrigue and the discontent of other princes, she used her wisdom and medical skills to work with the regent, Quan Jiuzhou, to stabilize the court. During this process, Jiang Yunxi's secret of being a woman was on the verge of being exposed, and her relationship with Quan Jiuzhou gradually deepened. Ultimately, Jiang Yunxi not only secured her throne but also found love, becoming a wise and benevolent ruler.
泄露心声后，所有人都来攻略我 | "After Revealing My True Feelings, Everyone Came to Conquer Me"

Chu Zi Jun, Kang Yu QianThe goddess Fang Ruotang, her soul damaged, is reincarnated as the legitimate daughter of a prime minister's family. She gains access to a mirror that allows her to foresee the future, learning that she must win over six male protagonists to save a collapsing small world. Her innermost thoughts, shared with the mirror spirit, are accidentally exposed and overheard by the crown prince, the young prince, and the emperor. Using her voice, they purge the court and prepare for disaster relief, while the six male protagonists, initially suspicious, fall in love and actively cooperate to earn points for her. Through her efforts to win over and save the world, Fang Ruotang not only protects the small world and evolves the Heavenly Dao, but also develops feelings for the male protagonists, ultimately succeeding in protecting the small world.
网购男友竟是孩子爹 | "My Online Shopping Boyfriend Turns Out to Be the Father of My Child"

Huang Zi Qi, Zhang Yi MengFive years ago, the female protagonist, Lu Qingran, fell in love with the succubus male protagonist, Ji Hanxiao. Shortly after giving birth to their son, Ji Muyang, she was framed and lost her memory, completely losing contact with her husband and son. Ji Hanxiao had to raise his son alone. Five years later, Ji Hanxiao learned of Lu Qingran's whereabouts again and discovered that his wife had lost her memory. He immediately took Ji Muyang and went to her door.
女承母业，我选择在豪门当保姆 | "Following in My Mother's Footsteps, I Chose to Be a Nanny in a Wealthy Family"

Yuan Zi Ming, Cha Yi ChenUnemployed college graduate Jiang Mo plunges headlong into the life of a wealthy family, becoming the "second-generation heiress" of the Gu family. Intending to focus on making money and keep her heart locked away, she uses her high emotional intelligence and exceptional mahjong skills to win over many admirers, only to unexpectedly attract the attention of the aloof CEO, Gu Xun. Caught between a path to becoming a top-notch nanny and the CEO's seemingly gentle trap, Jiang Mo frantically takes on multiple jobs and outwits her rivals within the wealthy family, only to discover that her greatest challenge is her own heart. When career and love clash, what will she choose?
价码之上，心动之下 | "Above the Price, Below the Heart"

Wang Yu Bo, Sun Yi FeiEntrusted by Xia Qing, Lin Yan approached Song Yizhou, the heir to the Song family business, through a transaction, successfully persuading him to break off his engagement. However, Song Yizhou developed genuine feelings for Lin Yan and, even after discovering the deception, refused to let go. Lin Yan, burdened by her past of being coerced into drinking with her stepson Zhou Mi, faced a united attack from Xia Qing, Zhou Mi, and others after the deception was exposed, leading to widespread rumors on campus. To protect Lin Yan, Song Yizhou was willing to give up his inheritance rights. Desperate, Lin Yan resolved to fight back, gathering evidence of Zhou Mi and others' illegal bidding schemes. During this process, her relationship with Song Yizhou underwent trials and tribulations. Ultimately, the two joined forces to fight the villains, revealing the truth and also confronting their deeply hidden feelings for each other.
反派破产不要慌，作精老婆觉醒了 | "Don't Panic When the Villain Goes Bankrupt, My Spoiled Wife Has Awakened"

Zong Bin, He Yi TingAwakening to her newfound power, Ji Qingrong, seeing her bankrupt villainous husband, decides to "invest." After binding herself to the system, she helps him rise again, becoming the head of a wealthy family. However, she discovers that her once indifferent husband, Jiang Xujing, has completely fallen for her—he finds hier adorable when she passes by, her breath is a tool, and even her words of dislike are interpreted as affection by him. Late at night, tightly bound to him, Ji Qingrong falls into deep thought: has her arrogant and cool villainous husband disappeared?
皇城震惊！冷面太子有崽了 | "The Imperial City Was Shocked: The Cold-Faced Crown Prince Had a Child"

Ming Chuan, Hu Jia RongIn her previous life, Jiang Buxi saved the Crown Prince, but the promised reward turned into the massacre of a village. Reborn, Jiang Buxi is determined to no longer tolerate the scumbag. The two clash and bicker, gradually developing an inseparable bond. Later, they resolve their misunderstandings, return to the palace, and embark on a hilarious journey of revenge against the scumbag. Adapted from Tomato's novel "The Imperial City is Shocked! The Heirless Crown Prince and the Widow Have a Baby" by author Ana Bao.
驯服逆臣 | "Taming the Rebellious Minister"

Huang Sheng Jie, Zhang Wan YueTo rescue her imprisoned mother, Li Mi deliberately provokes Fu Jinghan, the richest man in Kyoto, who suffers from bipolar disorder. Initially approached with ulterior motives, her unique pine resin scent and gentleness gradually heal Fu Jinghan's twisted past and violence. Their forbidden entanglement of "using and being used" evolves into mutual devotion and redemption. Along the way, they encounter Shen Chuyu's schemes, Lilith's revenge, and family coercion, yet their bond remains strong. Ultimately, Li Mi rescues her mother and punishes the villains, Fu Jinghan overcomes his illness, and the two break through societal barriers, transforming their "forbidden and ill-fated relationship" into "explosive true love," achieving a happy ending.
系统逼我救未来老公 | "The System Forces Me to Save My Future Husband"

Wang Zhi Yao, Tang Zhi XuanA modern romance story blending elements of rebirth, a system, redemption, and revenge. The female protagonist, Jiang Chuchu, is reborn back to her high school days, bound to the "Tu Mi System." She earns rewards by completing tasks that fulfill others' regrets, while simultaneously protecting her past lover, Shen Jinian, and making amends for her past life's regrets. The story unfolds along four lines: the task line, the romance line, the background line, and the revenge line, spanning from high school to university, ultimately revealing the heroine's true identity and achieving mutual redemption.
重生换嫁大佬把我宠上天 | "Reborn and Married to a Powerful Tycoon, He Spoils Me to the Heavens"

Wang Heng Yu, Zhou Qin TongAfter being reborn, Jiang Li, determined to escape the fate of being killed by the scumbag Ye Yuchen and her beloved in her previous life, actively approaches Yuan Hezhi, the president of the Yuan Group. She orchestrates a marriage swap, and through her wisdom and courage, navigates the complexities of her reborn sister Jiang Song'er, the scumbag Ye Yuchen, and Xie Yaran, the daughter of the Xie family, gradually winning Yuan Hezhi's heart. Together, they face family machinations, business suppression, and deadly revenge. Jiang Li also relies on her calligraphy talent to become independent and strong. Ultimately, the wicked reap what they sow; Jiang Li not only avenges her past life but also receives Yuan Hezhi's unwavering love, unlocking a happy and fulfilling life.
姐姐别挡路，哥哥是我的 | "Sister, Don't Block My Way, Brother is Mine"

Xu Bu Chao, Zhang Xu HanWen Yiyi, betrayed by her stepmother since childhood, feigns mental instability to protect herself, while being bound by a childhood betrothal to Ling Yue. She navigates the machinations of her stepmother and sister while deepening her relationship with Ling Yue amidst misunderstandings and protectiveness. Unexpectedly, she discovers her biological father from a reclusive family. After overcoming engagement turmoil and a revenge-driven reversal, Ling Yue abandons his family business for her, and the two finally overcome all obstacles. Will this love story, transcending conspiracy and lineage, have a smooth and fulfilling ending?
暴君入我怀 | "The Tyrant Enters My Arms"

Zheng Feng, Lin Jun YiThe story revolves around the cold-blooded tyrant Xiao Jingyan and the time-traveling healer Su Yao. Su Yao unexpectedly saves the severely injured Xiao Jingyan, but is initially fearful of his violent nature. Amidst the turmoil at court, Xiao Jingyan is framed by a powerful minister. Su Yao uses her modern medical skills to help him overcome the crisis, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other. Despite his outwardly cold exterior, Xiao Jingyan is incredibly gentle towards Su Yao, even defying the Empress Dowager's decree for her. Ultimately, Su Yao uses her wisdom to help Xiao Jingyan consolidate his power, and the tyrant willingly relinquishes his authority for her, resulting in a legendary love story that transcends social status.
高手下山，这个保镖太无敌 | "A Master Descends the Mountain, This Bodyguard is Invincible"

Li Mu Xi, Li Jian Ren (RAW)The story follows Lin Feng, a master martial artist living in seclusion deep in the mountains, who descends to become the personal bodyguard of Su Wan, a wealthy heiress, to fulfill a promise to an old friend. New to the city, Lin Feng, with his extraordinary martial arts skills and wisdom, repeatedly resolves crises faced by Su Wan, including business conspiracies and assassinations by the underworld. He not only defeats various powerful enemies but also exposes the conspiracy of a traitor within the Su family, while his relationship with Su Wan evolves from mutual distrust to a blossoming romance. The drama blends action-packed battles, business intrigue, and lighthearted romance, with Lin Feng, through his unparalleled skills and humorous personality, writing an urban legend of protection and growth.
谋凰！重振家族荣耀 | "Scheming for the Phoenix! Revitalizing the Family Glory"

Wang Jia Mao, Li Man NiBetrayed by her husband Xuan Yuanlin, his mistress Xu Lu, and their adopted son and daughter, Shang Xuan's entire family was unjustly murdered. Reborn, she carries the memories of her past life to seek revenge. First, she foils her adopted son's plot to steal the deadly jade pendant, then seizes Xu Lu's wealth and settles the dowry accounts. Tribal betrayals and framing occur, a princess's banquet orchestrates her adopted daughter's marriage to a fallen prince, and the palace birthday banquet thwarts the Xuan Yuan family's rebellion. Step by step, she systematically tears apart her enemies. Finally, the truth behind the setup on her wedding night is revealed, she finds her biological son Nangong Yuechu, resolves her entanglements with the Third Prince, makes her enemies pay for their crimes, and ultimately gains freedom and a new life.
