大嫂：烽火佳人 | "Sister-in-Law: A Beauty in the Flames of War"

Wang Kai Mu, Wang Xiao YiOn a stormy night, Yan Xin rescued the injured Jing Yuanzhao, becoming the savior of the Qinglong Gang leader. Fate, however, plunged her into despair: betrayed by her father and fiancé. She resolutely severed ties with the past. Jing Yuanzhao groomed her to be a cool and shrewd gang leader's wife, only to witness his "death" on their wedding day. Seeking revenge, she patiently navigates the complexities of her enemies. Can Yan Xin turn the tide? Witness how a woman rises to power in a chaotic world, writing a legendary tale of love and passion intertwined with Jing Yuanzhao.
捡来的合约夫人不太乖 | "The Contract Wife I Picked Up Isn't So Well-Behaved"

Dong Yi, Xiang Yun JieThe talented painter Yun Feiyan is tricked and forced to become her sister Yun Qingyu's ghost painter. By a twist of fate, she forms a tragic bond with Li Yanci. To escape the control of the Yun family and reclaim her identity, Feiyan enters into a contract marriage with Li Yanci. From initial suspicion to mutual redemption, the two gradually fall in love while uncovering the truth and fighting against evil. Feiyan picks up her paintbrush again, reclaiming the name "Wangshu," beginning with a contract and ending with true love.
他的港夜未央 | "His Harbor Nights Never End"

Cheng Cheng, Xiang Yun JieSu Miaomiao transmigrates to 1990s Hong Kong City, where she's immediately handed over to Wan Sinian, a top figure in both the underworld and legitimate society. This ruthless and vicious man, whose women are all wealthy and powerful, finds himself completely captivated by Su Miaomiao. Not only does Su Miaomiao subdue all her enemies, but she also trains Wan Sinian into her personal loyal servant.
心跳共振 | "Heartbeat Resonance"

Shao Wei, Lin JingJewelry design prodigy Kong Zhiwei was exploited for years by her adoptive mother, the Wen family. Not only was she falsely accused of plagiarism and blacklisted, but she was also forced to take the blame for her adopted daughter. While being sent to work as a hostess, she met Yan Jingshuo, the head of the prestigious Yan family in Beijing. Due to a car accident, Yan Jingshuo developed a one-sided empathy for Kong Zhiwei; he could deeply understand her pain. To change the tragic ending he foresaw in his dreams, Yan Jingshuo actively protected her, rescuing her from danger several times. During their time together, they developed feelings for each other. Kong Zhiwei gradually broke free from the Wen family's control, revealed the truth, returned to the design world, and ultimately found true love with Yan Jingshuo.
窈窕淑女 | "The Elegant Lady"

Liu Qing, Yao HuiJi Shuyan's life was strictly controlled, leaving her with no freedom. However, having read extensively, Ji Shuyan was no longer satisfied with her current situation. After accidentally meeting Qin Xiao and learning about his background of traveling all over the country, she plotted to get close to him and force him to marry her, hoping to escape the control of her family. Little did she know that Qin Xiao's identity as a businessman was a facade; his true identity was that of a military governor. Ji Shuyan's seemingly clever scheme was nothing more than Qin Xiao's long-planned scheme. Ji Shuyan thought that she could gain freedom through marriage, but she never imagined that the price of freedom would be his constant harassment.
误入贵族学校，她只想搞钱 | "Accidentally Entering a Prestigious School, All She Wants Is to Make Money"

Wu Si Teng, Zhang Ying FeiSt. Toriya is a prestigious private school, and Yunling is its first sponsored student. Sponsored by Ms. Zhuo, a member of the school's board of directors, she lives in the Zhuo family home and develops a close relationship with Ms. Zhuo's son, Chi Sheng. Yunling diligently earns money at school, helping classmates solve various problems and collecting fees in return, thus winning the support and affection of everyone. The new sponsored student, Lin Shiyun, is jealous of Yunling. She believes herself to be academically superior but loses to Yunling in the exam. She accuses Yunling of being greedy and lacking principles, while she herself becomes the follower of the wealthy young master, Song Zhiyu.
微光向暖：学霸的团宠逆袭 | "A Glimmer of Light Towards Warmth: The Rise of the Top Student's Beloved"

Li Ye Chen, Hu Jia NiYan Ning, a top student specially admitted to Shenghua Middle School, had her living expenses cut off due to her mother Liu Wan's opposition to her studies. However, she became the "group's darling" by the heartwarming care of her classmates, and even the school bully Ji Huai proudly protected her. Liu Wan repeatedly humiliated her, even attempting to sell her to human traffickers, and falsely claiming that the Ji family were her father's murderers. Yan Ning's investigation revealed that her father Yan Jun's Alpha chip technology had been plagiarized by his colleague Ma Dongsheng, and Liu Wan was an accomplice. With the support of Ji Huai, her classmates, and Ji's mother, she exposed the truth at a school assembly, and the villain was apprehended. After clearing her father's name, Yan Ning, together with her friends, headed towards the college entrance examination, welcoming the new students.
我只想赚钱怎么成了所有人的白月光 | "I Just Want to Make Money, How Did I Become Everyone's White Moonlight?"

Chen Rui, Tang Li WenYunling, a student from a poor family, uses her intelligence and resilience to navigate the elite social circles of her prestigious school by selling her notes and taking part-time jobs. She goes from conflict with the arrogant young master Chi Sheng to a mutually beneficial relationship with the wealthy heiress Zhou Wanli. Facing the jealousy and provocation of fellow scholarship student Lin Shiyun, she remains calm and resourceful, finding a balance between academic, interpersonal, and family pressures. Ultimately, she breaks down class barriers and earns respect, embarking on a journey of self-made success at her elite school.
穿书八零，首富老公养成计划 | "Transmigrating into the 80s: The Richest Husband Development Plan"

Wang Yan Xin, Dai Qi XuanXin Manman unexpectedly travels back to the 1980s in a novel, becoming the wife of Li Jifan, a wealthy man with two children. In the original story, Li Jifan is bullied and swindled out of his family fortune by relatives, and both he and his wife die tragically. Knowing the original plot, she is determined to change her family's unfortunate fate. Facing the deception of her malicious relatives, she cleverly exposes their true colors and protects Li's initial investment in his business. Leveraging her understanding of the plot, she guides her husband to success, using information asymmetry to protect him, diligently managing their family, and defeating various unscrupulous individuals. The relationship between her handsome, considerate, and gentle husband, her two adorable children, and this capable and independent mother also deepens over time.
不许你乖 | "Don't Be Good"

Lu Dan Dong, Yang Yi MoOn the surface, Wen Yining is a docile "good girl," while Lu Xingye appears perfect but is inwardly obsessive and spoiled. Their personalities are polar opposites, yet their fates intertwine. Lu Xingye tries every means to keep Wen Yining by his side. His gentleness is a trap, and his love is a prison. This time, how will she break free, and how will she succumb?
逆天神医妃 | "The Unparalleled Divine Doctor Consort"

Ma Shi Yao, An AnThe 23rd century's number one thief transmigrated into the body of a useless ninth young lady, only to find herself on a martial arts tournament stage, destined to marry the short-lived Prince Rong. Everyone waited to see her fail, but she used golden needles to control all poisons, stirred up the imperial power with her bare hands, kicked away the scumbag husband, and overthrew the scheming relatives. After the capital was turned upside down, wait a minute? The bloodthirsty and ruthless prince husband she was promised had transformed into a peerless devil who constantly clung to her for kisses and love. "Your Highness, my old ailment has relapsed, and I need your personal treatment." She sneered, holding a needle. "Treatment is fine, but first, sign the divorce papers!" The man pulled her into his arms, his voice tender, "My body and soul will be healed by you alone."
穿成主母重生文里男主的白月光 | "Transmigrated into the Male Lead's White Moonlight in a Rebirth Novel"

Huang Zi Qi, Zhang Yi MengModern female doctor Jiang Zhi transmigrates to ancient times, becoming the white moonlight of the male protagonist in a novel about a reborn mistress. She saves Shen Qingci, the severely injured and amnesiac heir of the Yongning Marquis, only to discover after he regains his memory and returns to the capital that he has been "caught in the middle"—Shen Qingci already has a wife, Lu Yan. The two gradually discover Shen Qingci's true nature: a selfish, hypocritical, and exploitative man who lives off women. Jiang Zhi and Lu Yan resolutely join forces, and also meet Princess Songyi, whom Jiang Zhi once saved but mistakenly believes to be her benefactor. The three go from rivals to allies, working together to punish the scumbag. These three women, in their fight against injustice, each forge their own brilliant paths, together breaking free from the constraints imposed on women by the era.
闺蜜穿古代，我在现代给她送物资 | "My Best Friend Transmigrated to Ancient Times, I Delivered Supplies to Her in Modern Times"

Wang Yu Han, Zhao Hui NanLuo Yunliu's best friend, Qiao Yanxiao, dies unexpectedly. While keeping vigil for Qiao Yanxiao, Luo Yunliu discovers that a vase in her home can connect her to her friend. She learns that Qiao Yanxiao has been reborn as a princess consort and will later be framed by a scumbag and die a tragic death. With Luo Yunliu's help from the modern world, Qiao Yanxiao gradually establishes herself in the Marquis's mansion and rises to a high position. Luo Yunliu also makes it onto the Forbes list in the modern world because of Qiao Yanxiao. In the end, the two discover that the greater their merit, the more living beings they can send to the world. Finally, Qiao Yanxiao returns to the real world and lives a life of wealth, beauty, children, and leisure with Luo Yunliu.

雪满东院 | "Snow Fills the East Courtyard"- Shen Du, Zhao An DiRegent Shen Du, wanting to ensure his deceased elder brother had an heir, followed clan rules by marrying his elder sister-in-law, with whom he had a child, A Jin. The female protagonist, heartbroken, wanted to divorce him, taking the child's memorial tablet with her. However, the controlling male protagonist burned the child's tablet, prompting the female protagonist to seek revenge. She burned down the courtyard, feigned death, and six months later, at the height of her career, successfully attended the Mid-Autumn Festival banquet hosted by the Emperor. She gathered evidence of the male protagonist's crimes and presented it to the Emperor. Together with the Emperor, they stripped him of his regent power, revealed the truth about the child, and obtained a divorce agreement.
锦瑟谋心 | "The Scheming Heart of the Brocade Zither"

An Yi Ming, Song Jia YinIn the Great Qian Dynasty, powerful relatives of the empress dowager held sway, and regional princes carved out their own territories. Wei Yuan, the eldest daughter of the Wei family, entered the palace to save her father and was chosen by the Empress Dowager to be Empress. She once rescued Emperor Xiao Jingheng on his way back to the capital in a bustling marketplace, but Xiao Jingheng, unaware of his savior's identity, mistook her for the Empress Dowager's spy and harbored resentment towards her. In the harem, the Empress Dowager instigated a power struggle between Wei Yuan and Consort Liu, but the two gradually developed feelings for each other while working together to break the deadlock. The Prince of Huai entered the capital and coerced Wei Yuan into aiding him in a rebellion, causing discord between the Emperor and Empress. Consort Song seized the opportunity to frame him, ultimately reaping the consequences of her actions.
替嫁大佬不好惹 | "The Substitute Bride Boss is Not to be Trifled With"

Mao Qi Sheng, Zhang Wan YueSong Jiuyao, who is forced to marry the seemingly madman Fu Jingmo for a billion-dollar dowry, is actually the boss of the Wucheng Wine God Gang, solely to buy Prague Island to fulfill her nanny's dying wish. She and Fu Jingmo go from testing each other to falling in love, overcoming multiple crises and uncovering Lu Chennian's conspiracy. After her identity is revealed, she decides to bring Fu Jingmo back to Wucheng. Will this love story, which transcends good and evil, take another turn?
破屋起家！变富婆撩皇子 | "Starting from a Ruined House! Becoming a Rich Woman and Seducing a Prince"

Qi Xiao Shu, Gao Meng YaShen Yue transmigrated into the impoverished Shen family, becoming a despised and wicked young woman who was jilted upon waking. Faced with her family's alienation and disgust, and the hardships of survival, she abandoned the original owner's vampiric and wicked ways, using a system to make money. After returning home, Shen Yue paid her family a salary, successfully gaining some support. She then began arranging jobs for her family. Through various difficulties, the Shen family came to admire Shen Yue immensely. Later, Xiao An revealed his identity as a general of the court, and Lu Yu was recognized by the royal family as a prince. Shen Yue persuaded Xiao An to take Shen Yue's fourth son as his apprentice, bringing immense prestige to the Shen family. Finally, Lu Yu proposed marriage, and Shen Yue became the prince's consort, while her business flourished.
哄骗计划 | "The Deception Plan"

Li Guan Lin, Lv Yan FeiThe story revolves around Lu Chen, a genius strategist who appears to be the owner of a marriage consulting firm but is actually skilled at using psychological techniques to help clients solve their emotional problems. In an unexpected turn of events, he is forced to take on the task of helping wealthy heiress Lin Wanqing escape pressure to get married, only to be drawn into a battle for a family inheritance due to a mix-up. The two go from scheming against each other to developing feelings for one another. Along the way, Lu Chen uses "deception" to resolve the Lin family's business crisis and expose his uncle's conspiracy.
霸姐带飞，假千金别闹 | "Domineering Sister Carries Me On, Fake Heiress, Stop Making Trouble"

Jia Bo YaThe shadows lurking in the darkness will eventually be crushed by the blazing sun—this is a vortex of revenge spanning two generations. Shen Qingnuan, the eldest daughter of the wealthy Shen family, wields a powerful hand in managing the conglomerate, only to discover the truth amidst the family's undercurrents: her pampered younger sister, Shen Mingzhu, for sixteen years, is a fraud whose life has been switched, while her true bloodline, Shen Qingyue, suffers endless abuse in the countryside. When the timid fledgling is pushed back into its gilded cage, the ghosts of old power struggles awaken from their graves. In the name of her elder sister, Shen Qingnuan clears away all obstacles for her returning younger sister, unaware that she has already stepped into a deeper game.
一品锦衣 | "First-Class Brocade Robe"

Zhang Yi Yang, Wang JingLi Xiaoya, a heavily indebted junior officer of the Imperial Guard, teams up with the seemingly cold but actually warm-hearted courtesan Yu Wanmian and her adorable and loyal but useless subordinates. Amidst court intrigues, they utilize methods such as "insurance system" and "salt-making innovation" to showcase the story of an underdog's great comeback through lighthearted, stress-relieving, and satisfyingly face-slapping moments.
娇宠甜野小孕妻 | "Pampering My Sweet and Wild Pregnant Wife"

Li Bin Hang, Sun Yi FeiLin Yang, a washed-up actress, is framed by her own mother and sister, and becomes pregnant after a one-night stand with Qin Jue, the president of the Qin Corporation, who is allergic to women but immune to her. To break her contract and make a comeback, she agrees to a "100 million yuan marriage" agreement, embarking on a marriage-of-convenience-to-love relationship with Qin Jue. After marriage, she confronts eccentric relatives, fights back against workplace shady practices, and returns to her peak through her own abilities. Qin Jue, on the other hand, transforms from a cold, wealthy tycoon into a fiercely protective husband, shielding her from all hardships. The two heal each other amidst the power struggles within the wealthy family and business crises, offering both sweet and romantic interactions and the satisfying feeling of a heroine's triumphant return.
大舅二舅三舅四舅，都被我带飞 | "My Uncles, Second Uncle, Third Uncle, and Fourth Uncle, All of Them Are Carried On by Me"

Zhang Yu Xuan, Yang Shu YinYao Yao borrowed money to bury her mother, but was abandoned in the suburbs by her aunt's family. Unexpectedly, she unlocked the ability to understand animal language and successfully hooked up with the richest man, Fu Jinhuai, becoming the young lady of the Fu family. Yao Yao also constantly used her skills to help the Fu family solve all kinds of troubles, and finally successfully melted the heart of her disabled uncle, Fu Shenyan, who initially disliked her, becoming the family's darling.
程少，你柔弱不能自理的夫人又打架了 | "Young Master Cheng, Your Delicate and Incapable Wife is Fighting Again"

Gu Yu Yang, Zhong Xiao Jin, Cui Yin Si HanXu Anran, the head of an overseas assassin organization, returns to China disguised as a poor college student to avenge her mother's persecution by the Shen family. Just then, the Shen family comes to her seeking a kidney donor for the critically ill Shen Xue. She uses this opportunity, leveraging her past act of saving the Cheng family's life, to arrange a marriage with Cheng Ancheng, the only son of the Cheng family. Cheng Ancheng falls in love with Xu Anran at first sight, believing her to be a delicate and innocent girl, and even after witnessing her take action, he remains steadfast in protecting his wife. The two work together to overcome the crisis, ultimately bankrupting the Shen family, bringing their enemies to justice, and transforming their sham marriage into true happiness.
重生七九年，我给未婚夫当保姆 | "Reborn in 1979, I Became My Fiancé's Nanny"

Huang Si Yu, Cui Xu Yu (RAW)In her previous life, Su Ye and her husband Gu Sinan were brought together by an arranged marriage by their parents. After twenty years of marriage, they became a bitter couple, and after seven miscarriages, she was diagnosed with kidney failure. On the operating table, Gu Sinan died donating a kidney to Su Ye. His only wish was that in the next life, he would have no further connection with her, so he could be with his beloved. Reborn in 1979, Su Ye proactively dissolved the engagement and severed ties, starting as a nanny for the Gu family and burying herself in her studies to prepare for the college entrance examination. While she and the gentle teacher Liang Jikai embarked on a new life together, Gu Sinan was filled with regret. Through daily comparisons, he came to understand his own heart, a truth he could never escape.
夜雾与枪吻 | "Night Fog and Gun Kiss"

Lin Shi Jie, Nui Xiang Lu (RAW)In her previous life, Lin Xinglan was betrayed and shot to death by Shen Qi on their tenth wedding anniversary. She also learned that her father had been murdered by her husband's scheme. She was saved by Lu Chenyuan before dying, filled with resentment. Later, she was unexpectedly reborn and returned to the day she was choosing her fiancé. Faced with a second chance, she tore up Shen Qi's photo and unexpectedly chose Lu Chenyuan, who had always silently protected her. Determined to rewrite her destiny, she sought revenge against Shen Qi and Zhao Mianmian, and together with Lu Chenyuan, revitalized the Lin family.

诱吻春色 | "A Seductive Kiss of Spring"

Xiong Yun Hao, Zhang Qiu ZiSong Qingyu, the last surviving member of the Song family, goes by the alias Yan Miao and infiltrates the Si family's opera troupe, plotting her revenge. With wisdom and courage, she meticulously plots, uncovering conspiracies, avenging blood debts, and ultimately bringing evil to its knees. 惊！逃荒路上每天和殿下亲亲抱抱 | "Shocking! Daily Kisses And Hugs With His Highness During the Escape From Famine"

Chen Yun Ting, Wang Lu QingModern-day goldfish spirit Jin Yu transmigrates to ancient times, bound to a death countdown system that requires her to stay close to the deposed crown prince Pei Xuan to extend her life. Holding hands for 1 hour, hugging for 2 hours, kissing for 24 hours, and sleeping for 1 year! To survive, she forcefully seduces the heavily injured and fleeing, cunning prince, leading from famine relief to their joint ascension to the throne. She uses the system to foresee disasters and save the people, bravely venturing into danger to remove a heart-devouring curse for him; he shields her from all storms, pampering her until she becomes the happiest empress of the dynasty. What begins as a life-extending scheme ends in a lifetime of companionship, a sweet romance intertwined with thrilling political intrigue, a mutually redemptive and healing story.
登对 | "A Perfect Match"

Jin Wang, Huan Yi XinQi Sinian and Zhong Xiran are childhood sweethearts who grew up together. He harbored a secret crush on Zhong Xiran for eleven years. After Zhong Xiran was abandoned by her first love, Huo Xin, he married her through a family-arranged marriage. After the marriage, he protected her in an awkward but affectionate way, helping her to resolve the past grievances with her first love, Huo Xin. 重生后，我成了冷面厂长的心尖宠 | "After Rebirth, I Became the Cold-Faced Factory Manager's Beloved"

Li Jun Liang, Zhao Zhao'erLin Wanqing is reborn in 1995. To avoid the fate of being framed by her cousin Lin Yurou in her previous life, she remarries Gu Chengchuan, the heir to the Gu family's clothing factory, known as the "Cold-Faced Second Uncle." Gu Chengchuan has secretly loved her for many years, and their marriage of convenience blossoms into love, leading to numerous misunderstandings and hilarious situations. Lin Wanqing starts her own business by setting up a clothing design stall, with Gu Chengchuan quietly supporting her. Together, they resolve internal family conflicts, and ultimately, the Gu family business grows and successfully goes public, creating a sweet and romantic entrepreneurial legend.
报告大小姐，天才男大是你老公 | "Report, Miss, the Genius Male Star is Your Husband"

Liu Hao Yuan, Zhong Xiao JinProfessor Lu, the "father of Chinese semiconductors," tragically died in an accident. His genius son, Lu Xingye, was rescued by Jiang Yan, the eldest daughter of the Jiang family, during his escape. The two formed an unbreakable bond in their childhood. Twelve years later, Jiang Yan, now the chairwoman of the Jiang Group, dedicates herself to chip research and development, searching for mathematical geniuses. She reunites with Lu Xingye, and the two join forces to fight against evil, protect their country and home, and find happiness together.
我的九尾狐男友 | "My Nine-Tailed Fox Boyfriend"

Ai Ke Li Ya, Zou Jia JiaA thousand years ago, the Demon Lord led his forces to attack the Heavenly Court, and Si Yan, the Nine-Tailed Fox God of Qingqiu, led his army to join the battle. During the decisive battle, his beloved Fu Ying sacrificed herself to protect him. Heartbroken, Si Yan gave her a spiritual pearl to help her reincarnate and vowed to find her. He then joined forces with others to seal the Demon Lord. Due to his heavy sins, he was banished to the mortal realm by the Heavenly Dao. A thousand years later, college student Su Zhenyue was in a car accident as a child, and her parents disappeared. She was rescued by a "Nine-Tailed Fox God." Using a Nine-Tailed Fox Wishing Coin, she relentlessly pursues the truth and accidentally meets Si Yan, the president of Shengshi Group—who bears the exact same appearance as the fox god from years ago. Si Yan is also searching for his reincarnated lover, Fu Ying.
真千金光宗耀祖，假千金配享太庙 | "A True Heiress Brings Glory to Her Ancestors, a Fake Heiress Deserves to Be Enjoyed in the Imperial Ancestral Temple"

Ai Ke Li Ya, Shu Xue ManSong Yuheng, possessing immense strength, was mistakenly adopted from a general's mansion and placed in a scholarly family, becoming a good-for-nothing with no knowledge, constantly belittled by her highly talented family members, to the point of questioning her existence. Once their identities were restored, the real heiress brought honor to her family through her talent, while the fake heiress achieved great military exploits and was honored with a place in the Imperial Ancestral Temple. Who says the real and fake heiresses have to compete? They can also shine like sisters.
穿书七零，鸡飞狗跳的下乡生活 | "Transmigrating into a Book in the 1970s: A Chaotic Rural Life"

Zhang Pei Bao (Ming Yang), Peng Dai DaiModern medical student Mingdai transmigrates into the body of an abused orphan in the 1970s, gaining a cheat-like spatial ability. She retaliates against her awful uncle's family, selling her job to trick her cousin into going to the countryside, selling her house for money, and subsequently being forced to go to the countryside herself. By a twist of fate, she chooses to live with Zhou Sinian, who suffers from post-war trauma. Unexpectedly, Zhou Sinian's true form is a glutton, and the two gradually develop trust. She uses Zhou Sinian to escape the ostracism of the educated youth and gains the approval of the brigade leader, the two becoming a unique "crazy couple" in the 1970s.* This real CP is finally back on the same drama. 驯服闫总这件小事 | "Taming President Yan: A Small Matter"

Jia Yan, Jin Ming23-year-old Han Tiaotiao, a financially strapped graduate, joins the Yan Group and unexpectedly gains the ability to unconsciously control her cold-faced boss, Yan Qinyao. She faces difficulties from colleagues but receives Yan Qinyao's secret protection, and the two gradually develop a rapport. Meanwhile, Yan Qinyao's younger brother, Yan Xiao, also begins pursuing her. During her career triumph, Han Tiaotiao realizes her feelings and chooses Yan Qinyao. She also helps resolve Yan Xiao's loss of control crisis and Gu Zhenhai's business conspiracy, revealing that their bond stems from a preordained marriage agreement on a magical tree. However, Yan Qinyao has already fallen deeply in love with her. Ultimately, Yan Qinyao's proposal is successful, and the two are married in front of family and friends. After marriage, Han Tiaotiao juggles her work and her flower shop, and unexpectedly becomes pregnant…
重生七零资本家小姐一心想离婚 | "Reborn in the 1970s: The Capitalist's Miss Wants a Divorce"

Wang Yan Rui, Li Zi YingSu Yao, the daughter of a capitalist, is unexpectedly reborn into the 1970s, where she finds herself trapped in an unhappy marriage. In her previous life, she was arranged by her family to marry a dull and conservative husband, leading a repressed and painful life. Reborn, Su Yao is determined to escape this marriage and pursue a free life. However, the road to divorce is fraught with difficulties: her husband's stubbornness, her family's opposition, and gossip from the outside world all become obstacles in her path. But with her wisdom and courage, she faces these challenges while striving to realize her self-worth. Whether she will ultimately succeed in divorcing and starting a new life remains to be seen.
傲娇小青梅甜又黏，又在偷看我了 | "My Arrogant Childhood Sweetheart is Clingy and Spying on Me Again"

Zhang Tian Cheng, Zhou JingYan Shu is reborn back to his freshman year of college, determined to make up for the regrets of his past life. He had missed his childhood sweetheart, Xu Mi'er, who suffered from congenital heart disease, due to a misunderstanding, leading to her death. After his rebirth, he decisively breaks up with his materialistic girlfriend, Jin Lili, and actively approaches Xu Mi'er. From changing his image and accompanying her to school to requesting tutoring and trying to join her team, he gradually resolves their differences. Faced with Xu Mi'er's inferiority complex and withdrawal caused by her illness, Yan Shu firmly confesses his love, promising to transfer to the medical school to study cardiac surgery to treat her. The two confirm their feelings for each other through mutual support, working together for a future, determined to rewrite the tragedy and walk hand in hand towards happiness.
月光下的千金契 | "The Heiress's Contract Under the Moonlight"

She then bumped into Ye Junbo, her brother Mu Zhiyuan's college classmate, and, in desperation, proposed hiring Ye Junbo to pretend to be her boyfriend to deceive her mother. Ye Junbo proposed a quick marriage, getting a marriage certificate with Mu Qing in a contractual whirlwind romance. Mu Qing thought Ye Junbo was a penniless young man, unaware that he was not only the heir of the prestigious Jun family but also the head of the Fengchen Group, and the person who had secretly loved her for eleven years. Under his attentive care, Mu Qing gradually fell in love with Junbo until she discovered his deceitful nature and decisively filed for divorce. Ye Junbo was filled with regret, facing a daunting task of winning her back.
夜染春色 | "Night Colors Spring"

Her supposed "benefactor" turns out to be her enemy, and her love is entangled in a deep-seated blood feud. When the truth is revealed, she is caught between love and hate, while he, at the cost of breaking with his family, stands up for her. This is a heart-wrenching urban romance interwoven with lies, revenge, and deep affection; it is also a battle of fate for reconciliation and eventual union.

Dying twice in one minute? This is too bad luck! The system tells me that I can be reborn by completing the mission of becoming a famous minister, or I will be erased and disappear forever if I fail! I urgently save myself and clear my name. My soul from the 21st century wants to change this feudal empire.
格林童话 | "Grimm's Fairy Tales"

Chen Tian Xiang, Zhu Xiao XueThe seemingly perfect goddess Jiang Ying is actually an imposter, a "shadow" who uses lies as armor to navigate the world of the powerful in order to help her grandmother escape the prison of a wealthy family. Ji Qingyan sees through all her pretenses, yet, torn between contempt and infatuation, he becomes the only one who walks towards her against the light. When the mask crumbles, his outstretched hand rewrites the ending—it turns out that the most dangerous hunter had already offered his true heart.
拯救我的黑白月光 | "Saving My Black and White Moonlight"

Li Zi Jie, Zhang Zi HanAudio anchor Jiang Yuwei unexpectedly contacts a listener named "Hei" who is trapped in a dangerous situation during her live broadcast. After guiding "Hei" to escape, "Hei" mysteriously disappears, leaving Jiang Yuwei with a lot of trouble. Just when Jiang Yuwei is at her wit's end, she reunites with the listener "Hei" in reality. It turns out that the listener "Hei's" real name is Lu Tingxiao, and she comes from the future three years in the future. Lu Tingxiao tells Jiang Yuwei that she will die in a year. Jiang Yuwei is unwilling to be controlled by fate and decides to join forces with Lu Tingxiao to fight against the mastermind behind the scenes. In the process, they fall in love with each other and finally successfully expose the mastermind behind the scenes, changing the ending of death.
装乖臣服，温小姐步步沦陷 | "Pretending to be Obedient and Submissive, Miss Wen Falls Step by Step"

Hou Peng Yan, Chen CiWhen Wen Li took her marriage certificate to the Civil Affairs Bureau to get a replacement after it was chewed up by a dog, she learned that the certificate was fake. He Xizhou had not only lied to her, but had also registered the marriage with the maid to please her. Wen Li then went to Peking University, chose a high-achieving male student, and gave birth to the Wen family's heir, unaware that she had incurred the wrath of a top-tier tycoon.
蓄谋已久的爱 | "A Long-Planned Love"

Wang Wei Yang, Li Yao YaoAfter being betrayed by her fiancé Lu Tingxuan, Shen Shuning decisively broke off their engagement. By chance, she had a whirlwind marriage with Lu Siyan, the head of the Lu family. After marriage, under Lu Siyan's protection, Shen Shuning shed her weakness and faced the scheming of her family of origin and the difficulties caused by her former fiancé and his adopted sister. Relying on her own strength and wisdom, she fought back, making all those who had hurt her pay the price, and ultimately gained true love and a happy life.
爱意燃尽，傅总追妻三千次 | "Love Burns Out, President Fu Pursues His Wife Three Thousand Times"

Wang Zi Yi, Jiang XinLin Shuyin, who once devoted her youth to Fu Jingnian, suffered neglect after marriage, the Lin family went bankrupt, and her parents passed away. After the divorce, she left for three years. Upon her return, she let go of her obsession and focused on investigating the truth behind her family's bankruptcy, only to unexpectedly reunite with Fu Jingnian. By this time, Fu Jingnian had already repented and embarked on a long journey to win back his wife. Lin Shuyin repeatedly faced danger during her investigation, and Fu Jingnian repeatedly risked his life to protect her. Amidst suspicion, testing, and fighting side by side, the two resolved past misunderstandings, exposed Li Dongyang's conspiracy, and ultimately not only brought justice to the Lin family but also rekindled their lost love, leading to a happy ending together.
妄想成真 | "Delusion Comes True"

Qiu Zhe Fu, Zhang Zhang (Zhang Yu Jiao)After her father's death, Sang Yuan, in order to comply with the will that only heirs could inherit, decided to abandon her father and keep her son. She mistook Xie Chengye, the son of the top underworld Qilin Society, for a male model. Xie Chengye, who needed to hide his identity and was deeply in love with Sang Yuan, took advantage of the situation and stayed by her side as her "adopted younger brother," secretly helping her clear obstacles.
大小姐，忠犬请签收 | "Please Sign for the Loyal Dog of the Young Lady"

Guan Ding Yi, Cao Qian YiHeiress Dai Baozhu unexpectedly sees comments on a live stream and learns that she is the villainous female supporting character in a novel, destined for a tragic end. To rewrite her fate, she confronts her scumbag fiancé, outwits her hypocritical cousin, and uses the cunning and ruthless villain Shen Zhaoye to break free from the shackles of the plot. During their time together, Dai Baozhu is moved by Shen Zhaoye's sincerity, and the two find mutual love at the pinnacle of power.
星光熠熠 | "Shining Stars"

Cao Jia Ze, Li Chun YiChen Xingguang, an artist at an entertainment company, was imprisoned and abused by Han Bing before committing suicide by jumping off a building. He was reborn three months in the past. To change his fate, he deliberately approached top actress Miao Yi, but developed feelings for her during their time together. Chen Xingguang feigned allegiance to Han Bing, but in reality, he colluded with Miao Yi to collect evidence of Han Bing's manipulation of artists and her involvement in power-for-sex transactions. During this time, he was repeatedly coerced, abused, and imprisoned by Han Bing, and framed by Xu Yibai, which led to a breakdown in Chen Xingguang's relationship with Miao Yi, almost causing him to repeat the fate of his previous life. In the end, the misunderstanding between the two was resolved, Miao Yi rescued Chen Xingguang, and changed Chen Xingguang's destiny in his previous life.
乖，嫁我!别逼我求你 | "Marry Me, Don't Force Me to Beg You"

Wang Ming Yang, Dong Ai Ni"It's okay if you're married. You break up with him, I'll give him a hundred million and ten women. It's okay if you have a child, I won't have one. From now on, he'll be my own son!" After parting ways at the orphanage, he searched for her for fifteen years. When they met again, it was a fierce battle! "As long as you're still breathing, you can get married today, and we'll play piano music. If you don't, we'll call a suona band!" Hahahaha!
穿成恶毒女配被京圈太子缠上了 | "Transmigrated as a Villainous Supporting Character and Becomes Entangled with the Crown Prince of Beijing"

Feng Wen Dong, Sun Yi FeiRenowned designer Jin Zhao transmigrates into a novel as a villainous supporting character, bound to a villain system that requires her to foster the romance between the original male and female leads. To avoid a tragic end, she clings to her arranged marriage husband, Wei Ting, a princeling in Beijing's elite circles, shedding her original sycophantic attitude and undergoing a radiant transformation, slapping everyone in the face. As they spend time together, feelings develop between them. Jin Zhao helps Wei Ting navigate family infighting, while Wei Ting protects her. She repeatedly overcomes plot holes while completing system tasks, ultimately not only successfully changing her own and everyone else's fate and breaking free from the system's constraints, but also achieving a happy ending with Wei Ting, officially announcing their blissful life together.
旧月曾照故人归 | "The Old Moon Once Shines on the Return of an Old Friend"

Li Xiang Yu, Ding DingBai Lu, the heiress of the Bai Group, maintains a secret romantic relationship with her bodyguard, Jiang Mochen. This unequal relationship begins to crack after Bai Lu's fiancé, Shen Nanfeng, returns to the country. To maintain their business marriage, Bai Lu, at Shen Nanfeng's instigation, repeatedly humiliates Jiang Mochen in public, including forcing him to kneel at a welcome banquet, punishing him by pushing him into an ice pool after the death of his beloved dog, and ultimately abandoning Jiang Mochen by taking Shen Nanfeng with her when they are attacked. Heartbroken, Jiang Mochen decides to leave the Bai family, only to discover during his investigation into his past that he is the orphan of a drug enforcement hero.
问灵＆明月千里寄相思 | "Asking the Spirit & Sending Longing Across a Thousand Miles with the Bright Moon"

Huang Xiao, Han Feng'erYunniang's husband, Song Xu, rejected the princess's advances. In retaliation, the princess killed Yunniang and dumped her body in front of him. Yunniang, now a spirit, watched helplessly as Song Xu left with the princess without shedding a single tear for her. Yunniang believed Song Xu was a scoundrel who had climbed the social ladder, while the princess thought she had won the heart of a beautiful woman. However, neither woman realized that Song Xu was actually the most powerful sorcerer in Yunhuang; his feigned obedience was merely a ploy to help Yunniang defy fate.
流放路上，娘子无双 | "On the Road to Exile, My Wife is Unparalleled"

Wu Hao, Yang Yi Mo (RAW)In her past life, Lu Wan, a merchant's daughter, sacrificed everything for her husband's family during their exile, only to be betrayed when her husband colluded with her sister-in-law, demoting her to a concubine and causing her to die of anger. Reborn, Lu Wan decides not to support her ungrateful husband's family again. This time, she chooses to conceal her identity, disguising herself as a constable to silently protect her young general, Chu Yanxiu. However, her scumbag husband remains unconvinced, believing that Lu Wan chose Chu Yanxiu only to spite him.
真仙下凡，老婆竟是玄凤之体 | "A True Immortal Descends to Earth, and My Wife is Actually a Phoenix"

Wang Bing Xiang, Jiang Xin Yan (RAW)Lu Ming was originally a true immortal in the celestial realm, but due to his eccentric behavior, he was punished by heaven and reincarnated into the mortal world, becoming the head of the Lu family, one of the four ancient martial arts families. He also has a beautiful wife, Lin Qingxue, who was chosen by heaven to cultivate a divine body. However, the Lu family is now facing a life-or-death crisis. The original Lu Ming was also known as the "shame of the Lu family" because of his cowardly character. He didn't even dare to climb into his wife's bed after five years of marriage, and the Lu family is entirely supported by Lin Qingxue. Lu Ming smiled crookedly, "Whether or not we cultivate together or not, I don't care at all. But restoring the glory of the Lu family is my duty!"
千金撩宠：沈总他步步诱婚 | "A Rich Girl's Pampered Darling: President Shen Seduces Me Step by Step into Marriage"

Zhang Xiao Yu, Gu Si SiJi Qingtang, the daughter of the Ji family, and Shen Jinyu, the president of the Shen Group, are married through a business arrangement. They appear loving in public, but friction exists behind the scenes. Their relationship evolves from playful bickering and testing of each other to a gradual development of ambiguity, only to be jeopardized by a scandal that plunges them into a crisis of trust. It's only when they travel abroad together to care for a seriously ill family member that they finally see each other's true feelings, allowing their marriage, initially based on mutual benefit, to quietly transform into one of deep affection.
云深不知晚 | "Deep in the Clouds, I Know No Time is Late"

Ma Qian Huan, Chen CiSix years ago, Lin Wanwan was deceived by her boyfriend Zhang Wenzhe, who not only stole her design plans but also betrayed her feelings. While drunk, she unexpectedly became involved with Gu Yunting, the president of the Gu Group, and gave birth to his child. Six years later, having successfully lost weight, Lin Wanwan takes her sick son Yangyang to the doctor, where she reunites with Zhang Wenzhe and his girlfriend Su Xiaoyue, only to be humiliated. Fortunately, she receives powerful protection from Old Madam Gu!
长亭映晚潇 | "The Long Pavilion Reflects the Evening Breeze"

Wang Yu Wei, Wang Wan ZhongNing Wanxiao, the legitimate daughter of the Duke of Zhenguo, dies tragically at the hands of Emperor Murong Xu. She volunteers to become a palace maid, hiding deep within the palace, vowing revenge by assassinating the emperor. To break her pride, Murong Xu orders Consort Liu to administer aphrodisiac poison and sends guards to humiliate her. Ning Wanxiao escapes desperately, stumbling into the pavilion of Wei Changting, the head of the Western Depot. Wei Changting is actually Li Changting, the former crown prince, who has disguised himself as a eunuch for ten years to take charge of the Western Depot. He too is determined to avenge his father and restore his kingdom, and considers Ning Wanxiao his beloved since childhood. The two form an alliance to jointly confront the crisis.

云渺5：天道终局 | "Yunmiao 5: The End of Heaven's Way"

Lan Bo, Wang Xiao Yi, Xue Bin Hong, Guo JingOn her deathbed, the Empress of the Great Qian Dynasty lingered, unable to let go of her unresolved inner turmoil, while her three princes engaged in fierce competition for the throne. At this critical moment, Yun Miao, dressed in white, suddenly entered the capital, claiming she could help the Empress pass away peacefully, but was met with skepticism and suppression from the princes. However, when she appeared in the palace, the dying Empress miraculously revived, kneeling before her and acknowledging her as "Miss." The royal family was shocked, treating Yun Miao as an honored guest. The secrets Yun Miao uncovered within the royal family, however, unraveled a shocking conspiracy interwoven with kinship, power, and obsession.
重生90：富豪榜我排第一，牛排第二 | "Reborn in the 90s: I'm Number One on the Rich List, Steak is Number Two"

Gan Wang Xing, Yue Yu Ting (Advertisement Drama)In 2025, Chief Livestock Nutrition Officer Yin Lili unexpectedly travels back to 1999, becoming a bride forced into marriage by her gambling-addicted aunt. She resolutely refuses the marriage and makes a bet with Gu Youran, a wealthy man, promising to double her debt within three days and successfully annul the engagement. Leveraging her 26-years-advanced professional knowledge, she writes a dairy cow breeding plan and applies for a high-paying job, earning the appreciation of her mentor, Professor Wang. However, her aunt impersonates her, stealing her job and salary. In a critical moment, Gu Youran produces the original plan as evidence, and Professor Wang exposes the lie. Ultimately, Yin Lili clears her name, her relationship with Gu Youran deepens, and she resolves to share her technology to help the rise of China's dairy industry.
灾年逆袭，我搬空渣夫全家成了诰命夫人 | "A Year of Disaster: I Empty My Scumbag Husband's Whole Family and Became a Noble Lady"

Guo Jia Nan, Wang Lu QingChi Yu transmigrates into the body of a cannon fodder female supporting character in a famine-stricken novel. Facing her scumbag husband Qi Mingyu, who inherits two households, and his wicked mother-in-law's family, she uses her spatial ability to retrieve her sold child, empties her in-laws' possessions, and then forcefully divorces them. She foretells a freezing rain disaster and leads Chi Family Village in stockpiling food and clothing, building kang beds, and planting vegetables, ensuring the entire village survives the crisis safely. During this time, she falls in love with Qin Mu, who appears to be a jinx but is actually the heir of the Marquis of Zhenyuan. She makes medicine to save lives, outwits the government, and is eventually granted the title of a third-rank imperial lady, living happily ever after with Qin Mu.* This is long drama actors pairing lol
心动指令：带我逃婚＆玫瑰窃贼 | "Heartbeat Command: Take Me Away from My Marriage & Rose Thief"

Huang Jing Zhou (Xiao Tai), Long Yi Yi (Wang Jin)Repair shop hustler Lu Yu accidentally kidnaps Ye Wanqing, who is on her engagement, only to be manipulated by this seemingly docile but actually rebellious "canary." She secretly helps him escape and makes a deal with him to "kidnap" her again at her wedding to Zhou Xun, the adopted son of the Zhou family. With each adventure, the mystery of Lu Yu's past is revealed—he is actually the biological son of Zhou Ye, a Hong Kong tycoon. The two redeem each other amidst power struggles and betrayals, working together to break free from family control and overcome obstacles from all sides, ultimately finding a way out through truth and true love.
太子爷的掌心离婚妻 | "The Prince's Divorced Wife"

Zhang Pei Bao, Yang Yun XuanLuo Caiwei suffers from her husband Shen Qingyan's infidelity and family machinations, and after their divorce, she unexpectedly meets Fu Zheng, a wealthy heir in Beijing's elite circles. From an initial "sugar baby" arrangement to joining forces to fight a dark organization and uncover the truth behind a family secret, their feelings for each other gradually blossom amidst suspicion and protectiveness. Faced with the return of her beloved Xie Yu and the entanglements of family feuds, Luo Caiwei finally understands her own heart, overcomes the barriers of social status with Fu Zheng, and finds true love and justice.
校草的心动陷阱 | "The School Prince's Heart-Fluttering Trap"

Xia Hou Yi Han, Xu DanRuan Wu only learned at the last moment of her nemesis Shen Yehui's life that he had been deeply in love with her for ten years. Reborn into a high school classroom, Ruan Wu, facing Shen Yehui who mocked her ten years ago, decides to start flirting with him now. Despite Shen Yehui's apparent indifference, she does not back down, but in the end, she is flirted with by Shen Yehui in return. The story is one of gaining love, family, friendship, and a successful career.
只争朝夕 | "Seize the Day"

Liu Run Ming, Kang Yu Qian, Ling XuanIn order to save his father, Xie Chaoxi gave Zuo Rongjing clues and closed his eyes. When he woke up, he found that he had gone back to 20 years ago, when his father Xie Mingwei was about to hit Rongjing's arm at the critical moment. Xie Chaoxi saved Rongjing and changed the future. Step by step, she succeeded in bringing Rong Jing and Xie Mingwei closer together. Later, Xie Chaoxi was surprised to find that her parents' first acquaintance was completely different from what she knew in her previous life. She suspected that her arrival had affected the development of the past, and how she would change everything.
顾先生的落跑甜 | "Mr. Gu's Sweet Runaway"

Tan Xu Zhe, Xue Qi HuiJiang Hui, who was forced by her adoptive father to get married, had a one-night stand with Gu Yanbei, the blind richest man in Los Angeles by chance. Three months later, the pregnant Jiang Hui was found to have a congenital disease in her child. In order to pay for the surgery after the child was born, Jiang Hui came to the Gu family and worked as Gu Yanbei's life assistant, starting a life of making money and saving the baby by herself. What she didn't know was that Gu Yanbei was going crazy trying to find her.
二婚上上签 | "A Lucky Second Marriage"

Yuan Liu Zhe, Zhao ShuaiSu Xiaomi, who is divorced and has a baby, is oppressed by her original family. Fortunately, Jiang Ze comes to help, and the two develop a mutual affection for each other as they get along. Faced with multiple obstacles such as the traditional prejudice of her mother-in-law, the malicious instigation of her ex-girlfriend, and the entanglement of her original family, Su Xiaomi sticks to the bottom line and achieves a career counterattack, while Jiang always firmly protects and runs in both directions. In the end, the two got rid of their prejudices and got married, gave birth to twins, and resolved family conflicts. They used practical actions to interpret the growth and perfection of women that "true love has nothing to do with marriage history, and happiness requires courage to strive for."
互换人生后，小小姐被全家宠上天 | "After Swapping Lives, the Little Miss is Pampered by Her Whole Family"

Cheng Zi Han, Yang Yuan YuanYouwei and her sister Keke were reborn and returned to the day they were adopted. Faced with Keke's frame-up, Youwei gave up the "fire pit" of the Xie family, the richest man in Shanghai, to her, and chose the "ordinary" Su family, not wanting the Su family to be the richest man in China. With her wisdom and past life memories, Youwei successfully transformed her two "rebellious" brothers and gained the ultimate love from her family. Because the villain accused him of a conspiracy to "acknowledge the thief as his father", the Su family was forced to "chasing the girl in the crematorium", and finally worked together to reveal the truth and slap the villain in the face. From an orphan in a welfare home to an heir to a wealthy family, Youwei healed the trauma of her past life in the warmth of family love, reversed her tragic fate, and finally lived a winner surrounded by love.
蒹葭 | "Reeds and Rushes"

Liu Shang Lin, Li Jia Yuan ZiThe general died in battle and his body was hung in the enemy city. His wife, Yan Zhaoyun, sneaked into the enemy camp alone, endured humiliation, hijacked the enemy general, and retrieved her husband's body. On her way back, she was blocked by her own soldiers, who forced her to bury her dead husband in the wilderness. She fought to the death. After escaping, he encountered ambushes and pursuers one after another. In a desperate situation, how can a woman lead her late husband back to her homeland through thousands of miles of smoke and smoke with her own courage?
江南又逢卿 | "Meeting You Again in Jiangnan"

Wang Zi Ming, Li Mi'erSix years ago, she cruelly broke up with him. Six years later, to keep her job, she begged top writer Jiang Nan on her knees, only to stumble into the arms of her first love, Jiang Jinyue! A drunken kiss was caught on camera, workplace harassment compounded by family feuds—her father turned out to be her family's murderer? A tumultuous reunion unfolds, a chaotic and heart-wrenching tale. Can the top writer, who has harbored deep feelings for her for six years, rekindle her long-dormant heart? This belated romance is a double whammy of sweetness and heartbreak!
金屋藏他 | "Hiding Him in a Golden House"

Zhao Zi Lu, Ma HuaYan Shuang has been married to Song Siming for three years, but he treats her coldly with a three-point agreement: "no love, no children, no formal status." By chance, she encounters Song Siming's half-brother, Song Zhiye, the heir to the Song family. He passionately professes his love and promises her everything she desires. When media gossip leads to a confrontation, Song Zhiye bluntly states that he wants her to be his wife, only to be caught in the act by Song Siming. The two high-achieving men fight over her, forcing her to choose between them, and in the process, Yan Shuang gradually rediscovers herself.
他尝遍她的苦 | "He Tasted All Her Bitterness"

Wang Yu Bo, Zhao Zhao'erYe Ning transmigrates into a tragic romance novel, becoming the female lead, bullied by the male protagonist Fu Zhizhou and the scheming female supporting character Gu Xueru. The system grants her the cheat ability to swap physical sensations with Fu Zhizhou—her injuries will reflect back onto him. Ye Ning uses this ability to relentlessly humiliate him, making Fu Zhizhou experience her pain firsthand and gradually see Gu Xueru's true colors. When her fake heiress identity is exposed, Fu Zhizhou regrets his actions, but Ye Ning is already determined to divorce him. Ultimately, she completes her mission, returning to reality with a reward of billions, while the world within the book is completely rewritten because of her.
王牌翻译官，80肥妻不好惹 | "The Ace Translator's 80-Year-Old Fat Wife is Not to be Messed With"

Yang Hao Ran, Su Wen WenIn the drama, the female lead is a talented translator, but due to an unexpected weight gain, she faces ridicule and ostracism. However, with her outstanding translation skills and resilient character, she achieves a comeback in both her career and personal life. Facing her husband's misunderstanding and external prejudice, she does not back down, using her wisdom and courage to defend her dignity. In solving one problem after another, she not only achieves success in her career but also earns the respect of her husband and those around her, staging a wonderful story of a "fat wife" transforming into a top performer.
轻吻蝴蝶谷 | "A Light Kiss in Butterfly Valley"

Si Kan, Hai Yi FanA romantic drama blending urban romance, family feuds, and revenge. The story revolves around Zhu Miaomiao, a dance major who is forced into a deal with Duan Siyu, the heir to a wealthy family in Macau, in order to save her critically ill grandmother. Initially using and testing each other, the two gradually develop genuine love, facing pressure from the Huo family, internal strife within the Duan family, and the shadows of their past together. The plot is full of tension, intertwining emotional entanglements with power struggles, ultimately leading to redemption and reunion.
沉入他的月光海 | "Sinking into His Moonlight Sea"

Li Xing Lin, Lin Zi XuanRising dance star Jiang Jiu, seeking the truth behind her sister's mysterious death, infiltrates a wealthy family as an avenger, only to become entangled in a deadly power struggle and forbidden love between the Gu brothers. Jiang Jiu's first step is to join Lin Qinwan's dance troupe, where she meets the eldest son of the Gu family. If Jiang Jiu obeys him, the Gu family president will give her a large sum of money and arrange for her mother to stay in the best hospital. Jiang Jiu signs a contract with him.
