不当太子侧妃后，我被王爷宠成宝 | "After Renouncing My Role as the Crown Prince's Concubine, I Was Pampered by the Prince"

Wang Xuan, Mi QiGu Xiyuan, to help her cousin, Crown Prince Xiao Jinchen, with disaster relief efforts, donated 200,000 taels of silver in exchange for his promise of becoming his only Crown Princess. Unexpectedly, upon his successful return, he conspired with her father to seize her title of County Princess and Crown Princess, bestowing them upon her half-sister. Heartbroken and betrayed by her family, Gu Xiyuan finally realized her mistake and refused to remain a submissive legitimate daughter. She emptied the Marquis's mansion, angrily kicked out the scumbag, helped her mother divorce, and even offered 10,000 taels of gold as a dowry to buy the position of Princess from the cold-faced Prince Yan, Xiao Xuan. From then on, she wielded her business empire, meticulously planning every step, determined to make all those who wronged her regret their actions!
拆家野玫瑰 | "The Wild Rose Who Destroyed the House"

Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), Ma Le JieDissatisfied with an arranged marriage, Xie Yanli hastily finds Lu Xiaoqiu, a butcher, to be his contract bride. Lu Xiaoqiu agrees for money, putting on a dramatic performance, taking revenge on Xie Yanli's savior, and gradually uncovering the secret of Xie Yanli's savior and Lu Xiaoqiu's true identity. Meanwhile, the two fall in love, a story destined by fate.
弃婿后，我自成凰 | "After Being Abandoned as a Son-in-Law, I Became a Phoenix"

Li Zhuo Yang, Mai TongGeneral Duan Rufei of the Great Xia Dynasty was initially in love with Chen Zheng, one of the three prospective sons-in-law chosen by her father. However, she unexpectedly stumbled upon his secret rendezvous with the slave girl Xiao Yu'er and discovered that Chen Zheng only wanted to use her to seize military power within the Duan family army. Heartbroken, she then sought to marry Crown Prince Murong Yan. Later, Duan Rufei confronted the provocations of Chen Zheng and his associates, revealing the truth about Xiao Yu'er's status as a slave in the brothel. Step by step, she plotted and retaliated against the villains, fighting and seizing power, ultimately becoming a female ruler.
渐入佳婚2 | "Gradually Entering a Perfect Marriage 2"

Xia Ning Jun, Yu Yu Tong[PART 1]Wenxi, whose identity is misplaced, finds order in a business marriage. Her husband, Shang Chen, is strict and rigid, yet he researches "how to write love letters" for her and defends her against all slander. When outsiders question whether their marriage is merely a transaction, Wenxi asks him under a sky full of fireworks, "What else is there between us besides cooperation?" He leans down and places a long-awaited wedding ring on her finger; the answer is self-evident.
星河为聘 | "The Milky Way as Dowry"

Li Pei Yang, Yu LingShen Yun, a terminally ill office worker, transmigrated into a fantasy romance short drama before her death, becoming a cannon fodder junior sister. Bound to a system, she must win the favor of destined heroes like Song Quan, Yue Mang, and Ye Hansheng to prolong her life. Rejecting the tragic romance, she focuses on cultivating immortality, venturing into secret realms, seizing magical treasures, and breaking through illusions. She ultimately triumphs in the cultivation competition, gradually unlocking her power. During this time, she uncovers the price her senior sister Bai Qimeng paid to save her, joins forces with her chosen one to fight against the Demon Lord Yan Hua, and after enduring life-or-death trials, not only survives and advances in cultivation but also finds true love, ultimately defeating the Demon Lord and protecting those she cherishes.
爱迟了很多年 | "Love Came Too Late"

Qian Zhe, Wang Yi YangAfter enduring three years of abuse, Shen Shu took the initiative to dump her domineering ex-husband, bidding farewell to her forbearance and focusing wholeheartedly on her career. Romantic opportunities kept coming her way. While her ex-husband was still furious about the "aborted" child, she had already become a beacon of light for him, an unattainable figure. It wasn't until the domineering CEO humbled himself and desperately tried to win her back that he realized getting her back was harder than climbing to heaven.
撞到唯一的救星 | "Bumping into the Only Savior"

Jin Ze, Ye Shu YuWaking up after a car accident, Song Xiaoxiao discovers she can see everyone's life countdown, with "7 days" clearly displayed above her head. To secure her hardworking mother's future, she storms into the Chu Group with an insurance brochure, only to accidentally bump into Chu Nianyi, the eldest son of the Chu family, in the elevator. This CEO, who suffers from "opposite-sex contact allergy," is the only person who has extended her life, and she is also the antidote to Chu Nianyi's allergy to the opposite sex. Due to a family agreement that "marriage is required to inherit the group," the two unwittingly sign a contract. Song Xiaoxiao joins Chu Group as an "assistant," frequently approaching Chu Nianyi under the guise of "extending her life."
我的王妃扮猪吃虎 | "My Princess Pretends to Be a Fool to Catch a Tiger"

Chen Zheng Yang, Yu Xin YiModern mercenary Wen Yu transmigrates into the body of the daughter of the Prime Minister of Dongli Kingdom, only to be forced to disguise herself as a man and become known as the "most incompetent fool in the capital." Intending to retire with her father, she is unexpectedly chosen as the top scholar in the imperial examinations after casually drawing a turtle, thus becoming embroiled in court intrigues. To protect herself, she targets the cold-faced Regent Yan Chuxiao, feigning a desire for protection, only to be misunderstood as a homosexual. Amidst their scheming and testing, feelings develop between them. When her true identity as a woman is exposed and imperial intrigue looms large, the man who once found her troublesome suddenly stands before her with a sword, declaring, "Anyone who touches her will die."
夫人她只会养猪 | "My Wife Only Knows How to Raise Pigs"

Ma Xiao Fan, Wu Yi QiaoSu Ye, the second daughter of the Su family in Longcheng, raised pigs in the countryside from a young age. Forced by her parents to marry Shen Wubing, the sickly eldest son of the Shen family, in place of her sister, she was forced to feign illness to protect herself after her parents' death and persecution by her uncle, Shen Jianjun. After the marriage, Su Ye cured Shen Wubing's anorexia using unorthodox methods, subdued Shen Jianjun with her bare hands, and won over Grandma Shen with her rural wisdom; the two gradually developed feelings for each other. Later, Shen Wubing revealed his healthy physique and strength, and together with Su Ye, they collected evidence of Shen Jianjun's crimes, successfully protecting the Shen family's business. Ultimately, Su Ye broke free from the shackles of her dysfunctional family and found happiness with Shen Wubing.
公主又美又飒 | "The Ninth Princess is Both Beautiful and Cool"

Xi Er Li, Huang Yun YunModern military doctor Chu Qingge transmigrates into the body of the Ninth Princess of the Great Chu Dynasty, immediately facing the desperate situation of being strangled to death by the Crown Prince Feng Liye on their wedding night. She uses her talents to reverse her tarnished reputation, exposes the two-faced nature of the scheming Princess Chu Weiyun, and, after joining the army on a campaign against Mo City, repeatedly achieves remarkable feats using her medical skills and combat command abilities, such as saving a seriously wounded general, deciphering enemy tactics, and controlling a plague within the army. During this process, Feng Liye's initial dislike and misunderstanding gradually transforms into attraction to her; the two go from enemies to fighting side-by-side, their feelings deepening. Ultimately, through countless life-and-death experiences together, they confirm their love and become a couple.
重生觉醒，这次我不做恋爱脑 | "Reborn and Awakened, This Time I Won't Be a Love-Obsessed Person"

Ou Jing Xiao, Wu Fei XueLin Wu, a wealthy heiress, is betrayed by her lover and family, suffering the destruction of her home and family. Reborn into the past, she vows to defy fate. She decisively breaks off her engagement, tears apart the scumbag and the scheming woman, and secretly gathers evidence of her uncle's embezzlement of the family fortune. In the process of protecting her family, she unexpectedly finds her younger brother who was lost in childhood, and her broken family regains its warmth. At the same time, she hires Xu Jingwang, a future business tycoon—a poor but academically gifted student—as her tutor, and the two develop feelings for each other while protecting and supporting one another. Lin Wu is no longer a spoiled heiress; with her foresight and wisdom, she joins hands with her lover and family, carefully plotting step by step, and ultimately exposes all the conspiracies.
涅槃千金：教母的华丽蜕变 | "Nirvana of the Heiress: The Godmother's Magnificent Transformation"

Yu Xing Chen, Yang JieXia Hua, the second daughter of the Song family, seeks revenge with a dual identity. By day, she's a pushover; by night, she transforms into the "godmother" of a socialite training program. To avenge her deceased stepbrother, she orchestrates a scheme within Beijing's elite social circles, using a Go bet to secure a promise from Xie Yuchen, the heir to the Xie family, and also plotting to humiliate her sister. Xie Yuchen sees through her act but is captivated by her intelligence, secretly promising to protect her after several encounters. Xia Hua proceeds with meticulous planning. Xie Yuchen, knowing she's using him, willingly becomes her pawn. When Xie Yuchen is shot protecting her, Xia Hua finally emerges as the leader of a phoenix-like rebirth, bringing billions in assets to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with Xie Yuchen, announcing the Song family's downfall, and finding love amidst her vengeance.
失忆后前夫对我蓄谋已久 | "My Ex-Husband Had Been Plotting Against Me After My Amnesia"

Cao Jun Ke, Cao Jia YiLin Zhiyao suffers amnesia due to a kidnapping and car accident, forgetting her marriage to her wealthy ex-husband Shen Yanting and the pain of losing her child. She reunites with Shen Yanting during a blind date. After searching for Lin Zhiyao for three years, Shen Yanting, facing his amnesiac and distant ex-wife, is both jealous and furious, while secretly protecting her. Meanwhile, Lin Zhiyao, in the process of exploring her past memories, is caught between Shen Yanting and the gentle doctor Cui Ziming. Ultimately, she exposes her cousin Lin Hanshan's conspiracy, clears up misunderstandings with Shen Yanting, and reconciles with him.
窃君心 | "Stealing Your Heart"

Cao Jun Ke, Yi MengTo escape her life of dependence, the orphaned Su Wansi sets her sights on her cousin, Xue Zeli—the heir to the Xue State Duke's mansion. She skillfully navigates the power struggle between the heir's mistress, Su Miaoyan, and her cousin, Shi Yilan. Initially disliked by her scheming, the heir discovers her intelligence and resilience through a series of events, and his feelings evolve from pity to love. After enduring trials such as poisoning, assassination attempts, and a fire, the heir sees through her facade but loves her true self even more. Ultimately, he obtains an imperial decree to formally marry her. Despite being an orphan, Su Wansi, through her wisdom and strategy, wins the heir's heart and the position of mistress of the Duke's mansion, achieving a reversal of her fate.
娘娘吉人自有天相 | "Your Majesty is Blessed by Heaven"

Fu Bang Qi, Hu Yao WenOn her first day in the palace, Su Xing consulted a fortune teller and discovered that she could win simply by lying low. She believed it. So, she spent her days eating and sleeping, avoiding all palace intrigue. However, by chance, Su Xing helped Consort Liu find her cat. From then on, Su Xing's peaceful life was disrupted. But determined to be a carefree, laid-back woman, she wouldn't give in. Watch how she handles every situation and ultimately achieves her dream of a carefree life, unexpectedly contributing to peace within the palace.
明月照晚秋＆女帝是我前任，新帝是我老婆 | "The Bright Moon Shines on Late Autumn & The Empress Was My Ex, the New Emperor Is My Wife"

Fu Bang Qi, Wen QingSong Ci, a disciple of Zhuge Liang, and Princess Gu Lanyue are both reborn. In their previous life, Song Ci helped Gu Lanyue ascend the throne as Empress but was tragically poisoned. In this life, he refuses to repeat the same mistake. The Princess, still obsessed with the throne, colludes with Song Jianglin, who impersonates a master of fortune-telling, to repeatedly frame Song Ci and the kind-hearted Third Princess Gu Wanqiu. After Song Ci uncovers the conspiracy, he helps Gu Wanqiu fake her death to avoid disaster. Ultimately, Princess Gu Lanyue's attempt to stage a coup with foreign enemies fails, and she even publicly kidnaps the old emperor, declaring, "The throne is best seized!"
娇宠蔷薇 | "Pampered Rose"

Yang Yan Guang, Zhi PengThis drama tells the story of Jiang Yuwei, the adopted daughter of the Mo family, who becomes the laughingstock of the city on her wedding day when her three brothers, Mo Xingzhou, Mo Yunjing, and Mo Zihao, elope with their savior, Lu Zhaozhao. In despair, she hastily marries Gu Linghan, a mysterious global tycoon, starting a new life. After the marriage, the three young masters of the Mo family repeatedly harass and humiliate Jiang Yuwei, while Lu Zhaozhao constantly plots against her. Gu Linghan remains steadfast in his protection of Jiang Yuwei, exposing Lu Zhaozhao's lie about claiming her life-saving grace and causing the Mo family to go bankrupt. Jiang Yuwei gradually lets go of the past and falls truly in love with Gu Linghan. Mo Xingzhou, driven by love turned to hate, kidnaps Jiang Yuwei but is eventually subdued.
重生后我成了校花的渣夫 | "After Rebirth, I Became the School Beauty's Scumbag Husband"

Yu Hai Bin, Li Qian Le (RAW)The story follows Lin Chuan, a rising business tycoon, who is unexpectedly reborn back to his university days. He discovers that in his previous life, his philandering and cold-heartedness led to the tragic death of his beloved college sweetheart, Su Wanrou. Reborn, he resolves to rewrite his destiny, transforming from a scumbag husband who constantly opposes Su Wanrou into a devoted protector. In the drama, Lin Chuan not only faces the conspiracies of his business rivals but also dispels Su Wanrou's misunderstandings, gradually melting the ice in her heart with his sincerity. As the story unfolds, the two work together to overcome a family crisis, ultimately finding true love, and Lin Chuan undergoes a transformation from a carefree cynic to a responsible individual.
星夜沉沦 | "Starry Night's Fall"

Chen Si, Liu Xi Yu (RAW)To save her critically ill mother, Lin Qingzhu makes a deal with Chu Nanhe. Little does she know that he is actually Chu Guanxing, reborn, whose obsession in his previous life led to Lin Qingzhu's suicide. Now, filled with remorse, he returns with a new identity, clearing obstacles for her while suppressing his surging love. Lin Qingzhu, in protecting him, senses that the gentle and refined Chu Nanhe, who harbors a hidden sharpness, is intricately connected to the tragedy of her past life.
⬅️[PREV]2 January Releases:1. 不当太子侧妃后，我被王爷宠成宝

Wang Xuan, Mi Qi[HERE]2. 拆家野玫瑰 - Chen Gang (Chen Bai Qiao), Ma Le Jie[HERE]3. 弃婿后，我自成凰 - Li Zhuo Yang, Mai Tong[HERE]4. 渐入佳婚2 - Xia Ning Jun, Yu Yu Tong[HERE]5. 星河为聘 - Li Pei Yang, Yu Ling[HERE]6. 爱迟了很多年 - Qian Zhe, Wang Yi Yang[HERE]7. 撞到唯一的救星 - Jin Ze, Ye Shu Yu[HERE]8. 我的王妃扮猪吃虎 - Chen Zheng Yang, Yu Xin Yi[HERE]9. 夫人她只会养猪 - Ma Xiao Fan, Wu Yi Qiao[HERE]10. 九公主又美又飒 - Xi Er Li, Huang Yun Yun[HERE]11. 重生觉醒，这次我不做恋爱脑 - Ou Jing Xiao, Wu Fei Xue[HERE]12. 涅槃千金：教母的华丽蜕变 - Yu Xing Chen, Yang Jie[HERE]13. 失忆后前夫对我蓄谋已久 - Cao Jun Ke, Cao Jia Yi[HERE]14. 窃君心 - Cao Jun Ke, Yi Meng[HERE]15. 娘娘吉人自有天相 - Fu Bang Qi, Hu Yao Wen[HERE]16. 明月照晚秋＆女帝是我前任，新帝是我老婆 - Fu Bang Qi, Wen Qing[HERE]17. 娇宠蔷薇 - Yang Yan Guang, Zhi Peng[HERE]18. 重生后我成了校花的渣夫 - Yu Hai Bin, Li Qian Le[HERE]19. 星夜沉沦 - Chen Si, Liu Xi Yu[HERE]20. 触碰玫瑰 - Liang Si Wei, Sun Qian Xun[HERE]
穿书后，我攻略了权臣首辅 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Conquered the Powerful Minister"

Li You Lin, Shi Xue JingXin Yueying transmigrated into the body of Shen Qingqi's venomous and reckless first wife, a cannon fodder character. Upon arrival, she was forced to commit suicide by Shen Qingqi, but she cleverly saved her life. The saintly heroine, Meng Ruxin, constantly criticized and suppressed her from a moral high ground. Xin Yueying broke the deadlock and formed an alliance, becoming friends with the heroine's wicked stepmother. She also recruited villains like the eccentric doctor, the lame horse, and the wicked constable, Guan Waishan, to jointly defeat the hypocritical saintly protagonist group. Seeing her completely different from before, Shen Qingqi became convinced she was his savior, and his heart was filled with her. After many trials and tribulations, their feelings deepened, and ultimately, together with their companions, they embarked on the path to exonerate the Shen family.
冒姓琅琊之名扬天下 | "Claiming the Name of Langya and Spreading Throughout the World"

Liu Hao Qun, Chen Fang TongTime travel isn't a dinner party; it's a journey fraught with danger. Wang Yang, a penniless modern-day PhD, is forced to impersonate the son of a top-tier aristocratic family and step into the chaotic Southern Qi dynasty. Leveraging his millennia-old knowledge, he dominates the academic world and wins the hearts of noble ladies. However, danger lurks constantly—huge creditors, ruthless political enemies, and deadly assassins. While everyone awaits his downfall, he's playing a much bigger game.
美人骨，红袖昭 | "Beauty's Bones, Red Sleeves Shining"

Wang Jia Mao, Yuan Yi QingDai Qingyin's parents were murdered by bandits wearing Imperial Guard badges. She mistakenly believed that the Emperor was responsible and disguised herself as Hongxiu to enter the palace to seek revenge. She developed feelings for Emperor Xiao Yanhe, who was disguised as a guard. Through a series of misunderstandings and investigations, they discovered that the real culprit was Prince Rui. In the end, the two joined hands to expose Prince Rui's conspiracy, and Dai Qingyin got her revenge and finally became a couple with Xiao Yanhe.
假面蔷薇 | "Masked Rose"

Zhang Zhi Wei, Liu Mei NaTo save her mother, Shen Qiao impersonates Xie Jingyan's missing cousin and signs a contract with him. Their relationship evolves from initial antagonism to budding romance, but they suffer greatly due to their "cousin" identity. The interference of actress Xu Wanning and the pursuit of the second male lead, Ji Wenzhou, further complicates matters. When the mystery of their origins is revealed—Shen Qiao is actually a wealthy heiress, and Xie Jingyan is not of the Xie family bloodline—they overcome all obstacles, and the truth is finally revealed, leading to a happy ending.
后青春的诗 | "Poetry of Post-Youth"

Zhang Zhi Wei, Hao YunWen Run and transfer student Shi Qingye unexpectedly meet at an alleyway on a rainy day and become deskmates, sharing a youthful story. In their campus life filled with laughter and tears, they face the challenges of academics, friendship, and growth alongside their friends Qiao Shennan and Jiang Yu, while also quietly developing innocent and sincere feelings. Meanwhile, the arrival of Shao Yifan, a wealthy but lonely young man, further complicates the situation. Amidst the intertwining of family, dreams, and unrequited love, they learn courage, learn to say goodbye, and learn to write their own answers on the test of youth.
爱意藏不住 | "Love Cannot Be Hidden"

Wei Tian Hao, Wen Mo YanXu Xiyan is diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease. Her husband, Cheng Yufan, remains devoted to her, secretly cooperating with her repeated attempts to "divorce" and "marry" in order to slow the progression of her illness. Upon learning this, Xu Xiyan, not wanting to burden him, insists on divorcing him and leaving. Ignoring his mother's objections, Cheng Yufan restarts his research on related therapies while diligently caring for her. Heartbroken for her husband, Xu Xiyan asks her mother-in-law to hide her when she is lucid, only to be told the truth by her mother-in-law. Ultimately, Cheng Yufan's research achieves a breakthrough, stabilizing Xu Xiyan's condition, and he vows to protect his beloved for life.
闺蜜齐穿同心齐力把婚离 | "Best Friends Transmigrate Together and Work Together to Get a Divorce"

Liu Yu Jiao, Cui Xu YangModern-day best friends Song Xiali and Xu Zhiqing transmigrate into a novel, becoming the two young mistresses of the Huo family who gave up everything for love but were met with indifference. Knowing that their three-year marriage contract would grant them millions in assets and their freedom upon expiration, they endured the difficulties and humiliations from the Huo brothers, their former love interest, and their mother. During this time, they no longer acted as subservient as the original owners, cleverly retaliating against their provocations. After the marriage contract expired, the two decisively filed for divorce and left to start their own businesses. The Huo brothers initially didn't believe they would truly leave, thinking it was a ploy, but gradually felt uneasy and doubtful after losing them.
小奶包太甜冷面爹地顶不住 | "The Little Cutie is Too Sweet, the Cold-Faced Daddy Can't Resist"

Xi Er Li, Wang Lu QingSix years ago, a deliberate accident led to a one-night stand between Qin Chaolu and Gu Shichu, resulting in Qin Chaolu giving birth to twins on her own. Six years later, Gu Shichu and Qin Chaolu enter into a contract marriage. During their time together, amidst crises and with the help of their adorable child, feelings gradually develop between them. However, the appearance of Su Yan'an causes a change in their relationship. Just as Gu Shichu is about to let go, Lin Weiwei exposes the contract, causing Qin Chaolu's grandmother to fall into a coma. The two reunite for Qin Chaolu's grandmother, confess their feelings, confirm their parentage, and even work together to expose Lin Weiwei's scheme. Ultimately, Gu Shichu and Qin Chaolu hold their wedding and take their child abroad to pursue their dreams.
完蛋，我养的反派小崽全是大佬 | "Oh No, the Villainous Little Kids I Raised are All Big Shots"

Wang Yi Ge, Li Xue YangShen Yan accidentally travels 18 years into the future, only to find herself married to her arch-nemesis, Huo Yanxing, and with three troubled sons: Huo Xingran, an autistic eldest; Huo Xingchu, a rebellious school bully second; and Huo Xingchen, a cunning youngest. Faced with a cold husband and a chaotic family, Shen Yan decides to start by educating her children, gradually opening their hearts. Ultimately, she not only transforms her three "villainous little devils" into a scientific genius, a racing champion, and a talented painter, but also resolves her misunderstandings with Huo Yanxing and finds true love.
洛总初尝恋爱请多包涵 | "Mr. Luo's First Taste of Love, Please Be Forgiving"

Su Jun Xiang, Guo YaLuo Yunhe, heir to the real estate empire Luofu Group, meticulously plans a special "roommate" recruitment to resist the control freakish manipulation of his mother, Luo Jinyun. His true goal is to find Qin Yinyin, the girl who saved his beloved dog in his childhood, and to pull her into his plan to fight against his family. Qin Yinyin is an accounting graduate burdened by her father's wrongful conviction; her appearance is disguised by Luo Yunhe as an "accident." Two young people crushed by fate and capital begin living under the same roof under the guise of "roommates." From initial lies and tests to the genuine affection that blossoms as they jointly confront external malice, they find mutual redemption.
满月照乡野 | "Full Moon Shines on the Countryside"

Ma Chao, Yang LinJiang Yueman lost her parents at a young age, and her family property was seized by her uncle and aunt, leaving her to live as a dependent. After Jiang Yueman came of age, her uncle Jiang Wenqiang, aunt Yi Xiufang, and cousin Jiang Xuehan conspired to arrange a marriage between them, forcing Jiang Yueman to marry into a family that was rightfully hers. Jiang Yueman resisted, but was met with humiliation. Jiang Xuehan's family even used their control over the management of Jiang Yueman's parents' graves to force her to conceal the truth of the arranged marriage and marry into a rural family. Jiang Yueman initially thought she would suffer in the countryside, but she was surprised to discover that her mother-in-law's family lived in a large villa, with gold bars used to prop up table legs. It turned out that her mother-in-law's family had already become wealthy and were not a poor rural family at all.
傅少，叶小姐她不按套路出牌 | "Mr. Fu, Ms. Ye Doesn't Play By the Rules"

Ye Lin Sen, Wang Xin YingIn her past life, Su Qingyuan was blinded by Shen Zeyu's gentle facade and accepted his marriage proposal, only to be met with a shocking truth on their wedding night—Shen Zeyu's true love was Lin Weiwei, the daughter of their nanny who had been impersonating her and corresponding with him. Unable to win her heart, Lin Weiwei committed suicide by overdosing on pills on their wedding night. Shen Zeyu blamed Su Qingyuan for this regret and resentment, becoming utterly cold towards her from then on. Bearing the lessons of her past life and determined to protect her family, Su Qingyuan is reborn on the day Shen Zeyu proposed. This time, she sheds her girlish naiveté and resolutely refuses the marriage on the spot.
刚毕业就跟总裁姐姐求婚 | "Proposed to the CEO Right After Graduation"

Yao Lei, Cheng Xin YueFinancial elite Cheng Ye is betrayed by his materialistic girlfriend Lin Zhiya, who forces him to sign an outrageous prenuptial agreement after her return from studying abroad. Heartbroken, Cheng Ye tears up the agreement in public and impulsively marries Shen Xingwan, whom he has only met once. Shen Xingwan, the president of a multi-billion dollar conglomerate, is allergic to men but can only have intimate contact with Cheng Ye. To get close to this man who dislikes the wealthy, she hides her identity, disguises herself as a waitress, and moves into his rented apartment, only to be openly "kept" by Cheng Ye. From then on, Miss Shen begins her secret "doting husband" routine: he lives in an old apartment, she buys him a new one; he stays up all night working on projects, which are secretly authorized by his wife.
和前夫离婚后，她反手和死对头领证了 | "After Divorcing Her Ex-Husband, She Immediately Married Her Arch-Nemesis"

Zhong Zheng, Meng Jia XinShen Zhiyi and Meng Yunsheng are about to get married, but no one knows that Meng Yunsheng has never touched her. Meng Yunsheng claims to have severe mysophobia, which Shen Zhiyi respects and never forces. However, at his bachelorette party, the supposedly germaphobic Meng Yunsheng openly drinks water from his junior colleague Lu Mo's cup. It turns out his so-called germaphobia only applies to Shen Zhiyi. At the wedding, Meng Yunsheng openly calls off the engagement, wanting to pursue his true love, Lu Mo. He refuses to part amicably, choosing instead to betray her. Meng Yunsheng wants both—true love and Shen Zhiyi's family fortune. Shen Zhiyi sneers; it's time for a reckoning.*Younger Zhong Zheng
心藏旧爱 | "Holding Onto an Old Flame"

Wang Zhi Yu, Nie Wen HuaJiang Li and Fu Sinian were former lovers. After the Jiang family went bankrupt, Jiang Li was forced to become the fiancée of the playboy Zhou Ze in order to save the family. One night, while drunk, Jiang Li was "rescued" by Fu Sinian, who had returned from abroad. Fu Sinian, who was still hung up on his ex-girlfriend, took the opportunity to cling to the female lead and make her take responsibility, thus beginning an ambiguous tug-of-war between the two.

初见乍惊欢 | "A Delightful First Meeting"- Xuan Jia Cheng, Yang Zi YuAgent Lin Jinghuan of Bureau 768, in order to investigate the leader of a mercenary group, disguises himself as a "sperm donor" to get close to the female boss Long Kui. From the ambiguous game of power at the mercenary base to a misunderstanding at a matchmaking event in China, from a life-or-death gamble in the billiards room to a power struggle within the base, the plot twists and turns frequently. Lin Jinghuan juggles his mission and his feelings while uncovering Long Kui's true identity, while Long Kui wavers between suspicion and attraction, ultimately discovering that the man before her, Mr. Fox, is none other than her savior from years ago. A fateful reunion after ten years, an undercover game of espionage colliding with intense flirting, a life-or-death situation, and memorable scenes of father-to-son conflict—the sweet and refreshing story is high-energy from start to finish, making it increasingly addictive!

Bound to a "surprise system," she can become younger by using various tricks. However, her three grandsons are all villains in the book, about to be schemed against by the male and female leads, facing family bankruptcy and fratricide. For wealth and to protect her three beloved grandsons, she strikes back fiercely! She tears apart scheming women, kicks treacherous men, and severs all ties with her brothers. Then one day, she's shocked to discover that her long-deceased husband, Qin Jin, is not only alive but has become a handsome young man? Adapted from the novel "Transmigrated as an Old Lady, Using Tricks to Take Down the Villainous Family," by Kindergarten Worker.
我滴家在东北之双穿奇遇 | "My Home is in Northeast China: A Double Transmigration Adventure"

Zhao Yu Qing, Hao Rui JieNortheastern buddies Li Ergou and academic star Chen Xiuer accidentally transmigrate into a melodramatic novel while making popcorn, becoming a tragic couple in a tragic love story. Faced with clichés like a scheming cousin's betrayal, a fake act of saving their lives, and a forced marriage, the two bravely face the plot's punishments with hilarious antics, using their uniquely Northeastern humor to fight back. Together, they uncover the conspiracy, and amidst the chaotic plot, their friendship blossoms into true love, ultimately breaking free from the shackles of the story and holding their own special wedding.
穿书带亲妈，搞钱打脸两手抓 | "Transmigrated into a Book with My Own Mother, Making Money and Slapping Faces at the Same Hand"

Mao Zhi Yuan, Liu Meng TingChu Qingruan and her movie star mother, Shen Nianci, unexpectedly transmigrate into a book, becoming a vicious mother-in-law and a bullied daughter-in-law, respectively. When Chu Qingruan transmigrates, her husband, Zhou Yanqin, is having her blood drawn to save the scheming Chu Qianqian. After recognizing each other, mother and daughter join forces to fight back. Shen Nianci protects her daughter and confronts her husband, showcasing her dance skills on a variety show. Chu Qingruan uses her legal and hacking skills to expose the abuse within the Chu family and lands a job at a rival company of the Zhou family. The Chu family plots to drug her, but Chu Qingruan retaliates, and Zhou Yanqin regrets his actions after seeing the truth.
婚杀 | "Marriage Murder"

Lin Xiao, Zhang Zhang (Zhang Yu Jiao) (RAW)Pei Huaichuan's brother was killed by Lin Wan, a mysterious woman he married in a whirlwind romance. He chose to get involved, marrying Lin Wan and waiting for her to kill him. However, he unexpectedly discovered that Lin Wan was controlled by a criminal organization that used marriage to make money and kill people. In the process of testing and playing against each other, the two gradually revealed their true feelings and worked together to fight against the criminal organization.
繁花1990 | "Blossoming Flowers 1990"

Wang Heng Yu, Zhang Ya Di (RAW)Lin Wanqing, a beautiful divorced factory worker with a child, is constantly bullied by the director of the winery and harassed by her scumbag ex-husband demanding money. Until the appearance of Qi Xiuyuan, the eldest son of the Qi family, she becomes her salvation. Qi Xiuyuan buys her a color TV and furniture and takes good care of her and her child. Lin Wanqing thought she could live happily ever after. Little did she know that the real conspiracy was just beginning to be revealed. The young master of the Qi family came to acquire the winery.

婚夜，燃尽 | "Wedding Night, Burning Away"

Charon, Lin Qiu NaiThe female lead, Meng Yu, is the true heiress who has been found, but unfortunately, her family already has an adopted daughter, so she only gets a marriage proposal from Fu Qingshao. Fu Qingshao is aloof and ascetic, and his only requirement for the marriage is that there be no emotional entanglement. Meng Yu is very obedient and tries her best not to fall in love with him, but when Fu Qingshao is drunk, he pinches her slender waist and interrogates her, asking, "Can't you have even a little bit of me in your heart?"* 3 Versions of this Meng Yu & Fu Qingshao story released earlier at midnight lol. I'll post the 3 first for today..
地久婚长 | "Everlasting Marriage"

Chen Gang, Lin GeMeng Yu, the long-lost true daughter of the Meng family, returns home only to be used as a tool in a political marriage. She signs an agreement with Fu Qingshao, CEO of Zhonglin Group, promising not to love each other. After the marriage, Fu Qingshao goes to Europe, and the two live separately for two years, rendering the marriage meaningless. Meng Yu temporarily loses her sight during eye surgery, and unexpectedly reunites with Fu Qingshao upon his return. During their time together, Fu Qingshao breaks the agreement, silently indulging her whims, changing her hospital room, gifting her property, and fiercely protecting her when she faces difficulties from her family. Meng Yu's gentleness and resilience gradually melt Fu Qingshao's aloof exterior. From a marriage of convenience to soulmates, this marriage, which began as a transaction, ultimately blossoms into genuine love.* Second
婚长地久 | "Everlasting Marriage"

He Lian Fei, Wu Hao XuanFu Qingshao and Meng Yu had a whirlwind marriage due to an arranged union. Initially, they were respectful and distant, but later their relationship blossomed into a passionate romance after marriage. The aloof and wealthy young man gradually succumbed to Meng Yu's gentleness and beauty. When she was publicly humiliated by her biological mother, he flew back to China overnight to seek justice for her; when her ex-boyfriend returned to China to harass her, he immediately presented her with an engagement ring to assert his ownership. Their relationship began with a prenuptial agreement and ended with a tender and enduring love.*Third
在烟火深处说爱你 | "Saying I Love You Amidst the Fireworks"

Yang Peng Cheng, Peng YaoA young girl, desperate to escape her scumbag uncle and survive, "buys" the protection of the most ruthless street thug with an old pocket watch. From mutual exploitation to mutual redemption, they ignite a glimmer of light called "home" on the edge of the abyss. When the sins of their original families tear away the mask of warmth once more, and when his mysterious past ignites his own fire, can this relationship, which began with calculation, withstand the cruelest burning of fate? Witness how two broken souls become entangled in calculation and sincerity, clumsily yet passionately learning to love in the deepest darkness. Their story begins with a transaction, but gambles their entire future.
婚夜，燃尽 | "Wedding Night, Burning Out"

Zhong Zheng, Yang Shu YuAfter being recognized by the Meng family, the true heiress Meng Yu did not receive any familial affection. Instead, her parents, driven by business interests, forced her to break up with her boyfriend and instead went on a blind date with Fu Qingshao, who needed to marry to appease his family. Fu Qingshao, sensing that she already had someone else in her heart, proposed marriage, but demanded that Meng Yu sign a prenuptial agreement stipulating that they would not interfere with each other's lives, and especially that she could not fall in love with him. After obtaining their marriage certificate, Fu Qingshao went to Europe, and the two remained estranged for two years. It wasn't until Fu Qingshao returned to China and encountered Meng Yu undergoing eye surgery at a hospital that he began to care for her as her husband. Afterwards, due to family pressure, the two lived together and agreed to become a real couple.* Another version again (4th)
夜色轻颤时 | "When the Night Trembles"

Cao Tian Kai, Yuan Yu HanZhou Tang's wedding is disrupted by her old rival Huo Xinyue, who steals her husband, and her father is left without medical help. Fueled by hatred, Zhou Tang uses a calculated strategy to win over Huo Xinyue's father—the head of the Huo family—and becomes Huo Xinyue's stepmother. At Huo Xinyue's wedding, she launches a powerful counterattack, ruining the ceremony and humiliating her, all in an attempt to seize the Huo family's connections, the CEO position, and the inheritance. Huo Yanci, knowing Zhou Tang's ulterior motives, is still attracted to her, giving her everything and grooming her as his heir. Upon learning of her ordeal, he willingly becomes the weapon for her revenge, showering her with unconditional affection, and Zhou Tang, in the process, falls deeply in love with him.
牛马辞职当保姆，拿捏厌食症大佬 | "Ox and Horse Quit Their Jobs to Become Nannies, Taming the Anorexic Boss"

Zhao Guan Yu, Peng YaoLu Zhiyu worked tirelessly to help her boyfriend start his business, only to discover his infidelity. Her hard-earned sales figures became a stepping stone for his mistress to become his wife. Enraged, she quit her job and became a nanny for Shang Yu, a wealthy tycoon who had suffered from anorexia for five years. Her exceptional culinary skills helped Shang Yu regain his appetite, and her sincerity and kindness further touched him. When Shang Yu showed interest in her, she feigned ignorance due to their unequal social standing and couldn't bear to give up her high-paying job. She was repeatedly framed but was always protected by Shang Yu, and she gradually developed feelings for him. However, rumors of a past relationship prevented her from getting close, until Shang Yu publicly clarified the situation, at which point she finally overcame her reservations and accepted him.
沈先生，你家小保姆又去怼人了 | "Mr. Shen, Your Little Nanny Went to Argue with Someone Again"

Chen Zheng Yang, Liao Yin YueSong Tinghuan, an unemployed liberal arts student, becomes the caregiver for the disabled CEO Shen Yuqing for a high salary. Facing her boss's difficult behavior and his ex-fiancée's provocations, she gradually melts Shen Yuqing's frozen heart with her optimism and professionalism. The two develop feelings for each other amidst their playful daily interactions, and together uncover business conspiracies and emotional betrayals. Ultimately, Shen Yuqing miraculously recovers, and the lovers are reunited, achieving success in both their careers and love lives. This is a heartwarming and healing sweet romance story full of joy and tenderness.
云小姐，封先生说你跑不掉了 | "Miss Yun, Mr. Feng Says You Can't Escape"

Xie Hong Xin, Wang Lu QingDesigner Yun Wan accidentally unlocks CEO Feng Jingxing's expensive phone, resulting in the loss of a 1.2 billion yuan key and forcing her to shoulder a massive debt. To pay off the debt, she signs a two-year contract marriage, becoming his "contract bride." What was initially a cold transaction unexpectedly blossoms into romance due to family infighting and life-or-death crises. When conspiracies and kidnappings follow, Feng Jingxing risks his life to protect her. From a debt-paying bride to true lovers, the two join hands to uncover the family's dark secrets, weaving a bittersweet urban legend amidst lies and truth.
月光渡我向星河 | "Moonlight Carries Me Towards the Milky Way"

Yu Xuan Hong Hao, Li Xiao YuEight years ago, Gu Xitong mysteriously became pregnant after only having a dream. Under pressure from her stepmother and sister, and coercion from her father, she was kicked out of her home and raised her child, Xiaobao, alone. Eight years later, while looking for a job, Gu Xitong unexpectedly cured Fu Xingye, the president of the Fu Group, of his eight-year-long insomnia with a kiss, and became Fu Xingye's wife. Fu Xingye was even more astonished to discover that Gu Xitong's child, Xiaobao, was actually his biological son. Meanwhile, Gu Xitong and Xiaobao had been tricked into returning to the Gu family. To ensure her sister received a larger dowry when she married the vice president of the Fu Group, Gu Xitong and Xiaobao were sold out and sacrificed.
蓄谋图她 | "Plotting Against Her"

Zhang Zhi Peng, Li XiuSeven years later, Xu Jianxi, a socialite in Beijing, is forced into a business marriage for her mother's sake, only to be betrayed by her fiancé. Trapped in a cage of interests, she finally decides to escape and return to her small town to pay respects to her grandmother. There, she reunites with Zhou Wangye, her first love whom she abandoned in her youth—the "younger brother" with whom she once depended on for survival, yet whose promise she broke. Zhou Wangye conceals his identity, using gentleness as a web to gradually approach her, exploiting her guilt. He accompanies her back to Beijing, together tearing apart the hypocritical world of fame and fortune, and breaking free from the control of her closest relatives. This time, it's his turn to rescue her from her predicament, and to await a reconciliation that spans seven years.
总裁，夫人她又犯公主病了 | "President, Your Wife's Princess Syndrome Returns"

Rao Hao Wen, Ou NaPrincess Xia Ke of the Xia Dynasty travels to the modern era, becoming the long-lost daughter of the Xia family. She unexpectedly has a one-night stand with the wealthy tycoon Shi Beichuan. Upon returning to the Xia family, she is bound by a will to marry Shi Beichuan, but is repeatedly framed by her younger sister, Xia Qingqing. Xia Ke uses her talent for perfumery and her wisdom to overcome these crises, and Shi Beichuan also wholeheartedly helps her. Together, they expose Xia Qingqing's schemes. Ultimately, Xia Ke establishes her own business and achieves fame, and she and Shi Beichuan finally become a couple.
穿成恶毒亲妈后我意外成皇家团宠＆娘在闹爹在笑三个崽子哇哇叫 | "After Transmigrating into a Villainous Mother, I Unexpectedly Became the Royal Darling & Mother's Tantrum, Father's Laughter, and Three Cries"

Du Ya Fei, Jin Lu YingGu Nuo died suddenly from overworking and unexpectedly transmigrated to the Sheng Kingdom, only to find herself holding poison about to kill the emperor. To save her life, Gu Nuo immediately smashed a bowl to prove her innocence. However, changing others' opinions wasn't easy, so Gu Nuo could only start with the Third Prince. She rescued the abused Third Prince from Consort Chun, regained custody, and the Third Prince sensed her change and became close to her.
拂色生香 | "A Fragrance of Color"

Guan Yue, Zhao An DiOn her wedding night, Cui Zhaoxue was forced to commit suicide by her mother-in-law, Lady Xie. Climbing out of her grave, Cui Zhaoxue encountered Mingji, the younger brother of Xie Yuan and a venerable monk of the Great Zhou Dynasty who practiced Buddhism while still keeping his hair. Remembering the humiliation she had suffered at Lady Xie's hands, she resolved to bring this venerable monk, whom the Marquis's family valued most, down from his pedestal and make him her sole source of survival. Mingji had studied Buddhism since childhood, possessing profound Buddhist knowledge and exceptional concentration. He was only one tribulation away from achieving enlightenment—the tribulation of love. Cui Zhaoxue, however, exploited his compassion, administering the strongest aphrodisiac to herself, gradually disrupting his spiritual resolve.
残雪晚来负情深 | "Lingering Snow at Dusk Bears Deep Affection"

Chu Jun Chen, Xu Xiang YingReborn in 1985, Han Xue once again stands at a crossroads of fate. In her previous life, she watched helplessly as her husband, Qin Hao, poured all his care into Zhang Ruyan and their daughter, while her own son, Ranran, died in neglect, ultimately dying with resentment in her own heart. This time, her heart is calm, without lingering attachment or contention. The divorce papers she submits are the sharp blade she uses to sever ties with the past. Qin Hao's astonishment is irrelevant to her—in this new life, she lives only for Ranran and herself. The past is gone; in this life, she will build a safe and warm nest with her own hands.
全员女儿奴，七个爸爸风华绝代 | "All Doting on Their Daughters, Seven Stunning Fathers"

Qi Xiao Shu, Liu Mei NaThe story revolves around a girl who unexpectedly gains seven incredibly charismatic "dads" from diverse backgrounds, including business elites, artistic masters, and athletic champions—all doting fathers. They go to great lengths to protect their daughter, worrying about everything from everyday life to major life events. The journey is filled with hilarious situations, and the seven dads also experience clashes and disagreements due to differing parenting philosophies. The girl grows up surrounded by love, gaining warmth and wisdom, creating a series of heartwarming and funny stories.
三岁小福宝，靠捡垃圾养活全王府 | "3 Year-Old Lucky Baby Supports the Entire Royal Mansion by Collecting Garbage"

Li Si Yuan, Zhao Yi Qiao, Kou Wei LongThe Prince of Zhenbei's mansion suffered repeated setbacks. The Prince of Zhenbei fell into a coma after being poisoned, and his heir, Lu Conghan, was crippled in both legs and underwent a drastic personality change. Princess Shen Wan struggled to manage the household, accumulating enormous debts. The kind-hearted Shen Wan rescued a little beggar girl named Sui Sui who was nearly frozen to death on the street, and despite her family's objections, adopted her. Unexpectedly, Sui Sui possessed a unique ability to see things that others couldn't—the "trash" she picked up turned out to be priceless treasures. This not only alleviated Lu Conghan's leg ailment and provided Lu Yunzhou with a cure, but also helped the mansion earn a great deal of money, significantly improving their lives. Shen Wan and the others gradually realized that Sui Sui was the mansion's little lucky star!
茶艺师驾到，白莲统统闪开 | "The Tea Master Arrives, All White Lotuses Get Out of the Way"

Li Bo Han, An Xiao JieLin Chu, a seemingly innocent but actually manipulative woman online, is begged by Jiangcheng's richest man to become their daughter-in-law. Their son, a perfectly good young master, insists on being the devoted admirer of a poor school beauty! Since their son likes manipulative women, they'll find an even more manipulative one!! Lin Chu immediately accepts the arduous task of "saving the richest man's devoted son," because the wealthy couple is offering far too much! However, Lin Chu discovers that her opponent is none other than her old acquaintance, her own manipulative sister, whom she has already defeated.

天降小福星好运连连 | "A Lucky Star Falls from the Sky"

Mu Zi Jun, Meng NaIn their past lives, Prince Xuan, He Tingxiu, rushed to marry Su Jinshi. Upon discovering the child was not a lucky star, he cruelly murdered Su Jinshi and the child. Reborn, He Tingxiu chose to marry Meng Qingyi, while Su Jinshi chose to marry Prince Jin, He Yuan, who was rumored to be childless and averse to women in her previous life. Meng Qingyi quickly became pregnant after their marriage, but Su Jinshi was unable to consummate the marriage with He Yuan. Everything seemed to be progressing as He Tingxiu had hoped. However, an unexpected event occurred.
败将 | "The Loser"

Li Zhuo Yang, Li Sheng XuanWarlord Chu Mingzhi and singer Jiang Lingyi are reunited due to a blood feud between their families. Five years ago, Chu Mingzhi's parents were killed by Jiang Lingyi's father, and he vowed revenge. Jiang Lingyi returned after enduring humiliation, navigating the turbulent times and navigating the complex web of power struggles. The two become entangled in national crisis and personal grievances, gradually uncovering the truth behind the tragedy. Together, they fight against Japanese invaders and traitors, ultimately resolving their hatred under the banner of national righteousness, becoming each other's source of redemption.
流年最深处 | "The Deepest Part of Time"

Yu Long, Li Ruo QiOvernight, He Yutang went from being the apple of everyone's eye to a fallen heiress, and was even expelled from the country. So she painfully broke up with Zhou Yanze. Five years later, He Yutang and her brother decided to take back everything that belonged to them. However, the man who should have hated her actually became her brother's best friend, and was even willing to take care of his sister for his brother, taking care of her in a very meticulous way.

烬撩 | "The Ashes of Love"- Lu Dan Dong, Bei Chuan Wan WanPei Shixiang, the eldest son of the Pei family, died in a fire while traveling. His widow, Su Heng, seized the Pei family's seal and monopolized the family's assets, incurring the dissatisfaction and condemnation of the elders within the clan. However, the return of Pei Shiye, the second son of the Pei family who had been living away from home, changed everything. Pei Shiye made a high-profile return at his brother's funeral, holding Pei Shixiang's will and keepsakes, claiming that his brother had left everything to him and that he was the true heir of the Pei family. But what surprised Su Heng even more was that Pei Shiye looked exactly like Pei Shixiang.
呼吸失控 | "Breathing Out of Control"

Min Jie, Liu Man LiHuo Wantian, feigning a playboy lifestyle to seize her family fortune, returns to China and uses the seemingly down-on-his-luck Gu Jinnian, a woman working in a bar, as a shield. Unbeknownst to her, Gu Jinnian is actually Gu Hanye, the heir to the Gu family, who is feigning affection to repay a past life-saving debt. Amidst their push and pull, feelings develop between them. When Huo's father forces her into a marriage with the Jiang family, Gu Hanye publicly reveals his true identity to protect her, leading to a falling out between Huo Wantian and Gu Hanye due to the deception. Just then, their family faces ruin as their illegitimate son embezzles funds and their father suffers a stroke. Gu Hanye offers assistance on the condition of a marriage alliance, and Huo Wantian, using this as leverage, tries to gain the upper hand, only to discover that he already knows everything and is willingly cooperating.
娇宠前妻 | "Pampering the Ex-Wife"

Jin Jia Yu, Zhang Qiu ZiEveryone praised Mr. Huo as the epitome of a virtuous husband and loving father, until Wen Xuxu returned with their child, completely breaking down his defenses. Faced with his relentless pursuit, she boldly declared, "The child is mine, and you are someone I don't want." However, when he saw two identical versions of the young CEO appear, he finally resigned himself to his fate. A wife-chasing nightmare? He'd have to wait in line!
京婚恃宠 | "A Pampered Marriage in Beijing"

He Lian Fei, Ye MiaoAn unexpected encounter leads Shi Yuan to spend a night entangled with her brother's arch-enemy, Jing Zhao, only to be dragged to register their marriage the next day. The secret marriage agreement takes effect, and he dotes on her with a domineering yet subtly probing approach, while she playfully dodges his questions, her heart still fluttering. Family feuds, interference from her ex, and a plagiarism scandal follow one after another. When the aloof CEO transforms into a doting husband, is this marriage, which began unexpectedly, a long-planned scheme or a destined love?
上位者失控，九爷强势揽入怀 | "The Powerful Lose Control, Ninth Master Forcefully Embraces Her"

Du Ya Fei, Li Shi QiSong Qingnan was stunningly beautiful, and even though she was already taken, she still attracted unwanted attention. At a banquet, Xie Zhi, a powerful figure in Beijing's elite circles, fell in love with her at first sight. He resorted to any means necessary, forcibly taking her and shattering her self-deceptive illusions of love in the most ruthless way. She stubbornly resisted, but reality forced her to submit to him. Xie Zhi thought he had everything, unaware that Song Qingnan possessed her own pride. After Song Qingnan left, the usually aloof and powerful man finally bowed his head, kneeling humbly and begging for a chance to win her back.
破产姐妹 | "Broke Girls"

Yang Yu Bin, Wang Nan NanBefore his death, Xia Zhentian, the richest man in the Xia family, made a will. Because his eldest daughter, Xia Haitang, was addicted to parties, and his second daughter, Xia Wanwan, had a passion for smashing antiques, he worried about the family's future. Therefore, he instructed them to conceal their wealthy background from their youngest daughter, Xia Xiaoman, and raise her with frugality, grooming her to be a suitable heir. Only if Xiaoman passed a test at the age of twenty could the three sisters equally divide the billions of dollars in inheritance; otherwise, the entire fortune would be donated. For twenty years, Xia Xiaoman unknowingly grew into a simple and resilient young woman. Meanwhile, her two older sisters, while feigning poverty, secretly controlled the business empire and the antique restoration industry.
她和他的谎言 | "Her and His Lies"

Zhao Ting Yi, Zhang Chu XuanChen Jinxue awakens with complete amnesia. Only after opening a secret room and uncovering a terrifying truth, driven by revenge and a desire to survive, does she feign amnesia. She teams up with her husband Jiang Chen's ex-wife, a private investigator, her husband's new lover, and their prey, forming a revenge alliance. The four women set a trap, determined to send this monster to hell with their own hands. When the hunter becomes the hunted, a cataclysmic battle of identity, memory, and revenge officially begins.
替身萌娃竟是豪门真嫡子＆假戏真做：替身娇妻携子霸宠 | "The Substitute Child Turns Out to Be the True Heir of a Wealthy Family & Fake Love Turns Real: The Substitute Wife and Her Child Dominate Him"

Lin Xiao, Liao Mo XiFive years ago, Ma Xiaoxiao, a girl from a rural area, had an unexpected relationship with Song Xuan, the heir to a wealthy family, and gave birth to a child alone. Five years later, Song Xuan is forced into marriage by his father. To retain his status as heir, he searches the entire city for a fake wife and a fake child. By chance, he encounters Ma Xiaoxiao, who is raising her child alone, and the two enter into a contract to pretend to be a married couple. Song Xuan's stepmother, in order to secure the inheritance for her biological son Song Huai, tries every means to expose Song Xuan's lies, but she never expected that Xiao Biao is actually Song Xuan's biological son, and Ma Xiaoxiao is the person who saved Song Xuan's life five years ago.
霍总，闪个婚 | "CEO Huo's Flash Marriage"

Lin Xiao, Wu Hao XuanHaving been used as free labor since childhood, Su Qian was brought home by her parents and impulsively married Huo Zhongting, who was disguised as a poor young man. After marriage, the two concealed their identities, their relationship evolving from a superficial one to one of genuine love. Su Qian shone in her career through hard work, while Huo Zhongting secretly protected her. When the truth about their identities, family conflicts, and workplace conspiracies erupted one after another, the two faced them together, ultimately achieving true love and success, and a happy ending.
戏精前男友空降成我上司 | "My Drama Queen Ex-Boyfriend Suddenly Becomes My Boss"

替兄上朝，满朝文武陪我一起吃瓜 | "I Went to Court in My Brother's Place, and the Entire Court Officials Accompanied Me to Eat Melon"

Cheng Yu Feng, Jin Zi XuanModern-day office worker Feng Zexuan is reborn into ancient times with a built-in "gossip system." After her brother is assassinated and falls into a coma, she is forced to attend court in his place, and her innermost thoughts are heard by everyone. She scans secrets, solves numerous bizarre cases, earns "gossip points," and saves her brother. She and the Crown Prince go from being bickering rivals to mutually devoted lovers. She slaps down villains like the Prime Minister and the Wise Prince, helps the Emperor quell the Northern Di, rises from a seventh-rank official to become the Crown Princess, and even pushes for the Eldest Princess to participate in politics, breaking the tradition that women cannot interfere in politics. Using her gossip-eating abilities, she cleanses the court and realizes her grand ambitions.
二月二，嫁龙王 | "On the Second Day of the Second Lunar Month, I Married the Dragon King"

Zhao Zi Lu, Ke WeiLin Jianlu, the reincarnation of a deer spirit, is burdened with a destiny of tribulation. Her grandmother instructs her to stay away from the Dragon King Temple and remain a virgin. However, she repeatedly dreams of two men, one black and one white, claiming to be the Dragon King—Long Mingyuan and Long Mingze. They are actually twin brothers; Long Mingze, driven by obsession, seeks her life, while Long Mingyuan is her past life's protector. Villagers covet her deer blood for profit, and her parents, the Wen family, push her towards the Dragon King to avoid disaster. Awakening her powers in the midst of crisis, Lin Jianlu helps Long Mingyuan overcome his evil thoughts, ultimately resolving the tribulation, finding happiness with her beloved, and achieving a blissful ending.
巧娶豪夺 | "A Clever Marriage by Force"

Huang Jing, Li Zhi HuaQiao Zhixia was betrayed by her husband Shen Hanzhou and forced to leave with nothing. After the divorce, she resumed her career as a designer and unexpectedly reunited with her savior, Jiang Si, the head of the Jiang Group. The two had a whirlwind marriage and began a sweet and loving life together. Facing the revenge of her ex-husband and his mistress, as well as the difficulties caused by the wealthy family, the two joined forces to fight back. In the end, the scumbag and the mistress were disgraced, and Qiao Zhixia achieved a perfect comeback.
这个女保镖太飒了 | "This Female Bodyguard is Too Cool"

Liang Xu, Xin Shi QiRong Zhao, a powerful cultivator, seeks to protect the seemingly innocent but actually naive CEO Fu Yu in order to uncover her own past. She initially saves Fu Yu, but they unexpectedly become acquainted, and she later becomes his bodyguard. This assertive female bodyguard manages to control the seemingly innocent CEO. Rong Zhao saves Fu Yu multiple times, and he gradually falls for her. During their time together, Rong Zhao unexpectedly discovers that Fu Yu is actually her childhood friend! This also uncovers her own past and the truth behind the massacre of her entire family. Now invincible, she embarks on a path of revenge.
佛前雪未消 | "The Snow Before the Buddha Has Not Yet Melted"

Guan Yue, Zhao An Di (RAW)Widowed on her wedding night, Cui Zhaoxue is forced to commit suicide. To survive, she must carefully navigate the machinations of her mother-in-law, seducing her brother-in-law, Mingji, a devout Buddhist monk, into breaking his vows and falling in love. Unexpectedly, her deceased husband, Xie Yuan, returns, revealing that everything was a trap he set to seize Mingji's Buddhist relics. This forbidden love, which began with scheming, ultimately becomes a chaotic battlefield of love, hate, and obsession among the three.

高冷校草爱上我 | "The Cold School Prince Falls in Love with Me"

He Yu, Tan Yan YanJiang Lezhi, a mute campus beauty at Beicheng University, regains her voice after an accidental kiss with campus heartthrob Tan Qingze, only to discover that she relies on kisses to speak. To maintain her ability to speak, Lezhi actively pursues Qingze, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other, starting with awkward intimacy. Rumors on campus forums, interference from a love rival, and the resurfacing of childhood traumas all fail to stop them from getting closer. Ultimately, Lezhi recovers from her aphasia and confesses her love on stage. Qingze presents her with a ring, and this campus romance that began with an accidental kiss culminates in a sweet engagement.
渐入佳婚3 | "Getting Closer to Marriage 3"

Xia Ning Jun, Yu Yu Tong[PART 1][PART 2]Newlyweds Shang Chen and Wen Xi's married life is gradually blossoming. She is a calm and rational lawyer, and he is a steady and devoted CEO. From a bridal shop to online rumors, from workplace undercurrents to family entanglements, the two quietly grow closer through trials and tribulations. When rumors stir up trouble, he silently protects her, and she rises to the challenge. A marriage that began with an agreement is quietly blossoming into an unexpected and profound affection.
她上钩了 | "She's Hooked"

Xia Ning Jun, Zeng He Hui ZiAt their first meeting, Xu Zhining mistook Pei Zeli, the heir to the Pei Group, for a male model. She initially thought it would be a one-night stand, but unexpectedly, Pei Zeli ended up staying at her house. Pei Zeli deliberately seduced Xu Zhining, and she gradually fell for him. However, at the height of their passion, she learned that Pei Zeli had only approached her to repay a debt of gratitude. To allow Pei Zeli to live his life to the fullest, Xu Zhining feigned amnesia and tricked him into leaving. Three years later, the two met again, and Pei Zeli relentlessly pursued her.
朕不想带娃 | "I Don't Want to Raise a Kid"

Zheng Feng, Chang Dan DanYan Yan, a medic in a modern special forces unit, falls into the water due to overwork and unexpectedly travels to the Great Zhou Dynasty. There, she and the "tyrant" Emperor Feng Mingyuan are swapped due to a lightning strike. Forced to assume each other's identities, the two navigate the court. Yan Yan, in the emperor's body, deals with the Empress Dowager's schemes and the concubines' plots, while simultaneously using her modern medical abilities to detoxify Feng Mingyuan, who is trapped in her body. Feng Mingyuan, in the guise of a female physician, navigates the harem step by step, helping Yan Yan stabilize the court. From mutual dislike to fighting side-by-side, they uncover the Consort Shu's revenge, and the Empress Dowager's conspiracy to support her adopted son. After overcoming life-and-death trials, they successfully switch back to their original bodies and ultimately create a prosperous and peaceful Great Zhou Dynasty.
女扮男装当纨绔，成了全员白月光 | "A Woman Disguised as a Man and Becomes Everyone's White Moonlight"

Zhou Ling Feng, Gong Fang NiDuring her final exams, Jiang Ru unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel, becoming a spoiled young master disguised as a man in a male-oriented fiction. The original owner of this body is arrogant and loves to flirt with handsome men, especially the novel's male protagonist, Li Yaoche. However, Jiang Ru, having read the novel, knows that Li Yaoche will become an emperor, and she is merely a cannon fodder villain to be eliminated after his ascension. To avoid a tragic fate, Jiang Ru must maintain her "spoiled" persona while striving to increase Li Yaoche's affection for her. Unexpectedly, in the process, Li Yaoche gradually falls for Jiang Ru.
厉总，夫人不想复婚还偷生你的崽 | "Mr. Li, Your Wife Doesn't Want to Remarry and Even Had Your Child"

Zhang Yi Yang, Lu Wen ZhuoDespite facing opposition, Jiang Tong, from a wealthy family, married Li Jingchen. However, due to instigation from Li's mother and the interference of Cui Yingying, their marriage ended in divorce after two years. After the divorce, Jiang Tong discovered she was pregnant and gave birth to her son, Yangyang, alone. Five years later, Li Jingchen returned as the richest man in China. He still cared about Jiang Tong, but she avoided him. Later, Jiang Tong interviewed Li Jingchen for work and was asked to act in a scene to appease his grandfather. During this time, Li's mother made things difficult for her, and Yangyang nearly exposed his identity several times. To prevent the couple from remarrying, Li's mother hired Cui Yingying to try and drive a wedge between them. To win back Jiang Tong, Li Jingchen moved next door to her and invested in her business.
野火同谋 | "Wildfire Conspiracy"

Zhang Xin Gang, Lin WeiLin Wei, the female CEO of Lin'an Group, forced into an arranged marriage, and Zhou Yu, the illegitimate son of the Zhou family driven by revenge, begin as a calculated alliance of interests. He pretends to be her brother, becoming her "fiancé," while she uses him as a weapon against her family and business rivals. In a thrilling game of strategy, the two go from mutual distrust to unwavering trust, working together to combat family infighting and the financial tycoon Zhao Botao and his backers. Ultimately, they not only uncover the truth about their origins and dismantle the corrupt order of the wealthy family, but also win each other over in this challenging game, joining hands to build their own business empire and future.
喂你一口甜 | "Feeding You a Sweet Bite"

Wang Yu Wei, Liao Hui Min (Leng Ba)Modern food blogger Lou Atian, after being poisoned by mushrooms, unexpectedly travels back in time and becomes a palace maid in the Great Jia Dynasty, tasting dishes. Her only goal is to save money to leave the palace. An accidental kiss with Duan Chong restores the emperor's sense of taste, making Atian the "exclusive antidote." Using her modern culinary knowledge, Atian engages in a battle of wits with the emperor, discovering in one conflict that her pain is transferred to Duan Chong. As they spend time together, Duan Chong's cold heart gradually melts; Atian also glimpses the emperor's true feelings. When a huge storm erupts in the palace, Duan Chong resolutely chooses to protect Atian in a life-or-death situation. Ultimately, the two work together to overcome the crisis and share meals and seasons with Atian.
新婚夜，我和姐姐上错婚车嫁对郎 | "On Our Wedding Night, My Sister and I Got into the Wrong Wedding Car and Married the Right Groom"

Ge Xiu Yan, Xing Yi Ling, Yi Shu, Yang Qiao YuThe Su and Fu families were to form a marriage alliance. The original plan was for the aloof Su family head, Su Qing, to marry the Fu family head, Fu Chengzhou. However, the doting older sister Su Wan, unable to leave her sister, was incidentally betrothed to the arrogant and popular younger brother of the Fu family, Fu Yang. After the wedding, Su Wan, unable to bear Fu Chengzhou's strict control, tearfully complained to her sister and filed for divorce. Su Qing also began to doubt whether her control over Fu Yang was annoying and subsequently filed for divorce as well, causing a delicate turning point in the relationship between the four.*Another Su sisters and Fu brothers story with new actors (well, the casts are still foreign for me)
娇宠 | "Pampered"

Chen Qing Yue, Sang QiYoung Ye Ning mistakenly enters into a wealthy family and unexpectedly becomes entangled with Xie Yuli, the head of the Xie family. Their relationship evolves from initial suspicion and distrust to eventual love, weathering storms including family machinations, revenge from friends, and being framed and kidnapped. Ye Ning is once threatened by the Xie family patriarch with her relatives and forced to go undercover. Xie Yuli, despite knowing Ye Ning's true identity, unknowingly falls for her and even risks his life to save her multiple times. Ultimately, they join hands to resolve the crisis, binding themselves to marriage and jointly taking control of the Xie Group.
八零闪婚，硬汉老公他超爱 | "A Flash Marriage in the 80s, My Tough Husband Loves Me So Much"

Lu Qian, Cheng ChengAfter being cheated on by her college student fiancé, Zhuang Yumin angrily stormed out of a banquet and hastily married Xie Linzhou, a tough retired soldier. Unexpectedly, her in-laws harbored a wicked grandmother, a blindly obedient father-in-law, and two adopted children who resisted her, while her sister-in-law constantly sabotaged her. She fiercely and cleverly battled her wicked relatives, returned to her old clothing business, opened a wildly successful shop, and with the help of a benefactor, resumed her studies, only to discover that her university place had been taken. While tearing apart her scumbag ex-boyfriend and the vicious imposter, she also worked with her husband to build a business, ultimately regaining her student status, becoming a factory manager, and moving her whole family to the provincial capital, living the life of a winner.
漂亮后妈，甜翻全家 | "A Beautiful Stepmother, Sweetening the Whole Family"

Hong Jin Yu, Liu Yan Qiao, Xiang ShuaiSheng Mumu unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel, becoming the "contract wife" of the wealthy male lead, Qi Mo. To escape the tragic ending of the original story, she focuses on her career and lives a life of leisure and luxury. However, she inadvertently touches the heart of her rebellious stepson, Qi Shaobai, with her sincerity, and gradually develops feelings for the outwardly cold but inwardly soft-hearted Qi Mo through repeated "playing the lovey-dovey" moments. As the secret of Qi Mo's past is revealed, Sheng Mumu not only reverses her fate but also heals the rift within her family, ultimately achieving success in her career, love, and family life.
第八年，我穿越时间拥抱你 | "In the Eighth Year, I Traveled Through Time to Embrace You"

Pang Bo, Liu Jing YangXie Chuyi sacrificed herself to save her lover, Shen Zhongting, and her soul transmigrated into the body of a fifteen-year-old girl named Tang Tang who had lost her soul. Eight years later, she reunited with Shen Zhongting due to a relative's wedding. Shen Zhongting, deeply grieving the loss of his wife, was attracted to Tang Tang, who bore many similarities to Xie Chuyi. Tang Tang, bound by her past life, fell in love but mistakenly believed she was a substitute. Later, Tang Tang accidentally fell into the water and regained her memories, realizing she was Xie Chuyi, and the two recognized each other. Together, they resolved the internal strife within the Tang family, evaded rivals, won over Tang Tang's mother, and finally registered their marriage, rekindling their past love and achieving a happy ending.
结婚当天，和女朋友她姐穿到五年后 | "On My Wedding Day, I Traveled Five Years with My Girlfriend's Sister"

Di Ling Chong, Shu HaoQiao Ran wakes up to find herself sleeping with her assistant, Cheng Ye, on what is none other than Cheng Ye and Qiao Shanshan's wedding day. Overwhelmed with guilt, Qiao Ran wants to cancel the wedding, but a glance at her phone reveals she has traveled five years into the future. She discovers that she is now married to Cheng Ye and has a child. To maintain the status quo, the two must remain silent, continuing their facade of a loving couple while simultaneously dividing their assets and uncovering the truth of what happened back then.
盲刃破晓 | "Blind Blade Breaks the Dawn"

Xu Yi Shen, Feng RuiTo support her younger sister Wang Weiwei's education, Wang Xiaoxiao dropped out of school to work, only to find her sister murdered by Chen Feng, a wealthy heir. Unwilling to accept her sister's unjust death, Wang Xiaoxiao rented a mountain villa, pretended to be blind, and lured Chen Feng into a trap, where she found evidence of her sister's murder. Just as Wang Xiaoxiao was about to deliver the evidence to the police station, Chen Feng returned to the villa and began to question Wang Xiaoxiao's supposed blindness. He then launched a series of tests on her, which Wang Xiaoxiao cleverly evaded. During this process, Wang Xiaoxiao discovered that her sister's death was not as simple as it seemed.
饲雀 | "Feeding Sparrows"

Li Ze Yu, Wang Han YingYu Qingyan, the clan leader revered as a saint by the Sparrow Clan, is actually a "useless person" who has failed to awaken her bloodline abilities. Just as her younger sister, Mo Li, is pushing her to the brink of defeat, she unexpectedly encounters Lu Chuan, who is suffering from a deadly poison. She discovers that her X-meridian awakens whenever Lu Chuan steps within five steps of her, and that her blood can temporarily alleviate Lu Chuan's poisoning. Yu Qingyan signs a symbiotic contract with Lu Chuan, using her blood to prolong his life. However, Yu Qingyan is unaware that all of this is actually a revenge plot orchestrated by Mo Li for twenty years, leading to her demise.
PUA我知道什么叫态度姐吗 | "PUA: Do I Know What an Attitude Sister Is?"

Zheng Jia Wei, Chen Lin YuJiang Li unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a cannon fodder female supporting character in a novel, forced into a contractual marriage with CEO Fu Sihan. Bound by a "revenge system," she uses her wisdom and courage to resolve business crises, expose scheming women, and reform a wealthy family, rising from a legal consultant to a rising star in the capital world. Fu Sihan's initial indifference gradually transforms into attraction, and the two develop genuine feelings for each other within the contract, working together to combat family conspiracies and external provocations. Ultimately, Jiang Li not only reaches the pinnacle of her career but also joins hands with Fu Sihan to expose the villains and protect their true love, transforming from a contractual couple into soulmates, achieving a double fulfillment in both career and love.
带着物资去六零年代当小祖宗 | "Bringing Supplies to the 1960s to Be a Little Tyrant"

Wang Wei Sheng, Wu San BaoUFO athlete Cao Jingjing unexpectedly travels back to the 1960s, possessing the body of a girl with the same name who is betrayed by her fiancé Wei Minglang and Zhao Ruanruan. Armed with a work-point exchange system and the original owner's burning desire for revenge, she uses a Polaroid camera to catch the couple cheating, successfully breaking off the engagement. Afterwards, Cao Jingjing utilizes the modern resources and skills she acquired through the system to overcome obstacles posed by the Wei family, uncover her father's past injustice, and repeatedly turn the tables in hunting, factory recruitment, and other situations. During this time, she and Jiang Shaohua, a retired regimental commander with memories of his past life, go from cooperating to falling in love, joining forces to fight villains, protect their families, and ultimately clear their names, living a vibrant life amidst hardship.
