Liu Lan Bo, Shi TongQin Shuyi and Song Junping had been together for a year, their relationship stable, and she thought they would get married. However, one night she overheard her boyfriend laughing and talking with his friend. He jokingly remarked, "A mere opera singer, trying to enter the Song family?" Everyone laughed at her for overestimating herself. Then, on that day, the wind howled through Victoria Harbour. Qin Shuyi, dressed in a dark green cheongsam, swayed as she took Song Chongzhou's arm. He was the man who held the economic lifeline of the port city, and also Song Junping's uncle.
雯月 | "Wen Yue"

Chu Zi Jun, Zhou Jia YiInternational agent Yang Wenyue, to conceal her identity, disguises herself as a tutor and enters a wealthy family to discipline the spoiled young master Chen Wangye. She uses her absolute strength to defuse all his provocations and sees through the trauma beneath his eccentricities. When she discovers he is the son of her former benefactor, she becomes his only protector. The two grow closer through conflict, only to be separated by fate. Three years later, he is a business elite, still obsessed with her; she has shed her agent identity and returned to an ordinary life. Their paths intertwine again, and they finally achieve their deepest redemption for each other.
婚夜燃尽 | "Wedding Night Burns Out"

Dong Yi, Xue Qi Hui, Chang Xin (RAW)Fu Qingshao and Meng Yu entered into a loveless marriage based on their own needs, maintaining a cold and distant relationship for two years. When Meng Yu drunkenly kissed Fu Qingshao, she called out her ex-boyfriend's name, shattering the tranquility. Fu Qingshao realized he had fallen for her and began to actively approach Meng Yu, silently clearing obstacles for her. Under Fu Qingshao's continued gentle advances, Meng Yu gradually lowered her guard, and their relationship subtly changed.* Another Fu Qingshao-Meng Yu story. We got 4 (or is it 5?) a few days ago. But this one got copyrighted fast lol
重生之我要当后妈 | "Rebirth: I Want to Be a Stepmother"

Wang Bing Xiang, Chen Si CheIn the 1970s, Wen Qiao, abandoned by her fiancé, decided to end her suffering. She tore up her marriage certificate and married her fiancé's handsome and wealthy adoptive father, Shen Jichuan, transforming from a "country girl" into a "wealthy stepmother." She juggled revenge on her ex-fiancé, building her career, and protecting her mother; from tailoring and design to opening a factory, she achieved remarkable success. Shen Jichuan, seemingly cold, was actually incredibly devoted to his wife, willingly becoming her strongest supporter. The scumbag man wept with remorse, his first love faded into the background, and the couple joined forces to slap the scoundrel in the face, writing a sweet and satisfying story of triumph in a turbulent era.
系统让我走剧情，反派给我当靠山 | "The System Makes Me Follow the Plot, the Villain Becomes My Backer"

Li Bo Yi, Zhang Zi HanNan Yan unexpectedly finds a system and realizes that the world she lives in is a book, and she is just a villainous female supporting character in the book. In the end, she will be hated by everyone for repeatedly making things difficult for the female lead and die tragically in a car accident. After awakening, Nan Yan is determined to avoid the original plot, but the system is the female lead's system. Under the system's requirements, Nan Yan has to play the role of a villainous female supporting character according to the plot of the book, otherwise she will die from skin ulceration. In order to save her life, Nan Yan obeys the system's instructions while secretly doing things her own way. What a good girl and socialite she is, all of these are thrown to the back of Nan Yan's mind. Anyway, she is just a cannon fodder female supporting character, so she will create everyone equally.
囤物资穿越，农家娇妻直接躺赢 | "Stockpiling Supplies and Transmigrating: The Farmhouse Wife Wins Without Lifting a Bottom"

Yu Lun Hao, Zhang Zi HanAfter activating her bracelet's spatial storage, Jiang Nianchu stockpiled supplies and traveled to ancient times during a famine. She married Song Lin, a villager, and found his family kind and harmonious, deciding to settle down. During their escape from famine, Jiang Nianchu used her spatial resources and wisdom to overcome numerous crises. Upon arriving in Xinzhou, she presented a flood diversion and water storage map, earning the prince's appreciation and successfully settling in Zhuxi Village, completely escaping the entanglements of the Jiang family. Ultimately, Jiang Nianchu and Song Lin found happiness and a peaceful life in this new world.
重生改嫁，我从弃妇到摄政王正妻 | "Reborn and Remarried: From Abandoned Wife to Regent's Wife"

Li You Lin, Jin Lu YingIn her past life, Shen Qingci was heartbroken over her deceased husband, unaware that it was all a deception! Her scumbag husband faked his death, impersonated his brother, and conspired with his widowed sister-in-law to murder her and their child! Reborn before the tragedy, Shen Qingci, with blood on her hands, personally aborted the illegitimate child in her womb! Her scumbag husband wanted her to live a life of widowhood? She turned around and stepped into the powerful Regent's mansion, marrying the man who was rumored to be crippled and impotent!
家有悍妃爱纨绔 | "A Fierce Concubine Loves a Playboy"

Li Shi Jiao, Tan Jiu LuoSu Mengwan was reborn. In her previous life, she was the eldest daughter of the Marquis of Weiyuan, betrothed by the emperor to the outstanding Third Prince, Shen Huailin. However, on the day of the arranged marriage, Shen Huailin unexpectedly saved his cousin, Su Jinfeng, from drowning. Driven by his grandmother, the Marquis, Shen Huailin married both Su sisters. After ascending to the throne, he cruelly poisoned Su Mengwan and her unborn child after only one day as empress, and murdered everyone in the Marquis's household. It turned out that Su Jinfeng was a time-traveler, and this was all a scheme orchestrated by her and Shen Huailin. Reborn, she returned to the day of the arranged marriage. This time, Su Mengwan decisively rejected Shen Huailin and chose Prince Yu, known as the most dissolute playboy in the capital.
今夜宜相逢 | "Tonight is a Good Night to Meet"

Ceng Guo Xiang, Liu Zhuo QingYe Lanxi navigates the situation with the mindset of a "contractual couple," hoping to use the Jin family to escape the control of the Ye family. Jin Bingchen, beneath his cold facade, silently protects her, not only repeatedly shielding her from harassment by the Jin family's collateral branches but also secretly investigating the truth behind the "accident" that caused his serious injury years ago (which was actually a power grab plot by his uncle, Jin Youli). As they spend more time together, Ye Lanxi is moved by Jin Bingchen's gentleness and vulnerability, and the frequent flashbacks of fragmented memories make her doubt the authenticity of their "first meeting." With her support, Jin Bingchen gradually lets go of his resentment about "amnesia" and confronts their unfinished past.
夏棠满分甜 | "Summer's Sweetness is Perfect"

Wan Lin Zhou, Shen QingYu Tang was caught peeping at Pei Yanli changing clothes, only to be told that their grandfathers had arranged a marriage between them. After their contractual marriage, Pei Yanli's possessiveness and deep affection gradually melted Yu Tang's heart. Yu Tang suffered from amnesia due to a car accident, and Pei Yanli secretly researched drugs to treat her. When Yu Tang discovered the truth—that her mother died saving her—she was devastated. Pei Yanli confessed his love to her via live stream to win her back. Ultimately, Yu Tang regained her memory, the two cleared up their misunderstandings, and truly fell in love.
明月归处是故乡 | "Where the Bright Moon Returns is My Hometown"

Dong Zi Wei, Cao Wen JingDr. Jiang Hua, a medical doctor, transmigrates into a fictional character in a period novel, forced into a substitute marriage. With a medical space at her disposal, she retaliates against her scheming siblings and is forced into a marriage with Lu Mingchuan, a cold-faced military officer from an island. Initially intending to save lives and escape unscathed, she is instead drawn into a conspiracy, battling the nanny, curing a serious illness, and saving him from severe injuries. When Lu Mingchuan pins her against the door, who says it's just a marriage of convenience? This medical beauty, now fully licensed, is determined to change not only her fate but also her heart.
替嫁傻夫：严总你的马甲掉了 | "Substitute Bride: Mr. Yan, Your Disguise Has Fallen Off"

Li Jian Ren, Lei Xiao YuOn her wedding day, Qin Yi discovers that her fiancé, Xiao Xiang, is actually delivering her ex-girlfriend Yun Xia's baby at the hospital. Heartbroken and desperate, she publicly announces her marriage proposal at the ceremony. Yan Yize, the eldest son of the Yan Group who is "mentally impaired" due to a car accident, innocently raises his hand and responds, "Sister, I'll marry you!" To escape the shame and seek revenge on Xiao Xiang, Qin Yi resolutely marries into the Yan family. On their wedding night, Yan Yize's feigned mental impairment is exposed. It turns out that the car accident a year ago was deliberate, and he chose to pretend to be mentally impaired to uncover the mastermind and protect himself. Qin Yi's intrusion, which was unexpected in his plans, becomes a ray of light in his dark life.
咬钩 | "Taking the Hook"

Xie Cheng Ze, Wei Ling YaoChi Yang is arranged by her mother to marry her arch-rival, Xie Youci. On the day they register their marriage, Chi Yang, drunk, harasses Xie Youci, and they have a relationship, making the news. To save face, they decide to keep their marriage a secret, putting on a show in front of their parents and teasing each other in front of their friends. Xie Youci mistakenly believes that Chi Yang has a crush on him, but Chi Yang denies it, claiming it was just drunken harassment. As they spend time together, Xie Youci gradually falls in love with Chi Yang and pursues her. After overcoming the misunderstanding, Chi Yang finally accepts her feelings, and the two get married and find happiness.
八零：魔王她成了真千金 | "The 80s: The Demon King Became a True Heiress"

Li Zi Ming, Qi LePrincess Lan Ting of the celestial realm, having caused trouble, is banished to the mortal world and unexpectedly becomes Shi Lan Ting, the real heiress switched at birth in the 1980s. Facing lazy and greedy adoptive parents, she uses force to establish rules; encountering biased biological parents and a fake heiress, she refuses to acknowledge them and lives authentically. Using her celestial wisdom and strength, she joins forces with allies to build a business, amass wealth, recruit followers, make close friends, and even become a national defense student pursuing her dreams. From a rural courtyard to a business tycoon, from a top student to a military elite, she relentlessly defeats her enemies and grows stronger, protecting those around her while writing a unique and thrilling legend of the 1980s.
蝉鸣无尽夏 | "Cicadas Singing in Endless Summer"

Liu Yu Chen, Chen Lei LeiXia Xun, the low-profile heiress of the Xun Guang Group, poured all her resources into supporting her ambitious boyfriend Han Qi's return from studying abroad, only to be betrayed and cheated on by him. Heartbroken, she resolved to focus on her career and gradually discovered Zhou Yi, the seemingly humble but actually noble second young master of the Zhou family, who had silently protected her for ten years. After exposing the hypocrisy of Han Qi and the fake heiress Chen Man, resolving the family business crisis, and clearing up the misunderstanding surrounding the arranged marriage with the Zhou family, Xia Xun finally said goodbye to the wrong person and joined hands with the devoted and loyal Zhou Yi, achieving success in both her career and love life.
怎么能为了女人毁了兄弟情 | "How Could You Ruin a Broherhood For a Woman?"

Ye Zi Jing, Chu Qian YueKe Zheng-lin, a young master from a prominent Beijing socialite, made a bet with his brothers to pursue her, only to have his scheme foiled by Chen Yi-xuan, a student from a poor family. She cleverly orchestrated a conflict, turning the brothers against each other, and all three became pawns in her game. Wen Xu's money, Li Chuan's heart, and Ke Zheng-lin's twisted infatuation—she accepted them all, yet was always ready to withdraw. When the birthday party became the prelude to her escape, would these three once arrogant men have a change of heart, or willingly fall into an even deeper cage?

她引诱他连撩带宠 | "She Seduced Him with a Teasing and Pampering Approach"

Gan Wang Xing, Cao Sai YaRong Xichen knew Wen Jin was bait with a poisonous sting of revenge, yet he still tore through her disguise and plunged into the game. He taught her seduction, but lost himself in the process. "I taught you how to be captivating," but not how to be immune to you. We never said "I love you" to each other, only that I was your accomplice, and Rong Xichen, you were the only exception in my darkness, and my only salvation. He ripped away her disguise, saw through her stubbornness, and in the trap she had carefully laid, he laid an even deeper trap, "Want to learn the art of captivating? I'll teach you myself—but the tuition is your entire life."
红妆刃 | "Red Makeup Blade"

Lan Bo, Cai Zhuo YiYe Qingling, an illegitimate daughter of the Ye family, was forced to marry a critically ill prince. On their wedding night, the prince suddenly died, and she narrowly escaped becoming a sacrifice for the eldest princess. To survive, she took a risk and approached her cold-hearted uncle, Wei Hengzhi, faking a pregnancy through artificial insemination. She carefully planned her schemes, only to find herself entangled in a forbidden love triangle and a power struggle between her and her brother-in-law. Ultimately, Wei Hengzhi's true identity as a prince was revealed, and the two joined forces to thwart the conspiracy. He ascended the throne, and she became the empress.
穿书后，我带着小情人成了全家心尖宠 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, I Became the Darling of the Whole Family with My Little Lover"

Zhang Yun Tao, Li Jia Jie, Yuan Liu ZheAfter a car accident, Jiang Wu and her son Xiao Bao are transmigrated into a melodramatic novel. She becomes a troublesome cannon fodder female supporting character, while her son's soul transmigrates into the villain Shen Ye. To protect her "puppy-like" son and win back her wealthy husband Gu Zhixing, who looks exactly like her deceased husband, Jiang Wu embarks on a bittersweet journey of revenge, redefining love and family amidst the entanglements of wealthy family feuds and heartwarming everyday moments.

嬌嬌蓄意勾引清冷帝王淪陷了| "The Delicate Beauty Intentionally Seduced the Cold Emperor and Fell Into It"- Li Bo Yan (Li Bai Yan), Ma Qian QianPei Tingyue transmigrates into a palace intrigue novel as a cannon fodder concubine. Seemingly favored, she is actually a shield erected by the emperor to protect his beloved, ultimately dying tragically in the cold palace. To rewrite her fate, she decides to use a scheme against the aloof and profound emperor, Xie Chen. From their first encounter in the bathhouse to her assassination attempt during the spring hunt, from the concubines' machinations to the return of her beloved, she meticulously plans her moves, repeatedly breaking through the palace's power struggles and winning Xie Chen's heart, transforming him from a tool to a deeply loving man. Ultimately, she joins hands with the emperor to quell a rebellion, transforming from a pawn into his devoted lover who stands shoulder to shoulder with him for the throne.
和闺蜜穿成豪门反派母女后 | "After Transmigrating with My Best Friend as a Villainous Mother and Daughter in a Wealthy Family"

Chen Rui Feng, Xu ZhenModern-day office worker Lin Wan and her best friend Gu Lele unexpectedly transmigrate into a book, becoming a universally hated wicked stepmother and her burdensome daughter, immediately embroiled in a divorce crisis. The two decide to put on their acting skills, teaming up to outwit their arrogant stepson Gu Sinian and the scheming Fu Jingjing, while cleverly clinging to their boss Gu Changfeng. By using flattery to sow discord between the villains, they unexpectedly warm the couple's relationship, and Lin Wan even unexpectedly becomes pregnant.
玫瑰汹涌 | "Rose Surge"

Li Hao, Liu Meng RuReborn with overwhelming hatred, Shen Sangruo returns to the moment before her death, her first act being to brutally beat her enemies. In the chaos, Chu Mingxiao, who had been obsessed with her in her past life, bursts through the door. She instantly switches to a vulnerable mode and throws herself into his arms. But she doesn't know that Chu Mingxiao has also been reborn. In this life, Shen Sangruo only sees him as someone seeking "revenge," while he, knowing he's being used, still gives his all. Shen Sangruo discovers that she is Chu Mingxiao's first love, and her defenses gradually crumble. As her enemies are defeated, the truth of their past life's suicide pact is finally revealed. When she recognizes her love, Chu Mingxiao painfully lets her go.
坠入情深时 | "Falling Deep in Love"

Gang Tie Rou Rou (Li Lei), Cui Shi YiSong Li's father is suddenly imprisoned in Hong Kong. To rescue him, she travels to Hong Kong and is forced to seek help from her mother, Lin Xiumei, who has remarried a Hong Kong tycoon. She takes her sister Song Yao's place in a relationship with Huo Jinchen, becoming embroiled in Song Yao's deception. As Song Li and Song Yao continue to slip up, Huo Jinchen and his associates become suspicious. Through gemstone appraisal, Huo Jinchen finally confirms that Song Yao and Song Li are two different people, realizing he has been deceived. He decides to take revenge on the Song sisters and the Cheng family, but as he gets closer to Song Li, he uncontrollably falls in love with her.
怪她太撩人 | "Blame Her for Being Too Alluring"

Chen Jing He, Zhu Jin TongA deliberately staged car accident claimed the lives of Wen Zhi's lover, Shi Yan, and her adoptive parents. The culprit, Li Chi Ye, was only after Shi Yan's organs. After learning the truth, Wen Zhi, a doctor, deliberately approached the powerful tycoon Li Chi Ye, spending three years becoming his woman. Driven by a desire for revenge for her family, Wen Zhi meticulously planned and used every trick in the book. However, Wen Zhi never expected that she herself would unknowingly fall into this love trap she had designed. Could she still, as before, ruthlessly stab the man who claimed to love her?
好一个乖乖仔 | "What a Good Boy"

Ye Wen (Kevin), Cheng ZiFu Qian, the eldest son of the Fu family in Jiangcheng, dies in a car accident, and his stepson, Fu Long, seizes the opportunity to take his place. The Fu family patriarch urgently summons his second son, Fu Hanxi, who is cultivating in the mountains, back to the family. Fu Hanxi's fiancée, Yao Wanwan, has been having an affair with Fu Long and is pregnant. To prevent their affair from being exposed, Yao Wanwan plots to sleep with Fu Hanxi, but is unexpectedly saved at the crucial moment by Yun Chang, who came to catch them in the act but entered the wrong room. To investigate his elder brother's death and cover his tracks, Fu Hanxi bribes Yun Chang to be his wife in name only. Yun Chang initially agrees to do so to pay for her mother's medical treatment. However, as they spend more time together, they develop feelings for each other. Ultimately, they work together to uncover the truth and eliminate the villains.
说好的厌食王爷呢，怎么做啥吃啥 | "What Happened to the Anorexic Prince? He Eats Everything!"

Zou Ke Jun, Tan Jiu LuoTang Zhixia transmigrates into the body of a spoiled princess. Faced with the anorexic and mute prince Lin Xiao, she burns their divorce papers and vows to become a rich woman. Using her supernatural abilities to farm and do mukbang (eating broadcasts), she successfully raises the prince, even curing the Empress Dowager and providing sweet potatoes to alleviate famine. The once sickly prince speaks up for her, transforming into a jealous and relentlessly pursuing her. In the end, Tang Zhixia achieves success in both love and career, fulfilling her dream of becoming a rich woman!
穿书了，谁还稀罕当平妻 | "Transmigrated into a Book, Who Wants to Be a Second Wife?"

Huang Jing Zhou (Xiao Tai), Cai Miao YanDidn't you say you'd keep your distance, Your Highness? What happened to your vow? Transmigrated into a novel as a cannon fodder ex-wife, all she wanted was to defy fate and live a carefree life. But why did that cold-faced prince, burdened with lifetimes of merit and destined to be entangled with the female lead, always appear by her side? He coldly rejected her while simultaneously shielding her from all open and hidden attacks. When the mastermind behind it all emerged, he drew his sword and protected her behind him. "I've changed my mind," he said, "you absolutely must take this dual cultivation position."
逼锦鲤替嫁活阎王，相府气运全断了 | "Forcing a Lucky Koi to Marry a Living Yama, the Prime Minister's Mansion's Luck is Completely Destroyed"

Jin Wang, Liu Xing ChenSu Jinli, the legitimate daughter of the Prime Minister's family, was regarded as the family's "living lucky charm" from a young age, her destiny capable of sustaining the family's fortune for a century. However, the powerful minister Xiao Chengyuan, known as the "Living Yama," plotted to break the family's luck by having Su Jinli marry into the family in his place. On their wedding night, Xiao Chengyuan revealed the truth of the substitution, but was surprised to find a stark contrast between Su Jinli's pure and kind nature and her cold demeanor. As the two clashed, the truth about the Prime Minister's family's gradually declining fortune surfaced. Struggling between power struggles and genuine feelings, Su Jinli ultimately changed her fate, protecting her family and melting the heart of the "Living Yama."
她是你皇祖母，收拾你一下怎么啦 | "She's Your Imperial Grandmother, What's Wrong with Giving You a Little Discipline?"

Yu Di, Yang Luo QianModern-day academic genius Yuan Xi transmigrates to the Yuan Dynasty. After dying at sixty, she is reborn as a young girl, returning to the reign of an unfilial descendant. Faced with a grandson who favors his concubine over his wife and wreaks havoc on the court, as well as a transmigrated empress dowager who covets the throne, she uses the wisdom and courage of a founding empress dowager to restore order, punish treacherous officials, appoint capable generals, protect the royal bloodline and the Yuan Dynasty, and even promote female empowerment. Ultimately, after restoring the dynasty to its rightful place, she travels freely.
我的未婚夫阎罗大人＆我的夫君是阎罗 | "My Fiancé, Lord Yama & My Husband is Yama"

Xia Jin Mu, Su Yu TongSu Yao, betrayed by her adopted sister Su Yingxue, becomes a villain and loses her loved ones. In despair, she enters into a marriage contract with the Underworld King Mo Chen, hoping to use his power to seek revenge. Afterwards, Su Yao tries to break the contract, but Mo Chen needs the power to break a seal, and his forceful pursuit gradually makes her fall in love. Just when Su Yao truly accepts him, she discovers that it was all a carefully orchestrated scheme by Mo Chen.
双面嫡女扶摇上 | "The Two-Faced Eldest Daughter Rises"

Xiang Tai Cheng, Zhang Lan YueAfter Shen Ruyan's birth mother passed away, she was abused by her aunt. Her dowry was taken away, and to prevent Shen Ruyan from marrying, she was confined to the house, forbidden to see anyone, and treated like a slave. Taking advantage of her aunt taking her two older sisters to a banquet, Shen Ruyan seized the opportunity to steal the magical jade bracelet left to her by her mother, transforming herself into an even more beautiful and alluring woman, and went out to find a marriage partner. The bracelet's magic only lasted until midnight. By a twist of fate, she met Lu Jingchen, and hurriedly fled before the magic wore off. Lu Jingchen, still infatuated with Shen Ruyan and remembering her promise to marry him, used the jade pendant to order a city-wide search for her.
烬中欢 | "Joy in the Ashes"

Wang Ming Yang, Zhu Rong JunA county princess burdened with a blood feud encounters a fake scholar during her husband selection process, who turns out to be the suspected murderer of her father. After several entanglements, they join hands to break the deadlock, which turns into a desperate love affair that leads them to flee together! The disfigured county princess and the disguised prince who faked his death to seek revenge use the husband selection process to work together to solve a murder case. They want to uncover the truth of the palace coup three years ago amidst the turmoil of learning and power struggles. In the process, they are caught in the mystery of their identities and burned by their old feelings. What will become of the two of them in the future?
以爱为界，隔岸观你 | "Love as the Boundary, Watching You from Across the River"

Zhou Hang, Tian YuanUpon returning to China, Li Yuan visited a bar for the first time and met Jiang Su, a bartender. He fell in love at first sight. Jiang Su, because of a sum of money, fell into Li Chengyuan's trap and was forced to become his mistress. Unexpectedly, not only Li Chengyuan but also Li Yuan came to provoke her. She couldn't escape Li Yuan's grasp and had to endure his forceful plunder.
替嫁新娘商少的掌心娇飒翻了 | "The Substitute Bride: Young Master Shang's Palm is Full of Charm"

Li Si Yang, Zhang JieSang Chuzhi suffered ten years of abuse at the hands of her stepmother. Her childhood sweetheart, Shen Zhijing, in an effort to save his family business, gave her as a gift to Shang Yuzhou, the son of a prominent figure in Beijing's elite circles. Unbeknownst to him, Shang Yuzhou had secretly loved her for ten years and readily married her, showering her with affection afterward. Betrayed, Sang Chuzhi resolved to build her career, confronting her scumbag husband, fighting back against her wicked sister and stepmother's mistreatment. On her path to revenge, she gradually saw the true nature of Shang Yuzhou and fell in love with him. Ultimately, the villains reaped what they sowed, and Sang Chuzhi achieved success in both her career and love life, finding fulfillment in her life.
双向替身 | "Mutual Substitutes"

Ye Bo, Bao QingFor two years, Jiang Nanxi served as Huo Jifeng's substitute, while he remained celibate for his beloved. As soon as his beloved returned to the country, Huo Jifeng filed for divorce. Everyone assumed the virtuous Jiang Nanxi would accept her fate, but she drugged Huo Jifeng and left gracefully. Huo Jifeng initially sought revenge, but seeing her with someone else, he was consumed by jealousy. When he humbled himself and begged for reconciliation, he realized he too was a substitute, and not her only one. The proud man ultimately knelt and begged for forgiveness; the fate everyone had predicted for Jiang Nanxi had become his own.

陷落京霓＆暮然回首 | "Fall of the Jingle & Return of the Dusk"

Ma Xiao Yu, Sun Qian XunShen Jingni, the heiress of the Shen family, mistakenly identifies Zhao Zonglan, the tyrannical head of the Zhao family and a prominent figure in Beijing's elite circles, as her target, Zhao Siyuan, in an attempt to protect her fledgling brand and acquire Song brocade. This misunderstanding sets the stage for a complicated relationship between the two. From being forced to embark on a "strategic apology plan" to a romantic Christmas at a hot spring resort, the aloof and taciturn Zhao Zonglan, under Shen Jingni's influence, sheds his icy exterior and reveals a tender and doting side. Ultimately, the two openly confront their feelings for each other, confirm their commitment to each other with the blessings of their families, achieving a happy ending that "began with a misunderstanding, deepened with true love, and ended in lifelong companionship.
粉红王爷 | "The Pink Prince"

Wang Pei Yan, Yu Yin, Huai Wen, Li Yu TongShi Qianxia transmigrates into the novel's finale, reduced to a beggar on the street. Suppressing her hunger, she stops a pink carriage, only to be targeted by the crazed Prince Gu Qingyun. All because she bears a striking resemblance to his enemy—Princess Yujia of the previous dynasty. Gu Qingyun forcibly takes her back to his manor to be his "enemy's substitute," subjecting her to all sorts of torment, yet paying her a staggering 50,000 taels a month! Shi Qianxia endures it for the money, recklessly pursuing her path to becoming the Prince's concubine, but gradually discovers that beneath Gu Qingyun's arrogance and ruthlessness lies a broken past of imprisonment and torture. The two "fellow sufferers" heal each other amidst their chaotic and bickering daily lives. Gu Qingyun must confront—does he truly hate that face, or has he already fallen in love with this vibrant and arrogant soul?
雪落时分 | “When Snow Falls”

Jin Ze (Garvey Jin), Yuan Yu HanThe story revolves around Yue Liqing and Yu Yinyin, a couple in a business marriage. During a proposal in the snow-capped mountains, they are caught in an avalanche and awaken in a parallel world with fragmented memories—the husband suspects his wife of infidelity, while the wife has no recollection of the marriage. However, they rediscover each other and get to know one another while investigating the truth. As conspiracies on the snowfield, family conflicts, and a conspiracy involving their first love surface, the two travel through the snow-capped mountains, horse farms, and old streets of Yili, gradually unraveling the mysteries behind their memories. Ultimately, witnessed by the snow and ice, they rediscover their love that transcends time.
沈鱼落晏 | “Sinking Fish, Falling Dawn”

Ai Hong Chen, Long Yi Yi (Wang Jin)Shen Yu, a wealthy heiress, is unloved by her parents. Her sister's staged kidnapping lands her in jail, and her father is ashamed of her, her mother berates her for being vicious, and her brother says she deserves it. Feeling unloved in her family, she cuts ties with them, only to find herself pampered by the heir of Haicheng. Later, Shen Yu learns that there has always been a light in her life named Yan Shen, illuminating, warming, and healing her in places she couldn't see. To him, she is his exclusive, undivided love.
公主无诏 | "Princess Without Imperial Summons"

Liu Shang Lin, Tan Yan YanAfter Princess Linchuan's rebirth, to make amends to her former husband, Yunzheng, she risked her life to protect him from certain death. He ascended the throne, while she lay dead hanging at the city gates. Three years later, they met again in a military camp. She disguised herself as a stable boy, desperately trying to conceal her identity, while he relentlessly tested her. In the struggle and uncertainty, the truth of their past life and the love and hate of this one slowly unfolded. When the stability of the empire and her personal reputation became new obstacles, Yunzheng resolutely chose to abdicate and find her. Ultimately, Linchuan realized that true love is standing side by side.
请叫我鬼差大人 | "Please Call Me the Ghost Messenger"

Hao Fu Shen, Yang Shu Yu, Gao Jia LanAcross the vast land of Kyushu, terror has resurfaced, and bizarre phenomena rage! The people are displaced, and countless lives are lost! In this darkest hour of despair, a void post office silently appears, and crimson letters arrive without a sound. A mysterious young man, Wang Ye, emerges from nowhere! Witness him vanquish the bizarre, slay the evil spirits, and vanquish the great demon! With his mortal body, he cleanses the chaotic world; with his crimson blood, he restores peace—this era of rampant terror will ultimately end in his hands!
我靠伪装神女攻略整个皇朝 | "I Conquered the Entire Dynasty by Disguising Myself as a Goddess"

Deng Hao, Zhao Mu YanJiang Wu transmigrated into a fictional era and was bound to a system that rewards favorability points with cash back. Only by successfully winning over all the characters in the game could she leave this era and convert the favorability points earned by these characters into real money to take home. In order to earn enough money for retirement and return to her own era, Jiang Wu came up with the idea of ​​pretending to be a god. Thus, she began to conquer the dynasty, bring peace and happiness to the people, and transform from a "false goddess" into a "true goddess" who was admired and respected by all. In this way, she could complete the game, win over all the characters, return to reality, and become a billionaire!
婚后对她心动 | "Falling for Her After Marriage"

He Yu Yang, He Ling YaoThis story tells of a love triangle within a wealthy family that begins with a contract and ends with genuine affection. When the decisive and shrewd Ming Shuang bursts into a hotel room, tearing apart her cheating boyfriend, she also stumbles into the sights of business tycoon Ji Xingzhou. A marriage agreement with a "million-dollar monthly salary" binds these two individuals, each with their own needs, together. Thus, teaming up to outwit her stepmother, fight back against a scheming woman, and reorganize the wealthy family becomes their daily routine. The initially composed client and contractor gradually lose control and fall in love amidst their shared struggles. When the contract expires, she resolutely walks away, but he chases after her with red eyes, declaring, "My heart has already strayed; you can't escape."
家有肥妻好运来 | "Good Fortune Comes with a Chubby Wife"

Zhang Hao Yang, Yang Yu MengIn the simple and vibrant 1980s, Su Xiaoxiao had a beautiful older sister who, with her outstanding looks and unique charm, won the title of "City Flower," enjoying immense fame and becoming the center of attention. However, beneath this glamorous exterior lay a scheming and extremely jealous heart. Su Xiaoxiao possessed delicate eyebrows, starry eyes, and snow-white skin. She was also exceptionally talented, able to sing and dance, and write beautifully. Watching Su Xiaoxiao's ever-increasing brilliance, her sister's jealousy burned fiercely, threatening to consume her.
黑千金上位手册 | "The Black Heiress's Guide to Rising to Power"

Liu Yu Lu, Yi ChengLin Jian, misled by slander from others, was sent to the countryside with her pregnant mother by her wealthy father. She struggled for twenty years in the lower rungs of society, surviving several assassination attempts by a female supporting character, transforming herself into a ruthless and cunning woman. After being taken back home, facing provocation from her vicious stepsister, she took the initiative, winning back her father's trust, stealing her stepsister's fiancé, bringing retribution upon her stepsister, stepmother, and scumbag father, and seizing the Lin family's fortune. Meanwhile, she and the male lead, Wen Yanxiu, went from scheming and manipulating each other to fighting side-by-side, even helping him retrieve the heart that his biased parents had given to his brother.
真不怪我，少帅他非要为我挡刀 | "It's Not My Fault, the Young Marshal Insisted on Taking a Knife for Me"

Luo Pei Qi , Hu Yao WenIntern screenwriter Jiang Nianqing transmigrates to the Republican era, becoming the fiancée of the young marshal Meng Tingchen. She is bound to the "True Love is Invincible" system, requiring her to gain 100% of his affection within a month to return to the modern world. She overcomes numerous challenges, including resolving a wedding crisis, dealing with a scheming woman who uses her as a surrogate, and navigating her brother's collusion with others. Using modern thinking, she runs a newspaper, establishes a girls' school, and promotes change, eventually winning over the aloof young marshal, who initially treats her with suspicion but later becomes attracted to her and secretly supports her. Through repeated betrayals by villains and life-or-death trials, their love deepens. Ultimately, to save Meng Tingchen from being shot, Jiang Nianqing chooses to disappear in exchange for his life.
清知入怀 | "Qingzhi Enters My Arms"

Wu Xu Dong, Ai Jiang ShanA lucid Ruan Qingzhi transmigrates into a novel as the tragic heroine. To avoid a horrific death, she decisively clings to the golden thigh of Shen Tingbai, a CEO in a vegetative state. After Shen Tingbai awakens, his initial curiosity turns into deep affection. Together, they resolve family and business crises, and their feelings deepen. Ultimately, Ruan Qingzhi matures into an independent woman, Shen Tingbai proposes, and the two achieve success in both their careers and love.
闹离婚后，硬汉老公红眼求抱抱 | "After a Divorce, the Tough Husband Begs for a Hug with Red Eyes"

Zhou Yan Zhe, Zhou Yu LingLin Xia, a modern-day chief designer, is transported to the 1970s and finds herself in the body of a troublesome, cannon fodder wife! Facing the prospect of being forced to take poison and having her reputation ruined, she retaliates by subduing her awful adoptive mother, kicking away her bloodsucking scumbag husband, and using her unparalleled tailoring skills to turn the tables, rising from a fired temporary worker to the director of a state-owned factory! She plans to save enough money to divorce her husband and live a carefree life, but the rumoredly cold and ruthless Lu Beiting transforms into a devoted "wife-obsessed" man, showering her with affection. Fighting against scheming women and her true love, and engaging in bustling production, Lin Xia achieves success in both love and career, weaving a sweet and heartwarming love story in the 1970s courtyard!
太子救命！又双叒叕要死了 | "Prince, Save Me! I'm Dying Again!"

Sun Wen Bo, Shao Yi RuiChen Wanwan, the legitimate daughter of Marquis Chen, is repeatedly reborn at victory celebration banquets on the frontier due to Lin Wei's character-altering system, where she is repeatedly tortured and killed by Lin Wei. Chen Wanwan can hear Lin Wei's thoughts and gradually uncovers her character-altering tricks. She also discovers that Lin Wei is the daughter of her father's mistress from years ago and harbors a long-standing grudge against her. During the banquets, Chen Wanwan repeatedly tries to avoid trouble with Lin Wei, unexpectedly encountering Crown Prince Xiao Ji, with whom she had a conflict four years ago, and discovers that Xiao Ji may also be trapped in the cycle. The two go from initial antagonism and probing to reaching a cooperation agreement. Chen Wanwan uses Xiao Ji's power to fight against Lin Wei, expose Lin Wei's character-altering conspiracy, and together attempt to break the cycle of rebirth.
坏了，恋爱脑池总他有读心术 | "Oh No, Love Brain Pool Has Mind-Reading Abilities!"

Li Shu Tao, Zhang Yu MengThe story follows Shen Qingshu, who dies in a car accident but unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a wealthy bride. To stay in this new world, she is forced into a "contract marriage" with Chi Huaizhi and tasked with breaking up the male lead Chi Jizhou and the female lead Lin Xiyue by a system mission. Unexpectedly, on their wedding day, Chi Huaizhi gains the ability to read minds, hearing all of Shen Qingshu's inner thoughts. From initial resistance to eventual attraction, the two gradually develop a real-life romance amidst their chaotic daily lives. While Shen Qingshu tries to "build her career" to hinder the plot, Chi Huaizhi secretly pursues her. This bickering couple joins forces to fight against the "world's consciousness," ultimately uncovering the conspiracy and finding true love in a hilarious yet sweet romance of arranged marriage turning into love.

she became pregnant with the child of Prince Xiao Heng. In this cannibalistic royal palace, the lives of maids were as worthless as weeds, and those carrying the prince's child were certain to die. With the princess's spies everywhere, Shen Yueqian could only desperately seek a way to survive. A good opportunity arose, and Shen Yueqian successfully escaped the palace. When they met again, Shen Yueqian had given birth to a lovely child. Seeing the child beside Shen Yueqian, who looked nine-tenths like himself, Xiao Heng could no longer control himself.
前女友后悔哭：我的老婆是首富 | "My Ex-Girlfriend Cries With Regret: My Wife is the Richest Woman!"

Lin Yu Xi, Deng Yan NiAfter being betrayed by his girlfriend Liu Li, Fang Heng unexpectedly receives a million-dollar marriage proposal from the aloof CEO Leng Yu, binding him to the "Strongest Soft Rice King System," granting him a series of lucky draws and spending rebates. He heals the grandson of a billionaire, gaining powerful backing, slaps his ex-girlfriend and villains in the face, helps Leng Yu solidify her career, and uncovers family secrets. From a discarded husband to the richest man owning two conglomerates, the two develop a deep and unwavering bond while facing crises together, creating an ultimate sweet romance and a satisfying underdog story.
穿书成恶毒女配，我给情敌当僚机 | "Transmigrated Into a Book as the VillainousSupporting Character, I Become My Love Rival's Wingman!"

Zhu Jing Hao, Zhao Meng NaLin Weiwei, who transmigrated into a novel as the villainous female supporting character, absconded with a sum of money to save her life, but repeatedly became entangled with her domineering CEO husband, Gu Yechen. During this time, they faced obstacles from Lin Chi, family conflicts, and business crises, but Lin Weiwei gradually realized her own feelings, while Gu Yechen remained steadfast in his protection. Ultimately, the two resolved all crises, held a heartwarming wedding, welcomed twins, and began a happy life together.

越夜越熟之上瘾＆入夜我们谈恋爱 | “The Later the Night, the More Addictive It Becomes & Let's Fall in Love at Night”

Li Zi Jie, Yu CongSeeking a stable life, Shiyue married the kind and gentle Zhang Zhiyuan. She diligently played the role of a virtuous wife, managing the household affairs meticulously and treating her husband with tenderness and care, seeking only a peaceful and uneventful life. However, reality did not meet her expectations; the warmth of their marriage gradually cooled, and resentment and disappointment weighed heavily on her heart. One day, she met Qin Zhao, Zhang Zhiyuan's brother. Qin Zhao, who usually preferred vibrant and outgoing women, was moved by her appearance after she shed her docile facade. Their paths crossed subtly, and their secret companionship gradually deepened their relationship. Qin Zhao's growing concern drew Shiyue into an unexpected emotional storm.
在港难逃，香江旧梦 | “Trapped in Hong Kong, Old Dreams of the Fragrant Harbor”

Dong Yi, Cui Shi YiTo raise money for her mother's medical expenses, Li Xijian impersonated Lin Yinyin, Jiang Yan's unrequited love, and developed feelings for the blind Jiang Yan. Feeling inferior due to her identity, she fled and gave birth to her daughter, Li Li, alone in Hong Kong. Five years later, Li Li is diagnosed with leukemia and requires enormous medical expenses. Li Xijian returns to Hong Kong to seek employment and unexpectedly becomes Jiang Yan's private lawyer, leading to their reunion. Although Jiang Yan doesn't recognize Li Xijian, he is attracted by her calmness and gentleness and begins to approach her under the guise of business, while still searching for the missing Lin Yinyin. During their time together, Jiang Yan gradually discovers Li Xijian's special qualities.* This plot again. I don't like this plot because until now, all the versions only have the revelation in the last few minutes. It's annoying...
咬痕为契 | “Bite Marks as a Pact”

Zhang Yun Tao, Liu YingLi Li, a girl from Dongguo, infiltrates the Imperial Chinese Restaurant under an assumed name to investigate the truth behind her sister's death, where she is targeted by Ethan, a mixed-race genius doctor. Ethan is possessive and has a biting fetish, viewing people as commodities, but he sees Li Li as his only "toy." The two discover that the sister's death is connected to a mysterious organization that traffics in people and organs. Li Li tries to make Ethan fall in love with her in order to destroy the criminal network, while Ethan enjoys the process of "taming" her. In a game of lies, desire, and life and death, their relationship gradually becomes entangled from control to resistance. In the end, Li Li exposes the organization's inner workings, and Ethan begins to learn to respect life and love.
给残疾大佬做保姆的日常 | “Daily Life as a Caregiver for a Disabled Tycoon”

Du Ya Fei, Lin Zi RongTo alleviate her family's financial burden, unemployed liberal arts student Song Tinghuan takes a high-paying job as a nanny to care for Shen Yuqing, a wealthy CEO whose personality has drastically changed after a car accident. She breaks away from conventional relationships, illuminating Shen Yuqing's gloomy life with her energetic and straightforward personality. The two gradually develop feelings for each other, but face challenges such as the principle of "not dating the boss," the truth behind the car accident, and interference from rivals. Ultimately, with Song Tinghuan's support, Shen Yuqing regains his fighting spirit, uncovers the truth, successfully turns his life around, and wins the heart of his beloved. Their relationship transforms from employer-employee to soulmates who redeem each other.
救命我养的崽全是未来反派 | “Help! All My Foster Children Are Future Villains”

Zhu Jing Hao, Wu Jia LuXia Qiao wakes up to find herself transmigrated into the body of the villain's cannon fodder mother in a novel. Initially wanting a divorce, her original husband, Zhou Yuchen, after hearing her heartfelt words, offers her an exorbitant compensation package in exchange for her staying to raise the children. Xia Qiao then embarks on a daily battle of wits with the villainous children, gradually changing their temperament and developing feelings for Zhou Yuchen. Originally intending only to take the money and leave, Xia Qiao becomes increasingly involved in this family, ultimately deciding to join forces with Zhou Yuchen to change the tragic ending of the original story.
咬红杏 | “The Red Apricot”

Li Ruo Xun, Xue Zi QiJiang Mei, once the most beautiful courtesan at Yunlang Pavilion, was rescued and kept by Pei Jingchuan, a noble young master from Hanjing. However, heartbroken by his words, "you're nothing but a piece of trash," she ran away with her money. Three years later, to repay his life-saving grace, Jiang Mei was forced to sacrifice herself to save someone, unexpectedly reuniting with Pei Jingchuan. Pei Jingchuan harbored resentment over her escape but couldn't hide his love for her, meticulously plotting to keep her by his side, defying family rules and refusing an arranged marriage for her sake. Jiang Mei, however, due to the disparity in their social status and her past trauma, didn't believe his sincerity and only wanted to escape, resorting to lies to deceive him. This pair of stubborn but soft-hearted noblemen and the clear-headed former courtesan, in their pursuit and tests, embarked on a deeply moving entanglement where she could only have him.
十丈软红尘 | “Ten Zhang of Soft Red Dust”

Huang Jing Zhou (Xiao Tai), Wu Yan Yi He, Liu Yu Ting, Wang Qiu Yu, Leng Yue YinIn 1936, Ye Tingzhou, the young master of the Green Dragon Gang, had been searching for his sister for ten years when he unexpectedly encountered Ye Anning, a perfumer, at an ancient temple. He disguised himself as a detached Buddhist monk and took her in, unaware that she was an imposter trying to raise money for her mother's medicine. Amidst the deception, feelings blossomed, formidable enemies surrounded them, and their true identities were revealed. In the midst of worldly entanglements and chaos, the two found a destined love story intertwined with love and hate.
七年南风吹晚星 | “Seven Years of South Winds Blowing Evening Stars”

Wang Hui Long, Jing LuEveryone thought Lin Wanxing was Gu Nanyao's "lapdog," shielding him from drinks and attacks, willingly serving as his most humble secretary. In reality, Lin Wanxing approached Gu Nanyao only to use him as a substitute for her deceased lover, Gu Nanchen, and also to fulfill Gu Nanchen's dying wish of caring for him for seven years. During those seven years, Gu Nanyao tolerated Su Ruowei's wanton humiliation and harm towards Lin Wanxing. From life-or-death races to skydiving, Lin Wanxing repeatedly risked her life for Gu Nanyao. But when Gu Nanyao finally belatedly realized he had feelings for her, Lin Wanxing had already accumulated enough disappointment and decided to leave.
天降碎嘴小青梅 | "A Chatty Childhood Sweetheart Falls From the Sky"

Tan Zhe Xi, Xu Xing YueAs a child, Qin Yuchen suffered from post-traumatic stress disorder due to his father's death, making him withdrawn and quiet. His mother found Shen Ruoan, an orphan from an orphanage, to be his tutor and teach him to speak. Shen Ruoan, with her talkative nature, successfully helped Qin Yuchen overcome his emotional distress and learn to speak. Qin Yuchen also saw many admirable qualities in Shen Ruoan, and after their separation, he secretly vowed to marry her when he grew up. Later, Qin Yuchen became a powerful figure in the business world, rising to become one of the world's richest men. His first act after achieving success was to find Shen Ruoan and marry her.
月迷津渡 | "The Moonlit Ferry Crossing"

Zeng Xu Hang, Wen JieSong Yao was framed. She was falsely accused of being the real heiress of the Lu family and was even impersonated for saving President He Xunyan's life. She was sent to a mental hospital and suffered three years of torment, eventually developing Alzheimer's disease and dying. Her best friend Qin Fanghao rescued her and revealed her condition to her brother Lu Chi. He Xunyan also learned the truth about the mistake of identifying his savior by mistake. After the truth came out, He Xunyan and the Lu family, filled with remorse, realized that the mistake could not be undone and everything was irreversible.
⬅️[PREV]16 January Releases:1. 夜色撩人

Wu Tian Hao, Yue Yu Ting[HERE]2. 攀高枝 - Wang Yi Lei, Liu Xi Yu[HERE]3. 乔小姐，你捡的老公要贴贴 - Cai Xin Yang, Xiang Yun Jie[HERE]4. 予你岁岁美好 - Huang Hao Wen, Yang Shu Yu[HERE]5. 越夜越熟之上瘾＆入夜我们谈恋爱 - Li Zi Jie, Yu Cong[HERE]6. 在港难逃，香江旧梦  - Dong Yi, Cui Shi Yi[HERE]7. 咬痕为契 - Zhang Yun Tao, Liu Ying[HERE]8. 给残疾大佬做保姆的日常 - Du Ya Fei, Lin Zi Rong[HERE]9. 救命我养的崽全是未来反派 - Zhu Jing Hao, Wu Jia Lu[HERE]10. 咬红杏 - Li Ruo Xun, Xue Zi Qi[HERE]11. 十丈软红尘 - Huang Jing Zhou (Xiao Tai), Wu Yan Yi He[HERE]12. 七年南风吹晚星 - Wang Hui Long, Jing Lu[HERE]13. 天降碎嘴小青梅 - Tan Zhe Xi, Xu Xing Yue[HERE]14. 月迷津渡 - Zeng Xu Hang, Wen Jie[HERE]
大叔罗曼史 | “Uncle Romance”

Wang Dao Tie, Zhao Ting Yi, Bai Fang Wen, Zhang Chu Xuan, Yu Ling, Ma Xiao Wei [complete]Three middle-aged best friends encounter setbacks in their lives: top lawyer Wen Shi'an is publicly divorced; playboy Han Yue unexpectedly becomes a devoted lover, silently protecting his brother's younger sister Wen Xiao for 15 years; and cold-blooded CEO Zhou Mu is manipulated by a Gen Z intern. When these three elite men stand at a crossroads in their lives, their 17-year brotherhood becomes their last resort—amidst laughter and tears filled with the aroma of hotpot, they find their own answers.
软肋 | "Weakness"

Zhao Zhen Dong, Han Le Yao, Mei YangNing An'an, a nurse at the clinic, came from an orphanage and faced many hardships, yet she always faced life with optimism and positivity, warming everyone around her like a little sun and embracing the world with the utmost kindness. But even such a person couldn't warm the heart of Fan Wujiu, a heart hidden beneath a cold exterior. Born in the slums, Fan Wujiu grew up in the complex social environment of Cantana. Years of constant tension and harsh living conditions shaped his taciturn and withdrawn personality, making him feel as if he was born into hell. Until Fan Wujiu met Ning An'an, who pulled him from the abyss into the sunlight.
第七日蝉鸣 | "The Seventh Day of Cicada Song"

Zhang Chi, Hou Cheng Yue, Liu Yu Hang, Zhi Chun He, Zheng FengBetrayed by her newlywed husband and deeply wounded, Jiang Zhi unexpectedly encounters the body of her long-lost "husband." The familiar face opens its eyes, revealing itself to be Zhou Fan, a young "wanderer" with amnesia. It turns out Jiang Zhi has become a special human capable of seeing these "wanderers." Bound by a seven-day life-or-death situation, Jiang Zhi and Zhou Fan embark on a wondrous seven-day journey of love and redemption. Through encounters that unravel the obsessions of the "wanderers," they also help each other resolve their inner conflicts and rediscover their own lives and the truth.
诱为己有 | “Lure It to Mine”

Liang Si Wei, Zheng Chen YuAt the engagement banquet, Xing Lie, the true heir of the Xing family, returned from his spree, not only stealing his bride-to-be but also taking her for himself. The torn wedding dress bore the mark of his actions. Lin Tingran feigned a loving marriage with Xing Lie, but secretly harbored a knife behind her back. He grabbed her wrist, the one holding the knife, and pressed it against the mirror. "Look carefully," he said, "who is truly giving you pleasure now?"
人前不熟，人后熟透 | "Unfamiliar in Public, Familiar in Private"

Zhao Guan Yu, He Tian TianDiscovering her husband Zhang Zhiyuan's infidelity, Shi Yue tears away her long-maintained facade of a virtuous wife, determined to divorce him and refuse to tolerate it any longer. One night, drowning her sorrows in a bar, she unexpectedly encounters Qin Zhao, her husband's friend. One seeks solace in someone else's company, while the other is captivated by the stubbornness beneath her gentle exterior; they hit it off immediately. Aloof in public, intimate in private. Shi Yue believes this relationship will fizzle out, but Qin Zhao has already fallen deeper and deeper into it.
全网黑后，我靠演技封神 | "After Being Blacklisted Online, I Became a God of Acting"

Li Meng Ran, Guo JingActress Su Wan is reborn as Li Xiangwan, a struggling actress universally disliked online. On an acting variety show, she recreates a classic scene from her past life with actor Gu Fan, turning the tables and winning the lead role in "The Strategy of Mountains and Rivers." Her rival, Xia Weiwei, colludes with powerful figures to scheme against her. Xia first questions her dancing skills, which Li defuses with her "Dance of the Flying Swan." Xia then creates a dangerous situation on set by switching her sword with a real one, and at the wrap party, releases maliciously edited photos, sparking a boycott. Li Xiangwan and director Lu Zeming fight back, thwarting the conspiracy and bringing the villains to justice. "The Strategy of Mountains and Rivers" is a huge success, earning her the Best Actress award and ushering in a new chapter in her life.
吻过荆棘 | "Kissed Through Thorns"

Min Jie, Zhang Yan LinDriven to desperation, Shen Jinshuang was found by Mo Yehan, the heir of a reclusive family, near a garbage dump. Unexpectedly, this obsessive and possessive man, whose life was nearing its end, became entangled with her. "Before sunset, you may fly high; after sunset, return to my side." From then on, the violent and bloodthirsty man willingly became her shadow and the blade in her hand. He doted on her, protected her, and submitted to her.
云上有个月亮 | "There's a Moon Above the Clouds"

Jin Jia Yu, Teng Ze WenAfter being cheated on, Ruan Qingyue, a former housewife, resolutely divorced and struggled to make a living with her daughter. By chance, she met Yun Chen, a single CEO father strongly recommended by her adorable son, Yun Yao. To cope with her ex-husband's harassment and their current predicament, the two embarked on a "trial marriage." During this process, Ruan Qingyue remained independent, working hard to start her own private restaurant, while Yun Chen was moved by her resilience and warmth. Ultimately, the two overcame their differences in social status and external obstacles, honestly and sincerely building a loving and warm family of four.
冒姓琅琊之南朝贵公子 | "The Noble Young Master of the Southern Dynasty from Langya"

Jin Ze (Garvey Jin), Li Xi Wei (RAW)Wang Yang, the youngest researcher at the institute, unexpectedly transmigrates into the body of a fleeing refugee being hunted down. In desperation, he lies and claims to be from the aristocratic Langya Wang clan. His extensive modern knowledge makes him a figure of great talent in the eyes of others, and he becomes the Grand Master of the Imperial Academy. The Langya Wang clan includes him in their genealogy, and the talented Xie Xinghan is attracted to his abilities. He is favored by the emperor during academic discussions and becomes the emperor's right-hand man.
顾总给钱不回家 | "President Gu Gives Money but Doesn't Go Home"

Li Hao, Ding KunShen Tang transmigrated into the body of a doomed female supporting character, clutching a priceless marriage contract and only wanting to retire peacefully. Little did she know that Gu Huai'an had been reborn and could hear all her innermost thoughts. On the surface, she was attentive and obedient, but inside she was a whirlwind of complaints and lust for his body; Shen Tang's contrast gradually attracted Gu Huai'an. Was this marriage, which began as a contract, a cruel joke of fate, or the beginning of a passionate romance?
逆天狂妃倾天下 | "The Rebellious Mad Concubine Overturns the World"

Li Ruo Xun, Jiang YaoLin Jinzhao unexpectedly transmigrated into a book, becoming a cannon fodder female supporting character who was killed off as soon as she appeared. Gone right from the start? Lin Jinzhao refused to accept her fate and was determined to defy destiny. After the dramatic and suspenseful ending, Lin Jinzhao pointed at the damned screenwriter and cursed, "I said I was going to defy destiny and become the number one person in the cultivation world, not to give birth to 108 snake babies for that stinky snake, okay?"
至高至明日月 | "The Highest and Brightest Sun and Moon"

He Yu Yang, Yu CongTransmigrating from modern times to a chaotic era, Song Zhao and Lou Zhixiao rise from humble beginnings to become the founding emperor and empress. Seven years later, Lou Zhixiao returns victorious only to find a mother and child with him, betraying their vows and treating her coldly during her childbirth, causing her to lose her loyal servant and suffer a life-threatening delivery. In desperation, Song Zhao enlists the help of a reclusive sage, winning over the people and gradually undermining the dynasty. When love becomes a sacrifice to power struggles, she resolves to reclaim everything that was so easily taken from her—including the world that should have been shared.
权臣每日发癫，夫人藏不住了 | "The Powerful Minister Goes Mad Every Day, His Wife Can't Be Hidden Anymore"

Li Jun Chen, Yang FanLu Yao, the direct disciple of the Medical Sage, suffers a qi deviation during her cultivation practice and needs a spirit rhinoceros horn to prolong her life. Holding a betrothal jade pendant, she seeks out the powerful and treacherous Prime Minister Su Huai. At that time, Su Huai is suffering from the rare Miao poison "Yan Hua" and is desperately searching for the Medical Sage's successor. Both harboring their own ulterior motives, they agree to a marriage, beginning a tumultuous cycle of mutual exploitation. As the struggle for the spirit rhinoceros horn, the antidote to "Yan Hua," and a major treason case intertwine, Su Huai is willing to sacrifice his life for Lu Yao's survival. Ultimately, the two join forces to quell the rebellion. This love, which began with exploitation, ultimately becomes a destined bond of mutual devotion.
穿书后，我和闺蜜卷款跑路 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, My Best Friend and I Ran Away with the Money"

Li Jia Ming, Xia Mo, Xing Yue, Sha Xiao DongJiang Yan and Cheng Yiyi transmigrated into a novel, becoming cannon fodder in the Marquis's household. Learning of their tragic end in the original story, they resolved to escape. The two disrupted the wedding ceremony with a rooster, encountering Bai Shuangming and Bai Juncheng for the first time. Due to their unusual identities, they were suspected of being spies. The Empress Dowager and the Prime Minister controlled them with poison, ordering them to steal account books and city defense maps. They feigned compliance, using methods such as forging account books and feigning seduction to evade their tasks.
驸马每月给公主二十万安胎费 | "The Prince Consort Gives the Princess 200,000 Yuan a Month for Pregnancy Care"

Fan Cheng Qi, Zhou ZhouHuo Yu was a sickly princess, on the verge of death. Before she died, she wanted to take her brother's mortal enemy with her. However, she accidentally discovered that her illness vanished whenever she was near this man. She decisively decided to marry him, intending to torment him and avenge her brother! Gu Xuandu had a dream in which he married the stunningly beautiful Princess Jinyang, only to be killed by her on their wedding night. At Huo Yu's funeral, he was shocked to discover that the princess looked exactly like the woman in his dream. Not only that, the princess insisted on marrying him, claiming to be pregnant with his child and demanding 200,000 taels of silver monthly for pregnancy support. He gritted his teeth, wondering whether he should kill the princess.
纪总夫人来自农村 | "Mrs. Ji Comes from the Countryside"

Ai Ke Li Ya, Song XiChi Xiaoqing, a country girl, goes to the city to work and unexpectedly becomes the only cure for Ji Hengzhou, a billionaire CEO suffering from severe gynophobia. However, her scheming best friend, Chen Cuihua, forges a birthmark to claim credit and impersonate Chi Xiaoqing, marrying into the wealthy family. Chi Xiaoqing, with her exceptional intangible cultural heritage embroidery skills, enters Ji's factory and develops a fatal attraction to Ji Hengzhou amidst a series of crises. Faced with her scheming best friend's machinations and the CEO's misunderstandings, how will she turn the tables? The battle between the real and fake wives is about to erupt. Watch as this Cinderella manages to win over the aloof CEO and embroider a splendid life!
京霓入怀 | "Jing Ni Enters My Arms"

Xu Xiao, Wu Fei XueIn her quest to acquire rare Song brocade, Shen Jingni mistakenly enters the lounge of Zhao Zonglan, the head of the Zhao family. An unexpected entanglement ensues, leading to a contractual relationship between the two, with Shen Jingni becoming Zhao Zonglan's girlfriend. During their time together, Zhao Zonglan helps Shen Jingni overcome obstacles in her career and protects her, while Shen Jingni gradually melts his cold exterior. Their relationship evolves from initial mutual benefit to mutual attraction and a commitment to each other.

专治傅总各种不服 | "Specializing in Curing All of President Fu's Discontents"- Long Yi Chen, Ren Lou YiPsychology PhD student Ji Nuannuan transmigrates into a book, feigning amnesia to get close to Fu Jinghan. Originally intended to save her life, she unexpectedly begins a mutual protective relationship. She shields him from troubles, protects his family business, and helps him escape a fire

in return, he opens his heart to her, gives her his true feelings, and shows her unwavering love. Eighty episodes of sweet, flirtatious interactions, filled with both subtle competition and mutual understanding, as they work together to overcome obstacles and reclaim their family's glory. From strangers to devoted companions, they ultimately become each other's exclusive tenderness.
怦然心动时 | "When My Heart Fluttered"

Cao Jun Ke, Yu XinZhou Jia, a recent graduate and programmer, is forced into a blind date, only to discover that his date is none other than his former high school Chinese teacher, Chen Wanxin. This farcical blind date breaks down the boundaries between their past relationships. From an awkward encounter in a coffee shop to an unexpected incident at the movie theater, from offering warmth in the snow to going on an autumn outing together, to helping each other move and spending a late night together, the former teacher and student gradually lower their guard through their interactions. Zhou Jia's growing affection for Chen Wanxin and his budding feelings for her make this special relationship increasingly clear amidst the trials and tribulations.
京圈大佬夜夜爬墙来见我 | "Beijing's Bigwigs Climb Over the Wall Every Night to See Me"

Yuan Kai Kai, Zhao Xing HuiFive years ago, Jiang Shengyi and Gu Chengjin had a one-night stand, resulting in the birth of twins (a boy and a girl). Five years later, as the president of the Jiang Group, she wants to acquire a kindergarten due to a parent-child activity and reunites with Gu Chengjin, now the project manager of the "Beijing Core Enhancement" project. Their relationship is fraught with conflict yet harbors a hidden ambiguity. After Jiang Shengyi files a sexual harassment lawsuit, she unexpectedly receives a project bid. During this time, she faces difficulties from her sister Shen Lili and others, and after getting drunk, she becomes entangled with Gu Chengjin again. Ultimately, it is revealed that Gu Chengjin is the father of her children, and their relationship reaches a happy ending.
破产大佬不要慌，天降仙妻把忙帮 | "Don't Panic, Bankrupt Tycoon, a Fairy Wife Falls from the Sky to Help"

Ma Ze Han, Ma ChaoSystem intern Xue Yanxin (Xinxin) unexpectedly transmigrates to a novel world, becoming the vicious fiancée of Huo Yuan, the bankrupt male protagonist. To fix the world's bugs and avoid being wiped out, she must help Huo Yuan rebuild his business. During this process, she and Huo Yuan go from being wary of each other to supporting one another, and she discovers that Huo Yuan's younger brother, Qi Junlin, is actually the "original host" she once assisted. Together, the three uncover the Bai family's conspiracy to murder Huo and Xue's parents, and Xue Yanxin awakens her system power in the final crisis, turning the tide of battle. The story blends elements of revenge, a system, transmigration, and sweet romance, showcasing a bittersweet tale of redemption and growth.
预见你的爱情 | "Foreseeing Your Love"

Zhang Hao Wen, Chen ZhenTang Shuhan gains the superpower of precognition after a car accident. She mistakenly gets into the car of He Wenjing, the president of the He Group, and the two unexpectedly become entangled. To save her adoptive mother and escape her family's control, she enters into a contract marriage with He Wenjing. However, as they work together to overcome her stepmother's difficulties, her sisters' betrayals, and the schemes of business rivals, they gradually develop feelings for each other. With her precognitive abilities and resilience, Tang Shuhan exposes her family's conspiracies and the schemes of others. He Wenjing remains steadfast in his protection, and the two evolve from a contractual relationship into genuine love, ultimately becoming a couple.
精心安排下，我成了女强人 | "With Careful Planning, I Became a Strong Woman"

Liu Jing Yang, Zhou Xuan QiXia Xiaoman was struggling financially because her father was ill. By chance, arranged by the CEO, she downloaded a bizarre app. Under the app's instructions, she did all sorts of strange things to the CEO. She thought her life was ruined, but little did she know that each of her embarrassing moments was a carefully planned way for the CEO to secretly love her. After being exposed, the CEO clumsily confessed, "I love you, so I can only find other ways to stick to you!"
