触碰玫瑰 | "Touching the Rose"

Liang Si Wei, Sun Qian XunRuan Shisheng, the infamous eldest daughter of the Ruan family, becomes Meng Jinbei's wife through a marriage of convenience. Even Ruan Shisheng herself feels lucky, believing that fame and fortune have nothing to do with feelings. However, when she demands a divorce agreement and leaves gracefully, he seems to have gone mad. It turns out that this marriage, which began as a matter of profit, actually concealed his ten years of deep affection; it was all a long-planned scheme. (Aired: Jan 2, 2026)* I missed this one then lol
罗刹骨美人皮 | "Rakshasa Bone Beauty Skin"

Bai Fang Wen, Lu Lu LuThe famous opera singer Rouge is murdered and reborn as Shen Qingge through a shadow puppet box. She must change her skin monthly, or she will transform into a demon. She uses magic to infiltrate the Gu family for revenge, joining forces with the illegitimate son Gu Yun and Chen Mujin. When her appearance deteriorates, Gu Yunzheng begs Baijiabu to change her skin, uncovering the screen curse, the murder of his brother, and the soul-fighting technique against Li Ruolan. She then falsely accuses Liu Shuying of sabotaging her marriage proposal with "Rouge." Shen Qingge is kidnapped and escapes back to the opera troupe, revealing the truth about the maid's double. Ultimately, she destroys the Wanxiang Sect and restores the shadow puppetry to its rightful place.
前男友誓死不放手 | "Ex-Boyfriend's Unwavering Devotion"

Zhang Pei Bao, Zhao Yi Xuan (Ma Ming Jie)Gu Jiayi, who transmigrated into the book, knew that the obsessive CEO Lu Siyan would die for the original owner of the body. She decisively abandoned her escape plan and actively embraced this deep affection and life in a wealthy family. Facing Shen Peipei, who admired Lu Siyan and repeatedly plotted against her, Qin Wei, who fell in love at first sight and intended to interfere, as well as biased family members and internal scheming, Gu Jiayi, with her intelligence and courage, joined hands with Lu Siyan to uncover conspiracies, resolve crises, and reverse the tragic ending. In the process of overcoming numerous obstacles together, their feelings for each other deepened, and they finally became a couple, achieving a fulfilling love story.
站起来，我的招财猫大佬 | "Stand Up, My Lucky Cat Boss"

Sheng Yi Chen, Hong Yi XinWhen a lucky cat meets a cheerful puppy, watch how the 88th nanny of a crippled tycoon melts a frozen heart. Together they ride the carousel at the amusement park, blow up a latrine at an engagement party, watch fireworks, build swings, design flowerbeds—a gloomy person slowly recovers, becoming a new person with a "cure." The cheerful puppy, in healing others, also achieves success, gaining a jealous boyfriend who secretly eats blueberry jam to keep her from going out! And a uniquely adorable man who secretly rejoices when she touches his abs, wanting more!
糟糕，恶毒女配的心声被男主听到了&心聲夫婦今天官宣了嗎 | "Oh No, the Male Lead Heard the Villainous Female Supporting Character's Thoughts & Did the Heartfelt Couple Officially Announce Their Relationship Today?"

Hu Jin Chi, Liu YingFu Jiaojiao transmigrated into the body of a cannon fodder female supporting character in an old-fashioned CEO romance novel, becoming the secretary of the male lead, Jin Lihan. Initially, Fu Jiaojiao thought the story hadn't even begun. She and Jin Lihan developed feelings for each other, but Fu Jiaojiao insisted she was the villainous female supporting character and rejected Jin Lihan's affections. Jin Lihan, through reading Fu Jiaojiao's mind, realized he was the male lead in the story. In the end, Fu Jiaojiao accepted Jin Lihan, and the two lived happily ever after.
换巢鸾凤 | "A Phoenix Changing Nests"

Ming Chuan, Han Le YaoMerchant's daughter, Lu Zhaoning, married into a noble family but was met with coldness and neglect from her husband. Two years into their marriage, she remained celibate. In her quest for a title, and with her brother's recent "death," her husband was eager to consummate their marriage with his widowed sister-in-law. Therefore, she decided to find a new husband…
今夜有南音 | "Tonight There's Southern Music"

Wei Ling Yao, Xu YuanXu Nanyin decisively broke up with her boyfriend Chen Shiyu after discovering his infidelity. To comfort her seriously ill mother, she hastily married Shen Ye, an "ordinary" man. After marriage, she gradually discovered that Shen Ye was actually Lu Nanxiao, the richest man in Jiangcheng. The two stumbled along the way amidst concealment and misunderstanding, facing entanglement from her ex-boyfriend, rejection from the wealthy family, and the secret of her past. In the end, they were honest with each other, joined hands to overcome family pressure, revealed Xu Nanyin's true identity, and confirmed their true feelings for each other with everyone's blessings, achieving success in both love and career.
听见你心底的颜色 | "Hearing the Color in Your Heart"

Gao Gao, Song Zhao YiA blind date, each harboring their own secrets, leads to a whirlwind marriage between Mingruo, a blind musician, and Shang Chi, a CEO. He conceals his true identity by claiming to earn a meager salary of 5,000 yuan a month and to smoke and drink heavily, silently protecting her. Mingruo, however, already recognizes him as the man who saved her life in her youth. When the past is revealed and an unexpected event occurs, Shang Chi is willing to sacrifice his own sight to give her the possibility of seeing the world. From concealment to giving, two souls bound by fate leap and turn between lies and truth. This marriage of convenience, which began with a lie, ultimately forges an unconditional and genuine love through the deepest sacrifice.
极品亲妈逆袭记 | "The Ultimate Mother's Counterattack"

Ye Wen Yan, Lin Nian ChuA modern woman unexpectedly transmigrates into a book as Su Taotao, a villainous supporting character in the 1970s, inheriting a broken life marked by abandonment of her husband and children and a tarnished reputation. After awakening to her true nature, she reforms herself, using her culinary skills to improve her family's circumstances, repair family relationships, and fight back against her difficult relatives. Together with her engineer husband, Fu Zhengtu, she stabilizes her family and seizes the coconut candy business opportunity to establish a food factory, providing employment for family members and disabled individuals. She withstands pressure from competitors and ultimately showcases her products at a promotional event in the capital, achieving great success and a harmonious family life.
穿越八零家属院，冷面老公他超宠 | "Crossing Over to an 80s Family Compound, My Cold-Faced Husband is Super Pampered"

Cheng Cheng, Deng Xi, Lu QianModern medical guru Deng Jie unexpectedly travels back in time while receiving an award, becoming a lazy wife despised by everyone in the 1980s! Facing a cold and distant husband, Yang Rui, and a scheming rival, Liu Xin, she uses her superb medical skills to stage a powerful comeback—treating emergencies, thwarting schemes, and creating entirely new medical solutions, rising from a grassroots nurse to the head of her department. Workplace battles are fraught with danger, marital affection gradually transforms from a sense of responsibility to deep love, and they must also work together to combat a sudden epidemic! Witness how this time-traveling goddess navigates the challenges of the 1980s, establishing herself in her career while winning the heart of her beloved.
小狗不会冬眠 | "Puppies Don't Hibernate"

Zhang Hao Wen, Qiao JinTo escape the persecution and threats of her stepfather, Zhu Shouwen, writer Zhu Wendong painfully broke up with her first love, Qi Yanxue, and left the country five years later. Returning to China, she is determined to expose Zhu Shouwen's true colors and seek justice for herself and her mother, only to unexpectedly reunite with Qi Yanxue. Amidst misunderstandings and entanglements, the two resolve their past conflicts, joining forces to fight against Zhu Shouwen's conspiracies and Pei Miaomiao's provocations, exposing his crimes of sexual assault and illegal surveillance. Ultimately, Zhu Wendong successfully sends Zhu Shouwen to prison, overcomes her estrangement from Qi Yanxue, and they enter into marriage.
前夫要追妻，抱歉我领证了 | "My Ex-Husband Wants to Chase Me Back, Sorry, I've Already Got the Marriage Certificate"

Bai Huan Zhou, Liu Yu YeShang Shining and Lu Songyang were once each other's salvation, but their relationship completely collapsed after Lu Songyang suffered amnesia following brain cancer surgery. After losing his memory, Lu Songyang viewed Shang Shining as a stain, humiliating her in every way, while instead showering care for Fang Rui, ultimately leading to their divorce. In her despair, Shang Shining met Lu Jingzhou, Lu Songyang's uncle, a refined and aloof Buddhist from Beijing's elite circle, who carried prayer beads. Lu Jingzhou had long harbored feelings for Shang Shining and proposed a marriage of convenience to provide her with protection. After the marriage, Lu Jingzhou's gentleness and steadfastness healed Shang Shining's wounds, while Lu Songyang, having regained his memory, was consumed by remorse and relentlessly pursued her.
特工狂妃驾到，王爷乖乖躺好 | "The Special Agent's Mad Concubine Arrives, Your Highness, Lie Down Obediently"

Zhao Yuan You, Wen QingHaving just transmigrated, Su Yuyan immediately encountered a scenario of forced marriage. The special agent, Su Yuyan, declared it was no big deal; after all, she wasn't the one being forcibly taken. She was only interested in physical intimacy, not emotional connection; survival was the most important thing. Meanwhile, the "forced" Prince Rui, Jiang Hanyu, initially refused to submit but later became completely smitten, not only showering Su Yuyan with a lavish dowry but also spoiling her rotten. Su Yuyan tore apart the scheming woman and kicked the scumbag, and she and Prince Rui went from mutual dislike to a powerful alliance. Using their spatial abilities and modern knowledge, they quelled a severe drought in Qiangzhou, overthrew the crown prince, and helped Prince Rui, Jiang Hanyu, win the hearts of the people and the emperor.
浅承蚀月 | "Shallow Embrace of the Moon"

Han Zi Hao, Wang Xiu XiuSu Qianqian, who had just died from a serious illness, was chosen by a system to transmigrate into a book. To gain a new life, she needed to win over the heart of the philandering CEO Gu Chengyu within two years. Approaching her target as a junior assistant, she appeared weak and dependent, but in reality, she was shrewdly planning her moves. Using her intelligence, she navigated the machinations and schemes of Lin Shu, Qiao Xi, and others, steadily rising in the entertainment industry. During this process, she and Gu Chengyu gradually developed genuine feelings for each other, only to discover that transmigrating into the book was a deliberate arrangement by Gu Chengyu. After overcoming misunderstandings and life-or-death trials, the two persevered, their love reaching the required level, and Su Qianqian successfully extended her life, ultimately achieving both love and success, and embarking on a completely new life.
灯光下的明与暗 | "Light and Darkness Under the Lamp"

Liu Ya QianGu Xingwan was originally a poor student sponsored by the Li family, but to repay their kindness, she gave up an offer from a top university and devoted herself to assisting Li Chengzhou. Unexpectedly, Li Chengzhou remained infatuated with Song Weiwei, and even after his elder brother's "death," he brought the feigning-intelligence Song Weiwei to his side, constantly suppressing Gu Xingwan for her sake. He believed Gu Xingwan was deeply in love with him and wouldn't leave, unaware that Gu Xingwan had already signed an agreement with Li's mother: after 100 chances had passed, Gu Xingwan would retaliate, marry someone else, and reach the pinnacle of her career. Meanwhile, Li Chengzhou became a fugitive, imprisoned for ten years, and universally condemned.
假婚真孕 | "Fake Marriage, Real Pregnancy"

Wang Chao Yang, Bao Zhi Yue (RAW)Lin Xi, orphaned at a young age, was sold to a remote mountain village and forced to marry the uncouth Zhao Yaozu. On her wedding night, before being drugged and violated, she desperately escaped this hellish place, but in her dazed state, she unexpectedly had a one-night stand with Gu Yanshen, who was inspecting construction sites in the countryside. Afterwards, Gu Yanshen searched everywhere without success, while Lin Xi discovered she was pregnant. To make a living, she sold boxed lunches outside the Gu Group construction site, her pregnant belly a testament to her condition. Unexpectedly, Zhao's thugs came to kidnap her, but at the critical moment, Gu Yanshen, who was on patrol, reappeared and rescued Lin Xi. At this time, Gu Yanshen was under immense pressure from his family to get married. Upon learning of Lin Xi's pregnancy, the two pretended to get married.

以身为饵 | "Using Myself as Bait"- Shen Hao Nan, A ShangKidnapped as children and driven apart by a misunderstanding, Li Huang and Lu Niansheng reunite at an auction. Li Huang buys Lu Niansheng, who is being auctioned off, keeping him as a "caged bird" by her side, unaware that it's all part of Lu Niansheng's scheme. From mutual torment to clearing up misunderstandings and joining hands to confront the mastermind behind it all, they ultimately weave their own legend amidst love and hate.
岁月转角再相逢 | "Meeting Again at the Turn of Time"

Zhang Lei, Wang Yu JingXu Xi has devoted years to her family, only to be met with her husband Lu Yuan's growing indifference, her son's estrangement, and the frequent interference of her neighbor Meng Meiqing. During a prenatal checkup, she unexpectedly encounters Ji Mubai, a billionaire, who intervenes and shows unusual concern. Meanwhile, Xu Xi notices Lu Yuan and her son's close relationship with Meng Meiqing, and her unease grows. It's only when Lu Yuan, under the pretext of asking her to buy medicine, orchestrates a car accident that leaves her seriously injured that Xu Xi finally sees the betrayal and is forced to sign a divorce agreement leaving with nothing. Meanwhile, Ji Mubai, anxiously searching for her, is gradually uncovering a long-buried past.
别慌，我回来整顿黑化老公了 | "Don't Panic, I'm Back to Deal With My Corrupted Husband"

Li Ming Xuan, Zhao Xing HuiTo save her family from crisis, Yu Zhi enters into a contractual marriage with Pei Yuezhou, rumored to be cold and ruthless. While trying to play the perfect wife, she uncovers her husband's double-dealing secrets, but unexpectedly flashes back to her innocent school days. As reality and memory intertwine, deeply hidden love and obsession gradually surface. Yu Zhi must face a choice: escape this meticulously woven trap, or embrace the deep affection behind his madness. The appearance of Song Chuhe adds further complexity and uncertainty to this relationship.
落尽霜花满地伤 | "Frost Flowers Fall, Leaving Only Sorrow"

Li Jun Chen, Jiang ShenWith the border of Beiliang in dire straits, Qin Yunshu volunteered for a marriage alliance. Yunshu and the Crown Prince had been childhood sweethearts for ten years, inseparable whenever the Crown Prince was in Fengdu. Now, Qin Yunshu was abandoning the Crown Prince, Yuwen Hu, to travel alone to Beiliang for a marriage alliance. The Emperor was puzzled, but Qin Yunshu resolutely requested the imperial decree. When the Crown Prince, disregarding public gossip, asked to marry Lin Qingyao, the younger sister of his personal guard, she had already lost all hope in him and no longer sought anything. The Emperor issued a decree, bestowing upon Qin Yunshu the title of Princess Protector of the Nation, and ordering her marriage in seven days. Meanwhile, the Crown Prince, who always believed his childhood sweetheart would never leave him, remained unaware of the situation.
反派不听话，绑个系统来打工 | "The Villain is Disobedient, So I'll Tie Him to a System to Work For Me"

Sun Yi Fei, Zhou Ning Jia, Yu YingAfter the sudden death of office worker Lian Wu, she transmigrated into a novel, becoming a villainous supporting character destined for tragedy. To save her life, she cooperated with the villain's self-rescue system, targeting the comatose villain Zhou Yunian and facilitating their contractual marriage. Afterwards, Lian Wu overcame her romantic obsession, confronted the original male lead Xu Zhiyan, guided the female lead Su Momo to awaken her independence, and fought against enemies like her reborn brother Lian Chen, using her abilities to revitalize Xingran Media. During this process, she and Zhou Yunian gradually developed genuine feelings for each other, starting from mutual exploitation.
千方百计爱上我 | "Trying Every Means to Fall in Love With Me"

Shen Yang, Zhu Bi YiA revenge plot driven by jealousy, a tale of extremes and mutual entanglement. Wen Zhao uses every means at her disposal to seize the Jiang Group's core secret whitelist, while Jiang Junbai, ever the counter-strategist, employs every trick in the book to win Wen Zhao's love. A marriage that begins with conspiracy, where the seemingly prey-like but actually hunter-gatherer schemes to lure the vengeful heroine into a trap. Ultimately, the two reunite amidst a battle of truth and genuine affection.
程序先生和易拉环小姐 | "Mr. Program and Ms. Pull-Pull"

Zhang Chen, Huang Ya WenTo fulfill her critically ill grandmother's wish, Wen Ying hastily marries Jiang Chenye, a lawyer who adheres to the principle of "minimizing trouble," signing a prenuptial agreement that includes clauses such as no wedding, no public announcement, and splitting expenses equally. For a year after their marriage, the two maintain a polite, distant yet tacitly understanding "cooperative relationship." Jiang Chenye, having witnessed his mother's infidelity in his childhood, has become withdrawn, and Wen Ying's energetic and straightforward nature gradually enters his world. As Jiang Chenye's identity as the second son of the Zhongcheng Group is revealed, family conflicts and misunderstandings arise, and the two gradually develop genuine feelings for each other, breaking down the boundaries of "non-interference" and ultimately upgrading their whirlwind marriage into a mutual and passionate love.
第七年向你臣服 | "Seven Years of Submission to You"

Zhou Ning Jia, Bao Yan QiSeven years ago, Xiang Tian fell in love with Huo Yanchen at first sight on campus. After being rejected, she used her wealth to help Huo Yanchen out of his predicament, forcing him to sign a relationship (sugar daddy/sugar baby) agreement she proposed. Huo Yanchen signed it in humiliation. Afterwards, Xiang Tian was kicked out of her family and became a scorned fake heiress, while the poor boy she was keeping, Huo Yanchen, was the true heir to the family fortune. Pregnant, Xiang Tian went into hiding in another city, disappearing without a trace. Seven years later, now a single mother, she reunited with Huo Yanchen. Driven by guilt and fear of losing her child, Xiang Tian chose to hide, but Huo Yanchen relentlessly pursued her, making escape impossible.

半生风雨半霓裳 | "Half a Life of Storms and Half a Life of Splendor"- Nie Zi Hao, Li Xue YangXiao Nishang, a merchant girl from Lihua County, was childhood sweethearts with Qin Wen and they were betrothed. Even after the Qin family's decline, Xiao Nishang did not break off the engagement. She not only supported Qin Wen through his imperial examinations but also provided for the Qin family before their marriage. However, once Qin Wen became the top scholar, he was expected to take on two wives, marrying both his elder sister-in-law and Xiao Nishang. He even whipped Xiao Nishang for his elder sister-in-law's sake. Xiao Nishang finally saw through Qin Wen's true colors and married Xie Wuji, a butcher. She worked her way up the Qin family, expanding her business to the capital and becoming famous throughout the land. Only then did she discover that her husband was not a butcher but the renowned Prince Yongrui.
重生84：穷小子宠妻致富路 | "Reborn in 1984:A Poor Boy's Path to Wealth by Spoiling His Wife"

Liu Han Yang, Geng Chi SuIn 1984, Zhou Guoqing was reborn on a night when he was drugged by his elder brother Zhou Guohui and Liu Ruyan. He unexpectedly became bound to the "Golden Rooster Brings Good Fortune System," and used it to expose their affair. His parents forced him to take the blame, but heartbroken, he separated from the family and insisted on marrying Su Wan'er, the "mad widow" who had treated him so well in his previous life. To protect Su Wan'er and save money for the wedding, he used the system's skills to hunt and become wealthy. He was repeatedly blackmailed by his original family and retaliated against by Liu Ruyan, but he fought back fiercely. He rescued a hunter, killed a wolf king for its pelt, and after sharing the meat with his fellow villagers, he discovered that the Zhou family was plotting to steal his goods. A new battle was about to begin, and his path to revenge continued.
重生1980：开局卖茶叶蛋 | "Reborn in 1980: Starting by Selling Tea Eggs"

Wang Ya Qing, Xu Ning KeModern entrepreneur Li Xiangqian is reborn in 1980, becoming a scumbag with a history of domestic violence. Witnessing his beloved wife Hai Yanna's tragic plight, he reforms himself, determined to give her a better life. Drawing on his previous life's business experience, he earns his first fortune selling tea eggs, gradually expanding into quail farming, feed production, and other industries. He wins over a team of brothers, battling malicious neighbors and rivals. Seizing opportunities and securing policy support, he ultimately builds a business empire, acquiring a textile factory to gift to his wife, leading his neighbors to prosperity, and writing a legendary entrepreneurial chapter in the 1980s.

东夏合欢 | "The Eastern Xia Hehuan"

Lu He, Jin Kai Nan (RAW)It focuses on the entrepreneurial stories of university students in Songjiang University Town, blending the coffee culture of Dongxia Village, traditional Chinese medicine concepts, and modern industrial incubation background to tell the story of a group of young people pursuing their dreams, inheriting culture, and creating a shared future in the countryside.
日生夜熟 | "Born by Day, Mature by Night"

He Cong Rui, He Xuan LinWhen the facade of a perfect marriage shatters, Shiyue encounters her husband's best friend, Qin Zhao, in the darkness of night. Their relationship begins with a dangerous game of revenge, gradually revealing each other's wounds and pretenses. She secretly gathers evidence to fight for a divorce, while he hides a protective spirit beneath his seemingly carefree exterior. These two broken souls go from exploiting each other to redeeming one another, ultimately confronting their past, breaking free from their shackles, and forging their true selves and the courage to love in the darkness.
越夜越爱 | "The More the Night Passes, the More I Love"

Qian Zhe, Han Jia HuiShi Yue and elite lawyer Zhang Zhiyuan have been in a relationship for six years, a model couple in the eyes of outsiders, seemingly on the verge of marriage. However, on the eve of Zhang Zhiyuan's birthday, the expectant Shi Yue unexpectedly discovers his betrayal. While secretly gathering evidence, she develops a dangerous relationship with Qin Zhao, Zhang Zhiyuan's friend. Qin Zhao's aloofness and irresistible charm cause the usually rational Shi Yue to experience a loss of control for the first time. Meanwhile, Zhang Zhiyuan's relentless pursuit, his stepbrother Yao Zhuoyu's obsessive entanglement, and the complex family secrets behind Qin Zhao all surface, complicating her escape plan. Everyone wants to control their own destiny, unaware that they are already caught in the middle of it all.
第七日 | "The Seventh Day"

Li Ruo Xun, Xu Meng YuanXuan Jin, the messenger of the underworld, accepts the ultimate trial: to collect the soul of Bei Weiwei, whose lifespan is nearing its end, within 49 days, and he will succeed as the God of Hell. However, when he encounters this resilient and stubborn girl burdened with a deep-seated blood feud, his long-buried memories begin to awaken. He discovers that he is none other than Chen Mingyu, Bei Weiwei's unforgettable deceased boyfriend. Torn between the ironclad laws of the underworld and the obstruction of the Crimson Flame, and the safety of his beloved, Xuan Jin repeatedly breaks the rules to protect her. From their time together in the castle to their power struggle in the company, from exchanging lifespan for power to risking his life to save her, the two are pulled on the edge of separation between life and death, using their deep affection to fight against fate and their revenge to commemorate the past.
经年顶替 | "Substituted for Years"

Hou Peng Yan, Cheng Lin MiaoTo save her sister's orphan, Luo Zhihe married into the Jiang family five years ago, posing as "Mrs. Jiang." On their wedding anniversary, her sister returned and threatened her, prompting her to decide to escape. At her birthday party before the Lunar New Year, she suffered a sudden allergic reaction and was framed and forced to leave, only to have Jiang Yunchuan publicly expose that the child was not his. She then "disappeared in a plane crash." A year later, they met again in Paris, where he forcefully intervened in her new life, citing their "legal marriage." When all the pretense is stripped away, can this contractual marriage, which began with lies, blossom into true love on the ruins of trust?
重生嫁纨绔驭夫有高招 | "Reborn and Married to a Playboy: Masterful Husband Management"

Wang Bing Xiang, Zhang Yu TianThe true heiress, Bai Chuxia, is reborn at her wedding to Gu Qianfan. Knowing full well that in her past life, both she and Gu Jingyuan, the playboy eldest son of the Gu family, were murdered by Gu Qianfan and the fake heiress, Bai Xiaoxiao, she tears her wedding dress in public and insists on marrying Gu Jingyuan. After the wedding, she activates the Rebirth Revenge System, using system-generated drugs to treat Gu Jingyuan's body and force him to give up his bad habits, while simultaneously dealing with the machinations of Gu's mother and Gu Qianfan, vowing to reverse their fate and complete her revenge.
绝对失控 | "Absolutely Out of Control"

Zhang Li Ren, Zheng Qian YiSeven years ago, Ye Jinyu, the heiress of Hong Kong's richest family, was framed and had a one-night stand with Fu Huaichuan, a down-on-his-luck young man. Seven years later, the Ye family went bankrupt, and Ye Jinyu was left to raise their daughter, Fu An, alone, tirelessly seeking medical treatment for her. Meanwhile, Fu Huaichuan, who fell in love with Ye Jinyu at first sight, transformed himself into a wealthy man in Hong Kong to be worthy of her. When they met again, Fu Huaichuan misunderstood Ye Jinyu, believing she was driven by greed and harmed her. Later, he learned that Ye Jinyu was doing it to pay for her daughter's medical treatment and was filled with remorse. However, Fang Muyao continued to sow discord between them, leading to numerous misunderstandings. After overcoming many obstacles, they finally resolved their misunderstandings and walked hand in hand towards happiness.
温小姐的第二次人生 | "Miss Wen's Second Life"

Yi Bai Chen, Zheng Chen YuBefore her death, Wen Sining realized she was just cannon fodder in a short drama, manipulated by the plot to neglect her love-struck husband and distance herself from her adorable children, only to have her seemingly innocent but actually manipulative sister use her to climb the social ladder. Reborn, she breaks free from the shackles of her persona, rejects family pressure, and simultaneously clings to her husband, showering him with sweetness, while doting on her children. She exposes her sister's facade, awakens her confused parents, abandons the heart-wrenching script, focuses on delivering a sweet and satisfying performance, and ultimately becomes a winner in both career and love.
第七年，回响 | "Echoes of the Seventh Year"

Ma Qian Huan, Feng Yi RanChi Huanyang, a seemingly wealthy but actually illegitimate heiress, was forced to break up with her boyfriend Bo Yanjing by his mother because her biological parents were murderers. She then went abroad and gave birth to her son, Chi Jiamu. Six years later, Jiamu falls seriously ill and needs a twin's umbilical cord blood. Chi Huanyang returns to China with the child, intending to seduce Bo Yanjing and impregnate her with a second child. Bo Yanjing, still harboring feelings for his ex, repeatedly falls for her schemes. His childhood sweetheart, Xie Ya, interferes, fabricating an engagement announcement to deepen the misunderstanding. In a critical moment, Chi Huanyang reveals the truth about the child's parentage. After learning the truth, Bo Yanjing and Chi Huanyang overcome obstacles together, and the second child is successfully born. The umbilical cord blood saves Jiamu's life, and the family of three is finally reunited.
夜色回响 | "Echoes of the Night"

Mao Zhi Yuan, He Yi TingFive years after their breakup, Qin Li, a top reporter for the Beijing News Agency, reunites with her ex-boyfriend Shen Mingzhou, who has become a business tycoon, during an interview assignment. Shen Mingzhou still harbors feelings for Qin Li. Qin Li secretly investigates the truth behind the mysterious deaths of her parents and grandmother five years prior, suspecting a connection to the Qin family, led by her second uncle, Qin Renzhi. Shen Mingzhou protects and helps Qin Li in various ways. Amidst their struggles and tests, the two join forces to fight against a criminal syndicate centered around Qin Renzhi and smuggling boss Bai Yue, ultimately exposing the Qin family's numerous crimes, including patricide, smuggling, and money laundering. Qin Li is exonerated, and she and Shen Mingzhou reunite.
悠然见南山 | "Leisurely Gazing at the Southern Mountains"

Gao Ming Rui, Wang Tang YingJi Youran transmigrated into a novel, as a minor cannon fodder character appearing in less than a chapter. She was constantly tormented and unable to sleep until she met Mo Nanshan. Whenever she touched him, ghosts and monsters instantly vanished. Desperate for a good night's sleep, she schemed to get close to Mo Nanshan. However, Mo Nanshan mistook her for a woman trying to curry favor with the powerful and cursed her, saying that if ghosts existed, he would be turned into a child. The next morning, he awoke to find himself in the body of a six-year-old child.
且邀春风斩棘行 | "Inviting the Spring Breeze to Cut Through the Thorns"

Yu Yang, Zhao Mu YanJiang Yanxue transmigrated into a novel world, becoming a love-struck villain. To avoid a tragic death, she tried to "clear her name and let the male and female leads be together," but was still mercilessly executed by the crown prince. Reborn, she no longer tolerated this and decided to follow the original novel's plot, joining forces with the mysterious Dark Sound Pavilion Master, Xiao Xianyun, to dismantle the scheme and seek revenge. Just when everything seemed to be going well, Jiang Yanxue decided to return to reality. She thought she would never cross paths with Xiao Xianyun again after returning to the modern world, but their fates intertwined once more during a job interview.
夫人，我都听到了 | "Madam, I Heard It All"

Song Yi Fan, Guo Xin YuModern girl Liu Ruyi is transported to another world after a car accident, but is bound to a system and forced to marry Ji Yanli. She must help Ji Yanli achieve academic success in the imperial examinations to obtain a divorce decree in order to return to the modern world. However, after Ji Yanli achieves the same success, he not only doesn't divorce her but also showers her with affection. Liu Ruyi tries every means to obtain the divorce decree, but later discovers that Ji Yanli can hear her thoughts and learns that she has less than six months of life left in the modern world. Caught in a dilemma, she plans a fake elopement to test Ji Yanli, ultimately revealing his mind-reading secret. Meanwhile, Ji Yanli's feelings for Liu Ruyi have already deepened, plunging their relationship and Liu Ruyi's mission to return home into a new impasse.
弑君后，我和死对头锁死了 | "After Assassinating the King, My Nemesis and I Are Locked in Each Other"

Wei Zi Xiang, Meng LuAfter Empress Su Li uncovers the Emperor's plot to exterminate her family, she decisively kills him, only to be discovered by the Prince of Zhenbei, Kuang Yinzhou, who has disguised himself as the Emperor. Su Li then implicates Kuang Yinzhou, who pretends to be the Emperor, and Kuang Yinzhou plays along, leading Su Li to fall in love for real. The palace, a place of constant intrigue and hidden dangers, sees two master actors, each harboring their own secrets, gradually developing feelings for each other, from initial wariness and feigned affection to a deep, unspoken bond. What began as a charade of conspiracy slowly transforms into an inescapable gamble of true love. When the shocking secret of their origins is revealed, they entrust their kingdom and their hearts to each other.
烬颜谋 | "The Scheme of the Ashes"

Sun Yi Xun, Chen CiWhen the legitimate daughter, Wen Moli, was about to give birth, her half-sister Wen Wan and Concubine Kang stole her child and set the house on fire. Disfigured, she was given a face transplant by a renowned physician and, under the alias Shu Tang, infiltrated the Changning Marquis's mansion. Using her medical knowledge, she gained Wen Wan's trust, and through a calculated maneuver, attracted the Marquis Xie Ci, using his influence to fight back against his persecution. She was then granted the title of County Princess and became his secondary wife. After reclaiming her child, Wen Moli discovered that her deceased husband, Chu Linyue, was still alive, and that Xie Ci was the true culprit who murdered Chu Linyue and switched his title. Ultimately, Wen Moli, together with Chu Linyue, uncovered multiple conspiracies, punished all their enemies, and the family of three finally found peace.
上瘾离婚后怀崽，前夫要她同居 | "Addicted to Divorce and Pregnant, Her Ex-Husband Wants Her to Live Together"

Yuan Kai Kai, Zhao Xing HuiAfter her divorce, Sang Qian unexpectedly discovers she is pregnant, leaving her physically and mentally exhausted. She chooses to return to her old family home resort to clear her head, only to unexpectedly encounter her ex-husband, Jin Changyu, and his new partner, Zhou Yunshuang. At the resort, the three find their past warmth intertwined with the harsh realities of life, old affections clashing with new grudges. Facing this emotional turmoil and the uncertainty of the future, Sang Qian gradually grows stronger through her struggles, ultimately deciding to confront the past and bravely begin a new chapter for herself and the new life in her womb. The story revolves around love and growth.
999次叩首只为再次遇见你 | "999 Bows Just to Meet You Again"

Li Ke Lin, Ma Jia YingActress Qin Yuwan returns to the business world with her husband, exposes her adopted brother's conspiracy, and overturns the chessboard to regain control of the Qin family business. The emotional turmoil in the delivery room intertwines family warmth and redemption. Qin Yuwan, with her reborn prophecy, breaks down past barriers and rebuilds her bond with her husband amidst the pain of labor. Focusing on the repair of intimate relationships, the film showcases love and redemption through special scenes, with a fast pace and high emotional intensity.
错爱千年 | "A Thousand Years of Misguided Love"

Ge Zi Yang, Jia Yi XuanModern youth Ye Fan travels to the battlefield and uses modern resources to help the fallen princess Li Zhao ascend the throne. However, upon his triumphant return, he discovers his daughter has been humiliated, his military achievements stripped, and he witnesses the empress's intimacy with a powerful minister. Heartbroken, he takes his daughter back to the modern world in despair. Little does he know, Li Zhao endured humiliation and hardship all to protect him! When the truth is revealed, the empress, despite the dangers, travels back to the modern world to beg for forgiveness.
我有财富大亨系统 | "I Have a Wealth Tycoon System"

Ge Zi Yang, Chen Mu LinLuo Jing, an ordinary young man, suffers humiliation at a class reunion, falling down the stairs and activating the Wealth Tycoon System. He completes tasks such as holding hands, working out, and confessing his love, acquiring a Porsche, office building ownership, and shares in Xingyao Media, rapidly rising to become a business tycoon. After taking control of Xingyao Media, Luo Jing, relying on the top-tier business acumen and super orator skills granted by the system, defeats internal traitors like Zhang Xun, secures a partnership with Tianyue Group, wins the equity battle, and firmly establishes himself as chairman. In his personal life, he reunites with Jiang Shiyao, his high school crush, and falls in love again. Ignoring the interference of Chen Manlin's unrequited love and Lu Ningxue's ambiguous relationship, they finally become a couple, achieving a perfect ending of success in both career and love with a grand wedding.
薄总夫人她一身反骨 | "Mrs. Bo's Rebellious Spirit"

Wang Jun Zhe, Li Jia HuiAbandoned by her family, the fake heiress Su Yue, after suffering the humiliation of a broken engagement, encounters the mysterious and obsessive CEO Bo Yuci. She returns with a powerful dual identity as hacker "Z" and designer "Moon," vowing revenge against all those who wronged her. In her quest for revenge, she not only uncovers her astonishing identity as the true heiress of the Yun family and the mystery of her "Phoenix Fate," but also joins forces with Bo Yuci to fight against the evil organization "Shadow" hidden behind the scenes, rescuing her mother who has been imprisoned for many years. Ultimately, she inherits the family business, achieving success in both her career and love life, and embarks on a new chapter in her life with her beloved.
神医王妃升职记 | "The Rise of the Divine Doctor Princess"

Wei Ruo Chen, Fu Ya Ning (RAW)Su Qing, a top-tier hospital specialist, was stabbed by a medical malpractice perpetrator at the hospital. During the rescue, she transmigrated into the body of Jiang Mengli, a death row inmate in ancient times. Faced with a situation where rebirth meant certain death, Su Qing used modern medical skills to save the sixth prince, Hongye, who was suffering cardiac arrest. His death sentence was commuted, and she developed feelings for Hongye, successfully helping him become the crown prince.
以茶治茶：你们别怪姐姐了啦 | "Using Tea to Fight Tea: Don't Blame Your Sister!"

Lv Song Hao, Mei MeiThe protagonist, Qiao Wanyan, unexpectedly obtains a book of fate, learning that she will be killed by her older sister. Therefore, she decides to become a vicious supporting female character who fights and schemes. Her sister likes the crown prince? Steal it! Her sister's admirers? Control them! Her sister's young lover? Buy him first! She'll steal all of her sister's opportunities and defy fate! She will never be cannon fodder!
心动淮西 | "Heart-Fluttering Huai Xi"

Xi Wen Jun, Xu Ling YunThe aloof and elegant lawyer Xu Qingwu is the adopted daughter of the Shen family. Out of gratitude, she agrees to an arranged marriage, but through a series of unexpected events, she marries her best friend's rumoredly strict, aloof, and woman-averse CEO of Huajing, Cen Xihuai, her uncle. Intending to maintain a contractual marriage where they don't interfere with each other, Cen Xihuai meticulously fulfills his duties as a husband, meticulously managing everything from twice-weekly intimacy to regular romantic dates using a memo pad. In the process of repeatedly humiliating this eccentric character and defusing crises, Xu Qingwu gradually falls for him, only to discover that this marriage, which began in a misunderstanding, is actually a result of his long-term, conscious descent into depravity.
闺蜜双穿民国变妯娌 | "Best Friends Transmigrate to the Republic of China Era and Become Sisters-in-Law"

Li Ze Yu, Xian Ying YingSisters Su Yuluo and Xiao Wanqing, slum dwellers, awoke one day to find their souls transported to the Republic of China era, where they became the “evil female supporting characters” of wealthy families—one prophesied to be drowned in a pig cage, the other destined to be shot to death! To survive, the quirky sisters decided to join forces and rewrite their fate. They beat up deadbeat men, tear apart scheming mistresses, and drive the pure-as-lily female lead to madness—all while charming the aloof rich boys He Mingzhang and He Zhixu into falling head over heels. When the plot spirals into chaos and the system announces “Male Lead Awakening Successful,” they realize these scheming brothers had scripted their own revenge—now showering them with pampering instead! A hellish start to their dual transmigration?
诱饵千金，归来复仇 | "The Bait Heiress Returns for Revenge"

Gu Le Chen, Yin Chen ZanOn a rainy night, the gates of the Yu family mansion were slammed shut by a blood-stained "deceased." Yu Wei, the eldest daughter who perished in a fire eighteen years ago, returned covered in mud. The tranquility of the wealthy family was shattered, and the bones of past loves and hates resurfaced. Her seemingly kind mother, her face contorted with rage, accused her of being an imposter; her seemingly kind father's eyes swirled with dark undercurrents; her stepmother and sister smiled while concealing daggers. Only her non-blood-related brother, his gaze both fiery and sinister, trapped her in the shadows in the dead of night. "Are you prepared for the price of this revenge game?" Yu Wei wiped the blood from her lips, standing there with a smile. She was not only a returning heiress, but also a deadly lure thrown into this rotten mansion.
我的狐仙夫君 | "My Fox Fairy Husband"

Ai Er Fa Jin, Liao Hui Min (Leng Ba) (RAW)A century ago, the genius demon hunter Su Shengsheng pursued Bai Xingchuan, a six-thousand-year-old nine-tailed fox demon. Despite his repeated mercy, she sealed him into an ancient painting with her own blood. In modern times, Su Shengsheng, reincarnated as a designer, is betrayed by her fiancé and sister, falling off a cliff. Her blood awakens Bai Xingchuan. The two form a symbiotic contract, and Bai Xingchuan is forced to protect her, feeling both disgusted and soft-hearted. Su Shengsheng mistakenly believes the fox demon has a crush on her, teasing him relentlessly, and feelings quietly blossom amidst their playful banter.

大院来了个睡美人 | "A Sleeping Beauty Arrives in the Compound"

Hu Jia Hao, Gong Fang NiHuo Beizheng, returning home, unexpectedly encounters his comatose fiancée, Chu Qiaoxing, and takes her home. Unbeknownst to him, Chu Qiaoxing possesses the soul of a Mahayana cultivator from the cultivation world, suffering from drowsiness due to damage to her soul. To repair her soul, she discovers Huo Beizheng's inherent merit and they quickly agree to marry. Facing repeated schemes from Qin Yulian, Huo's adopted daughter, Chu Qiaoxing, with her magical abilities and Huo Beizheng's unwavering protection, resolves each crisis, even causing Huo Beizheng to sever ties with his family. Touched by Huo Beizheng's deep affection, Chu Qiaoxing relinquishes her obsession with returning home and decides to join hands with her lover. Ultimately, the two work together to uncover Qin Yulian's true identity and a shocking deception that has plagued the Huo family for over a decade.
饲野 | "Feeding the Wild"

Ma Shuo Qi, Zhong XiYu Qing is cold-blooded and ruthless. During a raid, she is ambushed and "accidentally" encounters male model Jin Ye. Knowing he is an undercover agent sent by her sister, she deliberately keeps him by her side. Jin Ye is cunning and sly, playing the role of a docile and loyal dog while repeatedly crossing boundaries and testing her limits, gradually stirring ripples in her hardened heart. Her defeated sister uses Jin Ye to set a deadly trap. Yu Qing is forced to choose an arranged marriage to save herself, only to discover that Jin Ye is actually the illegitimate son of a top-tier family who has been living away from home. Using Jin Ye's identity, she coldly lays her net and begins to subtly plot her revenge.
我只是重生报仇，诸神为何瑟瑟发抖 | "I'm Just Reborn for Revenge, Why Are the Gods Trembling?"

Li You Lin, Tian Tian YiThe female protagonist, Chu Qun, is reborn a thousand years later in another body, retaining memories of her previous life, but forgetting the male protagonist and her son. In this life, she is the only daughter of a royal princess, murdered by her half-sister and her body dumped in a forbidden area on a cliff. With her memories from her previous life, Chu Qun returns to the Marquis's mansion, retaliating against her wicked half-sister and stepmother while investigating the truth behind her murder a thousand years ago. During this process, she meets Mei Fugui, the righteous son of the Vice Minister of Revenue, and encounters the male protagonist, Di Chen. Through her interactions with the male protagonist and her son, she gradually regains her lost memories and uncovers the truth behind her murder by her siblings a thousand years ago.
忘记你，想起你 | "Forgetting You, Remembering You"

Feng Xiang Kun, Tang JingFu Shiyan, the president of the Fu Group, is severely injured in a manhunt, losing his sight and all his memory. He is rescued by Shen Zhao, a country girl. The two develop feelings for each other and marry. Shen Zhao resolutely donates her corneas to Fu Shiyan, but after the surgery, she learns she is pregnant. Just as she is about to share the good news, Fu Shiyan is taken away by the Fu family. After the surgery, he remembers his past but forgets everything about his relationship with Shen Zhao. Six years later, Fu Shiyan goes to Xingfu Village to oversee a demolition project and encounters the blind Shen Zhao and her two children. Shen Zhao recognizes her husband immediately upon hearing his voice, but he has no memory of the three people before him.
闪婚八零，我的会长夫人靠摆摊起家 | "A Flash Marriage in the 80s, My President's Wife Started Her Business with a Street Stall"

Quan Pei Lun, Jiang XinIn the 1980s, Ding Mo, a girl from a small town, suddenly suffered a family tragedy, was betrayed by her fiancé, and was dismissed from the supply and marketing cooperative. To pay off her debts, she entered into a sham marriage with Peng Shaoyang, a suspended cadre. Despite facing difficulties in starting her own business, she remained true to her integrity. Later, she revitalized the Ding family's winery and expanded into foreign trade with the help of reforms. During this time, she helped her sisters overcome their difficulties, gradually developed genuine feelings for Peng Shaoyang, and together they thwarted villains such as Yang Lan and Chen Qingsheng. In the end, Ding Mo achieved success in both her career and love life, and the Ding family's children all found happiness, basking in the warm sunshine of the times.
婢上青云 | "A Maid's Rise to Power"

Kang Xun, Li Tian YuanReborn back to the day she was asked the question, Sang Zhu smiled and said, "Choose the top scholar; he's the most tender-hearted." She personally pushed Lu Ningxue towards the eunuch Gu Wenjie, while secretly plotting to trick him into breaking off the engagement with the general, faking a blood omen to lie dormant, all to reclaim her indenture. Until that day, the general sheltered her in his arms. Having been a substitute bride twice, the maid's rise to power, stepping over the regrets of her enemies, reached the pinnacle.
替姐生子，庶女步步上位 | "A Concubine's Daughter's Rise to Power Step by Step by Bearing a Child for Her Sister"

Lin Jia Qi, Su Zi XiSong Tanyin was an illegitimate daughter of the Song family. Five years ago, she was framed and abandoned by her family. Five years later, she was sent to the Marquis's mansion to be used as a tool for her elder sister to bear children. To protect herself, she endured hardship and meticulously planned her schemes, gradually winning over the Marquis's heart. In the end, she avenged her family and underwent a magnificent transformation, becoming the respected Lady of the Duke of Zhenguo.
双面真千金，少帅请接招 | "A Two-Faced Heiress, Young Marshal, Please Accept the Challenge"

Xia Yi, Yao HuiSong Ran is reborn in 1914, escaping a treacherous mountain village and stumbling into the arms of the cold-faced young marshal, Gu Yuanting. To reclaim her life and engagement, stolen by a fake heiress, she attends schools and banquets, navigating conspiracies step by step. Gu Yuanting fires three shots to deter villains for her, silently protecting her. Together, they uncover the frame-up, weathering the flames of war, but also navigating the vortex of the real and fake heiresses and family feuds.
穿书后沉稳老公宠我入骨 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, My Calm Husband Spoils Me to the Bone"

Shen Jia Li, Bao Li NingJiang Wanyue transmigrates into a novel as a supporting female character in a period drama. After awakening her powers, she uncovers her cousin Jiang Xinrou's abortion plot and successfully retaliates. Deciding to keep the child, she moves to her husband's location. Using her wisdom and her personal spatial ability, she resolves crisis after crisis, deepens her relationship with her husband, and protects her family. Ultimately, she punishes the villains, embraces a happy new life, and faces the future hand in hand with her loved ones.
身陷修罗场，在线训狗 | "Trapped in a Shura Field, Training Dogs Online"

Li Jia Ming, Cheng Zi NingGu Miaoshu, a transmigration mission taker, is bound to a vicious villain system and enters the world of Haitang Wen to perform missions. She must maintain world stability by completing these missions, expecting a tragic end and the prospect of collective revenge. However, upon first encountering the handsome, powerful, and tragic male lead, Lu Yijin, she softens and abandons her attempts to make things difficult for him, unaware that he already harbors a secret, obsessive love for her. Gu Miaoshu struggles between the mission rules and her own heart, while Lu Yijin's fervent advances, the complex entanglements of others, and the world's inconsistencies further entangle her in this unexpected and chaotic situation.
吻漾 | "Kiss"

Luo Chu Fan, Zhao Mei XuanRising star Jiang Yuyang, in an attempt to cancel an arranged marriage, mistakenly identifies Fu Wenshen, the head of the Fu family, as her fiancé at a bar, leading to a series of hilarious encounters. Fu Wenshen is actually "Wen Shen," the voice acting master Jiang Yuyang has long admired, and her years-long unrequited love finally blossoms. Amidst conflicting identities, obstacles, and unwavering devotion, the two grow closer, facing career competition and malicious schemes together. After a kidnapping ordeal, they finally recognize each other. Ultimately, he sheds his disguise, she sees his true feelings, and they overcome their differences and misunderstandings to walk hand in hand towards a blissful ending.
救命这个夫君太粘人 | "Help! This Husband is Too Clingy"

Zhou Ti Shun, Tian Yu QingAfter leaving her father and keeping her son, Lu Jinshi, the legitimate daughter of a marquis, returned to the capital from the countryside. With one hand, she tore apart her stepmother's hypocrisy, and with the other, she exposed her half-sister's true colors, living a life of great success. Unexpectedly, her shameless biological father, who had never met her, was still haunting her, while the Seventh Prince, whom she had never met, was eager to take her in! After several fruitless struggles, she finally realized that these two clingy individuals were actually the same person! Rong Yi, under a different guise, had successfully re-entered the "ex-husband" life through relentless pursuit! Looking at this persistent pest, Lu Jinshi sighed, "Your Highness, your integrity has fallen to the ground; could you please pick it up?"
她的专属猎物 | "Her Exclusive Prey"

Ma Chao, Na XinTransmigrated into the body of Shen Zhiyi, the tragic heroine of a romance novel destined for a miserable death, and even given a terminal illness diagnosis as a bonus? She refuses to accept her fate, boldly declaring to the system, "Whoever I choose, that's the male lead!" Her target is the formidable, ruthless Lu Junyue. Substitutes, white moonlight, and vampire-like family members are nothing compared to her. She aggressively approaches him under the guise of love, but in reality, she's after his kidney. Lu Junyue goes from disgust to deep affection, accompanying her as she slaps down the scumbags. When he offers his whole heart, he learns he's merely a donor. How will this relationship, which began with calculation, end in love? The ultimate battle between kidney and love is about to be revealed.
深渊回吻 | "A Kiss from the Abyss"

Xie Zhuo, Luo FanAfter being betrayed by her fiancé, losing both her parents, and having her family fortune seized, ballerina Liang Qingyan forms a pact with Song Yuanye, a man burning with vengeance. Together, they orchestrate a scheme, navigating business battles and emotional maneuvering to confront a common enemy. From mutual exploitation to genuine love, they endure conspiracies, dangers, and sacrifices, ultimately punishing the true culprit, reclaiming their family business, and finding each other and themselves along the path of bloody revenge.
下山后宋小姐又美又飒 | "After Descending the Mountain, Miss Song is Both Beautiful and Charming"

Liu Ding Chen, Bu Meng NanSong Xiaotang, a metaphysical master with a flawed personality, is tricked by her master into marrying Xie Ci, who is afflicted with malevolent energy and has crippled legs, in an attempt to accumulate merit. She resolves to use her magic to heal Xie Ci's legs, and the two gradually develop feelings for each other. Xie Ci's cousin, Jiang Huainan, driven by jealousy, plots against Xie Ci and conspires with Jiang Ying to seize the family fortune and the Jade Marrow Pill. Song Xiaotang tears apart scheming women and fights villains along the way. After an unexpected pregnancy, her magical powers surge, and she ultimately joins forces with Xie Ci to thwart their conspiracy, giving birth to twins and beginning a happy life. However, the children also inherit her flawed personality.
别惹假千金，她哥是超级妹控 | "Don't Mess with the Fake Heiress, Her Brother is a Super Siscon"

Yang Chen Yi, Zhang Ji ShunWhile feeding the fish, Shen Yue accidentally fell into the pond. Later, she learned something: her parents weren't her parents, and her five brothers weren't her brothers either; she was a fake heiress of the Shen family! If one is destined to lose everything, then she chooses to give up. On the day the real heiress returned, her five brothers shielded her behind them: "Huihui, can we keep her? She's not quite right in the head; it's too dangerous for her to be out there alone."
她不只是你妹妹 | "She's More Than Just Your Sister"

Kong Xiang Dong, Shen QingJiang Jinyue, a powerful businesswoman, returns to China with capital to save her husband Zhou Chenye's struggling company. However, she discovers him having an affair with his secretary, Cheng Qi, who is also taking her belongings and her mother's heirloom. Faced with her husband's favoritism and betrayal, Jiang Jinyue sees the truth and embarks on a path of revenge and rebirth. She withdraws her support for the Zhou family business, exposes the conspiracy of Cheng Qi and her siblings, and ultimately brings the betrayers to their doom. Meanwhile, her childhood sweetheart, An Sheng, remains steadfast in his support. After experiencing heartbreak, Jiang Jinyue finally finds true love and achieves fulfillment in both her career and love life.
她走时暮雪千山 | "When She Left, Snow Covered a Thousand Mountains"

Zhang Qian Wen, Chen Zhao Yi (RAW)Five years ago, Shen Zhiyi was given to Jiang Beihan as an apology after her sister broke off her engagement. Five years later, her sister returned to the country, and Jiang Beihan protected her at every turn. Only then did Shen Zhiyi realize that her five years of companionship had not earned her a single bit of Jiang Beihan's true affection. Heartbroken, she took the initiative to propose a "marriage swap" with Shen Wanwan. Only after losing her did Jiang Beihan realize that his heart had already been taken by her.

不完美应答＆别对我动心 | "Imperfect Response & Don't Fall for Me"

Liang Si Wei, Wang Yan FeiThe Liu family, a scholarly household, produced a rebellious Liu Chun, beautiful and unrestrained, growing freely like a wild rose. A chance encounter in an elevator led to Liu Chun falling instantly in love with the aloof and reserved Cheng Yi. She then meticulously planned a scheme, gradually stirring the heart of this "unromantic stone." Cheng Yi outwardly rejected her, but his heart unknowingly succumbed, ultimately falling in love. This elite tycoon bowed to love, standing by her side against societal norms, protecting her eternal freedom.
夫人走的第三年 | "The Third Year Since My Wife Left"

Zhang Chi, Liu NianThree years after Shen Yiyao's death, her wandering spirit was unable to reincarnate. Meanwhile, her ex-husband, Pei Jizhi, with whom she had shared a distant and unambitious relationship in life, had used the guise of mourning to gain a good reputation and enjoy a prosperous official career. Enraged, Shen Yiyao resolved to teach Pei Jizhi a lesson in the name of a ghost, only to be outmaneuvered by the more cunning Pei Jizhi. The two, human and ghost, became entangled, their playful banter revealing misunderstandings from their past lives. They finally discovered that their apparent lack of love was merely a hidden affection, but when their broken relationship was mended, it was already a final farewell between them.
我们从谎言开始 | "We Started With Lies"

Ye Hao Ran, Meng NaDriven by a desire for revenge for her brother's death, Sang Huaixi, under the alias "Ganlu," infiltrates the inner workings of a wealthy family, her clear objective being to approach Qin Chaomu, a man bound by a family marriage arrangement. Qin Chaomu, devoid of affection for his fiancée Gu Manqing, keenly perceives Sang Huaixi's burning desire for revenge amidst the power struggles. The two, cautiously maneuvering and testing each other, find themselves developing a dangerous and unspoken affection. Gu Manqing subtly senses this and, in league with an old acquaintance of Sang Huaixi, plots a murder. Love and delusion clash, sincerity intertwined with scheming. In this game where fate hangs in the balance, who will emerge victorious, and who will truly emerge victorious?
被骗就变强，乖乖女横扫四方 | "Become Stronger After Being Deceived, the Obedient Girl Sweeps Across the Land"

Li Sheng Jie, Gong Fang NiTo escape an arranged marriage, Zhen Zhu binds herself to a "lie-to-get-rich" system, breaking into a club to make money, but disrupting Li Zhan's mission. The two go from being bickering lovers who distrust each other to joining forces to track down the villain who murdered Zhen Zhu's father. When everything comes to an end, and they agree to divorce their "stranger spouses," they are shocked to discover that the person they are arguing about divorcing, and the person they love, are actually the same person.
前夫日日求复合 | "My Ex-Husband Begs for Reconciliation Every Day"

Liu Te, Chu XiaQin Ziyu and her icy husband, Wei Yichen, decided to divorce. Just when they thought they were finally free, fate played a cruel joke – they were both transmigrated into a tragic novel. The system stipulated: they couldn't return to the real world until they completed all the heart-wrenching storylines. Qin Ziyu's eyes flashed – this time, it was time to change the script. She promptly dumped all the roles of substitute, betrayal, misunderstanding, and physical and emotional torture on her perpetually calm and collected ex-husband. But gradually, she discovered that Wei Yichen, who had previously ignored her, was actually enjoying the tragic storylines, even begging her to remarry him daily with a broken heart.
许你星辰 | "I Promise You the Stars"

Liu Te, Zhang Yu TianXu Xian is a genius surgeon, but she is forced to marry Shen Yanchen, the richest man in Jiangcheng. This man wears a mask, is violent, and is rumored to suffer from mental illness. However, Xu Xian gradually discovers that Shen Yanchen is actually "Xiao Xing," her childhood friend who was separated from her during a kidnapping. As fragments of her memories are uncovered, she is drawn into a vortex of love and conspiracy—Shen Yanchen's other personality is none other than Shen Xingcheng, the top star she once saved. In this battle between personality and true love, who is the real him? And how will Xu Xian heal this broken heart?

梦醒踹渣，太子爷拐我回家 | "Waking Up from a Dream and Kicking the Scumbag, the Crown Prince Kidnaps Me Home"- Yang Yu Bin, Huang Yun YunBefore her wedding, Wen Yuran foresaw her fiancé Ji Chenyu's infidelity and his intention to harm her family. She feigned maintaining the engagement while secretly gathering evidence. Unexpectedly, she kissed Qi Yao, the heir of Beicheng, at a bar, and Qi Yao fell in love at first sight and secretly helped her. On the wedding day, Wen Yuran publicly exposed the infidelity and canceled the wedding. To completely escape her past, she decided to "leave the father but keep the child," signing a contract with a male model she chose at a club to father a child—in reality, the model was Qi Yao in disguise. The two gradually developed genuine feelings for each other within this contractual relationship, working together to deal with the entanglements of Ji Chenyu and Tian Yuwei, showcasing the heroine's growth from a passive victim to someone actively taking control of her destiny.
白夜花园 | "White Night Garden"

Tan Yan Yan, Zhang Jin YiA cold yet gentle female thief versus a genius blind painter: mutual redemption, two women tearing apart a scumbag boyfriend, one devising the plan, the other carrying out the operation, fighting side by side and redeeming each other.
家主，夫人又在拆家规了 | "Master, the Madam is Breaking the Family Rules Again"

Wang Chao Yang, Zhang Shi YuanThe Rong family of Rongcheng, seemingly holding the top position among aristocratic families, is actually hollow inside due to its adherence to outdated and corrupt rules. The newly appointed patriarch, Rong Xu, had long seen through the family's precarious state and wanted to change things. The appearance of Hua Yan, who was betrothed to the Rong family, brought a turning point. Hua Yan, free-spirited and unrestrained by nature, gave Rong Xu an opportunity to break down the walls of the Rong family's rules. He realized she would be his most useful tool, but unexpectedly, he fell into her trap during the process. Two people who didn't believe in love became entangled in a passionate affair because of it.
我是侯府假千金，不参与诛九族 | "I'm a Fake Heiress of the Marquis's Mansion, I Won't Participate in the Execution of Nine Generations"

Liu Yi Long, Qin Tian AiNing Qingwan was originally an adopted daughter of the Marquis of Ningguo's household. Betrayed and murdered by her biological daughter, Ning Qingle, and the rest of the household, she was reborn with a thirst for revenge. She meticulously planned her revenge, regaining control of the household but then relinquishing it at the opportune moment, plunging the Marquis's household into a financial crisis. She exposed Ning Qingle's conspiracy, making her look foolish. During this time, she met and allied with the Third Prince, Xiao Yan, to investigate the Marquis's household secrets together. Ultimately, Ning Qingwan exposed the Marquis's crimes, leading to the exile of the entire household. She also broke free from the household's constraints and finally married Xiao Yan.
王妃临门全城上下有喜了 | "The Princess is Coming, the Whole City is Happy"

Wu Zhu Xi, Liao Hui Min (Leng Ba)Shen Rongrong unexpectedly transmigrated, and her first task was to be buried! Sorry, but she kicked open the coffin door, shocking everyone present! Her family fortune was seized? No problem, she'd find a man to conceive her child with, then, pregnant, she'd go to his house to demand justice! But… what? The man she randomly chose was actually Prince Xiao Moshen? Perfect! With royal backing, she could conveniently advance her profession! After all, her specialty was… impregnating people.
偷心劫匪是娇妻＆偷“心”劫匪是娇妻 | "The Heart-Stealing Robber is a Beloved Wife & The Heart-Stealing Robber is a Beloved Wife"

Yu Lun Hao, Chi Ning Ning (RAW)Yi Ran, who lost her voice at the age of seven, met the broken Nangong Lie and became the light in his life. At twenty, she was forced to marry him because her sister ran away from their arranged marriage, but she secretly rejoiced. On their wedding day, he sent her abroad for four years to protect her. After returning home, she was rejected and, in despair, encountered robbers. She found a voice-changing phone and pretended to be one of the robbers to force a divorce. After Nangong Lie discovered the truth, he set a trap, waiting for her to willingly reveal her secret and fall in love with him. What will the ending be?
错撩大反派 | "Wrongly Flirting With the Villain"

Li Xing Lin, Pan Hui MinShen Nuo transmigrated into a book, becoming Shen Huai's younger sister. The bad news was that her original brother, Shen Huai, was now desperate to kill her because of his fight for the family fortune. Afraid to go home, she hid in a bar and met a man whose looks and physique perfectly suited her. She tried to take him as a sugar daddy, but was rejected. Later, she unexpectedly learned that the man was actually her fiancé, Fu Chuji, the book's main antagonist. A series of hilarious entanglements ensued, but ultimately, they fell in love and got married.
读心大佬我家仆人脑洞炸天了 | "My Servant's Mind-Reading Genius is Out of Control"

Zhang Xin Gang, Mei MeiA young girl named Shi Liao Liao transmigrates into a novel, becoming Lu Yanzhou's personal butler, concealing her identity to complete system tasks. Unbeknownst to her, Lu Yanzhou possesses mind-reading abilities, revealing her outward and inwardly quirky and sarcastic nature. As Shi Liao Liao painstakingly advances the original plot and attempts to bring the "official couple" together, her vivid inner monologues and genuine care gradually win Lu Yanzhou's heart. Ultimately, she discovers that the person she has been searching for is herself. This romance, which begins with "heartfelt words," eventually leads to their sweet ending.
心语星愿之羊驼 | "Heartfelt Wishes: Alpaca"

Xu Jiang Shuai, Xin Run QianYun Duo and Lu Qi'an met in an orphanage, supporting each other and growing up together. On the night they pledged their love, Lu Qi'an knelt down to propose, the starlight adorning their tender moments. But tragedy struck suddenly; in the face of life and death, Lu Qi'an protected Yun Duo with his life, forever frozen in that night. When he opened his eyes again, Lu Qi'an had transformed into an alpaca, watching over the unconscious Yun Duo by her bedside. Upon waking, Yun Duo had lost all her memories and began a numb journey of blind dates. He, in his alpaca form, stayed by her side, silently hoping she could find a good man and live a peaceful life.
闺蜜双穿，这次不斗只磕CP | "Best Friends Transmigrate Together, This Time No Fighting, Just Shipping"

Jiang Hao, Hua Jia YiSu Qingyan and her best friend Su Man are unexpectedly transported into the world of a melodramatic short drama. One becomes the true heiress destined to be eliminated, while the other becomes the stepsister hated by everyone. The original plot of mutual destruction is completely rewritten as they choose to join forces to fight against conspiracies. Facing their stepmother's scheming, the power struggles within the wealthy family, and emotional entanglements, they rely on their clear minds and tacit cooperation to both plot their counterattack and enjoy some sweet moments. From cannon fodder to protagonists, from being manipulated to actively taking control, this time they don't fight the supporting female characters or follow the old path; they only focus on changing their fate and, incidentally, enjoying the sweetest couple.
老祖宗魂穿真千金，全家读心当团宠 | "The Ancestor Transmigrate Into the Body of the Real Heiress, the Whole Family is Mind-Reading and Pampered"

Huang Xiao Zai, Ma Xiao FanXie Nanxi, the patriarch of the Xie family, was an avid gossipmonger who exposed all the secrets of the immortal realm, earning her the nickname "The Immoral True Lord." Unexpectedly, one day, her gossip landed on her own head: "What?! I'm childless?" Learning that her descendants had all been harmed by a fake heiress and had gone to the underworld, Xie Nanxi had no choice but to beg the Heavenly Emperor for help. However, in exchange, she, having committed a great act of immorality, had to personally descend to the mortal realm to undergo tribulation. Xie Nanxi transmigrated into the body of the Xie family's true heiress, but her family unexpectedly overheard her innermost thoughts and awakened one after another. Under the patriarch's guidance, they defied fate and changed their destiny!
掌中求鸾 | "Seeking the Phoenix in the Palm of the Hand"

Zhu Jing Xu, Lan Xin YanPrincess Zhao Heyang, from a fallen kingdom, becomes a prisoner of the new emperor, Zhou Xi. He hates her for her cruel betrayal ten years ago, and uses this agonizing imprisonment to avenge the humiliation of that time; she endures his humiliation today, willing to die to preserve the truth of the past. When Zhou Xi discovers that Zhao Heyang's frail body stems from her testing medicine to prolong his life; when Zhao Heyang sees that beneath Zhou Xi's overwhelming hatred lies an undying love, will this extreme, torturous romance ultimately lead to their mutual demise, or to mutual redemption? "Zhao Heyang, your life is mine. I want you to live, hate me, or love me again."
月光下的秘密契约 | "The Secret Contract Under the Moonlight"

Li Xin Yan, Guo XiangGu Yusheng, a werewolf, accidentally had a relationship with Su Beichen while trying to escape the experiments of the perverted professor Gu Chuan. They had twins, Xiao Qi and Xiao Yu, and she subsequently went into seclusion with the children. Four years later, Su Beichen fell critically ill, and Xiao Qi used her umbilical cord blood to save her father, triggering the CEO's global search for his family. Gu Chuan and Bai Molin repeatedly plotted to expose Gu Yusheng's identity, and Su Beichen gradually accepted his wife and children's werewolf identities, working together to fight the crisis. The story revolves around identity exposure, family acceptance, and the struggle between good and evil, showcasing the protection and growth of an atypical family.
嫁君心 | "Marrying Your Heart"

Lin Xiao, Kong Yu QianSu Miaomiao unexpectedly transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder female supporting character, forced by her husband to choose a father to bear her child. Tearfully, she chooses Xiao Jin, who appears to be a blind musician but is actually a ruthless tyrant. She uses herself as bait, leaving behind a sachet as a pact. Sure enough, after regaining his senses, Xiao Jin forcibly takes Su Miaomiao into the palace. She plays hard to get, using the emperor's favoritism as a weapon, meticulously plotting to overturn the tragic ending of the novel and make her heartless husband suffer the consequences! Unexpectedly, the cold-faced crown prince's gaze grows increasingly intense. In this carefully calculated scheme, who will fall in love first?
闪婚小孕妻被全家团宠 | "A Pregnant Wife Married in a Flash is Pampered by the Whole Family"

Lin Fei Yu, Pan Tao XuanCollege student Shen Shuman meets Gu Qingsheng, a wealthy young master, and they accidentally develop a relationship. However, Gu Qingsheng mistakenly believes she has stolen secrets and tests her repeatedly. Shen Shuman suffers bullying from her older brother and sister-in-law, but the three elders of the Gu family dote on her, facilitating a contractual marriage between the two. During this time, Yin Qiushui, Li Weile, and others repeatedly plot against her. While protecting Shen Shuman, Gu Qingsheng gradually falls in love and discovers that the child is actually his. In the end, the villains' conspiracy is exposed, Li Weile's true identity is revealed, Shen Shuman safely gives birth to twins, and the two truly love each other, gaining the full approval of their families and jointly taking charge of the Gu family's future.
沈总，请签收你的小太阳 | "Mr. Shen, Please Sign for Your Little Sun"

Zhang Shao He, Su LiangDue to a personnel error, undergraduate student Song Tinghuan ends up working at Changqing Group as the caregiver for the disabled CEO, Shen Yuqing. Her optimism and resilience win over the withdrawn Shen Yuqing, who takes care of his daily life, assists his recovery, and helps him deal with the betrayal of his ex-fiancée, Qi Xue, and his friend, Xu Jiachang. During this time, feelings develop between them. Shen Yuqing regains control of the group, helps Song Tinghuan's parents find their relatives, and ultimately, they fall in love. Shen Yuqing proposes with an extended wedding leave, and Song Tinghuan successfully gets married.
被读心后，我靠嘴硬心软躺赢了 | "After Being Mind-Reading, I Won by Being Tough on the Surface"

Li Jia Hao, Wang Xiu XiuShi Yuanyuan, a modern practitioner of traditional Chinese medicine, transmigrates into a book as Lu Yuanxiu's deceased ex-wife. After being bound to a villainous female supporting character system, her mind-reading ability malfunctions, allowing the Lu family to hear her thoughts. Relying on her ancestral medical skills, the system's assistance, and her "tough on the outside but soft on the inside" nature, she exposes Wang Dafang's marriage fraud and Li Fenglan's child-swapping scheme, rescuing Lu Caimin, Su Tong, and others from their tragic fates. She also fights against Lin Wan and her accomplices' conspiracies. Meanwhile, she and Shi Yuanxiu gradually develop genuine feelings for each other, starting as a nominal couple. Ultimately, she distinguishes herself in the scientific research field, takes over as chairman of the Shi Group, and achieves a double success in her career and love life.
玉碎锁韶华 | "Jade Shatters, Youth Locks Away"

Chen Yan Lin, Zhou Yu LingPrincess Yin Zhiyu of the Great Yin Dynasty, after seven years of wandering among the common people, was found by her father, Emperor Yin Xuanjin. However, due to past blood feuds, she was deeply estranged from her father and suffered further persecution from her substitute, Murong Yan, who sought to protect her honor. From disfigurement and torture with burning coals to nearly being cut in half at the waist, Yin Zhiyu survived through her resilience and the royal heirloom. The young general Jiang Yan, who had been in love with her since childhood, always protected her with his life, helping her uncover conspiracies and punish unfaithful men and corrupt officials. After experiencing life-and-death trials, father and daughter resolved their differences, and Yin Zhiyu finally saw the truth in Jiang Yan's heart. In the end, she married Jiang Yan, achieving a happy ending in a grand ceremony.
被抢老公后我在末世吃喝不愁 | "After My Husband Was Stolen, I'm Living a Life of Plenty in the Apocalypse"

Xiao Yang, Li Qian LeBefore the apocalyptic heatwave, Xie Ying was betrayed and murdered by her stepsister Xie Jiaojiao and her husband Gu Shan. Reborn, she preemptively binds herself to a resource system, saves the tycoon Fu Yanjing, obtains a black card, and frantically hoards supplies and builds a safe house. Meanwhile, Xie Jiaojiao steals Gu Shan, convinced he will awaken his system, and mocks Xie Ying for her excessive hoarding. The apocalypse arrives as expected, but Gu Shan's system fails to awaken, plunging the three into dire straits. Xie Ying, however, survives thanks to the system's preservation function and abundant supplies. Later, she joins forces with Fu Yanjing to uncover the villains' conspiracy, establish a survivor base, and lead humanity in finding hope for survival in the post-apocalyptic world.
唯见君心 | "Only Your Heart is Seen"

Chen Rui, Wen Yi ZhenSu Tangyue, a seemingly innocent but actually ruthless vengeful queen, enters the palace disguised as a weak and innocent girl to rescue her imprisoned mother and clear the Yuwen family's name of treason. However, she is unexpectedly made empress by the old emperor, plunging her head into the cannibalistic vortex of the harem. On the surface, she is gentle and obedient, but in reality, she is highly skilled in martial arts and possesses unparalleled wisdom. On one hand, she tears apart the schemes of her half-sister, Consort Jia, and confronts the machinations of her biased father, Su Zhao. On the other hand, she sets her sights on the seemingly unassuming but actually ambitious and cunning Prince Mu Yunfan, who becomes the sharpest "knife" on her path of revenge.
死在帝王封妃夜，他哭红眼 | "He Died on the Night the Emperor Conferred Titles His Concubine, He Cried Red-Eyed"

Wang Yu Gang, Chu Qian YueAfter General Qin Wange died at Yanmen Pass, her mother used puppetry to temporarily preserve her body. Emperor Gu Changjue saw her "sitting" by the window and promised to make her empress. On their wedding day, however, beneath the red veil lay the bride's remains. He dissected the body to verify the truth, only to discover that his youthful affections had been misplaced. With the truth shattered, he went alone to his death beyond the pass, while her ashes were taken away by his deputy general. From then on, the legend of the emperor and empress being buried together was never repeated.
朕忙着统一，不做亡国太子 | "I'm Busy Unifying the Country, Not Becoming a Crown Prince of a Fallen Kingdom"

Feng Jun Xi, Kou Shi LingTransmigrated Li Yan becomes the "sycophantic crown prince" of the Xia Kingdom, while the original owner of this body is infatuated with Princess Wei Yun of the Wei Kingdom, betraying his country for personal gain. After awakening, Li Yan forcefully slaps Wei Yun in the face, joins forces with Princess Ji Qingyan of the Jin Kingdom, subdues the demoted general Han Shizhong, and seizes military power. Faced with his muddle-headed, sycophantic father, his wicked empress, and the conspiracies of the Wei Kingdom, Li Yan decisively stages a coup, seizes power, and ascends the throne. He develops the economy, reorganizes the army, purges traitorous officials internally, and uses schemes to instigate internal strife within the Wei Kingdom.
共度春山万重难 | "Overcoming Countless Hardships Together"

Ming Chuan, Wang Ru Wei (RAW)Huo Jinyu once swore in the snow that he would marry no one but Jiang Tingyu, but she turned around and entered the deep palace in her phoenix coronet and wedding robes. Huo Jinyu rose to become the powerful prime minister, stepping over bones, and his first decree was to order the death of her, the late emperor's concubine. Everyone said he hated her to the bone, but they didn't know that the white silk ribbon concealed his unspoken love for years. Only when she truly closed her eyes did the bloody truth come to light—that parting at the palace gates years ago was a sacrifice of her life's freedom for his life. Heartbroken, Huo Jinyu abandoned his wealth and glory, seeking death at the border amidst mountains of corpses and seas of blood, only to see his old friend again.
