燎原之烽火1945 | "The Flames of War 1945"

Shen Hao Nan, Lu Lu LuTo escape assassination, the dashing heiress Han Wanning kidnaps the playboy Gu Yeting, posing as his lover and sealing their "contractual marriage" with a kiss. They appear loving in public, but test each other in private. Han Wanning is actually "Flying Eagle," a member of the Communist underground, tasked with assassinating Japanese experts. Meanwhile, "Owl," a member of the Kuomintang's secret police, is carrying out the same mission, and clues point to Gu Yeting. Gu Yeting also senses that Han Wanning's identity is not simple. Amidst family infighting and external crises, Gu Yeting secretly helps her on several occasions, even suffering a whipping from the Kuomintang for helping Han Wanning transport medicine, though he conceals his injuries. After experiencing the sacrifice of comrades and eliminating the traitorous Uncle Han, the two share life and death, their feelings for each other deepen, and their trust in one another grows stronger.
掌上红裙 | "The Red Dress in the Palm of My Hand"

Li Zhuo Yang, Ma Le JieReborn and reborn, she finds herself on the very day of her wedding. Rumors abound in the capital that Qi Yuan'an, the jewel of the Qi family, and Fu Tingzhou are a match made in heaven. Only Zhou Yanqing knows that this grand wedding is merely the prelude to her demise. In his previous life, he hid his deepest love and fled to a distant land, ultimately unable to prevent her sudden death from illness. In the end, he could only hold her body in the flames, completing a belated suicide pact. In this life, only a stubborn resolve remains in Zhou Yanqing's eyes. A lover is like a flower; if he cannot cultivate it well, then she must leave. He shatters worldly gossip, willing to bear the infamy and stain his hands with blood, to reclaim this fragile white moonlight from his manor.
不求真心求苟活，奈何帝王偏爱我 | "Not Seeking Sincerity, But the Emperor Favors Me"

Yang Peng Cheng, Ye Xin XinJiang Yingli, seeking a peaceful life, married the unfavored Prince Su as a concubine. Unexpectedly, her husband, Xiao Chenglan, ascended the throne. Despite lowering her rank to avoid conflict, she was showered with the emperor's undivided favor, making her a target of envy and resentment. Xiao Chenglan used the throne as a pawn, eliminating powerful families and executing her enemies, protecting her from humble beginnings all the way to the position of Empress. Their four years of affection in the Prince's residence ultimately transformed into undivided favor in the deep palace.
攻略苗疆少主 | "Conquering the Young Master of Miao Territory"

Chen Tian Xiang, Zhi Chun HeModern girl Chu He transmigrates into a book, finding herself trapped in the perilous Miao region, becoming a sacrifice to a "mother Gu"! On the brink of death, she utters a wild claim to the Miao youth who has emerged victorious from a sea of ​​corpses—"I'm carrying your child!" From that moment on, the mad Gu master joins hands, their bond forged in lies! He is Chi Yan, the young master of the Gu witchcraft, a heartless and ruthless killing machine, driven only by a single desire, obsessively possessing this woman who speaks only lies. Together, they step out of the bloodthirsty Gu domain and into the bustling world of the Central Plains.
撕婚 | "Tearing Apart the Wedding"

Liu Xiao Xu, Zhu Rong JunA written contract conceals his decade-long silence. Marriage as a bond, a cage woven with tenderness—is this marriage, which began with lies, a prison or a final destination? When the mask of marriage is torn away, how will the hatred and love be settled?
薄情侯爷痴情妾 | "The Heartless Marquis and His Devoted Concubine"

Yi Hang, Lin Qiu NaiXu Ruyin, a refugee, was taken to the manor of the powerful Marquis of Zhenyuan, Gongzi Fu. To repay his kindness, she became Gongzi Fu's loyal follower. Gongzi Fu's secret care for her fostered feelings in Ruyin. Ruyin discovered a portrait of "Ada" in the study, realizing she was merely a substitute. Heartbroken, she faked her death to escape. Five years later, they met again on the battlefield. Gongzi Fu, poisoned and blind, was on the verge of death, but Ruyin, now the leader of the Yue Kingdom's secret guard, "Aheng," saved her. After surviving a life-or-death ordeal and uncovering the truth of what happened years ago, the two completely trusted each other and joined hands to rule the world.
转正后，我嫁老板一胎三 | "After Becoming a Regular Boss, I Married My Boss and Had Triples"

Zhang Bei Xi, Deng Xin YueLin Xi comes from a rural background. Her mother suffers from Alzheimer's disease and her memory is deteriorating. Lin Xi is an excellent student and was admitted to a top university in the country to study finance, hoping to give her mother a better life. However, she is defeated by reality. She is suppressed in the workplace because she has no connections and it is difficult for her to get a permanent position. Just when her mother is about to forget her, she meets Huo Zhiheng, who has been drugged. After having a relationship with him, she receives a notice of promotion. She hates herself for selling her body to get a permanent position and begins to avoid Huo Zhiheng at the company. However, her entanglement with him becomes deeper and deeper. After learning that Lin Xi is two months pregnant, Huo Zhiheng takes her home and begins to pamper his wife.
得偿所愿 | "My Wish Fulfilled"

Li Meng Ran, Cheng ZiBefore meeting Jiang Yu, Yin Lan, a powerful businesswoman, was the helmsman of the Leading Group. Born into a prestigious family, she took over the family business from her grandfather through her own abilities and propelled the group to new heights. It wasn't until Jiang Yu revealed Yin Lan's subconscious despair with the words, "There's an emptiness in your eyes that reflects unfulfilled desire," that she, though denying it, frequently thought of this college student with clear eyes after returning to the concrete jungle.
遇你听欢 | "Meeting You, Listening to Joy"

Wang Yan Xin, Cui Xiao XuanSong Tinghuan, a recent college graduate, unexpectedly becomes the nanny of Shen Yuqing, a business tycoon. Initially, she wanted to refuse her employer—but ultimately chose to "bow to reality." Through their bumpy but loving relationship, they build a tacit understanding of mutual respect, with Song Tinghuan often using humor to defuse the heavy atmosphere. She is determined to heal his deep-seated emotional wounds, while Shen Yuqing, initially resistant, wavers and ultimately succumbs hopelessly. This relationship is never a one-sided affair—they heal and are healed in the process of growing closer, achieving profound mutual growth—a two-way journey. It turns out that the most moving light is the reflection in each other's eyes.
云廷心上月 | "The Moon in Yun Ting's Heart"

Chen Yun Ting, Zhang HanQin Yannian transmigrated into a novel as a cannon fodder female supporting character. Because she was infatuated with her second cousin, Shen Shi'an, she frequently bullied the family's adopted son, Shen Zhiye. However, Shen Zhiye was the male protagonist of the male-oriented novel "The Treacherous Minister." As the adopted son of the Shen family, he had suffered bullying for over ten years, and his true identity was a prince who had been living in seclusion. After recognizing her as a relative, his first act was to massacre the entire Shen family, and Qin Yannian also died tragically. To defy fate, after sleeping with him, she decided to increase her stakes, dumping her second cousin and striving to marry the future ruthless Shen Zhiye, attempting to become his regent's wife and escape death. However, conquering the crazed male protagonist while also protecting the entire Shen family was proving to be incredibly difficult.
纸扎店老板娘她是玄门大佬 | "The Paper Craft Shop Owner is a Master of the Xuanmen Sect"

Chu Zi Jun, Cui Shi YiChen Zhaoyuan, a powerful figure in the Xuanmen sect who has lived for a thousand years, hides in a small town running a paper-craft shop, a recluse. Greedy, protective of her own, and with a fiery temper, she also suffers from partial memory loss. Decades ago, a friend who had shown her kindness arrives seeking help with his dying grandson. The infant's strange behavior shatters the peace, and evil spirits begin to appear in the ancient town, bringing to the surface long-buried Xuanmen grudges and fragmented memories. Using paper as her weapon and magic as her blade, adhering to the principle of "actions speak louder than words," she vanquishes demons and unravels mysteries along the way, uncovering hidden secrets.
这一秒上瘾 | "Addicted in This Second"

Min Jie, Zou Yi LinIn her previous life, Ruan Qiongwei mistakenly married He Mingyu, only to be betrayed by him and his cousin Xia Nannan, discovering that the marriage was nothing more than a scheme to seize the family fortune. Reborn, she is determined to seek revenge, and unexpectedly reunites with He Mingyu's uncle, He Jinchuan, whom she had once saved. At the family banquet, Ruan Qiongwei publicly retaliates, but at that moment, He Jinchuan bursts in, his identity revealed, creating suspense.
不再遗憾的夏天 | "A Summer Without Regret"

Wang Yao Cheng, An Qi'er, Li Zhi Yao, Chen Si (Special Appearance)The story revolves around a swimming team comprised of troubled members, often described as "monsters and demons." Yang Mumu, relegated to a substitute role due to an ear ailment, plots to defeat the transfer student "genius" Lin Yu in an effort to return to the competition. However, she is forced to form a mixed relay team with the arrogant heiress Yu Kaixin and the straightforward Wang Pengyu. During preparations, Yang Mumu notices something amiss with Lin Yu, discovering his true identity as Lin Hao, the younger brother who impersonated his deceased brother. The four go from initial conflicts to facing secrets and difficulties together, gradually building their bond. Seven years later, they reunite and decide to reform their team, ultimately finding themselves on the competition field and making up for the regrets of their youthful summer.
炮灰白月光归来，爆改全家剧本 | "The Cannon Fodder's White Moonlight Returns, Completely Rewriting the Family's Script"

He Yu Yang, He Ling YaoShen Qianhe tragically dies in a fire while protecting her two younger brothers, only to discover that the world she lives in is actually a novel, and she and her brothers are cannon fodder supporting characters. Devastated, Shen Qianhe opens her eyes to find herself transported to the tenth year after her death, embarking on a journey to save her brothers.
甜蜜陷阱 | "Sweet Trap"

Qin Chen Chen, Wang YuAfter being mistakenly kissed by a wealthy young master in Beijing's elite circles, Ruan Li unexpectedly awakens a "bullet screen perspective," discovering she's actually the villainous supporting character in a melodramatic soap opera. To escape the plot's control, she schemes step by step, outwitting a scheming younger sister, exposing the hypocritical male lead, and engaging in a sweet and competitive battle with Fu Shiyu, a wealthy young master disguised as a poor school heartthrob. When the truth is revealed, the two join forces to defy the script, staging a thrilling and sweet romantic comedy of revenge!
才下眉头，却上心头 | "Just Left My Frown, Yet Rising to My Hear"

Liu Hao Yuan, Wen Qing, Ling Yu WenLin Jianshu is reborn seven years in the past, only to discover that her husband, Lu Zhaoye, has also been reborn and chooses to save Bai Yu. In despair, she is rescued by Ji Hanjian, the captain of a rescue team. Lin Jianshu sees through Lu Zhaoye's true colors, decisively breaks off their engagement, and unexpectedly marries Ji Hanjian. After their marriage, Lu Zhaoye and Bai Yu repeatedly provoke her, but Ji Hanjian always protects her. Lin Jianshu uses her technical talent to reclaim the company, and Ji Hanjian's identity as a wealthy heir in Beijing's elite circles is revealed. Ultimately, Lin Jianshu completely breaks free from the past, and she and Ji Hanjian live happily ever after, achieving a blissful ending.
错婚成宠：换个老公去领证 | "Mistaken Marriage Becomes Pampered: Going to Get a Marriage Certificate with a Different Husband"

Wang Huai Jing, Guo Yi HuiCosmetic formulator Duan Zhiruo is betrayed by her fiancé and adopted sister at her engagement party. Heartbroken, she proposes to Ji Sinan, a down-on-his-luck older man who has also been abandoned, in a public display of affection. The two enter into a whirlwind contract marriage. Zhiruo mistakenly believes Ji Sinan is destitute and uses all her savings to support him, making him a stay-at-home husband while she focuses on her cosmetics business. Unbeknownst to her, Ji Sinan is actually the powerful head of the Ji Group in Beijing. He hides his identity, silently protecting Zhiruo and secretly helping her when she faces company framing, industry blacklisting, and revenge from her adopted sister. Amidst their comical interactions, feelings gradually develop between them, and what began as an accidental, ill-fated marriage slowly evolves into a mutual commitment.
闺蜜齐穿嫁豪门！要跑一起跑 | "Best Friends Transmigrate and Marry into Wealthy Families! We Run Away Together"

Jia Xin Yu, Ai YiSu Yu and Jiang Yi unexpectedly transmigrated into a novel after a plane crash, becoming two irreconcilable sisters-in-law in the Fu family, destined to be cannon fodder. To save their lives, they agreed to save money and run away. After transmigrating, Su Yu changed her original self's mischievous nature, using her charm and cuteness to win over the obsessive and domineering CEO Fu Yanchen; the aloof Jiang Yi, on the other hand, subverted her simp persona, gradually winning over the crazy top star Xiao Han. Together, they faced crises such as a wicked mother-in-law, a white moonlight (ideal love interest), and the original female lead, while simultaneously making money and dealing with their respective husbands, but in the process, they developed genuine feelings for each other.
偏偏深爱你 | "I Just Love You Deeply"

Yi Yang, Zhang Mu Tong (RAW)Four years ago, Xia Wan was tricked into leaving home to save Fu Siye, giving birth to a genius baby alone. Four years later, she returns with the FX formula, disrupting his wedding at a press conference. Fu Siye interrogates her while begging for reconciliation, their bodies burning on a cliff edge. In a life-or-death moment, Xia Wan sacrifices her life for her child, and Fu Siye protects his wife with his life. Mysteries of wealthy families, business battles, viruses, substitutes, and twins unfold in a series of twists and turns. In the end, the family of three joins forces to send the villains to prison. Yet, their love remains unwavering, even unto death.

Tang Shu Ya, Yang Fan (RAW)Shen Yao was an orphan from a general's family. The emperor, pitying her, arranged a marriage for her. In her previous life, Shen Yao married Crown Prince Xie Jingchu, but suffered endless humiliation in the Eastern Palace. After her death, Shen Yao was reborn and returned to the arranged marriage banquet. This time, facing the emperor's second arranged marriage, Shen Yao chose the handsome and unparalleled Prince Jing, who was severely injured in a battle and lay unconscious. After marrying Prince Jing, Xie Yuan, he miraculously awoke. Shen Yao received respect, protection, and love from him, and the two gradually developed feelings for each other. Meanwhile, Crown Prince Xie Jingchu gradually awakened to his memories of his past life, realizing he regretted losing Shen Yao, and began to relentlessly pursue her.
此生若得萧俞白 | "If I Could Have Xiao Yubai in This Life"

Zeng Hui, Li Ke YiLi Zitian, a country girl with a birthmark on her face, was sent to the palace by a portrait of a woman of unparalleled beauty, becoming Emperor Xiao Yubai's "dream lover." However, on their first meeting, Xiao Yubai angrily accused her of "deceiving the emperor," yet forced her to play along, driving away his fervent suitors. Their initial dislike gradually turned into genuine affection, but Li Zitian was assassinated while protecting Xiao Yubai, suffering from "half-month amnesia" afterward. Xiao Yubai, setting aside his imperial dignity, repeatedly helped her rediscover each other, falling in love again, using love to combat the cycle, proving that memories may fade, but love will not.
温柔猎手 | "The Gentle Hunter"

Duan Mei Yang, Zheng Chen YuThree years ago, Zeng Xinyi was forced to study independently due to family constraints, and her life was shrouded in darkness. An unexpected encounter led her into the world of the mysterious man Yang Haichao. After spending a night together, Zeng Xinyi quietly left. Three years later, Zeng Xinyi started working at Yang Haichao's company, and the two met again. Yang Haichao's long-suppressed emotions finally erupted. From frivolous curiosity to genuine protection, gentleness served as bait, and the hunter ultimately became the prey.
紫罗兰之恋 | "The Violet of Love"

Lin Feng Song, Tan Yan Yan (RAW)The newly appointed CEO turns out to be her ex-boyfriend, the one she adored in her dreams but dumped in reality! Now, Xu Si'an is a cold and aloof boss, while Qiao Xu is his humble assistant. He appears distant, but secretly catches her in his office, accusing her of stealing her dog after their breakup. Qiao Xu only wants to quit and run away, but he keeps her by his side with an exorbitant penalty for breach of contract. Until he reveals the tattoo beneath his shirt—an old scar blooming with her favorite violets. Four years ago, she abandoned him with the cruelest lie. Four years later, he's determined to mend their broken relationship at all costs. This long-awaited reunion is his carefully planned scheme. A cold, aloof, and secretly passionate executor vs. a stubborn yet soft-hearted and prickly assistant—join me in making love last forever!
放任男友青梅做勇敢小羊 | "Letting My Boyfriend's Childhood Sweetheart Be a Brave Little Lamb"

Gao Ming, Bai YeJiang Jinyi, the heiress of a billionaire, is reborn the day before she was killed by her boyfriend, Gu Yiheng. In this life, she no longer stops her self-proclaimed "brave little lamb" boyfriend, childhood sweetheart Liu An'an, from running rampant in the workplace, calmly watching her ruin important client banquets and destroy valuable gifts. Jiang Jinyi secretly establishes Jinhua Company, poaching the core team from her former company and using her abilities to reclaim key projects. During this process, she meets and falls in love with Pei Zhiyan, the intelligent and aristocratic heir of Beijing's elite circles. Ultimately, at her father's birthday banquet, the snobbish nature of Gu Yiheng's family is fully exposed, leading to their disgrace and ruin. Meanwhile, Pei Zhiyan proposes to her in public, and Jiang Jinyi achieves success in both her career and love life, ushering in a new chapter in her life.
周教授，这次换我哄你 | "Professor Zhou, This Time It's My Turn to Coax You"

Wang Bo, Zhu Jia NiJiang Songchu is reborn from a fire, returning to the year after her arranged marriage with Zhou Qi'an four years prior. In her previous life, she was abandoned by her boyfriend Lin Tian, ​​only to witness her ex-husband Zhou Qi'an risk his life to save her. Reborn, she decisively distances herself from the scumbag and actively approaches Professor Zhou, who appears cold on the surface but deeply loves her. The two gradually grow closer through testing and attraction, facing workplace struggles, family conspiracies, and obsessive entanglements together. In this life, Jiang Songchu decides to bravely love, cherish the man willing to give his life for her, and embark on a warm, mutual love story.
假千金她绑定了假大佬 | "The Fake Heiress is Bound to the Fake Boss"

Min Jie, Xie Xiao WeiJia Xingxing, a fake heiress, is reborn five times, each time harmed by her fiancé Lu Jingxing and her adopted sister Lu Wanqing because of her identity. In her sixth rebirth, on her 20th birthday, she wishes to summon Pei Zichen, the male protagonist of her comic book, and the two develop feelings for each other. Jia Xingxing publicly rejects the marriage proposal, and when her identity is exposed, she faces it calmly. Fortunately, she is protected by her grandmother and accompanied by Pei Zichen, and together they thwart the Lu siblings' conspiracy, finally becoming a couple. However, the system determines that Pei Zichen has violated the rules, and he must choose between losing his memory and returning to the comic book or living with his memories for three months.
闪婚死对头，顾总他宠妻无度 | "A Flash Marriage with His Nemesis, President Gu Spoils His Wife Insatiably"

Huang Hao Wen, Wu XinThe heiress of the Jiang Group, in her past life, was misled by a scumbag and lost the Jiang family business to another. She was also tortured to death in a mental hospital, only to realize her mistakes before dying. Reborn, she decisively marries her nemesis, Gu Yunzhi, the head of the Gu Group. Gu Yunzhi's father abandoned his first wife after achieving great success, leaving him with the stigma of being an illegitimate child. Although she and Jiang Wan were bitter enemies in her past life, she admired Jiang Wan's abilities and methods, sharing a mutual respect. After Jiang Wan's death, she was betrayed by the second male and female leads and died in a car accident. Reborn, after agreeing to the marriage alliance with Jiang Wan, she joins forces to punish the scumbags, becoming a fiercely protective husband. Together, they turn the tide and regain control of their own destiny.
恶毒千金被陆少缠上了 | "The Vicious Heiress is Entangled with Young Master Lu"

Yu Di, Gan Rui QiShen Qiyue was framed by her adopted daughter Wen Ling, branded as "vicious," and ostracized by her family and betrayed by her fiancé. At her engagement banquet, she became the laughingstock of the city, but she fought back fiercely, personally sending her biased family to the police station, beginning her counterattack. All of this was witnessed by the heir apparent, Lu Shiye. From the moment she fell to her lowest point, he no longer hid, forcefully entering her world, simply because she had protected him in his childhood. The two joined forces to tear down pretenses, destroy rivals, and sever family ties, fighting side-by-side in both career and love. When the truth was revealed, her enemies were defeated, she was cleared of her name, and he finally won her heart.
前任蓄谋已久成顶头上司 | "The Ex-Boyfriend's Long-Planned Becomes My Boss"

Wei Jia Le, Zhang Yu LinQiao Xu, from an ordinary family, had been deeply in love with Xu Si'an for nearly three years. On the eve of graduation, Xu's mother forced her to leave with a million-dollar check, which she refused. However, her father passed away due to problems with surgery costs. While grieving, she witnessed Xu Si'an entering a bridal shop with his arranged marriage partner, Shen Zhiwei. Heartbroken, she left with her beloved dog, Cherry. Afterwards, Qiao Xu was consumed by self-blame and suffered from depression, believing she had nothing more to do with Xu Si'an. Unexpectedly, four years later, Xu Si'an became her new boss and specifically requested her to be his personal secretary.
外室一身反骨 | "The Mistress is Rebellious"

Wang Zi Yi, Wang Wan ZhongSong Qingran transmigrates into the body of Prince Ning Zhuo's infatuated concubine. Ning Zhuo pays her 500 taels of silver a month to play the role of a concubine in order to refuse a princess's marriage proposal. Unexpectedly, the prince can hear Song Qingran's inner thoughts and begins to become curious about her. When Ning Zhuo sends the siblings Ning Xiaobei and Ning Xiaochun to live with her, the two children are initially hostile towards Song Qingran and play pranks on her many times, but Song Qingran cleverly defuses them all. Ning Zhuo, who hears Song Qingran's inner thoughts, gradually develops feelings for her, and they confess their love to each other.
天降盲盒，我在古代成首富 | "A Blind Box Falls from the Sky, I Become the Richest Man in Ancient Times"

Geng Zhi Xin, Yang Fu YuQiao Xiyue transmigrates into the body of a peasant woman in ancient times, bound to a blind box system that allows her to rise from humble beginnings. Using rare and valuable items obtained through the system, she starts as a street vendor, eventually opening a shop that becomes a sensation throughout the city, and her life flourishes. The only drawback is that her husband is mentally challenged. Qiao Xiyue uses the system to unlock magical items and dedicates herself to treating her husband. In their time together, she gains wealth and a good reputation, and gradually develops feelings for her "foolish husband." As the treatment progresses, her husband's true identity and past secrets are revealed. Together, they overcome numerous challenges and ultimately find happiness and true love.
放牛的星星 | "The Cowherd's Star"

Wu Zhong Yuan, You YangA mishap during the company's annual party screen projection leads illustrator Xia Zhi to the horrifying discovery that the sharp-tongued CEO she constantly criticizes is actually her online boyfriend, the one she's been asking for a picture of his abs. Their secret relationship struggles amidst misunderstandings and their vastly different social statuses, with the CEO's unpredictable behavior and the involvement of a mysterious heiress. When all her grievances are unleashed in a breakdown of questioning, he finally uncovers the truth: his deliberate distancing was a calculated step towards a brighter future for her.
洛泱公主 | "Princess Luo Yang"

Lv Yue, Ma Qiu YuanIn her youth, Luo Yang fell in love with Rong Jingzhan at first sight and traveled to the Great Chu to pursue her true love. The two were deeply devoted to each other, but the struggle for the throne of Great Chu plunged them into turmoil. Rong Jingzhan, misled by others, mistakenly believed that Luo Yang had betrayed him and married his enemy, leading to their estrangement. After Rong Jingzhan returned with his revenge and ascended the throne, he imprisoned Luo Yang in the deep palace. Due to misunderstandings and the instigation of others, he treated her with coldness and cruelty, neglecting Luo Yang's grievances because of his favoritism towards others. While another woman who had once helped him enjoyed great favor, Luo Yang endured endless suffering alone.
让你公司做牛马你让总裁生了俩 | "You Made Your Company Work Like a Slave, But You Made the CEO Have Two Children"

Ma Fa Yang, Wu Ruo YiChu Ning is unexpectedly bound to the "Ox-Horse System," requiring him to maintain his lowly worker identity and keep his savings below 10,000 yuan to gain superhuman abilities. Hiding his identities as the brilliant strategist "Ning" and the bestselling author "Mingyue," he works as a lowly employee at Zhuoyue Company, earning a meager 3,000 yuan a month. However, he unexpectedly becomes neighbors with the new president, An He. Their relationship evolves from misunderstandings and neighborly misunderstandings to tentative advances and growing attraction in the office. Chu Ning uses his disguise to earn extra money to pay his mortgage while navigating workplace challenges and a family crisis. Ultimately, he reveals his true identity, protects his lover, and their fake relationship blossoms into a happy marriage, beginning a sweet life together.
假戏真做上瘾了 | "Addicted to Taking the Fake Relationship For Real"

Li Ke Lin, Han YueAfter the car accident, Yan Xi feigned amnesia, intending to test her fiancé Fu Linzhou's concern for her. Unexpectedly, she stumbled upon his affair with her best friend, Shen Manni. Even more shocking for Yan Xi was that Fu Linzhou lied, claiming his good friend Huo Yanshen was actually her boyfriend. Yan Xi feigned cooperation, calmly navigating the relationship between the two men, trying to uncover the truth behind the betrayal. However, Huo Yanshen's true identity and his real purpose in approaching her became a mystery even more perplexing than the betrayal itself.
难哄失忆小青梅 | "Hard to Coax the Amnesiac Childhood Sweetheart"

Zhang Zhi Peng, Jiang LaiSu Youyou, a heiress suffering from amnesia, is forced into a marriage with business tycoon Han Yuchen to avert a family crisis. Unbeknownst to her, this aloof "brotherly friend" is actually her forgotten lover, whom she has silently protected for five years. When the boy's figure haunts her dreams, and a persistent suitor relentlessly pursues her, Han Yuchen decides to shed his disguise. Su Youyou, however, is unaware that the man who captivated her in her dreams is now, as her fiancé, launching a gentle offensive of memories, protection, and a renewed love.
青蘅 | "Qingheng"

Huang Xiao Zai, Cheng Shuo NanDu Qingheng, the legitimate daughter of the Marquis of Yongchang, is deeply in love with Shen Zhan. However, she fails the imperial examination for female officials because Shen Zhan favors her adopted daughter and forces her to marry the tyrannical emperor Wei Xiao. After entering the palace, she uses her intelligence to work with Wei Xiao to reform the court and eliminate corruption in the examination system. Shen Zhan later learns of Du Qingheng's evil deeds, but it is too late for repentance. Du Qingheng achieves top honors in the special imperial examination, realizing her ambitions, and joins Wei Xiao in protecting the country. Shen Zhan, on the other hand, resigns from his post in sorrow and goes into seclusion.
创飞原著后，我成商业巨鳄 | "After Reading Chuang Fei's Original Work, I Became a Business Tycoon"

Chen Kui Jun, Mi LiModern girl Jiang Chuyue transmigrates into a novel as an abandoned fake heiress. She decisively severs ties with her snobbish adoptive parents and returns to her impoverished biological parents. Utilizing her modern knowledge and design talent, she starts by selling handmade buttons at a street stall, gradually building her business from collecting duck feathers to opening a clothing factory and creating the brand "New Moon." She also teams up with Pei Chuan, a young man from an overseas Chinese family, to start her own business. Throughout this journey, she repeatedly thwarts the schemes of the real heiress, Su Qing, ultimately winning a fashion competition, reuniting with her wealthy grandfather, inheriting the family business, and achieving success in both her career and love life.
下乡后，我靠养崽横扫全村 | "After Going to the Countryside, I Swept Through the Entire Village By Raising Children"

Wang Bai Yuan, Ma Jing YuanZhu Zhuohua, a modern Sanda champion, transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder female supporting character in a period drama. Forced to go to the countryside, she is bound to a child-raising system, needing to earn "care points" for her unborn child to exchange for survival supplies. She kicks her scumbag fiancé, tears apart her scheming adopted sister, and leads her entire villainous Zhu family to reform. To clear the name of her child's father, Lu Zhiye, she deals with awful relatives to accumulate points while using a truth-telling potion to expose conspiracies. In the end, she makes a comeback and returns to the city, embarking on a thrilling life with Lu Zhiye.

In private, she secretly gathered evidence for a divorce, while he gladly delivered the sharpest blow to his brother's marriage. They tacitly understood that this was a dangerous game where each got what they wanted. She used him for stimulation and revenge, while he craved the novelty and contrast of her. Li Meng Ran, Ma Le JieA marriage contract sealed her fate, and she quietly married into a top-tier wealthy family. Alone on her wedding night? Until the Gu family crisis and the Wang family conspiracy erupted one after another, she turned the tide at the board meeting with a flick of her wrist and achieved legendary status at the racetrack. When the files of the massacre sixteen years ago resurfaced, everyone was horrified to discover—they hadn't mocked the parasitic vine clinging to power, but rather the vengeful goddess who had returned as queen. She just wanted a peaceful life, but by a twist of fate, she sleeps with a "security guard," thus beginning a perilous life of "running away with a baby." He Cong RuiWitnessing his parents' murder, Wei Xia, once an outstanding student, had to endure infamy and self-degradation to protect his younger siblings. Ultimately, he successfully dismantled the criminal network, remaining steadfast in his original aspirations and completing a long-standing act of protection, dedicating his life to fulfilling his responsibility as an elder brother and his unwavering commitment to justice.
莫将晚霞落黄昏 | "Do Not Let the Sunset Fall at Dusk"

As the incense burned out and her obsession dissipated, the two men who were willing to defy fate for her finally made her understand—some farewells are for beyond the cycle of reincarnation.

Xu Wangshu gained the trust of the Song family matriarch through her medical skills, but became embroiled in the power struggles and family conspiracies within the warlord's mansion. She discovered that her stepmother, father, and the warlord's wife were actually her mother's murderers, while Song Huai'an fell deeply in love with her and was willing to fight against the world for her. Lu Chengxi, who has long harbored feelings for Shen Xinghe, secretly helps her reclaim her rights. Through their maneuvering, Shen Xinghe gathers evidence of Jiang Shulang's infidelity and asset transfer. Together with Zhao Jiaxin, she exposes the truth at a shareholders' meeting, successfully removing Jiang Shulang from his position and leading to their divorce. Ultimately, Jiang Shulang is arrested for embezzlement, and Shen Xinghe, together with Lu Chengxi, embarks on a new chapter in her career and love life.
爱上九千岁 | "Falling in Love With the Ninth Thousand-Year-Old"

穿书后，我写的男主他失控了 | "After Transmigrating into a Book, the Male Lead I Wrote Went Out of Control"

Knowing she'll ultimately meet a tragic end, and that Jin Shichen will be redeemed by a reborn female lead, Wen Yuan decides to distance herself from the plot and enjoy a life of luxury. However, faced with Jin Shichen's relentless pursuit, the villain Lu Yan's treacherous schemes, and the original female lead's impending return to the country, she discovers the plot has completely veered off course. Xue Shao, though eccentric and tyrannical, dotes on his adopted sister, naming her Xue Yu. He hires a master to teach her both literary and martial arts, uses a poison doctor to heal her illness and strengthen her body, and secretly helps her regain the fighting power she possessed in her previous life.

The three even collectively submitted blank exam papers to help her get first place. After graduation, Lin Wanxing joins He Jiangye's Shengjing Group. With the help of Qin and Gu, she gets rid of difficult colleagues and escapes her dysfunctional family. Facing the oppression of He Jiangye's brother He Zhiqi's identity and business conspiracies, Lin Wanxing uses her keen insight to expose the mole, helping Shengjing Group resolve a supply chain crisis and thwarting the opponent's power grab plot.
婚后，把死对头钓成翘嘴 | "After Marriage, I Turned My Nemesis into a Beloved"

Cui Xu Zhong, Xie Han JieJi Ruochu, the patriarch of the Ji family, is forced to marry Jiang Wang, her high school rival and a spoiled brat, because her younger sister, Ji Ya, elopes with Jiang Xu, the eldest grandson of the Jiang family. To maintain the family's reputation, Ji Ruochu is pressured to compromise. After marriage, the two go from mutual hostility to gradual compromise. Ji Ruochu disciplines Jiang Wang with calm and assertive methods, while Jiang Wang, seemingly rebellious, gradually falls in love. Together, they face family struggles, Xie Yao's machinations, and the conspiracy of a business marriage, their feelings deepening amidst the conflicts. Ultimately, Jiang Wang reforms, Ji Ruochu becomes pregnant and gives birth to twins, the Jiang family accepts their relationship, and the story ends with the two facing the future together.
偏心过后,我光芒万丈 | "After Favoritism, I Shine Brightly"

Nie Han Dan, Zhao Ying NanLin Wan's parents favored her older sister from a young age, giving her a dowry of 1.2 million yuan while giving her younger sister, Lin Wan, a four-piece bedding set costing only 398 yuan. To avoid ruining her sister's livestreaming career, the biased parents pressured Lin Wan to cancel her wedding. Heartbroken, Lin Wan secretly held a lavish wedding with her boyfriend. Unbeknownst to her family, Lin Wan's boyfriend wasn't a poor laborer, but a wealthy man who had benefited from land expropriation. A year later, her sister fell on hard times, and the biased parents and selfish sister pressured Lin Wan to lend them money. Lin Wan refused to forgive them.
玫瑰与忠犬 | "Rose and Loyal Dog"

Fan Gao Po, Wen JieXia Yutong is reborn back to the night she was tricked and lost her virginity. She resolutely abandons her wealthy fiancé Zhou Hengzhi and chooses the devoted but impoverished Su Yuanzheng. Using her memories from her past life, she actively guides their relationship, joining hands with Su Yuanzheng to return to their hometown and start a business, cultivating roses and developing a floral art enterprise. Together, they fight against sabotage from a scheming best friend, suppression from powerful families, and internal family conflicts, protecting their love and dreams amidst thorns. Ultimately, they not only create a renowned rose estate but also allow everyone to witness the power of true love and the magnificent rise of an ordinary person.
